Comment: Jumped well, pressed on early to take a handy position on the rail behind leader, ready to strike turning in, quickened to take control of the race near 300 M and stayed on well to fend off the late challenge of the runner-up.
Slow to begin, hard ridden to take closer order in midfield 3-4Ls off the pace, kept to inside on straightening, responded OK and put in good work towards the finish.
Bounced out, always prominent in 2nd, kept on OK on straightening but lacked the extra gear to figure in the finish.
Slowly away, had to be shaken up early, gradually shuffled back to rear and was visibly struggling turning in, eased final 100 M and never threatened.

Taken back on jumping, assumed a rearward position as usual and raced 7Ls behind leader, used little in running, did not have the clearest of runs early in straight but made some late impression once into clear near 200 M.

Quickly into stride, attempted to make all in its first attempted over a mile, led at a steady tempo but inclined to hang out making the home turn, headed soon in straight and faded rapidly thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)

Reasonable jump from the inside barrier, held up towards the rear 6Ls back, shifted out in search of a clear passage on turning, took time to muster in straight but stayed on well enough inside 200 M.
Drawn wide, drifted back on jumping and settled in a rearward position about 6Ls behind leader, caught wide making home turn, showed little dash and was one-paced to the line.
Average jump, maintained a post in mid-division 3Ls back, moved closer when pace slowed down on the turn, held every chance but found little under pressure, weakened inside 150 M.

Away with them, restrained to race in midfield 5Ls back, crept closer on turning, brought with a run inside 400 M down the centre of track, came very close inside 50 M but could not peg back the winner.
Positioned behind midfield 2-wide with cover. From shortly after the 400 M until near the 200 M, was held up and unable to obtain clear running. Turned in a good performance.
From a wide alley was taken back in the early stages however was unable to gain cover and race wide back in the field for most of the trip. Ran to the line soundly.
Slowly away and settled in last position. Made usual late headway.

From the outside gate travelled wide in the early stages then was taken back to race in 2nd last position 3 to 4-wide with cover and was hampered near the 800 M. Came down the outside in the straight and plugged away.
Raced 3 back the fence. At the 250 M after being held up and unable to improve from on straightening, was checked when disappointed for running. Couldn't recover properly.
Slow to begin however used plenty of petrol to stalk the leader on the fence. Was gassed early in the straight.

After the 1200 M, when racing wide and without cover, was steadied and taken back, however, was unable to obtain cover and continued to travel wide for the remainder of the race behind midfield. Kept on well in the straight.
Raced handy to the leaders 2 deep with cover before being shuffled back near the 800 M and racing midfield 1 off with cover. Worked to the line well.
In the middle stages and in the home straight hung out whilst leading. Stayed on well after being challenged near the 200 M.
Travelled with the rear division 2-wide with cover, and was hampered near the 800 M. Not likely.
A little slow to begin and was inconvenienced soon after. Settled towards the rear along the fence , was hampered near the 800 and never really got into the race.
Worked forward from a wide barrier to land 3 back and travel 2-wide with cover. Responded well under hard riding to draw away and hold a margin in the run to the post.
Positioned outside the leader then mid race was carried out into a 3-wide line without cover. Struggled in the final stretch. (Irregular heart rhythm, to trial).
Raced behind midfield the fence. Railed up in the run home then made good ground over the final stages after peeling out near the 100 M.
Jumped well and was taken back to race behind midfield. Closed off strongly and swept past rivals to take control final 100 M.
Botched the start and raced in rear section. Ran on fairly and made up some ground in the straight.
2 to 3Ls off the lead but was wide and without cover. 2Ls down turning in and gradually faded in the straight.
Slow into stride and was ridden along to take the lead. Maintained advantage going into home straight but was headed 300 M out. Unable to find extra in the final stages.
Jumped awkwardly and raced at the rear. Trailed field into home straight and made up ground over beaten runners.
Raced along the rails at midfield. Switched out after straightening and closed the race off nicely.
Jumped well and was allowed to drop back to race behind midfield. Quickened on straightening and closed the race off well.
No worse than midfield. 3-wide making the turn and ran on fairly in the straight.
Niggled along early and raced within 3Ls of the leader. 2-wide and 2Ls off the lead turning for home. Weakened after straightening.
Dropped to the rear from widest draw. Near the back and was wide turning for home. Lacked a response and weakened in the straight. (Mucopus.)
Off slowly and raced in rear section. Made up some ground in the straight.
Led early stages. Behind the pace making the turn but regained lead shortly after straightening. Kept on only fairly thereafter and failed to keep advantage final 200 M.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Better than midfield. 2-back on the fence making home turn. Ran on well in the straight for a minor placing.
2-wide around midfield some 4Ls from the pace through to final 400 M, recovered a little late ground down the centre without threatening to place.
In 5th or 6th throughout, 3Ls or 4Ls off pace at halfway, flanking winner and with place prospects turning in, failed to quicken up.
Fractious in gates and slowest out, 7Ls last in middle stages, slightly further back off final turn, switched out at 300 M but never dangerous.
2-wide and 1L back in 2nd at the 1000 M, every chance when 3rd entering homestretch, fizzled out very tamely in last section and no excuses.
3-wide with cover 4Ls back in mid-division from middle stages until entering straight, ran on well in the straight to place and nearly got 2nd.
Raced in 10th out 2-wide about 5Ls from the speed through to final 400 M, no impression.
Caught 3-wide without cover throughout, 3Ls from the speed at halfway but pressured turning in, eased down final 200 M when all chance had gone.
Best away and led on fence by 1L at 1000 M, set the pace before being headed 300 M out, one-paced and tipped out of the money inside final 50 M.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Went back from a wide gate, 5Ls or 6Ls behind leader in rear group until straightening, never likely to improve any better than midfield.
3-back the rails in midfield about 4Ls from the speed until the 600 M, picked up from 4th off home turn to lead 50 M out, kept on well.
Tardy break, in 12th position throughout at least 6Ls from the pace, conceded further ground in the straight.
One from rear about 7Ls back at the 1000 M and no closer off last turn, plodded on home at the one pace.
2Ls back in 5th at 1000 M with cover, niggled along before final bend and yielded ground rapidly and eased down. (Heart irregularity.)
Held up in 12th or so about 6Ls from the pace down back straight, further back spinning for home and turned in a flat effort overall.
Midfield about 5Ls back out 2-wide at 1000 M, checked at 800 M and about 6Ls down swinging for home, ran on again late to be nearest at finish.
Never going well, pushed along when 6Ls back in 8th at 1000 M, faded out and eased down in final 200 M.
Best away and led by 2Ls on rails at 1000 M, headed at top of the home straight, one-paced and steadily faded out of the money.
Pressed on out 4-wide no cover at the 800 M when 4Ls back in 6th, niggled along to lie up turning in, kept on dourly but didn't cede any further ground.
2-wide and 2Ls back in 3rd at 1000 M, led at top of home straight and only ground down by the winner in the final stride.
Slowly away, never travelling very well nor better than 5Ls off pace in midfield until the final turn, nearest at the finish but still in mid-division.
Enjoyed a soft run tracking the leader in 2nd or 3rd right until home straight, no excuses for not being able to at least place.
Very poor run, 8Ls last at 1000 M and became further detached inside the final 500 M.
8Ls back in 10th at the 1000 M and not much better off entering home straight, always well held.
3-back on fence about 4Ls off speed in 4th at 1000 M, 3Ls down turning in, needed the full length of the straight to lead on the line.
Trapped 3-wide no cover throughout, 2Ls back in 4th at halfway, slightly further back into last 400 M, responded well to pressure and nearly won.
Taken back from wide gate, 9Ls off speed in rear at 800 M and only marginally closer turning in, ran on past a few stragglers to wrap up.
Rearward throughout, 8Ls back in 11th initially and continued to chase the majority of the field.
Slow away, settled at rear, 7Ls off the good pace 3 to 4-wide, progressed steadily 250 M. Nice debut.
Pushed forward and occupied the box seat, closed the race off strongly 300 M and scored deserved victory.
Hard ridden to obtain a more prominent spot in front of midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the good pace on the fence, no progress in straight.
Midfield along the fence, 5-1/2Ls off the good pace, made ground steadily 300 M to grab 3rd.
Hard ridden to share the lead at good pace 2-wide, applied pressure throughout, led briefly 300 M, overhauled 150 M, ran on for 2nd.
Midfield, 5Ls off the good pace 3-wide, just held ground in straight.
At rear, 8Ls off the good pace 2 to 3-wide, no progress in final stages.
Settled in front of midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, travelled comfortably, however no turn of foot in straight.
Midfield, trapped 4-wide and lost ground, 5Ls off the good pace, just held ground in final stages.
Hard ridden forward but failed to join the lead, sat 1-1/2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, raced flat after straightening, out of fuel 250 M.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Hard ridden to take the rail and difficult to settle when share the lead at good pace, under pressure on bend, soon emptied 300 M.
Never competitive at rear, tailed out. (Irregular heart beat.)
Behind midfield, 6-1/2Ls off the good pace, raced 5-wide throughout and lost too much ground, still ran on ok to the line despite negative racing situations.
Began well, settling on rails in midfield. Kept on steadily in straight without quickening.
Began well but held up in rear of midfield. Similar turning in but failed to quicken under pressure to threaten.
Refused to settle and raced wide in last few throughout.
Broke well from the widest draw. Raced wide without cover in forward of midfield. Kept on before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Soon outpaced and trailed the field in first 400 M. Remained in rear of field to straight. Made no progress.
Always well behind. Hampered approaching home turn and shifted widest when last into straight. Made no impression.

Travelled wide in midfield far side. Took closer order coming out of back straight to be 3L 3rd around home bend. Sustained progress to hold every chance over 200 M out but unable to follow through in closing stages.
Quickly ridden to hold rails run in 3rd or 4th never too far off. Boxed in for a run in straight until after 200 M. Responded well once into the clear. Did best work at the finish.
Driven along for pace early, travelling in midfield. Commenced run turning for home. Made moderate headway without threatening.
Lost ground at start. Raced wide towards the rear. Kept on without quickening down centre of straight. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Tracked leader. Came to tackle shortly after straightening hitting front over 200 M out. Just lasted.
Fair start. Soon took up running and crossed 1000 M out. Held clear advantage to straight but swamped when no extra shortly after straightening.
Always in last few. Made no impression in straight.
Slow out. Travelled just worse than midfield to straight. Shaken up to challenge over 200 M out. Finished off race well.
Away with them, rolled along the Stand's rail in a position behind midfield, dropped out of contention 600 M out and finished tailed-off. (Jockey reported the horse had unbalanced action.)

Standard jump, gradually crossed to the centre of track and settled handily behind leaders, accelerated in fine style when asked to go near 400 M, won going away despite drifting to the outside rail. A truly impressive performance.
Quickly into stride, pressed on to take up running against the Stand's rail under a steady tempo, under pressure approaching 400 M but kept on OK to the line.
Settled in a rearward spot on the outside of field, raced without cover throughout the race, had little to offer when the race got serious, just plugged away to line.
Slow into stride, moved forward to take closer order in midfield along Stand's rail, found little off the bridle near 400 M.
Even break, held up in midfield, asked for effort inside 400 M but responded only fairly, ran flat passing 200 M.
Slow into stride, settled in the rear early, moved closer from 600 M, made even progress inside 400 M, checked 50 M out.
Well enough away, restrained to race towards the rear in early stages, crept up closer midway, brought with a challenge 350 M out, kept on well but unable to cope with the progressive winner.

Up with the pace from the start, inclined to hang out through early parts, driven from 300 M but was picked off easily by the eventual winner, shifted in abruptly inside 50 M and lost out on 2nd at the finish.
Travelled prominently in a position 2-deep from the Stand's rail, pressed near 400 M but lacked a finishing kick, kept on at the one pace towards the line.
Jumped well, raced near the pace in front, inclined to hang out under pressure, dropped out rapidly from 300 M. (Mucus.)
Assumed a rearward position after jumping out and travelled 3Ls behind leader, ran on steadily towards the line without threatening.

Allowed to drift back and raced 3-wide in rear division 4-5Ls back, improved with trail to bend, into clear running at 300 M, let down smartly and quickly had rivals covered, drew away final 200 M to win easily.
Only fair to begin, settled behind midfield 5Ls back in running line, same margin down turning, tracked through at 350 M but just kept on at one speed thereafter.

Limited pace early and soon at tail, raced 7Ls off pace on fence, still same margin down rounding bend, steadied at 300 M when improving, didn't get much of a crack thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Amongst first few to jump, positioned nicely 1 out 1 back 2Ls away, had no excuses to bend, eased 4-wide on straightening, improved briefly but peaked at 250 M and just held ground thereafter.
No pace early, drifted back to 2nd last 6-7Ls back in running line, not asked to bend, made a wide run turning in, some limited progress to 200 M but plugged thereafter.
No real speed, positioned 5Ls away on rails, enjoyed a quiet run throughout, steadied and in traffic when turning, made steady ground along inside in straight.
Out in line, ended up 3Ls away on rails, enjoyed a good trail in mid-section, still behind horses turning, made good progress along inside to take placing.

Began well, pressed on from a wide gate to race outside lead, relaxed well in run, travelled strongly and took over shortly after turning in, held advantage to 200 M but no match with winner's turn of foot late.
Standard jump, failed to muster and ended up in midfield 4Ls away, had a good run to bend, improved between horses at 400 M, looked a place hope inside 250 M but couldn't dash at business-end.
Out with them, pressed forward however unable to slot in, posted 3-wide without cover outside of leaders, still challenging rounding bend, soon under pressure when hard run took toll, faded quickly.
Began fairly, went forward but forced to cover ground, raced 2Ls back with cover in mid-section, 4-wide turning but lacked extra gear in straight and just battled.
Bounced out, went on to race more prominently leading field up, set an even tempo in front, shaded soon after turning in, didn't fight and gradually weakened out.
Away nicely, took ideal spot behind leader on rails, not made use of to bend, eased out turning in and looked a brief threat at 300 M, just maintained same pace in run to line.

No early pace, positioned behind midfield 7Ls back in 2-wide line, suited by strong pace in front, came to middle on straightening, made even progress but lacked usual finish and just held ground inside 200 M.
Modest jump, drove through to race 6-7Ls away on rails, difficult to setting but had an easy time to bend, held up soon after turning and never got a crack in straight. Not fully tested.
First to hit ground, pressed forward in search of lead, overraced and drew clear of rest in pace battle, did work to bend, no pick up at 300 M and weakened out after a hard run.
Slow out, settled in rear division 9Ls off speed, helped by strong tempo, saved ground on bend, took inside runs in straight but no real progress final 300 M.
Began with rest, pushed up late midfield 6Ls from front runners, ridden along on turning to hold spot, run ended by 200 M and plodded thereafter.

Out only fairly, posted wide before angling into running line first turn, raced 5Ls back off strong speed, improved turning, let down at 300 M and kept giving to hit front inside 150 M and score deserved victory.
Began nicely, slotted into 1 out 1 back position 3Ls from solid pace, travelled well despite tempo, kept improving turning and made run with winner, out dashed last 100 M but held on creditably.
Out with rest, lacked early pace and drifted back soon after raced 2nd last 10Ls away in 2-wide line, fast pace at top end suited, switched wide turning, closed nicely down centre to take placing.

Even jump, angled back to slot in but caught 3-wide early, dropped in to running line 7Ls back on bend, travelled evenly turn, looked a chance at 300 M but lacked usual dash and just held ground final 200 M.
Amongst first few to break, ended up trailing leader 3Ls behind solid speed, came off heels to challenge at 350 M, there to 200 M but couldn't lift last bit.
No early pace and assumed usual position at rear more than 10Ls off lead, aided by strong pace, still a clear last turning, made many lengths down middle of course to make frame.

Amongst fastest out, showed usual pace to take up running, worked throughout and set solid pace with pressure from outside, fought off challengers soon after turning but hard run took toll and flattened last 200 M.
Midfield on rails far side. Took closer order entering straight. Made steady headway down inside but did not find much room closing stages.
Settled just worse than midfield. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M. Nearest at finish. (Tactic questioned.)
Raced 3-wide behind midfield. Made up some late ground inside final 200 M.
Gradually settled in 4th within 3Ls of speed. Closer up in box seat turning in. Obtained a clear passage over 200 M out and responded well to take charge shortly afterwards. Convincingly.
Settled in midfield. Kept on early in straight before gradually fading under pressure inside final 200 M.
Slightly slow out. Remained well back into straight. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M.
Sluggish at start. Settled just worse than midfield on rails. Did not find too much room early in straight. Made only modest impression inside final 200 M.
Began awkwardly losing ground. Last when hampered 1100 M out. Still well behind into straight. One-paced in the run home.
Raced wide in midfield to straight. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Raced 3-wide without cover in prominent 3rd. Fought on well to gain 2nd in a bob of heads.
Broke well. Travelled in better than midfield to straight. One-paced.
Raced up with the pace from the widest barrier. Crossed for rails run over 1000 M out. Led the field until overhauled passing 200 M.
Ridden for early pace, settling in one-out-one-back position in 2nd. Disputed lead turning for home but had no answer to winner's late burst of speed close to home.
Fair start. Gradually settled in rear of field. Made only moderate headway down centre of straight. Never nearer.
Taken back on jumping from the wide barrier, raced as the backmarker through early and middle parts, made some headway on straightening but was never a threat.
Bounded in the air on jumping, showed customary early speed to track leaders in a handy position, ready to strike turning in, unable to find another gear under pressure and kept on only one paced.

Quickly into stride, took up running but was unable to cross to the fence, ridden 300 M out, had a long duel with the eventual 2nd down the straight but both were nailed down by the fast-finishing winner on the line.
Slow to begin, shaken up to hold a position behind midfield about 5Ls back, pressed from 400 M but again lacked the speed to put in an effective blow.
Standard jump, hard driven early to be right there with the leaders but was forced wide without cover, under pressure on top of the straight and gave ground from 300 M.
Began well enough from the inside barrier, hard ridden early to maintain a rearward position 4 to 5Ls back, made even progress on straightening without troubling the first 4.

Blundered at the start, had to be rushed up to hold a prominent position early, negotiated the turn well enough, showed battling qualities to outrun the rival on his outside but was caught by the eventual winner close home.
Began in line, assumed a midfield spot 3 to 4Ls off the pace, didn't negotiate the turn smoothly, soon out of contention on straightening, dropped out inside 200 M.
Broke well, guided to a midfield position along the rail 3Ls back, gradually peeled out in search of running space on turning, made up plenty of ground inside 300 M to be nearest on the line.
Away with them, restrained to settle near the rear trailing 6Ls to leader, had plenty to do coming off the bend, ran on fairly down the outside but no threat overall.
Slow to begin, pressed on to take closer order behind leading group, brought with a challenge entering 350 M, responded well and was able to wear down the leaders over the concluding stages.
Travelled 3-wide with cover in midfield. Came wide in the straight and found some extra over the final stages to finish a sound 2nd.
Didn't muster early speed and coursed wide and without cover behind the pace in the early stages. Pressed on mid race to travel outside the leader, 3-wide still no cover. Struggled in the straight.
Ridden along early to lead and by the 800 M had shifted in to be on the paint. Was gassed inside the furlong.
Worked forward to race as equal leader early, 3-wide with cover. Managed to slide into the 1 off line near the 800. Faded in the straight.
Raced in a midfield position, 2 deep with cover. Picked up well when asked for an effort and found plenty to draw right away and win well.
Slow to begin and settled in last position. Worked through some openings in the run home and closed off satisfactorily.
Was crossed near the 800 M, and then tracked the leader along the fence from then on. Had no excuses.
Settled in 2nd last position. Made some late headway.
Positioned behind the speed 3-wide with cover. Never looked a winning chance.
Travelled 1 out 1 back early. Was shuffled back 1 position after the 800 M. For a considerable distance after the 400 M was held up and unable to improve. Paddled over the final stages.
No worse than midfield and stayed within 3Ls of the leader. Under pressure at 500 M but lacked the needed response. Kept on same pace thereafter.
Settled around midfield. 2 to 3Ls off the lead at 400 M. Kept on well final stages to deny rival late.
Kept within a length of the leader. Unable to quicken and stayed on same pace final stages.
In rear section. Lacked a response under the whip and ran home without quickening.
Trailed field until 300 M. Made up some late ground over beaten runners.
Kept pace with leader in a forward position. Stayed on well in the final stages to make the frame.
Jumped well and raced in the lead. Kept advantage until being headed final 100 M. Unable to find extra to remain in contention. (Blood in trachea.)
Midfield and 3 to 4Ls off the pace. Struggled to keep up at midway point and ran on without threatening.
Settled in midfield. Kept on steadily in the final stages.
Ridden early but showed no speed. Raced towards the rear and never quickened in the final stages.
Off slowly. Niggled along and steadily made up ground. 2 to 3Ls off the lead at midway point. Kept on well final stages but came up a bit short at the line.
Raced within 2Ls of the leader. Kept on fairly in the final stages to make the frame.
4-wide no cover towards rear down back straight, slipped back to 8Ls last at halfway, ran on again in the straight but without threatening. (Mucus.)
Slowly away, 5Ls back in 4th on fence at halfway, further back in 4th turning in, stayed on okay but still missed a share of the money.
Taken back from widest gate and soon 7Ls last, same margin behind turning for home in midfield, quickened up to lead inside 100 M, kept on.
Always one from rear, 8Ls behind at the 800 M and further back and struggling turning into final 400 M, continued to chase majority of the field.
3-wide no cover down back straight, got in 2-wide when 2Ls back at 800 M, 4Ls back in 2nd off last bend, one-paced while hanging in the straight.
Slowly away, always worse than midfield and about 9Ls behind swinging for home, never on terms.
Midfield about 4Ls behind early pace, 7Ls down and niggled along to try stay in touch entering stretch, one-paced to conclude.
Box-seated in 3rd on fence at first, about 5Ls back in 3rd turning in, stayed on fairly well for 2nd but lacked the pace of the winner.
Always towards rear and at least 5Ls from the pace, offered very little threat.
Led by 2Ls on fence at 1000 M, skipped 4Ls clear turning for home, same margin ahead at 200 M, tired and headed inside final 100 M and just held 3rd.
3-wide no cover early disputing early pace, still close-up 1L back in 2nd off last bend, found nothing under pressure.
3-back on the fence at the 1200 M, still reasonably close-up entering home straight but quickly faded in final quarter. (Bled.)
Slowly away and one from rear about 6Ls off pace at 1200 M, 4Ls back in same position off last bend, plodded on past a few stragglers to finish.
About 5Ls back in 11th down back straight, a little closer swinging for home, stayed on well for a place without matching pace of quinella pair.
Keen early on, 4Ls back in 9th in middle stages, darted to the lead 300 M out and only ground down by the winner inside final strides.
Slowest away, midfield about 3Ls or 4Ls from the speed through to home straight, stayed on okay to clearly take 4th.
Awkward break, midfield with cover about 3Ls back at halfway, checked and held up at top of straight, did very well to lead inside final strides.
Worse than midfield down back straight, left 4-wide no cover on circle and 5-wide about 2Ls off pace into home straight, very weak final 200 M.
Unacceptable performance, raced 3-wide no cover on pace at first, struggling to remain in touch off last bend and surrendered tamely, soon eased down.
Disputed early pace out 2-wide then box-seated in middle stages and ridden along to remain within 2Ls of the pace into final quarter, steadily faded out.
3-wide with cover in midfield about 3Ls off pace at halfway, 1L down in 3rd making last bend but yielded ground quickly.
Disputed early pace on fence, 1L clear off last bend but headed 300 M out and dropped out very rapidly. (Questioned for disappointing performance.)
8Ls back in rear at 1200 M, very wide (6-wide) and still last off last turn, emptied out and eased down, unacceptable performance.
One from rear at halfway about 6Ls from speed, midfield about 3Ls down turning for home, had his chance to place but his run soon peaked.
Hard ridden for a long distance to pressure outside the lead, harmed by the fast pace, ran on well until 150 M out of fuel. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent early but soon dropped to midfield, 4Ls off the fast pace along the fence, lacked room 400 M, just held ground when clear.
Pushed early but failed to join the pace group, 4Ls behind the fast pace 2-wide, soon dropped off 400 M.
At rear, 9Ls off the leaders, raced 3 to 4-wide and lost ground, suited by the fast pace, however only ran on fairly in final stages.
Eased to sit behind midfield, 6-1/2Ls off the leaders 3-wide, suited by the fast pace, progressed steadily 500 M to score.
Pushed to cross in front and took rail, then settled in box seat, not suited by the fast early sections, blocked most of straight, just ran on. Not fully tested.
Eased at start, 8-1/2Ls off the leaders 3-wide, favoured by the fast tempo, made ground steadily 300 M to finish 2nd.
Pushed for a prominent spot, 2Ls off the leaders 2-wide, not suited by the fast tempo, held ground in straight.
Hard ridden to take the rail and shared the lead at fast early sectionals, pressured throughout and used up too much fuel, hung on strongly until 150 M overhauled, just missed 3rd.
Hard ridden forward, 2Ls behind the leaders, trapped 3-wide throughout without cover and lost ground, harmed by the fast pace, ran on well until 150 M flattened.
Behind midfield, 6Ls off the leaders 2-wide, helped by the fast tempo, made minor ground to 200 M, held up 100 M.
Eased back, settled 7-1/2Ls off the leaders along the rails, benefited by the fast pace, made ground 250 M to grab 3rd.
Not far off onto course proper, one-paced under pressure in the run home while hanging causing inconvenience to rider.
Settled towards rear of early bunched field, kept on well to the line.
Prominent down centre of straight track, failed to quicken under pressure to threaten when things matter inside final 200 M.
Never seen with a chance, always struggling well behind.
Soon crossed to stands rails and never far off in 3rd or 4th, fought on under pressure but could not make any progress.
Soon took up running to make all, defeated the weak field with good authority.
Behind midfield of bunched field early, soon yielded ground once onto course proper.
Began well, close up 2nd along stands rails, unable to cause any threat, winner too good.
Not far off early, gave ground from approaching course proper, found nothing under pressure.
Broke well, settled in rear of early bunched field about 4Ls off the speed on stands rails, fought on nicely from halfway but without making ground on winner.
Settled in last few of early bunched field about 4Ls off, gradually faded inside final 300 M.
prominent to halfway mark, weakened under pressure once onto course proper. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Slow to begin, difficult to settle, pressed forward from a rearward spot to share lead near 1000 M, under pressure rounding the home turn, soon out of contention, dropped out inside 200 M.

Taken back from wide barrier, crossed to fence and raced in a rearward position 6Ls off the pace, briefly had to wait for a run on straightening, made some headway down the inside without threatening.

Jumped well from the inside barrier, had a comfortable trip along the rail 5Ls away from leader, urged along approaching home straight, made some progress inside 300 M but unable to bridge the gap with leaders.
Well enough away, gradually drifted back to the rear trailing 6 to 7Ls behind, moved closer on turning, met with traffic early in straight, ran on well once into clear entering 250 M.
Began well, maintained a 3-wide position behind midfield, taken wider making home turn, responded only fairly under pressure, no extra inside 200 M.
Broke well, taken to a handy position just behind leaders after crossing from an outside barrier, unable to sprint with them when asked, kept on one-paced to the finish.

Standard jump, guided to a midfield position on the fence 3 to 4Ls back, travelled well enough going into straight, made his run from 400 M but never looked like catching the winner. Lost out on 2nd close to the line.

Slow to begin, ridden early to stay closer to the pace before settled behind midfield 4Ls back, peeled out making home turn, took time to gather speed on straightening, did his best work late and was closest on the line.
Ordinary jump, failed to muster early speed, soon settled in rear trailing 6 to 7Ls to leader, struggled from 500 M, lacked finishing kick and ran on one-paced to line. (Blood in trachea.)
Slightly slow out, hard driven to take up running, pressed by horse on outside approaching home turn, found little when asked, headed near 350 M, weakened noticeably inside final 200 M.
Quickly away, travelled in a position better than midfield but was very keen in his running, unable to quicken up on straightening and gave ground from 300 M.

Good start, prominent early then eased back to midfield, gradually crept up on the outside rounding home turn, picked up well to lead 350 M out and found enough to hold on as challengers came at him on both sides inside 200 M.
Moderate jump and drifted back to race 3 wide at rear, 8Ls off speed, had cover in mid-section, still well back to bend, made many lengths widest in straight to be closest on line.
Began in line, unable to slot in, pressed on 3 wide without cover to race 3Ls back, did share of work to turn, hard run took toll and weakened out in straight.
Slow out, ended up back with last few best part of 8Ls away on rails, not asked in mid-section, set big task turning, made fair progress but unable to break down margin.
Away with rest, ended up 4Ls back on rails, had an easy time on rails, travelled well enough to bend, didn't pick up but just battled away under hands and heels riding.
First out, led early but checked to take a trail, enjoyed easy run in middle stages, still there to bend, didn't let down and gave ground last 200 M.
No early pace, ended up sharing a 9Ls back, still rearward on bend, severely checked by fallen horse and lost plenty of ground, never factored thereafter.
Out with first few, went on to adopt 1 out 1 back position, had no excuses in run, into clear on turning and briefly challenged at 300 M but just maintained same pace.
Behind midfield on rails, travelled well to bend, fell at 500 M.
Out with rest, ended up 3 wide in midfield 5 to 6Ls back with cover, continued to cover ground to bend, lacked extra gear but just held ground evenly in finish.
Out with rest, elected to take a midfield trail 4Ls off speed, raced on rails but shifted 2 wide before bend, not used to turn, closed off nicely final 300 M to take placing.
Standard getaway ended up behind midfield 7Ls back, travelled evenly in mid-section, made a 5 wide run rounding bend, kept coming gradually making same late impression without threats.
Began evenly, took trial off pace 4Ls back in running line, relaxed well and enjoyed a good run to bend, made challenge at 300 M, kept challenging to 100 M but found winner a shade too good late.
Reasonable jump, pressed on to race outside of leader, had a fair run throughout, found little when asked on turning in, folded tamely. (Jockey reported not comfortable in action.)
Out only fairly, driven up to roll forward and take up running, set terms to suit in front, still 1L clear turning, found plenty in straight to repel challengers and hold on comfortably late.
Standard jump, pressed on to hold prominent spot behind leader, did a little bit with genuine speed on, into clear on turning but lacked a turn of foot, just held ground in finish.
No early pace, ended up 6 to 7Ls back 3-wide behind midfield, angled wider on turning, lacked needed response and struggled in finish.
Allowed to drift back from a wide gate, raced 3 wide at rear 10Ls off speed, had a trail to bend, still plenty to do turning in, made good headway down middle to be closet on line.

First to hit ground, pressed on to take up running, kept speed genuine in front, still defied rivals turning and travelled comfortably to 200 M, couldn't dash with winner but still held on nicely late.
Lacked early speed and assumed usual position near to last 10Ls back on fence, helped by speed on, still well down turning, made remarkable progress in straight to be nearest at finish.
Fast away, crossed first but elected to take a trail, raced outside leader on bend, challenged soon after turning, looked a place chance to 250 M but emptied thereafter.
Began evenly, posted 3 wide 3Ls back but did have cover, used some petrol with speed on, tightened briefly at 500 M, didn't let down turning and emptied at 200 M.
Began only fairly ridden up to race 3Ls back on fence, had ideal trip to bend, took inside runs turning, made no progress final 300 M to take placing.
No early pace, ended up best part of 10Ls back sharing rear, never nearer to bend, made a little progress before lost run 150 M, never really likely.
Standard jump, took a midfield trail, raced in midfield 5Ls back, no excuses to bend, lacked sprint in straight and just battled away at same pace.
Even jump, pressed on from an awkward draw to race outside leader, forced to race 3 wide on bend, workload took effect and stopped quickly inside 400 M.
Standard jump, ended up 8Ls back 3 wide behind midfield, had a trail to bend, switched to middle, closed off respectively making many lengths to be in frame.
Out with rest, settled 5Ls away on rails, used little in run, saved ground on turning, made some minor progress without threatening, crowded late.
Began with first few, positioned nicely 1 out 1 back 2Ls away, used a bit tracking solid tempo, produced effort, passing 350 M, quickly took over at 200 M and kept grinding to take a solid victory.
Taken back on jumping, settled in the rear trailing 8-9Ls to leader, travelled wide throughout the trip, had plenty to do turning in, didn't respond under pressure and just plugged away to line.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.

Quickly away from the inside barrier, travelled a shade keen early before settling prominently behind leaders, commenced his run near 400 M, stayed on well but unable to give serious threat to the first two.
Well enough away, taken a midfield spot on the rail 4Ls back, travelled comfortably to bend, dashed home strongly inside 300 M but the winner got first run on him. Just failed.
Quickly into stride, showed early speed to take up running, led field at slow tempo, pressed by runner on outside making home turn, headed near 250 M, battled on before weakening inside 100 M.
Slow to begin, held up patiently in the rear pack trailing 8Ls to leader, under urging making the home turn, couldn't switch to another gear and was one-paced in his finish.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Away with them, failed to muster early, assumed a position behind midfield 6Ls back, held up for a brief moment on straightening, into clear 250 M and made up plenty of ground thereafter.
Awkwardly away, in rearward position, unable to cross and was forced wide without cover throughout the race, struggled early in straight and could only hold ground to line.
Began awkwardly and lost ground, crossed over to the rail, settled in a rearward position 7-8Ls back, had a ground saving trip but found little when asked on straightening, god tired inside 100 M.
Average break, parked 2-wide behind midfield 6-7Ls off the pace, crept closer making the home turn, ran on OK in straight but was not a threat overall.
Bounced out, pressed on early to race behind leader in a prominent position, tracked well to turn, couldn't sprint with them on straightening, gave ground from 200 M.
Settled 3 back the fence. Loomed up approaching the furlong but peaked on its run well before the wire.
Raced in a midfield position 2 deep with cover. Commenced to close off fairly until the last 100 M when unable to obtain clear running.
Ridden along to take up the lead in the early stages at a fair tempo. Was pressured midrace and dueled for the lead. Faded over the concluding stages.
Raced handy to the leaders but coursed wide for much of the event, 3 deep with cover. Kept on satisfactorily in the run to the line.
Travelled close to midfield, 3-wide with cover. Peeled out turning for home and battled on well over the concluding stages.
Slowly away and settled midfield on the fence. Kept to the inside in the straight, ran on well however was unable to obtain clear running over the final 50 M.

Pressed early to land on the back of the speed and travelled 3-wide along the back straight. Gained some cover near the 700 M and once in the straight found the lead near the 200 M, and drew away to have the race well in keeping.
Was taken back from the outside barrier and travelled behind midfield 1 off with cover. Ran into traffic problems in the straight and was never tested over the final 150 M.

Worked forward to the lead early, crossed after the 800 M and shifted out to travel 1 off. Was steadied after being disappointed for run when improving near the 400 M then had difficulty obtaining clear running turning in, even finish.

Wasn't the best away then took time to muster, speared forward in the early stages. Caught wide entering the back straight and was stoked along to race outside the leader 2 to 3-wide. Battled honestly to the line.
Slow to begin and settled in last position a long way off the field. Raced greenly. Finished well back.
Began awkwardly, got its head up and as a consequence failed to muster speed in the early stages. Struggled in the straight.

Jumped only fairly and steadily moved into a forward spot. 2-wide behind the pace. No more than 3Ls off the lead in back straight. Struggled to keep up making home turn and dropped out thereafter. (Heart Irregularity.)
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground. Trailed field until home straight and was checked 350 M out. Made a brief dash on straightening but unable to sustain final 200 M.
Raced along the fence but was no better than midfield. Made a ground saving trip around home turn and was 2Ls off the lead on straightening. Kept on same pace in the straight.
3-wide and better than midfield. Started to fade making home turn and weakened in the straight.
Settled towards the rear. Made a ground saving trip around home bend. Gradually switched out after straightening and charged home strongly to run down rival near the post.
3-wide behind midfield. Ridden along rounding bend and was wide turning for home. Ran on fairly in the straight.
Settled behind midfield. Checked and swung out on straightening. Rallied and steadily made up ground in the straight to be closest at finish.
Raced 3-wide towards the rear. Swung wide turning for home and made up ground over beaten runners in the straight.
Raced 2-wide at midfield. Responded well when asked on straightening and steadily made up ground. Kept on fairly final stages but unable to turn up a notch.

Had the early lead. Took cover 1000 M out but raced keenly. Then popped out 2-wide to race alongside the lead. Opened up a length's advantage 300 M out but unable to find extra to remain in contention final stages.
Off slowly and was niggled along to a forward spot. Led field into the back straight. Disputed lead making home turn and weakened on straightening.
Raced along the rails behind the pace. Quickened on straightening and took the lead 100 M out. Kept on well final stages but was caught at the line.
Didn't break well, on fence 9Ls back in 10th at 1000 M, niggled along at 600 M, picked up very well through the field to nick 3rd close home.
2-wide and 5Ls back in 4th at 1200 M, closer and going well turning for home, led 200 M out and all out to just cling on.
No match for CLASSA SUPREME in front early, held 2nd from 1100 M to home turn, still only a neck down at 200 M, very weak closing stages.
Lost ground at the start, 12Ls last at the 1000 M, 7Ls last off final corner, stayed on well down the centre, closest at the line.
Trapped 3-wide no cover throughout, 7Ls back in 8th at 1000 M and 4Ls behind off last turn, extra work told inside final furlong.
Swerved left at start, always one from the rear, 10Ls behind at 1000 M, always chasing the majority of the field, no danger.
Went back as usual, 9Ls back in 9th at 1000 M, 4-wide (widest) off last turn when 5Ls back in 9th, ran on very strongly, only just denied the win.
Nicely placed in 'one-out-one-back' position in 3rd through to final quarter when niggled along, steadily faded out of the picture.
Hared to the front as usual, 3Ls clear 800 M out, 1L to the good at final bend, headed 200 M out, slipped rapidly through the field when beaten. (Questioned for poor performance.)
2-wide and 7Ls in 7th at 1000 M, 6th and 4Ls back making final bend, ran on okay to wrap up but had his chance to place.
3-back along the rails in 4th or 5th through to home straight when 3Ls down, one-paced to conclude.
3-back on rails in 6th about 5Ls from pace at 600 M, closer turning in, couldn't find much room on rails until 100 M out when his chance had gone. (Questioned.)
Pressed on from wide gate and easily slipped into box-seat on rails from 1200 M to final bend, dug in well to lead about 30 M out and just held on.
Over-raced at first, 3Ls back in 5th in middle stages and same entering home straight, outpaced from then on.
Scorched to lead by 4Ls about 1300 M out, soon steadied the pace and 1L clear from 800 M to final turn, 2Ls up at the 200 M, lost a place inside final 30 M.
Eased back, clipped heels about 900 M out when 5Ls back in 8th and same turning in, finished off very strongly but line came a stride or two early.
Squeezed out at start, 2-wide and 5Ls back around midfield at 1000 M, fractionally closer turning in but never likely to improve much.
Worse than midfield as usual, 6Ls back in 9th at 600 M, 5-wide (widest) off final curve, rattled home strongly and only just failed.
2-wide and 1L back in 2nd at 1100 M and still on right on terms off last bend, sorely lacking a turn of foot and well beaten by the 200 M. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Always rearward and at least 6Ls from the speed, found nothing in the straight. (Fractured cannon bone.)
9Ls back in rear at 1000 M and still last entering home straight, always well behind.
Taken back from wide gate, 6Ls or 7Ls back in 10th until home straight, stayed on well along the inside, never nearer, much improved performance.
3-back along fence in midfield about 4Ls from the front from 1200 M to home turn, remained in midfield and no threat to principals.
Trapped 3 and 4-wide no cover throughout, 2Ls back in 4th and pressed closer off final turn, one-paced but not a bad finish considering the tough trip.
Hard ridden forward but failed to take the rail, sat outside the lead and not suited by the fast pace, eased further back 600 M to sit behind leaders, soon weakened 250 M, checked 150 M.
Hard ridden early but did not muster speed, traveled behind midfield, 5Ls off the leaders 2-wide, helped by the fast pace, however blocked all straight, never tested.
Pushed to occupy the box seat, not suited by the fast early sectionals, momentarily held up 300 M, ran on ok when clear.
Eased to rear, 6-1/2Ls off the leaders 2-wide, favoured by the fast tempo, held up 4-2, made ground when clear.
Eased to sit in midfield early, however trapped 4-wide, then was allowed to go forward and sit outside the lead 600 M, hit front 300 M, flattened 100 M.
Settled behind the leaders 2-wide, 2-1/2Ls off the fast pace, just held ground in straight.
Eased back, 5Ls off the leaders, suited by the fast tempo, but trapped 3-wide throughout and lost too much ground, raced flat until 200 M but made some ground late.
Pushed to obtain a more prominent spot about midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the leaders, helped by the fast pace and the rail-run, progressed steadily 300 M to run 3rd.
Eased at start and settled at rear, 7-1/2Ls off the leaders 2 to 3-wide, helped by the fast pace, progressed steadily 500 M, dominated 150 M.
Eased to sit in midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the leaders, favoured by the fast tempo, but trapped 3-wide throughout, made ground steadily 250 M to finish 2nd.
Settled behind midfield, 5Ls off the leaders, benefited by the fast pace and the rail-run, however blocked most straight, dashed well when clear and just missed 3rd.
Hard ridden to obtain the rail and led by 1/2L, pressured throughout and harmed by the fast early sectionals, emptied 250 M.
Began fairly settling well behind, waited with, made significant progress down centre of straight, did best work late.
Began from wide draw, soon picked up to prominent 2-back position in 3rd, similar in box-seat turning in, kept on steadily without quickening.
Broke well, held back to track leader, raced one-out-one- back far side, came to challenge turning in, hit front over 200 M out for cozy victory.
Made running to 200 M, folded up quickly under pressure.
Broke well, settled 2-wide in midfield, had every conceivable hope in straight, failed to quicken under pressure.
Broke well, settled 3-back in 4th early, closer up 4th far side, ran on steadily inside final 200 M without threatening.
Soon taken back to rear, raced wide without much cover in last few far side, made steady headway on outside up Rock, 4-wide home turn, no extra in straight.
Began with others, held rails run in midfield, no clear run until 150 M, kept on same pace home.
Jumped in air, stumbled and lost ground at start, quickly recovered to worse than midfield on rails, kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Slow out, tightened passing winning post the first time, settled in last few, made no show in the run home.
Moderate start, settled 3-wide without cover in forward of midfield, gave ground noticeably shortly after straightening.
Well enough away, drifted back to hold a midfield position 4Ls back, travelled well for much of the way, picked up well 300 M out and readily came clear inside 100 M to record a cosy success.

Away with them, maintained a spot on the outside of mid-division 3-4Ls behind, crept closer making the home turn, briefly led near 200 M but was soon put in place by the winner and could not hold on to 2nd late on.
Hard driven leaving the stalls, unable to cross and was caught wide throughout, moved up alongside leaders on turning. Struggled from 200 M and faded gradually in run to line.
Slow to begin, held up patiently in the rear trailing 6-7Ls to leader. Switched wide coming off the bend, made even progress down the outside without threatening.
Bounced out, restrained to sit behind leaders who were setting a steady tempo, close enough turning for home but didn't enjoy the clearest of runs in straight. Checked near 250 M and 50 M.
Shot out of the stalls, unable to cross to rail and led field in a 2-wide position till 500 M, had slim advantage on straightening but was soon headed, gave ground from 200 M. (Lame next day.)
Quickly into stride, up with the early speed and took a sit behind the leader, travelled comfortably along the rail, boxed in on straightening and was unable to improve throughout. Not tested.
Jumped well, always prominent behind leaders, emerged as the main threat coming off the bend, asked to go near 250 M, unable to quicken up and could only hold ground to line.

Jumped well from the inside barrier, had a nice trail along the fence in mid-division, ready to strike turning in but had to be shifted out for a clear run, made ground inside 200 M to finish nearest on the line.

Bounced in the air as they began and lost ground, shaken up to remain in touch with the group, had 6Ls to make up turning into straight, given a huge task but was able to make some headway inside 150 M.
Awkwardly away and lost ground, assumed a rearward position 5Ls off the pace, made its move rounding the home turn, ran on respectably down the outside but found no extra over the final stages.

Taken back on jumping, crossed over to the rail and settled in a rearward position about 5Ls back, used little in running, into clear 300 M, ran on well and did his best to bridge the gap between the winner.
Drawn low, took up running towards the far side, drifted in badly when placed under pressure near 400 M, unable to quicken and gave ground from 250 M.
Slow into stride, travelled in midfield within the group in the middle of track, asked for effort entering 400 M but didn't respond. No impression.
Began in line, lacked early speed and had to be shaken up, travelled in a rearward position 3 to 4Ls back, under pressure from 500 M but managed to make some progress inside 300 M.
Slow into stride. Raced in the rear trailing 4Ls to leaders, drifted gradually towards the stand's rail, switched out to improve from 500 M and closed off the race strongly.
Awkwardly away, assumed a position in midfield towards the centre, moved up from midway and briefly hit front near 350 M, unable to sustain run, weakened rapidly inside 200 M.
Jumped well, enjoyed a trouble-free run down the middle of track, close enough approaching final 400 M, ran on well under pressure but had no answer to the winner's turn of foot inside 200 M.

Jumped well, travelled towards the stand side within 2Ls from leaders, brought with a challenge near 350 M, loomed up as a serious contender for a brief mement but ran flat inside final 150 M. (Bled.)
Away with them, up there with the pace from the beginning, led steadily towards the centre of field, commenced its run entering 300 M, kept on OK to line. Decent first up.

Standard break, travelled close enough to leaders towards the far side of straight, showed signs of greenness in its running and had a tendency to hang in, struggled from 350 M, dropped out rapidly inside last 200 M.
Average beginning, settled in midfield towards the far side, attempted a run down the far rail near 400 M but was hampered by a horse on its outside, ran on well thereafter despite hanging out.

Awkwardly away and lost ground, guided to a midfield spot down the centre of track, quickened tidily to briefly strike the front inside 300 M before the winner swept by. Weakened over the final stages.
Well enough away from the outside barrier, rolled along the stand's rail in a prominent position, gradually outpaced from midway, found nothing when asked inside 400 M.

Awkwardly away, tucked in and obtained cover behind leader on the stand's rail, switched out near 400 M for clear passage, picked up really well and swept past his rivals inside 200 M to score with plenty in hand. Promising debut.
Shot out of the stalls, showed good early speed to take up running down the centre of track, ridden out from 300 M, failed to pick up and gradually weakened towards the line.
Was crowded after jumping awkwardly and raced towards the tail of the field 3-wide with cover. Never appeared likely.
Was checked early and raced towards the rear along the fence. Made good ground early in the straight before peaking on its effort in the run to the wire. (Bled.)
Ridden forward to sit off the speed. Was carried 3-wide at the 800 M, then covered ground from that point on, without cover. Gave little under pressure in the straight.
Raced along the fence early in 3rd spot, hung out near the 800 M then raced 1 off. Struggled over the latter stages.
Travelled back in the field 2 deep with cover. Finished well back.
Scooted along early to take up a leading position setting a solid tempo . Faded close to home.
From an inside gate, never went to the fence coursing a 1 off line. Got the breaks in the straight and kicked well to win in good fashion.
Travelled in last position and finished tailed out. (To trial.)

From wide gate proved difficult to settle got its head up for a considerable distance in the early stages while being steadied, raced behind midfield, weakened in the run home after racing wide without cover. (Blood in trachea.)
Settled midfield and raced 3-wide with some cover. Had difficulty obtaining a run near the 250 M, was checked at that point then paddled over the concluding stages.
Began awkwardly then chased along to track the leader. Kept on strongly to finish in the frame.
Landed on the paint slightly forward of midfield. Was held up until the furlong whilst hanging in. Turned in a sound performance.
Behind midfield. Switched out turning for home but lacked the needed response in the straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced wide behind midfield. Last on straightening and weakened thereafter.
Better than midfield. 2-wide and 2 to 3Ls off the lead making home turn. Kept on fairly but unable to turn up a notch in the straight.
Had the early lead but gave it up after 1200 M. Settled behind the pace making home turn and regained lead 300 M out. Kept on well final stages to hold off rival.
Raced towards the rear. Under the whip and trailed field making home turn. Lacked a response and only ran past a beaten runner in the straight.
Dropped to the rear from widest draw. Rallied through rivals in the straight and made up good ground. Came within a length of the winner but unable to draw any closer in the closing stages.
Ridden along early and was racing better than midfield. 3-wide making home turn and weakened after straightening.
Ridden along from a wide draw and took the lead 1200 M out. Held a length's advantage on straightening but was soon headed. Faded in the final stages.
Settled on the fence at midfield. Had some trouble getting a clear run after straightening. Closed off fairly and made up some late ground.
Settled behind midfield. Ran on without making much ground in the straight.
On the fence and better than midfield. 2Ls behind the lead turning for home. Had trouble getting a clear run after straightening. Ran on only fairly in the final stages.
No worse than midfield. Kept on for a while after straightening but unable to sustain in the final 200 M.
Settled behind midfield. Caught in traffic in the early part of the straight. Made up some late ground once finding daylight.
Box-seated on rails in 4th at 1400 M, hung out at halfway, pressured and 3Ls down in 4th turning for home, very one-paced to conclude.
Checked early on in rear, 10Ls back in rear at halfway and still a long way back and widest turning for home, stayed on best to lead close home.
Settled 9th or so about 8Ls off pace at halfway and only marginally closer turning in, ran on quite well close home for 3rd.
Midfield about 7Ls behind in middle stages, pushed out 4-wide no cover on the circle and ran on fairly to be nearest at the finish.
Soon led on fence, led by no more than 1L from 1400 M to final turn, headed 300 M out and tipped out of the money inside final 100 M.
Close-up but 3-wide no cover until the 800 M, a neck down in 2nd on the circle and led 300 M out, grabbed by the winner inside the final 30 M.
Went back from wide gate, 10Ls down in rear at halfway and a little closer into final 400 M, not much room inside final 100 M and not tested.
Went back from wide gate, about 10Ls off pace at 800 M, 8Ls down off last bend, nearly fell when tight for room 100 M out, eased down afterwards.
Prominent before easing back to 3-back on the rails position down back straight, 3Ls down in 5th off last turn, had every chance to place.
Slowly away, niggled along in 8th when 7Ls down at halfway, one-paced and beaten before the 200 M.
Always rearward, 9Ls back in 10th at halfway and similar entering home straight, remained in same position despite retrieving a little late ground.
Never going well, 4Ls back in 5th at 1000 M, about 5Ls down in 7th at the final bend, dropped out very tamely. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Held the "one-out-one-back" position from 1000 M to home turn about 2Ls off lead in 4th, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M and no excuse for not placing.
Never travelling well in rear, about 12Ls adrift at the 800 M, plodded on only fairly in the final 400 M and never nearer.
1L back in 2nd at first but about 6Ls down in 2nd into final turn, one-paced to conclude but still never nearer.
Soon led on fence as usual, skipped 5Ls clear off last bend, tired inside final 200 M and headed by the winner inside the final 30 M.
3-wide no cover in midfield at the 1000 M when 7Ls behind, further back making last bend, stayed on only fairly in the finish.
Didn't break well, never any better than 8Ls from the pace at any point.
Awkward break, always worse than midfield and never any better than 6Ls from the front, tame effort.
About 5Ls back in 8th at first but further back still in 5th entering home straight, kept on fairly well to wrap up but always held from the money.
1L back in 3rd at the 900 M, still 3rd but 6Ls behind GAUCHO off final bend, dug in well to overtake the leader inside final strides.
3-back along fence in 4th down back straight, still 4th but 8Ls down off final bend, ran on strongly in final 200 M to nick a place, nearly got 2nd.
Never any better than midfield, between 6Ls and 9Ls from the speed until final turn, never likely to be competitive.
Under pressure throughout, 4-back on the fence at the 800 M when about 8Ls behind leader, lost further ground thereafter.
4-wide no cover in rear and a long way off the pace at the 800 M, never remotely on terms.
Very slowly away losing about 4Ls behind remainder, never within 8Ls of the lead at any stage.
Behind midfield along the fence, 5-1/2Ls off the leader, harmed by the slow pace, momentarily held up 400 M, no dash when clear.
Eased to rear and took rail, harmed by the slow pace, never competitive.
Jumped very well, eased to sit in midfield, raced 3 to 4-wide and lost ground, dropped off steadily 600 M and tailed out.
Settled in midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the slow pace, blocked 300 M, little dash 100 M.
Pushed forward, sat 1-1/2Ls off the leader 3-wide, suited by the slow tempo, however soon weakened 400 M.
At back as usual, 6-1/2Ls off the leader, trapped 4-wide throughout and lost too much ground, harmed by the slow pace, never progressed.
Crossed towards 2-wide steadily and settled in front of midfield, 3Ls off the slow pace, made early move 700 M, led 300 M and drifted away to score.
Eased to rear and took rail, 7-1/2Ls off the leader, dashed strongly 300 M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Pushed to occupy the box seat, enjoyed the rail trip, however blocked 400 M, lacked turn of foot when clear, just held ground.
Eased back, 6-1/2Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, harmed by the slow pace, ran on ok in final stages.
Pushed forward, settled 1-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, benefited by the slow early sectionals, never had threat to the winner, but ran on well to the line and secured 2nd.
Pushed to take the rail and led by 1-1/2Ls at advantageous slow sectionals, overhauled 300 M, flattened 150 M.
Bumped start, eased to sit in midfield, 5Ls off the leader 3-wide, not suited by the slow pace, just held ground in straight.
Eased to sit in front of midfield, 3Ls off the leader along the fence, raced very keenly, not suited by the slow tempo, faded 400 M.
Travelled within 2Ls of pace in 3rd on rails, held in box seat after straightening, ran on inside 200 M despite tight between runners.
Settled towards rear, ran on steadily down the straight without ever threatening.
Began with others, settled in midfield, commenced run upon straightening, responded well to win convincingly.
Niggled at early, settled in midfield on rails, taken back to rear of midfield before home bend, no room after straightening until 200 M, produced good late impression.
Began from the widest barrier, soon taken back to race wide without cover in midfield, commenced move around home bend to be close up into straight, swamped inside final 200 M.
Travelled in forward of midfield to straight, folded up quickly under pressure.
Soon took up running, led the field to 250 M, overhauled.
Began from a wide draw, gradually crossed to 1-out-1-back position, same turning in but gradually weakened out of contention.
Soon in last few, found nothing under pressure in the run home, jockey warned regarding his riding around the home turn.
Settled at the back, blundered 1200 M out, no clear passage until over 200 M out, finished off race well.
Settled in midfield 3-off the stand's rail, checked near 300 M, ran on without serious threat thereafter.
Even break, assumed a position in mid-division towards the centre of track, ridden out from 350 M but lacked a finishing kick, stayed on same pace.
One of the first to jump, rolled along the stand's rail to be prominent early, under pressure inside 400 M, unable to find another gear and was one-paced in its finish.
Settled near the rear 3 to 4Ls behind leader, attempted a run down the stand's rail entering 400 M but didn't pick up. No impression.

Jumped well, taken to a spot in mid-division 4 deep from the stand's rail, gradually outpaced from halfway, soon out of contention entering 350 M, dropped out thereafter. (Bled and irregular heart rhythm.)
Standard break, assumed a rearward position 3Ls off the pace, still held up behind horses approaching 400 M, quickened well between horses to cut down the leader over the concluding stages.

Jumped well, never far off the pace, gradually drifted towards the stand side, challenged for the lead inside 400 M, hung in under pressure, briefly hit front near 100 M but was overhauled by the winner in the final stages.
Away in line, guided to a handy position 3 off the stand's rail, picked up only fairly when asked, ran into an awkward position near 50 M and was unable to improve from there.
Average break, travelled in midfield towards the stand's rail, never far off the pace, short of room near 300 M and was held up for about 50 M, ran on only fairly when cleared.
Slow to begin and lacked early speed, travelled in a rearward spot 3 to 4Ls back, switched out for a clear passage entering 400 M but couldn't quicken, no extra inside 200 M.
Well enough away, prominent early before drifting back to obtain cover behind leaders, pressed on near 400 M, took time to gather and did his best work towards the finish.
Raced prominently throughout down the middle of the track, kept on well under pressure near 400 M but his run appeared to flattened out inside final 100 M.

Quickly away, showed early speed to get to the front, crossed over to race closer to stand's side, kept on strongly when pressed by the eventual runner up, outpaced inside 100 M to finish 4th. Not beaten far.
Slow to begin, travelled in the rear throughout, had to be shaken up approaching 400 M, not able to pick up and ran some way below what he is capable of.

No speed from outside, allowed to drift back to tail, raced 10Ls away in last place, aided by solid pace at top end, still well back turning, made many lengths along inside to be nearest on line. (See Racing Incidents.)
No speed to speak of and ended up behind midfield 8Ls back in 2 wide line, aided by tempo, urged along on bend, made some ground to 200 M before run ended and tired late.
Began with first few, lobbed 1 out 1 back spot, had fair run just off a solid speed, 3 wide turning, lacked extra gear final 300 M and gradually faded.
First to hit ground, pressed on wide to race outside leader, continued to apply pressure and took lead at 800 M, kept rolling and held lead until 250 M, no match for winner's dash late.
Away well, went forward and raced just behind pace trio, continued 3 wide from midpoint to be outside lead on bend, still there on turning and kept on evenly final 200 M.
Allowed to angle in behind from a difficult draw, took a midfield role 5Ls away, had a fair run in mid-section, no response in straight.
Moderate jump, back in rear division 8Ls from top end, had a quiet run throughout, still well back with job to do turning, made fair progress without threatening.
Taken back from a wide alley, ended up 6Ls or so away in running line, appreciated genuine pace took runs inside horses turning, closed off evenly to be closest at finish.
Allowed to drift back to race behind midfield 6Ls away in running line, shuffled back approaching bend, made a wide run on turn, couldn't make progress final 300 M.
Tardy away, soon sharing rear best part of 10Ls back, helped by pace on, still last on turning, passed only beaten runners late.
Moderate jump, mustered and ended up 3Ls back on fence, angled 2 wide on top turn, travelled well rounding home bend, let down nicely at 300 M to race away for a convincing win.
Even break, pressed on to settle 3Ls away in running line, had a fair trip despite solid speed, niggled before turning, quickly dropped out.

Amongst first few to break, took lead early but was pressured throughout, shaded until midpoint when finally gave up fence, bumped rail at 500 M, not far away turning, no dash and just held ground final 300 M.
Out with line, taken back to race on rails 6Ls or so away, used little in run, urged along on bend, found little and gradually weakened. (Bled both nostrils.)
Reasonable jump, pushed up to race 2 to 3Ls behind leader, had an easy time on bend, held up for a considerable distance after straightening, only clear last 150 M when race was over.
Taken back after jump, raced 5 to 6Ls back in running line, travelled well between horses on bend, steadied at 500 M into clear at 300 M and kept closing despite hanging to make frame.
Standard beginning, unable to slot in, ended up 3 wide 5Ls back with cover, did share of work to bend, lacked a response and struggled in straight.
Bounced out, took a spot 4Ls away on rails, not asked in mid-section, made some fair progress turning but didn't go on with it and stayed on at same speed final 200 M.
Began nicely, went on to challenge for lead, shaded leader setting a decent pace to bend, soon took over on straightening, collared at 200 M and tired late.
Out with rest, taken back to race 6Ls away at rear, still well back turning and searching for runs early in straight, made solid progress down middle in straight.
Slow into stride and lost considerable ground, settled last 7Ls off pace, aided by solid pace on, switched wide on turning, made lengths down middle in straight to be nearest on line.

Began OK but eased back to rear from a wide alley, raced behind midfield 6Ls off pace, suited with pace on, last and took inside runs turning, held up and finally clear at 200 M, made remarkable ground late for 2nd.
Average jump but showed early speed to take up running, pressured throughout and shaded on circle, niggled leaving bend, no response and didn't see out trip.
Moderate jump and restrained from wide alley, posted 4 wide 5Ls away without cover, set too great a task and used up soon after turning, flattened at 300 M.
Began better than normal, assumed a midfield spot 4Ls away between horses, tracked well to bend, kept on fairly between horses in straight just holding ground in run to line.
Out in line, assumed ideal spot 2 to 3Ls back off pace, travelled well to bend, made run turning, hit front at 200 M and kept on well final furlong to hold off rivals.
Jumped with rest, posted 3 wide in midfield 5Ls back, did it tough without cover throughout, improved turning, kept giving in straight to get close to mark late.
First to hit ground, in pace battle early before racing 1 out 1 back, did share of work with speed, on ridden along turning, couldn't respond and lost touch final 300 M.
Well enough away, guided to a handy position just behind leading pack, had the race run to suit, picked them up near 200 M and powered clear for a convincing success.

Fast out from the wide barrier, ridden to a forward position, unable to cross and was forced wide without cover, gradually outpaced by the leaders rounding the home turn, kept on very once-paced towards the finish.
Jumped well, drifted back and taken to a rearward position 2 off the fence, slightly hampered making home turn, ran on steadily down the home straight but didn't pose a serious threat.
Away in line, settled in a rearward position 5 to 6Ls behind leader, checked near 500 M, had plenty to do entering home straight, took time to gather speed and did his better work towards the finish.

Standard break, assumed a midfield position close enough to the leaders, caught wide making the home turn, under pressure inside 400 M, found little when asked and hung in under pressure. No impression.
Moderate start, had to be rushed up to hold a prominent position early, checked and shuffled back near 600 M, kept on only fairly in the straight before momentarily checked inside 100.

Slowly into stride, pressed on early to keep up with the pace, raced in a 3-wide midfield position, steadied near 450 M, made even progress inside 300 M but never looked like catching the winner. (Retired subsequently.)
Taken back from the wide barrier, raced detached in the rear trailing leader 7 to 8Ls, had to be shaken up on turning, switched out and produced a good late run down the outside of straight.

Quickly into stride, always in the front rank but was pressed by runner on both sides, briefly hit front inside 250 M but was soon collared by the eventual winner, no extra inside 150 M and was visibly weakened over the final stages

Drawn low, rolled forward along the rail to take up the early running, was taken on for the lead by runners on his outside, unable to keep up effort on straightening, soon headed and faded inside 200 M.
Ordinary jump, attacked the lead early, 3-wide turning home, dropped out of contention early in straight. (Irregular Heart Rhythm.)
Even break, taken to rail and settled in mid-division closely enough to the pace, checked severely and lost 2Ls near 500 M, recovered and made some headway down the inside on straightening.
Raced three back on the rails. Railed up in the straight and finished off well despite being tight over the final 100 M.
Camped behind the leader on the fence. Switched out on the home turn and accelerated strongly to draw away and win by a handy margin.
Began awkwardly, lost ground at the start and as a consequence got well back in the early stages. After this, travelled 3-wide with cover at the rear of the field. Not likely.
Travelled midfield the fence. Worked home soundly.
Worked forward from the outside gate to land 3 back. Travelled satisfactorily in a 1 off position after the 800 M, however faded over the concluding stages.
Was allowed to settle with the rear division along the paint. Ran on strongly over the last 300 M. (See Racing Incidents Report.)
Travelled at the rear along the fence. Tired noticeably in the final stretch.
For the major part of the race travelled wide and without cover in a midfield position. Weakened in the straight.
Aggressively ridden to take up the lead and was rated nicely in front. Kicked well when challenged near the furlong had every chance.
Raced 2 deep with cover, midfield. Gave in tamely in the run home.
Raced with the backmakers 2-wide with cover. Made some ground in the straight without threatening.
Positioned close to midfield, 2 deep with cover. Battled on gamely in the run to the post.
Stumbled and lost ground at the start. Settled at the rear. Last on straightening and only ran past a beaten runner in the straight.
Travelled nicely in the lead and took a length's advantage into the home straight. Kept on fairly but was headed by winner final 50 M. Held on for a minor placing.
Raced 2-wide and a length off the lead. Remained on same pace in the home straight.
Raced along the fence behind the pace. Lacked a response when asked 700 M out. Never quickened in the straight and gradually faded.
Settled on the fence behind midfield and was 4Ls off the pace. Gradually switched out after straightening. Steadily made up ground in the straight and was closest at finish.
Raced 2-wide at midfield and no more than 3Ls off the lead. Quickened nicely when asked on straightening. Ran down early leader and took control final 50 M.
Settled in rear section early and middle stages. Closed the race off with a strong rally and made up good ground in the straight.
Caught 3-wide without cover throughout despite exiting gate 5, midfield at first but began to tire at final turn and weakened right out.
No early speed and 5Ls or 6Ls from the straight in 10th or so until straightening, stayed on at the same pace on the inner.
2-wide and 4Ls back in 5th or 6th through to home straight, failed to quicken up sufficiently in the straight but still nearly placed.
Box-seated on rails 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th through to home turn, had every chance but could not match winner's late kick.
Pressed on from wide gate and flanked pacesetter in 2nd until home straight before quickly retreating. (Questioned for poor performance.)
3-back on rails in midfield at halfway, 3Ls down in 5th turning for home but quickly outpaced.
Worse than midfield throughout, 3-wide with cover about 5Ls off pace down the back, 4-wide turning for home, never able to challenge.
Went back from wide gate and slightly detached in rear about 8Ls from the speed until home straight, ran on well, nearest at finish.
Went back from wide gate, one from rear about 6Ls off the speed until final bend, blocked for a run about 200 M out but looked held in any case.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
2Ls back in 3rd at the 800 M, still close-up in 4th turning for home, outpaced by quinella pair in the straight but did best of the rest for 3rd.
Led by less than 1L on rails through to home straight, headed about 150 M out and soon slipped out of the money.
4-back along rails in 7th about 5Ls from the pace at halfway, stayed on best of the rest in the straight but never likely to catch the winner.
Taken back to 10th about 7Ls from the speed at the 1200 M and similarly placed into last section, made some late ground, never nearer.
Nicely placed in the 'one-out-one-back' position in 4th or 5th and 2Ls or 3Ls off pace until home straight, tame finish given his nice passage.
Led by 1L at the 1200 M, about a neck to the good at top of home straight, soon headed and quickly faded out.
Went back as usual, 5Ls back in 9th on rails at 1200 M, 7Ls to make up rounding final corner, retrieved a little late ground but no danger.
3-back on rails in 4th or 5th about 4Ls behind the pace until final bend, had his chance to figure in the quinella but lacked the turn of foot.
Settled in 2nd just outside leader from 1200 M to home turn, led 250 M out and always doing enough to score.
4Ls back in 6th out 2-wide at the 1000 M and same margin behind turning in, made some moderate late ground for 5th.
Went back from wide gate, 8Ls or 9Ls last until home straight, never likely.
Caught 3-wide no cover throughout towards rear and at least 7Ls from the pace, never on terms.
3-back the rails in 5th about 4Ls from the pace until home straight, given every chance to place but lacked the gears.
Box-seated but over-raced and unbalanced through early stages, 2Ls back in 3rd and with strong place chances off last turn, one-paced to finish. (Jockey warned re riding near 1500 M.)
Eased at start to cross towards rail behind the field, 6Ls off the leaders, not suited by the slow tempo, no turn of foot in last quarter.
Pushed early, settled nicely just in front of midfield, 4Ls off the leaders 2 to 3-wide, demonstrated strong finishing efforts 250 M to score its 2nd goal.
Hard ridden forward, sat 1L off the slow pace, however trapped 3 to 4-wide throughout without cover and lost too much ground, ran on well until 150 M, out of fuel.
Pushed to cross in front and shared the lead 2-wide, enjoyed the slow early tempo, led 200 M, closed the race off strongly, just beaten by a narrow margin in last few strides.
Eased back, 7-1/2Ls off the leaders, 3-wide at bends and lost ground, harmed by the slow pace, held up 4-2, dashed strongly when clear.
