Pushed forward, 2Ls behind the slow pace 2-wide, no turn of foot in straight, flattened 100 M.
Slow away, pushed to hold the rail in midfield, 4Ls off the leaders, dashed strongly 250 M despite not suited by the slow pace, just beaten by a very narrow margin in 3rd.
Slow away, pushed to obtain the box seat, favoured by the slow tempo, closed the race off strongly 200 M, just missed 3rd.
Eased to sit in midfield, 5Ls off the leaders, trapped 3-wide throughout and lost too much ground, harmed by the slow pace, ran on ok in final stages.
Very slow away, 8Ls off the leaders at rear but on the rails, not suited by the slow pace, ran on fairly in straight.
Hard ridden to take the rail and shared the lead at advantageous slow early sectionals, hung on until 200 M overhauled, flattened 50 M.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Began with others, soon crossed to rails to share pace, gained 1L break down far side, similar turning for home, gradually weakened inside final 200 M.
Amongst leaders early, settled one-out-one-back in 3rd, similar and about 2Ls off turning in, soon gave ground after straightening.

Broke well from wide draw, obtained rails run in 5th just better than midfield before stables bend, in similar position turning in, tight between runners early in straight, fought on steadily until no extra late.
Jumped moderately, soon gained rails run just off the speed, one-paced after home turn, folded up quickly after 200 M.
Settled in midfield, swung wide into straight, ran home one-paced.
Wide with leaders after beginning from wide draw, worked hard around bend to obtain 2-wide position outside leader, about 1L off the pace far side, fading under pressure when checked 200 M out.
Began awkwardly, settled towards rear on rails, soon came to challenge after straightening, fought on well despite tight under pressure early in straight.
Broke well, settled in midfield on rails, gradually shifted to outside around home bend, widest runner turning in, quickened well to take charge over 200 M out, won convincingly.
Planted at start losing many lengths, gradually picked up to tail-end of field before stables bend, remained last to straight, soon dropped out.
Settled just worse than midfield, steadied twice before and after the 200 M mark, fought on doggedly to the line.
Slightly slow out, settled well behind, briefly baulked before switched in for a clear run over 200 M out, ran on to be nearest at finish.

Held up patiently in a position behind midfield about 6Ls back, used little in running, responded well under pressure, made good progress down the centre of track to take 3rd on the line despite racing tight near 150 M.

Eased back on jumping, travelled in the rear trailing 10Ls early, inconvenienced by the slow pace down the back straight, switched wide near 300 M and made good progress but the winner found the necessary to hold on.
Away with them, taken to a 3-wide position in mid-division without cover, 4Ls behind leader rounding home turn, had an uninterrupted run down the outside but was never quite getting there.
Jumped well, held a spot in midfield 3-4Ls back, travelled well enough going into straight, ran into an awkward position from 200 M and didn't have the clearest crack in run to line.
Maintained a midfield position 5Ls behind leader, 3-wide without cover entering back straight, moved up tracking leaders entering 800 M, asked near 200 M but gave a very limited response.
Standard break, pressed forward to take up early running, was given breather passing 800 M, held every chance going into last 200 M but ran flattened out thereafter, swamped by others inside 100 M.

Slowly away, raced in a rearward position 9Ls behind leader in early stages, crept closer approaching the Rock, came wide on turning, gradually found his stride in the straight and saw them off entering 50 M. Hung in late.

Moderate start, pressed on to take a handy position just behind leaders, unsuited by the slow pace down the back straight and was difficult to settle, into clear inside 300 M, lacked a finishing touch and was one-paced to line.
Shaken up early to assume a prominent position on the rail just behind leader, tracked well to bend but couldn't pick up on straightening, finished the race one-paced.

Ordinary jump, guided to a rearward position on the rail 7Ls back, not used in running, kept to inside on straightening, ran into traffic and unable to improve from 200 M. Not fully tested. (Jockey severely reprimanded re his riding)
Away quickly, drifted back to hold a midfield position on the rail, moved closer approaching the home turn, kept to inside on straightening, made fair headway but found no extra inside 100 M.

Hard driven to the front after jumping from the wide barrier, caught wide on the 1st turn, alongside leader approaching home turn, under pressure from 400 M, stayed on well before his stamina gave way inside final 100 M.

One of the first to jump, soon taken to an ideal position on the rail tracking leaders, ran on well down the inside on straightening and looked a possible winner inside 200 M, but effort just flattened in the closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, travelled in a rearward position 4Ls back, 3-wide making home turn, couldn't step up a gear in straight and stayed on only fairly. No impression.

Away with them, rolled forward to share lead in a position one off the fence, travelled strongly going into straight, went to the front inside 350 M but was unable to shake them off, kept giving in the run to the line, headed near 100 M.

Jumped well from a wide barrier, travelled close enough to the pace, moved up near 800 M to race on the outside of leaders, gradually outpaced on straightening and faded out of contention inside 200 M.

Standard break, unable to find cover and was inclined to hang out for the major parts of the race, didn't negotiate the turn and from then on was always an uphill struggle. Dropped out rapidly entering final 200 M.

Well enough away, restrained to take cover in midfield, travelled well but was carried wide on turning, took time to get going in straight, ran on well inside 300 M but could never quite get on terms with the winner.

Swiftly away, drifted back to a 3-wide position better than midfield, had a tendency to hang out in middle stages, gradually picked up in straight, in front near 100 M and showed the right battling qualities to hold off rivals.
Jumped with rest, lacked early speed, assumed a position in midfield 3Ls off the pace, found little when asked for an effort, checked near 150 M and no extra thereafter.
Slowly away, settled near the rear trailing 5Ls to leader, gave limited response on straightening, hung out under pressure and was difficult to ride. (Bled.)

Taken back to the rear after start, checked on turning before gradually shifted out to avoid traffic, had 5Ls to make up coming off the bend, made some progress down the outside without seriously threatening.

Quickly into stride, took up running near 1000 M at a steady tempo, pressed by runners on its outside rounding the home turn, under pressure approaching home straight, battled on for some distance but was noticeably weakened inside 150 M.
Began in line, shaken up to take closer order just behind the leading trio, tracked well on turning, brought with a challenge inside 400 M, ran on well but was always shaded by the eventual winner.
Ordinary jump, taken to a 2-wide position in midfield, showed greenness in its running, unable to pick up when required, dropped off from 150 M.

Broke well from the inside barrier, held up patiently on the fence about 3Ls off the pace, used little in running, shifted away from the rail to find daylight in straight, steadied near 300 M but stayed on OK towards the end.
Raced in 2nd last position, 2-wide with cover. Was found wanting over the final stages.
Travelled 3 back the fence. Peeled out early in the straight, no excuses.
Travelled close to midfield, 1 off with cover. Struck some traffic problems near the 300 M and in the run to the line could not be ridden out.

Travelled midfield early before sliding forward mid race to camp on the back of the speed. Was always posted 3-wide without cover. Put under pressure early in the straight and kept whacking away to gain the upper hand late.
Ridden along at the start and found the lead along the fence in the early stages. Was overhauled at the 400 M and was a spent force inside the furlong.

Tracked the leader along the fence. Went for a narrow run along the rail early in the straight however was held up and checked when disappointed for running. Didn't recover fully after that point. (See Racing Incidents.)
Speared out of the gates then drifted back to settle in a handy position, 3 deep with cover. Plugged away in the straight.
Was taken back in the early stages and settled in last position. Rolled out to be widest early in the straight and let down well, closing off soundly.
Slow to begin and settled behind midfield the fence. Not likely.
Positioned 3 back, 2 deep with cover. Raced dourly in the run home.
Allowed to settle behind midfield, 3 deep with cover. Drifted out after the 400 M, and ran on well late for 3rd.
Worked forward to settle outside the leader. Hit the front after the 400 M but came up short after having every possible hope.
Raced 1 out 1 back. Had every chance.
Jumped well and led early stages. Better than midfield and settled 2 to 3Ls off the lead in back straight. Kept on same pace in the straight.
Raced along the fence at midfield. Gradually switched out after straightening and closed the race off well.
3-wide without cover in midfield early stages. Slightly behind midfield in back straight. Lacked the needed response when asked on straightening and weakened thereafter.
2-wide at midfield. Quickened nicely when asked on straightening. Steadily made up ground and was closest at finish.
2-wide and no better than midfield. Slipped to rear section making home turn. Steadily made up ground in the straight and was closest at finish.
3-wide behind midfield. Remained on same pace in the straight.
Settled in a rearward position. Made up ground over beaten runners in the straight.
Caught wide into the 1st turn. 2-wide and raced within 3Ls of the pace in back straight. Unable to quicken when asked making home turn and weakened in the straight.
Soon in the lead. Maintained a slim advantage on straightening but gradually dropped out in the straight. (Substantial blood in trachea.)
Led briefly in the early stages. Kept pace behind the leader in back straight. A length off turning for home and stayed on fairly in the straight for a minor placing.
Raced along the rails behind midfield. Steadied when crowded for room 300 M out and took some time to pick up again. Closed off nicely and made up some late ground.
Settled towards the rear. Wide and trailed field turning for home. Only ran past a beaten runner in the straight.

Trailed field early stages. Allowed to stride forward after 1200 M and was racing alongside the leader making home turn. Took the lead 300 M out and kept on well final stages to hold off a late challenger.
Darted over very quickly to rails from wide gate, led by 1L until final turn, headed just inside the 200 M and weakened out of the money final 100 M.
Trapped 3-wide no cover throughout, rearward and 8Ls back at 1000 M, 6Ls down making final turn and wide, soon beaten.
3-back along the rails in 4th about 3Ls or 4Ls from the speed, couldn't take advantage of the soft trail, one-paced.
Box-seated on rails 2Ls back in 3rd through to final 400 M, had his chance to place but was lacking in acceleration.
Slowest away, 8Ls down on the rails at halfway, still rearward and with 6Ls to make up off final bend, finished off pretty well, never nearer.
Worse than midfield on rails down backstretch, a little closer on straightening, ran on through the field to take 3rd on the line.
Slow to begin once again, held up in rear 8Ls behind early pace and 6Ls down and pressured turning in, offered little or no threat.
In 8th about 6Ls or 7Ls from the pace until home turn, 5Ls down off last turn, briefly held up at 200 M, ran on well late to nick 2nd in final strides.
Pressed forward from wide gate to race 1L back in 2nd down the back, narrow lead about 150 M out but no extra and tipped out of the money final 30 M.
4Ls down in 5th out 2-wide at 1200 M, hard pressed to remain this close off last turn, steadily faded out and eased down.
5Ls off speed out 2-wide at 1000 M, 3-wide no cover on the circle and 4Ls back off last turn, never likely to improve significantly.
12Ls last at the 1000 M, wide and 8Ls back off last turn, made only very minor late ground.
Always in rear bunch and between 6Ls and 8Ls from the pace until home bend, made no impression.
3-back on rails about 5Ls off speed in 6th at halfway, gradually edged closer and hard ridden to lead about 30 M out, did enough.
Raced 2Ls back in 2nd down back straight, 1L down but hard pressed to hold position off last turn, well beaten before the 200 M and eased late.
Went back from a wide gate, at least 7Ls from the pace until home straight, never on terms and eased late.
Slow to muster pace and 8Ls back in 12th at the 800 M, made some minor late ground past beaten rivals in the homestretch.
Crossed from wide gate to set a good pace by 2Ls at 800 M, headed about 300 M out, gamely clung on for a place.
Towards rear about 6Ls behind at first, checked at the 800 M, 5Ls down off last bend but soon outpaced and eased down close home.
Posted 4-wide no cover throughout, 4Ls back in midfield at halfway, wider off final turn and extra work led to a one-paced conclusion.
2-wide and 4Ls back in 4th leaving back straight, 2Ls down off last bend, had his opportunity to place but couldn't find that bit extra.
Lost ground at the start, 6Ls down and a little green at first, closer but wide off last turn, kept on fairly well and narrowly missed a place.
Raced greenly with head up down the back in midfield, 4Ls back off final bend but soon wilted.
Very reluctant on way to start, 3-back the rails 4Ls off in 5th at 800 M, closer off last curve, kept on best of the rest, had little chance with winner. (Tactic questioned.)
Over-raced on rails with head high in places along back straight, just 3Ls back in 5th or so off last bend, weakened out gradually thereafter.
Fractious in the gates, soon about 8Ls behind in rear, still well back off last bend, never any danger.
Nicely placed 3Ls back in 3rd with cover at 800 M, moved closer on straightening and led 300 M out, pulled clear for another comfortable win.
Went back from a wide gate and soon detached in rear, 9Ls last swinging for home, ran on past a few spent rivals to wrap up.
Eased to sit in front of midfield, 3Ls off the leaders 2-wide, suited by the fast tempo, made some ground 300 M.
At rear, 7-1/2Ls off the leaders 2-wide, favoured by the fast pace, held up 4-2, made ground when clear.
Slow away, in front of midfield, 3Ls off the leaders along the fence, suited by the fast tempo, but no turn of foot in final stages.
Bumped start, hard ridden to obtain a forward spot, 2Ls behind the leaders 3-wide, not suited by the fast early tempo, just held ground in straight.
Midfield on the rails, 5-1/2Ls off the leaders, helped by the fast pace, just ran on ok in straight.
Eased to sit behind midfield, 6Ls off the leaders 3-wide, benefited by the fast pace, made ground steadily final 300 M to win.
Pushed early, settled in midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leaders 3-wide, helped by the fast tempo, progressed steadily 400 M.
Pushed early to occupy the box seat, not suited by the fast early tempo, led 300 M, hung on until 50 M overhauled, ran on for 2nd.
Eased to rear and took rail, 9-1/2Ls off the leaders, suited by the fast pace, blocked 4-2, made ground when clear.
Pushed early to maintain a midfield spot, 4-1/2Ls off the leaders 2-wide, suited by the fast tempo, however no progress in straight.
Trapped 3-wide throughout and shared the lead at fast sectionals, used up too much fuel in early stages, faded quickly 300 M.
Pushed to share the leader 2-wide, pressured throughout, harmed by the fast early sectionals, ran on until 200 M, weakened.
Eased back, 6-1/2Ls off the leaders, trapped 4-wide throughout, helped by the fast pace, progressed steadily 300 M to grab 3rd.
Pushed early but failed to muster, at rear, 7-1/2Ls off the leaders 3-wide, benefited by the fast pace, just ran on fairly in last quarter.
Raced wide down far side in forward of midfield, took closer order around home bend remaining wide without cover, well there turning for home but soon lost touch.
Raced mainly on rails in midfield, saved ground turning in, fought on steadily without quickening.
Slightly sluggish at start, raced freely while picking up to forward of midfield, wide in midfield turning in, soon dropped out.
Broke well, with leaders early, one back in 3rd around home bend, gradually weakened after straightening.
Soon picked up to join leaders, checked and lost a length coming out of back straight, about 2Ls off turning in, kept on same pace under pressure without quickening.
Soon taken back to rear from a wide draw, trailed the field to straight, produced good late impression inside final 200 M.
Began fairly, held rails run in first few, steadied to race one back within 2Ls of pace around home bend, fought on steadily without threatening.
Broke well, amongst leaders, gained half a length advantage coming out of back straight, 1L clear turning for home, hung on well to finish.
Soon settled in last few, saved ground on inside turning in, ran on to be nearest at finish.
Settled in last few of the bunched field from a wide draw, soon came to challenge after straightening, fought on well to be nearest at finish.
Niggled at for pace early, settled wide in midfield, very wide turning in, never recovered. (Bled.)
Disputed lead far side, settled one-out-one-back around home bend, folded up quickly after straightening.
Standard jump, maintained a midfield position 4Ls off the pace, travelled strongly into straight, posed no threat to the winner but made some good late impression inside the final 200 M.

Awkwardly away and lost ground on jumping, shaken up to take closer order behind midfield, had 5Ls to make up approaching home straight, soon under pressure but could only keep on at the same pace to finishing line.
Away quickly, overcame a wide draw to take up the running, had an uncontested lead throughout, could offer little resistance to the first two but kept on well inside 200 M to hold on for 3rd.
Began with rest, held up in mid-division 4Ls behind leader, tracked well to bend, lacked a strong finishing kick but ran on OK under pressure.
Eased to the rear after jumping, caught wide making the home turn, had plenty to do coming off the bend, didn't pick up under pressure. Never a factor.
Quickly into stride, always prominent tracking the leader, travelled noticeably well going into straight, burst to the front 300 M out, kept on strongly to win in fine style.
Jumped well, pressed on early to keep up with pace, settled in a 3-wide spot in mid-division, found little on straightening, weakened from 200 M.
Drifted back to race behind midfield 5 to 6Ls off the pace, enjoyed a ground-saving trip along the fence, had no clear run from 300 M to 200 M but stayed on OK once got into the clear.
Taken back on jumping, settled in the rear 7Ls off the pace under restraint, taken wide rounding the home turn, unable to pick up and could beat tired runners only.

Moderate start, taken to a handy position on the rail never far off the pace, briefly held up after straightening, into clear near 300 M, hung out in its run and was unable to close in on the eventual winner.

Ordinary jump, gradually moved forward to be tracking leaders approaching home turn, unable to cross and was caught wide without cover, responded only fairly when put under pressure 350 M out, gave ground last 100 M.

Stumbled leaving the stalls, maintained a position better than midfield but was difficult to settle in early stages, had to be urged along on bend, found little in straight and faded out inside 200 M.

Slightly slow out, raced ungenerously towards the rear, unable to settle and had a hard run throughout, didn't find his stride in straight, dropped out from 250 M. (Jockey reported his horse showed dislike to the gear change.)

Began with rest, angled into a trailing spot 4 to 5Ls away in running line, had a fair run in mid-section, 3Ls down turning, took gap between horses at 300 M and dashed strongly keeping on for a solid 3rd.
Allowed to drift back from a wide gate, ended up 8 to 9Ls back in running line, improved 3 wide with steady pace on bend, circled 5 wide turning, kept coming in straight to be closest at finish.
Reasonable jump, forced to angle back into 3 wide line to get cover, raced 3 wide 6Ls away with trial pace against and raced keenly on bend, didn't let down when they sprinted and plodded late.
No speed from jump, ended up 4Ls away on rails, used nothing in run, took inside runs turning and right in mix at 300 M, just peaked on efforts final furlong.
Began with first few, elected for a trail on leaders back, used little throughout with steady speed, left behind when they dashed turning, gradually faded out in straight.

Standard getaway, and lost further ground, ridden up to hold a 1 out 1 back position, 2Ls down on bend and suited by steady pace, right there turning, hit lead briefly at 300 M, peaked on run at 200 M just held ground late.
Fastest out, took hold when unable to get close raced 3 wide 2Ls away, travelled fairly with steady pace, bumped turning, lacked usual finish and just held ground in run to line. ("Raced flat".)
Restrained from a wide gate, ended up at rear 9 to 10Ls off pace, not suited in mid-section, saved ground on fence on bend, took inside runs and made solid progress along inside to make frame.

Dropped back soon after start raced 8Ls away in running line, not helped by steady tempo, shuffled back to last turning, in traffic to 300 M, dashed sharply when clear and powered through final 200 M to get up on line.
Good getaway, pressed on but unable to slot in, forced to travel 3 wide without cover, did work despite slow speed, tired soon after straightening.
Angled back from an awkward draw, raced 6Ls or so away on rails, pace not to suit to bend, lost run on turning, into clear running at 350 M, closed nicely making ground to be nearest on line.
Began nicely, took up lead comfortably, controlled pace to suit with leisurely sections, difficult to settle on bend and hung to turn, found little at business end and gradually lost touch.
Even jump, went on to race outside leader, had an easy time with steady pace, still there but struggling on turning and soon dropped right out.

Away in line, allowed to drift back to race behind midfield 3 wide 4 to 5Ls back, travelled strongly on bend, brought with wide run on turning, made a strong finish and in front until shadows of post.
Taken back from a wide alley, switched down to rails, raced 8Ls away near to tail, still well back turning, made good progress along inside in straight but steady early pace harmed chances.
Moderate jump, soon in rearward division, raced 6 to 7Ls away, tempo against in mid-section, well back to bend, battled evenly before lost run at 200 M, never factored thereafter.
Even jump, ended up in midfield spot 4Ls away, enjoyed reasonable run in middle stages, pushed wide on bend, didn't let down and just struggled in straight.
Showed early speed, took up running, set terms to suit with steady sections, held a narrow lead turning, couldn't dash with rest inside 250 M but held ground creditably in run to line.
First out, pressed on to race outside leader, had an easy time with steady sections, levelled up on straightening, lacked extra gear final 300 M and just kept same speed in run to line.
Out slowly, ended up 4 to 5Ls back on fence in midfield, raced keenly but saved ground throughout and took short cuts turning, made good progress along inside in straight to take 2nd late.
Drifted back from widest gate, posted 4 wide 8Ls away, went forward without cover on bend, 5Ls down on bend, very wide turning, ran on nicely final 300 M to be nearest on line.

Began well enough, assumed a position behind pace 3 to 4Ls off front, enjoyed a quiet run in mid-section, aided by steady sections to bend, into clear turning and made good ground to 100 M but couldn't wear down margin.
Began nicely, took trailling position on leaders back, had ideal run to bend, eased out to challenge at 300 M, hit lead passing 200 M and held off rivals late for a strong win.
Lacked early pace, ended up racing 3 wide with an 8Ls or so away, still well back on bend and not suited by pace, lacked room in important part of straight and was not properly tested.
Standard jump, ended up racing 3 wide early but dropped in on bend 5Ls away in running line, urged along before steadied on straightening, switched out and made even ground off on unsuitable tempo.
Lacked speed from outset as usual and soon at rear, raced 8Ls away in 2 wide line, steady pace harmed chances, well back turning, held up most of straight and was not properly tested.
Began with first few, took a prominent role 1 out 1 back, helped by steady tempo to bend, under pressure soon after turning and faded easily.
Jumped fairly, ended up behind midfield 6Ls from top end, saved ground on rails throughout, gained inside runs in straight and finished soundly.

Taken back on jumping, crossed behind runners to race towards the rear, trailed 7Ls to leader as they settled down, no clear run early in the straight but finished strongly when cleared near 200 M. (Jockey questioned.)

Taken back, held up patiently in the rear trailing 7Ls to the leader, commenced to improve position inside 500 M, ran into an awkward position early in straight, shifted out near 200 M and stayed on well to the line.
Away with them, eased to take cover behind midfield runners, used little in running but had plenty to do going into the straight, found nothing when asked, dropped out inside 100 M.

Slowly into stride, in mid-division early, commenced to race wide and without cover passing 1100 M, moved up to 2nd approaching home turn, failed to run on in the straight, faded rapidly inside 200 M.

Standard jump, crossed over and raced along the inside rail behind midfield throughout, moved closer passing 600 M, carried in on straightening, made some progress down the inside without threatening.
Quickly into stride, driven to get the early lead, gradually slowed down the tempo before home turn, had 1L advantage turning in, headed near 200 M and weakened towards the line.

Bounded in the air on jumping and lost ground, held a position in midfield along the rail in early stages, shifted out to be 2-wide approaching home turn, made even progress in the straight to finish nearest on the line.

Away well enough, slotted into a 3-wide position better than midfield early, crept closer down the back straight, found daylight down the inside of track, kept on well but didn't pose serious threat to the winner.
Ordinary jump, maintained a spot in mid-division 4-5Ls behind leader, carried wide making home turn, unable to pick up under pressure, steadied inside 200 M, dropped out thereafter.
Had the rail draw but was slowly away, pressed on early to hold a position ahead of midfield, had a smooth trip but failed to quicken on straightening, already beaten passing 200 M.
Jumped well, quickly taken to a prominent spot on the rail tracking leader, travelled well going into straight, levelled with the leader near 200 M before staying on strongly to score with ease.
Began with rest, guided to a handy position not far away from leader, shaken up approaching home straight, came with a challenge inside 300 M, ran on well but never looked like catching the winner.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.

Early in the race when racing wide, was steadied and taken back to a position with cover. Then passing the 1200 M shifted out and for the remainder of the race travelled wide and without cover around midfield faded in straight.
Went to the front travelling solo until joined in the lead mid race. Made every post a winner to hold a narrow margin.
Slow to begin and settled behind midfield on the rails. Shifted to the 1 off line near the 600 M to continue going forward. Made some good late headway.
Travelled 1 off with cover, midfield. Slipped back one position near the 600 M, and was ridden along from that point to improve. Plugged away in the straight to finish in the frame.
Began awkwardly then raced 3 back the fence. Found no extra inside the furlong.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Settled in last position from the outside gate. Never lengthened in the run home failing to close off.
Raced 3 back, 2-wide with cover. Plugged away in the run home.
Had every possible chance on the back of the leader. Faded over the latter stages.
Settled with the back markers 2-wide with cover. No progress.
Raced 2-wide behind the pace. 3-wide turning for home and kept on well in the straight for a minor placing.
Took cover in midfield. Quickened nicely on straightening and made up ground in the straight to be closest at finish.
Lacked early speed and raced towards the rear early stages. Behind midfield at the turn and made up some late ground in the straight.
Settled behind midfield. Only kept same pace in the straight.
2-wide in the lead or disputed lead. Kept on fairly in the straight but unable to sustain effort and faded out of contention in the closing stages.
Slow and failed to muster speed. Raced towards the rear throughout and showed nothing in the straight.
Raced along the rails in a prominent spot behind the pace. Went stride for stride with eventual winner in the home straight but came up a bit short in a photo finish.
Jumped only fairly but was ridden along and took the lead 700 M out. Continued well in the home straight and kept on gamely in the closing stages to win by a narrow margin.
Wide and without cover in midfield. Raced among leaders making the turn but remained wide. Kept on without quickening and then was steadied when crowded final 100 M.
Raced at midfield. 2Ls off the lead turning for home. Kept on same pace in the straight.
Slow into stride and raced behind midfield. Checked 600 M out and was ridden along making the turn. 3 back on the fence turning in and kept on only fairly in the straight.
Slow and failed to muster speed. Trailed field throughout race and found nothing in the straight.
Midfield or better between 2Ls and 3Ls from the speed, 3-wide turning for home and with place prospects, couldn't quicken up.
Pressed on and led by a neck at first, crossed to lead by 1L on fence at 500 M, grabbed by the winner 50 M out but held 2nd okay.
Slowly away, about 6Ls off pace and one from rear at halfway, recovering some ground when checked 200 M out, didn't trouble those ahead.
3-back along the rails about 4Ls off speed in midfield at the 600 M, finished off strongly to nick a place close home.
2-wide and 4Ls back in 8th or so until straightening, held up from 200 M to 100 M but wasn't posing a threat to principals anyway.
Awkward break and taken back from wide gate, 7Ls last taking the final bend, ran on well to be nearest at the finish. (Jockey warned.)
Midfield or better about 2Ls off speed until home straight, one-paced to conclude and no excuses.
Raced in midfield down the back but at least 3-wide no cover for the duration, 4-wide turning for home, kept on well to lead about 50 M out, big win.
3-wide no cover at first, 1L down in 2nd from the 600 M to final bend, had his chance and tipped out of the frame close home.
Slowest out and raced very greenly and ungenerously down the back straight and bumped the rail 600 M out, offered little in the straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Box-seated on fence in 4th or 5th about 2Ls from the pace until home straight, soon outpaced.
Without early pace, rearward and at least 5Ls from the front until straightening for home, ceded further ground.
Held the 'one-out-one-back' position through first half, losing prominence and pressured entering home straight, petered out tamely. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Pressed on out 4-wide at first, 3-wide no cover 1L back 2nd at 1000 M, struggling to keep up 500 M out, very weak and eased late.
2-wide and 4Ls back in 8th at 1200 M and edged closer in 5th turning for home, lacked a turn of foot.
Disputed early pace, a neck 2nd at 1100 M, over 1L back in 3rd and ridden along to stay in touch turning for home, faded out.
Always worse than midfield and at least 4Ls or 5Ls from the pace, never dangerous.
Travelled sweetly on fence in 4th or 5th about 2Ls off pace until straightening when quickening up well to lead, pulled clear decisively.
Best away and no more than 1L clear on fence from 1200 M to 600 M, headed at top of home straight and steadily faded out of the picture.
3-back on fence about 3Ls back in 7th at halfway, 2Ls down in 4th turning in, did enough to place.
Slowly away, one from rear about 8Ls off speed at halfway, recovered a little ground without threatening.
Always rearward, 9Ls last at the 800 M, still last turning for home, never a factor.
4-back on the rails about 5Ls off pace at 1200 M, closer and travelling well entering home straight, finished off only fairly.
6Ls back in 10th when pressured to improve 500 M out, widest (5-wide) spinning for home, ran on well for 2nd but no hope with the winner.
Settled in a prominent spot, 1-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, benefited by the slow tempo, however closed the race off only fairly, checked 200 M.
Took rail easily and led by 1-1/2Ls at advantageous slow sectionals, hung on strongly until 150 M overhauled, ran on well to the line.
Hard ridden to occupy a rail spot in midfield, 5Ls off the leader, momentarily held up 300 M, dashed strongly when clear despite harmed by the slow pace.
Slow away, soon took a midfield spot, 5-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, blocked most straight, dashed well when clear despite not suited by the slow pace.
Pushed to obtain the box seat, 2Ls behind the slow pace, lacked turn of foot in straight, held up for running 200 M. Only clear when too late.
Hard ridden to secure a prominent position, 3-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, enjoyed the slow early sectionals, closed the race off strongly, dominated 150 M.
Eased back, 8-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, swept towards 4-wide at home bend, harmed by the slow pace, dashed fairly.
Behind midfield on the fence, 6-1/2Ls off the leader, not suited by the slow pace, swept towards 3-wide at home bend, just ran on ok in last quarter.
Midfield, raced 3-wide without cover throughout and lost too much ground, 5Ls off the leader, harmed by the slow tempo, held ground in straight.
Eased to rear, 10Ls off the leader 2-wide, took rail in back straight and moved closer, not suited by the slow pace, ran on fairly in final stages.
Eased to sit behind midfield along the rails, 6-1/2Ls off the leader, harmed by the slow pace, blocked most straight, clear when race was over.
Eased to rear and took rail, 8-1/2Ls off the leader, harmed by the slow pace, demonstrated strong finishing efforts 200 M to finish 2nd.
Broke well, close up briefly, soon settled in midfield on rails, in similar position when badly hampered after straightening, just kept on same pace in the run home.
Soon took up running, led or disputed led, drifted off rails straightening when 1L in front, swamped under pressure closing stages.
Raced wide without cover in midfield, lost position when wider turning for home, made no impression in straight.
With leaders early, settled one-out-one-back in 3rd far side, similar turning in, kept on steadily without quickening.
Settled in midfield, went wide making home turn, ran on under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Slightly slow out, settled in rear of field, quickened well down centre of straight to snatch victory late.
Began fairly from one draw, soon settled about 2.5Ls off the speed in 4th, one back in 3rd on rails turning in, ran home one-paced.
Slow to start and soon checked, trailed the field until effort up Rock, sustained progress on rails around bend, just 2Ls off turning in, met interferences 200 M out, ran on for best work late.
Sluggish at start, remained well behind to straight, made good progress when widest runner down the track to be nearest at finish, jockey warned for his riding at the finish.
Well there, disputed lead far side, chased leader into straight, folded up quickly.
Settled in rear of midfield, minor interferences after straightening, ran home one-paced.
Eased on jumping from the wide barrier, settled in the rear trailing 8Ls to leader, held up briefly near 200 M, switched out and closed off the race very strongly. Lost out in a 4 way photo finish.
Assumed a position in midfield 4Ls behind leader, shuffled back making the home turn and had to be shaken up, picked up gradually on straightening and did his best work towards the finish.

Moderate jump, travelled in a rearward position about 6Ls off the pace, improved its position rounding the bend, responded well under pressure and came with a serious challenge inside 300 M. Narrowly beaten.
Raced towards the rear in a 3-wide position trailing 7Ls to the leader. Carried wide on turn, last going into straight and was unable to pick up. Never a factor.
Swiftly away, up there with the pace in a handy position, under pressure making the home turn, found nothing when asked and gradually faded in the run to the finish.

Well enough away, unable to cross early and was forced wide on the 1st turn, raced prominently behind leader, under pressure passing 500 M, soon struggled to keep up with leaders, no extra inside 200 M .
Travelled a shade keen in early stages, later settled in a 3-wide position with cover, brought with a well-timed challenge inside 300 M, quickened up well to get there just in time.
Unable to slot in after jumping and travelled 3-wide without cover in mid-division, moved up to take closer order near 600 M, stayed on ok but never posed a serious threat.

Held a position on the rail in mid-division, had a smooth trip to bend, attempted a run down the inside but ran into an awkward position last 100 M , not fully ridden to the finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never far off from the leader, travelled strongly going into straight, progressed well down the inside rail, looked a possible winner but was caught close to the line.
Slowly away, soon taken to the rail and raced towards the rear, had plenty to make up turning in, made even progress to 100 M but had no clear run over the final stages.
Quickly into stride, showed customary early speed to take up running, kept on strongly to 100 M, effort just flattened over the concluding stages.
Moderate jump only, shaken up early to take closer order in mid-division, had a troubled passage behind horses on straightening, stayed on well to the line when cleared near 200 M.
Unbalanced shortly after start, settled in the rear of the field trailing 8Ls to leader, under pressure on turning and had nothing to offer as the race got serious. No impression.

Well enough away, drifted back to race in the rear pack 7Ls off the leader, taken wide approaching home straight, had plenty to do but managed to make some progress down the outside. Reasonable seasonal reappearance.

Quickly away, switched off to assume a rail position behind midfield 4Ls off the pace, inclined to hang out on turning, shifted out into clear near 250 M, kept on well to take 3rd without troubling the first two.
Began awkwardly, lacked early speed and settled behind midfield 6Ls to leader, couldn't pick up on straightening and turned in another disappointing effort.
Ordinary jump, hard pressed for speed early, vied for lead approaching home turn, asked for more effort near 300 M but found little, gave ground rapidly from 200 M.
First to jump, always prominent behind leaders, travelled strongly going into straight, loomed up as a serious threat near 250 M but effort just flattened over the concluding stages.
Settled in midfield under restraint, crossed to a rail position near 800 M, moved closer approaching home straight, raced tight near 300 M but ran on well when cleared despite hanging out.

Awkwardly away, travelled handily behind leaders which set a solid pace upfront, shuffled back on turning but quickened well in straight to lead near 200 M, battled on to repel the late challenge coming from its inside.
Taken back on jumping, unable to slot in from the outside barrier and was forced very wide throughout, unable to pick up inside 400 M and kept on one paced to line. (Jockey dropped whip near 200 M.)
Away in line, travelled in a position better than midfield but was caught wide making the home turn, showed signs of greenness and was seen shifting in and out under pressure inside 400 M..
Quickly into stride, took up early running along the fence at a solid pace, pressed by runner on its outside 800 M out, struggled to keep up from 300 M and weakened rapidly thereafter.
Ordinary break, in mid-division early, still green in its running and had a tendency to hang out, didn't negotiate the turn and found nothing on straightening. Hampered badly near 50 M.
Slightly slow out, held a rearward position on the fence trailing 7Ls to leader, kept to inside on straightening, responded fairly under pressure but was overall not threatening.
Travelled just off midfield 2-wide with cover. Peeled out into a 3-wide line after the 600 M, chased hard in the run to the post to come up short of the prize.
Worked hard from a wide gate to cross and vie for the lead near the 800 M. Faded quickly in the straight. Finished tailed out. To Trial.
As the start was affected, lunged forward and broke open the front gate of its stall losing ground. Made good yards in the early stages to travel behind midfield, paddled thereafter.
Ridden hard for most of the early stages before settling 1 out 1 back. Hung out in the middle stages and gave in quickly after turning for home.
On jumping was taken back and settled in last position. Made up some late headway down the outside in the straight.
Box seated behind the leader on the fence. For a considerable distance after the 400 M was held up. Battled on to the line.
Travelled towards the tail of the field, 1 off with cover. Over the final 350 M was not able to obtain clear running and because of this was not tested.
Travelled 1 off the fence in a midfield position. Worked to the line dourly.
Went forward and led, difficult to settle in middle stages.
Travelled 3 back, 1 off with cover. Wasn't in the hunt over the final furlong.
Settled with the back makers, 2 deep with cover. Struggled in the final stretch.
From a wide gate settled in about 3rd last position along the fence. Closed off well in the final stages.
Settled well back in the event 2-wide with cover and never looked likely to run on.
Settled midfield on the fence. Got all the breaks along the paint from the 700 M and improved to be on the back of the speed rounding the circle. Forged ahead at the 400 M, held margin to line.
Raced in a prominent spot behind the pace. Kept on fairly but unable to turn up a notch in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground. Raced along the rails behind midfield. Started to fade 600 M out and dropped out quickly in the home straight. (Bled.)
In rear section. Quickened nicely in the straight and was closest at finish.
Raced 3-wide behind midfield. Lacked a response when asked making home turn and found nothing in the straight.
Raced 2-wide at midfield. 4-wide and a length off the lead turning for home. Lacked the needed response to keep pace after straightening.
Dropped back to race in a rearward position. Remained towards the back turning in and closed the race off with a nice rally.
Raced along the rails at midfield. 3Ls off the lead turning for home and unable to quicken in the straight.
Failed to muster speed and caught very wide into 1st turn. Raced 3-wide at midfield in back straight. Lacked a response after straightening and kept on same pace thereafter.
Settled behind midfield. Improved to be within 3Ls of the pace making home turn. Kept on well in the straight for a minor placing.
Raced 2-wide and no more than a length off the pace. Ridden along to keep pace making home turn and unable to turn up a notch in the straight.
Taken back from a wide draw. Trailed field for most of the race and near last on straightening. Never quickened in the straight.
Jumped well. Settled 2 to 3Ls off the pace. Made an impressive run in the home straight despite hanging in and was closest at the line.
Jumped well and took the lead. Had a length's advantage going into the home straight. Kept on nicely in the straight and held off a late challenger.
Raced 3-wide and without cover among leaders in back straight. A length off the pace making home turn but weakened on straightening.

Broke well from wide draw, raced wide with leaders throughout far side, settled just outside leader before the bend, disputed lead into straight, gradually faded under pressure inside 300 M. (Tactic questioned.)
Gradually took up running on rails, holding narrow advantage until joined around home bend, folded up quickly after straightening. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Settled wide in forward of midfield, ran home steadily to reach 2nd inside 200 M, overhauled when no extra near finish.
Waited with, finished off race strongly inside final 200 M, nearest at finish.
Began with others and was looking for cover, settled in better than midfield position before rapid progress around bend to join leaders, lost touch under pressure over 300 M out.
Began awkwardly, settled in midfield, slightly worse around bend and turning in, kept on same pace in the run home. (Tactic questioned.)
Settled at the back from wide draw, remained well back to straight, snuck up on rails turning in and early in straight, unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Raced keenly and amongst leaders early, taken back to about 2.5Ls off the pace before home bend, gradually faded after straightening.
Settled within striking distance on rails, one-back turning in, soon obtained clear run after straightening, responded well to draw clear over 200 M out.
Dislodged rider at start.
Began fairly, settled 3-wide behind midfield from wide-ish draw, found nothing in straight. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Slightly slow out, gradually picked up to midfield on rails, closer up home turn, improving when forced to switch 300 M out, fought on without threatening.
Soon in rear, never seen with a chance.
Broke well, with leaders early, settled just off the pace in 5th or 6th, in similar 3-wide position turning in, gradually faded under pressure.
Fair to begin, ended up 4Ls away on rails, saved ground on bend, shifted wide turning, lacked usual dash and just held ground final furlong.
Ordinary break, regathered to race 3Ls away on rails, had a good run to bend, held up in traffic turning, gained gap at 350 M and closed off nicely to just miss.
Out in line, unable to slot in and raced 4 wide throughout, no cover on bend, kept coming despite workload and did well to make frame.
Reasonable getaway, box seated 2Ls away behind speed, had fair run to bend, in traffic turning, kept on reasonably without looking a threat.
Little pace to from outset, dropped back to rear 5Ls or so away, struggling and drifted out wide on bend, never factored and got further behind on bend.
Average jump, ended up back in pack 5Ls or so away in 2 wide line, tried to improved wide on bend, found little and just plugged in straight. (Blood in trachea.)
Fast away, took up running soon after start, set speed to suit in front, still held a 1L lead turning, held advantage to 100 M but unable to resist fast finishing rivals.
Slowly away, at rear soon after, raced 8Ls or more away, back a clear last on bend, made useful progress to 200 M before being held up, clear last 100 M but just held ground.
Began nicely, pressed on to race outside leader, did some work with pressure from outside horse, pushed along turning, gave in soon after and dropped out.
Drifted back from an awkward draw, ended up 5Ls or so away in 2 wide line, pace only average in front, improved inside on turn, closed well down middle to be nearest on line.
Out in line, pressed on but unable to slot in, posted 3 wide without cover outside leader, did work to bend, struggling 300 M, faded out 200 M.
Bounced out, sat on leaders back, used nothing in run, stalked leader on bend, no clear run for the majority of straight, clear from 150 M and dashed well to get up on line.
Eased at start, 5.5Ls off the leader 2 to 3 wide, not suited by the slow pace, dashed well 400 M, however run ended 100 M.
Pushed to obtain a midfield spot, 4Ls off the leader on the fence, carried back 800 M, blocked most straight, harmed by the slow pace, just held ground late.
Eased at start and took rail behind midfield, 5.5Ls off the leader, raced keenly, not suited by the slow tempo, little dash 200 M.
Eased back, 6.5Ls off the leader, trapped 3 to 4 wide and lost ground, demonstrated strong finishing efforts despite not suited by the slow pace and scored its second consecutive victory.
Eased to rear, 6.5Ls off the leader along the fence, momentarily held up 400 M, harmed by the slow pace, no dash.
Pushed to cross in front, eased to sit behind the lead on the rails, suited by the slow tempo, ran on until 200 M, flattened.
Eased at start, 7Ls off the leader 2 to 3 wide at rear, harmed by the slow pace, blocked 4-2, dashed strongly when clear and finished a strong 2nd.
Midfield, 4.5Ls off the leaders 3 wide, checked 700 M, carried out to 5 wide prior to straightening, dashed well 300 M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Pushed forward and settled in a prominent position, 2Ls off the leader, enjoyed the slow early sectionals, however just held ground over final stages.
Hard ridden to occupy the box seat, pushed back from 800 M, 2.5Ls off the leader, not suited by the slow pace, lacked turn of foot in straight, flattened 100 M.
Eased to sit behind midfield, 5.5Ls off the leader, trapped 4-5 wide and lost too much ground, moved up 800 M, soon weakened 300 M.
Hard ridden forward, 3Ls off the slow pace, trapped 3 to 4 wide, dropped off quickly 400 M. (Blood in trachea.)
Pushed forward and led by 1L at advantageous slow early sectionals, hung on until 150 M overhauled, ran on for 3rd.
Based to sit in midfield, 3.5Ls off the slow pace 2 wide, difficult to settle, lacked turn of foot, just held ground in straight.
Broke well, settled just better than midfield in 3L 5th, kept on before weakening out of contention inside final 300 M. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Settled in rear, kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Settled in midfield on rails, remained same to straight, baulked for a run early on, quickened up well once into the clear passing 200 M, did best work late.
Lacked early pace, trailed the field to 200 M, only ran past beaten horses late.
Broke fairly, raced wide in forward of midfield gradually moving up to 4th within 2Ls of pace, commenced move approaching straight, quickened up to hit front early on only to be run down 200 M out.

Broke well from a high draw, raced wide in prominent position for first 400 M, then settled in one-out-one-back position, came to dispute lead turning for home, hit front on straightening, overhauled 350 M out.
Began with others, gradually took up running by about 1L, joined into straight, folded up quickly inside 400 M.
Midfield to straight, kept on before fading closing stages.
Slow out, settled behind midfield, circled field coming out of back straight, 3-wide without cover around bend, responded well to take charge inside 200 M.
Broke okay, settled behind midfield, taken to inside on straightening for a luckless run, switched out for a clear passage 200 M out, fought on doggedly to finish.
Wide early after beginning from a wide-ish draw, raced in 2L 3rd on rails, similar in box-seat turning for home, obtained a clear passage shortly after but found nil.

Held up patiently in the rear about 8Ls back and always had the eventual winner in sight, urged approaching home straight, couldn't match the winner's turn of foot but stayed on well for a minor placing.
Taken back to the rear on jumping, enjoyed a run on the fence and used little to bend, found himself behind a wall of horses to 200 M, but responded only fairly when cleared.

Always prominent behind leaders in early and middle stages, had no clear run early in straight, attempted a run down the inside but was steadied near 250 M, stayed on well after shifting out to obtain clear running.
Became detached from the field not long after the jump, didn't muster any speed and trailed the field throughout.

Not used early, settled towards the rear 6Ls behind leader and travelled sweetly to bend, cruised into the lead with 250 M to go and showed a fine change of pace to score his 10th victory over the mile with total authority.

Didn't lead as anticapted but was never far away from the pace, settled one out one back going into straight, briefly hit front inside 300 M but had a tendency to hang in forcing necessary correction by the jockey. Just held on for 4th.

Slow into stride, assumed an unexpected forward position just behind leader, travelled well enough going into straight, quickened well to join the lead with 300 M to go but found no extra inside 200 M. Weakened thereafter.
Began well, held back in search for cover but was unable to tuck in, raced keen down the back straight, found little when placed under pressure, dropped out inside 150 M.
Quickly into stride, took up running on the fence at a steady pace, had an uncontested lead throughout, unable to keep on in straight, headed near 350 M and weakened rapidly inside 250 M.

Began in line, travelled in a 3-wide spot behind midfield, had a smooth run to straight, made a bold bid for victory near 300 M, picked up well to post a career best performance but was firmly put into place by the classy winner.
Lost ground at start, soon taken to a midfield position on the rail 4Ls back, had a clear passage down the inside on straightening, ran another honest race without seriously threatening.
Settled in mid-division 3 to 4Ls back, travelled 2-wide with cover, peeled out approaching home straight, unable to quicken and dropped out passing 150 M.
Showed good pace from jump, held front but taken on for lead, set up a solid tempo in mid-section, shared lead on turning, soon headed but did keep on evenly over concluding stages given workload.
Began with them, worked across but unable to slot in, posted 3 wide 5Ls away in midfield, did too much work in run, faded from turn and just plugged in straight.

Taken back from outset, more than 12Ls back and with solid pace on, always a clear last well off front, gradually improved on bend, let down with a strong finish and overhauled rivals final 100 M to score nicely.
Drifted back soon after start, settled 10Ls away in rearward division, helped by strong tempo, trailed 3 wide on bend, made even progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Standard jump, assumed a midfield role, raced 5Ls back in 2 wide line, tempo in middle stages to suit, switched wide on turning, closed off soundly but couldn't hold off winner last 100 M.
Began nicely, pressed on but unable to cross, raced outside leader 1/2L but, pace even in middle stages, took over on turning, held on to 150 M before collared, held on to make frame.
Slowly away, mustered to take a closer spot 2 to 3Ls back on fence, did share of work on speed, improved on leaders back rounding bend, aided extra gear final 300 M and just plugged away late.
No early dash, raced 8Ls away early stages in 2 wide line, aided by solid pace in mid-section, kept coming in straight and whilst lacked dash of placegetters battled on evenly to line.
No pace early, settled 2nd last 12Ls back, improved on to be 8Ls away at mid-point, kept to rails turning, lacked a response and gradually lost touch in straight.
Away evenly, pressed on to sit on back of pace 2Ls away, did share of work on solid pace, struggling on turning, didn't see out trip and gradually weakened in start.
Showed pace, pressed on in search of front, posted 3 wide without cover on a decent speed, did too much work but still shared lead turning, weakened soon after and faded quickly.
Reasonable break, raced 3Ls back behind pace, had a fair trip travelling on solid speed, travelled well turning, produced a strong finish but outgunned by rivals final 100 M.
Out in line, assumed box seat 1 out 1 back trailing pace, travelled well to bend, lacked usual dash but stuck on reasonably just holding ground final 200 M.
Amongst first few out, crossed but took sit behind leader, right there to bend, struggled from 300 M and gradually weakened out.
Failed to muster, ended up 3 wide in midfield 5Ls back, continued to work pressing forward 4 wide turning, 2Ls down straightening but workload took effect and folded quickly final 200 M.
Even break, ended up 3 wide in midfield 6Ls or so away, had cover in mid-section, shifted 2 wide on bend, lacked a dash but stuck to task well in straight.
First to hit ground, continued on to race outside leader, proved difficult to settle in mid-section, right there on turning, unable to lift a notch and just battled final furlong.
Well enough away, posted 3 wide without cover, did plenty of work in middle stages, under pressure turning, stopped quickly 300 M. (Blood in trachea.)
Average getaway, raced 7 to 8Ls or so away on rails, aided by tempo, saved ground on turning, made modest headway before checked at 100 M and not able to be tested thereafter.
Bounced out, pressed on and took up running, kept pace even in mid-section, increased tempo on bend, held a 1/2L turning, kicked strongly and found plenty final 200 M for a strong win.
Out only fairly, drifted back from a wide alley, posted 3 wide 8Ls off pace, still well back to bend, made ground before steadied 300 M, continued to close nicely to be nearest on line.
No speed from outset, ended up 12Ls or so away at tail, still well back on bend, battled in straight to be beaten a long way.
Began well, allowed to drift back and race 5Ls back on rails, saved ground on bend, continued to improve on turning, made brave effort taking good ground off winner to 100 M before run ended.
Moderate jump, ended up 8Ls away behind midfield, improved 3 wide with cover on bend, 4Ls back turning, made a brief sprint at 300 M but just plugged final 200 M.
Slow out, back at rear 10Ls away, saved ground on rails, urged along on bend, made some minor late ground but still only passed tired runners.
No speed, soon dropped to rear, raced 12Ls off pace, still last turning in, never a factor.
Slightly slow out, parked in a 3-wide position in midfield, commenced to race without cover from 1000 M, had a clear run on straightening but didn't respond, weakened rapidly passing 150 M.
Average beginning, pressed on to hold a prominent position behind leader, made his move shortly after straightening, kept giving but unable to bridge the gap with the leader..

Drawn on the inside, assumed a midfield spot on the rail 3Ls back, unsuited by the slow pace and was difficult to settle, trapped towards the inside in straight and had no clear crack until 200 M, finished off the race nicely.

Guided to a midfield position not far off from leaders, had a smooth run to bend, made good headway inside 300 M, looked a possible winner but was just caught by the fast finishing winner in closing stages.
Taken back on jumping, held up in the rear 5Ls off the pace, peeled out approaching home straight, had plenty to do but gradually picked up inside 400 M, ran on strongly to take charge close home.

Dropped back to the rear on jumping, crossed to a rail position and raced 4 to 5Ls behind leader, inconvenienced by the slow sectionals, didn't pick up under pressure and kept on one-paced to the line.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Quickly into stride, soon took up running on the fence and led them slowly, still had plenty in hand on straightening, kept on strongly to line and was just overhauled in the final stages.
Unable to cross from a wide barrier, unsettled in early stages when racing in a forward position without cover, couldn't quicken in the straight and commenced to give ground gradually passing 200 M.
Standard jump, settled towards the back of mid-division 3 to 4Ls off the pace, threatened with a strong run 300 M out but his run turned flat inside 100 M.
Tracked the leader along the fence. Had no real excuses.
Was last early before switching in near the 1000 M and settling 3 back the fence. Got to the line well after being held up until near the 300 M.
Travelled keenly in the early stages settling with the back markers, 3-wide with cover. Peaked on its run inside the final stages to come up short.
Slow to begin and settled in last spot. Made a wide run on bend, didn't run on in straight. (Vet reported post race blood in the trachea.)
Travelled with the back few, however was last arriving on the home turn, came wide in the straight, worked home well enough.
Raced outside the leader without pressuring. Faded in the run home.
Travelled handy to the leaders. Never saw daylight until the furlong, whacked away over the concluding stages.
Led and set leisurely tempo in front to make every post a winner. Skipped away from the remainder of the field by the home turn and won easily.
Was posted 3-wide without cover making the circle when racing behind the speed. Not likely.
No better than midfield. Towards the rear on straightening. Closed off well despite taking some time to pick up in the home straight.
Taken back from a wide draw and raced behind midfield. Remained wide turning for home. Kept on steadily and made up ground in the straight.
Raced within 2Ls of the lead. Quickened nicely when asked after straightening. Kept on well but unable to pose serious threat to winner.
No worse than midfield. Switched out making home turn. Steadily made up ground in the straight and was closest at finish.
Raced 3-wide among leaders without cover. Failed to keep pace after straightening and weakened.
Lead or disputed lead. Opened up a clear advantage after straightening and kept on well final stages to hold off challengers.
Behind midfield. Near the back and was wide turning for home. Made up ground over beaten runners in the straight.
Missed the kick and raced in rear section. Made up some ground in the early part of the home straight, but unable to sustain effort in the final 200 M.
Taken back from a wide draw and raced in rear section. Hung out and was widest making home turn. Made up some ground in the home straight.
Best out but was wide and without cover among leaders early stages. No more than 2Ls off the lead making home turn. Ran on well in the straight and held onto a minor placing.
Off slowly. Raced along the rails and was no better than midfield. Ridden along and was 3 to 4Ls off making home turn. Remained on same pace in the straight.
Ridden along and raced at midfield. Crowded making home turn and weakened in the straight.
Disputed front until straightening. Weakened thereafter.
Jumped awkwardly and raced towards the rear. Trailed field turning in and made up some late ground.
Best away but opted to track the leading quartet on fence down back straight, led about 300 M out but headed about 100 M out, had his chance.
Went back from wide gate, about 8Ls off the pace until straightening, one-paced to wrap up.
Parked behind fast early pace in midfield, 4Ls behind off last bend when held up for about 100 M, ran on strongly once clear, only just denied, unlucky.
Fractious in gates, disputed fast early tempo out 3-wide with cover, weakened in the straight. (Bled.)
In front rank within 1L of a fast tempo until home straight, stayed on gamely in the final 400 M, solid effort to take 3rd.
Trapped 4-wide no cover throughout but still pressed on to lead 800 M out, retreated swiftly from top of home straight.
Lost ground at the start and soon 7Ls adrift in rear, edged closer turning in, helped by fast pace to lead out wide on the line.
Better than midfield about 2-1/2Ls from the lead through to final bend, had his chance to at least place but lacked the turn of foot.
Midfield down backstretch, shuffled back slightly on the circle and never very dangerous in the final third.
Disputed early pace on fence and skipped 1L clear turning for home, headed about 200 M out and steadily faded out of the money.
Always well back at least 7Ls from the pace, never a factor.
Always slightly worse than midfield at least 4Ls or 5Ls behind a strong pace, recovered very minor late ground down centre of the track.
Unacceptable performance, in touch down the back straight but very weak inside the final 600 M and eased down a long way out.
Always slightly worse than midfield at least 4Ls or 5Ls behind a strong pace.
Box-seated in 3rd about 2Ls off pace until home straight, gave best chase to the winner but never likely to poke to his head in front.
Close up in 4th at the 800 M, slipped out of contention in the straight having been suited by being close to the pace in a leader-dominated race.
Taken back from a wide gate, rearward and 7Ls behind turning in, stay on well from the rear for 4th.
Worse than midfield at first and shuffled back to 8Ls last off final bend, soon beaten.
Led by 1L on fence until the 600 M, headed soon after straightening and stayed on pretty well to comfortably hold 3rd in the straight.
Around midfield but caught 4-wide no cover for most of back straight and circle, wide trip took its toll in the homestretch.
Crossed from wide gate to flank pacesetter in 2nd at the 800 M, led soon after straightening, pushed out to hold a margin.
3-back on the rails about 4Ls behind leaders through to home straight, yielded ground inside the final section.
Caught quite wide in places, 5Ls or so back in 10th through to home bend, steadily weakened out of the reckoning. (Questioned for poor performance.)
4-back the rails and always worse than midfield at least 5Ls from the speed, petered out in the straight.
3-wide with cover in mid-division about 4Ls or 5Ls from the speed until home turn, outpaced thereafter.
Midfield about 4Ls from the speed until straightening, one-paced to conclude with no real impression made on the leading trio.
Worse than midfield at least 5Ls from the speed until the final third, kept on at the same pace to finish off, never dangerous.
No early speed from the wide gate, in rear at least 6Ls from the leaders, never on terms.
Box seat, not suited by the fast early sectionals, ran on fairly in straight, flattened 200 M.
Midfield, 5-1/2Ls off the leaders 3-wide, raced keenly, benefited by the fast tempo, made ground steadily final 300 M to finish 2nd.
Eased back early, made early moved from 1000 M to sit 4-1/2Ls off the leaders 3-wide, suited by the fast tempo, kept progressing along and closed the race off strongly to the line.
Pushed to hold the rail and led by 1/2L at fast early sectionals, used up too much fuel, soon overhauled 300 M, flattened 100 M.
Very slow away, hard ridden to gain a midfield spot along the fence, 4Ls off the leaders, benefited by the fast pace, held up 400 M, progressed steadily before finding traffic close to line.
Pushed forward, 3-1/2Ls off the fast pace 2-wide, soon dropped off 400 M.
Eased back and crossed towards the rails steadily, 6Ls off the leaders, favoured by the fast pace, blocked from 400 M to 200 M, made late ground when clear.
Hard ridden early, 7Ls off the leaders 2 to 3-wide at back, favoured by the fast tempo, lacked room 400 M, made some ground when clear.
Eased to sit behind midfield, trapped 4-wide throughout and lost too much ground, 6-1/2Ls off the leaders, suited by the fast tempo, made ground 400 M, run ended 100 M.
Pushed forward, 1-1/2Ls off the leaders, trapped 3-wide throughout and lost ground, not suited by the fast pace, emptied 350 M.
Eased to rear for cover, 9Ls off the leaders 2 to 3-wide, favoured by the fast pace, picked up 400 M, dashed well 200 M to win.
Pushed forward, sat just outside the lead, harmed by the fast pace, took lead 300 M, hung on until 50 M overhauled, ran on for 3rd.
Eased to rear, 7-1/2Ls off the leaders, trapped 3 to 4-wide and lost ground, helped by the fast pace, made ground 250 M without much threat.
Well there with rails run, steadied behind leader approaching home bend, 2 back on rails in 5th at best turning for home, made no impression in straight.
Jumped moderately, soon picked up a prominent spot just off the speed, one-out-one-back turning for home, one-paced.

Ridden to muster speed early, travelled within 2Ls of pace before minor interference coming out of back straight, recovered to 2Ls off in joint 5th turning in, kept on till steadied late. (Tactic questioned.)
Soon taken back to rear after beginning from a wide barrier, obtained rails run in last few 1000 M out, closed off race well inside final 200 M.
Began with others, settled behind midfield, steadied coming out of back straight, commenced move entering straight, failed to quicken to threaten.
Began from a wide draw, soon found himself in rear of field, trailed them to straight, made no impression.
Settled in last few, shaken up after straightening, quickened well to challenge inside 250 M out, unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Began moderately, soon picked up to 3-wide midfield, met minor interference coming out of back straight, took closer order around bend, hit front over 300 M out, won cozily.

Broke best from the widest draw, crossed to lead outside 2nd before home bend, ceded advantage around bend, one-back in box-seat turning in, no room until a tight passage appeared after checked 200 M out, fought on late. (Not tested.)
Settled wide without cover in midfield, ran on down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Raced in forward of midfield early, made rapid progress coming out of back straight to take up running, held 1L advantage straightening, weakened out of contention over 250 M out.

Began fairly from a wide draw, settled wide just worse than midfield, inconvenienced coming out of back straight, well back turning for home, made significant progress down centre of track, nearest at finish.
Towards rear early, gradually improved to midfield before home bend when steadied, shifted out for a run in midfield turning for home, fought on steadily without quickening.
Travelled in forward of midfield on rails, hampered coming out of back straight, faded under pressure in straight.
Moderate start, shaken up to take a spot in mid-division about 3Ls back, saved ground along the fence, ridden out near 400 M but had nothing more to give on the run to the line. (Blood in trachea.)
Away with them, travelled prominently behind leaders, struggled to keep up on straightening, weakened and gave ground passing 200 M.
Away in line, settled in mid-division 4Ls back, used little in running, held up on straightening to 300 M, finished the fastest of all and just failed narrowly to catch the front running leader.
No early pace and travelled in last throughout, ran poorly in straight and never picked up.

Switched off to race towards the rear and trailed 7Ls to leader in middle stages, 3-wide turning home, picked up well inside 400 M but never looked like catching the runaway leader. Just prevailed in a 4 way photo for 3rd.

Difficult to settle from the outset, travelled 3-wide in midfield without cover, brought with a challenge passing 300 M, battled on but unable to close in on the leader. Missed out on 3rd by a narrow margin.
Jumped well, restrained to hold a position behind midfield 5Ls off the pace, shuffled further back approaching home straight, angled out near 400 M and finished the race strongly.

Jumped well from the advantageous inside draw, went forward with minimal effort, led steadily to bend and travelled strongly, kept finding extra in straight and stuck on gamely to hold off the fast finishing 2nd.
Quickly into stride, handily placed behind leader, travelled well enough going into straight, ran on steadily inside 350 M without troubling the winner. Outpaced gradually close home.
Eased back on jumping, soon crossed to the rail and guided to a position behind midfield, not helped by the slow tempo on the turn, asked near 300 M but never got into things. (Bled.)
Fast away, showed customary early speed to be right up with the leader, had every chance in straight but responded only fairly under hands and heels riding. Gave ground from 200 M.
Showed usual speed, pressed on and raced outside leader, worried inside horse throughout, levelled up on turning, kept to task but just peaked on run final 100 M.
Reasonable getaway, pressed on but caught 3-wide, had cover 4-5Ls or so away, ridden along approaching bend, kept on reasonably before condition gave out at 200 M, steadied 100 M.
Blundered on jumping, ridden up to hold a midfield spot 4-5Ls back on rails, urged along on bend, struggled when placed under pressure, faded out.
Standard jump, positioned behind midfield 3-wide 5Ls or so back, covered extra ground to bend, moved wider for run turning but lacked usual finish and just plugged late. (Bled both nostrils.)
Bounced out with first few, drove through to hold lead, pressured by outside horse throughout, shared lead turning, found plenty inside 300 M and drew away from rivals last bit.
Began nicely, went forward but posted 3-wide without cover 2Ls back, did too much work to bend, dropped out 200 M when hard run took toll.
Restrained from a wide draw, 7-8Ls back near to last, travelled well at rear, set big task on turning, switched widest and made good progress down outside to be closest at finish.
First to bend, took hold when unable to cross, ended up in an ideal spot 1 out 1 back, tracked leaders on bend, looked a place hope at 300 M but unable to sustain run and just held ground last 100 M.
Standard jump, drifted back from an awkward draw, ended up 6Ls back amongst last few, made a wide run leaving bend, closed off best of rest making good late progress for 2nd.
Out in line, held a prominent spot behind leader, raced 2Ls away behind speed throughout, kept coming gradually in straight doing best late to snatch 3rd.
No pace from outset, assumed spot at rear, raced 8Ls away at tail, kept to inside turning, did best work final 200 M to finish on backs of placegetters. (See Racing Incidents.)
Even getaway, assumed a spot in front of midfield 3Ls away, travelled well to bend, made steady ground between horses to be nearest on line.
Standard jump, settled just behind midfield 5Ls away in running line, used little to bend, continued to close inside 200 M before losing run late and was not ridden out as would normally be.
Showed good early pace, lead briefly before electing to take trail on leaders back, eased outside leader on bend, challenged for front to 200 M but didn't have extra and faded out.
Out in line, unable to drop in, caught 4-wide 7Ls back early, made a looping run 5-wide without cover on circle, unable to sustain effort and tired last 250 M.

Taken back from a wide gate, ended up 7Ls away in 2-wide line, pace not ideal and difficult to settle, in traffic turning, dashed sharply at 300 M when run emerged, failed to chase down winner final 50 M.
No early pace, ended up 6Ls back on fence, not helped by pace, 3Ls down when field bunched up approaching turn, limited room to 200 M, lacked a dash when run emerged final furlong.
Reasonable jump, posted 4-wide without cover in mid-section, struggling on turn, folded soon after straightening.
Began with rest, drove up to land spot on leaders back, travelled well throughout, plenty to offer turning, took gap at 300 M and let down well, held advantage in run to line.
Allowed to drift back from awkward alley, raced 5-6Ls back at tail, still well back turning, produced a big finish making many lengths down outside to take placing.
Began fairly, slotted in to running line 5Ls back, moved 3-wide with cover on circle, shifted wider on turning but flattened at 300 M and lacked required finish late. (Lame next day.)
No early pace, ended up 8Ls away on rails, pace not ideal to bend, never really saw daylight in straight and was not properly tested.
Well enough to begin, assumed prominent spot 1 out 1 back, had fair run to bend, held up 400 M to 150 M, just held ground when clear.
Restrained early, raced 3-wide in last few 8Ls back, had a trail to bend, 4Ls back on turning, made good progress between horses in straight to make frame.
Fastest out, pressed on to take up running, set even tempo to bend, challenged turning, kept on to 200 M before losing advantage and just held ground thereafter.
Even break, pushed on but posted 3-wide without cover 2Ls back, did too much work to bend, kept coming in straight but early work took effect and emptied final 100 M.
Began moderately, driven to prominent spot outside leader, disputed lead into straight, gradually weakened under pressure inside final 300 M. (Tactic questioned.)
Raced wide in last few, remained widest around bend, ran home strongly alongside fellow runners-up, did best work late.
Settled well behind, improving well when baulked closing stages, kept on well to the line.
Began well, travelled in forward of midfield, fought on nicely closing stages to be nearest at finish.
Settled 3-wide just worse than midfield, similar turning in, made significant progress down straight to just fail to get up on line.
Moderate jump, travelled in last few, remained in rear turning in, found nothing. (Jockey warned re riding early stages.
Broke well from high draw, settled about 2Ls off the pace in 4th, made no impression in the run home. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Settled in midfield, responded well inside final 200 M, nearest at finish.
Virtually made all, joined early in straight, forged clear inside 200 M but only briefly, just held off fast-finishers late.
Slightly sluggish at start, settled in worse than midfield, fought on steadily without threatening.
Settled in rear of midfield, lost position coming out of back straight, tired noticeably inside final 200 M.
Began with others, settled in last few, similar turning in, improving well under strong driving when run out of room over 100 M out. (Not fully tested.)
Well there, chased leader in 3rd to straight, soon dropped out of contention.
Began from the widest barrier, remained wide without cover in midfield to straight, gradually weakened.
Slowly away, shaken up to take closer order just behind leading pair, hung in early in straight and was unable to shift out until 200 M, stayed on ok when cleared.
Unable to slot in and was wide without cover down the back straight, found nothing under pressure on straightening. Another disappointing effort.
Began well, soon eased off to last trailing 7Ls to leader, taken wide approaching home straight, made even progress from 350 M. (Jockey questioned about his riding in the finish.)
Ordinary jump, raced in midfield along the fence, kept to inside on straightening, ran on only fairly although he didn't have the clearest run inside 150 M.
Rushed to the front early, sat prominently behind leaders in a 2-wide position, failed to respond under pressure and gave ground from 200 M.

Swiftly away, up there with the pace early but restrained to a midfield position before turning, into clear 400 M, picked up really well and moved to the front near 150 M, kept on strongly to win his debut with something to spare.
