Taken back on jumping from a wide barrier, raced in the rear about 7Ls back, struggled to keep up on turning, soon beaten passing 400 M.

Switched off to race in a rearward position after jumping, held up patiently and travelled well to bend, had 4Ls to make up near 400 M, showed a fine change of pace and stayed on strongly towards the end.
In midfield, showed greenness in running and was difficult to settle between horses, crossed to the fence approaching home turn, struggled to go with them in the straight, soundly beaten.

Quickly into stride, rolled along the rail and led at a steady tempo, travelled well enough to straight, began his sprint for home near 400 M, had every chance but was headed near 150 M, lost out on 2nd narrowly.
Began well, pressed on to race alongside leader, kept giving in straight but was unable to make significant headway.
Set a solid pace in front but was gassed by the 200 M and faded in the run to the line.
Slow into stride and settled in last position. Struggled in the straight.
From a wide gate settled in near last position, 1 off with cover. Made good late headway.
Raced off the fence with cover behind leading division. Whacked away at the same pace for most of the home straight.
Camped midfield with cover, 2 to 3-wide. Gradually made ground in the straight to overhaul its rivals and land the prize despite wanting to lay in over the final stages.
Travelled in 2nd position, 1 off. No excuses.
Enjoyed a nice run in the event behind the pace, 2 deep with cover. Hit the front by the furlong but was mowed down close to home.
Positioned towards the rear, 1 off with cover. Battled on gamely to the wire.
Raced midfield the fence. Failed to run on.
Slow to begin and raced 3-wide with cover with the back makers, had cover. Never likely.
Slow to begin and settled back in the field along the fence. Took inside runs in the final stretch and rattled home nicely.
Parked on the back of the speed, 2 deep with cover. Gave in quickly turning for home.
Raced in midfield. 2-wide and 3Ls off making home turn. Ran on fairly in the straight.
Hard ridden out of the gates and raced 2 to 3Ls off the speed. Only kept same pace after straightening and tired closing stages.
Raced behind the pace early stages. Took the lead on the turn and opened up a clear advantage on straightening. Caught 200 M out but fought back in the closing stages to capture the race.
Settled towards the rear until straightening. Rallied in the home straight and just missed a minor placing.
Jumped well and raced along the fence behind the pace. Caught behind slow traffic turning in. Closed off strongly in the straight despite having trouble getting a clear run 150 M out.
Raced wide and without cover in midfield. Remained wide and a length off the lead making the turn. Hung in and closed off only fairly.

Jumped well and was allowed to drift back to race in midfield. 3-wide making home turn. Quickened nicely on straightening and gained lead 200 M out. Kept on well but lost lead final stages when rival fought back.
Off slowly and trailed field for most of the race. Only ran past a beaten runner in the straight.
Slow into stride and raced towards the rear. Hampered at 1200 M whilst trying to make up ground. Remained in rear section at the turn and only ran past beaten runners in the straight.
Raced along the fence behind midfield. 4-back on the fence making home turn. Ran on same pace in the straight.
Hard ridden from wide draw to take the lead. Headed 700 M out and unable to keep pace turning in. Weakened after straightening.
Raced 3 and 4-wide no cover down the back straight, 2Ls down in 3rd at halfway, steadily lost touch and eased down inside final 200 M.
Disputed initial lead out 2-wide and led by a neck at 800 M, still vying for the lead from 400 M to 200 M, weakened sharply final 100 M.
Slowest away, 5Ls back in 11th at the 1000 M and much the same on straightening, kept on all right, never nearer.
Went back from wide gate, 8Ls behind in rear at 1200 M, still in rear group about 5Ls down off final bend, never seriously threatened.
8Ls back in rear at the 800 M and briefly off the bridle soon after, checked 350 M out but stayed on strongly towards the inside to take 2nd late.
Box-seated in 4th and a little keen early on, 2-1/2Ls back in 5th off home bend, steadily faded out of the picture.
7Ls back in 12th at first but peeled out wider turning for home when 4Ls back in midfield, all out to remain in touch at the 200 M, yielded ground late.
Broke better than normal, midfield at first but left 3 and 4-wide without cover from 800 M to home turn, kept on fairly well despite the wide trip. (Tactic questioned.)
2-wide and in 8th or so down the back, similarly placed turning in, hard ridden to lead about 100 M out and kept on okay for the win.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.

Fair to begin, positioned behind speed 4Ls away in running line, not used in mid-section but did race keenly, lacked extra gear in straight just battling away at same pace.
Moderate jump, ended up 7 to 8Ls away on rails, straight 950 M, gradually progressed saving ground on bend, made nice progress along inside in straight to be nearest on line.

Average jump, ridden along to hold a midfield position, raced 6Ls back on fence, steadied 850 M and shifted 2 wide, back between horses on bend, lacked usual close and just battled late.

Fair to jump, slotted onto rails and raced 5 to 6Ls back on fence, used little in run, shifted out approaching bend, made ground to 200 M before run ended.

Began nicely, displayed good toe to hold front, kept speed genuine early racing 2Ls clear, always travelling comfortably to bend, kept them chasing and found plenty to score with something in hand.

No more than 2Ls off the pace. Just a length off the leader at 400 M. Kept on well but unable to draw closer in the final stages.

Eased to rear, 8Ls off the good pace 3-wide, lost ground at bends, stayed flat until 200 M made some late ground without threats.
Eased at start to get cover toward rear, 6-1/2Ls off the good pace 3 to 4-wide, moved up 600 M, progressed steadily 400 M, dominated 200 M.
Hard ridden to occupy a prominent spot, 3Ls behind the good pace on the rails, made ground 400 M, run ended 150 M. (Lame.)
Settled in midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the good pace 2 to 3-wide, made ground 300 M to run 3rd.
Pressed forward and took the rail, led by 1L at good pace, hung on until 250 M weakened.
Hard ridden to occupy the box seat, 1-1/2Ls off the good pace, dropped off rapidly 400 M.
Eased to rear, 8Ls off the leader, raced 4-wide throughout and lost too much ground, progressed steadily 250 M.
Eased to sit 2Ls off the good pace 2 to 3-wide, travelled nicely, however never progressed and soon weakened 400 M.
Hard ridden to sit 1L off the good pace outside the leader, faded quickly after straightening.
Bumped start, 6-1/2Ls off the good pace 2-wide at back, blocked 4-2, made ground steadily when clear and finish 2nd.
Eased back, raced keenly, hung out badly from 800 M towards the outside fence, tailed out.
Eased to sit in midfield along the fence, 5Ls off the good pace, momentarily held up 4-2, just ran on ok when clear.
Eased to sit in midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the good pace, trapped 3 to 4-wide and lost too much ground, no turn of foot in straight, raced flat.
Began very awkwardly losing considerable ground, soon recovered and snuck up on rails to be midfield by home bend, found nil in straight.
Began moderately, settled just worse than midfield, found nothing in straight.
Began awkwardly, travelled at the back, hampered and lost position approaching home bend, never recovered.
Broke well looking for cover, travelled in worse than midfield to straight, kept on steadily without quickening.
Took up running over 800 M out, obtained rails run coming out of back straight, soon drew clear after straightening, won unchallenged.
Driven early to muster speed, settled in midfield and mostly 3-wide without cover, dropped out after straightening.
Settled in worse than midfield, kept on steadily in straight.
Broke well, close up early, settled in 4th about 4Ls off the speed, found nothing in straight.
Began moderately, travelled in a prominent position in 3rd to straight, gave ground gradually after straightening.
Settled in last few, made significant progress down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Slow to muster despite ridden along, settled in midfield on rails, shifted off the rails around home bend, failed to quicken under pressure in straight.
Jumped best from the widest draw, gradually crossed for rails run, handed up advantage over 800 M out, disputed lead 2-wide turning in, found no extra gear in straight.
Broke well, tracked leader along the rail in a prominent position 1 back, shifted out passing 900 M to be 3-wide, ran on one-paced in the straight. (Jockey suspended for 9 racedays re his ride.)
Behind midfield in a 2-wide position, well covered to bend and travelled comfortably throughout, lacked a turn of foot in his finish but stayed on OK towards the line.
Pressed on early to obtain a position one out one back from leader, struggled for pace approaching home straight, ridden out inside 400 M but failed to respond, gave ground from 200 M.

Held up patiently 5Ls off the pace in a rearward position, travelled comfortably throughout, drifted out under pressure on straightening, ran on strongly inside 250 M but was hanging in and difficult to ride. Beaten narrowly.
Unable to tuck in on jumping from a wide barrier, travelled wide in mid-division without cover, moved closer making the home turn, held every chance on straightening, kept on OK without threatening.
Travelled in the rear trailing 7Ls to leader, had plenty to do on straightening, didn't really pick up under pressure, weakened final 150 M.

Slow to begin, quickly taken to the fence and raced at the back trailing 6 to 7Ls to leader, inconvenienced by the slow pace in middle stages, found nothing when pressed on in straight. Soundly beaten.
In a position better than midfield down the back straight, struggled to keep up from 800 M, made a wide turn and never got into contention in straight.

Awkwardly away, slotted into a rail position behind midfield 4Ls back, travelled strongly into straight, had plenty to do passing 200 M but displayed a fine turn of foot to mow down the leader and score close home.

Settled in midfield along the inside rail, crept closer making the home turn, easily went into front near 250 M, looked to be coming to win 150 M out, kept on strongly but was just run down close to the line.

Quickly into stride, took up running as usual under a steady tempo, had an uncontested lead to straight, ridden inside 400 M but inclined to hang out, had no chance with the first three but battled on gamely to hold on for 4th.
Niggled at early to be joint leader, gradually crossed to rails before home bend, held close-up 2nd around home bend, disputed lead early in straight, unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Made no impression at the back throughout.
Broke well from the widest draw, remained wide as joint leaders far side, gained about 1 length's advantage coming out of back straight, joined turning for home, soon found no extra.
Began fairly with others, settled in rear, commenced move turning in, failed to quicken to make any impression in straight.
Slightly sluggish at start, settled in midfield on rails, ran home one-paced.
Prominent but wide far side after beginning from wide-ish barrier, settled in forward of midfield rounding home bend, made steady headway in straight without threatening.
Never far off on rails, held 2L 3rd around home bend, obtained a run over 300 M out and quickened to hit front inside 200 M, hung on under pressure to the line. (Questioned for improved performance.)
Began fairly, settled in 4th about 3Ls off the lead, closer up turning for home, fought on steadily without threatening.
Settled 3-wide in midfield to straight, soon dropped out.
Very slowly away losing considerable ground, trailed the field to 300 M, produced moderate late impression.
Remained wide in rear after beginning from a wide draw, similar turning for home, made up good ground down centre of track.
Midfield when steadied and lost position early, travelled in just worse than midfield position to straight, ran home at the one pace. (Jockey said horse not striding out.)
Even break, took a midfield position 3Ls or so away in running line, reasonable run in mid-section, shifted wide turning but could only hold ground in run to line.
Slow away, settled at rear 5Ls back on rails, steady pace not to suit, not far away when field bunched turning, had to steer chequered course in straight and made many lengths last 200 M. Unlucky.
Fair to break, unable to slot in and posted 3 wide without cover in midfield, pressed on 3Ls back turning, gradually faded after straightening when hard run took toll.
Well enough away, kept on to hold position behind leader, enjoyed easy run throughout, stayed on solidly along inside in straight before run closed at 100 M and unable to get closer.
Fast into stride, crossed to race outside leader, had ideal run with steady speed, levelled up soon after turning in, hit front and kicked strongly at 300 M, caught in final few strides.
Moderate beginning, ended up sharing near 5Ls away in 2 wide line, not helped by steady pace on, back in traffic on turning, and had no real crack to 200 M and was only clear when it was too late.
Out in line, caught wide from an awkward alley, never better than 4 wide without cover in midfield, still 4Ls down on turning, struggled to dash after using too much and battled in run to line.
Jumped with rest, crossed into a midfield trailing position, raced 4Ls back but overraced in mid-section, had a reasonable cart into the race, steadied at 200 M, not a factor thereafter.
Began well but restrained to rear, raced 3 wide at tail, 5Ls off front, not helped by steady pace on, still at rear turning, made no impression in straight.
Fastest out, took up running set steady tempo to suit, 1/2L clear on bend, challenged and headed passing 350 M, emptied at 200 M and folded late.
Standard jump, positioned just behind midfield 4Ls away on rails, had a quiet trip to bend, weaved between horses at 300 M and closed off nicely to make frame.
Well enough away, slotted into ideal trail, travelled strongly throughout, eased out at 400 M, took length of straight to overhaul leader prevailing in shadows of post.
Worse than midfield throughout but no closer than 5Ls or so from the speed, very weak in home straight. (Heart irregularity.)
Midfield about 5Ls off pace and 3-wide no cover in middle stages, all out to get within 2Ls or so of the pace until 300 M, tired in closing stages.
Led by 1L at first and then vied for or held a slender margin through to final bend, headed by winner 300 M out, one-paced thereafter.
Went back from wide gate, 2-wide about 8Ls off pace at halfway, made very little impression down the centre of the home straight.
Lost ground at start, 2-wide in 6th or so about 4Ls off pace in middle stages, held up for about 150 M out from top of home straight, finished off fairly.
Disputed strong initial tempo out 3-wide without cover, still wide and close to the speed off last bend, extra work took its toll in final 200 M.
Travelled nicely on fence close to a solid tempo, poked through a gap at top of home straight, pulled well clear for another impressive win.
3-back on fence tracking winner HAPPY ZERO until homestretch, no chance with winner and outpaced by CLEMENT ELITE for 2nd.
Close to fast pace 2Ls off leaders in 4th down the back, still close-up but 4-wide on straightening, very weak inside final 200 M.
Never any better than midfield, 8Ls behind in rear to start with, similarly placed off final turn, plugged on past a few tired rivals to wrap up.
Always in rear bunch, about 6Ls off pace to begin with and only slightly closer off last turn, no danger.
Disputed fast pace in places out 2-wide down the back straight, about 1L back in 2nd off last bend, rapidly faded out of the reckoning.
Slowest out, 4-back along the rails 6Ls from leaders at 800 M, closer but no better than midfield turning in, stayed on best of the rest for a remote 2nd.
Around midfield between 3Ls and 5Ls from the pace until home straight, never likely to pose a genuine challenge in the straight. (Mucus.)
Pressed on early for the lead, settled one back off the leader in a handy position along the rail, sent on near 300 M but ran home one-paced and could never quite make up the leeway.

Jumped well, showed bags of early speed to move to the front with ease, enjoyed an uncontested lead throughout, kept going in straight but was readily swept aside by the winner near 100 M. Missed out on 3rd close home.
Well enough away, slotted into a 2-wide position 4Ls off the pace, niggled along on turning, shifted out to obtain clear run near 300 M, ran on ok but had no match for the winner.
Ridden along from the start to maintain a position in midfield, unable to cross and was forced wide without cover on turning, found little when asked inside 300 M and was tired towards the line.
Rushed to a prominent position one out one back, held every chance on straightening but unable to quicken under pressure, gave ground from 100 M.
Ordinary jump, settled towards the rear as expected, used little in running, shifted out for a clear run near 300 M but responded only fairly.
Attempted to go forward on jumping from the wide barrier but lacked early speed, ended up in a 4-wide position towards the rear, beaten early in the straight as early hard run took toll.

Checked shortly after the start and was shuffled back to a rearward position on the fence, moved closer to be 4Ls down on turning, took some time to get going in straight but finished okay towards the end.

Held up along the fence on jumping from the inside barrier, settled in a midfield position 3Ls back and going well into straight, picked up strongly to hit front near 100 M and won going away. A fine effort albeit an ordinary contest.
Taken back on jumping, given a waiting ride in the rear trailing 6Ls to leader, made some headway inside 200 M but was overall not threatening.
Allowed to drift back after start, raced in a rearward spot 5-6Ls back, had plenty to do turning in, failed to muster speed when asked and finished off the race disappointingly.
Away with them, pressed on early to take closer order just behind leaders, couldn't match the winner's acceleration but stuck to task well for an encouraging 3rd.
Slow to break and settled near to last on the rails. Rolled out turning for home and closed off well.
Raced with the back markers, 2 deep with cover. Failed to close off. (See Racing Incidents.)
Tracked the leader throughout along the fence. Was steadied when disappointed for running near the 250 then was allowed to coast to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began awkwardly then didn't muster early speed settling well back the fence. Never quickened when asked for an effort turning for home.
Settled midfield 2-wide with cover before shifting out near the 1600 M to go forward and race to the outside and behind the leader. Gave ground after the 100 M.
Raced just off midfield the fence. Kept to the inside in the straight closing off satisfactorily before peaking close to the post.
Settled about 3 back, 2-wide, gained cover after the 1400 M. Ran wide on the home turn and finished tailed out. Vet reported post race, mucopus. To Trial.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Slowly away and settled last, 2-wide. Never really got into the race and struggled in the straight.
Raced midfield, 2-wide with cover. Took inside runs in the straight and ran to the post gamely.
Travelled behind midfield, 1 off with cover. Made some late ground without threatening.
Slow to begin then travelled 3 back the fence. Peeled out after the 500 M to improve and raced 3-wide turning for home. Maintained a strong gallop right to the wire to record a sound win.
Jumped well and was allowed to drift back to the rear. Trailed field until home straight. Made up ground over beaten runners.
Better than midfield. Box-seated behind the leader making home turn. Kept on well but unable to draw closer in the final stages.
Jumped well and drifted back to midfield. Struck heels and lost ground on entering back straight. Behind midfield and 4 to 5Ls off the pace making home turn. Weakened on straightening.
Ridden along from a wide draw to race alongside the lead. Disputed lead turning in and matched strides with eventual winner before bowing down in the final stages.
Raced 2-wide behind the pace. 2Ls off the lead turning for home. Kept on only fairly after straightening and was steadied 200 M.
Hard ridden to be in midfield. Checked and lost ground at 1000 M. 2-back on the fence making home turn. Lacked the needed response in the home straight and remained on same pace.
Taken back and trailed field. Behind midfield and 4Ls back on the fence making home turn. Kept on steadily and made up some ground in the straight.
Soon in front. Remained in the lead or disputed lead until the final stages. Kept on well to deny challenger.
No worse than midfield but raced wide and without cover. 3-wide and within 2Ls of the leader making home turn. Kept on but unable to turn up a notch in the straight.
Taken back in early stages and raced 3-wide behind midfield. Made up a bit of ground around the turn and was 3Ls down on straightening. Remained on same pace and weakened final stages.
In rear section. Last on straightening and showed nothing thereafter.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Good early pace from out wide to lead by 1L at the 1000 M, headed 200 M out, one-paced inside the final 100 M but always doing enough to place.
Settled 8th about 5Ls off speed initially, closer on straightening, made some minor late ground, wants further.
2-wide and about 3Ls back in 5th down the back straight, pressured turning for home and could only hold his ground in the finish.
Disputed the pace out 3-wide no cover until the 500 M, capitulated rapidly. (Lame next day.)
Ideal slot 'one-out-one-back' '1L off until home straight when going well, looked winner when leading 200 M out, didn't follow through and caught late.
Box-seated in 4th about 2Ls back at the 1000 M, enjoyed a cushy trail until home turn, couldn't take advantage in final section and only held 4th.
Slowest away, under pressure in rear throughout and never on terms.
Slowly away, always under pressure in rear, never on terms.
About 10th or so through first 400 M, 4-wide (widest) taking final bend when 5Ls away, plodding finish.
Held up in 9th at first, similar position but closer about 4Ls from the speed off last turn, one-paced thereafter.
Settled 4-back along the rails in 9th until the 600 M, edged out wider circling for home, quickened up well to lead 150 M out and won easily.
No early speed, a little keen through first half, one from rear throughout, 6Ls behind in 11th as field packed at the 600 M, offered very little. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Slotted into the run of the race 2Ls back in 4th on rails at 1100 M and same and going well turning for home, no excuses for not picking up a lot better.
Slowly away, ran on well in the straight from the rear when 5Ls back in 11th and nearly nicked 2nd.
2-wide and 4Ls back in 5th at the 1000 M, closer turning in with every chance, had no chance with the winner and all out to hold 2nd.
3-wide with cover in midfield about 3Ls back until home turn, had his chance to place but bereft of acceleration.
3-wide with cover at the 1000 M in 8th or so, about 3Ls down turning in, recovered minor late ground to take 4th.
3-back along rails about 5Ls behind speed in mid-division at 1000 M, steadied before home turn, never likely to place.
Disputed early pace out 2-wide before handing up to race 1L or 2Ls back in 2nd or 3rd until homestretch, lacked a change of gear.
Trapped 3-wide no cover for the duration, pressed forward and 1L back in 2nd making last turn, little surprise that most of the field ran past.
Disputed early pace, over-raced a little early when leading while opting to race 2-wide while leading, headed just inside furlong pole and fizzled out. (Questioned.)
Always rearward and 4-wide no cover for much of the back straight, became detached about 500 M out and ceded further ground.
Hard ridden early but failed to secure a prominent spot, 3-1/2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, carried back 800 M, made ground when clear 300 M, again held up 100 M.
Soon crossed in front and took rail, then eased to sit 1-1/2Ls off the good pace and moved to 2-wide, closed the race off strongly in last quarter, just missed 3rd.
Always prominent, took lead from 1000 M, led by 1-1/2Ls at good pace, hung on until 100 M overhauled and emptied.
Pushed early, sat behind midfield, 5-1/2Ls off the good pace 2 to 3-wide, ran on ok in straight until 100 M when flattened.
Eased at start and took rail behind the field, 6-1/2Ls off the good pace, lacked of room from 400 M to 200 M, progressed steadily when clear and just prevailed in last few strides.
Eased back, trapped 4-wide throughout without cover and lost too much ground, dropped off 400 M, tailed out. (Abnormal breathing.)
Settled in midfield along the fence, 4Ls off the good pace, made ground steadily 300 M and finished a close 2nd.
Eased back, 6-1/2Ls off the good pace, trapped 3 to 4-wide throughout and lost too much ground, ran on ok to the line despite not suited by the racing situations.
Very slow away, at tail, 8Ls behind the good pace along the fence, blocked 4-2, made ground when clear.
Eased to sit in midfield, 5Ls off the good pace, trapped 3-wide and lost ground, progressed steadily 300 M, led 100 M, just missed win in last few strides.
Pushed forward and crossed steadily towards box seat, 2-1/2Ls off the good pace, made some ground 200 M.
Better than midfield, 3Ls off the good pace 2 to 3-wide, weakened 250 M.
Always well behind and never seen with a chance.
Began moderately, soon picked up to 2L 3rd, similar into straight, made only modest headway without threatening.
Broke well, soon settled one-back on rails, stalked leader into straight, in tight run on rails 200 M out, failed to quicken under pressure closing stages.
Began moderately, settled wide in worse than midfield, picked up some ground down centre of straight, never nearer.
Settled in rear of midfield, finished off race well under pressure, did best work late.
Soon took up running despite unfavourable draw, held clear advantage to straight, failed to sustain effort inside final 100 M, swamped for a placing.
Sluggish from wide barrier, trailed the field to straight, responded well under pressure after straightening, making good progress before running out of room over 150 M out, not fully tested.
Broke well from the widest draw, settled in 5th in forward of midfield, fought on steadily without threatening.
Broke well, soon niggled at but settled in 3L 4th, similar turning for home, ran home one-paced under pressure.
Settled in midfield on rails, switched inside for a clear passage early in straight, fought on gamely to snatch victory close to home.
Soon taken back to race in last few, in similar position into straight, found nil. (Questioned.)
Sluggish despite under urge early, raced in rear of midfield on rails to straight, briefly baulked about 200 M out, sustained progress to the line.
Slowly away, soon racing detached in the rear, eased out of the race on the 1st turn.
Awkwardly away and lost ground, settled on the rail in a rearward position 4-5Ls back, kept to inside on straightening but was held up near 200 M, ran on OK when cleared 150 M.
Awkwardly away, drifted to the back and remained there to turn, taken wide for a clear passage approaching home straight, ran on strongly down the outside and made up plenty of ground.

Slow into stride, unable to cross early and was taken back near 1600 M for cover, unsettled by the slow pace and over- raced in middle stages, taken wide to challenge, stayed on OK but never looked like catching the runners on the inside.

Drifted back to a rearward position after start and travelled comfortably in early and middle stages, shaken up rounding the home bend, squeezed through a gap inside 200 M and quickened well to win with something in hand.
In a midfield position but was caught travelling wide without cover, niggled along making the home turn, ran on evenly in the finish. Not beaten far.
Made some use to go forward early, settled prominently behind leader, under pressure on turning and failed to deliver a finish in straight. (Questioned.)
Quickly away from the wide barrier, crossed before the 1st turn and led them slowly to bend, pressed by another runner passing 600 M, kept on in straight before fading away passing 150 M.

Drawn low, pushed along the rail to hold a prominent position just behind leader, tracked well to bend, loomed up as a serious danger when hitting the front 200 M out, kept on but effort just flattened out close home.

Jumped well, in a handy position just behind leaders, hampered by the slow pace down the back straight and was sent alongside leader passing the Rock, couldn't pick up on straightening and was swamped inside 200 M.
Held a position in midfield, travelled well along the fence to straight, momentarily steadied twice near 200 M, finished well when cleared. Ran decently in his seasonal reappearance.
Slow to begin, parked into a 2-wide position midfield, moved closer towards the home turn, shifted out for a clear run inside 300 M, ran on well in the finish but was firmly put aside by the winner.

Away well enough, tracked leader in a prominent position, moved into the lead with ease inside 350 M, didn't show a sudden change of pace when pressed but stuck to his task well and held off the odds-on favourite.
Soon taken up the lead down the centre of track, ridden along near 400 M, headed inside 350 M but showed battling qualities and rallied on. Just failed narrowly to peg back the winner.
Awkwardly away and lost ground, raced towards the stands' side as the back-marker, ran on well from 400 M but was just tired over the concluding stages.
In a rearward position throughout, struggled to keep up passing 500 M, well beaten.
Quickly away, shared the lead in a position towards the stands' side, swamped inside 350 M before weakening right out of contention.
Never far off the pace in 4th, steadied near 450 M but made even progress to take 3rd on the line. Encouraging debut.
Was midfield the fence before being checked near the 800 M and was last approaching the first bend. Closed off strongly.
Settled 2 to 3-wide, in third position and in pursuit of the breakaway leader. Responded well to pressure turning for home to reel in the leader and surge to the front after the 100 M.
Raced 2-wide with cover behind midfield. Failed to quicken in the final stretch, weakening over the final stages.
Parked close to the on pace runners along the fence. Battled on gamely over the final stages.
Settled in front of midfield, 2 deep with cover. Worked into the clear in the straight and got to the line soundly.
Chased the tearaway leader throughout, fading on its effort inside the last 100 M.
Settled in last position from the outside gate. Was hampered near the 800 M, went wide from that point on and had a tough run from there on.
Settled midfield the fence. Was a beaten horse before the turn and gave in quickly in the home straight finishing tailed out. (To trial.)
Pressed on from a wide gate and by the first turn had crossed to lead about 2 off the fence and approximately 4L in front. Tired in the run to the line.
Travelled towards the rear 2 deep with cover before finding the rail near the 700 M. Plodded to the finish.
Camped behind the speed, 3 to 4-wide no cover. Kept on well in the straight.
Reared as the start was effected and lost considerable ground. Never got into the race thereafter despite being hampered at the 800 M traveling at the rear for the majority of the event.
Best out and always in the lead. Quickened away from rivals on straightening and cruised home for an easy win.
Steadily drifted back to the rear. Trailed field on straightening and closed the race off with a strong rally.
Off slowly and raced behind midfield. Ran into some traffic 200 M out and stayed on only fairly thereafter.
Raced along the rails behind the pace. Unable to turn up a notch after straightening but kept on well enough for a minor placing.
Raced along the fence at midfield. 2Ls off turning for home. Ran on well in the straight but was never a threat to the winner.
2-wide at midfield. 3Ls off the lead turning for home. Kept on fairly in the straight.
Dropped back from widest draw. Settled towards the rear until straightening. Made up ground over beaten runners.
3-wide and better than midfield. 3Ls off turning for home. Kept on only fairly in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly, lost ground and raced in rear section. Raced keenly middle stages. Hugged the rails and was 4Ls off the lead making the turn. Weakened after straightening.
Hard ridden early and raced behind the lead until straightening. Failed to keep pace and gradually faded. (Substantial blood in trachea.)
Midfield and was wide without cover. Kept on same pace in the straight.
Settled in rear section until straightening. Responded well when asked and closed the race off nicely.
Niggled along from a wide draw and gradually made up ground. Raced wide among leaders making the turn but steadily faded after straightening.
Prominent but left 3-wide no cover about 1L back in 3rd at 900 M out, led at top of home straight, driven out and always fending off PRIME CHAMPION.
Disputed early pace while opting to remain a little wide, 1L back in 2nd at 1000 M, upsides leader off last bend, found nothing under pressure.
2Ls back in 4th at first, raced even closer with cover until the final bend, had his chance to pick up DISGUISE but could only get within half a length.
One from rear 5Ls off pace at 1200 M, only a little closer turning in but stayed on well to be nearest at finish and place.
On the pace but 3-wide no cover at first, pressed on to lead by 1L at 1000 M, headed at top of the home straight and soon surrendered.
Very keen through the first half along the inner, within 2Ls of the pace through to final turn, no extra when it mattered.
Midfield 3Ls back initially, 3-wide with cover on the circle and widest turning in when slightly nearer, one-paced.
Slowest out and soon 6Ls adrift in rear, 5Ls last turning for home, ran on well in final quarter, never nearer.
Slow start, on the inner about 4Ls from the lead in 7th until final turn, recovered only minor late ground without threatening.
Checked at the start, at least 5Ls or 6Ls from the pace and behind midfield through to final bend, retrieved some good late ground, just missed 3rd.
Midfield at first but left 3-wide no cover from the 1300 M, tried to press forward but struggling before final turn and eased late.
Taken back to the rear and always at least 8Ls or so from the pace, never on terms.
Never better than midfield, 11th or 12th at least 6Ls from the pace until home turn, no danger.
Good early pace to cross from wide gate to the rail 4Ls back in 4th a mile out, 2Ls back in 3rd turning in, dug in well enough to lead 50 M out, kept on.
One from rear about 9Ls from the pace at 1600 M, tried to improve out wider on the circle, plodding finish.
Over-raced a little when close to early pace in 3rd, suited by slow tempo, began to lose touch on the circle, weakened out rapidly, poor run.
Wide early on, got into leader's slipstream from 1300 M, upsides BATURO off last turn, had every chance to win, one-paced final 200 M.
Checked at the start, raced 3 and 4-back on the rails through first half, improved to 4Ls back in 3rd on straightening, unable to get much closer.
Midfield out 2-wide about 5Ls from speed a mile out, off the bridle 600 M out and yielded ground in the final 400 M.
Bounced to the front and between 1L and 2Ls in front until the home straight when challenged, stayed on gamely but still overhauled 50 M out, held 2nd fine.
About 7Ls back in 9th initially, marginally closer off last turn, stayed on okay but never likely to feature prominently.
Very wide on first bend, 3-wide with cover and 6Ls back in midfield at halfway, soon struggling, eased down a long way out, heart irregularity.
Settled 12th about 7Ls from pace through to home straight, had to weave through beaten horses and held up 100 M out, might have got a little closer.
Pushed forward, 1-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, harmed by the fast early tempo, ran on until 150 M flattened.
Prominent, 3Ls off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the fast early sectionals, just held ground in straight.
Hard ridden to obtain the box seat, used up too much fuel during the fast early sections, weakened 250 M.
Eased at start, suited by the fast pace but never a factor.
Eased to sit in midfield with cover, 4-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, benefited by the fast pace, progressed steadily 300 M to run a close 3rd.
Pushed early to hold the rail in midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leader, enjoyed the rail-run and suited by the fast pace, made ground steadily 250 M to win by a narrow margin.
Eased back, trapped 5-wide at stable bend, hard ridden from 700 M, never progressed.
Eased back, hung out badly and raced 5 to 6-wide throughout, never better than midfield and tailed out.
Settled in front of midfield along the fence, 3Ls off the leader, suited by the fast pace, soon flattened 250 M.
Eased back, 6Ls off the leader, suited by the fast tempo, trapped 3-wide throughout and lost ground, no progress in final stages.
Eased back, 5-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, helped by the fast tempo, held up 4-2, no dash when clear.
Eased to sit in midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leader, helped by the fast pace, however trapped 3-wide throughout and lost too much ground, ran on well to the line.
Hard ridden to take the rail and led by 1-1/2Ls at fast sectionals, used up too much fuel in early stages, hung on strongly until last few strides, just missed.
Eased at start and steadily took rail, 6-1/2Ls off the leader, favoured by the fast pace, raced flat until 200 M to make up some ground.
Began fairly, close up and disputed lead around home bend, drifted out turning for home, soon yielded ground.
Broke well from a high draw, steadily shuffled back to last few despite niggling along far side, remained same around home bend and into straight, always struggling.
Sluggish at start, soon recovered to worse than midfield of bunched field, found nothing under pressure in straight.
Soon taken back from the widest barrier, trailed the field to straight, produced a strong finish down centre of the track, held every chance but denied by a narrow margin.
Began from a poor draw, soon taken back to race in rear but without cover, took closer order around home bend, made steady headway in straight without seriously threatening.
Well placed in prominent position, shaken up turning for home, folded up tamely soon after straightening.

Began with others from a high draw, soon taken back to race in rear, waited with, no clear passage early in straight and steadied for a run 200 M out, quickened up well late to snatch victory on line.
Began with others, settled within 2Ls of pace with inside run, kicked 1L clear early in straight and soon flattered, swamped over 100 M out.
Slow to muster, picked up under urge along rails to travel just worse than midfield, gradually faded out of contention after straightening. (Questioned for poor performance.)
jumped with others but slightly slow into stride, settled 2 back on rails just better than mid-division of bunched field, not much room upon straightening, ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Raced wide without cover in a prominent spot, given reminders approaching home turn, soon dropped out.
Began awkwardly losing ground, settled well back as usual for a late burst through the field in straight, nearest at finish.
Broke well, settled outside joint leader most of way, carried wider around the bend, fought on in vain under pressure in straight, folded up quickly inside final 200 M. (Questioned.)
Settled wide in forward of midfield after beginning from wide barrier, gradually shifted out for a clear run after straightening, produced steady late headway final 200 M despite shifting ground.

Jumped OK, switched off to race towards the rear, overraced when unsuited by the slow tempo in middle stages, shuffled back to last turning in and was held up till 300 M, ran on strongly down the outside to finish nearest on the line.
One of the first to jump, tracked leaders handily in 3rd crept closer rounding the home bend, had every chance but failed to quicken, faded inside 100 M.
Away with them, settled along the rail in mid-division, 4Ls down turning in, responded fairly and ran home very one paced.

Taken back on jumping, given a waiting ride in the rear 9Ls back, kept to inside on straightening and weaved through horses to lead near 150 M, looked a winner but hung out late and was touched off on the line.
Bounced out, soon taken forward and settled on the heels of the leader, shifted out 2-wide making the home turn, under pressure early in straight but unable to quicken, dropped off entering 200 M.
Ordinary start, enjoyed an easy run along the fence just behind leader, into clear 300 M, came through strongly to edge ahead inside 50 M and just held on.

Fine start, drifted back to a position near the rear, proved difficult to settle and moved up to take closer order approaching home turn, took time to gather speed on straightening but stayed on well inside the final 200 M.
A little slow out, taken to the rail and travelled in a position just behind midfield, showed a much better finish than his recent runs although never seriously threatened.
Patiently held up towards the back, raced a shade keen down the back straight, came wide on turning, made good progress from the back on straightening but ran flat over the concluding stages.

Utilised his early speed and took up running as expected, led uncontested at a steady tempo, held 1L advantage going into straight, all out inside 300 M, headed near 150 M and weakened rapidly thereafter.
Guided to a midfield position 4Ls back, shaken up approaching home straight, ran on evenly but lacked the extra gear to feature in the finish.
Broke well, drifted back to a position behind midfield 6Ls behind leader, travelled strongly to straight, made good headway inside 300 M. Fine effort.
Standard jump, drifted back to race 6 to 7Ls back on fence, used little in run, improved on bend, made run with eventual winner down middle final 300 M, just nosed out in final strides.

Speedy beginning, set tempo to suit in front, allowed to slide passing 1000 M, was 4Ls clear on bend, kicked strongly maintaining advantage to 100 M but couldn't sustain run, held on creditably to make frame.
Restrained from a wide alley, raced 10Ls off leader early but was further back by midpoint, set huge task once pace quickened, well back turning, passed only tired runners.
Standard jump, taken back but forced to race 3 wide at rear, 7Ls back, did share of work with pace on, still back with last few turning, just held ground in straight.
Ordinary break, worked forward 4 wide to race outside leader by midpoint, used plenty of petrol with pace on, faded out from 300 M.
Well enough away, pressed forward but posted 3 wide in midfield 4Ls back, pushed 4 wide in mid-section, tough run took toll and folded from 500 M.
Began with rest, allowed to take a midfield role, ended up 5Ls back in midfield, travelled well turning, lacked usual sprint but kept finding in straight despite hanging to be nearest on line.
Modest getaway, ended up 6 to 7Ls away in running line, suited by tempo and relaxed in run, shifted 3 wide with cover on bend, made good ground down middle final 300 M to snatch win late.
Away well, slotted into 1 out 1 back spot however overraced throughout, raced 3 wide on bend, ridden along turning but lacked usual close and just held ground concluding stages.

Well enough away, box-seated 3Ls away on fence, raced keenly and kept to rails for a ground saving trip, into clear and chasing at 350 M, looked a chance before peaked at 150 M, just held ground thereafter.
No early speed, ended up 8Ls away in 2 wide line, not used to bend, still well back turning, made minor progress in straight without threatening.
Fast into stride, worked across to rails and took a sit behind leader, did share of work to turn, struggling on straightening and soon dropped out of contention.
Smartly into stride, positioned outside leader in first part of event, had cover from midpoint, close enough on turning, kept to task in straight but lacked extra gear to factor final 200 M.
Out with rest, assumed a more prominent spot 5Ls away on rails, aided with speed on, saved ground on fence on bend, into clear turning, did best work final 200 M to snatch 3rd.
Out in line, unable to slot in and ended up 3 wide 6Ls away, had cover in middle stages, ridden along to improve turning, made a little ground before run ended at 200 M.
Began in line, took a midfield spot racing 6Ls away in 2 wide line, travelled well to bend, into clear on turning, made good progress final 300 M but just failed to overhaul winner.
Began with more purpose, pressed on to race outside leader, two wide no cover to bend, still there turning, stuck to task in stretch and battled away evenly to make frame.
Amongst first few to break, positioned well behind leader, raced 2Ls back throughout, same margin down turning, didn't have extra gear and just peaked on run at 200 M.
Poor beginning, recovered to race 7Ls back on fence, took short cuts throughout, still behind midfield turning, made some minor progress without threatening.
Out with rest, ended up racing 3 wide at rear 9 to 10Ls from top end, always in last few, passed only beaten runners in straight.
Began in line, drifted back to race 6Ls away in running line, had a fair run to bend, set a task turning, just battled and weakened inside 250 M.
Standard jump, posted 3 wide without cover 5Ls away, did plenty of work in run, bumped at 600 M, struggled turning and faded right out.
First to hit ground, took up running easily, rolled along with speed to suit, still held advantage leaving bend, defied rivals in straight finding plenty under pressure to score another handy win.
Jumped nicely, tucked in behind first few in a 1 out 1 back spot, had a fair run thereafter, unable to sprint on turning but held ground creditably final 300 M.
Even getaway, positioned behind speed 4 to 5Ls away on fence, enjoyed a quiet run in mid-section, saved ground to bend, closed nicely in straight to go down in a 3 way go.
Taken back from a wide gate, raced at tail 10Ls off speed, set a big task from midpoint, still last turning, lacked usual close and made only minor progress. (Jockey reported not striding out.)
OK jump, raced 6Ls back on rails, broke down on bend, didn't finish.
No pace as usual, ended up 9Ls away on rails, always back with last few, set too much to do turning for home, made some minor ground to 200 M before petrol ran out.
Broke well but soon taken back to race in midfield on rails, similar turning in, making steady headway between runners when steadied 100 M out, kept on well to finish.
Soon taken back to race in rear, remained well back to straight, produced only moderate effort inside final 300 M down centre of track without threatening.
Broke OK, soon restrained to race in last few but very wide without cover, made no impression in the run home. (Mucus.)
Chased leader to straight, unable to sustain effort and overhauled about 300 M out.
Raced wide without cover in prominent position, soon came under pressure to challenge after straightening, outsprinted close to home.

Broke well, settled just off the speed in 3rd on rails, met minor interference before home turn, badly baulked early in straight, never really obtained any clear passage final 200 M. (Not fully tested.)
Broke well from a high draw to gradually take up running, extended lead to 3Ls rounding home bend, drew further away early in straight, tiring badly when quickly overhauled 100 M out.
Raced wide in last few, not much room behind runners early in straight, one-paced closing stages.
Settled mainly in forward of midfield on rails, raced tightly inside early in straight, made no impression closing stages.

Began with others and travelled with leaders early, gradually settled in 3L 5th before home bend, remained similar with in main group turning in, quickened well inside final 200 M to just get up on line.
Began with others, raced in midfield but wide due to poor draw, found nothing under pressure in straight.
Very slow out, raced in rear of field throughout, briefly baulked after straightening, made no further impression in the run home.
Settled in midfield, ran home well inside 300 M alongside winner for a creditable narrow defeat.
Soon taken back to obtain inside run behind midfield down far side, remained same turning in, baulked for a run passing 400 M, finished off race strongly to narrowly miss a placing.

Broke well from the inside barrier, soon rolled along the fence and sat in a prominent position just behind leader, in a perfect spot to strike going into straight, couldn't find the extra gear and ran home very one-paced.
One of the first to jump, vigorously ridden to lead before the first turn, rolled along in a steady pace in middle stages, challenged inside 500 M, kept on till final 200 M before weakening.
Pressed forward to be one out one back in early and middle stages, moved alongside leader rounding the home turn, had his chance but unable to go with them under pressure, faded rapidly form 150 M.
Pressed on early to maintain a midfield spot, under pressure making the home turn, lacked speed when required but stayed on well from an unpromising position.
Away well enough, drifted back to a position towards the rear 5Ls behind leader, enjoyed an easy run along the fence, took time to get going in straight but ran on OK towards the end.
Eased back to a rearward position after jumping, travelled in a 3-wide position 6-7Ls off the pace, moved closer down the back straight, ran on evenly inside 300M but no extra in closing stages.
Away with them, failed to muster early speed, slotted into a 2-wide position towards the rear 5Ls back, had plenty to do turning in, couldn't pick up in straight and could past beaten runners only.
Unable to slot in early and was caught wide making the first turn, settled in a midfield position down the back straight, steadied twice early in straight before fading out of contention.

Began awkwardly, soon grabbed the inside rail and settled in a midfield position 4Ls back, had a smooth run to bend, showed a neat turn of foot when switched out to make his challenge, in charge near 200M and won going away.
Shaken up early to assume a position better than midfield, close enough going into straight, unable to hit back when collared by the winner near 200 M but kept going to hold on for 2nd.

Switched off to the rear on jumping from a wide barrier, had a ground-saving trip along the rail 7Ls back, remained there turning in, made some eye-catching progress through the last 200 M without troubling the winner.
Began only fairly then hung in for most of the race whilst in a midfield position 2-wide with cover. Kept on in the straight and battled to the post.
Raced about 4 back, 1off with cover. Came wide turning for home, struggled thereafter.
Slow to begin and was checked at the start, settled in last position. Made some late headway.
Was hard ridden early from the outside gate to take up a position 3 back, 3-wide without cover. Not likely.
Box seated. Ranged up and looked like overhauling the leader but came up marginally short.
Raced towards the tail of the field along the rails. Ran on without ever threatening.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Began awkwardly and used plenty of gas to go forward and sit outside the leader by the 1100 M. Faded quickly in the straight.
Settled 3 back on the fence. Kept to the inside in the straight and closed off fairly.
Went forward and crossed to lead on the fence near the 1100 M. Was never headed thereafter and fought gamely over the final stages to repel all challengers.
Travelled with the backmakers, 2 deep with cover. Failed to close off.
Settled 1 out 1 back. Challenged soundly in the run to the line.
Jumped well from widest draw but lacked speed to keep pace. Gradually dropped to rear section. Near last on straightening and never quickened.
Settled in midfield on rails. Under pressure at 400 M but lacked the needed response.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground. Settled behind midfield. Ran on same pace in the straight.

Eased to rear, 6L off the leader at 600 M. Saved ground on inside turning for home. Obtained run through the field in the straight. Made progress inside final 200 M and just landed on a place at finish.
Jumped awkwardly, lost ground and took cover behind midfield. Ran on only fairly in the straight.
Hard ridden and took the lead 800 M out. Headed on straightening and dropped out quickly.
Began well, raced 2-wide and better than midfield. 2L off the lead tuning in. Kept on well in the straight. Never likely to catch the winner but held off the rest of the field.
Best out and had the early lead. Took a sit behind the leader 800 M out. Kept on steadily in the straight.
3-wide and better than midfield. Struggled to keep pace and hung out making home turn. Near last on straightening and showed nothing thereafter.
Began awkwardly. Given reminder to keep up midfield in the early stages. Same pace in the straight.
Trailed field throughout race and showed nothing in the home straight.
Bumped on jumping. Picked up quickly to travel outside the leader. Travelled nicely 3/4L down turning in. Led 250 M out and went on to score an easy victory.
Always rearward at least 5Ls from the front, ceded further ground in the final 400 M.
Ideally positioned with cover in 3rd between 1L and 2Ls from the pace until the home bend, found nothing and no excuses for not doing better.
Slowest out and soon 8Ls last, 6Ls back in 10th turning in, made some decent late ground to be nearest at the finish, probably wants further.
Trapped 3 and 4-wide no cover throughout, remained in no-man's-land in midfield and little surprise that he knocked up in the straight.
Wide early while pressing on to lead, never managed to get to the rail and 2-wide 1L clear off last turn, soon headed, weakened inside final 200 M.
2-wide and about 2-1/2Ls back in 4th or 5th before the last turn, outpaced by the principals thereafter.
Soon about 4Ls back in 8th, always niggled along and wide (5-wide) turning for home, never genuinely in the hunt.
Fractious in gates, 3-wide with cover in midfield initially, further back 6Ls down in 10th turning for home, poor run.
Away well to dispute early lead, 1L back in 2nd and going well from 800 M to home turn, led soon after straightening and won unchallenged.
Swerved left at the start then switched inside from widest gate, about 7Ls down until the final turn, remained a similar distance from the lead.
3-back the rails in 4th or 5th about 3Ls behind the lead through to straightening, never likely to grab winner but did enough to snatch 2nd late on.
Didn't break well, 10th about 5Ls from the lead at first, crept a little closer turning in, had his chance to take 2nd but not a bad debut nonetheless.
About 1L back in 3rd but trapped 3-wide no cover throughout despite exiting gate 5, all out to remain in touch 200 M out, folded thereafter.
2-wide and 2Ls or 3Ls back in 5th or so through to the final turn, no excuses for not doing better in the finish.
Box-seated about 1L back in 3rd on rails at 1200 M, over-raced a little, still nicely placed taking final bend, very one-paced but held a remote 4th.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Fractious in gates, 3-wide with cover in midfield about 3Ls or so from the pace through to last turn, emptied out rapidly in the straight, to trial.
Went back from a wide gate, one from rear about 8Ls back at the 1200 M, only ran through a few beaten rivals to conclude.
4-back along the rails at the 1200 M, about 4Ls back in 9th until the last turn when niggled along, lacked any form of acceleration.
Disputed the pace out 2-wide, still sharing the lead cornering for home, found nothing off the bridle, scoped for mucus in trachea afterwards.
Always rearward, went back from wide gate, at least 6Ls adrift until final turn, very weak.
Travelled nicely 3-back along the rails in midfield about 3Ls from the front until home turn, stayed on okay for 2nd but had little chance with the winner.
5Ls behind pace in 8th or 9th through first half, advanced from the 600 M, hung sharply right once leading 200 M, won well.
Slowest away, in 10th at least 5Ls from the speed through to the final turn, dropped out further.
Pushed to secure the box seat, benefited by the slow tempo and the rail run, closed the race strongly and dominated 100 M.
Eased to sit behind midfield, 4Ls off the leader 3-wide, harmed by the slow pace, blocked 4-2, ran on ok when clear.
Settled in midfield, 3Ls off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the slow tempo, just held ground in straight.
Eased back, 5Ls off the leader, not suited by the slow pace, trapped 4-wide throughout and lost too much ground, momentarily held up 300 M, ran on ok in straight.
Eased back, 5-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the slow tempo, held up 4-2, little dash when clear.
Pushed forward for prominent spot early, broke down 800 M.
Hard ridden to take the rail and led by 1L at advantageous slow early sectionals, hung on until 100 M overhauled, ran on for 2nd.
At back but on the fence, 5-1/2Ls off the leader, harmed by the slow pace, dashed well in final stages and finished 3rd.
Hard ridden forward, 2Ls off the slow pace, hampered 800 M, checked 600 M and carried wider, hung out, raced 5-wide, lost too much ground, raced flat thereafter.
Settled 1L off the leader 2-wide, enjoyed the slow early sectionals, however soon weakened 250 M.
Very slowly away, at rear, 8Ls off the leader along the fence, moved closer 600 M, dashed strongly 200 M despite harmed by the slow pace.
Pushed forward, 2Ls off the leader 3-wide, bumped 600 M, not suited by the slow tempo, soon flattened after straightening.
Good early pace to cross from widest gate and get a nice trail 2Ls back in 3rd at 700 M, picked up nicely to lead 200 M out, kept up to his work to score.
Slow to begin, never better than 10th at least 5Ls from the pace.
3-wide with cover in 9th or so about 4Ls or 5Ls from the pace before final bend, very weak to conclude.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
3-wide no cover at first, pressed on out wide to lead 600 M out, upsides from final turn to 200 M, couldn't hold a place in closing stages.
Pressed on from wide gate to lead on fence while racing keenly, still sharing the lead turning for home, faded out in the final 200 M.
Midfield 3-wide at first, left 3-wide no cover at halfway when 3Ls off speed, kept on fairly well in the finish despite the tough trip.
Box-seated on fence 2Ls back in 4th until the home straight, bumped by the winner 250 M out, no extra close home and lost 2nd on the line.
3-back along the rails about 4Ls back in 7th or so through to final bend, had his chance to place but failed to quicken sufficiently.
Slowest out immediately losing 2Ls, switched inside from wide gate and one from rear about 7Ls off pace at 1000 M, stayed there.
Settled 6Ls off pace in rear at the 800 M, still at the tail making last turn, recovered some fair late ground through beaten rivals.
Settled just behind midfield about 4Ls from the speed through to home bend, stayed on strongly to nick 2nd on the line.

Given a patient ride, rolled along the rail in a position slightly behind midfield, switched to 2-wide making the home turn, held up shortly in straight before shifting out to clear, ran on well but the winner found enough to hold on.
Went forward early and raced prominently behind leaders, moved up alongside leader when tempo slowed down near 800 M, found little when required, checked near 200 M before dropping out of the race.

In a midfield position 5Ls back, had a relaxed run throughout before moving closer approaching home turn, came with a strong challenge to lead 150 M out and kept on well to hold off the persistent runner up.

Pressed forward soon after jumping, unable to cross and was caught wide without cover throughout the trip, close enough on turning, appeared to be struggling inside 400 M but kept on OK to the line. (Questioned.)
Had to overcome a wide draw to lead on the rail, had cover from 800 M when another runner crossed in to lead, shaken up approaching home straight, run ended at 200 M when early hard run took toll.
Restrained to a rearward position on jumping, settled last but one about 8Ls off the pace, saved ground along the fence, couldn't find the extra gear under pressure, ran on only fairly.
Quickly into stride, soon crossed to the rail and raced in a midfield position 4Ls back, couldn't pick up under pressure, got tired inside 150 M.
Even break, switched off to race in the rear trailing leader 8Ls, used little in running, had plenty to do turning in, ran on ok inside final 200 M.
Slow to begin, travelled in a rearward position 6Ls off the pace, bumped near 700 M and raced 3-wide on the home turn, made some headway down the outside last 300 M but was overall not threatening.

Used up early to attain a handy early position from his wide draw, led from 1000 M under a steady tempo, became over-raced when jockey steadied the pace near 800 M, headed near 200 M and weakened rapidly thereafter.
Jumped well, settled in a position better than midfield 3Ls off the pace, crept closer approaching the Rock, made even progress in the straight but never troubled the first three.

Bounced out of the gates and soon had the advantage of the rail, tracked leader 1 back in early stages but was shuffled back approaching home turn, finished off nicely down the inside but was firmly put aside by the first two.
Assumed a midfield spot 3Ls off the pace, had a smooth run to bend, sent on near 350 M but lacked a finishing burst, stayed on well towards the line under top weight.
Began with them, settled in a 3-wide midfield position, carried wider by a riderless horse near 700 M, came under pressure approaching home straight, unable to quicken up, dropped away 100 M out.
Awkwardly away, guided to the rail in a midfield position, travelled a shade keen in middle stages, kept to inside on straightening, stayed on well without troubling the first two.
Well enough away from the wide barrier, swiftly crossed to a one out one back position and remained prominent to straight, hampered passing 400 M and was unable to pick up. (Irregular hear rhythm.)
Stayed close enough to the pace but was 3-wide without cover, shaken up approaching home straight, battled on all the way to finish. Narrowly missed out on 3rd.

Quickly moved to the lead with ease, rolled at a slow tempo, had 2Ls advantage going into final 400 M, kept on under hands and heels riding but was picked off easily near 150 M. (Jockey dropped whip near 300 M.)
Slow to begin and was hampered by a riderless horse shortly after start, settled in a rearward position 5Ls back, came wide on turning, hung out in straight and ran on very one-paced in the finish.
Jumped well, tracked leader along the fence, travelled really strong throughout, gradually quickened after switching to make his challenge, hit front near 150 M, kept on to win convincingly.
Began awkwardly, dislodged its rider shortly after start.
Missed the start and lost many lengths, gradually crept closer to race in the rear of the field, couldn't pick up in straight and tired out from 200 M.
Settled towards the rear under restraint, held up for a brief moment in straight but finished off the race nicely when cleared 300 M out.
Raced towards the rear, 2-wide with cover. Never quickened after turning for home.
Raced midfield, 2-wide with cover. Struggled in the final stretch. (Vet reported the following day that the horse had a stiff and restricted action, OVE.)
Box seated. Faded quickly inside the final furlong.
Travelled midfield 4 deep without cover. Not likely.
Raced with the rear division, 4-wide with cover. Came widest in the straight but failed to run on.
Positioned behind the speed, 3-wide with cover. Kept on soundly in the run to the post.
Slow to begin then improved along the fence to travel in a handy position. Was held up rounding the home turn, and was checked at the 200 M, never recovered from thereon.

Camped on the back of the speed, 3 back, 1 off with cover. Pinched a break to improve and be on the leaders heels on the home turn. Didn't have a lot of room until after shifting out near the 200 M, got to the line well.
Showed great gate speed and speared to the front to lead on the fence. Looked the winner until overhauled in the final stages.
Jumped awkwardly but showed sufficient early speed to go forward and race in 2nd position, 1 off. Battled on well to stay in the frame after being bumped near the 200 M.
Settled behind midfield, 3-wide with cover. Worked home nicely.
Raced on the pace but faced the breeze 3-wide. Gradually weakened over the last 100 M.

Awkwardly away then was taken across runners to settle back in the field on the fence. Made good headway along the inside from the 500 M, switched out into clear running near the 200 M, charged to the line, won easily.
Began awkwardly lost ground and settled a long last. Passed tiring runners along the inside in the straight.
Dropped back to race towards rear, 2-wide with cover. 4-1/2Ls off speed at 1200 M. Held up rounding the turn. Switched out for clear running 400 M out. Stormed home and ran down rivals near the line.
Pushed forward after jumping. Raced 2-wide behind the pace. Hit lead briefly 400 M. Peaked on efforts final furlong.
Broke okay. Raced along the rails 2Ls off the leader. 2-wide making home turn. Kept giving in straight but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Began in line, moved forward gradually to lead from 1600 M. Enjoyed the slow sectionals. Kept on strongly in straight. Just unable to hold off the winner.
Pressed to obtain prominent spot. Settled behind the pace from 1400 M. Remained in box-seat turning for home. Assisted by the slow tempo but failed to quicken enough in straight.
Jumped well and raced 2-wide at midfields. Showed keenness throughout. Folded quickly in the straight.
Away fairly. Raced towards rear on rails. 3-1/2Ls back at 1200 M. Baulked for a run early on straightening. Took time to find clear passage. Finished off well and was closest on the line.
First to begin. Taken back and trailed the field 5Ls back at 1200 M. Improved wide at the bend and was 4-wide turning in. Stayed in touch on straightening but faded inside final furlong.
Mostly wide without cover, 4Ls back in midfield out wide at 1000 M, closer but 4-wide turning for home, quickly retreated after the tough trip.
7Ls back in 12th on rails at 1000 M, crept closer off the final bend and poked his head in front along the inside 100 M out, kept on well.
2-wide disputing early pace, 1L back in 2nd at the 800 M but pressured to retain this proximity at top of home straight, petered out steadily.
Went back from wide gate, one from rear 8Ls off pace early on, 5-wide (widest) turning for home, never threatened to improve better than midfield.
Raced much too keenly while rearward and at least 5Ls off pace, held up 300 M out, not beaten so far considering how he fought his rider.
Soon led and crossed to rail to lead by 1L at 1000 M, still 1L to the good at top of straight but headed 100 M out, all out to just cling on to 2nd.
Took a nice position in 4th out 2-wide down back straight, 1L down in 4th and dangerous at top of home straight, couldn't sustain the run.
3-back the rails 3Ls off pace in 6th down back straight, 2Ls off pace in 4th taking last corner, had his chance to place but lacked the turn of foot.
Crowded at start, 4-back on inside 5Ls off pace in 9th at 1000 M, midfield turning in, stayed on well inside final furlong and just missed 2nd.
Performance deemed unacceptable for last start winner, 10th about 6Ls or 7Ls from pace out 3-wide down the back straight, 4Ls down turning in, weakened.
5Ls off pace in 8th out 2-wide at the 1000 M, bumped at the 800 M, dropped out sharply in the straight, performance deemed unacceptable.
Disputed early pace, box-seated in 3rd about 2Ls back on fence at 1000 M, every chance when a neck 2nd at 300 M, couldn't follow through.
Held up in last about 8Ls off speed at the 1000 M, 6Ls adrift turning for home, only ran on past a few beaten rivals.
Unbalanced at start, 3Ls back in 5th out 2-wide at the 1000 M, midfield and hard pressed to make an impact from 400 M to 200 M, faded out.
3Ls back in 5th or 6th out 2-wide before straightening, stayed on pretty well in the final 400 M to nick 2nd in final strides.
3-back along fence 4Ls from the pace when midfield or better until final turn, fairly one-paced to wrap up.
On fence in rear quartet at least 5Ls from the pace through to last turn, held up 300 M out but never much of a threat in any case.
Always rearward at least 6Ls from the speed, struggling at halfway, dropped out, later found to have bled.
Taken back from wide gate, 4-wide no cover on the circle at least 7Ls from the speed, finished off out wide without posing any danger.
Caught 3-wide no cover when prominent early, 2Ls back in 2nd off last bend, kept on at the same pace.
Handy 3rd or 4th about 2Ls back on the fence until home turn, kicked strongly inside final 200 M to lead 70 M out, probably better for further/more pace.
Slowest out, 4-back on fence in 8th about 5Ls behind lead at halfway, finished off well in the straight to very nearly nick a place.
Inauspicious debut, poor start, struggling to lie up at halfway and gone at the top of the home straight, to trial.
Soon led on fence, between 1L and 2Ls clear until home turn, still 2Ls up at the 200 M, headed about 70 M out and tired late to lose 2nd on the line.
Another very meek performance, always in rear and at least 7Ls from the action.
Went back from widest gate, no better than 11th or 5Ls from the speed before the home turn, made no real impression down centre of track.
5Ls behind in 7th out 2-wide at halfway, similarly placed off last turn, made some minor late ground, abnormal breathing diagnosed again.
2-wide and 1L from the early pace but over-raced with the head up, struggling to keep up when 3Ls back in 4th off final bend, fizzled out.
Bumped start and lost ground, soon moved forward, settled 1-1/2Ls off the good pace but trapped 3-wide without cover, drifted away 200 M to win.
Slow away, eased to sit at rear, 9Ls off the good pace 2-wide, ran on fairly until 250 M to pick up and made some ground.
Midfield along the fence, 4-1/2Ls off the good pace, soon dropped off 300 M.
Hard ridden to occupy a prominent spot, 3Ls off the good pace 2-wide, just held ground in straight, run ended 100 M.
Eased to sit behind midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the good pace 3-wide, made ground steadily 400 M to finish 3rd.
Eased back, 6-1/2Ls off the good pace along the rails, progressed steadily final 300 M.
Eased to sit in midfield, 5Ls off the good pace, trapped 3 to 4-wide throughout and lost ground, no progress in final stages.
Eased back, 6-1/2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, never better than midfield.
Took rail easily and shared the lead at good early sectionals, overhauled at 300 M, ran on well until 100 M totally emptied.
Settled nicely in a prominent spot along the fence, 3Ls off the good pace, ran on well to the line, finished 2nd without threatening the winner.
Pressed forward steadily, shared the lead 2-wide at good pace, faded quickly 400 M. (Abnormal breathing.)
Eased to rear, raced very wide and hung out badly, never competitive.
Eased to sit behind the pace group but trapped 3 to 4-wide, 3Ls off the good pace, lost too much ground at bends, no dash in straight, flattened 250 M.
Settled mainly 2-wide 2-back in joint 3rd, no panic when juxtaposed with PACKING WINNER which hit the front early in straight, soon had PACKING WINNER collared inside 200 M to assert authority.

Broke well waiting for VIVA MACAU to cross, tracked pacemaker down far side, 4Ls behind despite sedate pace, soon taken to the front in straight without going clear enough, fought on gamely but outstayed inside 200 M.

Made running setting a sedate pace which slackened midway down far side. Rider reported saddle shifted on entering back straight inconveniencing his riding. Tired out of contentiopn shortly after straightening.
Settled well behind, saved a lot of ground on rails turning in, held up for a run 2 back inside until after 200 M, ran home steadily without threatening.

Unable to find cover early when 3-wide behind midfield of the small field, harmed by the sedate pace and over-raced throughout far side despite cover, widest runner turning in, failed to stay on in critical stage of race.
Settled 2-back disputing 3rd with rails run, held in box-seat early in straight, showed no turn of foot despite gaining clear passage inside final 200 M.
Settled on rails in midfield of small field, shifted out looking for a clear run entering straight, ran home at the one pace without quickening.
Soon taken back to race well behind, commenced move approaching home straight but crowded and faded out upon straightening.

Carried to a rail position after start, 3Ls adrift to leader in middle stages, switched to 2-wide making home turn, made steady progress passing 400 M, came close final 50 M but couldn't wear down the winner.

First to jump, always prominent behind leader, in a perfect position to strike turning in, produced a late surge inside 200 M to hit front close home and battled on to hold off his much higher rated rivals.
Led early, eased back after crossing to the rail near 800 M, squeezed through a narrow gap to challenge inside 200 M, dug deep over the closing stages but was unable to overhaul the winner.
Soon towards the rear after starting a little slow, had 4Ls to make up turning in, closed off the race strongly down the inside but was severely checked near the 50 M mark. Should have been closer.
Slightly slow out, in a handy position early before taking up the running near 800 M, head 1L advantage going into straight, kept on strongly and was just swamped in the closing stages.
Even break, settled 3-wide in mid-division, crept closer rounding the home bend, brought with a run 350 M, kept giving to the line but once again couldn't pull out the extra under pressure.
Jumped well, drifted back to a midfield position one off the fence, checked near 700 M, found little when pressed on in straight and was a touch disappointing.
Given a waiting ride in a position towards the rear but ran a shade keen in the middle stages, carried wide making the home turn, unable to find top gear and was gradually outpaced from 200 M.

Quickly away to hold a prominent position on the rail, hampered near 800 M when the front runner steadied the tempo, unable to sprint with them on straightening and could produce an one-paced finish only. (Lame front leg.)
Restrained on jumping, raced as the back marker trailing 5Ls to the leader, checked and shifted wider near the top of the bend, made a little progress in the straight but never really threatened.
Amongst first few to break, prominent in lead battle early, did share of work following strong speed, in contention to 300 M but unable to quicken and simply battled late.
Reasonable getaway, unable to slot in, ended up 5Ls back in running line, eased 3 wide without cover on bend, powered to lead at 350 M, kept going despite hanging to score a strong win.
Out with rest, took a position behind midfield and ended up 7Ls back in 2 wide line, niggled along to improve on bend, kept on fairly before flattered at 200 M.
First to hit ground, led easily and kept pace honest in mid-section, raced 2Ls clear on bend, defied rivals passing 300 M but soon overhauled and weakened easily.
Slow break, settled next to last 8Ls back on rails, not used in mid-section, still well back on turning, made limited progress only passing tired runners.
Reasonable break, positioned well 4Ls back, 2 wide with cover, not asked in middle stages, struggling on bend, stopped quickly.
No pace early, at rear soon after, ridden hard to make ground and take a midfield ride 6Ls back, not used to bend, progressed to 200 M when run came to an end.

Began fairly, ended up 5Ls back on rails, had an ideal run in mid-section, improved on rails to bend, made good ground between horses once clear of traffic at 300 M, did best work late but unable to wear down margin.
Amongst first few to break, pressed on when caught wide, early to race 3Ls back first without cover 2 wide, tucked in on bend, in mix at 300 M, no match for first two however hel on well late.
Slow out and lost considerable ground, regathered to race at tail 10Ls from top end, still sharing rear on straightening, never a factor.
Standard jump, unable to slot in and posted 3 wide without cover 3Ls back in mid-section, did work on bend, under pressure turning and faded out easily.

Out OK, taken back from widest gate, ended up at rear with last few 10Ls from top end, set a big task, still well back on circle, shifted to outside and made many lengths from an impossible spot to make frame.
No early pace and settled behind midfield 8Ls off pace, not asked in middle stages, didn't have much dash but made some minor progress to 200 M before run ended.
Began nicely, assumed a forward position on leaders back, raced 3Ls away following a strong speed, close enough on turning, lacked required turn of foot and struggled final 200 M.
Out in line, ended up behind midfield, 7Ls back 2 wide, not helped by slow pace on, still rearward on turning, didn't make much progress in run to line.
Allowed to drift back into position behind midfield, raced 3 wide 6Ls off steady speed, not helped by way race was run to bend, lacked needed response in straight.
Out in line, held prime position on leaders back, enjoyed an easy time with moderate sections, right there on turning, stuck to task but unable to match turn of foot of winner late.
Slow out, recovered to hold a midfield spot 4 to 5Ls away on rails, used nothing on bend, kept to inside in straight but effort was one paced jut holding ground in run to line.
Showed good early pace to race alongside leader, advantaged by slow tempo in middle stages, still 1L back turning, hung in final 300 M but unable to keep on last 200 M and weakened out. (Bled.)
Began with rest, unable to slot in and trapped 4 wide without cover, difficult to settle in middle stages, still 6Ls down turning, folded tamely after hard run. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well, soon led and controlled race from outset, held a 1L advantage on bend, increased pace turning and proved too hard to catch for rivals holding margin in run to line.
Faded back from an outside draw, raced 3 wide at rear 7Ls back, had cover but disadvantaged by pace, angled wide turning but lacked a finish in straight.
Jumped with rest, posted 3 wide without cover 4Ls away in front of midfield, helped by steady tempo and gradually improved on bend, kept coming in straight and made frame despite tough run.
