Reasonable break, slotted in nicely to 1 out 1 back spot 3Ls away, had run of race to bend with steady pace, into clear passing 400 M but couldn't pair back first two over final furlong.
Fair jump, took a midfield spot 4 to 5Ls back in running line, raced keenly with slow trip to bend, eased out at 400 M, kept coming in straight to be nearest on line.
Awkwardly away, shifted to rails at tail of field, raced 8Ls off pace, not helped by slow speed and raced keenly, no impression in straight.
Restrained from an awkward alley, raced 6Ls away on rails, not helped by slow speed on, saved ground on bend, made some minor progress late along rails.
Taken back from a wide gate, shared rear 8Ls of slow tempo, chances harmed with slow pace in mid-section, still well back turning, made remarkable ground from tail to be closest at finish.
Jumped well, stayed close to the pace and never far off, bumped near 200 M, ran on ok towards the line.
Quickly away, travelled in a position just off the pace along the inside rail, steadied near 600 M, didn't have the clearest run for some distance near 250 M but responded only fairly when cleared.
Raced handily behind leaders, failed to pick up under pressure before fading out of contention inside 200 M.
Failed to muster early speed, in a rearward position and trailed 12Ls in middle stages, given an impossible task but stayed on ok towards the end.
Failed to muster early speed, travelled wide without cover in a better than midfield position, covered ground on turning, kept giving in straight but was unable to close in on the winner.
Drawn wide, settled in a position behind midfield, moved closer approaching home turn, made some headway to be nearest on the line.
First to jump, took them along under a steady tempo but was challenged in middle stages, took a definite advantage coming off the bend, kept on well to keep the chasing rivals at bay.
Slow to begin, pressed along to maintain a position, lacked speed and was 10Ls away in middle stages, raced greenly throughout and never factored.
Well enough away, caught wide on the 1st turn, moved up alongside leader near 800 M, found little when asked inside 300 M, faded rapidly 150 M out.
Average jump, taken to a position behind midfield early, moved closer passing 800 M, box seated entering the home straight and unable to improve until 200 M, finished the race strongly.
In a rearward position from the outset, 12Ls off the pace in middle stages, made some headway on straightening but was well beaten.
Awkwardly away and lost 4Ls at start, raced in last detached trailing 15Ls to leader, beaten early in straight.
Slow to begin then was ridden along with the whip to camp midfield, 1 off with cover. Swung wide rounding the final turn and lifted well to hard riding to hold an advantage.
Enjoyed the run of the race behind the leader on the fence, no excuses.
Led at a leisurely pace. Failed to respond to pressure in the final stretch and tired noticeably. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced midfield, 2 deep with cover. Didn't run on.
Went forward to race outside the leader. Weakened sharply in the straight.
Travelled midfield the fence. Rolled out rounding the home turn, plodded to the post.
Failed to go the early speed of the race despite being ridden along, settling in 2nd last position. Was last at the 500 M, rallied strongly under heavy pressure to close off nicely along the inside.
Raced with the backmakers along the fence. Stayed to the inside over the last 300 M, but failed to close off.
Was prominent early, but after being caught wide without cover, was taken back to settle towards the rear, 1 off with cover. Went to the post one paced.
Tightened on jumping, settling in last position. Made a sweeping run around the field after the 600 M, making good ground in the run to the wire.
Crowded at the start but by the 1200 M was able to drop in to race 1 out 1 back. Peeled out turning for home, had every chance.
Settled 3 back the fence. Struggled over the concluding stages.
Best away. Soon taken to the rails racing prominently behind the pace. Took the lead 900 M out. Hung onto lead until 300 M, ran on for 3rd.
Slowly away and always in rear at least 8Ls off pace until 800 M, 5Ls down off the last turn. Made a moderate late bid down centre of track.
Broke slowly, 2-wide and 4Ls back in 6th at 1100 M. Closer and travelling well entering home straight. Finished off just fairly.
Switched inside from widest gate and trailed field. A little closer making home turn. Made some minor late ground past beaten rivals.
Began awkwardly, settled 2-wide and 6Ls back in 8th at 800 M, 3Ls off swinging for home. Ran on well in the finish but couldn't get to leading trio.
Jumped reasonably. Slotted into 2-wide position 2Ls off the speed at 1200 M. Shifted out to be 3-wide approaching the bend going forward. Remained one-paced in the straight.
Unable to work across from a wide draw and eased to travel wide without cover for most of the race. Dropped out soon after straightening.

Moderate jump. Pressed on to hold a midfield position 2 to 3 Ls off the pace 900 M out through to home turn. Picked up well on straightening and looked threatening 150 M out but unable to run down rival late.
Slowest out, raced along the rails 7Ls off the leader at 1000 M. Made some progress down the inside on straightening but weakened in the final 50 M.
Quickly into stride, driven to lead until after 1000 M. 2-wide and a length off the lead back straight. Hard ridden at 400 M and faded quickly in the home straight.
Bumped upon jumping. Failed to muster speed and raced 2-wide in a rearward position. Pressed on 600 M out but lacked a finish in the straight.
Began well. Assumed a handy position on the rails within 2Ls off the pace. Found the front in the final furlong. Kept on strongly to hold off rivals.
4-back on the rails in 10th down back straight, 5Ls down turning for home and still rearward, made only fair late ground, never nearer.
3-back on fence about 3Ls from the front around midfield through to final turn, held up briefly 200 M out, stayed on well on inside late to nick 2nd.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Midfield but left 3-wide no cover from the 700 M, 4Ls down turning for home, didn't fade out entirely after the tough passage to his credit. (Tactic questioned.)
4-wide no cover initially, found cover soon after and 5Ls back in 8th out 3-wide turning in, one-paced thereafter.
Tackled early for the lead, crossed to fence to lead by 1L from 800 M to home bend, pulled clear inside the final furlong, did it well.
Keen early when racing 2Ls back in 4th out 2-wide, still close-up off last bend, one-paced to wrap up.
Enjoyed the box seat trail on fence 2Ls or so back in 3rd or 4th until home turn, had his chance to place, just missed out.
3Ls back in 6th on fence out 2-wide at halfway, outpaced in the final third.
Caught wide no cover early before tracking winner 1L back in 2nd out 2-wide from 700 M to final turn, outpaced by winner, all out to just place.
At least 4Ls back in 8th or 9th out 2-wide before taking the home turn, stayed on strongly inside final 100 M, only just missed a place.
Soon racing one from rear and 7Ls last entering home straight, recovered only minor late ground, no real threat.
3-wide no cover 1L off pace at 1000 M, a neck 2nd at the 800 out 2-wide, still right there turning for home but did not find anything off the bridle.
Caught 4-wide no cover early on and 3-wide no cover at halfway when 1L off pace, extra work took its toll in the straight.
Bounced to the lead and 1L clear at 1100 M, about a neck up from the 800 M but headed before the home turn and slipped out of contention.
4-back on fence in 10th about 5Ls from lead at halfway, still well back but going nicely turning in, quickened up well to lead inside 100 M, kept on.
Hampered at 1100 M, 2-wide with cover in 8th or so between 3Ls and 4Ls from the pace through to homestretch, muted response when it mattered.
Box-seated in 5th on fence early, hampered at 1100 M, still close-up before being galloped on and losing his action off final turn, pulled up.
Midfield 3-wide with cover 4Ls from pace at 1000 M, darted forward from the 500 M to lead at top of home turn, 2Ls clear 200 M out, lost quinella inside final 100 M.
Checked early on, crowded at 600 M when 3-back on the rails when 4Ls back in 8th, steadied turning in, didn't finish with quite his usual flourish.
Taken back and 7Ls last at 1100 M, 5Ls last turning for home, stayed on strongly through to the field to take 2nd close home.
1L back in 3rd at the 1000 M, steadied at the 800 M but still handily placed off last turn, very one-paced to finish.
5Ls back in 9th with cover at the 1000 M and edged closer making the last turn, 2Ls back in 2nd at the furlong pole but couldn't sustain the bid.
Went back, 6Ls back in rear at 1200 M, 5-wide (widest of all) when 4Ls down, stayed on okay for 4th.
Settled in box seat, favoured by the slow early sectionals, weakened 250 M.
Hard ridden early to obtain a more prominent spot, 2-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, benefited by the slow tempo, dashed well 250 M to grab 2nd.
Pushed forward, settled 1-1/2Ls off the slow pace, however trapped 3-wide throughout and lost too much ground, faded quickly 300 M.
Hard ridden to sit outside the lead, enjoyed the slow early tempo, ran on until 200 M flattened.
Took rail easily and led by 1/2L at advantageous slow early sectionals, hung on strongly until 50 M when overhauled, ran on for 3rd.
Eased back, 5Ls off the leader along the fence, harmed by the slow pace, blocked 4-2, dashed well when clear.
Eased to sit in midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, momentarily held up 300 M, dashed strongly when clear and scored.
Eased at start to take rail behind the field, then ridden along to gain a midfield spot, 3-1/2Ls off the leader, not suited by the slow pace, just held ground in final stages.
Eased back, 6-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the slow tempo, just ran on ok in straight.
Eased to rear, 7Ls off the leader on the fence, harmed by the slow pace, dashed fairly in final stages.

Hard ridden early but failed to challenge the lead, 3Ls off the leader, not suited by the slow tempo, trapped 3 to 4-wide throughout and lost too much ground, still held ground in straight despite all negative racing situations.
Dipped after start, behind midfield, 5Ls off the leader 2-wide, dashed strongly 250 M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Not the fastest to jump from a high draw but soon took up running, held clear advantage to straight holding a 2L break most of way, failed to sustain effort when headed inside 200 M.
Broke well from the widest barrier, trapped wide early, settled in one-out-one-back from stables bend, about 2Ls off turning for home, soon weakened.
Settled one-back on rails to straight, failed to quicken to challenge.
Settled in last few, similar turning in, full of running when out of room throughout final 200 M, not fully tested.
Slightly awkward jump, settled in last few, just kept on at the same pace in the run home.
Used slow jump to get rails run in midfield early stages, similar turning in, quickened under strong driving to claim 2nd over 100 M out.
Broke well, settled 2-wide 2-back in 4th, came to challenge under pressure turning for home, looked quickening but outsprinted by winner when it matters at the 200 M, one-paced at the finish.
Began awkwardly, soon taken back and trailed the field to straight, tailed-off from home bend. (Irregular heart rhythm.)
Travelled in midfield, same position turning for home, responded well inside final 200 M to take command about 100 M out.
Settled in rear of midfield, kept on well to the line.
Broke well, gradually settled for cover 2-back mostly in 5th on rails, angled out for a run turning in, ran home steadily for a nice finish.
Began well, soon taken back behind midfield, forced to switch over 150 M out, sustained steady headway to the line.
Made use early to overcome a wide barrier, pulled his way to 2nd approaching home turn, under pressure shortly on straightening, gave ground from 200 M.
Quickly away, eased off to take a sit behind leaders, in a perfect spot to strike turning in, unable to seriously threaten the winner but kept on well to the line.
Average beginning, lacked early speed and settled in a rearward position 7Ls back, had to switch wide for clear running in straight, made some headway inside final 200 M. (Questioned.)
Shaken up early to hold a prominent position 1 back, travelled nicely for much of the way, threatened with a strong run down the inside but was gradually outpaced by the winner inside final 200 M.
Pressed on to assume a position slightly better than midfield, chased the leaders and, though keeping on, could not step up a gear when placed under pressure inside 300 M.
Enjoyed a good trail along the rail with the help of the inside draw, never far off the leaders throughout, ran on OK in straight without troubling the first three.

Hard ridden early, crossed to the lead after entering the back straight, pressed by a runner on the outside, inclined to hang out turning in, soon beaten. (Jockey reported uncomfortable action with the horse.)
Lost ground at the start, given a waiting ride in the rear, had 7Ls to make up turning in, switched wide to challenge but couldn't make any impression.
Travelled in midfield 5Ls off the pace, found little in straight, never a factor.
Taken back on jumping, raced keenly in a position behind midfield, taken to 3-wide rounding the bend, ran home one-paced.
Well enough away, travelled strongly in mid-division, swung wide on turning, picked up strongly to take charge near 200 M. Won decisively.
Taken back from a wide barrier, raced towards the rear trailing 7Ls to leader, pressed on inside 400 M, closed off the race strongly but the winner has already sailed home.
Swiftly away, tracked the slowly run leader in a one out one back position, in front coming off the bend, quickened well and responded gamely to hold off the persistent runner-up.
Took them along slowly, inclined to hang out in middle stages, collared by the winner approaching home straight, battled on but couldn't match the turn of foot displayed by the first two.
Never far off the leader in a slowly run race, loomed up as a serious challenger inside 400 M, chased the winner all the way and despite finishing 2nd posted a great effort in defeat.
Began awkwardly and raced in a rearward position, unsettled by the slow pace in early and middle stages, keen to 600 M, hung out in straight and found little.
Settled one back from the leader on rail, outpaced by the first three when the race got serious, held ground in the run to the line.
Raced without cover in the rear until home turn, hampered by the slow tempo, couldn't pick up on straightening.
Parked midfield towards the outside fence. Was a little flat footed when the tempo went up a notch after the 250 M, but kept on soundly.
Showed some early speed to camp on the pace. Was a beaten horse after the 400 M.
Began awkwardly, tailed the field and never got into the race always well back. (Abnormal breathy.)
Was ridden quietly to settle behind midfield, however was inclined to get its head up in the early stages. Made some minor late headway.
Secured a nice run on the back of the speed, worked into the clear and after the 300 M accelerated nicely under the whip. Looked all over the winner until claimed in the shadows of the post.
Showed good gate speed to land well in front, then soon after headed towards the outside rail and settled about 3Ls in front. Battled on well in the run to the wire.
Travelled in a midfield position, not likely.
Raced towards the outside rail but never looked to be travelling well and over the concluding stages gave ground.

Wasn't the best to begin then drifted back in the early stages to settle towards the rear. Commenced to improve and worked towards the centre of the track by the 300 M. Let down nicely to finish over the top of its rivals.
Was in touch with the leader after mustering good speed despite being slow to begin. Fought on well over the final stages to finish close to the principals.
Travelled behind the speed, but was under pressure at the 400 M, failed to respond.
Raced well off the outside fence in the first 3. Paddled to the post.
Away with them, settled in rear 10Ls off the pace at 1000 M. Swung wide turning for home. Unable to find daylight in the straight and was not fully tested.
Out fairly. Driven up in the early stages and settled 4 to 5Ls back 1100 M out, 3-wide without cover. Even wider turning in. Kept one-paced in the straight.

Jumped fairly well. Pressed on to obtain 6th position 5 to 6Ls off the speed in the early stages. Progressed along the rails 500 M out. Kept battling in the Straight but found no extra gear. Lost minor placing narrowly.
Quickly into stride, taken to a rearward position. Ran 3-wide without cover in the early stages. Settled 2-wide before the bend. Forced to go wider 600 M out. Past only beaten rivals in straight.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Awkward jump, eased to the rear on rails at least 10Ls behind the pace at 1000 M. Unable to obtain clear run in the straight. Not fully tested.
Began in line. Ridden along 2-wide to maintain a midfield position. 4 to 5Ls down rounding the turn. Ran on steadily towards the line.
Standard jump, taken back to rear around 10Ls off the pace at 1200 M. Improved on turn. Switched out for clear running 350 M out down centre of the straight. Drew away final furlong to win easily.
Broke okay and trailed field. Ran on fairly in the straight without much quickening. Checked and eased down 100 M out.
Began awkwardly. Taken to a rearward position on rails around 10Ls behind the pace at 1200 M. Remained in similar position turning in. Made good progress steadily 300 M. Ran on for 3rd near the line.
Jumped well, raced 1/2L outside the leader. Took the lead at the 350 M but was overhauled in the final 200 M.
Fair start, raced comfortably on rails 2 to 3Ls off the pace in 3rd. Switched 3-wide on straightening and weakened in the last 100 M.
Hard ridden to take the lead. Pressured 400 M out. Faded at 200 M and finished tailed-off.
Began fairly. Pushed in the early stages to stay midfield. Hard ridden along the rails 600 M out. Made up ground inside over beaten runners in the straight.
6th and 3-wide no cover for some of back straight, moved a good deal nearer in 3rd off last bend and led 150 M out, kept up to his work to score.
Slowest out, always rearward and struggling at least 8Ls from the front turning for home, remained a long way behind.
2Ls back in 2nd at the 1000 M, 4Ls clear of the 3rd horse at halfway, briefly led about 300 M out but gathered in again by COOL CAT close home.
5th on the fence about 9Ls behind a solid pace at halfway, further back and pressured making last bend, no impression.
Performance deemed unacceptable, slow to muster pace and always struggling in rear.
Worse than midfield at least 10Ls behind a strong pace at halfway, closer in 5th on straightening, had a chance to place but run peaked 200 M out.
A remote 7Ls back in 3rd in the middle stages, 3Ls back in 4th taking final bend, one-paced to conclude.
In 9th or so a long way from the speed at the 800 M, still a good distance back in 9th entering home straight, made only very minor late headway.
Niggled along at halfway when about 10Ls behind a fast pace, ridden along when 6Ls back in midfield taking last turn, kept on fairly well for 4th.
In 5th about 7Ls back on fence at 1000 M, 5Ls down swinging into final 400 M, very one-paced to wind up.
Never on terms and a long way behind and hard ridden turning for home, very weak effort.
Led by 2Ls at the 1000 M, raced quickly to go 4Ls clear at halfway, headed just over 200 M out but rallied gamely close home to take 2nd.
Led by 1L at the 1400 M, a neck to the good on straightening, headed soon after and petered out very quickly.
Taken back from wide gate to be 7Ls behind early pace, kicked from rear 500 M out to lead at the 200 M, kept on strongly to score.
Keen early on when 9Ls off pace in rear, 8Ls back and still last turning for home, limp effort.
About 2Ls back in 4th out 2-wide down back straight, led briefly about 300 M out before being headed by the winner, all out to hang onto 2nd.
Keen early on, 2-wide and 4Ls back in 5th at 1200 M, 3Ls off the pace turning in, finished off evenly for a place.
Didn't break well, 8Ls back in 10th at the 1400 M and only slightly closer before the final turn, 4Ls down at the 200 M, faded back thereafter.
Enjoyed the run of the race on fence 2Ls back in 3rd or 4th through to home straight, no excuses for not being able to place.
One from rear 8Ls off pace down the back when 3-wide without cover, gained cover at the 800 M, never any better than midfield.
5Ls back in 7th out 2-wide at the 1400 M, 4Ls back taking last turn when switched out to challenge, closer at the 200 M, couldn't sustain the run.
2-wide and 1L back in 2nd at 1400 M, about a neck back turning in, steadily faded out of the picture and without excuses.
6Ls back in 8th on fence at the 1400 M, 4Ls away in a similar spot off final turn, failed to quicken up.
3-back on fence in 6th when 4Ls off pace at 1200 M, marginally closer turning for home, briefly held up over 200 M out but outpaced in any case.
Eased back, 8Ls off the good pace 2 to 3-wide, held up 4-2, made ground steadily when clear and stormed home for another close 2nd.
Eased to sit just off the pace group, 2-1/2Ls behind the good pace 3-wide, soon weakened 300 M.
Eased to sit behind midfield, 6-1/2Ls off the good pace 2 to 3-wide, momentarily held up 500 M, progressed steadily 250 M.
Eased back, 7-1/2Ls behind the good pace, trapped 3 to 4-wide and lost too much ground, ran on ok in final stages.
Behind midfield along the rails, 7-1/2Ls off the good pace, blocked 4-2, made ground steadily when clear.
Bumped start, dropped to rear, never competitive.
Eased to rear, 9-1/2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, made ground steadily 400 M, however run ended 150 M.
Midfield along the fence, 5-1/2Ls off the good pace, never progressed.
Shared lead along the fence at good pace in the first half, raced keenly, then eased back for cover in box seat, closed the race off strongly in straight and ran a close 3rd.
Bounced at start and lost ground, hard ridden forward, sat 3-1/2Ls off the good pace, trapped 3-wide, emptied 250 M.
Slow away, pushed forward to obtain a midfield spot, 4-1/2Ls off the good pace 2 to 3-wide, progressed steadily 300 M and once had threats, however a bit weak in last few strides.
Eased to sit in front of midfield, travelled nicely 3-1/2Ls off the good pace on the fence, made some ground 400 M without much threats.
Pushed to occupy a prominent spot, 1-1/2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, ran on until 250 M flattened.
Shared lead easily at good pace, dominated from 800 M, hung on strongly to achieve its first success.
Slowly away and sluggish early, trailed the field onto course proper, shaken up to produce reasonable late impression closing stages.
Slow out, settled just worse than midfield, gave ground under pressure once onto course proper.
Moderate start, prominent briefly on stands rails, dropped to midfield onto course proper, soon gave further ground.
Close up, gradually lost touch from the 400 M mark.

Began slightly awkwardly, settled first behind midfield, then gradually picked up to mid-division, shifted out for stands rails run passing 400 M, quickened up well to snatch easy victory final strides.
In rear of field to halfway, soon tailed-off.
Just worse than midfield, gave ground under pressure inside final 300 M.
Never far off travelling well in the centre of the track, came late to challenge inside final 250 M, did best work at the finish.
Midfield to about halfway, gradually weakened.
Broke well, disputed lead with stands rails run, fought on well under pressure but failed to match smart winner's late burst of speed.
Never better than midfield down the centre of the track, dropped out under pressure inside final 400 M.
Moderate start, soon in touch, gradually improved to join leaders over 200 M out holding good chance, faded out of contention inside final 100 M.
Began with others, soon led or disputed lead, just failed to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Never far off within striking distance, held every chance until unable to quicken under pressure nearing finish.
Broke well, drifted back to a 2-wide position behind midfield, 4Ls down turning in, ran on evenly to the line.

In a handy position along the fence one back from leader, had a smooth run to bend, held every chance but was unable to peg back the runaway leader. Narrowly lost out in a photo finish involving horses placed 2nd to 5th.
Caught wide early, switched off to race in the rear passing 1000 M, 6Ls down coming off the bend, switched wide for a run but ran on only fairly.
Taken up the lead under a positive ride, given a breather approaching home turn, kept on strongly and turned round his recent form to win a convincing manner.

Taken back to a rearward position on jumping from the wide barrier, difficult to settle in early stages, had 5Ls to make up turning in, held up briefly near 300 M before closing off the race strongly. Unlucky not to finish 2nd.
Purposely taken back to a rear position, checked near 1000 M, enjoyed a better run on the turn, made some progress on straightening but run peaked 100 M from home.
Slow to begin, taken to the fence and raced in a midfield spot 3Ls off the pace, kept to inside on straightening but ran home very once paced.
Away well enough, in mid-division early, involved and hampered in a shoving match before the bend, 3-wide turning in, switched wider in straight but failed to make any impression.

Tracked leader in a one out one back position, ridden out near 400 M, unable to make up ground on the leader, but stuck to task well when challenged from both sides to hold on for 2nd in a close finish.
Raced keenly in the early stages, travelled in a 2-wide position with cover, stayed on well inside 200 M despite hanging out. Promising debut.
Began awkwardly, assumed a position in midfield, pushed out near 1000 M to be widest making the home turn, soon under pressure inside 400 M and got tired towards the line.
Reasonable jump, never far off the pace but was 3-wide without cover, found nothing turning for home, gave ground from 300 M.
Even jump, positioned 5Ls back in 2 wide line, travelled well throughout, shifted out passing 400 M, let down with a strong sprint to claim rivals final 100 M.
Broke well, angled into a midfield trail 4 to 5Ls back, had a fair run in mid-section, only one paced in straight.
Drifted back from a wide gate, raced 8Ls away in 2 wide line, last on turning, passed some tired runners late.
Standard jump, posted 4 wide without cover in midfield, set too much to do 6 wide turning, weakened from 300 M.
No early pace, ended up well back 8Ls away sharing rear, made no impression.
Pressed on from a wide alley, posted 3 wide in midfield without cover, worked hard and pushed 5 wide turning, dropped out final 200 M.

Away in line, slotted in 5Ls away on fence, suited by decent speed and improved on rails on circle, switched 2 wide leaving bend, made a strong finish last 300 M but just failed to run down rival on line.
Began nicely, pushed on to race on speed, forced to travel wide without cover on bend, struggling turning and soon dropped out, eased down thereafter. (Muco in trachea.)
Amongst first to break, used a bit early to cross to lead, rolled along 1L clear in front, pinched a 3L lead at 350 M, kept on well and went down in a 3 way go.
Standard getaway, soon in rear division, settled 7Ls back in running line, no excuses with pace on, shifted wide on bend, made some headway but lacked usual finish and struggled final furlong.
Jumped respectably, took a trail behind pace, tracked well 3Ls back in 2 wide line, improved 4 wide on bend, looked a threat to 200 M but peaked on run and didn't go on with it late.
Drifted back soon after start, ended up 6Ls away on rails, helped by solid tempo, saved ground on rails on bend, found traffic in early part of straight, charged late when clear to just miss place.
Showed good early speed, did some work to race outside leader, still 1L down on bend, unable to match the rest when they sprinted at 400 M, gradually faded out.
Began well, showed more speed to hold a spot 2Ls away behind leader, had easy time to bend, running emerged at the 400 M, lacked dash but stuck on evenly to be not far away in finish

Moderate jump, ended up 5Ls back in running line, raced ungenerously throughout, still well back to bend, lacked usual finish and just battled at rear. (Jockey reported better suited to Happy Valley.)
Fair jump, pushed forward but caught 3 wide without cover, forced to work in middle stages, 2Ls off lead racing 4 wide on bend, struggled inside 300 M and remained one paced late.
Poor break, ended up 3 wide with a trail 5Ls away, covered ground throughout, well back on turning, made no real progress in straight.
Outpaced soon after jump, settled amongst rearward division 6Ls from top end, still well back with job to do on turning, made no impression in straight.
Jumped nicely, assumed spot on rails, checked 800 M, 3Ls behind pace pair and gradually improved on circle raced with eventual winner leaving bend, into clear at 300 M and chased gamely late.
Ordinary jump, ended up behind midfield 5Ls off top end, not asked in mid-section, gradually improved turning, switched out at 150 M and made some late progress to make frame.
Even break, positioned move forward than usual, raced 4Ls back on fence, travelled well on bend, angled out turning and made minor progress to 200 M before run ended.
Began well, pushed on to race outside leader, had a fair run in mid-section, right there turning and took over shortly after, in mix to 200 M but couldn't go with first two final furlong.
Out in line, angled to take trailing position but forced to travel 3 wide, obtained cover racing 4Ls back, made a 4 wide run turning and quickly swept to lead at 250 M, held off late challenge.
Began well, pushed on to take up running, set standard tempo in front, still sharing lead on turning, there to 200 M before faded out.
Amongst first few out, slotted in 1 out 1 back, overraced and was difficult to settle in mid-section, shifted 3 wide on circle, lacked turn of foot at 300 M, dropped out late.
First to break, led early before taking a trail, had an easy time thereafter, 2Ls down on turning, just held ground without threatening principals.
Standard break, unable to drop in, ended up 6Ls back in 3 wide line, still back with last few rounding bend, made useful progress to be nearest on line.
Allowed to drift back from a wide draw, positioned 7 to 8Ls back at rear, raced 3 wide on circle, switched widest on turning, made some late progress from an impossible position.
Raced keenly in forward of midfield, similar position turning in, shifted wide for a clear run, responded well for a nice finish, lost 2nd late.
Raced well behind and very wide without cover most of way, ran past well-beaten horses closing stages.
Settled towards rear, similar turning in, ran home one-paced.
Never far off, steadily pulled forward to a more prominent position before home bend, just off the pace in 4th turning for home, tired under pressure noticeably.
Began fairly, niggled along in forward of midfield, wide without cover around bend, jostled with runner turning in, ran home one-paced.
Jumped awkwardly losing ground, gradually recovered to midfield racing wide without cover, moved closer around bend disputing lead in 3rd turning for home, soon weakened under pressure.
Close up early, gradually shuffled back to midfield on rails around home bend, renewed effort after straightening, kept on well to finish.
Led early, ceded advantage and gradually taken back to about 2Ls off the pace, weakened soon after straightening.
Travelled in last few on rails, similar turning in, ran home strongly inside final 200 M, did best work late.
Broke well, settled 3-wide in midfield, went even wider turning in losing ground, produced moderate impression at the finish.
Broke well, restrained in vain for cover approaching home bend, travelled outside leader around bend, strolled to lead over 200 M out, easily.
Soon taken back to rear from a wide barrier, remained same with inside run, baulked until 300 M, rattled home on inside to be the fastest-finisher in the race.
Broke well from the widest draw, disputed lead wide before pulling forward to cross approaching home bend, held narrow advantage turning in, headed by winner over 200 M out and soon weakened.
Slow to muster, picked up along rails to midfield before home bend, finished off race strongly inside final 200 M.
Shaken up early to maintain a position in midfield, caught wide turning in, soon beaten in straight. Never a factor.
Vied for lead early before taken a sit back in 3rd, held every chance going into straight but couldn't pick up, faded inside 150 M. (Blood in trachea.)
Went for the early lead, alongside leader on the turn, under pressure 350 M out, dropped away rapidly entering 250 M.
Average jump, pressed on to maintain a better than midfield position, travelled well to straight, ran on steadily inside 350 M.
Slightly slow out, held a midfield position on the rail 4-5Ls back, ran home strongly down the inside on straightening, finished the fastest and was just touched off in a photo finish.
Slow to begin, pressed on to take closer order in mid-division, switched out near 350 M to find clear passage, ran on nicely but couldn't trouble the first three.
One of the first to jump but was soon taken back in search of cover, travelled behind midfield in a 3-wide spot, finished off the race ok. (Jockey questioned.)
Near the rear throughout, had 6Ls to make up passing 400 M, made some progress on straightening but turned flat over the concluding stages. Not beaten far nevertheless.
Given a patient ride in the rear, came wide on the turn, had 5Ls to make up passing 400 M, weaved through between horses and closed off the race well enough. Encouraging seasonal reappearance.

Vigorously ridden to find the lead, crossed to the fence before home turn, kicked 3Ls clear passing 300 M, got tired close home but showed battling qualities to hold off rivals in a desperately close finish.
Held the inside draw advantage and rolled forward to race prominently behind leaders, given a breather on the turn, powered home strongly to be nearest on the line. Beaten narrowly.
Assumed a rearward position, trailed 7Ls to leader in early and middle stages, made some headway from the back inside 350 M but was never threatening.
Went forward and raced keenly in the lead along the paint. Pinched a break early in the straight but faded in the run to the post. (Bled.)
Couldn't go the early speed and settled back in the race 2 to 3-wide with cover. Was shunted very wide after the 500 M and struggled thereafter. (Vet reported "roarer".)
Travelled in last position. Steadily improved after the 600 M, ran on fairly.
Raced 4Ls off the leader but commenced to hang out badly passing the 500 M, and covered considerable ground from then on. Not likely.
Raced on the speed but was caught 3-wide without cover on the circle. Maintained a good gallop all the way to the wire to finish in a place.
Showed plenty of gate speed to be in front early, before parking outside the leader, about 3/4L back. Kept up workload and closed of strongly to draw a margin over the final stages.
Stalked the leader along the fence. Was somewhat one paced in the straight.
Out in line, ended up behind midfield. Wide without cover and 4 to 5Ls back at 800 M. Widest turning in and faded out in the straight.
Slow to begin. Hard ridden and given reminder in the early stages. Raced behind midfield 5 to 6Ls back and trapped 4-wide throughout. Failed to quicken in the straight.
Away with them. Taken back to trail the field 7 to 8Ls off the pace at 800 M. 5-wide rounding the turn. Passed only beaten rivals in the straight.

Began awkwardly. Hard ridden in the early stages. Settled 3Ls off the pace on rails at 900 M. Urged along rounding the bend. Kept giving in the Straight. Slightly inconvenienced at 50 M and narrowly missed 4th.

Began in line. Hard ridden and given reminder to keep up with the field in the early stages. Raced on rails towards the rear rounding the turn. Improved along inside in the straight but never looked like threatening.
Slow into stride. Slightly worse than midfield 5 to 6Ls away at 1000 M and slipped to the rear making home turn. Ran on between runners and was unable to see daylight in the straight.
Good jump, soon led easily. Held a 1L advantage on bend and widened gap on straightening. Kept on in the last 50 M to hold off late challenger.
Jumped well. Pressed on in the early stages and eased to sit 2 to 3Ls off the pace at 800 M. Steadily made up ground in the straight and but lacked the turn of foot to figure in the quinella.
Jumped okay. Ridden to assume a handy position 1 to 2Ls off the speed at 800 M on rails. Hard pressed to hold position 600 M out but couldn't follow after straightening.
Quickly into stride. Moved away from rails to settle 2-wide 3 to 4Ls back in 6th 900 M out. Shifted wider to obtain clear running at home turn. Ran on well in the Straight and was closest at finish.
Well enough away. Pressed on early but failed to slot in. Trapped 3-wide barely with cover through to the home turn. Kept battling but one-paced in the straight.
Quickly away. Raced 3-wide and a length or two off the lead until the home turn. Pressured 300 M out and weakened inside 50 M. Just clung on to make frame.
Worse than midfield before advancing 3-wide no cover at 800 M when 5Ls off in 7th, upsides leaders at 200 M with every chance, couldn't sustain.
3-back the rails in 6th about 4Ls or 5Ls from the speed through to last turn, held up from 250 M to 150 M, one-paced once clear anyway.
Midfield with cover 5Ls from the pace until halfway, closer off home turn and with every chance at the furlong pole, couldn't seal the deal.
Settled 10th about 7Ls from the lead initially, ridden along at the 1000 M, wide turning in when 5Ls back, responded well, post just came too soon.
Best away, eased back to race in 3rd or 4th 2Ls off the pace until final bend, hit the front 200 M out and all out to just cling on.
Went forward but 3-wide no cover at first, disputed the lead until the final 400 M, soon surrendered not having had things go his own way up front.
Slow out, settled 11th at least 8Ls from pace until halfway, pulled widest (5-wide) to challenge into straight, never quite troubled the principals.
4-back along rails about 6Ls from speed in middle stages, recovered some fair late ground along the inner without threatening.
Taken back from wide gate, one from rear or outright last throughout at least 6Ls from the lead, poor effort.
Taken back from wide gate, 12th and 9Ls behind at 800 M, still rear but travelling nicely into straight, stayed on well through pack to place.
Handily placed 4Ls back in 5th at the 1000 M and closer again at point of home turn, no excuses for not being able to finish off better.
4th on fence about 2Ls or 3Ls from speed until halfway, pressured to keep up at 600 M, faded out quickly, diagnosed a 'roarer', to trial.
Went forward and raced too freely early on vying for the lead, a neck clear turning for home, soon headed and faded out of the picture.
Eased back to last place from widest gate, 10Ls last at halfway, ran on okay to be nearest at finish but of little consequence overall.
3-back on the rails about 5Ls from the speed at halfway, going well turning in but never saw the light of day in the straight, ignore the run.
Taken back as usual, one from rear and 5Ls behind the pace taking last turn, held up for a fair chunk of the straight and only clear late.
Half a length back in 2nd down the back but pressured to retain this proximity entering home straight and at 200 M, weakened inside the distance.
Box-seated in 3rd on fence 1L or 2Ls until home turn, bottled up on the rails all the way to the line, checked also at 200 M, ignore the run.
Soon led on fence by half a length, a neck to the good but niggled along turning for home, headed before the furlong pole and yielded ground quickly.
'One-out-one-back' 2Ls off pace in 5th through to straightening, had every chance to at least place as others behind were blocked for run.
4Ls off pace and 3-wide with cover leaving back straight, closer turning for home and swept to the lead out wide 200 M out, pulled clear.
3-wide no cover throughout, 1L back in 3rd at the 800 M, in touch until the 200 M after which the extra work exacted its toll.
4Ls back in 6th or so at the 800 M, held up off the final turn but ran on well for 2nd once clear while others were held up, solid debut nonetheless.
Held up two from the rear about 5Ls from the pace until the last turn, held up for a run until well inside final furlong, nicked 3rd once clear.
Fractious in gates and always rearward, pressured to remain within 6Ls of the pace at 600 M, hung out turning for home, laboured performance.
Bumped start, at back but on the rails, 6-1/2Ls off the leader in main bunch, helped by the fast tempo, checked 1000 M, lack turn of foot in straight, just made some ground 200 M.
Very slowly away, took rail at rear, suited by the fast pace but never competitive.
Eased to sit behind midfield 2-wide, took rail half way, suited by the fast tempo, never progress.
Eased to sit in midfield 2-wide, 3-1/2Ls off the leader in main bunch, favoured by the fast pace, but held up 4-2, just ran on when clear.
Eased to rear, 7-1/2Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide in main bunch, helped by the fast pace, never progressed.
Bumped start, hung out badly after being hard ridden forward, trapped 4-wide throughout in midfield, lost too much ground on bends, soon emptied 400 M.

Hard ridden early but failed to muster speed to cross in front, 2-1/2Ls off the leader in main bunch, trapped 3-wide throughout, not suited by the fast tempo and lost too much ground at bends, checked 250 M, weakened afterwards.
Hard ridden forward as usual, 2Ls off the leader in main bunch along the fence, not suited by the fast tempo, led briefly 250 M, overhauled 100 M, ran on well for 3rd.
Pushed to take the rail and led by 1-1/2Ls in main bunch, harmed by the fast early sectionals, dropped off quickly 400 M.
Hard ridden to hold the rail and secure a midfield spot, 3-1/2Ls off the leader in main bunch, benefited by the fast pace and the rail-run, progressed steadily 300 M to win easily.
Eased at start, 6-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide in main bunch, benefited by the fast pace, made ground steadily 300 M.
Eased back, 5Ls off the leader in main bunch, suited by the fast pace, but trapped 3-wide throughout and lost too much ground, progressed steadily from 600 M, run ended 100 M.

Hard ridden to take the rail and led at fast early sectionals, 3Ls ahead off the main bunch, took some breath from 800 M, but still used up too much fuel in early stages, hung on until 250 M overhauled, ran on for 2nd.
Obtained a prominent spot, 1-1/2Ls off the leader in main bunch, not suited by the fast tempo, trapped 3-wide throughout and lost ground, faded 300 M.
In front early, settled just off the speed on rails in 2L 3rd, baulked for a run after straightening, renewed effort shortly after 200 M, did good work late. (Riding early in straight questioned.)
Soon taken back for a late run in the straight, racing keenly at times far side, however only produced moderate impression at the finish.
Settled in forward of midfield on rails, remained similar to the turn, picked up nicely after straightening to be nearest at finish.
Soon taken back to rear from the widest draw, raced wide without cover in rear of midfield far side, commenced move around bend, fought on nicely but unable to peg back winner throughout straight.
Broke well from a high draw, settled for midfield in 3-wide position, took closer order around bend, gained 1L 2nd 3-wide turning in, faded out of contention passing 200 M. (Tactic questioned.)
Settled mostly 3-wide in worse than midfield, made no show in straight only keeping on at the one pace.
Slow out, travelled on rails towards rear of small field, ran home one-paced.
Soon took up running holding 1L advantage most of way to straight, hung on well under pressure to keep challengers at bay throughout.
Broke well, settled one-out-one-back in 3rd far side, gained 2nd approaching home bend, found nothing in straight.
Failed to muster early, soon found himself at the back, remained similar turning for home, never on terms.

Given a waiting ride in a rearward position 8Ls behind leader, moved closer on turning but was very wide and covered ground, finished strongly and came close to score but the winner found some extra close home.
In mid-division early, had a smooth trip to bend, 3Ls down turning in, picked up well and looked a possible winner passing 200 M, shifted out under pressure and was overhauled in the closing stages.
Tracked leaders in a prominent position on the rail, in a perfect spot to strike turning in, ran on steadily but couldn't trouble the first three.
Failed to muster early speed and travelled 2nd last trailing leader 10Ls to leader, had plenty to do on straightening but ran on only fairly down the inside.
Taken back to a rear spot on jumping and was given an easy time in early and middle stages, shaken up passing 500 M, made steady headway in straight despite drifting out.
Held the inside draw advantage and moved to the front with ease, led them along in a steady tempo, headed near 200 M and got tired passing the final 100 M.
Broke well, settled in a better than midfield position 4Ls off the pace, picked up well under pressure but was momentarily checked passing 200 M. Would have been closer.
Went forward early, travelled 2-wide in a handy spot just behind leading pair, caught wide making the turn, held every chance but kept on only one-paced.

Restrained after jump and soon had the advantage of the rail, travelled sweetly in a midfield position 7Ls back, responded well when asked and produced a late surge in the final stages to sweep past his rivals.
Well enough away, assumed a 2-wide position in midfield about 6Ls back, struggled to hold his position turning in and found nothing in the finish. (Jockey reported the horse made respiratory noises.)

Missed the break and lost 5Ls at the start, raced detached in last about 12Ls away in the first half, under whip near home bend and switched very wide on turning, made some headway from the rear but was given too much to do.

Made early use and raced alongside leader in early and middle stages, gradually outpaced approaching home turn, didn't respond under pressure and rapidly dropped out of contention passing 300 M. (Performance deemed unacceptable.)
In the front rank throughout, did not really accelerate inside 350 M after looking to travel well, battled on to take 3rd.
Up with the early pace, pressed on near 400 M but unable to quicken, weakened passing 150 M.
Slowly away, raced in the rear throughout, appeared to struggle from halfway, dropped out passing 300 M.
Began awkwardly and lost ground, settled in the rear 3Ls off the leader, unable to sprint with them passing 400 M when placed under pressure. Soundly beaten.
Tracked leader on the stands' rail, waited with until 300 M, ran on OK but unable to take ground off the winner.
Took them along on the stands' rail, responded positively inside 350 M and kept on strongly in the closing stages to score.
Settled towards the rear but never far off the pace, picked up gradually from 300 M, came close last 50 M but the winner was always doing enough to hold on.

Bounded in the air at the start and lost ground settling in a midfield position with cover midway through the race. Improved nicely to join the leaders by the furlong and showed a good turn of foot to draw away.
Travelled towards the middle of the straight track. Never became involved at the business end.
Travelled close to the outside rail in 2nd position. Was under heavy pressure after the 300 M, drifted to the inside over the last 100 M, never quickened.
Settled back in the field near the outside rail. Commenced to shift in after the 300 M to secure running, finishing off soundly.
Showed good speed to lead early but peaked on its run over the latter stages.
Raced along the centre of the track, handy to the leaders, but commenced to tire joining the course proper. Not likely.
Travelled on the speed. Failed to quicken after the 300 M, faded during the final stages.
Raced towards the outside rail, midfield. Shifted in to continue improving after the 300 M, received some inconvenience over the concluding stages.
Travelled in a midfield position, but was a beaten horse by the 350 M.
Tracked the speed but was a spent force by the 400 M, giving ground quickly by that point.

Was a little slow to begin, then lost further ground when crowded for room then failed to muster speed settling at the rear. Near the 400 M, shifted in to obtain clear running, ran on well down the centre of the track.
Raced on the speed along the outside fence. Didn't find any extra in the run to the wire.
Camped midfield with cover. For a considerable distance after the 400 M was held up and unable to obtain clear running. Closed off strongly after working into the clear.
Began awkwardly and lost a considerable amount of ground settling close to 2nd last. Didn't really recover paddling to the post.
Away with them, dropped back to rear on rails 9 to 10Ls behind speed at 700 M. Swung 4-wide for home and made steady progress in the straight.
Pushed early from wide draw and caught wide without cover in a forward spot. A length off on straightening and weakened thereafter.
A little slow to begin. Assumed a prominent spot behind the pace on rails until turning for home. Found nothing when asked in the straight.
Began awkwardly, raced 2-wide at rear, 8 to 9Ls back at 700 M. Swung widest turning in. Finished off well and made up good ground in the straight. Closest at the line.
Jumped well, eased to settle at midfield, 5 to 6Ls off the pace at 900 M. Shifted to 3-wide rounding the turn. Just held ground inside 200 M.
Fast into stride. Showed early speed to lead field 900 M out on rails. Held a 1L advantage on bend. Hung on well in the straight but was outpaced inside 50 M.
Taken back on jumping and raced in a rearward position. Near last on straightening and rallied in the straight. Covered plenty of ground to make frame.
Moderate jump. Ridden early to obtain a position better than midfield. 3 to 4Ls off the lead at the bend. Responded nicely when shifted out for clear running 200 M out. Took charge inside 50 M.
Awkward break. Raced along the rails 7 to 8Ls off the leader at 800 M. Unable to quicken in the straight and past only tired runners.
Began nicely, driven forward to a handy position, 2-wide and 2Ls off the pace tuning for home. Kept on fairly on straightening but unable to turn up a notch in the closing stages.
Bumped upon jumping. Settled 2-wide in 8th at 900 M. 4 to 5Ls back and was wide turning in. Couldn't pick up under pressure in the straight and weakened.
Slow into stride and drifted back to last trailing 10Ls. Last on straightening and retrieved some limited ground thereafter.
Raced in 5th while 3-back on the fence at the 1000 M, 4Ls down and still 5th turning for home, no excuses for not finishing off better.
Held up in 12th or so at least 6Ls from the speed before halfway, a little closer into straight, just over 1L back in 3rd at 200 M, run peaked.
3-wide no cover when at least 7Ls from the pace for much of back straight, 6Ls adrift turning for home, never better than midfield. (Tactic questioned.)
Never travelling very well, 4-back on rails at first, midfield about 4Ls back off last bend, briefly loomed a place hope at the 200 M, tired late.
Went forward but taken on in front and couldn't establish an outright lead, pressured to keep up before the home, dropped out, to trial. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Slowest out and 8Ls back in rear at the 1000 M, 6Ls back in 12th off last turn, ran on through beaten rivals to conclude.
Checked at the 1000 M when close-up, 4Ls back in 6th at halfway and losing touch taking final bend, very one-paced, to trial.
Box-seated on rails in 3rd about 2Ls from pace at 1000 M, 1L back in 2nd off final turn, upsides at 300 M, couldn't follow through to win, held a place.
Soon led on fence, vied for the lead in places but 1L in front again entering homestretch, soon tackled for the lead before being headed 70 M, held 2nd okay.
Tame performance, always rearward at least 7Ls from the leaders until home turn, kept chasing the majority of the field. (Injured.)
Slowly away, 2-wide and 5Ls back in 8th at 1000 M and much the same spinning for home, never troubled the principals.
Lost ground at start, rearward at least 7Ls from pace through first half, 4Ls back in midfield with place prospects at the 200 M, no extra.
Went forward, nicely placed 2-wide and 2Ls back in 4th at the 1000 M, pressured to retain this proximity off last turn, weakened steadily.
Worse than midfield on rails down the back, 5Ls off turning in, held up briefly 300 M out, quickened well once clear to lead 70 M out, tidily.
Awkward break losing 2Ls immediately, 3-wide with cover and behind midfield 5Ls from pace until home straight, never loomed likely.
Always towards the rear, at least 6Ls from the speed through to the home straight, a little closer at the 200 M but very weak final 200 M.
Took up the box-seat position 2Ls back in 3rd on fence from the 1000 M, pressured to keep up at the 600 M despite the soft run, dropped out, to trial.
3-wide without cover when 2Ls back in 5th at the 1000 M and 4th off final bend when still close up, ceded ground rapidly.
Pressed forward to dispute the pace at the 1000 M and a neck in front off last bend, headed by winner 200 M out and lost out on 2nd in final strides.
Over-raced initially while vying for the lead, a neck back in 2nd off last bend, all out to remain in touch at the 200 M, very tired final furlong.
8Ls last at the 1000 M and similarly placed at point of home turn, recovered a little late ground through beaten rivals.
3-back the rails about 6Ls back at the 1000 M, edged closer taking last turn and 1L down in 6th at the 200 M, grabbed 2nd late but little chance with winner.
Keen early, 2Ls back in 4th out 2-wide at the 800 M, still close-up and 3rd off last bend and upsides 250 M out, one-paced final furlong.
4Ls back in 7th down the back straight, 5Ls back swinging for home, 3Ls back in midfield at the 200 M, couldn't get any closer.
Travelled well in 6th or so no worse than 4Ls from the lead through to home straight, 1L off and dangerous at the 200 M, run soon peaked.
Always rearward, 7Ls back and last at halfway, never really on terms.
Settled 8th about 5Ls from the speed at halfway, a little coser and going well turning in, quickened up to lead 200 M out, hung left while pulling clear.
Eased back, 5Ls off the leaders along the fence, harmed by the slow pace, blocked 4-2, little dash when clear.
Settled in box seat, enjoyed the very slow early sectionals, lacked turn of foot in straight, just held ground.
Behind midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leaders 2-wide, harmed by the very slow pace, held up 400 M, no dash when clear.
Took rail and led easily by 1/2L at very slow early sectionals, suited by the tempo, but soon emptied 300 M.
Midfield along the fence without being used early, 3-1/2Ls off the leaders, not suited by the slow pace, lacked room 400 M, dashed well 200 M and finished 3rd.
Pushed for a few strides but failed to muster, then eased back for cover, 5Ls off the leaders 3-wide, harmed by the slow tempo, blocked 400 M, just ran on fairly when clear.
Niggled early, failed to muster, sat 3Ls off the leaders, raced 3-wide throughout and lost too much ground, not suited by the slow pace, no turn of foot in straight.

Eased to rear, 6Ls off the leaders, trapped 3 to 4-wide lost ground, harmed by the slow pace, made the move from 600 M, dashed strongly 400 M to win, however relegated to 2nd because it hampered the 2nd placegetter final 200 M.
Settled in midfield, 3Ls off the leaders 2-wide, not suited by the very slow pace, soon dropped off 300 M.
Prominent, 1-1/2Ls off the leaders but 3-wide, favoured by the very slow tempo, however weakened quickly 350 M.

Eased to rear for cover, 6-1/2Ls off the leaders 2 to 3-wide, dashed strongly 300 M despite not suited by the slow pace, was carried out and bumped in final stages, finished a very close 2nd but was promoted to win on protest.
Hard ridden forward to sit outside the lead, benefited by the very slow early sectionals, soon out of fuel 300 M.
Began well, led the field until joined around home bend, soon weakened out of contention after straightening.
Slightly sluggish at start, settled in 4th in forward of midfield of the small field, closer up in one-out-one-back position turning in, fought on steadily without threatening.
Settled just worse than midfield of the small field, baulked for a run early in straight, fought on nicely to the finish doing best work late.
Well there, settled just off the pace on rails, met minor interferences early in straight and 200 M out, kept on at the same pace to finish.
Broke well, soon taken back to travel well behind in the small field, switched out for a strong run down centre of the straight, unable to sustain effort inside final 100 M.
Settled in rear of small field, just about 3Ls off the speed turning in, ran home one-paced.
Began well from a high draw, gradually settled wide behind midfield of small field, in slightly closer order turning in, ran home one-paced.
Broke well, settled in midfield on rails about 3Ls off the speed, similar turning in, responded well inside final 300 M to take charge over 200 M out, hung on well to the line.
Began with others from the widest barrier, settled 2-wide 2Ls off the pace, moved up to dispute lead around home bend, gained narrow advantage early in straight, faded over 200 M out.
Drawn low and raced alone on the far side, hung out badly passing 400 M when being ridden out, got tired inside 200 M.

Given a waiting ride in the early stages, 2Ls behind leaders on the outside of main group, crept closer passing halfway, sent on near 400 M, finished strongly and pushed the winner all the way to the line. Ran creditably in defeat.

Took advantage of the high draw and soon taken a position on the Stands' rail, travelled prominently behind leader, checked near 200 M and was unable to find a clear passage inside final 100 M. Not tested.
Reasonable jump, settled between horses in mid-division, kept on well when pressed but didn't pose a werious threat to the first two.
In a rearward position throughout, attempted a run down the stands' rail passing 400 M but found little in the tank, hung away from the rail inside 200 M.
Tracked leaders down the centre of track, responded only fairly when placed under pressure passing 400 M, faded gradually in the run to the line.
Drawn low but quickly moved across the track to race in a prominent position towards the stands' side, alongside leader 400 M out and he accelerated away to score impressively.
Average jump, moved to the front and led them along on the stands' side, travelled fairly to 400 M, soon headed and faded gradually in the run to the line.
Held up near the rear in a position towards the centre of track, kicked home near 400 M, couldn't find the change of gear needed despite running on well to the line.
Patiently ridden in a rearward position 3Ls behind leaders, took a while to get going but stayed on OK towards the end.
Away well enough, assumed a midfield spot not far off from leaders in early stages, outpaced passing 500 M, shaken up and switched out for a run, finished off the race nicely.
Broke well, held a handy position just behind the early pace, looked promising going into final 500 M but couldn't sprint with them when the race got serious.
Began well, assumed 1 out 1 back spot, had ideal run in mid-section, right there on turning, just kept on at one speed behind eventual placegetters to be not far away on line.
Assumed a midfield role from an awkward draw, raced 3 wide with cover in mid-section, 3Ls down on bend, closed nicely in straight to go down in 3 way go.
Began with move purpose, had an ideal run on leaders back 2Ls away throughout, right there turning, held up to 200 M, lacked dash when clear running presented, battled late.
Slow into stride, back with last few 6Ls away in running line, always well back, had job to do turning, battled away in straight.
Well away, pushed on to race outside leader, in a battle for spot early with pace on, relaxed well 1L back on bend, headed at 300 M but fought back strongly to claim win on line.
No early pace, soon in rear division 6Ls away on rails, still rearward with job to do on turning, lacked usual finish and never looked likely late.
Taken back from outside alley, ended up 7Ls away at rear, improved 3 wide on circle when field packed, switched out turning, made gradual progress late to be nearest on line.
Standard jump, posted 4 wide without cover when improving in midfield, set too much to do in middle stages, continued to close on turning and fought out finish with first few just tiring last 50 M.
Standard beginning, ended up 3 wide in behind midfield 5Ls from pace, improved 4 wide with cover on bend, lacked usual finish and just held ground final 200 M.
Fair break, assumed a spot 5Ls back just behind midfield, difficult to settle in middle stages, back in pace on turning, made no serious progress.
Showed plenty of early speed, unable to slot in and forced to race 3 wide without cover, did share of work to bend, in battle to lead at 300 M, kept on bravely and went down narrowly final 50 M.
Out in line, took a midfield spot 3 to 4Ls back, difficult to settle in middle stages, same margin back on turning, stayed on evenly in straight without looking a serious threat.
Slow out, mustered to drive forward and hold lead, backed off tempo past 1000 M, still held a length lead turning, couldn't go up a notch and headed at 300 M, just battled thereafter.
Only fair to begin, ended up 5Ls away on fence, used little to bend, made good progress along rails before running into traffic inside 100 M and was not ridden out late.
Standard break, no speed from outset, raced 7 to 8Ls away, not asked in run, still well back and switched wide turning, held up in early part of straight, made fair progress late without threatening.
Fast into stride, worked forward to race outside the leader, had a fair run with average speed on, still there turning, found little when pressured and dropped out quickly last 300 M.

Amongst first few to break, unable to lead and box-seated 1 out 1 back instead, had an easy run to bend, challenged and hit lead briefly passing 300 M, peaked on run at 200 M and just kept on at one pace thereafter.

Well enough away, pressed on but caught 3 wide without cover, did work throughout 2 to 3Ls off lead, niggled along to be challenging on turn, in mix at 300 M but couldn't sustain effort and faded out at 200 M.
Taken back from a wide alley, shared rear 9Ls or so off leaders, tracked wide at 500 M, came 6 wide approaching 400 M, couldn't go on inside 300 M and gradually lost touch thereafter.
Out in line, showed good pace to cross to front, controlled race thereafter, still held advantage on turning, unable to quicken passing 300 M and gradually weakened out.

Away in line, allowed to settle behind midfield 6Ls back on rails, always travelling and had plenty to offer turning, held up to 200 M, burst into clear shortly after and quickly spaced rivals with a brilliant finish, easy win.
Well enough away, took a trail behind speed 3Ls off leaders, difficult to settle in mid-section, held up for a considerable distance to 200 M, just stayed on evenly once clear.
Standard beginning, assumed a midfield spot 5Ls or so away in running line, not asked to bend, struggling soon after turning, weakened out easily.
Among first few to break, settled in a prominent spot on leaders back, had a reasonable run to bend, close enough on turning, lacked a turn of foot and simply battled away in straight.
Average jump, ridden up to race behind midfield 6 to 7Ls off top end, fair trip to bend, made a strong challenge inside 300 M, in battle for lead to 200 M, no match for winner final furlong.
Out fairly, took a midfield position 4 to 5Ls away in midfield, used nothing to bend, to inside runs and kept to task well to look winning chance to 200 M, was dominated by winner late.
Angled back to take a spot in rear division 8Ls from top end, set task from midpoint, attempted to improve wide turning but lacked extra gears, never factored.
No early pace and drifted back to tail from widest alley, raced 8 to 9Ls back at tail, made a wide run at 500 M, very wide but challenged passing 300 M, battled to front at 200 M, tired inside 100 M.
Handily placed in 4th, had a smooth run to bend, stayed on ok in straight but was one-paced in his finish.
Well enough away and was able to move to the lead without making too much use, set a steady gallop in front, under pressure passing 450 M but kept on well in straight. Headed near 100 M.
Switched off and settled in the rear, 10Ls away from the leader in middle stages, taken wide on straightening, made some progress in the straight but was given far too much to do.
Raced behind midfield 7Ls off the pace, saved ground on the inside, unable to pick up when pressed inside 300 M.
In midfield 4 to 5Ls behind leader and travelled well throughout, picked up gradually inside 300 M to score in comfortable style.
No early pace and struggled to hold a position on the rail early, travelled in midfield 5Ls away from leader, switched out near 300 M for a clear run and did his best work towards the end.
Held a rail spot in a position better than midfield, had a relaxed run to bend, box-seated on straightening and couldn't get out until 150 M, ran on well when cleared.
Raced prominently behind leader but unable to quicken under pressure turning in, gave ground from 150 M.
Towards the rear, 8Ls behind leader making the home turn, soon struggled. Dropped out passing 200 M.
Settled towards the rear and trailed 8Ls down the back straight, came wide on turning, ran on only fairly in straight. No impression.
Settled 2-wide in mid-division, ran on steadily in straight without troubling the first three. Lacked the needed late kick.
Tracked leader one out one back, always going easy, had a duel with the leader on straightening but both of them were unable to contain the eventual winner late.
Raced close to midfield the fence. Struck some trouble at the 1200 M and 900 M ending up 3rd last by the 800 M. Plodded to the post.
Travelled towards the rear of the field, but had no luck and was caught wide and without cover for most of the trip, finishing well back.

Raced in 4th position, well off the leader punching the breeze. Went forward when the field compressed near the 800, and took up front running duties by the 600 M. Kicked strongly in the straight only to be caught close to home.
Raced just behind midfield, 2-wide with cover. Shifted out rounding the home turn, running to the post one paced.
Taken back at the start and settled in 2nd last position. Commenced a forward move around the field after the 1200 M, but was trapped wide and without cover from the 600 M, failed to run on.

Positioned with the backmakers, 1 off with cover. Shifted out to improve and race 4-wide when the pace went on midrace, but was under hard riding by the 700 M, came wide in the straight and was gassed by the 100 M.
Travelled near midfield, 2-wide with cover. Made a sweeping run to improve its position near the 900 M, but peaked on its effort over the concluding stages.

Went forward and opened up a decent lead stringing the field out before relaxing and running a slow tempo in the middle stages. Was headed and took up a trailing position after the 800, struggled in the straight.

Landed in 2nd position, then overtook the leader after the 800 M, was chased along for some distance thereafter to stay on the back of the leaders that swooped near the 700 M. Kept on well to stay in the frame.

Travelled a distant 3rd early along the fence. Attempted to go forward when the speed quickened near the 700 M, but was checked soon after and never really recovered from then on after being shuffled back.
Raced in last position. Kept along the rail for the major part of the race, and in the run home failed to close off.
Camped midfield on the fence. Sat and waited when the race developed into a sprint near the 700 M, gained the split near the furlong and motored to the post to come up trumps.
Began in line and eased to the rear. Improved at the bend and was 4-wide turning in. Ran on fairly to make up minor ground in the straight.
Soon to trail field. Always at rear. Never a factor.
Jumped fairly and clipped heels shortly afterwards. Hard ridden on rails 1000 M out to keep touch with the field but failed to muster. No progress in straight.
Away with them from a wide draw. Took a spot slightly worse than midfield 3-wide with cover. Steadied at 600 M. Took time to find daylight in the straight but showed little dash when cleared.
Slow into stride. Pressed hard early, caught wide and without cover in a forward spot. 2Ls off rounding the turn. Fought on gamely in the straight and just missed 2nd.
Amongst first to jump. Took lead on rails 700 M out. Travelled nicely round the bend but faded quickly in the straight. (Irregular Heart Rhythm.)
Jumped nicely, settled 2-wide, 4Ls behind speed at 600 M. Shifted out for clear running in the straight. Kept on well and barely missed a minor placing.

Quickly into stride and raced behind the leaders early stages. 3Ls off at the Rock. In prominent spot behind the lead turning in. Outclassed by the winner in the straight and gave plenty to hold its position in the quinella.
Fair start. Urged along the rails in the early stages. Settled 3Ls back making the home turn. Unable to see daylight in the straight and was not fully tested.
Well enough away. Driven forward and raced 2-wide 2Ls off at 600 M. Travelled nicely on straightening but couldn't pull out the extra final 100 M.
Broke well, raced outside the leader about 1/2L back near the Rock. Ready to strike on turning, hit front 300 M out. Was never in doubt thereafter.
2-wide and 1L back in 2nd at the 1200 M, began to lose touch on the circle and dropped out sharply in the run home, performance deemed unacceptable. (See Racing Incidents.)
9Ls last at the 1000 M and no better off swinging for home, never on terms.
Caught 3-wide no cover throughout in midfield position about 4Ls from the pace, always held in the stretch after the tough passage.
3-back the fence 3Ls or 4Ls from pace in 5th or so until the 600 M, pressured before home turn, stayed on dourly along rails to lead very late on.
Box-seated on rails 2Ls off pace in 2nd or 3rd through to home straight, one-paced when it mattered and no excuses for not doing better.
Close-up in 3rd or 4th no further than 2-1/2Ls behind lead through to final bend, briefly led inside the furlong pole, caught by quinella pair late.
Slow out, 4-back the fence (behind winner) until home turn when 4Ls back in mid-division, finished off strongly, winning post came a fraction too soon.
Slowly away and held 10th position at least 5Ls from the lead for most of the race, recovered fair late ground without threatening.
2-wide and 5Ls off pace in 8th or so until the final quarter, ran on well and narrowly missed a place.
Away well from wide gate and led by 1L on fence at the 1200 M, 2Ls clear off the final turn, headed about 100 M out, swamped in final strides.
Taken back to race one from rear at least 6Ls from the front until straightening for the line, ran on well, nearest at the finish. (Tactic questioned.)
3-wide but with cover in 9th at least 5Ls from the speed at halfway, same turning for home, found zero off the bridle.
Nicely placed in 4th out 2-wide and 2-1/2Ls behind the speed until last corner, one-paced to conclude.
Pressed on 3-wide no cover to dispute the pace at halfway, raced greenly on the circle and beat a hasty retreat in the stretch. (Tactic questioned.)
Midfield 4Ls off pace until home bend, challenging when checked by winner 100 M out, may have placed otherwise, objection by rider overruled.
10th and 6Ls behind initial tempo, wide turning for home and still well back, clawed back some fair late headway, wants further.
Led by 1L at first before being joined at the 800 M, established a break again at the last bend and 200 M before being swamped final 150 M.
Eased back to 9th about 5Ls from the speed through the first 800 M, finished off well out wide but not quickly enough to reel in the winner.
Pressed to dispute the pace at the 800 M, 1L back in 2nd turning for home, had every chance to at least place but lacked an extra kick.
Enjoyed the softest run possible on rails 2Ls behind the speed in 3rd before straightening, did enough to place but had every hope to win also.
Settled in 6th out 2-wide and 4Ls down initially, closer off last bend, quickened up to lead 150 M out while hanging in, driven out to hold on.
3-wide but with cover around midfield and 4Ls from the tempo at 600 M, checked before home turn and petered out in conclusion.
Slowly away, at least 7Ls behind in 11th down the back straight and same spinning off last bend, retrieved some late ground, never nearer.
Slow out and soon 9Ls last, remained at the tail of the field despite retrieving minor late ground.
Pushed forward and crossed steadily in front, sat outside the lead and benefited by the slow early tempo, took lead briefly 250 M, overhauled 100 M, ran on for 3rd.
Eased back, 6Ls off the leaders, trapped 3 to 4-wide throughout and lost too much ground, harmed by the slow pace, little dash 200 M.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Checked after start, at rear but on the fence, 8Ls off the leaders, harmed by the slow pace, lacked turn of foot top straight, picked up 100 M and dashed well.
Pushed early but failed to cross in front, 2Ls off the slow pace, trapped 3-wide throughout and lost too much ground, kept on well to the line but one paced.
Slow away, hard ridden to occupy the box seat, enjoyed the slow early sectionals, however lacked room 400 M and slightly hampered, ran on ok to the line.
Eased to sit behind the pace group, 3Ls off the leaders 2-wide, not suited by the slow tempo, blocked most of straight and therefore not tested.
Eased to sit behind midfield, 6Ls off the leaders 2-wide, dashed strongly 250 M despite harmed by the slow pace, dominated 100 M.
Midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leaders 2 to 3-wide, not suited by the slow pace, dashed strongly 200 M to finish 2nd.
Very slow away, took rail at the tail, 9-1/2Ls off the leaders, dashed impressively 150 M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Eased back, 8Ls off the leaders 2-wide, harmed by the slow pace, no dash in final stages.
Pushed to take the rail and led by 1/2L at advantageous slow early sectionals, hung on until 250 M weakened.
Began well, held back for coveted run on rails in 3rd, soon angled off rail for a run after straightening, fought on under pressure to gain upper hand in the shadows of the post.
Broke well, soon obtained cover settling 2-wide in midfield, ran on well inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish despite a tight passage.
Soon taken back for rails run in midfield, came to challenge upon straightening, could only run home one-paced.
Began fairly, ridden along early, settled on rails in 5th mostly about 4Ls off the speed, similar turning in, fought on doggedly to be nearest at finish.
Settled in last few, made no serious impression in the run home.
Settled towards rear, similar turning in, found no extra after straightening.

Raced wide in midfield after beginning from a wide-ish draw, shuffled back towards rear rounding stables bend, one from last far side, closed off well okay down centre of straight. (Tactic questioned.)
Settled in rear of midfield, went wide for a run into straight, ran on steadily inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Began well, soon took up running, narrowly headed around home bend, dropped out under pressure from 250 M.
Soon moved up from the widest barrier to join leaders, settled in 2nd just outside the lead far side, hit the front around home bend, unable to sustain effort and headed close to home.
Settled at the back, trailed the field most of way, finished off well running past well beaten horses close to home.
Began nicely from a wide draw, settled 2-wide in 4th within 3Ls of pace, came to challenge after straightening, made steady headway until tightened and lost position close to home.
Taken back early, raced in last 8Ls behind leader, had a relaxed run throughout before taken wide to challenge passing 350 M, came with a sustained run and was well on top close home.
Failed to muster early, unable to cross and covered extra ground on the first turn, remained wide in a midfield spot throughout the trip, couldn't pick up when asked and weakened 200 M out.

Guided to a midfield spot along the inside rail 5Ls back, used little in running, hit full stride passing 200 M, held every chance but not being able to stay on as well as the winner over the concluding stages.
Shaken up early to obtain a forward position, caught 3-wide and raced without cover for the major parts of the race, under pressure 400 M out and could not sustain his effort from 200 M.
Broke well from the inside barrier, settled in midfield under restraint, tracked well to bend, held up on the inside in straight and was not tested in the run to the line.
Behind midfield 5Ls back, travelled 2-wide but well covered, held every chance in straight but ran flat and never figured.

Quickly moved to a rail position and led early, raced handily in 3rd / 4th down the back straight, couldn't sprint with them as the pace quickened inside 300 M, no extra over the final 100 M. (Questioned.)
Taken back on jumping, settled towards the rear 6Ls off the pace, made some headway on straightening but was steadied near 150 M.
Pressed on early, tracked leader one out one back, unable to quicken inside 300 M and could never land a blow.
Caught wide making the first turn, moved up to the lead passing 1200 M, had an uncontested run to bend, kept on well going into final 200 M but was headed in the closing stages.
Taken back on jumping and was given a waiting ride in the rear, had 7Ls to make up passing 400 M, didn't have a clear run to 200 M but finished off the race well when cleared.
Niggled along in the early stages to assume a position better than midfield, stayed close to the pace throughout, lacked a finishing touch and could keep on one-paced to the line only.
Urged along to hold a 3-wide position in midfield, shuffled back turning in, taken wide on straightening and found little off the bridle.
In the front rank but unable to cross, 3-wide without cover turning for home, weakened inside 300 M, no extra in the closing stages.
Jumped well, restrained to midfield for cover but was never far off the pace, squeezed his way out near 400 M, threatened with a strong run but could not sustain his effort inside final 100 M.
Allowed to stride to the front from a wide barrier but was unable to cross before the turn and covered extra ground, delivered a strong challenge inside 350 M, came close to win and only just failed.
