Taken back on jumping from a wide barrier, in rear throughout and made a wide turn for home, never picked up in straight. Another disappointing effort.
Behind midfield, raced wide in the early and middle stages, had plenty to do turning for home but quickened impressively to wear down his rivals 50 M from home.
Slow to begin, settled in 2nd last about 6 to 7Ls behind leader, struggled for pace turning in and could not find anything when asked in straight.
Quickly into stride and was soon in the front rank, emerged as the race leader turning in, headed near 300 M, kept giving before weakening inside the final 100 M.

Away well enough, tracked leaders but proved difficult to settle in early stages, showed a smart turn of foot to sweep into the lead near 300 M, battled gamely but couldn't fend off the first two late on.
In midfield 3Ls back, 2-wide with cover turning in, ran on only fairly when asked for his effort, flattened inside 200 M.
Held a midfield position along the rails, soon weakened on straightening and gave ground rapidly from 350 M.
Swiftly taken to the front and held the inside running, travelled sweetly throughout, kept on well and displayed a likeable attitude when the race got serious. Beaten by more experienced rivals.
Average jump, settled behind midfield along the fence, switched outside for his run passing 400 M, took time to gather but was able to make some headway inside 200 M.
Taken back on jumping, stayed in a rearward position 6Ls off the pace and was a shade keen in middle stages, taken very wide on straightening and was very one-paced in its finish.
Raced back in the field, 3-wide with cover. Came wide turning for home and lengthened strongly down the middle of the track to finish over the top of its rivals.
Was taken back at the start, travelling in 2nd last position for most of the trip. Never a factor.
Positioned with the backmakers, always wide with cover. From the 600 M, was carried out and coursed wide and with out cover from there on.
Raced close to midfield, 2-wide with cover. Plodded to the line.
Raced near midfield, but travelled wide and without cover for most of the journey, struggled over the final stages.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Raced in 4th position, some lengths off the leader. Peeled out turning for home kept on well right to the line.
Raced a distant third position. Gave ground sharply inside the furlong. (Blood in trachea.)
Travelled with the rear division along the paint. Struggled in the straight.
Bowled along in front and kept up a good gallop all the way to the wire.

From a wide gate, near the 1300 M after being ridden along to go forward and being prominently positioned, was steadied and taken back when racing wide and without cover. Settled in last position. Made some ground along the inside.
Travelled behind midfield, along the fence. Ran on well however was one paced over the final stages.
Missed the start then showed good gate speed to improve and be up in the first 5. Took advantage of inside runs throughout to improve ran on soundly to finish close to the principals.
Raced 1 off with cover, midfield. Loomed up at the 200 M but peaked on its run over the final stages.
Began in line. Travelled with the pack but lost touch when the tempo quicken 450 M out. No impression.
Bumped at start. Slightly better than midfield within the pack 700 M out. Pressed on at 500 M and no extra final 300 M.
Drawn low, took up running on the far side. Raced about 3Ls off speed at 700 M. Vigorously ridden and given reminder at 450 M. Finished one-paced but not beaten far.
Began fairly. Settled behind leaders about a length back 2-deep from the stand's rail. Shifted out for clear running 350 M out but failed to quicken enough to pose any real threat.
Slow to begin. Trailed field 800 M out. Hard pressed from 400 M and past only one beaten rival home.

Good jump. Taken to a rearward position along the stand's rail at 700 M. Crossed towards centre of track behind field 600 M out. Shifted further in final 200 M. Responded well thereafter and was closest at the line.
Began fairly. Raced about 2Ls behind pace near the middle of track at 700 M. Hard ridden and responded well 300 M out. Just failed to match the turn of foot of the front trio. (Abnormal breathing.)
Moderate jump, tracked leaders 2-deep from the stand's rail. Switched for clear passage near 500 M. Picked up steadily and kept on gamely in closing stages to win by a narrow margin.

Bumped at start. Settled within the pack 2Ls off leaders at 700 M. Pressured 400 M out. Fought on well with the quinella pair inside final furlong. Peaked on its run near the line and lost out on 2nd.
Jumped well. Taken to the stand's rail and led 700 M out. Under pressure at 300 M and kept battling well with the eventual winner. Just came up a bit short in a photo finish.
Quickly into stride. Rolled towards the stand's rail and shared lead 700 M out. Remained a serious contender until 150 M but found no extra thereafter. Inconvenienced near the line.
In 10th down back straight out 3-wide but with cover, one from rear 6Ls back taking last turn, very weak overall.
Led by 1L setting steady enough pace at the 1000 M and same margin clear into homestretch, headed by the furlong pole and weakened tamely.
3-wide with cover in midfield between 4Ls and 5Ls from the lead until the final bend, briefly threatened a place at 200 M, no extra late on.
Pressed on 3-wide no cover at first to go 2-wide and 1L back in 2nd from 800 M to home turn, led 200 M out but grabbed by winner soon after.
3-wide no cover about 3Ls back at halfway, under pressure to retain this proximity off last bend, weakened steadily.
Midfield 2-wide about 4Ls or 5Ls off speed until last turn, closer at 200 M, unlucky not to place having had his running taken by winner soon after.
Awkward break and slow to muster pace, 6Ls back in 12th or so before last corner, made no great impression.
Taken back from widest gate, 9Ls last at the 1000 M, still well back on straightening, ran on past a few beaten rivals on the run-in.
Within 3Ls of the lead in 4th or 5th through to final bend, pressured 300 M out but responded well to lead inside the final 100 M out and keep on.
Taken back from wide gate, soon one from rear 8Ls from pace, widest turning in, quickened up well to challenge 200 M out, kept on well, just held.
4-back on rails around midfield through to last bend between 4Ls and 5Ls from the speed, one-paced and disappointing thereafter.
Went back from wide gate and rearward about 6Ls from the speed through to home straight, made some fair late ground, nearest at finish.
Broke better than normal, 3-back on fence in mid-division 3Ls off speed at 1000 M, closer in 4th turning in, failed to quicken up, petered out.
Box-seated 2Ls back in 3rd on fence at halfway, 1L down turning for home and vying for the lead at furlong pole, couldn't sustain the bid.
Set a fast pace and about 2Ls to the good until the final turn, came back to the field at the final furlong and dropped away.
Awkward break, never travelling well in rear and eased down a long way out in the straight, performance was unacceptable.
4th about 4Ls off initial speed, 3rd and still 4Ls back off last bend, upsides with every chance at 200 M, easily held by winner, probably better for further.
Midfield with cover roughly 5Ls from speed through to final bend, challenging over 1L off lead at the 200 M while hanging in, one-paced to wrap up.
Slow to muster pace, always rearward, 10Ls behind turning for home, very one-paced.
Always a long way off the pace and ceded further ground in conclusion, performance deemed unacceptable.
3-back on rails in mid-division about 5Ls or 6Ls from the fast speed, tepid finish.
Caught 3-wide no cover throughout, close-up in 5th or so at the 1000 M, hard pressed to keep this close off home turn, dropped out quickly.
Eased back 9Ls behind solid speed in rear in middle stages, quickened up nicely from top of home straight to lead 150 M out, kept on strongly.
3-wide no cover in places in 8th down back straight, over 5Ls behind taking final turn, a neck down in 3rd at the 200 M, run peaked but held a place okay.
Raced 2nd about 2Ls behind the strong pace until the home turn, swamped at around the furlong pole having gone a bit too quickly.
Raced 3rd until the 600 M but a little green and wayward on debut, faded out of the picture in the home straight.
12th about 8Ls from the speed at the 1000 M and still well back taking final bend, considerably closer at the 200 M but couldn't follow through.
Worse than midfield about 7Ls from pace in 10th out 2-wide until the home straight, launched a brief bid but held inside the final furlong.
Slow away, pushed forward, 2-1/2Ls behind the slow pace along the rails, dropped off 300 M.
Eased back, 9Ls behind the leader 2-wide, harmed by the very slow tempo, little dash 200 M.
Eased to sit in midfield on the fence, checked early, 5Ls off the leader, not suited by the very slow tempo, swept out prior to straightening to make run, however lack turn of foot, just ran on.
Eased to rear for cover, 10Ls behind the leader 2-wide, not suited by the very slow tempo, lacked turn of foot, ran on fairly in final stages.
Eased at start, settled behind midfield, 7Ls off the leader 3-wide, harmed by the very slow pace, demonstrated very strong finishing efforts 300 M and finished 2nd.
Eased to sit behind midfield, 8Ls off the leader, not suited by the very slow pace, trapped 3-wide and lost ground, raced flat until 100 M to show little dash.
Pushed to take the rail and led by 1L at advantageous slow sectionals, overhauled 300 M, out of fuel 200 M.
In front of midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, favoured by the very slow early sectionals, however just held ground in straight.
Jumped well, eased back towards rear, 9-1/2Ls off the leader, harmed by the very slow pace, trapped 4 to 5-wide throughout and lost too much ground, dashed fairly, crowded for room 200 M.
Eased back, 9-1/2Ls off the leader 3-wide, dashed well in straight despite not suited by the very slow tempo.
Midfield, 5Ls off the leader 2 to 4-wide, harmed by the very slow pace, bumped 400 M, weakened 250 M.
Eased to rear, 10Ls off the leader, trapped 4 to 5-wide throughout, harmed by the very slow pace and lost too much ground at bends, dashed well 250 M despite all negative racing situation.
Pushed to occupy the box seat, enjoyed the very slow tempo, picked up well 400 M and secured 2nd until 100 M, ran on for 3rd.
Settled nicely in the leading group 2-wide, benefited by the very slow sectionals, easily led 300 M, drifted away 200 M to win by big margin.
Began moderately, picked up steadily far side to settle just better than midfield in 5th, kept on steadily at the one pace without threatening in straight.
Began well from a wide draw, soon ridden to join leaders, disputed lead around the bend and into straight, kept on until fading under pressure 200 M out.

Driven along far side in 4th just over 3Ls off the speed, settled for the spot around the bend, ran on doggedly to gain upper hand over 100 M out, just held on to the line. (Questioned for improved performance.)
Raced wide without cover in worse than midfield, widest runner turning in, kept on same pace down centre of straight without quickening.
Settled well back, made steady headway down inside of straight, did not find much room closing stages. (Reported to be not fully tested.)
Niggled at early but slow to muster, settled in midfield to straight, ran on under pressure to miss by a narrow margin.
Settled on rails in rear of midfield, dropped slightly further back around home bend, given reminders turning in, ran on to produce good late impression despite baulked inside 200 M.
Always struggling wide in last few, never seen with a chance.
Began with others, settled in forward of midfield but lost position approaching home bend, remained similar into straight but fought on well to snatch 3rd late.
Close up, held slender lead on rails around the bend, gained a length's advantage briefly over 200 M out, soon found no extra and headed.
Settled towards rear, remained in last few into straight, held up behind runners until after 300 M, ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Prominent briefly, gradually settled in midfield, made steady headway between runners in straight, nearest at finish.
Close up in 3rd on heels of leaders most of way until finding no extra 200 M out.

Quickly taken back from the widest barrier after jump, remained well behind into straight, produced good late impression inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish over an apparently insufficient trip.

Behind midfield 6 to 7Ls off the pace, had to switch outside for a clear run near 300 M, finished the race strongly over a distance that might be a shade short of his best, but full credit to the winner.
Difficult to settle down the back straight, raced in a better than midfield position not far off the pace, responded only fairly under a vigorous ride and stayed on at the same pace to the line.
Travelled 3-wide without cover in mid-division, had 6Ls to make up passing 400 M, couldn't pick up when asked and was beaten near 200 M.
In midfield throughout, had a smooth run along the rail, ran on OK when asked but unable to pose any serious challenge.
Broke well, travelled in a midfield spot along the fence, gradually angled out making the turn, couldn't find the extra gear but stayed on well enough towards the end.

Taken back on jumping from a wide barrier, waited with in 2nd last trailing 10Ls to the leader, swung wide into straight, came with a serious challenge down the outside but his run ended passing 200 M and got tired close home.
Broke well, settled in midfield under restraint, took time to gather on straightening before finding his stride inside final 200 M. Posed little threat but a respectable effort after a 3 month break.
Well enough away, ridden forward and took it up passing 1000 M, had 2Ls in hand coming off the bend, kept on gamely under pressure to hold off GOOD BA BA's late challenge. A remarkable performance.
Rolled along the fence and held a prominent spot just behind leader, switched to 2-wide turning, appeared to travel well throughout but found nothing when asked, gave ground from 250 M.
Patiently settled in a rearward spot 8Ls back, taken wide to challenge on straightening, showed a fine change of pace and made up plenty of ground from 350 M.
Given a waiting ride at the back, caught wide turning and was 10Ls away in a very unpromising position coming off the bend, ran on one-paced in straight.

Rolled forward to take up the early running till 1000 M, in a perfect spot to strike turning in, kept giving but unable to close the gap on the leader, gave ground from 200 M and was swamped over the concluding stages.
Assumed a position close to the pace, raced 3-wide without cover from 800 M, kept on OK in straight but could find no extra inside final 150 M.
Amongst first few out, took sit in ideal spot 1 out 1 back 2Ls away, travelled keenly in run, held up from turning to 250 M, lacked usual dash when clear and just held ground late to make frame.
First to jump, went forward but posted 3 wide without cover throughout, 2Ls away on bend aided by slow pace, kept on respectably in straight to hold a place.
Out in line, unable to slot in and travelled 3 wide in midfield with cover, 4Ls back to bend, in clear running from 400 M, no extra final 200 M.
Began well, ended up with box seat position on leaders back, used little to bend with steady pace on, lacked extra gear when they sprinted inside 400 M, plugged away late.
Got back early, raced keenly 5Ls away in 2 wide line, still well back and shifted out at 400 M, lacked a finish and just struggled final furlong. (Blood in trachea.)
Fair to jump, posted 4 wide without cover 4Ls away in midfield, set impossible task to bend, kept giving despite workload and peaked on efforts at 150 M. (Dropped whip at 250 M.)
Standard break, drifted back to race 3 wide in rear division 5Ls off slow pace, disadvantaged in mid-section, well back turning, only beat tired horses in run to line.
Began with more purpose, settled in a good spot 3Ls away in running line trailing favourite, had fair run to bend, just kept on evenly behind them to 100 M when run ended.

Even break, trapped 4 wide from an awkward alley, pressed on and did work to race outside leader, got breather with steady speed to bend, didn't respond at 400 M, dropped out easily. (Unbalanced in action).
Steadied to rear, raced 6Ls or so away at tail, chances harmed by slow speed, still last on turning, lengthened nicely final 300 M to make good progress late and be nearest on line.

Away in line, pressed on to take up running, set terms to suit with advantageous slow sections, 1L clear on turning, accelerated nicely to pinch a 2L break at 300 M, never seriously threatened thereafter.
Standard break, ended up 5Ls or so away near to last on rails, harmed by slow sections, saved ground on bend, weaved between horses in straight and closed nicely to snare 2nd late.
No pace from outset, positioned 5Ls away and 4 wide for most of journey, had trail on circle, well back turning, made no serious impression in straight.
Ordinary jump, ended up 3Ls back on fence, enjoyed easy time to bend with steady pace, lacked turn of foot in straight, weakened out final 200 M.
Amongst first couple out, went on to take up running, set even pace 1L clear throughout, soon overhauled on turning in and gradually faded.
Out behind rest, settled 6Ls back in midfield, used little in run, travelled well to turn, in traffic at 300 M and steadied at 200 M, closed sharply late to miss out in a 3 way go.
No speed from outset, raced 9 to 10Ls away at rear, set task and still well back on bend, made no real progress in finish.
Slow into stride, ended up 8Ls away on rails, not made use of to 500 M, saved ground on rails, finished evenly along inside in straight.
Moderate jump however better than recent starts, settled 7Ls back on rails, not asked throughout, kept on fairly along inside in straight without looking likely.
Slow into stride, ended up well back in running line, 8 to 9Ls away throughout, still had job to do well back turning, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Average break, faded back to race behind midfield, not asked to bend, switched wide at rear in straight, run ended at 200 M.
Jumped well, took a trailling position 4Ls back on fence, enjoyed run of race throughout, didn't let down in straight and just held ground in run to line.
Even jump, assumed a closer role, 4Ls away in running line, tracked pace nicely in middle stages, improved into clear running turning, closed soundly to make frame without looking a place chance.
Even break, took a midfield role 5 to 6Ls away, had reasonable run to bend, tracked into race well at 300 M after being relunctant to shift out, kept coming late to go down narrowly.
Jumped with first few, crossed to race outside leader, cruising in mid-section 1L off lead, quickly accounted for leader on straightening and held off late challenge to score.
Fast away, pressed on from a wide gate, couldn't find cover and raced 3 wide facing breeze, 2Ls back, workload took toll inside 300 M and just battled away final furlong.
Out nicely, held a more prominent position on leaders back, used little to bend, unable to dash when run emerged at 300 M, battled on respectably for an improved effect.
Began well enough, box seated 1 out 1 back 2Ls back, travelled well behind pace to bend, run emerged at top of straight, no dash to factor and just held ground late.
Slow to begin, crept closer to hold a prominent position just behind leaders, held every chance on straightening, stayed on OK and did well to hold off the late challenges for a minor placing.
Caught wide making the first turn, settled in a better than midfield position in middle stages, carried back near 400 M, took time to gather on straightening and did his best work towards the line.
Settled in midfield along the rail, angled out for a clear run near 300 M, picked up gradually from 200 M to record a back to back success close home.
Amongst the front rank but proved difficult to settle racing outside the lead, struggled for pace on turning, beaten early in straight.
Became unbalanced and lost ground shortly after start, held a midfield position 5Ls back, shuffled back turning in, had no clear run until 200 M, finished off the race reasonably thereafter.
Taken back on jumping, crossed to the fence and raced in a rearward position early, moved closer entering the back straight, steadied near 250 M before running on without threat down the inside.
Quickly rolled to the lead and went a leisure gallop, quickened up the tempo making the home turn and held 2Ls advantage inside 300 M, kept on well and was only caught a few strides before the line.
Raced 3-wide behind midfield, 5-6Ls off the pace down the back straight, similar turning in, failed to quicken up under pressure and ran home one-paced.

Always close to the pace, unable to cross from a wide barrier and raced wide on the first turn, tracked leader one out one back turning in, battled on in the straight without making ground on the leader.
Urged to maintain a spot behind midfield, raced 2-wide trailing 6Ls down the back straight, came wide on turning, finished the fastest and just missed a placing.

Taken back from the wide barrier, raced in distant last trailing over 10Ls in early and middle stages, moved closer making the home turn but went very wide, didn't find much on straightening and ran disappointingly.
Taken back on jumping, in a rearward position throughout, made a wide turn and had 7Ls to make up coming off the bend, ran on only fairly.
Lifted front feet off the ground at the start and was slow to begin settling midfield, 3-wide with cover. Came wide in the final stretch and maintained a gallop right to the wire.
Travelled midfield but coursed wide and without cover. Struggled in the run home.
Camped midfield 2-wide with cover. Found the fence after the 500 M, travelling 3 back. Kept on well before being checked close to the post.
Parked worse than midfield, 3-wide with cover. Ran on soundly.
Showed good early dash to settle behind the pace. Had cover on the circle, swung out on the home turn, whacked away at the same pace in the final stages.

From a wide gate had to use some petrol to cross and make the speed shifting to a position on the fence by about the 500 M. Looked the likely winner but commenced to tire and wander out over the concluding stages.
Was the early leader before handing up and taking a sit mid race. Railed up in the straight, keeping up workload to draw a neck margin.
Raced wide in the early and middle stages before working forward to sit outside the leader after the 500 M. Kept to the inside in the straight but was gassed shortly after the furlong.
Broke evenly but found its way back in the field when outside runners speared forward. Had to be checked off heels near the 600 M and was in last position on the home turn. Never a factor.

Ridden out of the gates and was prominent early before being crossed near the 700 M. Travelled 4L back by the 600 M and had to be eased at that point while hanging out. Failed to stride out from then on. (Lame left fore.)
Was taken back at the start and settled in last position. Closed off well despite having some difficulty obtaining clear running approaching and passing the 100 M.
Raced behind midfield, 1 off with cover. Kept on one paced in the straight.

Out nicely. Eased off for cover and settled 2-wide 6Ls from the speed from 1600 M. Quickened nicely 4-wide making the home turn. Took lead at 200 M. Just unable to hold off the top pair near the line.
Pushed early and caught wide in a forward spot. Crossed to fence to take the lead 1400 M out. Still clung on straightening but swamped at 350 M.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. Moved to a forward spot 600 M out. 3-wide and a length off the lead turning in. One-paced thereafter.
Behind leaders early. Midfield on the fence back straight. Found nothing in the straight.
Quickly into stride. Ridden to lead on rails. Took a sit behind the pace 1400 M out. Crept closer at 600 M but made no impact thereafter.

Raced 2-wide and 5Ls down early. Slotted into 3rd position on rails at 1300 M. 3Ls back at the Rock and was urged 600 M out. Got clear run down the rails in straight. Stayed on gamely but well beaten by the front trio.
Settled in rear section. Hard ridden 600 M and widest turning for home. Made some headway down the straight but never likely to test the main players.
Taken back to last. Urged along at the Rock and improved wide at 600 M. Weakened on straightening.
Settled on the rails at midfield. Swung wide turning in and took inside run for clear passage at 300 M. Dashed well in final furlong and ran down rivals at the line.
2-wide in rear-section. Raced at rear until 600 M. Responded well when asked on straightening. Kept on strongly in the closing stages and just fended off by the winner.
Box-seated 2Ls back in 4th on fence at the 900 M, hung out at the 600 M and struggling from the home turn, folded tamely.
4-back along fence in 10th or 11th at least 5Ls behind leaders at the 800 M and off last turn, recovered some late ground past spent rivals.
Lost ground at start, 3-back the rails just over 4Ls off pace around mid-division until last bend, switched out to challenge at 250 M, made no real impression.
One from rear about 7Ls off pace at halfway, 6Ls adrift taking final turn, kept chasing the majority of the field.
Disputed early pace before establishing an outright lead by 1L on fence from 900 M to home turn and then the 200 M, grabbed by the winner in shadows of post.
Disputed early tempo out 2-wide, settled back 2nd about 1L from the lead from 900 M to home turn, lacked any acceleration.
Settled between 6th and 8th about 4Ls off speed before final turn, finished off strongly to lead on the line.
Slowest away losing 2Ls immediately, 7Ls or 8Ls last through to straightening, stayed on well in the finish and narrowly missed a place.
4-wide no cover early on, taken back to 6Ls off pace in 10th at 800 M, hung out on the circle and 5-wide (widest) turning for home, one-paced in conclusion.
3-wide but with cover outside winner in midfield 4Ls off the lead until the final 400 M, one-paced inside final 200 M and just held 3rd.
Raced forward 2Ls in 3rd or so initially, slightly further back turning into the home straight, had nothing more to offer.
3-wide no cover throughout but within 2Ls of the pace in 3rd right until the last corner, stuck on creditably in the straight after the tough trip.
Led by 2Ls on fence at the 1300 M, set steady pace to hold a narrow break from the 800 M, headed at top of home straight, one-paced in response.
Dwelt at the start losing at least 4Ls immediately on main body of field, niggled along at halfway in rear, always at least 6Ls from the front.
Suited by even tempo in 3rd or 4th initially, under pressure to retain this proximity at the 500 M, surrendered very meekly, poor run.
3-back on fence in 5th or 6th about 4Ls from the lead through to final bend, recovered some late ground but never loomed a genuine threat.
Over-raced when 3-wide no cover and rearward at least 6Ls from the pace through first half, never likely to figure thereafter. (Tactic questioned.)
Enjoyed a nice trail in 3rd on the fence through to home straight, loomed upsides winner 150 M out with every chance but could not go past.
Dwelt at the start losing at least 4Ls immediately on main body of field, always rearward behind slow tempo, never landed a blow.
Over-raced at the 1000 M around midfield in 2-wide position, 6Ls back in 7th off last curve, retrieved some minor late headway.
One from rear or 10th at least 6Ls from the pace until halfway, not suited by slow tempo, 3-wide with cover in places, no impression in final quarter.
4-back on the rails worse than midfield at least 6Ls from the speed through to home straight, not suited by the tempo and no danger.
4Ls back in 6th out 2-wide at halfway, challenged out 3-wide turning for home, stayed on fairly well but winning post came too soon.
Raced 2Ls back in 2nd at 1300 M, within 1L of the pace from 800 M to home turn, led 250 M out and all out to hold a narrow margin thereafter.
Slow away and took rail at rear, 10Ls off the good pace, dashed fairly in straight, held up 200 M, clear too late and just ran on.
Hard ridden to share the lead 2-wide at good pace, faded 250 M.
Slow away, hard ridden forward, 2Ls off the good pace 2 to 3-wide, ran on well to the line and grabbed 3rd.
Midfield, 4Ls off the good pace 2 to 3-wide, made ground steadily 300 M to score its 5th victory over the course and distance.
Eased to rear at usual, 10Ls behind the good pace 2-wide, picked up after straightening but only made slight ground 200 M.
Eased back for cover, 8-1/2Ls off the good pace 2 to 3-wide, made some ground 300 M but never really.
Took rail easily and shared the lead at good pace, ran on until 200 M when emptied.
Settled just behind the pace group on the rails, 3-1/2Ls off the good pace, crowded for room 350 M, progressed steadily 250 M and finished 2nd.
Pushed to obtain the box seat, travelled well with good pace, ran on until 150 M flattened.
Very slow away, pushed along to hold the rail and sat behind midfield, 7Ls off the good pace, no progress in final stages.
Eased to sit behind midfield, 6Ls off the good pace 2-wide, lacked room 300 M, made little ground 100 M.
Eased to sit in midfield along the fence, 5-1/2Ls off the good pace, held up 300 M, progressed steadily when clear.
Began with others, settled in forward of midfield, commenced move turning in, closed off well to snatch victory near the line.
Raced mainly 3-wide in last few and without cover at times, similar turning in, made no progress in straight.
Slow out and equally slow to muster, travelled one from last on rails, saved ground turning in, run soon ended.
Broke well but taken back to settle in worse than midfield, kept on steadily without quickening under pressure down centre of straight.
Gradually crossed to take up running from wide draw, held clear advantage to straight, unable to sustain effort and swamped for a placing late.
Began moderately, made rapid progress on rails to settle in 5th within 4Ls of speed, saved good ground hugging rails home turn, produced good impression early in straight and hung on well to finish.
Travelled in rear of midfield and did not settle well, went wide into straight, fought on steadily without quickening.
Began awkwardly losing many lengths, settled at the back to straight, produced short-lived effort early on, found no extra closing stages.
Tracked 2Ls behind leader to straight, came to challenge strongly soon after straightening, held every chance throughout closing stages only to be out-sprinted final strides.
Settled on rails in midfield, similar turning in, finished off race nicely inside final 200 M, closest at line.
Quickly obtained rails run settling just worse than midfield, ran on under pressure in straight, did best work at finish.
Broke well, settled in 3rd within striking distance, fought on steadily to gain a placing late.

Ridden along after jumping but unable to hold its position early, shuffled back approaching home turn, kept to inside in straight, made some progress though never troubled the first two. Lost out on 3rd narrowly.

Quickly away, held a position on the fence 4Ls behind leader travelled strongly throughout, began his chase on the runaway leader inside 350 M, unable to bridge the gap but finished well clear of the rest.

Slow to begin, proved difficult to settle at the back, unsuited by the slow pace and shifted out to improve entering the back straight, in mid-division turning in, had a clear passage in straight but ran on only fairly.
Tracked leader prominently, struggled for pace from 500 M, eased down. (Irregular Heart Rhythm 2nd time.)

Slow to begin, shaken up to take closer order behind early leaders, checked at the top of the bend, held every chance inside 300 M, didn't show much acceleration but fought on gamely to the line. Missed out on 3rd by a narrow margin.
Given a waiting ride in the rear, trailed 10Ls to leader in early and middle stages, found nothing to pressure and ran disappointingly.
Shaken up early to assume a spot in mid-division, raced 2-wide throughout, checked on turning near 400 M, couldn't pick up when pressed, dropped away inside 100 M.
In mid-division 5Ls off the pace, had a comfortable run along the fence, kept on steadily to the line but unable to trouble the first two.

Took it up making the 1st turn and dictated the race from there, quickened inside 450 M and held significant advantage coming off the bend, kept on strongly to the line and never looked like being caught.
Taken back on jumping, travelled 2-wide in a rearward position 8Ls back, urged along approaching 400 M, swung wide into the straight, failed to run on when the race got serious.
Ridden to a forward position just off the pace, travelled in a handy 3rd in the middle stage, couldn't match the first two but kept on ok until weakening inside final 50 M.
Behind midfield, raced in a 2-wide position throughout, made some progress inside 300 M and just came out on top in a close finish for 3rd.
Jumped well, prominent early but eased back to midfield before the turn, struggled to keep pace passing 500 M but stayed on ok towards the end.
Began awkwardly and lost ground, raced as the back marker in early stages, crept closer making the turn, made significant headway from 400 M to be closest on the line. Decent first up.
Showed signs of greeness in his debut, gave ground passing 600 M, never a factor. (Unacceptable Performance.)
Tracked leaders handily in 4th, had to be urged along passing 600 M, picked up gradually on straightening and burst through inside final 100 M to score his 2nd success in the Griffin class with ease.
First to jump, took up early running but was soon pressed by a runner on his outside, kept on one-paced in the straight and got tired inside final 100 M.
A little slow to begin, improved his position along the inside rail before making the home turn, quickened to hit front inside 300 M, kept on before weakening near 100 M.
In a rearward position throughout, didn't handle the turn and could never pick up in the straight.
Average jump but soon moved to the front rank and vied for the lead, couldn't sprint with them when asked inside 300 M, ran on one-paced.

Raced behind midfield on the fence. Experienced some difficulty obtaining clear running over the concluding stages whilst closing off nicely and because of this was not ridden out fully to the end of the race.
Proved to be a bit of a handful early by over racing eventually taking up a midfield position, 1 off with cover. Rolled out to travel 3 deep after the 600 M, struggled in the run home.

Checked shortly after the start but recovered to race behind the speed. Caught 2-wide and without cover from about the 800 M, and was carried out further passing the 600. Stuck on gamely in the final stretch.
Parked on the back of the speed, 2-wide with cover. Gained the split after turning for home and showed a good turn of foot to draw away from its rivals.
Began awkwardly then settled midfield on the fence. Plodded to the line.
Settled in 3rd spot, 1 off with cover, but after the 700 M was carried to a three wide position without cover and then in the early part of the straight hung in. Weakened over the final stages.
Box seated along the fence before rolling out near the 700 M, racing 1 off and improving to lead the field turning for home. Battled on soundly to finish in the frame.
Settled back in the field after being hampered near the 1000 M, racing 2-wide with cover. Switched to the outside in the straight and ran on well.
On jumping got its head up and then continued to get its head up when being taken back in the early stages, settling in last position. Made some late headway.
Began awkwardly, shifted out abruptly then was hard ridden to go forward and cross to the lead after the 800 M. Faded in the straight.
Was close to the speed early before settling 3 back the fence after the 800 M. Experienced traffic problems early in the straight, found the wire well after working into the clear soon after.
Settled towards the rear of the field, was always wide and after being hampered near the 1000 M, never really got into the race, finishing tailed out. (To trial.)
Raced with the back makers and was checked after the 1000 M. Coursed wide from the 900 M, struggled in the run home.
Taken back, trailed field along rails from 700 M. Took inside run in the straight. Failed to make any impact.
Moderate jump. Ridden to share lead 2-wide 900 M out. Held 2Ls advantage going into straight. Caught by the quinella pair at 150 M but kept well clear from the rest for 3rd.

Began well. Sat midfield on the fence at 600 M. Shifted 3-wide on straightening. Threatened with a strong run 300 M out. Toe-to-toe with the eventual winner in the concluding stages, nosed out on line.
Began fairly. Took a spot at midfield 2-wide. Shifted wider and ridden out making the home turn. Dropped off inside 200 M.
Well enough away. Shared lead at reasonable tempo on rails until straightening. Respond fairly when asked 350 M out. Crowded near 200 M and faded thereafter.
Best out. Enjoyed an easy run in prominent spot turning in. Made a strong run 300 M out and just prevailed in a duel over the final stages.
Out in line. Settled 2-wide 5 to 6Ls behind the speed. Trapped near 650 M. Unable to see daylight early in straight. Produced steady late headway when clear but of little consequence overall.
Began fairly. Raced towards the rear 3-wide without cover. Widest rounding the turn. Made steady progress in the straight to run 4th but was beaten fairway by the front trio.
Settled 6Ls back in 10th at the 1000 M and edged closer turning in, quickened up well to lead 200 M out and always doing enough to win. (Questioned for improved performance.)
Towards rear on the rails about 7Ls behind initial pace, crept closer turning for home, finished off pretty well but still unable to place.
Disputed early pace on the rails, a neck to the good from halfway to home straight, weakened well before the final furlong.
One from rear about 8Ls off pace at the 1000 M, only marginally closer turning in, never loomed a threat.
Caught 3-wide no cover at halfway when 5Ls back in 8th or so, continued wide on the circle and rather one-paced in the homestretch.
On fence 2Ls back around 4th at 1000 M, same margin behind but swamped at the furlong pole and tired late. (Tactic questioned.)
4-back the rails 5Ls off pace in mid-division at halfway, smooth headway on inner to vie for lead 250 M out, always just held by the winner.
3-back on fence 4Ls back in 6th or so down the back, peeled out 2-wide turning for home, still with place prospects at furlong pole but run soon peaked.
Disputed early pace before settling into 4th out 2-wide and 2Ls back at halfway, every chance when 3rd at 200 M, weakened without excuses.
Always rearward and relegated to 10Ls last at the 600 M, struggling before the home turn, unacceptable performance. (Lame next day.)
Midfield with cover about 5Ls off pace at 1000 M, very one-paced in the home straight, diagnosed a 'roarer'.
9Ls last at the 1000 M, 12th and 5Ls off taking last turn, stayed on well for a place without quite reaching quinella pair.
Disputing early tempo out 4-wide no cover, a neck down in 2nd out 2-wide from halfway to home straight, began to wilt before the 200 M, well beaten.
3Ls back in 5th out 2-wide at the 1000 M and still close up on straightening for home, very weak inside the final furlong.
Travelled well in 2nd about 2Ls behind leader down back straight, quickened up off final bend to lead 250 M out, pulled clear, easily.
One from rear about at least 9Ls from the pace through to final bend, held up down the centre at the 300 M, well held thereafter.
Bumped at the start, in 10th about 8Ls off pace at halfway, no closer taking last turn, always well held from then on.
3-back on rails in 4th about 4Ls from pace at 1000 M, 2Ls back in 3rd at furlong pole, no chance with winner, couldn't overhaul HOT SUN for 2nd.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Slowly away, rearward about 9Ls from the pace at 1000 M, edged a little closer into home straight, kept on past a few spent rivals to wrap up.
Trapped 3-wide no cover throughout at least 7Ls or 8Ls from the speed, no danger.
Worse than midfield about 8Ls from the pace at halfway, struggling before the final bend, later found with displacement of soft palate.
Rearward but 3-wide with cover at least 9Ls behind the steady pace, offered very little in the homestretch. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Raced in 5th between 4Ls and 5Ls from the speed through to the final bend, sorely lacking in a turn of foot.
Best away from widest gate and didn't take long to lead by 2Ls on fence, headed by the winner 250 M out but was still able to hold down 2nd.
3Ls back in 3rd initially and even closer in 3rd entering the home straight, still on terms 200 M out but inexplicably weak thereafter.
4-back on the rails in 6th about 6Ls off speed in middle stages, pressured to lie up taking final turn when a little closer, one-paced to conclude.
Keen early on at least 10Ls last, not suited by the slow tempo and of little consequence in the straight.
Took rail steadily and shared the lead at advantageous slow early sectionals, dominated from 400 M.
Settled in box seat, enjoyed the slow early sectionals, ran on well to the line for 2nd, not much threat to the winner.

Eased to rear, 6-1/2Ls off the leaders, raced 3 to 4-wide and lost ground at bends, harmed by the slow pace, dashed strongly 300 M despite all negative racing situations and finished a remarkable 3rd.
Eased to rear, 8Ls off the leaders 2-wide, harmed by the slow tempo, lacked room 400-200 M, dashed well to the line, improving.
Eased to sit behind midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leaders 2-wide, showed some dash despite not suited by the slow pace.
Eased back, 5Ls off the leaders, trapped 4-wide throughout and lost too much ground, harmed by the slow pace, held ground in straight.
Hard ridden to share the lead at slow pace, however hung out badly at bends and raced 3 to 4-wide, weakened 250 M.
Eased back, 5Ls behind the leaders, trapped 3-wide and lost ground, harmed by the slow pace, blocked most straight, little dash when clear. (See Racing Incidents.)
Pushed to sit in front of midfield, 3Ls off the leaders along the fence, not suited by the slow tempo, out of fuel 250 M.
Very slow away, sat midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the leaders, trapped 3-wide and lost ground, harmed by the slow pace, lacked turn of foot, just held ground in straight.
Very slow away, soon progressed along the fence and sat midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leaders, not suited by the slow pace, little dash 200 M.
Settled behind the pace group, 2Ls off the leaders and trapped 3-wide, not suited by the slow sectionals, just held ground in final stages.
Hard ridden to occupy a prominent spot, just behind the leaders 2-wide, benefited by the slow tempo, ran on until 150 M emptied.
Eased to sit slightly better than midfield, 3Ls off the leaders 2-wide, not suited by the slow tempo, soon flattened in straight.
Began awkwardly losing ground, settled in last few, commenced move and went wide around home bend, made up good ground down centre of straight, nearest at finish.
Began well, with leaders most of way to straight, folded up quickly after 400 M.
Raced wide in rear of midfield far side, found no cover around the bend, kept on early in straight, found no extra inside final 200 M.
Settled in rear of midfield, wide with cover around the bend, found nil in straight.
Raced wide in prominent positions, took closer order around the bend, but weakened under pressure after straightening.
Began with others, settled towards rear, kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Raced keenly in just better than midfield, came under pressure to challenge after straightening, ran on to hold good chance inside 200 M, unable to sustain effort late.
Began well from the widest barrier remaining wide, crossed to lead coming out of far side, fought on to maintain advantage until finding no extra over 100 M out.
Waited with, baulked for a run early in straight, improved from 250 M when still tight between runners, responded well to snatch victory near line.
Soon taken back to race in rear, went widest to avoid general bunching around the bend, found nothing in straight.

Began with others, travelled mainly in rear of midfield despite hampered 1000 M out, shuffled backward when pace slackened around the bend, not much room early in straight, fought on under pressure without threatening.
Broke well, gradually settled in one-back position on rails, similar turning in, improved steadily to hit front over 100 M out only to be caught close to home. (Questioned for improved performance.)
Began fairly, settled in forward of midfield, lost position coming out of far side, just worse than midfield of bunched field around the bend, baulked early in straight, kept on well closing stages.

Ridden to pick up on rails to 2-back position sharing 4th, similar position in middle of bunched field when pace slackened home bend, held up in box-seat early in straight, made good headway final 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Always handy behind leaders, under pressure from 600 M, couldn't show his usual acceleration on straightening and ran someway below what he is capable of. (Questioned.)
In a position towards the rear 8Ls behind leader, moved closer from 700 M and covered extra ground, fought on briefly in straight but didn't progress at all, dropped out near 200 M.

Took it up from 1400 M and set a steady pacing in front, given a breather on the turn before picking up again passing 400 M, kept on strongly to line but couldn't repel the impressive winner inside 150 M.
Held up towards the rear in early stages, strode forward passing 800 M to be alongside leaders coming off the bend, kept on one-paced and never threatened.
Settled in midfield 5Ls off the pace, commenced to race ungenerously near 600 M, found little under pressure before weakening inside 150 M.
Held a rearward position 7Ls back in the early and middle stages, crept closer along the fence passing 500 M, angled into clear 250 M, stayed on well to take 3rd but never troubled the winner.
Purposely taken back, travelled in the rear throughout, taken very wide making the turn, had nothing to offer once into the straight, dropped away near 200 M.
In midfield early but was shuffled back to the rear on turning, taken wide for a clear passage approaching home straight, came with a serious challenge down the outside but run ended passing 100 M.
Assumed a forward position as expected, tracked leader along the rail, made his move passing 600 M, battled on early in straight but couldn't sustain effort inside final 150 M.
In midfield 5Ls off the pace, travelled strongly throughout, briefly held up for a run in straight but really accelerated away when cleared 300 M. Won decisively.

Began only fairly, drifted back early, settled 9Ls of so away, not helped by slow tempo, crept forward at midfield to race outside leader, rolled to front at 300 M, dashed clear, held rivals comfortably. Brilliant ride.
Useful jump, pressed on racing outside leader, moved to outright lead at 1200 M, took trail at mid-point, close enough on turning, no extra in straight.
Moderate break, drifted back to race 9-10Ls back, harmed by slow speed, still had plenty to do turning, made no ground in straight.
Amongst first few out, took ideal spot 1 out 1 back early on slow speed, shuffled back with mid-race changes to be 5Ls down on bend, urged along turning but only produced a one-paced close.
Standard jump, drove up to sit 5Ls off pace in middle of pack, unbalanced at 700 M, raced keenly in middle stages, struggling on bend and offered little in straight.
Jumped reasonably, ended up 3Ls away on rails, not asked throughout with steady tempo, saved ground on bend, not much room early straight, one-paced when clear.
Standard jump, settled 6-7Ls back on fence, not helped by slow speed at top end, still back in pack turning, only average close finishing in front of those well beaten.

Jumped with more purpose, took initiative and led early, took trail at 1200 M, advantaged by slow sections, trailed eventual winner on bend, left flat footed but stick to task chasing gamely but unable to wear down margin.
Ordinary jump, regathered to race 4Ls away on rails, raced a bit keenly early, saved good on rails on bend, clear of traffic at 350 M and made some minor progress but no extra last bit.
Out with rest, unable to take a position and ended up 7Ls away in running line, overraced throughout with slow tempo, 3-wide on bend, made gradual progress to furlong but run ended thereafter.
Drifted back from a wide alley, unable to slot in and posted 3-wide 9Ls back, unsuited by slow tempo, improved 3-wide on circle, made ground to 200 M but workload took toll and just held ground late.
Slow into stride, soon at rear best part of 10ls away, raced keenly with slow tempo, well back in an impossible spot turning, made no impression.

No early speed, trapped 3-wide without cover 8Ls away, allowed to improve around field with slow tempo, went to front at midpoint, continued to set steady tempo to bend, headed at 350 M, same speed to line.
Even break, prominent early before settling 4Ls back tracking pace group, 3-wide without cover from top turn, kept to task in straight but was not able to match first two.
First to hit ground, showed more initiative and went forward to race outside leader, shaded inside horse but travelled a bit keenly under slow speed, held front to 100 M but couldn't sustain effort.
Out with line, trapped 3-wide in midfield 3-4Ls away, chances not helped by average speed on, couldn't produce usual sprint and struggled late.
Drifted back from an awkward alley, raced 5Ls away at tail, disadvantaged by slow speed at top end, had field to beat turning, unable to dash and never factored.
Moderate beginning, settled behind midfield 4Ls back in running line, not helped by speed, only battled in straight.
Drifted back soon after start, positioned well back 5Ls off lead, not helped by steady speed, still well back to bend, shifted out turning and closed hard down middle to take place.
Standard getaway, caught 3-wide but did have cover, raced 5-6Ls back at rear, harmed by tempo throughout, well back turning, never nearer.
Slow out, lost 3Ls, mustered to take spot just behind midfield 4Ls away, overraced in mid-section, made steady headway in straight but just couldn't go with first few last bit.
Fast away, pressed on but caught 3-wide without cover, right there 1/2L back to bend, in mix until 200 M when run peaked, checked shortly after and dropped off last bit.

Began only fairly, pressed on but posted no better than 3-wide, only 2Ls away throughout and did have cover, aided by steady tempo to bend, made strong challenge and hit 1ead at 100 M, collared final 50 M.

Began well, slotted into box seat 1 out 1 back, had a dream run to bend with no speed on, no clear run for majority of straight and checked at 250 M, never really saw daylight and was unlucky not to be closer.

Tardy to begin, ended up in midfield role 3Ls off leaders, easy time in mid-section, travelled well turning, without a run to 200 M, picked up sharply when clear and closed over top to win with authority.
Began smartly, took up front running easily. Shaded throughout by outside horse, had easy time to bend, showed little fight and just struggled at same speed late.
Even jump, took a spot on rails 2-3Ls away behind leader, enjoyed soft trip to turn with average sections, didn't see clear running until 150 M and only clear run race was over.
Settled wide towards rear, made modest headway down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Travelled in better than midfield position, gained 3L 3rd around home bend, fought on steadily without quickening in straight.

Rear early, improved to rear of midfield at 1300 M before shuffled back towards the rear approaching home bend, saved ground turning in, ran on steadily to be nearest at finish despite a tight run on the rails.
Began fairly from a poor draw, raced wide without cover in midfield throughout far side and around home bend, soon weakened in straight.
Began with others, close up early before taken back to forward of midfield, mainly 3-wide around the bend, fought on until finding no extra inside final 150 M. (Questioned.)
Midfield early, soon dropped back to the rear of field, remained well back to straight, ran past well beaten horses without threatening.
Broke well from the one draw, restrained from leading to settle in midfield, kept on before finding no extra closing stages.

Began awkwardly losing about 3Ls, quickly recovered to lead the field over 1000 M out, crossed to rails coming out of far side holding 2Ls into straight, soon headed over 300 M out, folded up quickly.
Raced wide in rear of mid-division, remained similar to straight, fought on steadily under pressure without quickening.
Soon taken back to rear, waited with, produced good late finish down centre of straight, did best work late.
Broke well from the widest draw, amongst leaders before settling in 2L 2nd around the bend, similar turning in, quickened up to hit front over 300 M out only to be pipped at post.
Jumped moderately, settled in rear of midfield, soon came to challenge after straightening running on gamely between runners to just get up on line.
Settled in forward of midfield, similar turning in, badly baulked until 200 M, kept on well to the line.
In front early, held back to travel 2-back in 4th on rails, similar turning in, fought on steadily without threatening.
Urged along in early stages but failed to muster speed, improved around the outside of the field making the turn, couldn't sustain effort in straight, weakened from 300 M.
In a position slightly behind midfield, showed signs of greenness throughout the race, picked up well from 300 M but couldn't trouble the first three.
Hard pressed forward from the beginning, raced keenly just off the leaders, looked a serious challenger early in straight but weakened rapidly passing 200 M.
Hard ridden out of the gate, couldn't quite muster and raced in mid-division 5Ls back, found nothing under pressure before dropping away passing 200 M. (Bled and subsequently retired.)

Lost position when crowded for room after start, eased to the rear and trailed 10Ls in early stages, moved closer passing 600 M but still well back off the bend, finished the race fastest and made up plenty of ground from 350 M.

Away well enough, took up a rail position ahead of midfield but ran a shade keen, raced tight from 600 M to 300 M and unable to improve, had every chance thereafter but unable to find a change of pace to wear down the pair in front.
4Ls back in midfield in early stages, shuffled back on turning, took some time to get going after straightening, made a little ground late on but no threat overall.
In a rearward position throughout, checked near 700 M, out of contention thereafter.
Went forward, ridden along but unable to cross, forced 3-wide on turning, responded well to pressure and was closing all the way to the line. Narrowly beaten.
Average start only but soon crept up to assume a better than midfield position, held every chance in straight but was one-paced in his finish.
Always in the front rank, emerged as the clear leader passing 800 M, all out inside 300 M and battled on gamely to hold off the challenge from the persistent runner up. (Lame right fore leg.)
Quickly crossed to the rail from a wide barrier, settled in midfield going well enough, edged to the outside approaching home straight, ran on OK despite hanging in over the final 200 M.
Began awkwardly and lost ground, lacked pace and always in the rear trailing over 10Ls, never a factor.
Quickly away from the inside barrier, took them along before sitting back in 3rd passing 800 M, raced a shade green throughout, couldn't quicken up in straight and faded gradually from 300 M.
Raced behind midfield 3-wide without cover for the majority of the trip. Struggled in the run home.
Travelled with the back markers, 1 off with cover. Dour in the straight.
Stalked the leader along the paint. Had no excuses.
Raced 1 out 1back. Hit the front at the 100 M but was nailed close to the line.
Began awkwardly settling behind midfield the fence. Was briefly held up early in the straight, worked home soundly.
Travelled towards the rear of the field along the fence. Closed off strongly however was blocked for running near the 100 M.
Enjoyed a comfortable run on the back of the speed along the paint. Had every chance.
From a wide barrier was taken back, settling 2nd last. Failed to close off.
Travelled in last position. Finished tailed out. (To trial.)
Raced slightly forward of midfield, 2 deep with cover. Kept on one paced in the run to the wire.
Travelled midfield the fence. Kept to the inside in the straight and closed off fairly without threatening.
Settled just behind midfield 2 deep with cover. Commenced to improve after the 600 M and came widest turning for home. Came with a well timed run to snatch victory in the shadows of the post.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Went forward and led along the fence. Faded over the concluding stages.
Good jump. Moved to rails and urged to maintain a position worse than midfield at 800 M. Swung 4-wide turning for home. Made up some minor ground late.
Began nicely. Sat 2-wide 2Ls behind the speed at 600 M. Kept one-paced in the straight and weakened final stages.
Bumped at start. Took a spot worse than midfield 3-wide without cover. Improved on turn wide but couldn't follow through. Just held on for 4th by a narrow margin.
Moderate jump and soon trailed field. Ran past a few beaten runners.
Amongst first to begin. Pushed early and obtained a forward spot outside the lead rounding the turn. Always held 2nd in the straight. Never posed serious threat to winner.
Began in line. Niggled along but failed to muster in the early stages. Settled 3-wide 7Ls back at 800 M. Shifted wider turning for home but failed to quicken in the straight.
Bounced upon jumping and lost ground. Raced 2-wide 7 to 8Ls off the pace at 800 M. Just held ground in the straight.
Jumped fairly. Driven to a midfield spot 2-wide at 800 M. Pressured 600 M out but soon faded in the straight.
Quickly into stride. Settled 2 to 3Ls back on rails. Pressed hard 500 M out. Never looked likely to catch the quinella pair but ran on for a minor placing with some comfort.
Led easily 2Ls in front at 900 M. Held a 1L advantage making home turn. Pulled clear in the straight for a convincing win.
Well enough away. Ridden to stay midfield on rails. Remained in similar position turning in. Made steady progress in the straight. Just missed out on 4th.
Always at rear. Struggled to keep up and made no impression in the straight. Never a factor.
2-wide mid-division within 3Ls or so of leaders before straightening, 2Ls down but held up at 200 M, kept on once clear, unlucky not to place.
Pressed forward and led by 1L out 2-wide at 800 M, under pressure when headed before the home turn, surrendered fairly tamely.
Caught 4-wide no cover around midfield about 2Ls behind leaving back straight, all out to retain this proximity at the 200 M, ceded ground late on.
Always rearward, wide but with cover about 5Ls off pace through to home straight, made not the slightest impression.
Pressed forward from the jump but trapped 3-wide no cover throughout, disputing the lead before final turn, extra work took its toll in final furlong.
Slowest out and soon one from rear 8Ls behind leaders, still at the rear off last curve, ran on okay through a few beaten rivals, never nearer.
Around midfield 3-wide but with cover within 4Ls of the pace until home turn, picked up well to lead at the 100 M, driven out.
Slowly out, between 4Ls and 5Ls back in 9th or so until final turn, finished off pretty well and nearly placed.
Went back from wide gate, at least 8Ls before final corner, never likely to play a serious role in the finish.
Close-up about 2Ls behind early speed, beginning to lose touch at point of home turn and drifted back to last.
5Ls back in 12th leaving back straight and similarly placed turning in, ran on strongly through the field for 2nd.
Enjoyed the box-seat trail in 4th on fence 2Ls from the speed until last turn, had every opportunity to achieve a better finishing position.
3-back the rails around 10th at least 4Ls from the pace through to homestretch, one-paced to wrap up.
A neck down in 2nd on the rails at 1000 M, led by a neck 500 M out and clear by 1L at furlong pole, headed 100 M later, barely clung onto a place.
Travelled well in mid-division 3Ls from pace until home straight when slightly held up, quickened up once clear to lead 50 M out and settle matters.
Worse than midfield about 6Ls off pace leaving the back, had to hurdle fallen LEADER off final bend, badly hampered, eased down a long way out.
Caught wide no cover throughout, 5-wide at first the 3-wide 2Ls back vying for 3rd at halfway, struggling to keep up off last bend, faded out.
3-wide no cover at first, with cover and 2Ls down vying for 3rd at halfway, still prominent off last bend but soon fizzled out.
Stumbled at start, one from rear and 7Ls behind initial speed, checked turning for home and never likely to regain much ground.
Soon led on fence and 1L clear from 1000 M to final bend, joined 150 M out but fought on well and only grabbed by the winner 50 M out.
Eased back to race 8Ls last at 1000 M, niggled along in places, marginally closer turning for home, tight for room late on when midfield.
Raced in 2nd out 2-wide with cover and 1L back in 2nd until home turn, every chance of quinella at least 200 M out, couldn't find enough.
6Ls back in 10th with cover at halfway and same off last turn, recovered some fair late ground, may want further and/or stronger tempo.
Caught 4-wide no cover initially, with cover 4Ls back in mid-division at 800 M, not much closer off last turn and the 200 M, remained same distance away.
Worse than midfield about 6Ls off pace leaving back straight, attempting to get into the clear turning for home when clipping heels and falling.
Midfield about 4Ls back with cover down the back, much the same turning for home, had his chance but dropped out tamely, no excuses.
Box-seated 2Ls back in 4th on fence at 800 M, under pressure at 500 M despite this soft trail and plodded on home at the one pace, might have done better.
Slowest away, unbalanced at 1200 M, 3-back on rails about 4Ls from the lead at halfway and off final turn, one-paced to wrap up.
Eased to rear for cover and took rail, more than 10Ls off the leaders, harmed by the front-runners' track, no progress in final stages.
Failed to muster, not suited by the front-runners' track, trapped 3-wide throughout, never better than midfield.
Pushed to take rail and lead early but under pressure, sat just behind the leader 2-wide, suited by the front-runners' track, hit the front 400 M, hung on until 100 M, ran on for 3rd.
Pushed early but not muster, 9Ls off the leaders on the rails, harmed by the front-runners' track, little dash 200 M.
Eased to rear, raced 4 to 5-wide throughout, lost too much ground at bends and not suited by the front-runners' track, never competitive.
Hard ridden to sit in front of midfield, 4Ls off the leaders along the fence, not suited by the front-runners' track, dashed strongly 300 M to hit lead, won nicely.
Eased back, 9Ls off the leaders, trapped 3 to 4-wide and lost too much ground, little dash 200 M despite not suited by the front-runners' track.
Hard ridden to cross in front of the main bunch, travelled nicely just behind the leaders, favoured by the front-runners' track, progressed steadily 400 M to grab 2nd.
Settled in midfield, 5-1/2Ls off the leaders 2-wide, not suited by the front-runners' track, weakened 250 M.
Slow away, pushed to sit in front of midfield, 4Ls off the leaders 2 to 3-wide, not suited by the front-runners' track, faded 500 M.
Hard ridden forward but failed to take lead, 2Ls off the leaders, trapped 2 to 3-wide and lost ground, dropped off 500 M.
Eased back, 7-1/2Ls off the leaders along the fence, harmed by the front-runners' track, just held ground in straight.
Hard ridden to challenge the lead, dominated from 1000 M, benefited by the front-runners' track, however soon out of fuel 400 M.

Slightly slow out possibly by design due to a wide draw, soon taken across to rails at the back, trailed the field to straight, lacked room early on, ran on well between runners inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Broke well, settled in forward of midfield, saved ground turning for home, straightened in 1L 4th, fought on determinedly to gain upper hand final strides.
Began moderately, settled wide towards the rear, very wide when wider rounding home bend, made no recovery in the run home.
Began with others, soon took up running and led to 400 M, dropped out. (Blood in trachea.)
Settled in rear, commenced move turning in, made significant progress down centre of track inside final 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Began from a wide draw, crossed to travel in 2L 4th, moved closer to 3rd approaching home bend, hit front under pressure over 200 M out only to be worn down close to home.
Well there, settled in 4th about 2Ls off, became 5th rounding home bend, similar turning in, ran home one-paced under pressure.
Ridden for pace early, settled for wide run with cover in rear of midfield, 4 wide without cover around home bend, midfield into straight, gradually weakened. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Slightly slow out, settled towards rear, took closer order approaching home turn, sustained headway from 2L 6th into straight to be nearest at finish.
Began fairly, soon picked up to prominent one-back position on rails, shifted out to challenge turning in hitting front briefly early in straight, unable to sustain effort and headed 200 M out.
Began well from middle draw, raced wide with leaders early, soon settled in midfield, lost position into straight, gave ground steadily under pressure.
Settled on rails towards rear, saved ground rounding home bend, not much room behind runners early in straight, produced good late impression inside final 200 M.
Began with them, ran a shade keen in early stages before settling down in a 3-wide spot around midfield, couldn't pick up on straightening and faded away passing 200 M.
Taken back on jumping, not used in the early and middle stages, travelled comfortably towards the rear throughout, stayed on under pressure but never looking likely to pick them up.

Raced freely from 1000 M and pulled his way to the front rank, forced wide on turning, unable to bridge the gap with the first two but battled on well to take a minor placing after a long duel with the 4th over the final 300 M.
Soon rolled to the front under a positive ride and able to dictate the race with a slow tempo, pulled 2Ls clear 300 M out and sustained his effort all the way to the line.
Settled one off the fence behind midfield, had plenty to do turning in, couldn't find much when pressed, kept on one paced to the finish.
Average beginning, 5Ls along the fence in mid-division, unable to quicken inside 400 M when the race got serious, never threatened.
Prominent early, reigned back to sit in 5th passing 800 M but never far off from the leaders, came with a strong looking challenge 350 M out but appeared to have peaked on his run inside 150 M.
Switched off to the back early, raced in a rearward position throughout, waited with until 400 M, made up a lot of ground early in straight, but turned flat over the final 100 M.
Raced ungenerously down the back straight, 3-wide in midfield turning for home, dropped away from 300 M, never a factor.
Jumped well, gradually eased back to a midfield position, well covered in the 2-wide running line, edged out to challenge inside 400 M, ran on OK without offering a threat.

Started poorly, travelled in the rear 8Ls off the pace but saved ground along the fence, had much to do on straightening and not clear until 250 M, finished off the race encouragingly. (Jockey questioned.)
Away well enough, raced prominently one out one back, struggled to hold his position passing 500 M, found little when asked before weakening rapidly inside 200 M.
Allowed to drift back on jumping, 6Ls back in the rear pack, raced 3-wide over the bend, made only slight progress in the straight and was never dangerous.
Broke well from the prime inside draw, tracked the eventual winner handily on the fence, ran on strongly in straight and pulled clear from the rest, but the winner kept finding more in the finish.
Angled into running line, ended up 6Ls away in midfield, helped with pace on, tracked 3 wide leaving bend, let down nicely final 300 M to take lead at 150 M and score convincingly.
Away ok but ridden up to take up running, set a genuine tempo, 2Ls clear throughout, extended margin rounding bend, kept on but couldn't hold off challengers final 150 M.
Restrained from a wide gate, settled 9Ls or so away sharing rear, helped by strong speed, made wide run leaving bend, made some ground down middle without looking a winning hope.
Bounced out quickly, pushed forward to race behind leader, made some use of with strong speed, struggling on bend, weakened quickly.
Away well, settled in midfield 2 wide 4 to 5Ls away, had a fair trip to bend, found little when moved wide in straight, dropped out easily. (Abnormal breathing.)
Standard jump, positioned 5Ls away on fence, had an easy time on rails to bend, kept to fence but not clear until 200 M, made only moderate progress thereafter.
No early pace, settled in rear division 7 to 8Ls back, aided by solid tempo at top end, still well back on bend, improved wider turning, closed hard down outside for a clear 2nd.
Drifted back from a wide alley, ended up 3 wide 8Ls away from lead, raced wide throughout, switched out turning, lacked usual response and just plodded in straight.
Began with rest, ended up behind midfield 8Ls from front runners, speed on to suit, struggling turn, battled in straight.
Amongst first few out, outpaced by front runners early, raced 3Ls back 3 wide without cover, did share of work to bend, kept on soundly given trip but just peaked on efforts at 200 M.
Ordinary jump, ridden up to take closer order, raced 8Ls back on fence, helped with speed on, ridden along turning, made gradual progress in straight doing best work late to make frame.
Broke nicely, ended up 3 to 4Ls away just behind strong speed, had even trail to bend, looked a place chance at 400 M but found little under pressure and weakened out.
Began well, pressed on to take a spot outside leader, did some work with genuine speed and had to cart field up on bend, kept on to 200 M but unable to find extra to continue to figure last bit.
Drifted back from a wide alley, shared rear on rails, 8 to 9Ls away throughout, still had job to do on turning, weaved between horses in straight closing well to be nearest at finish.
Even jump, ended up in midfield 3 to 4Ls off speed, travelled strongly to bend, made run shortly after straightening, in mix to 200 M but no match for winner late.
No early pace, soon at rear 6Ls off speed, had a fair run to bend, switched widest turning, made some fair ground down middle but gave away too much start.
Out in line but trapped 3 wide without cover, did work throughout 2Ls away, crept closer on bend, urged along turning, gave in quickly.
Fastest out, pressed on to take up running, set standard tempo in front, kept on to 200 M but couldn't dash with them, tightened final 100 M but was struggling at that point.
Jumped nicely, took trail on leaders back, enjoyed ideal run to bend, didn't pick up and just battled away in straight. Disappointing.
Restrained from a wide alley, ended up 5Ls away on rails, pace not ideal in mid-section, held up considerable distance turning to 200 M, closed nicely when clear to make frame.
Broke reasonably but failed to muster, didn't occupy usual lead role, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield to bend, didn't pick up and just battled in straight.

Out in line, allowed to relax 3 to 4Ls away on fence, used nothing in run, travelled well behind them on turning, worked into clear passing 200 M, sprinted sharply to soon have race in keeping. Easy win.
Showed good speed after standard break, pressded on to race outside leader, within 1L of leader turning, kept to task and hit lead briefly near 200 M, outclassed by winner late.
Bounced with first few, took a 1 out 1 back trail, enjoyed run of race to bend, didn't sprint with them but just kept on at one speed final 200 M.
Average jump, ended up 5Ls back racing 3 wide, speed not ideal, had trail on bend, closed only moderatly beating tired horses to line.
Standard jump, no early pace raced 5 to 6Ls back in rear division, was difficult to settle throughout, well back turning, found little in run to line.
Away well enough but had to be pressed to hold a midfield position, always in touch within 4Ls of leader, didn't find another gear in straight and kept on one-paced to the line.
Slow to begin, settled in the rear pack 8Ls off the pace, similar turning in, hung in under pressure on straightening and ran home disappointingly.
Allowed to drift back on jumping, trailed 6Ls behind leader in a 2-wide position near the rear, made some progress on straightening but was never threatening.
Raced ungenerously in early stages before settling down in a position on the rails behind midfield, gradually improving on the turn, stayed on reasonably well in straight for a non threatening 4th.
Swiftly away, drifted back to mid-division 6Ls behind leaders, waited with until 350 M, finished off the race really well to be nearest on the line.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Good jump from the inside barrier, rolled forward to be prominent behind leader, couldn't quicken when asked and just stayed on in a much laboured fashion before weakening inside 150 M.
Standard jump, urged along to maintain a position in midfield, under pressure rounding the bend, in trouble early on straightening. Beaten near 300 M.
Went forward to obtain a handy position just behind leaders, travelled well to the straight, came with a determined challenge inside 350 M but unable to come to terms with the runaway winner.
Rushed to the front early, tracked leader one out one back, couldn't sustain effort passing 300 M mark and dropped away rapidly.
Led them along at a steady tempo, had plenty in hand passing 300 M and kept on strongly to the line. Won cosily.
Slow into stride, settled in a rearward position along the fence 6Ls behind leader, urged along passing 450 M, ran on only fairly.
Ridden along early from an outside draw to settle as joint leader. Was gassed over the final stages.
Parked 2 deep with cover, midfield. Gained an opening near the 300 M and chased keenly to hold a margin to the wire.

Prominently placed early from an outside alley, however was badly hampered near the 1000 M. Raced 3-wide without cover before rolling in to race 1 off the fence near the 500 M. compounded in the straight.
Settled behind midfield on the rails. Commenced to close off strongly however was held up until about the 200 M, raced to the line strongly once in the clear.

Raced up with he front runners early before being hampered near the 1000 M, settling off the speed 2-wide with cover. Was pushed to stay in touch prior to being crossed near the 500 M, then travelled 3 back. Whacked away at the same pace
Camped midfield along the fence. Stayed to the inside in the run home, closed off well.
Was taken back in the early stages, settling last. Began to improve after the 700 M, came 3-wide passing the 500 M, closing off smartly.

Led early from stall 1, commenced to hang and shift out approaching the first turn and was crossed near the 800 M settling about 3 off the lead. Continued to hang out for the majority of the race, struggled in the straight.
Assumed the lead near the 800 M along the paint. Was pressured for most of the trip by a runner to its outside, fading in the run home.
Travelled midfield 3-wide with cover. Was left racing without cover after the 500 M, however got to the line well.
Went forward from a wide gate but was severely checked near the 1000 M, never recovered, hung out and proved difficult to ride, finishing well back.
Bounded in the air at the start and lost ground settling 3rd last the fence. Railed up in the straight, was held up until the 200 M, closed off soundly.
Began awkwardly. Settled in rear section. Made up some ground in the straight.
Jumped nicely. Raced along rails 3Ls back 1300 M out. Took inside run and made up ground steadily in the straight. Was inconvenienced inside 50 M to settle for a dead-heat minor placing.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. 4Ls down turning for home and kept on fairly in the straight.
Raced 2-wide behind the pace. Hard ridden 400 M out. Weakened inside 200 M.
Began fairly, 2-wide at midfield making the first turn. Shifted 3-wide with cover from 1100 M. Improved on turn and was 3Ls from the lead. Fought on in the straight to claim win near the line.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Last out. Settled at rear on rails. Shifted 3-wide to go forward at 800 M. Widest turning for home 3 to 4Ls off the lead. Finished off well and was nearest at the line.

Jumped awkwardly. Picked up quickly to race on rails 3 to 4Ls off the speed at the first turn. Remained in similar position turning in. Unable to see daylight until 100 M. Responded fairly well once obtained clear running.
Moderate jump. Slotted into 2-wide position 2Ls behind the pace 1300 M out. Closed the race off satisfactorily early in the straight but ended its run inside 50 M.
Amongst first to begin. Took lead on fence and always held a 1L advantage. Kept giving in the straight but was overhauled by the principals inside 100 M. Was checked at 50 M.
Taken back. Niggled along and given reminder in the back straight. Struggled to keep up and made no impression in the home straight.
Quickly into stride. Took a handy position on rails within 2Ls off the pace 1200 M out. Hit front at 200 M but couldn't repel winner's late thrust.
3-wide no cover in rear at first, pressed on out 3-wide no cover from halfway, 1L down in 4th at the 200 M, kept on well, only just failed.
Slowly away and taken back from wide gate, always rearward and at least 6Ls from the pace before last curve, offered little threat. (Tactic questioned.)
Held the 'one-out-one-back' position in 4th no worse than 3Ls from the pace until final bend, led about 150 M out but headed on the line.
Slowest out again, last and between 6Ls and 8Ls of the lead until straightening for home, made some decent late ground, never nearer.
Always close-up, trailed the leader on rails at 1000 M, 2Ls back in 3rd turning in, kept on well to lead on the line.
Opted not to track the leader on the rail in favour of a 3-back position, 4Ls down in 5th turning in, found very little off the bridle. (Questioned for poor performance.)
One from rear and keen at the 1200 M, at least 6Ls off the pace from 800 M to final turn, recovered some minor late ground.
4-back the rails in 8th or so about 5Ls from the pace through to final quarter, fizzled out tamely in homestretch. (Blood in trachea.)
