2-wide and 4Ls off pace at halfway, 5Ls back in 7th swinging for home, one-paced to conclude.
Soon led by about a neck on the fence, 1L clear turning for home, headed before entering furlong and dropped away. (Epiglottic entrapment.)
Disputed early pace out 3-wide no cover, less than 1L back in 2nd from 800 M to final turn, steadily petered out.
2-wide in 8th or so between 4Ls and 5Ls from the pace through to home straight, made some moderate late ground for 4th but never likely to place.
Slowly away again, rearward through first half and still 6Ls back in 10th at the 600 M, retrieved some ground in straight but not a genuine threat.
2-wide and 2Ls back in 3rd at 1200 M, eased forward to dispute lead entering final straight, a neck clear 200 M out, soon headed, lost 2nd on line.
Bounded in the air and fluffed the break by about 6Ls, 8Ls last at halfway, regained some fair late ground in the straight, nearest at the finish.
2-wide and 4Ls back in 5th at halfway, closer in 4th swinging for home, had his chance but one-paced and tended to hang in the straight.
3-back on rails 3Ls from the pace when keen at the 1200 M, similar spot entering final quarter, 1L back in 2nd at the 200 M, led soon after and kept on well.
Slow to muster early pace, 5Ls back in 7th at halfway and edged closer off last bend, stayed on fairly well to nick 2nd on the line.
Raced much too freely through first half in 8th or 9th about 5Ls from the pace, had little to offer in the straight having over-raced so much.
Best away, handed up the lead to track the leader on the rails in 2nd or 3rd until the last bend, very one-paced in conclusion.
On fence about 7Ls back in 9th at the 1000 M, a little nearer off last turn, yielded ground again inside the final stages.
Went back from wide gate, one from rear about 7Ls from the speed at halfway, closer but last turning in, never likely.
Midfield on the rails about 4Ls or so from the speed through to the final turn, moderate late headway on the rails, posed no real danger overall.
Pressed forward to lead by 2Ls at the 1000 M, joined for the lead at top of home straight and yielded ground steadily inside final 200 M.
Eased to rear, not suited by the slow tempo, never competitive.
Pushed to sit in front of midfield along the rails, 3Ls off the leader, not suited by the slow tempo, on heels 300 M, dashed well 150 M and finished 3rd.
Midfield along the fence, 5Ls off the leader, harmed by the slow pace, no turn of foot in final stages.
Eased back and took rail, 6-1/2Ls off the leader, made the move at 500 M around the field 3-wide, demonstrated strong finishing efforts despite not suited by the slow pace to score overdue win.
Trapped 3-wide first bend, took rail steadily and led by 1L at slow sectionals, hung on until 200 M weakened.
Bumped at start, trapped 4-wide first bend and lost ground, pushed forward and crossed to be 2-wide, sat 2Ls off the leader, suited by the slow tempo, however just held ground in straight.

Eased at start, 6-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, harmed by the slow pace, bumped 500 M, lost ground and carried into 4-wide, regained balance and dashed well 200 M despite all negative racing situations.
Eased at start and took rail at rear, 8Ls off the leader, dashed strongly 250 M despite not suited by the slow pace, however run ended 100 M.
Settled in front of midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, not suited the slow early sectionals, closed the race off strongly 300 M and took 2nd.
Eased to sit in midfield, 5Ls off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the slow tempo, little dash 300 M, run ended 100 M.
Slow away, hard ridden to go forward, trapped 4-wide first bend and lost ground, sat 1L off the slow pace 2-wide from 1600 M, faded quickly in straight.
Hard ridden to occupy the box seat, enjoyed the slow early sectionals, out of fuel 200 M.

Broke well from middle draw, raced 3-wide without cover in prominent position, improved to join leader briefly approaching home bend, held one-out-one-back position turning in, hit front after straightening, caught late.
Sluggish at start, travelled wide towards rear far side, went wider into straight dropping to last, no further impression.
Moderate start from a high draw, settled just worse than midfield far side, kept on steadily in straight without quickening.
Began with others from the widest draw, soon settled at the back, saved ground turning in, ran on steadily until running out of room closing stages. (Questioned.)
Broke well, niggled along, settled just better than midfield to 400 M, made no progress in straight. (Blood in trachea and lame next day.)

Began fairly, soon 0.5L in front but taken back to 1-out-1- back position early far side, shuffled back to 2L 4th before switched out to improve around the bend, held some chance 200 M out but unable to sustain effort. (Tactic questioned.)
Began well from the one draw, held rails run to soon take up running, led the field to 250 M, no extra.
Settled on rails in midfield, angled off rails for a run after straightening, quickened well to assert authority near the line.
Began with others, raced in prominent one-back position on rails, similar in box-seat turning in and inconvenienced, fought on gamely without threatening.
Settled towards rear to straight, ran on steadily down straight, did best work late.
Settled in last few to straight, tight between runners 200 M out, made some late impression.
Taken back and assumed a usual position in the rear, had 9Ls to make up passing 400 M and was taken wide on straightening, finished the race ok but was left too much to do.
In a 2-wide position behind midfield, ridden along 500 M from home, finished well down the inside but never looked like getting involved.
Unable to slot in and travelled in midfield 3-wide without cover throughout, struggled for pace turning in, found little in straight and ran home disappointingly.

Quickly away and grabbed the inside rail running with ease, inconvenienced by the slow pace and shuffled back entering the back straight, urged along from 500 M and stayed on okay in the straight. (Jockey questioned.)
Pressed on early to be prominent behind leaders, struggled to hold his position making the home turn, already beaten going into the straight.

Not far off from leaders in early stages, trapped on the rails, hampered by the slow pace and was shuffled back to a rearward position approaching the home turn, had plenty to do inside 350 M but couldn't pick up.

Switched off to the rear early, hampered by the slow pace down the back straight, sprinted into the lead passing 700 M, held 2Ls advantage going into straight, kept on but couldn't repel the winner close home.

Urged along to maintain a position in midfield 4Ls back in first half of the race, going strongly rounding the bend, finished the fastest and made up plenty of ground inside 350 M to be nearest on the line.
In mid-division early, gradually shuffled back to the rear passing 1100 M, outpaced from 400 M and never picked up.

Pressed forward to briefly lead making the first turn, had a relaxed run in 3rd under a slow tempo, moved forward from 500 M to stay close to the runaway leader, picked up well to hit front 100 M from home.
Taken back on jumping from the wide barrier, in a rearward position early but crept up to midfield entering the back straight, gave little response inside 350 M. No impression.
Tracked leaders early, led the field down the back straight until the start of the home turn, unable to sprint with them as the race got serious, weakened 200 M out.
In mid-division, raced a shade free without cover, unable to sprint with them as the race got serious inside 400 M, dropped off.
Slow to begin, obtained a midfield position close enough to the pace, responded fairly when asked near 400 M, ran on OK but never troubled the first four which pulled well clear.
Behind midfield towards the stands' side, never picked up despite urging. Disappointing.
Lacked early pace and trailed in the rear 7Ls back, under pressure from midway, made some ground late on but was given too much to do.
Drawn low, in a rearward position on the outside of field, ran on only fairly inside 400 M and found no extra over the final stages.
Took them along under a steady tempo and always going nicely, put in a brave effort inside final 400 M but unable to repel the winner when passed near 50 M.
Showed good speed throughout to be prominent along the stands' rail, kept on resolutely to the line but was always being held.
Raced ungenerously in early stages, never far off the pace and always had the leader in sight, produced a very good finishing kick to cut down the leader 50 M out. Sound effort.
Awkwardly away and lost ground, switched to race along the stands' rail, gradually crept closer to be 4th going into final 400 M, but could find only one pace when it mattered.
Settled one back from the leader on the stands' rail, raced a shade keen in the middle stages, picked up well inside 400 M without quite reaching the first three.
Slow to begin and raced towards the rear for much of the contest, drifted in and out under pressure, never threatened but stayed on OK towards the line.
Standard jump, travelled within 3Ls of the leader down the centre of track, didn't find a lot on asking but kept battling on to the finish.
Stayed close to the pace early on but struggled for speed passing halfway, already beaten 400 M out.
Caught deep early and was used up to stride forward to settle off the leader near the 1100 M. Faded over the final stages.
Went forward to lead along the fence. Compounded in the final stretch.
Settled in last position along the fence. Stayed to the inside early in the straight before peeling out near the 200 M. Went to the line dourly.
Stalked the leaders along the fence. Had every chance.
Raced 3-wide without cover along the back straight, was able to slot in to travel 1 off with cover near the 700 M in midfield. Gave in quickly in the run home.
Raced in 2nd last position. Got onto the back of another runner near the 600 and began a forward move. Knuckled down well in the final stretch to claim the prize close to home.
Went back from a wide gate then landed a midfield position along the fence. Failed to close off.

Settled early, 2-wide with cover midfield, but raced keenly and shifted out near the 1200 M, to travel 3 deep with cover. Was posted after the 600 M, then commenced its run shortly after. Was nailed in the shadows of the post.
Travelled midfield but caught 4-wide with out cover for most of the trip. Battled on well over the concluding stages.
Travelled 2-wide with cover tracking the leaders. No excuses.
Raced midfield 2 deep with cover then was shuffled back after the 600 to be last on the turn, ran on strongly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slow into stride. Raced along the stand's rail at rear 800 M out. Kept on one-pace final stages.
Moderate jump. Worse than midfield at 400 M. Weakened inside final furlong.
Out fairly. Settled in midfield 3Ls off the pace at 700 M. Failed to quicken when asked 400 M out.
Slow into stride and lost ground. Always at rear. Inconvenienced 300 M, never a factor.
Jumped awkwardly. Raced towards rear at 600 M. Took a while to pick up and closed off strongly final 200 M. Nearest at the line.
Moderate jump. Pressed early and settled behind midfield. Responded well inside 400 M and made the frame.
Well enough away from a low draw. Raced with leaders 700 M out. Hung on until final furlong.
Quickly into stride. Disputed lead 700 M out. Unable to match winner's turn of foot inside 200 M and lost out on 2nd in a photo finish.
Began well. Tracked leaders 800 M out. Shifted clear at 400 M. Hit front inside 150 M. Won going away.
Slow to begin and raced in rear section. Shifted for clear passage on the far side at 400 M. Made up some minor ground late.
Jumped okay. Driven up to race in midfield at 600 M. Hard ridden 400 M out. Flattened inside 200 M.
Good jump. Sat 3Ls behind leaders at 700 M. Faded inside 400 M.
Jumped nicely. Showed early speed and disputed lead on stand side rail 800 M out. Remained in front at midpoint but found no extra inside 300 M.
Jumped fairly. Raced a length back at 600 M. Picked up steadily inside 200 M. Well beaten by the winner but snatched 2nd place final stride.
Rearward throughout at least 6Ls or 7Ls from the speed, another weak effort.
Worse than midfield and ridden along at halfway to keep in touch, over 6Ls back off last turn, no impression.
Midfield but wide at halfway when 5Ls adrift, a little further back turning for home, very one-paced.
Midfield with cover about 6Ls off speed at halfway, tapped for toe at top of home straight, still 5Ls back at 200 M, tight for room late, never nearer.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Always in rear group at least 7Ls from the pace.
Prominent early on, settled 4-back on rails in midfield at halfway, 5Ls back off last turn, always held.
Taken back from the start to race 3-wide with cover at least 7Ls from the lead, never likely to land a telling blow in the straight.
Pressed on from wide gate to lead on fence by 2Ls at 1200 M, joined by the winner on circle and headed at top of home straight, one-paced to conclude.
Midfield with cover about 4Ls or 5Ls from the speed through to straightening for home, finished off well for a place, never nearer.
Went back as usual, still 8Ls last 600 M out, made only very minor late ground.
Best away, 3-back the rails at first but hard pressed to hold this spot in 5th about 4Ls back turning for home, dropped out. (Questioned for poor performance.)
2Ls back in 2nd on fence initially, pressured when same margin back in 3rd at 600 M, kept on at the same pace in the straight for 4th.
Slowly away, pressed forward from 3-wide no cover position from back straight to be 3Ls back in 4th turning in, couldn't reach the winner.
Slowest out, rearward on fence before dashing forward from 600 M to be 5-wide turning for home, 1L down with every chance at 200 M, couldn't sustain.
3-back the rails when 3Ls off pace in 5th at 1000 M, still on terms turning for home, blocked for a run 300 M out, wasn't far away inside the distance.
5Ls off pace at halfway with cover, lost position when 6Ls back in rear off last curve, always well held thereafter.
Mostly 3-wide no cover down back straight when midfield about 3Ls off pace, extra work took its toll and not competitive in the home straight.
Slow to muster early pace, no better than 9th or 10th at any stage, 6Ls behind initially and kept chasing the majority of the field in the straight.
Very wide while cutting out early running, a neck clear and 2-wide at halfway, joined from top of straight to furlong pole, weakened close home.
One from rear down back straight 7Ls behind leader, pressed on at 600 M when 4-wide no cover, a neck back in 3rd at 200 M, tired close home.
8Ls last at the 1200 M, remained in last place, limp effort.
2-wide in 9th at halfway when 5Ls back, on the inner and same margin behind turning in, held up until the 200 M, ran on well and got close.
Behind midfield about 6Ls off early pace, looped field at the 700 M to vie for the lead turning for home, all out at the 200 M and tired final 100 M.
Midfield about 3Ls or so from lead until home turn, held up for a run until the 200 M, ran on well once clear, might well have won otherwise.
Handy position in 3rd at 1200 M, still on terms within 2Ls of the pace taking last turn, held when checked 150 M out, eased late.
On the leader's back on rails 2Ls off through to home straight, held up until the 300 M, responded well to lead 50 M out, did enough.
1L back in 2nd on fence at 1200 M, upsides entering home straight and held a narrow break at 200 M and 100 M out, soon headed but just hung onto a place.
At back, 7-1/2Ls off the good pace 2 to 3-wide, made some ground 200 M.
Eased to sit in midfield along the fence, 5-1/2Ls off the good pace, no turn of foot in straight.
Hard ridden early but failed to muster, trapped 3 to 4-wide behind midfield, 6Ls off the good pace, no progress in final stages.
Behind midfield along the fence, 7Ls off the good pace, progressed steadily 300 M.
Pushed forward and took rail, 3-1/2Ls off the good pace, lacked room after straightening until 250 M, made ground steadily when clear and scored.
Eased to sit behind midfield, 6Ls off the good pace 2 to 3-wide, just ran on ok in final stages, never threatened.
Slow away and bumped, at rear, 9Ls behind the good pace on the rails, made ground 500 M, flattened 100 M.
Hard ridden to obtain the rail and led by 1L at good pace, hung on until 300 M when emptied.
Hard ridden to take the box seat, pace good, soon dropped off 350 M.
At rear, 8Ls off the good pace, trapped 3 to 4-wide and lost ground, just ran on fairly in straight.
Pushed to occupy a prominent spot behind the leaders, 2-1/2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, made some ground in straight to grab a minor 3rd without threatening to winner.
Eased to sit in midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the good pace 2 to 3-wide, progressed steadily 500 M, led 300 M, hung on until 50 M overhauled, just missed win by a neck.
Pushed forward, trapped 3-wide without cover throughout and lost ground, 1-1/2Ls off the good pace, held ground in straight despite the negative situations.
Hard ridden to go forward, sat 1L off the good pace 2-wide, soon weakened 300 M. Used up early.
Began fairly, raced wide throughout, settled just worse than midfield, fought on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Slow out, remained well back to straight, saved ground turning for home, kept on steadily without quickening.
Always struggling in last few, made no show in the run home.
Began fairly from a wide draw, raced wide without cover in midfield far side and around the bend, soon weakened after straightening.
Began well from the one draw, settled on rails 3Ls off the pace in forward of midfield, ran home one-paced under pressure.
Never far off to straight, gave ground gradually after straightening.
Began moderately from a poor draw, prominent early, travelled one-out-one-back to straight, shifted out to challenge turning in, responded well to take charge 100 M out.
Broke well to lead, joined by ROYAL PERICLES (eventual 2nd) approaching home bend, shared pace to 100 M, unable to sustain effort close to home.
Began well but soon lost touch, travelled in forward of midfield to straight, dropped away noticeably. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Soon tailed off. (Saddle shifted - see Racing Incidents.)
Reared and lost rider jumping out.
Began with others from the widest draw, came to dispute lead from approaching home bend, joint leader to over 100 M out, plugged on for 2nd.

Held up at the back of the field on the inside, 8Ls behind passing halfway, attempted a run down the inside and looked a possible winner near 200 M but appeared to have flattened out over the concluding stages.
First time over a mile. Took up the running as expected, had his lead challenged making the turn, swamped passing 200 M, weakened rapidly thereafter.
Switched off to the rear on jumping, 9Ls away in middle stages, swung wide into home straight, stayed on OK giving some late impression.

Allowed to drift back on jumping and given a patient ride throughout, still last going into final 400 M but he came through a gap between horses to hit full stride inside 200 M. Won with something in hand.
Standard jump, rolled along the fence to settle in a forward position one back from leader, couldn't quicken when asked and could keep on one-paced only.
Prominent early before settling down in a better than midfield position, chased them throughout in the straight but, despite keeping on, couldn't pick up sufficiently to feature in the finish.

Had a smooth run in mid-division, switched wide turning in, picked up strongly and hit front inside 200 M, kept on but was picked off over the final stages. Ran a creditable race but the winner was too strong.
4Ls back in mid-division throughout, 2-wide turning in, ran on well early in straight and looked a danger near 250 M, but couldn't sustain his challenge late on.
Always in the front rank, vied for lead passing 800 M, pressed on from 350 M but found very little in the run to the line, dropped away inside 100 M.
In a rearward position along the fence, found nothing turning into straight, eased down. (Irregular heart rhythm 2nd time.)
Away with them, settled 4Ls back in midfield along the fence, had a relaxed trip to straight, had to switch several times inside 350 M for a clear run, ran on nicely.
Ridden forward after the start, raced prominently in 3rd behind leaders, held every chance on straightening but his run peaked near 200 M, no extra close home.
Plenty of early speed, kicked through to lead but had to work to do so, held a 1L advantage on bend, kept to task well on turning but run ended at 250 M and didn't see out trip.

Fastest out, pressed on to challenge for front, kept early speed honest, sat 1L back in mid-section, lay down challenge to leader turning, headed by eventual winner at 250 M, fought bravely to go down by small margin.
Drifted back as usual from widest alley, positioned 10Ls away and aided by early pace, raced between horses in running line on circle made some minor late headway without threatening.
Slowly away, raced 3 wide behind midfield 8Ls off speed, had cover in mid-section, under pressure on turning, didn't figure in straight.
Moderate jump, ridden up to be first behind lead on rails 4Ls away, easy time in mid-section, niggled turning, didn't respond and simply battled in run to line.
Moderate jump, assumed a midfield role 5Ls or so back in running line, not used in middle stages, switched out turning but lacked extra gear, just battled away at same speed late.
Standard getaway, ended up 4Ls back in running line in front of midfield, proved difficult to settle in mid-section, looked a minor place chance at top of straight but failed to go on last furlong.
Away fairly, ended up in midfield 6Ls back, improved 3 wide on circle despite overracing, gradually made progress between horses to 200 M, unable to get closer but was nearest on line.

Bounced out, elected to take trail 1 out 1 back 2Ls behind lead, always travelling comfortably in run, cruised up on turning, took lead at 250 M, didn't quicken as intimated but responded under hard riding late to score narrowly.
Ordinary beginning and angled back from outside draw, posted 3 wide at rear 10Ls off lead, did work but had cover throughout, still well back turning, just passed tired runners late.
Out with rest, pressed on but posted 3 wide without cover 3Ls back, used too much in mid-section, same margin back on turning, faded inside 200 M.
Began with rest, ended up 3 wide in midfield 5Ls from leaders, enjoyed a trail in middle stages, crept closer leaving turn, switched wide but didn't let down and gradually weakened out.
Tardy into stride, settled at rear 10Ls off speed, had even run on rails with speed on, still last turning with job to do, made some late ground along inside.
Standard jump, allowed to drift back from an awkward alley ended up best part of 8Ls down, shifted to rails on circle, saved ground turning, kept closing but unable to wear down first two late.
Jumped with more purpose, went on to race on leaders back, used a bit on strong speed, urged along turning, couldn't go on and faded out.
Began with rest, ended up 5Ls back on rails, had an ideal run with speed on, saved ground on bend, made gradual progress in straight doing best work late to snare place.
Standard getaway, took a position on rails in rear division, best part of 6 to 7Ls but saved ground on rails, made good ground in straight to be closest at finish.
Tardy into stride, settled best part of 10Ls off top end, well back but suited by speed on throughout, in impossible spot bend, worked home evenly without looking likely.
Away fairly, sat in front of midfield 3 wide with cover 2 to 3Ls back, did share of work to bend, lacked a sprint final 300 M and just battled late.
Reasonable break, assumed a midfield role but drifted back on top bend, raced 3 wide 6 to 7Ls down on circle, lacked extra gear and run peaked at 200 M. Dropped out thereafter.
First to hit ground, worked across from outside gate, led field easily racing 2Ls clear, backed off pace on bend, held advantage to 200 M but condition gave out thereafter.
Allowed to drift back to tail, raced 9Ls or so away and helped with pace on, still had plenty to do turning, made some progress in straight but unable to get closer final 200 M.
Began with rest, pressed forward from a wide alley, used a bit when racing 3 wide without cover outside leaders, still 1L down turning, there to 250 M but knocked up thereafter.
Out in time, used to take a position early, always prominent driving through to race outside leader, did share of work to bend, went with principals when they dashed at 250 M, just lost place late.

Standard jump, mustered to drive through and race 3Ls off speed in 2 wide line, always travelling to bend, let down quickly at 300 M, took over inside 200 M, kept on despite hanging and was collared in shadows of post.
Amongst first out, took hold and angled back into midfield 4Ls back, raced 3 wide with cover on circle, switched out 5 wide turning, came with a bold sprint to claim victory in the final 50 M.
Little early pace and drifted back to race 3 wide at rear, helped by pace on at top end, 8Ls back on circle, tracked wide turning, made useful ground once clear to turn in an improved effort.
Taken back from an awkward draw, settled 6Ls back in running line behind midfield, tracked well on bend, made steady progress between horses in straight to be nearest on line.
Behind leaders early but raced keen in middle stages and was taken back to midfield, lacked a sudden change of pace but ran on ok in the finish.
Despite being ridden not able to generate sufficient pace to go forward and cross, caught 4-wide making the final turn, beaten shortly after straightening.
Broke well from the widest gate, shaken up early but unable to shift in, gradually shuffled back to midfield for cover, never threatened in the straight.
Away well enough, in mid-division early but allowed to stride forward passing 800 M, vied for lead over the home turn, didn't find much under pressure and kept drifting out in the run to the line.
Raced in a position better than midfield but was unable to cross and remained wide for most of the trip, looked in trouble turning for home, fought on briefly in straight but gave ground from 200 M.
Began awkwardly and lost ground, raced as the back marker throughout the trip, taken wide on the turn and covered extra ground, finished best of all.

Jumped well from the inside draw, held a position on the rail never far off the leaders, surged through to lead 100 M out and kept on determinately to hold off the fast finishing challengers on the outside.
Slowly away, shaken up to take closer order behind midfield, carried back when steadied near 600 M, switched wide approaching the straight and finished off the race strongly.
Drifted back to a rearward position after start, 5Ls off the pace turning in, didn't have the clearest run in straight and was steadied near 200 M, stayed on ok towards the line.
Taken back on jumping, shifted across to a position behind midfield on the rail, had 4Ls to make up passing 400 M but could keep on one-paced only.
Quickly into stride and led steadily along the rail, had his lead challenged rounding the home bend, held slight advantage coming off the bend, kept on until headed near 100 M.

Swiftly away, raced prominently outside the lead in early stages, eased back to sit in 4th making the home turn, held every chance in straight but had nothing more to offer passing 200 M. (Jockey questioned.)
Came out of the boxes running and was the leader along the fence before being headed near the 500 M. Showed good resilience to hold a head margin over the final stages.
Pressed forward to race outside the 2 front runners, before strolling to the lead, 1 off no cover after the 500 M. Battled on well.
Positioned 2nd last, 1 off with cover. Came wide in the straight and found the line soundly.
Settled back in the field, 2-wide with cover. Ran on well.
Tracked the speed along the paint. Didn't find much early in the straight however got to the line satisfactorily.
Worked forward from a wide gate to travel outside the leader. Raced in 3rd position after being crossed near the 500 M. Kept on well.
Travelled towards the rear along the rails. Struggled in the run home.
Was taken back at the jump settling last. Whilst making some ground in the straight had to be checked to avoid heels near the 200 M.

Lost ground at the start after beginning awkwardly, settling midfield 2 deep with cover. Peeled out approaching the home turn and quickened early in the straight before leveling out on its run before the line.
Raced midfield the fence. Had to be steadied when making ground along the inside near the 150 M, then plodded to the wire when unable to obtain clear running thereafter.
Positioned midfield 2 deep with cover. Made good late ground without threatening.
Overraced early whilst parked on the back of the speed 2-wide with cover. Rolled out near the 450 M to improve racing 3-wide. Snared 3rd spot close to the post.
Away in line. Took a handy position on rails and 3Ls behind the speed from 1400 M. Pressured 500 M out. Barely saw daylight in the straight and was not fully tested.
Amongst last to begin. Sat 2-wide and 7Ls off back straight. Hard ridden 500 M out. Took inside run and improved moderately in the straight.
Soon occupied a prominent spot. Hit front 200 M. Kept on well to win comfortably.
Slow into stride. 2-wide worse than midfield at 1300 M. Wide towards the rear rounding home turn. No impression thereafter.
Jumped awkwardly and was slow to muster. 4Ls off on fence in back straight. Peeled out for clear passage in the straight and closed the race off well. Failed to make frame narrowly.
Out nicely. Pressed early from an outside draw to race 2-wide outside the leader. A length off turning into the home straight. Kept one-pace final stages and just hung on to make frame.
Well enough away. Better than midfield but was 3-wide without cover back straight. 3Ls off turning in and responded well in the straight. Snatched 2nd on the line without serious threat to winner.
Quickly into stride. Ridden to take lead on fence 1300 M out. Held a 1L advantage turning in but couldn't sustain its run in the straight. Swamped in the closing stages.
Good jump. 2-wide better than midfield back straight. 5Ls back turning in. Failed to respond under pressure in the straight. Flattened inside 150 M.
Jumped awkwardly. Raced 3-wide at rear back straight. 9Ls off making the home turn. Made up some late ground.
Away with them. Slotted into 2-wide position 4Ls from the lead 1300 M out. 7Ls off turning in and kept same pace in the straight.
Bumped at start. In rear section on rails. 6Ls off back straight. Saved ground along rails to finish off well in the straight. Just missed out on 2nd.
Awkward start, 10th initially about 7Ls from the lead, 5Ls last at the 600 M, not suited by tempo and ran on past a few spent rivals only.
Enjoyed the run of the race about 2Ls back in 3rd or so until straightening, stayed on well in the finish but couldn't quite overhaul the winner.
Slow out and keen at first, wide without cover before slipping into 'one-out-one-back' spot at 1200 M, a neck 2nd off last turn, faded out tamely.
Always rearward, 5Ls last at the 800 M and widest off final bend, offered nothing.
2-wide in midfield about 4Ls or so from the speed until the last turn when with place prospects, no pick-up and always held through the final 300 M.
8Ls last at 1200 M, pressed on out 4-wide no cover down back straight but hung out and laboured on the circle, gone off the home turn.
Off the bit at halfway as usual when worse than midfield, 5Ls back in 9th turning for home, no impression, flat performance. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Very slow to muster early pace in rear, 4Ls or so back in 8th at halfway, soon came off the bit again and very weak in the final two furlongs.
On the leader's back on fence 2Ls off in 4th or so through to final turn, given every possible chance to win, did enough to place.
Raced 3 and 4-back on the rails around midfield and about 4Ls from the speed until the last bend, found nothing off the bridle.
Looped field to lead on fence 1400 M out, set sensible pace, clear by no more than 1L until last turn, joined 200 M out, no real excuse for not placing.
Nice trail 3Ls back in 5th with cover 1200 M out, popped out 3-wide no cover 700 M out when 1L back, upsides 200 M out, all out to hang on.
3Ls back in 3rd at halfway, upsides when 3-wide taking final bend, had every chance but rather one-paced inside final furlong.
Best out, made early running before handing up to the winner 700 M out, a neck 2nd turning for home, one-paced in final 200 M but still placed.
Midfield or better out 3-wide down the back, going well when 2Ls back in 6th off last turn, found disappointingly little off the bit.
Handily placed behind the leader on the rails down the back, 1L down in 3rd with every chance 200 M out, couldn't go with the winner.
Good pace to cross from wide gate and lead 700 M out, 1L clear turning in, responded well to pressure and pulled further clear late on.
Caught very wide throughout, 3 and 4-wide no cover down the back straight, 3Ls back in midfield off last bend, soon faded out after the extra work. (Questioned.)
3-back on the rails about 5Ls behind early pace and closer turning for home, outpaced in the closing stages.
Weak effort, never going well, hard ridden to keep before final turn when 5Ls back in 9th, ceded further ground.
Slowly away, always rearward at least 5Ls from the speed, hung in the home straight and very much held.
Went back from a wide gate, 7Ls last and widest turning for home, made some fair late ground out wide, may want more ground.
Taken back from a wide gate, one from rear when checked at halfway, 6Ls adrift off last bend, never on terms.
In 7th out 2-wide some 5Ls from the pace until the last bend, held his ground in the straight but neither did he pose any danger.
Eased to sit behind the leading group, 2-1/2Ls off the fast pace, trapped 3-wide, hung out badly from 600 M and dropped off.
Hard ridden to take the rail and led by 1L, not suited by the fast early sectionals, hung on strongly until 100 M overhauled, ran on for 3rd.
Eased to rear, 9Ls off the leaders on the fence, favoured by the fast pace, however never progressed.
Slow away, at rear, more than 10Ls off the leader 2-wide, suited by the fast pace, however failed to sustain clear running in straight, made some ground in last furlong.
Very slow away, pushed forward and occupied a midfield spot along the fence, 4-1/2Ls off the leaders, benefited by the fast tempo and the rail-trip, progressed steadily 300 M, dominated 100 M.
Pushed early to obtain the box seat, 2-1/2Ls off the fast pace, ran on well to the line and finished 2nd.
Eased back and took rail, 7-1/2Ls off the leaders, benefited by the fast pace and the rails-run, made ground 400 M, flattened 100 M.
Hard ridden forward, 2Ls off the leader, not suited by the fast tempo, trapped 3-wide throughout and lost too much ground, weakened quickly 300 M.
Hard ridden early, but soon eased to sit just in front of midfield, 4Ls off the fast pace 2-wide, pushed back and carried out badly from 600 M to 4 to 5-wide, flattened in final stages.
Pushed early to secure a midfield spot, 5-1/2Ls off the leaders 2-wide, helped by the fast pace, lacked turn of foot until 200 M to make some ground.
Pushed forward and cross, 1L off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the fast early sectionals, emptied 250 M.
Eased back, 7-1/2Ls off the leaders 2-wide, favoured by the fast tempo, progressed steadily 250 M.
Settled in forward of midfield, similar into straight, made no impression.
Not far off in 3rd on rails, faded under pressure after straightening.

Began moderately, travelled in first few on rails, 2L 4th off the Rock stretching to 3Ls around the bend, shifted out to challenge turning in hitting front momentarily 100 M out, collared close to home.
Began fairly, settled in midfield on rails, angled out to challenge upon straightening, fought on well to assert authority close to home.
Settled well back, remained last to 300 M, finished off well impressively down the centre of the straight.

Jumped moderately, travelled wide in last few, hampered and lost position passing 800 M, awkwardly placed behind runners after straightening, obtained clear passage 200 M out, fought on well to finish.
Began fairly, settled in rear of midfield, shuffled backward passing the Rock, briefly baulked upon straightening, produced good late impression inside final 200 M.
Began moderately from a wide draw, raced wide in midfield, lost position turning in, ran home one-paced under pressure.
Checked at start, hampered in rear midway down far side, finished off race nicely. (Questioned.)

Broke well from a poor draw, raced prominently without cover down far side, rolled up to one-out-one-back spot approaching Rock, similar turning in, fought on steadily under pressure until finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Began well from the widest barrier, soon took up running and crossed for rails run far side, led till joined inside 200 M, soon overhauled.
Settled towards rear, saved ground turning in, ran home well to only find winner too good at the finish.
Broke nicely and swiftly crossed to the rail, settled in midfield 3Ls back, poised to strike turning in, made a strong run down the inside but was firmly put aside by the winner.

Towards the rear early, badly hampered by the slow pace and shifted out to improve passing 900 M, took it up approaching the home turn, couldn't match with the winner but kept on well to finish a close 4th. (Jockey questioned.)
Jumped well, tracked leader along the fence, shifted out to challenge coming off the bend but was steadied near 250 M, recovered to take 3rd but didn't pose serious threat to the winner.

Taken back on jumping from the wide barrier, travelled in a rearward position 8Ls back, responded only fairly when placed under pressure inside 600 M, stayed on but never threatened. (Jockey and Trainer questioned.)
Average beginning, moved up making the 1st turn and briefly led passing 1200 M, shuffled back to midfield approaching the home turn, steadied near 250 M and kept on one-paced only.
Began awkwardly and lost ground, shaken up to take closer order in midfield, remained there to straight but was left behind when the race got serious. Never a factor.
Drifted back to last after a fine start, trailed 8Ls to leader in middle stages and used little in running, closed off the race reasonably but given too much to do. (Jockey questioned.)
Away well enough, settled in a position better than midfield in early and middle stages, shifted to 3-wide approaching home turn, ran on fairly down the outside without looking dangerous.

Quickly slotted into a 2-wide midfield position before the first turn, unsuited by the slow pace and allowed to stride forward down the back straight, made a wide turn and found very little when asked, weakened inside 200 M.
Quickly into stride, led slowly in early stages but soon had his lead challenged, geared up the pace approaching home turn, accelerated away near 200 M for a determined victory.
Kept to inside along the fence in midfield, inconvenienced by the slow tempo, took time to gather on straightening but stayed on well despite not having the clearest of runs close home.

Travelled wide without cover rounding the 1st turn, gradually moved up to a forward position down the back straight due to slow tempo, stayed on and gave everything in straight, but never looked like threatening the first three.

Held up in midfield 3Ls off the pace, pushed along from 400 M, picked up strongly to lead near 150 M and was well on top at the finish. Good effort considering the weight he had given to other opponents.
Tracked leaders in a close up 4th, outpaced from halfway but did show some battling qualities inside the final 400 M, stayed on ok in the finish.
Began awkwardly, lacked speed and ended up in the rear trailing more than 7Ls, soon left behind when the race got serious in the 2nd half.
Bounded in air on jumping, dislodged his rider shortly after the start.
Broke well, soon took it up from a position one off the stands' rail, responded well and kicked clear inside 300 M but had no answer when the winner appeared passing 200 M.
Reasonable jump, settled in a position behind midfield, ridden along approaching 400 M but found very little. No impression.
Hampered shortly after the start and lost ground, switched to a rearward position on the stands' rail, urged from 500 M but had nothing to offer in the run to the line. Ran disappointingly.
Behind midfield tracking the eventual winner, didn't possess the same turn of foot as the winner, but did run on ok to take 3rd close home.
In the front rank throughout but showed signs of greenness in his debut, inclined to hang out when placed under pressure, weakened from 300 M.
Fast away, went forward and rolled along the stands' rail, responded fairly under pressure inside 400 M before fading away in the final 200 M.
Raced in 3rd position, 1 off. Enjoyed the run of the race and had every chance. Gave ground quickly inside the furlong.

Bounded in the air at the start, loosing ground and settling towards the rear. Struggled in the straight. (Vet reported after the race the horse had lost its left hind and right front plates. Swollen tendons next day.)
Settled midfield 3-wide without cover. Battled to the wire in the final stretch.
Was slow to begin settling at the tail of the field. Came widest in the straight and closed off soundly.
Raced well back in the event, 2-wide with cover. Commenced to peel out after the 600, came wide on the circle and closed off well without threatening.
Ridden along early, settling close to midfield, 2 deep with cover. Failed to quicken in the straight.

Camped on the back of the leader. As the pace quickened was 2 lengths off the front runner on home turn. Make good ground early in the straight finding the lead inside the 100 M, drawing a margin late.

Bounded in the air when the gates opened and struck its head on an overhead bar in the barriers. Consequently lost ground settling with the back makers along the paint. Made some late ground in the run to the line.
Travelled just behind the speed 1 off with cover. Never quickened but kept on at the same pace for the length of the home straight.
Landed 3 back the fence. Whacked away at the same speed before tiring over the concluding stages.
Raced midfield on the fence. Went to the post dourly.
Scooted along in front from the outside alley to lead for most of the trip. Showed good resilience to stay in the frame.
Raced in last position. Kept to the fence in the straight, paddled to the line.

Began awkwardly bumped the outside of the gate causing its rider to become unbalanced as a result settled back in the field 3-wide with cover. Never really travelled and was a beaten horse on straightening.
Last out and was given reminder early. Worse than midfield on rails at 1000 M. Checked to the rear at 800 M. Failed to quicken in the straight.
Pushed early to obtain prominent spot 1000 M out. Barely saw daylight on fence in the straight and was steadied final 50 M. Not fully tested.
2-wide at midfield at 1000 M. 2Ls behind the pace turning in. Had every chance final 100 M but was denied by the quinella pair closing stages.
Slow to begin. Urged early to race better than midfield 1000 M out. 2Ls behind the pace on fence making home turn. Trapped until final 200 M. Finished off well when clear and was nearest at the line.
Began fairly, trailed field 1200 M out. Made progress on home bend and was 4-wide turning in. 4Ls back early in the straight. Held ground thereafter.
Well enough away. Taken to midfield and 3-wide in the early stages. Widest on home bend. Faded in the straight.
3-wide behind midfield at 1000 M. Driven to race outside leaders into the home straight. Battled with the front trio from 400 M but peaked on efforts inside 100 M.
Soon taken back on rails after start. Checked to last at 800 M. 4-wide round the bend and 6Ls back on straightening. Passed only beaten rivals in the straight.
Away with them. Raced outside the leader 1/2L down 900 M out. Remained in front early in the straight. Weakened final furlong. (Bled.)
Good jump. Settled 2-wide and 2Ls behind the lead. Found nothing when asked in the straight.
Hard ridden early along the fence to stay midfield. Slipped to rear section 3 to 4Ls behind the pace on straightening. Made up some late ground in the straight.
Quickly into stride from wide draw. Driven to take lead on fence 900 M out. Grabbed by the winner closing stages but gave plenty to hold 2nd.
At rear after start, 8-9Ls off the pace at 1000 M. Improved wide at the bend and was 2Ls off turning in. Ran down rivals near the line.
Out nicely. Eased to settle 2-wide behind midfield at 1100 M. 4Ls off turning for home. Clear run down the centre in the straight but kept on one-paced.
3-wide but with cover about 2Ls back in 5th at 800 M, lost ground on the circle and at least 5Ls off the winner in the homestretch.
Rearward and 3-back the rails at least 5Ls from the speed until straightening, recovered some nice late ground to place, sound debut.
2-wide and worse than midfield at first, lost ground on the circle and 7Ls off turning for home, remained a good distance behind.
2Ls back on fence in 5th at the 800 M, slipped further behind off last bend, no impression.
Slowly away and eased back to 10th about 5Ls from the speed, never looked likely to play a serious role in the finish. (Questioned.)
Vied for early lead out 3-wide no cover, eased back to be 3Ls back in 3rd swinging for home, one-paced.
Disputed early speed on the fence, 2Ls back in 2nd turning for home, chased best of the rest but never likely to reel in the winner.
Disputed early pace before establishing an outright lead by 1L at halfway, kicked over 2Ls clear at the 200 M, always in command.
2Ls back in 4th initially, 3-back on rails and under pressure off last turn, found nothing off the bit. (Heart irregularity.) (Blood in trachea.)
3Ls back in midfield with cover down the back, further behind spinning for home, one-paced.
Wide throughout, 4-wide no cover on the circle in midfield, beaten a long way from home, performance deemed unacceptable. (Mucus.)
Slowest away, 6Ls last at the 800 M, lost further ground in the straight.
Very wide down the back straight without cover, 6-wide (widest) turning in when 6Ls last, ran on past a few spent rivals to finish.
Settled 9th about 4Ls off pace at 800 M, under pressure at halfway in midfield, plodded on home at one speed.
Midfield at first and 4Ls back in 5th turning for home, had his chance to place but was a bit too one-paced.
Fractious in barriers, around midfield when 4-wide no cover at the 800 M, soon lost his position and struggling turning for home, eased down, to trial.
Pressed forward to lead by a neck out 2-wide before being headed again at top of home straight, 2Ls back in 2nd at the 200 M, very one-paced.
Went back and soon 6Ls last, gained a split at top of home straight, no chance with winner and just missed out on 2nd place.
Best away, led before handing up the advantage to race 2nd from 800 M to final turn, skipped over 2Ls clear by the 200 M, won easily.
Eased back to 10th place and about 6Ls off the pace turning for home, found nothing under pressure and eased down closing stages.
Lost ground at start, 3-back the rails 4Ls back in midfield, same margin back turning home, no chance with winner but stayed on well to nick 2nd.
Prominent early on, had 'one-out-one-back' spot in 4th on the circle, very one-paced to wind up.
5-wide down the back straight but still had cover, 5-wide no cover on the circle and 6Ls down turning for home, no pick-up, eased late on.
Tracked the pacesetter 2Ls back on the fence at first, pressured to remain in 3rd turning for home, soon surrendered.
Hard ridden to take the rail and led by 1-1/2Ls at advantageous slow early sectionals, hung on until 200 M emptied.
Hard ridden to occupy a midfield spot along the fence, 4-1/2Ls off the leader, not suited by the slow tempo, blocked most of straight, no progress when clear.
Bumped at start, hard ridden to sit behind midfield, 6Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, not suited by the slow pace, dashed strongly 300 M whilst hanging in, dominated final 150 M.
Pushed to take a more prominent spot in midfield, 3Ls off the leaders 3-wide, not sutied by the slow pace, ran on until 200 M weakened.
Pushed to obtain the box seat, benefited by the slow early tempo, very one paced and just held ground in straight.
Settled in front, 1-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, helped by the slow early sectionals, however soon out of fuel 250 M.
Very slow away, at rear, 9Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, dashed strongly 200 M despite not suited by the slow pace and took 3rd.
Eased to sit behind midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, harmed by the slow pace, lacked room in straight, no dash when clear, on heels 200 M and 100 M.
Eased to sit behind midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leader 3-wide, harmed by the slow tempo, lacked turn of foot in final stages, never progressed.
Hard ridden early, at back, 7Ls off the leader on the rails, harmed by the slow pace, blocked most straight, checked 200 M, just ran on.
Eased to sit in midfield early, allowed to stride forward 1000 M and sat 1-1/2Ls off the slow pace 3-wide, soon dropped off 350 M.
Eased to sit just better than midfield, 3Ls off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the slow pace, ran on until 150 M flattened.
Eased to rear, 8Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, harmed by the slow pace, demonstrated strong finishing efforts and finished 2nd.
Pushed early but failed to muster, 3Ls off the leader on the fence, not suited by the slow pace, held up 4-2, just held ground when clear.
Drawn wide, settled in last few, commenced run when wide around home bend, widest turning in, made up good ground down centre of straight.
Soon taken back from a wide draw to travel wide in midfield, no cover around home bend, fought on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Jumped moderately, soon driven to front rank early, settled one-back in 3rd on rails before home bend, quickened well inside final 200 M, lost 2nd late.
Raced wide without cover in midfield, took closer order rounding home bend, beaten and giving ground when hampered inside 200 M.
Began with others, settled 3-wide in midfield, similar turning in but not much room early in straight and shuffled back, tightened inside 200 M, made no impression closing stages.
Never better than midfield, towards rear into straight, beaten when hampered inside 200 M.
Settled in last few on rails despite drawn widest, stuck to the rails for a run after straightening, produced good impression in closing stages doing best work late.
Prominent far side, slightly shuffled back to just better than midfield coming out, similar on rails turning for home, switched out for a run 400 M out, kept on steadily without quickening.
Settled on rails in midfield, raced tight between runners early in straight, inconvenienced inside 200 M, kept on steadily to finish.
Niggled at in first few, gradually took up running, held one length advantage rounding home bend, headed over 200 M out, no extra.
Began fairly from middle draw, restrained to forward of midfield in a slow-paced race, took closer order turning in, gradually faded from 3rd inside final 200 M. (Lame and roarer.)
Soon dropped to last despite niggled along, trailed the field to 400 M, ran home strongly inside final 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Began with others from a poor draw, niggled at to muster speed for a prominent one-out-one-back spot, similar turning for home, hit front under pressure 200 M out, held on well to finish.
Travelled just better than midfield, raced very awkwardly and lost position approaching home bend, tightened for a run about 300 M out, made no further impression. (Questioned.)
Taken back on jumping, settled well in a rearward position 4Ls behind leader, ran on soundly from off the pace but unable to close in on the runaway winner.
Enjoyed an inside run 1L off the leader, boxed seated on straightening and didn't obtain clear run until 100 M, stayed on ok towards the finish.
Even break, couldn't shift in and kept racing wide over the bend, looked very one-paced after straightening on his first attempt over AWT. Never a threat.
Drifted back on jumping from the wide barrier, showed little speed and was soon in last about 6Ls back detached, unable to pick up in straight. Never a factor.
Towards the rear, swung very wide into straight and covered extra ground, shaken up early in straight but the response was very limited.
Unable to cross after the start and was caught wide without cover throughout the trip, gradually outpaced on turning, beaten early in straight. (Jockey questioned / Blood in trachea.)
Switched off to a rearward position after beginning well from the inside barrier, into clear early in straight and produced a sustained finishing burst to win in fine style.
Held up in mid-division 3-wide and going strongly passing 400 M, gradually picked up on straightening to snatch 3rd right on the line.
Went forward on jumping, had a tendency to hang out and as a consequence travelled very wide on the turn, found nothing left coming off the bend, weakened rapidly from 250 M. (Jockey questioned.)

Niggled along to obtain a prominent position just off the pace, looked threatening early in straight but couldn't quite match the winner's acceleration inside 200 M. Ran another consistent race and just missed out on 3rd narrowly.
Ridden forward from a wide draw, crossed to the rail and led them at a decent tempo, battled on briefly in straight but weakened passing 200 M, eased down final 100 M.
Shaken up to take closer order in midfield after a slow start, held every chance turning in but couldn't step up a gear when asked.
Taken back from a wide gate, ended up 3 wide at rear 8Ls back, set a task and still well down on bend, made some minor ground in straight from impossible spot.
Fair to begin, not pushed early and took a spot further back than usual, raced 3 wide with cover 6Ls off speed, ridden along turning and made a little progress before condition gave out.
Awkwardly away, ridden up to sit 6Ls or so away behind midfield in running line, niggled on turn, dropped right out to be beaten a long way.
No early speed, ended up 3 wide in rear division 7Ls or so off lead, fair run in middle stages, shifted wider on turning, made some moderate progress, never likely.
First to hit ground, pressed forward to race outside leader, appreciated speed steadying in mid-section, still 1/2L down leaving bend, kept on to 200 M but peaked on run thereafter.

Assumed usual position at rear 8Ls back on fence, had fair run but used little to bend, had plenty to do and ridden along turning, made gradual progress along inside in straight to be nearest on line.
Out with rest, unable to slot in and posted 3 wide without cover in midfield, 4 to 5Ls back on bend, used too much in run and peaked on efforts at 200 M.
Began well, pressed on to assume usual role in front, had ideal run making all, cruising 1/2L clear on bend, kept finding under riders urging, held off fast finishing rival final 50 M.
Jumped with first few, box seated behind leaders, used little in run, held up some time from turning to 200 M, dashed sharply when clear and unlucky not to take victory.
Slow out and lost ground, drifted back to race 3 wide at rear 8Ls away, ridden along from bend, no real response and just struggled late.
Fair to begin, assumed a midfield role 3Ls or so off speed, travelled kindly in middle stages, lacked extra gear but kept on soundly late at some speed.
Slow to jump, ended up 4Ls or so away on fence, conserved energy in run, didn't have much room in early part of straight, closed respectably last furlong to make frame despite crowding at 100 M.
Well enough away, slotted into ideal spot 1 out 1 back, travelled well in mid-section, right there turning, kept giving in straight and held 2nd until shadows of post.
Out with rest, ended up 3Ls away on fence, used little in run, hung rounding bend, shifted wide in straight but unable to make required progress and just held ground final furlong.

Allowed to slide back from an awkward alley, ended up 6 to 7Ls back, shifted 3 wide with cover at top bend, 4 wide turning and let down with strong sprint at 350 M, hit lead at 200 M, kept on to score nicely.
Showed usual pace to work forward in search of front, eventually took over at top bend, did plenty of early work, kept on to 200 M before tiring when workload took toll.
Reasonable break, pushed forward to take spot 1 out 1 back, used a bit on speed, there to 200 M but didn't find extra turn of foot, just plugged away late.
Plenty of early speed, crossed to lead but continuously pressured by outside horse, relinquished lead at top bend still there on turning, emptied at 200 M and faded out after doing too much.
Standard jump, ridden along to take a prominent spot, ended up no closer than midfield 3 wide with cover, did too much work to bend, faded right out in straight.
Slow into stride, ended up behind midfield 6Ls away in running line, back in pack in middle stages, just kept on between horses in straight lacking the extra gear to factor.
First to break, pressed on to race behind leader raced 2Ls back but forced to use some petrol on speed, held up behind them to 200 M, only produced a moderate effort when clear.
No early speed and allowed to fade back, shared rear 8Ls or so from top end, helped by reasonable tempo, 3 wide with cover on circle, made nice ground from well back to take place.
Reasonable break, had an easy time 4Ls away on rails, consevered energy to bend, held up behind horses from 400 M to 200 M, made nice ground when clear and unlucky not to place.
Out in line, ended up 5Ls away in midfield on rails, settled better than previous runs, used little in middle stages, clear soon a few turning and kept to task well chasing gamely for 2nd.

Tardy into stride, ended up 7Ls or so away on rails, helped by even tempo, well back, took gaps turning and chased gamely making good ground to 100 M before becoming unbalanced and losing action. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bounced out, restrained from early pace battle to take trail 3Ls back behind pace, shifted at 700 M, same margin down turning, struggled when pressured and dropped out tamely.
No early speed, drifted back to race 7Ls away in 2 wide line, aided by even speed on, still in rear division on turn, made no real progress in straight.

Awkwardly away, ended up best part of 8Ls away sharing rear, aided by speed but still well back to bend, shifted widest turning and closed soundly down middle making many lengths to be nearest on line.
Broke well from a wide draw, remained wide holding slender lead down far side, crossed to rails for home bend, broke 2Ls clear after straightening, caught by fast-finishing winner final strides.
Soon taken back to the rear, raced wide around home bend and into straight, kept on steadily without quickening.
Prominent early, settled wide in forward of midfield, similar turning in, fought on steadily without quickening.
Broke well, settled just off the speed in one-out-one-back spot, dropped out soon after straightening.
Chased leaders to straight, weakened under pressure. (Tactic questioned.)
Soon taken well back from the widest draw, trailed the field to straight, ran past well-beaten runners down centre of straight.
Settled in last few, ran home one-paced. (Jockey reported abnormal breathing noise.)
Settled behind midfield, no better turning in, soon dropped out.
Began moderately, raced 3-wide without cover just better than midfield, kept on early in straight before failing to sustain effort inside final 200 M. (Questioned.)
Began moderately, settled on rails in midfield, similar turning in, baulked for a run 250 M out, fought on steadily without quickening closing stages.
Niggled at to pick up better than midfield position early, folded up quickly inside 400 M.
Travelled just better than midfield, kept on until finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Travelled away from rails in midfield, quickened well after straightening, took charge close to home, won well.
Settled well behind, held up briefly early in straight, ran on well inside final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Showed some early speed but not able to cross from the unfavourable outside draw, in the front rank making the turn but was 3-wide, kept on inside final 300 M without threatening.
Tracked leader in a prominent position on the rail, going strongly and ready to strike turning in, picked up well producing a late burst inside 100 M to wear down the race leader.
Away with them, settled in mid-division 3Ls behind leader, ran on well to take 3rd despite hanging in under pressure in straight.
Slow into stride, failed to muster speed despite urging, trailed in the rear 6Ls off the pace, stayed on well in straight making headway inside final 300 M but was left too much to do.
Even break, lacked early speed and settled in a rearward position along the rails, ran disappointingly on straightening. (Retired subsequently.)
Dropped back in trip. Used up early to obtain a forward position, travelled one out one back turning in but was soon beaten passing 250 M. (Jockey questioned.)
Broke well but not fast enough to find the lead, drifted back to a 3-wide spot in mid-division, gradually outpaced from 400 M and found nothing in the finish.
Had a smooth run in midfield along the fence, stayed on OK when pressed but could not quite get on terms with the first two.
Quickly into stride, had an uncontested lead at a decent tempo, kept on strongly in straight and battled on when the eventual winner loomed up near 100 M, headed close home.
Taken back from the wide gate, raced towards the rear about 5Ls back as they turned, shifted wide to challenge in straight but found nothing for pressure inside 300 M.
Average beginning, never far off the pace in midfield but offered little response when the race got serious inside 350 M. No impression.
Allowed to drift back on jumping, 3-wide turning in and had plenty to do passing 400 M, never picked up in straight and was eased close home. (Jockey questioned / sore next day.)
Raced midfield, 3-wide with cover. Came wide turning for home, failed to run on.
Travelled 2 deep with cover, behind midfield. Briefly held up early in the straight, plodded to the line.
Raced behind midfield the fence. Struggled in the run home.
Parked midfield the fence. Peeled out turning for home, ran on well to score in convincing fashion.
Used plenty of gas from the outside gate to cross and make the speed along the rails. Kicked clear early in the straight but peaked during the concluding stages.
Began well, remained 1 off in 2nd position. Had every chance.
Camped 3 back, 2-wide with cover. Kept on soundly in the run to the wire.
For the major part of the race hung out and travelled wide and without cover on the back of the speed. Gave ground after the 500 M and was a beaten horse from that point on.
Raced midfield, 1 off with cover. Was under hard riding after the 500 M, never really quickened and only battled to the line.
Was taken back at the start settling towards the rear, 2-wide with cover. Hung in along the back straight and did little in the final stretch.
Slow to begin and settled last on the fence. Made some late ground without threatening.
Stalked the leader along the paint. Had no excuses.
Travelled midfield on fence, 4Ls behind the speed from 800 M Ran on evenly in the straight without challenging the principals.
Raced at rear on fence, 7Ls behind the speed 1000 M out. Kept same tempo despite under pressured from 500 M.
Settled behind midfield, 2-wide and 5 to 6Ls back 800 M out. No pick-up in the straight.
First to begin and raced better than midfield. 2-wide and 3Ls back 800 M out. Just held ground in the straight.
Always prominent. Hit front at 100 M and went on to win strongly.
Settled at rear, 2-wide and 8Ls off the pace from 800 M. Improved slightly early in the straight when asked but couldn't follow through.
Bounded in the air at start and lost ground. 9 to 10Ls back early stages. Made up some ground in the straight.
Prominent spot throughout but kept one-paced in the straight without posing real threat to the quinella pair.
Pushed early and ran wide round the 1000 M turn. Took lead on fence 800 M out. Kept on steadily in the straight without troubling the front trio.
Began awkwardly. Driven to race near midfield, 3-wide without cover and 4Ls behind the pace at the Rock. Pressed on at the bend and was 4-wide turning in. Faded inside final furlong.
At rear and raced greenly throughout. Never a factor.
Handy position on rails, 2 to 3Ls behind the pace through to the straight. Responded well inside final furlong but unable to match the winner's turn of foot.
Tucked in behind midfield initially, travelled well 2-wide when 4Ls back in 5th at the 600 M, led at top of home straight, grabbed in shadows of post.
Vied for the early advantage, settled 1-1/2Ls back in 4th from 700 M to final bend, weakened inside final 200 M.
Led by a neck on the fence early on, initial tempo was solid, headed at the 800 M and 1L back in 2nd off the last turn, soon fizzled out.
Hard ridden to take up a 3-back rails position at the 1200 M, around mid-division and 4Ls off lead through to last bend, couldn't quite reach the principals.
A neck back in 3rd out 2-wide at halfway, advanced to lead by 1L at the 600 M, headed at top of home straight and finished feebly.
Box-seated in 4th on the leader's back on fence at the 1000 M, in 5th off last bend, very one-paced.
Taken back from wide gate, niggled along when 8Ls back in rear at the 600 M, plugged on past a few spent rivals in the straight.
6Ls back in 10th at the 1000 M, closer in midfield but a little wide off last bend, had his chance to place but lacked the turn of foot.
4-wide with cover disputing pace at 1300 M, soon slipped back to midfield position, wide and struggling turning for home. (Bled.)
Slow to muster early pace, about 4Ls back in 9th at halfway and marginally closer turning for home, 2Ls back at the 200 M, all out to take 3rd.
Trailed 4-back on rails in 10th from wide gate, 5-wide (widest) turning in when 4Ls off in 10th, stayed on strongly to lead close home.
5-wide no cover vying for early lead, 3-wide no cover and a neck clear at the 800 M, struggling well before final turn after tough trip, to trial. (Tactic questioned.)
Midfield at the 1200 M, never really travelling well and beaten before the home turn, to trial.
5Ls back in 9th at halfway, peeled out widest of all (6-wide) to challenge turning in, briefly loomed a winning chance 150 M out, did enough to place.
8Ls last on rails passing winning post for the first time, 5Ls back in 9th turning in, finished off fairly well, nearest at finish, much improved effort.
2-wide in rear about 7Ls off steady early pace, same turning for home, always outpaced by the principals.
Always rearward and 3-wide sometimes without cover, not suited by the tempo and never at all likely to land a blow.
Close-up but trapped 3-wide no cover from wide gate through first half, 1L back in 2nd and pressured to lie up 500 M out, retreated steadily.
Always handily placed, just over 2Ls back in 4th at halfway, 3Ls down off last bend, had every chance inside the final furlong, just held by the winner.
Enjoyed a cushy trail on the back of the handy tempo in 3rd on the rails until the last bend, led about 150 M out and did just enough to secure the win.
Slowly away, 4-back on rails between 4Ls and 5Ls off pace through first half, held up 250 M out, nearest at the finish but never likely to place.
Led on fence by 2Ls passing post for the first time, maintained the lead before being headed 150 M out, tipped out of a place close home.
3-back the rails when 4Ls back in 5th at the 1000 M and similarly placed off last bend, didn't have much room around the 200 M, held close home.
Midfield and 4Ls back 3-wide with cover at halfway, left without cover on the circle, launched a brief bid at top of home straight but run peaked 200 M out.
Settled nicely in midfield, 5Ls behind the good pace 2-wide, progressed steadily 300 M to score another victory over its favourite trip.
Eased to sit behind midfield, 6Ls off the good pace, trapped 3-wide throughout and lost ground, progressed steadily 200 M.
Eased back and took rail, 6-1/2Ls off the good pace, held up 200 M, made ground when clear.
Hard ridden early but failed to muster, raced 3 to 4-wide at back and lost ground, checked 600 M, never competitive.
Hard ridden to obtain a midfield spot, 4-1/2Ls off the good pace 2 to 3-wide, checked badly 600 M, flattened afterwards.
Awkwardly away, eased to rear and took rail, 9Ls behind the good pace, ran on fairly in final stages.
Settled 3Ls off the good pace along the fence, lack turn of foot in straight, just held ground for 3rd.
Pushed early but failed to take the lead, raced ungenerously in box seat, allowed to stride forward 900 M and led by 1L at good pace, hung on until 50 M overhauled, ran on for 2nd.
Awkwardly away, eased to rear, 8L off the good pace 2-wide, ran on ok in last quarter.
Hard ridden to go forward, hampered 900 M, sat 2Ls off the good pace 2 to 3-wide, held ground until 200 M when flattened.
Hard ridden to sit in front of midfield, 3Ls off the good pace, trapped 4-wide throughout and lost ground, struck heels 600 M and almost fell, faded 400 M.
Hard ridden to cross in front, settled 1L off the good pace 2-wide, ran on strongly until 50 M when out of fuel.
Travelled behind midfield and wide without cover far side, widest runner turning in, kept on steadily down centre of straight without making any serious impression.
Broke with others, gradually taken back to race 2-wide in midfield, commenced move turning for home, ran on steadily to be nearest at finish but without threatening.
Began fairly but failed to muster, raced in last few, steadied and lost position 600 M out, did not make much impression in straight and hampered again close to home.
Began fairly from a wide draw, tracked leader before taking over turning into back straight, led until headed coming onto home bend, soon weakened out of it after straightening.
Soon driven to lead despite the wide draw, headed turning into back straight, gave ground steadily from 500 M.
Slightly slow out, settled well behind, commenced move rounding home bend, made steady headway past beaten runners despite hanging in and a difficult ride in straight.
Settled towards rear, commenced run around home bend, finished off race well from rear of midfield into straight, did best work late.
Settled at the back, last into straight, virtually trailed the field throughout to beat one home. (Tactic questioned.)
Began with others, settled just off the speed on rails, moved up to lead around home bend holding 1L advantage turning in, flattered and swamped inside final 100 M.
Broke well from a low draw but looking for cover, settled in close-up 4th on rails far side, became 5th going up Rock, similar turning for home, kept on steadily without quickening.
Began with others, settled not far off in 4th then 5th just better than midfield, gained 3rd into straight, sustained effort to take charge inside final 100 M.
Settled on rails in midfield, ran home one-paced under pressure.
Swiftly away, placed on the inside just off the pace, box-seated early in straight but couldn't step up a gear when cleared 200 M.
In midfield and travelled well throughout the trip, showed good acceleration to take it up 150 M out, looked a winner until the winner emerged near 50 M. Creditable effort in defeat.
Had the inside draw but struggled to hold a position, raced in last detached trailing over 10Ls, never able to pick up. Disappointing run albeit his first start after a long layoff.
Taken back on jumping, towards the rear 6Ls back, taken wide approaching the home straight but failed to pick up from behind. Never threatened.
Jumped well, obtained an inside run in mid-division, had a smooth run to straight but was held up on the fence to 200 M, picked up nicely once into clear.

Broke well but was soon eased off to a position behind midfield. 5Ls behind leader as they settled, made a powerful surge inside 200 M to wear down the leader close home and recorded his 3rd win over the course and distance.
Began well but shifted very wide after the first turn, couldn't slot in throughout the race and was beaten turning for home. (Jockey questioned.)
Average beginning, gradually crept up to race one out one back from leader, under pressure early in straight, unable to keep on and weakened rapidly passing 200 M.
Drifted back to a position behind midfield, well covered on turning, stayed on soundly from off the pace for third.
Rushed to the front on jumping from the wide barrier, led them along at a decent tempo, kept on till 200 M but found no extra in the closing stages.
In a forward position but was forced wide without cover, held every chance going into straight but couldn't accelerate when the race got serious, faded tamely inside final 150 M.
Switched off to the rear in early stages as expected, had 6Ls to make up turning in, took a while to clear before putting in a late effort that was always falling a little short.
No early pace and allowed to slide back from outside draw, shared rear 6Ls or so away, difficult to settle in mid-section, checked on turning, made no serious progress in straight.
Bounced out well, took ideal position 1 out 1 back, in mid-section used some resources with even tempo, close enough turning, unable to find extra gear and struggled final furlong.

Out in line, pressed forward but trapped 4 wide without cover, allowed to stride forward to race outside leader by midpoint, continued to work shading inside horse, went to front turning but hard run took toll final 100 M.
Out with first few, pressed on early to hold a prominent spot, had cover when crossed at midpoint, 1L down on turning, unable to lift when required and just battled away late.
Drifted back from a wide alley, ended up behind midfield 5Ls or so, still well back with job to do on bend, made a 5 wide run straightening and closed hard down middle for 2nd.
Standard break, drifted back to race behind midfield 5Ls or so away on rails, not made use of in mid-section, still well back and saved ground on turning, no impression in straight.
Amongst first to break, held a prominent spot on leaders back, did some work with solid speed, 2Ls down on bend, took run on turning and looked a place chance at 200 M, peaked on efforts late.

Standard jump, taken to rails soon after, enjoyed a soft trip on rails 3Ls or so away, improved turning, took inside runs in straight and overtook rivals with a strong finish, won with something in hand.
Standard getaway, drifted back to share rear 6Ls or so from lead, difficult to settle early, improved 2 wide at rock, continued run between horses turning, kept on only fairly final 200 M.

Amongst first to leave gates, went forward to take closer order, unable to drop in and did plenty of work without cover throughout, struggling on bend and dropped right out after hard run. (See Racing Incidents.)
Away with them, displayed customary speed to cross and lead, didn't relax in front and did share of work with pressure from outside horse, steadied turning and gradually weakened out.
Standard jump, positioned in midfield in 2 wide line 4Ls or so away, enjoyed easy time in mid-section, made a 4 wide run on turning, made even progress to be nearest on line.
Fair to begin, ridden along to take closer order, unable to cross and posted much without cover, had trail from midpoint racing 2 wide, hard run took toll and faded out late.

Out with rest, restrained from outside alley, ended up 4Ls or so away on rails, not suited by steady tempo, shifted out on bend and circled field, swept down middle making many lengths to snare 2nd late.

Well enough to begin, forced to restrain from a wide gate to get cover, raced 3 wide 3 to 4Ls away, had trail to midpoint but without cover thereafter, urged along turning, produced only a moderate response late.
Out in line, ended up in mifield 4Ls off leaders, didn't settle with slow speed, ridden along on bend, produced only a moderate finish despite being bumped at 150 M, just held ground thereafter.
Standard break, ended up 3Ls or so away on rails, not asked in middle stages, in traffic on turning, clear passing 200 M and kept on evenly to make frame.
Bounced out, pressed on to take up running, set leisurely tempo in lead, still controlling affairs 3/4Ls clear on circle, kicked strongly into straight and dashed away to win easily.
Away nicely, took ideal spot on leaders back, did little in middle stages with lack of pace on, still right there on turning, kept to task well but lacked extra gears to trouble winner.
Lacked pace as usual, taken back but proved difficult to settle throughout, ended up 5Ls or more away in rear division, lacked usual finish in straight and plodded to line.
Standard break, ended up 5Ls or so away in 2 wide line behind midfield, shuffled back approaching bend, made no real progress in straight and just battled late.
Drifted back soon after start, ended up last 5 to 6Ls and not helped by standard tempo, still well back with job to do turning, closed well making many lengths final 200 M to be nearest on line.

Reasonable jump, pressed forward to take close order, trapped 4 wide without cover early, did plenty of work to eventually cross outside leader at 600 M 1L down on turning, hard run took toll and just battled late.

Slow into stride, mustered to race outside lead early, took 1 out 1 back trail in back straight, no excuses thereafter, made a 3 wide run and was 1L away on turning, no extra from 200 M and faded late.
2-wide in midfield, tracked well to bend and came with a strong looking challenge in straight to hit front near 150 M, kept up the gallop all the way but was nailed right on the line.
Slow to begin, in a rearward position early but gradually crept closer to be 5Ls down in back straight, chased the eventual 2nd inside 300 M, kept finding and eventually got up just before the line.
Eased back to a spot towards the rear, 8Ls off the pace as they settled in middle stages, took a while to gather speed but stayed on ok towards the finish.
Allowed to drift back on jumping and raced as the back marker about 8Ls back, had enormous task passing 400 M, ran on one-paced beating tired runners only.

Average break only, ridden to a position one off the fence just behind leaders, held every chance and looked a threat early in straight, couldn't sustain effort passing 200 M and weakened gradually to the line.
Guided to the fence and raced in mid-division 5Ls back, patiently waited with before edging into clear inside 300 M, produced a solid finish but never able to match on terms with the first two.

Crossed to lead as expected, set a slow pace in front and travelled well enough, urged from 300 M out but unable to shake off the pursuing pack, headed inside 150 M and was swamped over the closing stages.
Rushed to the front from a wide barrier and travelled one out one back, under pressure passing 400 M but failed to keep up, dropped out inside 150 M.
