Away well enough and tracked leader one back in 3rd, found nothing when asked before fading away inside 200 M. (Bled for the 2nd time and subsequently retired.)

Broke well from barrier one, held inside run 3Ls back in a position better than midfield, travelled well enough throughout, picked up gradually from 350 M but posed little threat to the first two which were well ahead of the rest.

Drifted back to a rearward position 7Ls off the pace, had a relaxed run along the fence but was held up behind a wall of horses early in straight, shifted out to improve near 200 M and closed off the race fairly.
Parked 1 out 1 back. Didn't quicken at the business end, had every chance.
Stumbled at the start, settled 3 back, 2-wide with cover. Kept on one paced in the home straight.
Led along the fence. Faded passing the 200 M.
Dropped back from a wide box to race behind midfield 1 off with cover. Ran on strongly to win in good fashion.
Ridden aggressively from a wide alley to camp outside the leader. Found the front at the 200 M, but was overhauled inside the 100 M.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Taken back from an outside gate to settle in last position. Worked home soundly.
Box seated from gate 1. Raced greenly for most of the trip and hung out, tiring inside the furlong.
Was taken back from the outside gate to settle 2nd last. Made good late ground.
Slow to begin, inconvenienced soon after, settling 3 back on the rails. Struggled in the run home.
Raced towards the rear along the paint. One paced in the run home.
Couldn't match the early speed, settling midfield on the fence. Railed up in the straight and battled on to the post.
Good jump but soon trapped 3-wide without cover at midfield. 5Ls back swinging for home. Made up ground steadily in the straight.
Pushed early to maintain a 2-wide position behind midfield. 5Ls off the pace round the bend. Made some late headway in the straight.
Taken back to race on fence from wide barrier. Sat behind midfield, 5 to 6Ls back round the bend. Past only beaten rivals in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly. Raced at rear until straightening. Produced good late effort in the straight.
Pressed on early and disputed lead from 700 M. Unable to keep pace in front and faded in the straight.
Away with them and settled at rear. 3-wide and 6Ls back turning in. Made up considerable ground in the straight to land a minor placing.
Always prominent within 2Ls of the lead turning in. But unable to turn up a notch in the straight.
Moderate jump. Failed to muster and raced in rear section. Made minor progress down the centre of the straight.
Hard ridden to take the lead. Held a 1-1/2L advantage into home straight. Kept on well to deny rivals.
Well enough away and settled better than midfield. 2-wide and 4Ls back rounding the turn. Weakened in the straight.
Hard ridden along the fence. Raced at midfield, 4 to 5Ls down into the home straight. Weakened inside final 200 M.
Out nicely to be in handy position behind the speed. Responded only fairly early in the straight but picked up well from 100 M. Nearest at the line.
Checked at the start, 4-back on the rails 6Ls behind in 8th at the 1000 M, similarly placed 400 M out, very one-paced to conclude.
2-wide and 5Ls back in 8th at halfway, niggled along but same margin back before final bend, made some fair late ground, never nearer.
Had a soft trail on the leader's back in 3rd about 2Ls off speed, pressured despite the cushy trip turning for home, one-paced inside the final furlong.
Slowly away and switched inside from wide gate, 8Ls back and one from rear from 1000 M to straightening for home, kept chasing most of the field.
3-back the fence about 4Ls back in 6th at the 1200 M, steadied at the 600 M, moderate late headway in the straight.
Torpid effort, slow to muster pace, 7Ls back out 2-wide in 9th at the 1000 M, similar turning for home, never on terms.
Soon led by 1L on fence, joined then headed briefly 800 M out, 1L ahead again off last bend, headed about 50 M out and done for 2nd on the line.
Crowded at start, 4Ls back in 5th out 2-wide at 1200 M, still 2Ls adrift at the furlong pole, all out to nick 2nd on the line.
Away well but opted to ease back to 9Ls last at the 1200 M, much the same spinning for home, recovered a little late ground but never a genuine threat. (Questioned.)
4-wide no cover before briefly leading by a neck out 2-wide at 800 M, 1L back in 2nd off last bend and pressured, didn't drop out entirely to his credit.
Settled into 'one-out-one-back' position from the 1200 M, 3-wide and 2Ls back in 4th off last turn, all out to lead at the 50 M, kept on.
Lost about 1L at the start, 7Ls back in 10th out 2-wide at 1000 M, 5Ls adrift turning in, ran on fairly well for a place but no threat to quinella pair.
Disputed early lead, set a reasonable pace, shared the advantage from halfway to the final bend, still thereabouts at the 200 M, weakened late.
3 and 4-wide no cover early before slotting in 'one-out-one- back' in 3rd at 1100 M, hard ridden when 2Ls back in 4th off last bend, soon beaten.
Went back from wide gate, 9Ls rear at the 1000 M, pressured and still well back off last turn, recovered minor late ground.
Slowly away, 4-back on fence 7Ls off lead in 9th at 1000 M, a little closer off last curve, kept on dourly for 4th.
On fence 3Ls back in 4th at the 1100 M, going well in 3rd turning for home, launched a sustained challenge, only just held by the winner. (Lame next day.)
2-wide and 6Ls back in 8th at the 1000 M, closer but 5-wide (widest of all) turning for home, led about 150 M out, all out to hold onto a slender break.
3-wide no cover the trip despite exiting gate 5, did well to remain a little better than midfield throughout after the tough trip.
Taken back from wide gate, one from rear 8Ls back in 11th at the 1000 M, still rearward but closer into final turn, recovered a little late headway.
Led by a neck out 2-wide at the 1200 M, still right there on the circle while pressured, yielded ground from top of home straight.
Slow out, 3-back the rails in 6th about 5Ls off at the 1000 M, 3Ls back in 5th into home straight, one-paced and no excuses.
4Ls behind lead out 2-wide in 5th at 1000 M, similar spot off last turn, held up until inside the 200 M but appeared held by the principals anyway.
At rear, 7-1/2Ls off the good pace on the rails, progressed steadily 200 M.
Eased to rear, 7-1/2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, picked up lately and made ground 100 M.
Hard ridden to sit outside the leader with good pace, ran on until 100 M flattened.
Prominent, 2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, ran on well to the line and finished 2nd.
Pushed to obtain a midfield spot, 4Ls off the good pace, trapped 3-wide throughout and lost too much ground, ran on fairly.
Pushed to occupy the box seat, just held ground in straight.
Hard ridden early to keep up in midfield, 5-1/2Ls off the good pace along the fence, lack room 300 M, ran on fairly when clear.
Pushed early, but soon eased to sit behind midfield and crossed to 2-wide, 5Ls off the good pace, made ground steadily 200 M.
Never competitive at rear, tailed out.
Pushed to hold the rails in midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the good pace, no turn of foot in final stages.
Pushed to take the rail and led by 1/2L at good pace, drifted away 250 M to produce another impressive victory.
Midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, weakened 200 M.

Slow to jump, settled behind leading group within 3Ls of pace on rails, produced for a run upon straightening, had a tight passage early on, finished off well to just fail by the narrowest of margins.
Broke well, settled for midfield position one off the rails, fought on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Very slowly away losing many lengths, trailed the field to straight, saved ground turning in, worked home steadily running past well-beaten horses.
Soon taken back from the widest barrier, raced wide towards rear, dropped out shortly after straightening.
Very slowly away losing many lengths, remained well behind to straight, widest turning in, made significant progress down centre of track, did best work late.
Began moderately, settled towards the rear, made up good ground down centre of straight, nearest at finish.
Began well, settled in 4th within 2Ls of pace mostly one-out-one-back, similar turning for home, could only keep on at the same pace without quickening.
Niggled at to keep amongst leaders early, held slender lead before joined around home bend, had 1L advantage early in straight until seriously challenged closing stages, just lasted.
Slightly slow out, settled behind midfield on rails, lost position around home bend, renewed effort inside final 200 M producing good late impression.
Began with others, held rails run just behind leaders, kept on same pace without quickening, swamped for a placing close to home.
Began well but soon taken back to rear of midfield, remained similar to straight, fought on well under pressure to do best work late.
Began moderately, driven along to share the lead, disputed lead turning in, folded up quickly.
Hard ridden to obtain a forward position just behind leader, moved closer vying for lead approaching the home turn, fought on but was gradually outpaced passing 200 M.
Average start, raced 2-wide in midfield 5Ls off the pace, carried wide making home turn and as a consequence covered extra ground, ran on steadily down the outside and finished just out of the frame.

Quickly away and crossed to the fence, 3Ls back in a position better than midfield, enjoyed a good run throughout, gradually picked up inside 350 M and prevailed in a blanket finish for the 3rd place.
Pressed on early to take a close order, 2Ls off the leader in 4th and remained there to straight, couldn't match the first two but fought on gamely to the line.

Average break, unable to slot in and was caught wide without cover rounding the 1st turn, settled in midfield but unsuited by the slow tempo in middle stages, beaten passing 300 M. (Jockey questioned re poor performance.)
Ideally placed in 3rd under a positive ride and tracked leaders handily, put in a sustained effort inside 300 M to charge down the runaway leader close home.

Quickly taken to the fence and settled towards the rear 6 to 7Ls off the pace, saved ground on the inside throughout, stayed on inside 350 M. Narrowly beaten for 3rd but didn't pose any threat to the first two.
Switched off to the rear soon after jumping, trailed 10Ls to leader and didn't really pick up when asked. Disappointing.

Held a midfield position on the rail and about 4Ls off the pace when they settled, shaken up passing 600 M, drifted out on turning, closed off the race nicely and was just touched off in a close finish for 3rd.

Standard jump, eased back to a rear spot 6Ls behind leader, commenced his run passing 450 M but was carried wide, finished the fastest amongst the chasing pack but lost out for 3rd in a blanket finish.

Overcame a wide barrier and led, steadied the tempo in middle stages before picking it up again approaching home straight, pulled well clear and looked unassailable until the winner flashed past inside final 50 M.
Settled one off the fence in a rearward spot 8Ls back, under urging from 400 M, did make up some ground on straightening but never looked likely from that position.
Hard ridden early to go forward and raced one out one back from leader, responded fairly under urge before weakening inside 150 M.
In a handy position early, lost some speed and shuffled back near 600 M, plugged on under pressure but found not much in reserves passing 200 M.
Showed little pace in his debut and was struggling to keep up passing 800 M, trailed the field and gave no response to pressure.
Drifted back from a wide barrier, unable to cross and was caught very wide over the turn, soon left behind passing 300 M.
Behind mid-division, 3-wide on the turn covered extra ground, ran on ok from off the pace but came too late to threaten the first three.
Began awkwardly and lost ground, settled towards the rear in a 3-wide running position, taken very wide to make his challenge on straightening but never looked likely.
First to jump, drifted back to midfield and raced 4Ls back on the fence, under urging from 500 M, couldn't step up a gear when required despite having no clear run from 300 M to 200 M.
Took up the running, quickened in the middle stages and built up a 2Ls lead going into the straight, kept on well but was firmly put aside by the fast finishing winner 100 M out.
Average break, travelled one-off the fence in mid-division, found plenty when cleared 350 M, in charge 100 M out and won going away.
Began well but eased back to a midfield position making the home turn, struggled to pick up when asked and faded out from 200 M. (Irregular Heart Rhythm.)
Lost ground at the start, held inside running in a position behind midfield 6 to 7Ls back, unable to quicken when the race got serious. No impression.
Average jump, one off the fence in a position behind midfield 7Ls off the pace, took some time to get going but stayed on ok towards the line.
Jumped well, ideally placed in 3rd, kept on in the first half the straight and showed some battling qualities, but effort flattened passing 150 M.
Slow into stride and held up in the rear, 7Ls down turning in, gradually picked up down the inside and closed right in on the 2nd late on. Encouraging debut.
Raced with front division, 3-wide without cover. Came wide swinging into the straight giving ground quickly. (To Trial.)
Travelled 1 out 1 back, had every chance.
Travelled with the backmakers, 2 deep with cover. Came widest in the straight passed only tiring horses.
Began awkwardly and settled towards the rear along the fence. Kept to the inside in the home stretch and plugged away over the final stages.
Slow to begin then failed to muster, traveling at the rear on the paint. Never really quickened in the run home.
Began awkwardly, lost ground and settled back in the field 1 off with cover. Failed to close off.
Showed good gate speed to scoot forward and lead along the rails. Was then pressured throughout the race but dug deep to kick clear early in the straight and repelled all challengers.
Box seated behind leader, looked the likely threat before ending its run just short of the line.
Raced midfield, 2-wide with cover. Was under pressure from the 500 M, and peaked on its run at the furlong.
Raced midfield the fence. Got all the favors along the inside after the 600 M, had every chance but came up marginally short.

Travelled in front of midfield, 3 deep with cover. Commenced to shift out after the 600 M, approaching the home turn shifted out to race wide and without cover. Peaked on its run well before the post.
Restrained at the start and took up a rearward position, however never settled and was caught wide and without cover from the 800 M. Struggled in the final stretch. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled back in the event 3-wide with cover. Closed off well.
Gradually worked forward to share leading duties. Was a beaten horse after the 400 M.
Raced at rear at 1200 M. Improved 3-wide round the bend and was 4Ls back on straightening. Kept one-paced thereafter.
Led on fence after start. Held a 1-1/2L advantage into the home straight. Ran on well and was caught by the front trio only inside final 100 M.
Prominent spot through to the home straight. Dropped out thereafter.
3-wide without cover and 2Ls down early stages. Driven to race outside the pace on straightening. Rallied on gamely to the post and just failed to fill the quinella.
Quickly into stride. Raced 4-wide without cover in leading section early stages. Taken back for cover from 1400 M. 4-wide 6Ls off making the home turn. Made up some ground in the straight.
Raced 2-wide behind the pace until final 400 M. Found nothing when asked.
Last out. Raced on rails at midfield and 4Ls off at 1200 M. 2-wide and 2Ls back turning in. Dashed strongly in the straight and hit front 100 M out. Kept on well closing stages to deny rivals.
2-wide better than midfield, 2 to 3Ls behind the speed through to the home turn. Made strong finishing effort but failed to overhaul the winner. Prevailed in a battle for 2nd at the line.
Trailed field and was 8Ls behind the pace early stages. Didn't settle in mid-section and still 6Ls back on rails rounding the turn. Made some progress in the straight.
Began well. Taken to race behind midfield, 2-wide and 4Ls back 1100 M out. Remained in similar position turning for home. Made some headway in the straight but not threatening.
Began in line. Eased to sit behind midfield on fence and 5Ls off 1200 M out. Past only beaten rivals in the straight.
4-wide no cover on the circle despite exiting gate 6, all out to be within 2Ls of the pace at the 300 M, weakened thereafter.
Awkward break, rearward about 5Ls back initially, 4Ls back turning for home, 2Ls down with place prospects at the 200 M, couldn't sustain.
Worse than midfield about 5Ls from early pace, over 3Ls back in same position taking final turn, one-paced to conclude.
Box-seated in 4th about 2Ls off speed down the back, 1L back in 2nd into home straight and led from 300 M to 200 M, held onto a place.
2-wide around midfield about 4Ls from the pace through to home straight, responded well in the straight to lead on the line.
Taken back from a wide gate and 7Ls last at first, 5Ls down turning in, made some fair late ground down the centre, never nearer.
Held the 'one-out-one-back' position in 3rd through first half, 2Ls back off last bend, had every chance to at least place.
4-wide with cover at the 800 M when over 4Ls back in 10th in or so, remained a similar from the lead throughout, jockey also dropped whip 300 M out.
Better than midfield just over 2Ls behind lead until final turn, led at the 200 M but grabbed by the winner on the line.
Led by 1L at the 800 M but headed before the home turn and dropped away very swiftly, eased down a long way out, to trial.
3-back on fence over 3Ls back at the 800 M, a little closer making final turn, one-paced.
On fence 1L back in 2nd at the 900 M, led before the home turn but headed again at the 300 M and dropped away quite tamely.
Bounded at start losing ground, 6Ls adrift at the 1000 M, always rear and never in contention.
Midfield at halfway over 3Ls from the speed, closer when 4-wide and pressured turning for home, no real response.
2-wide and 5Ls off speed at halfway, marginally closer turning in but 2Ls back and dangerous at furlong pole, lacked the dash of the winner.
Pressed forward to lead at the 1000 M on fence, led by 1L or so before being headed inside the furlong pole and then losing a place.
4Ls back in midfield at first, and much the same but pressured at the top of home straight, one-paced and no danger late on.
Disputed early pace, 1L back in 2nd from the 800 M to home turn and upsides again at the 200 M when all out, faded inside final stages.
2-wide and 3Ls back in 5th at the 800 M, 3Ls back in 4th off last turn, didn't trouble the leaders.
8Ls rear through to home straight, made up some fair late ground past spent rivals.
Slightly worse than midfield through to final turn at least 5Ls from the front, loomed a winning chance when 1L back at the 200 M, run peaked.
Slowest to begin, one from rear about 7Ls off speed at the 800 M, recovered very minor late ground.
Slowly away, 3-back on fence about 3Ls off pace at the 800 M, one-paced in the home straight.
Did not go forward as usual, worse than midfield at the 800 M and 8Ls back turning for home, very one-paced.
Pressed forward from wide gate to be 2Ls back in 3rd through first half, ceded ground rapidly in the straight.
Caught 3-wide no cover at halfway when 3Ls off the speed, found nothing off the bridle and eased down a long way out.
12th about 6Ls off speed until home straight, always chasing the majority of the field.
4-back on rails about 6Ls off at halfway, edged closer turning for home, nice acceleration to lead about 150 M out, stayed on well.
Pushed forward, 1-1/2Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, favoured by the slow sectionals, ran on until 100 M flattened.

Hard ridden early but failed to muster, trapped 4-wide throughout in midfield and lost too much ground, 4-1/2Ls off the leader, harmed by the slow pace, still held ground in straight despite all negative racing situations.
Ridden vigorously forward, 1L behind the slow pace 2-wide, dropped off quickly 400 M.
At back, 6-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the slow tempo, made some minor ground 200 M.
Pushed early but failed to muster, at back along the fence, 7-1/2Ls off the leader, harmed by the slow tempo, ran on ok in final stages.
Bumped start, behind midfield, 5Ls off the leader, helped by the rail-run but not suited by the slow pace, no progress.
Eased to sit at rear, 8-1/2Ls off the leaders, trapped 3-wide and lost ground, harmed by the slow pace, blocked 4-2, dashed strongly when clear.

Traveled most prominently in midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leader, trapped 3-wide and lost ground, harmed by the slow pace, held up 400 M, demonstrated strong finishing efforts when clear, stormed home for a very close 2nd.
Hard ridden to take the rail and led by 1L at advantageous slow early sectionals, hung on until 150 M when overhauled, just held 4th.
Hard ridden to hold a prominent spot along the fence, 2-1/2Ls behind the slow pace, finished the race off strongly 300 M and won by a very narrow margin.
Eased to sit in midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, momentarily held up 400 M, little dash when clear despite not suited by the slow pace.
Eased back, 7Ls off the leader, trapped 3 to 4-wide and lost ground, harmed by the slow pace, never progressed.
Slow away, hard ridden to take a midfield spot, 3L off the leader, trapped 3 to 4-wide and lost ground too much ground, not sutied by the slow pace, weakend 300 M.
Hard ridden to go forward but trapped 3-wide, 1-1/2Ls off the leader, suited by the slow tempo, ran on well to the line for 3rd.
Travelled mainly 3-wide in mid-division, remained similar into straight, soon came under pressure to challenge but could only run on steadily without threatening.
Slightly slow to jump, quickly recovered along rails to a 2-back position in 3rd, fought on well under pressure in straight, did best work late.
Settled well behind, saved ground turning in, not much to give under urge in straight.

Began fairly from the one draw, took up running passing the 1400 M mark holding a 1L advantage from the eventual winner to the straight, soon joined after straightening, fought on doggedly but denied in the bobbing of heads. Lame next day.
Broke well, soon restrained to midfield for cover, slightly worse turning for home, fought on steadily without quickening.
Slow out, settled mainly 3-wide towards the rear of the field, shaken up to challenge down centre of straight, fought on steadily without threatening.
Broke well from the widest draw, travelled wide without cover in a prominent spot in joint 3rd about 2Ls off the speed to the straight, soon yielded ground after straightening.
Settled well back, last into straight, switched out for a run after straightening but could only produce moderate impression down the centre of the straight.
Settled behind midfield, did not make a strong impression in straight, never nearer.

Soon taken back from the middle draw, progressed along rails down far side to reach mid-division coming out of back straight, snuck up to 3L 3rd turning in, fought on steadily in straight but swamped for a placing close to home.
Jumped best, tracked leader in the 1-out-1-back position, taken closer turning in drawing level if not in front inside final 200 M, just prevailed.
Never far off the pace in a position ahead of midfield, shifted out for room prior to straightening, picked up strongly from 300 M out but was outrun by the impressive winner.

Travelled outside the lead in early stages before easing back to race 2 to 3Ls off the pace down the back straight, moved closer turning in, had every chance but probably found this grade too stiff. Beaten near 300 M.

In a 2-wide better than midfield position, over-raced in early stages but travelled well enough down the back straight, came with a strong looking challenge inside 400 M but effort just flattened out near the finish.

Slowly away and switched off to the rear trailing over 10Ls early, had enormous tasks turning in but produced a breathtaking acceleration to cut down his rivals in the space of 300 M for a last to first victory.

Taken back on jumping and patiently ridden in 2nd last, trailed 10Ls in early stages but took closer order approaching the home turn, kept on one-paced without ever looking dangerous. (Lame left front leg.)

Jumped well, improved round the field on the first turn to race alongside leader entering back straight, given a breather passing 1000 M, briefly hit front inside 200 M but despite running on well, couldn't fend off the pursuers.
Raced in midfield along the fence, had a smooth trip to bend but was carried wide from 500 M, took a while to gather up and stayed on well over the final 200 M.

Quietly ridden, settled well in a position behind midfield some 7Ls back, swung wide into straight, quickened well down the outside and was closing in on the 2nd at the line. Ran a cracking race in defeat.
Settled in midfield 5 to 6Ls back, carried wide making the final turn and as a consequence covered extra ground, outpaced from 400 M.

Assumed the pacemaking role and took them along steadily, quickened up over the final turn to be 3Ls clear inside final 400 M, looked dangerous at one stage but couldn't hang on, headed near 250 M and found no extra thereafter.
Tardy away, soon at rear 7Ls off lead, tacked on 3 wide by midpoint, still well back and forced 5 wide turning, only passed tired horses late.
Nicely into stride, pressed forward but caught 3 wide without cover outside leaders, did it tough without cover, folded soon after 300 M when they sprinted, gradually lost touch late.
Standard jump, ended up 4Ls away on rails, used little in run, checked 800 M, took inside runs on turning, made some minor progress without threatening.
Out in line, angled back to sit in behind midfield, raced 3 wide 4Ls away with cover throughout, shifted out turning and closed respectably before run ended inside 200 M.
First out, ridden hard to challenge for front, unable to cross and raced outside leader, there to bend, dropped off soon after straightening to be well beaten.
Began OK, unable to slot in and posted 4 wide 4 to 5Ls away without cover, not helped with speed on, urged turning and out of gas at 200 M, faded after a bad run.
Reasonably away, pushed up to hold lead early, did some work to do so and was shaded by outside horse throughout, 2Ls clear on turning, held on to 200 M before emptied.
Began nicely, ridden hard to take a prominent spot, used up to hold 1 out 1 back position right there on turning, was a spent force at 200 M but kept on nicely to make frame.
Allowed to slide back from an outside alley, ended up next to last 2 wide 6Ls back, aided by speed on, still well back turning and held up early in straight, closed evenly but no match for first two.
Began with first few, outpaced and forced to be content with leaders back, travelled 3Ls back with an easy run, no pick up on turning and simply battled in straight.
Jumped well, kept on with it early before taking a trail on back on speed, raced 3Ls away in midfield, held up at 400 M, didn't find much when clear and just closed at one speed.

Standard jump, allowed to drift into a midfield role 4Ls or so away, travelled well back between horses to bend, in traffic to 200 M, dashed sharply to soon be in action when clear, dug in late to hold on.

No early speed, settled amongst last few, raced 5 to 6Ls away off pace on rails, shared rear to bend, saved ground taking inside runs turning, weaved between horses and displayed a strong finish but just out lasted by winner.
Fast away, pressed on but took some time to cross outside leader, raced 1/2L down on bend, niggled turning and lacked usual pick up and gradually faded out. (Didn't handle track.)
Began fairly, assumed a midfield role 5Ls back in running line, enjoyed an easy time in mid-section, held up for a considerable distance after 400 M, closed hard when clear to make frame.
No early speed, faded back to rear, raced 7 to 8Ls back sharing rear in 2 wide line, still well back with job to do on turning, made no real progress final 200 M.
Began moderately, taken across to rails, raced 6 to 7Ls back on rails in rearward division, saved ground turning, just kept on at one speed without looking likely.

Began on line, showed good early toe to kick up and lead, set reasonable tempo throughout, 1L clear leaving bend and had rest chasing, established a break and went on for a strong win despite tiring a little late.
Taken back soon after start, ended up 7Ls or so away at rear racing on rails, not travelling on bend, took inside runs and did pick up a little ground final 300 M.
Amongst first few to break, took hold to obtain trail when unable to cross, raced 3 wide in midfield without cover, dropped out in straight after hard run.
Drifted back from widest alley, settled 7Ls back 3 wide with cover, even run thereafter, still had job to do and switched wide turning, made no impression in straight.
Away well pushed on to take ideal spot 1 out 1 back, had fair trip despite speed, right there and made 3 wide effort on turning, kept on to 200 M but just held ground thereafter.
Began respectably, continued forward but allowed to take a trail after 300 M, raced 4Ls back in 2 wide line, didn't pick up on straightening and just battled away late.
Standard jump, ended up in 6th spot 4 to 5Ls back on rails, used little to bend and same margin down turning, took a clear 2nd inside 200 M but unable to hold off finish of 2nd final 50 M.
Began in line, pushed on to race behind leader 2Ls back, did some work with even speed, shifted 2 wide turning, soon under pressure and weakened easily.
Standard beginning, ended up behind midfield 6 to 7Ls off speed, helped by even tempo, took inside runs turning, made gradual progress through pace to be nearest on line.
Broke with line, drifted back to race 6Ls or so away in 3 wide line, had cover in mid-section, improved wide on turning, made plenty of ground down centre to take second late.
Shaken up early to hold a position behind leaders, couldn't sprint with them when the race got serious, stayed on one paced.
In midfield on the fence and had a smooth run throughout, urged from 400 M and stayed on at one pace.
Held a 2-wide position in midfield 3-4Ls back, weakened over 300 M out. Never a factor.
Average beginning, gradually moved up to 6th place on the outside of group, took some time to gather in straight but stuck on in willing fashion to claim 3rd albeit well beaten by the front pair.
Began awkwardly and lost 4Ls at the start, travelled in the rear 8Ls off the pace in middle stages, taken wide to challenge but never really got competitive, hung out near 100 M.
4-wide without cover behind midfield, covered extra ground and was beaten passing the 400 M mark. No impression.
Slow to begin, in a rearward position 6-7Ls back, under pressure from 500 M and weakened quickly after turning in.
Average break, drifted back to race in a rearward position 5Ls behind leader, shifted out for a clear run on straightening but didn't find much when asked.
Swiftly away, restrained to a handy position behind leaders, ready to strike turning in, locked in a long duel with the eventual winner, showed battling qualities but was outran close home.
Eased to a position behind midfield, 3 wide turning for home, looked promising early in straight but his effort flattened passing 200 M.
Well enough away, tracked leader prominently, held every chance turning in but was gradually outpaced passing 200 M.
Rolled forward after the start and led steadily, pressed from 300 M but despite running on, couldn't step up a gear, headed inside 200 M and weakened close home.
Handily placed in 3rd, going strongly despite racing wide, picked up well to hit front inside 200 M, made to work all the way to the line by the persistent runner-up but found enough to hold on.
Lacked early pace, travelled near the rear 7Ls back and inclined to hang out over the turn, picked up well passing 350 M and made some late progress.
Raced outside the leader. Faded over the concluding stages.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.

Ridden quietly early and allowed to settle back in the field from a wide gate, 2 to 3-wide with cover. Commenced a forward move after the 700 M, racing 4 deep with cover. Stayed on well in the run to the post.
Raced towards the rear, 2 deep with cover. Gave a big start and just plugged away in the final stretch.
Failed to muster and settled in midfield, 2 deep with cover. Struggled in the straight.
Travelled in 2nd last position, 1 off with cover. Never in the hunt.
Slow to begin then tailed the field throughout. After the race the Veterinary Officer said the horse was displaying an irregular heart rhythm. (To Trial.)
Raced in a handy position but travelled 3-wide and without cover. Commenced to give ground on the circle.
Stalked the leader along the fence. Had no excuses.
Parked slightly in advance of midfield on the fence. Kept on dourly in the final stages.
Camped back off the speed, about 3 back, 2 deep with cover. Got all the favors turning for home and never looked like being headed, scoring a comfortable win.
Just forward of midfield, 3 deep with cover. Battled away at one pace over the latter stages.
Went forward from a wide alley and led at a good clip. Was well and truly beaten by the furlong post.
Settled near the rear, along the fence. Made good late ground towards the inside.
Raced behind midfield. 3-wide and 4Ls back round the bend. Failed to find extra gear in the straight.
Slowly into stride and failed to muster early stages. 2-wide and 6Ls back 800 M out. Passed only beaten rivals in the straight.
Slowly out. Urged along the fence to race within 4Ls back. Ran on well in the straight and was nearest at finish.
Began awkwardly. Driven to take the lead 600 M out. Held a 1-1/2L advantage into home straight. Clung on early in the straight but peaked effort inside final 100 M.
Trailed field on rails 900 M out. 5Ls down on straightening. Made some headway early in the straight but failed to follow through.

Ridden to race in the leading section on fence at 900 M. Eased to sit behind the leader making the home turn. Loomed up as a serious contender in the straight. Just unable to hold off the quinella pair closing stages.
Began well and raced better than midfield. 3-wide and 2-1/2Ls back on straightening. Made a strong run in the home straight and ran down rivals on the line.
Pushed early to race 2-wide behind the speed. Kept on battling with the eventual winner in the straight and was denied only by a narrow margin.
Away in line and trapped 4-wide without cover at midfield. Slipped to the rear making the home turn. No impression thereafter.
Quickly into stride. Settled in a handy position within 3Ls of the pace on rails. Managed to hold ground only in the straight.
Raced better than midfield and trapped 4-wide without cover. Hung out badly rounding the bend and finished tailed-out.

Jumped fairly. Hard ridden to stay in touch with the field early stages. Settled 2-wide and 3Ls behind the speed 1000 M out. Kept on improving down the centre of the home straight but had little hope with the front trio.
Better break than normal, 5Ls back 12th at halfway behind slow pace and much the same turning in, finished off well to nick 3rd in final strides.
Checked early on and 3-back on fence about 4Ls from speed down back straight, tight for room from 300 M to 200 M but never dangerous late on.
Taken back to rear and not suited by the steady pace, ran on past a few beaten rivals in the straight. (Questioned.)
Pressed on from wide gate to set a steady pace by a neck on the fence at the 1000 M, headed at the top of the home straight, weakened final 200 M.
Awkward break, on the leader's back 2Ls off in 5th or so through to the home straight, had his chance to place but was one-paced again.
Slowest away, 6Ls behind steady pace one from rear at 1000 M, retrieved some good late ground in the straight, never nearer for 5th.
1L back in 3rd but mostly 3-wide no cover behind slow pace in first half, same margin behind off home turn and at 200 M, kept on evenly for 2nd.
Midfield with cover about 3Ls from the speed until the home turn, found nothing off the bridle, another disappointing run.
Raced 2nd about a neck behind a sedate pace down the back, led at top of home straight, 1L clear at the 200 M, always doing enough to secure the win.
In 5th or 6th with cover no worse than 2Ls or 3Ls from the speed until final bend, 1L down at the 200 M, no extra and done out of a place late on.
4Ls behind the initial tempo, shuffled back a little and struggling entering home straight, soon dropped off.
4-wide no cover throughout, close-up through first half but the extra ground he covered exacted its toll in the home straight.
3-wide with cover about 4Ls from the pace in mid-division at the 800 M, one-paced in the home straight and no danger inside final 200 M.
Lost ground at the start, 4-back the fence about 6Ls back in 12th at the 800 M, ran on strongly in the final 300 M to nick 2nd close home.
Disputed early pace on the fence, slipped 1L clear at the 600 M and pulled further ahead in the straight to win unchallenged.
3-wide no cover when 1L back in 3rd at 1000 M, wide throughout, 2Ls down in 3rd turning for home, soon petered out after the extra work.
Went back to last from gate 13, 8Ls off at the 800 M but edged closer turning for home, stayed on pretty well for a place, steadily improving.
Taken back to 12th at least 6Ls from the early pace and much the same but wide turning for home, made some minor late ground, nearest at finish.
One from rear about 7Ls from initial pace, widest (5-wide) and last about 6Ls back swinging for home, made only minor late ground.
Midfield about 4Ls from the pace at first, further back off last turn and soon eased down.
Slowly away as usual, recovered to race around midfield on fence at halfway, place prospects when 2Ls back in 4th at the 200 M before the run peaked.
Disputed early speed with the winner out 2-wide, 1L back in 2nd off the last curve, one-paced inside the final 200 M.
Settled midfield between 3Ls and 4Ls from the speed through to home turn, was then held up until 250 M out, appeared unlucky not to place.
Handy position in 5th about 3Ls from pace with cover through to straightening, found zero off the bit, disappointing effort. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Raced wide throughout sometimes without cover when around midfield and 3Ls from the front, began to retreat by the 200 M.
On the leader's back on rails in 4th at the 800 M, under pressure despite this soft run turning for home and quickly wilted.
Eased back, 7-1/2Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, helped by the fast pace, momentarily held up 400 M, progressed steadily final 200 M. Doing best work late.
Pushed early but failed to muster, then soon eased to sit behind midfield, 6Ls off the leader 2-wide, benefited by the fast pace, made ground 400 M, run ended 100 M.
Hard ridden to take the rail and led by 1L at fast early sectionals, hung on until 250 M overhauled and flattened.
Eased back, 9Ls off the leader 2-wide, benefited by the fast pace, made ground steadily 250 M.
Slow away, hard ridden to gain a midfield spot, 4Ls off the leader 2-wide, helped by the fast tempo, weakened 300 M.
Hard ridden to cross in front and took box seat, not suited by the fast early tempo, flattened 300 M.
Very slowly away, more than 10Ls off the leader at tail 2 to 3-wide, favoured by the fast pace, progressed steadily 400 M, run ended 100 M.
Hard ridden to cross in front, 1L off the leader 2 to 3-wide, used up too much fuel to cross during the fast early sectionals, soon flattened 300 M.
Settled in prominent spot, 2-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the fast early tempo, ran on well to the line and grabbed 2nd.
Eased to sit in midfield along the fence, checked badly first bend, 4Ls off the leader, suited by the fast pace, blocked 400 M, ran on fairly when clear.
Eased back, 7-1/2Ls off the leader along the fence, benefited by the fast pace and the perfect trip, progressed steadily 300 M to win.
Never better than midfield, 6Ls off the leader, trapped 3 to 4-wide throughout and lost ground, suited by the fast tempo, no progress.
Eased at start and took rail at rear, checked early, 9Ls off the leader, suited by the fast pace, but never progressed.
Very slow away, hard ridden forward and took rail, 2-1/2Ls off the fast pace, led 250 M, overhauled 100 M, ran on for 3rd.
Settled towards rear, briefly tightened early in straight, fought on steadily between runners to be nearest at finish.
Began moderately but quickly recovered to a prominent spot, settled in forward of midfield on rails to straight, ran home one-paced.
Began fairly, soon taken back to rear of field, taken to centre of track after straightening, made steady headway for good late impression. (Tactic questioned.)
Began with others from the widest barrier, well there before taking lead coming out of back straight, folded up quickly after straightening. (Blood in trachea.)
Began moderately, gradually picked up to midfield, remained similar to straight, forced to check when improving over 200 M out, no clear passage throughout closing stages.

Began in earnest from a wide draw holding slender lead off the rails, steadied to sit on rails inside leader coming out of far side, hit front when leader retreated upon straightening, just held on under pressure.
Began fairly, settled well behind, only ran past beaten horses closing stages.
Soon settled behind midfield and remained wide without cover, similar turning for home, found nothing.
Settled just worse than midfield, 4-wide around home bend and into straight, fought on well to be nearest at finish.
Raced in prominent position early, gradually drifted backward to midfield by home bend, found nothing under pressure in straight.
Began moderately, settled wide in forward of midfield, commenced move rounding home bend, sustained progress from 2L 3rd into straight to just fail to get up on line.
Began with others from a wide draw, settled just behind leaders in 3rd, just kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Settled in 4th but more than 10Ls behind, gradually crept closer approaching home turn, had a clear run down the inside but lacked a change of gear.

Taken back to the rear and more than 20Ls behind the runaway leader at one stage, not used in running and had 7Ls to make up passing 400 M, couldn't find much on asking and finished the race one-paced.
Pressed the leader making the 1st turn and set a very fast early pace, eased back entering the home straight, struggled for pace passing 600 M and ran out of gas inside 200 M. (Jockey questioned.)

Held up near the rear in a fast run race, way off the pace in the first half but moved closer rounding the home turn, didn't find quite as much as expected when asked for maximum effort and was never going to reach the principals.

In a rearward position 20Ls behind the runaway leader in the first half, moved closer as the tempo steadied halfway, carried wide turning home, battled for 3rd place but ran flat over the final 150 M.

Quietly ridden despite the fast early tempo, behind midfield more than 15Ls back down the back straight, closer on turning but never looked like figuring from that position. The last 200 M may have just found him out.

Settled well in 5th from the off, tracked the breakaway leader passing 600 M, had more than 2Ls to make up but despite the step up in trip, stayed on extremely well and found plenty to prevail inside 100 M.

Set a blistering pace in the first 1000 M and was 10Ls ahead of the main group down the back straight, slowed down approaching the home turn and was headed near 600 M, weakened early in straight. (Jockey questioned.)
Slotted into a 2-wide spot behind midfield, way off the pace in the first half and was a shade keen in his run, took a while to quicken up from off the pace but never troubled the first two.
Behind midfield in 8th, shifted out to 3-wide without cover halfway down the back straight, had 5Ls to make up passing 400 M, couldn't match with the first two but ran on doggedly to the line.
Travelled handily in 3rd before taking it up passing 600 M, established a 2Ls lead 400 M out, kept on well but was picked off inside final 100 M. Commendable effort.

Only far to begin, positioned 3-wide in midfield 3Ls back, forced to move 4-wide without cover when speed slackened, looked a place chance turning but condition gave out and just held ground final 200 M.
Amongst first to break, settled outside leader, travelled well sharing front throughout, 1L down turning, struggling before hampered and lost run, weakened out thereafter. (Heart Irregularity.)
Bounced out with first few, took an ideal spot on leaders back, always right there throughout, didn't quicken turning and just finished on at one speed late.

Begin in line, had a good trail early, raced 3Ls back in 2-wide line, tracked 3-wide on bend, travelling strongly and into clear at 250 M, cruised to lead inside 200 M, didn't go away as expected and clung on by a nose.
Fairly away, took a midfield spot 3Ls back on rails, used little but raced keenly in middle stages, checked at 500 M, didn't see daylight until 200 M, just battled away when clear.
Showed usual pace, pressed on but unable to slot in, forced to race 3-wide without cover and difficult to settle in mid-section, ridden along turning, folded after hard run.
Standard getaway, ridden up early to maintain spot at tail 4-5Ls back on rails, improved 2-wide turning, made steady progress final 300 M without looking likely.
No early speed, soon travelling at rear 5Ls off speed, moved 3-wide with a trail on circle, made run widest turning and closed respectably gaining 3rd final 100 M.
Out well, continued forward to take lead, controlled affairs to suit in front, 1L clear turning, kicked but headed inside 200 , fought back strongly to go down by narrowest margin.
Out with rest, took ideal spot 2-wide behind speed, raced strongly to bend, no clear run to 300 M, lacked usual finish when clear and struggled late.
Out with them, pressed on but trapped 3-wide without cover in mid-section, did it tough 3Ls back throughout, struggling on turning, faded out after hard run.
Reasonable jump, positioned handily 3Ls back on fence, not asked in mid-section, same margin down turning, faded out gradually. (Blood in trachea.)
Restrained from a wide gate, ended up 10Ls back at rear on rails, always well back and in impossible spot turning, closed off well making many lengths to be closest at finish.
First to hit ground, crossed easily and elected for a trail on leaders back, had a fair run thereafter, clear enough turning but found little and gradually dropped out.
Restrained from an awkward draw, 9Ls from to find racing on rails throughout, a bit keen in mid-section, took inside runs turning and made ground to 200 M before run ended.
Began with purpose, pushed on to take up running, kept speed even throughout, headed soon after turning, steadily weakened out in straight.
No early speed, drifted back to race 6Ls back on rails in midfield, used little in run, held up on turning in, made steady progress when clear to be nearest on line.
Moderate jump, ended up well back 9Ls off speed, always near to last, no response in straight.
Began in line, ended up trailing pace quartet 3Ls back in 2-wide line, travelled well to bend, went to them at 200 M and looked in a commanding position before winner emerged final 100 M.
Restrained from an awkward alley, shared rear 10Ls back in 2-wide line, always well back and was difficult to settle throughout, set task turning, only beat tired runners home.
Even jump, pressed on to take a prominent spot, camped on leaders 2Ls away throughout, held same position to bend, looked a place chance at 300 M but unable to go on with it late.

Eased at start, positioned 8Ls back behind midfield in 2-wide line, shifted 3-wide with trail on bend, 5-wide turning, let down well at 300 M but found extra gear at 200 M to score with some authority.
Broke well, continued on to sit outside early leader, had every chance on steady speed, still there turning and took front at 200 M but unable to go with first few last bit, stuck on well regardless.
Standard beginning, ended up 6Ls back in running line, released well in run, improved 3-wide on turning, made good finish final 300 M making run with winner, fought out battle for 2nd final 50 M.
Settled well behind, remained same into straight, finished off race well down centre of track, never nearer.
Attempted to make all, narrowly headed under pressure inside 200 M, fought on under pressure to be just denied in a 3-way photo-finish.
Always struggling at the back.
Raced wide just worse than midfield, held up for a run early in straight, improving under pressure when tightened again late near finish thus not ridden out fully.
Began with others, travelled keenly amongst leaders far side, settled in 2L 3rd around home bend, fought on steadily to hit front narrowly passing 200 M, just pipped at post. (Tactic questioned.)
Travelled in midfield, kept on early in straight until finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Soon taken back to rear from a poor draw, raced wide throughout far side and around the bend, slightly inconvenienced 300 M out, ran on well down centre of track to be closest at finish.
Began awkwardly losing ground, travelled towards the rear, did not find much room throughout home straight, not fully tested.
Settled in midfield on rails, saved ground turning for home, obtained a clear passage to challenge over 300 M out, held good chance throughout closing stages only to be swamped late.
Raced prominently and without cover far side, trailed the leader around the bend, gradually weakened after straightening, eased inside final 200 M. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Settled in a prominent spot on rails in 3rd or 4th within 2.5Ls of pace, similar into straight, just kept on steadily without quickening.
Broke well from a wide draw, soon taken back to midfield for cover though still 3-wide, responded well inside final 250 M to just get up on line.
Began from the widest draw, raced wide without cover in midfield throughout far side and around the bend, soon dropped out after straightening.
Fast into stride, always in the firing line just off the pace, had a long duel with the persistent leader shortly after straightening, stuck on well to gradually gain the upper hand inside 150 M.

Taken to the fence on jumping, travelled towards the rear about 5Ls off the pace, gradually drifted out passing 600 M and poised to strike, stayed on OK inside the final 200 M without threatening the principals.
Began with them, settled in a rearward position 5Ls back, had no clear run early in straight but couldn't pick up from off the pace when clear. Another disappointing effort.
Ordinary jump but showed plenty of pace to grab the lead, kept on strongly from 400 M when the eventual winner loomed up alongside, battled on well to go down by a neck at the finish.
3Ls off the pace in a position better than midfield but had little left once into the home straight, dropped away passing 200 M.
Slow out, taken to a 3-wide position behind midfield, raced without cover and shuffled back to last coming out of the bend, made some ground down the outside but never threatened.
Stayed close to the early pace but soon ran freely and difficult to settle, back in midfield turning in, couldn't step up a gear when asked and quickly faded out of contention inside 300 M.

Drifted back on jumping from a wide barrier, given a patient ride in the rear against the rail and had 5Ls to make up passing 400 M, ran on well down the inside but offered little threat to the first two which kicked well clear.
Quickly into stride, up with the pace early but was caught 3-wide making the turn, held every chance but kept on one-paced only.
Average start from the inside draw, soon shaken up to take closer behind leaders, ideally positioned turning in but dropped right out passing 300 M.
Bumped at the start and lost ground, guided to a midfield position on the fence 3Ls behind leader, under pressure from 500 M and had nothing to offer in straight.
Went to the front and led until the furlong, faded from that point on.
Went back from a wide gate to settle near the rear 1 off with cover. Waited for an inside run turning for home, but didn't make much impact in the run to the wire.
Raced behind midfield 2-wide with cover. Never ran on.
Travelled close to midfield, but was wide and without cover. Gave in quickly in the straight. (To Trial.)
Travelled midfield the fence. Found the lead over the concluding stages but was nailed close to the line.
Travelled early along the fence but raced somewhat greenly and lost its position when racing inside runners whilst positioned on the pace. Was found wanting in the run home. (To Trial.)
Showed good gate speed to camp on the back of the leader. Hit the front by the 200 M, but peaked on its run well before the wire.
Raced in 3rd last position along the fence. Kept to the inside in the run home but struggled.
Parked 2 deep with cover midfield. Failed to quicken when asked for an effort after turning for home, weakening over the final stages.

Failed to go the early speed in the race despite being ridden along, eventually taking up last position. Was under pressure for most of trip, finally responding when brought to the outside in the straight. Flashed home to score.
Raced on the back of the speed, 1 of with cover. Had every chance.
Failed to muster early stages. Sat 3-wide without cover at midfield back straight. Urged 600 M out. 5-wide and 4Ls off on straightening. Kept one-paced in the straight.

Raced 3-wide without cover in the leading section early stages. Settled 2-wide in midfield back straight. 1-1/2L down on straightening. Failed to catch the winner but did well enough to hold 2nd place.
Prominent spot through to the home turn. Within 2Ls of the lead in the straight. Took charge inside final furlong and kept on well to deny rivals.
Trailed field after start. A little closer on back straight. Improved widest at the bend and was 5 to 6Ls off turning in. Failed to make further progress thereafter.
First out but unable to work across from a wide draw. Trapped wide rounding the first turn. 2-wide and disputed in back straight and making home turn. Found no extra thereafter.
Dropped back from the widest gate. Moved to race behind midfield along the fence back straight. 4Ls off turning in and held up until 250 M. Ran on only fairly when clear.
Out nicely to be in handy position behind the speed through to the home turn. Found nothing when asked in the straight.
Quickly into stride. Disputed lead on fence back straight. Overhauled inside 300 M but hung on to make frame.
2-wide and 5Ls behind the speed through to the home turn. 3Ls back early in the straight and responded well when asked. Barely missed the quinella.
Taken back from a high draw. 6Ls behind the pace back straight. 4Ls down early in the straight. Made minor headway inside final furlong.
3 and 4-wide no cover throughout, 3rd at the 1000 M when 2Ls back, a little further back turning for home, one-paced.
Around midfield and within striking range through to the final bend, dropped out meekly thereafter.
Midfield and 2-wide over 4Ls off the early tempo, 3Ls back in 6th turning for home, one-paced to wrap up.
Never any better than midfield and always at least 5Ls from the speed, posed little trouble in the straight.
Soon one from rear about 7Ls off the pace, not suited by the on-pace race but still finished off strongly for 5th, possibly better at 1600 M.
Slowest away losing 3Ls immediately, 8Ls last at halfway, made some minor late ground down the centre of the track but never at all dangerous.
Had the box-seat position on fence between 1L and 2Ls from the speed before taking up the lead 300 M out, kicked clear, easily.
3-back the rails in midfield about 4Ls off leader at halfway, closer turning for home, no chance with winner but stayed on well to nick 2nd inside final 50 M.
Soon led by 1L but over-raced a little early on, 2Ls clear at the 800 M, headed by the winner 300 M out, headed for 2nd inside final 50 M, just hung onto 3rd.
Always towards the rear at least 6Ls from the pace, still very few signs of ability.
Settled in 11th at the 1000 M, closer about 4Ls back in midfield off last turn, one-paced to wind up.
Half back in 2nd outside leader early on, still as close-up turning for home, couldn't find and extra gear when the tempo quickened late on.
3Ls back in 5th out 2-wide at the 1000 M and closer in 4th into the last 400 M, failed to capitalize on the cheap run, poor finish.
Always worse than midfield at least 5Ls from the pace, struggling well before the home turn, poor.
Slow out and bumped at the start, over 4Ls last early on, ran on well through the field to nick 2nd late on.
Disputed the early speed along the stand's rail, under pressure to try and keep up 300 M out, petered out quite tamely.
Midfield about 2Ls off the speed until the 400 M, made some good late head way for 4th, probably wants further.
2Ls back in midfield at halfway, beaten once the tempo quickened soon after.
Prominent very early on but steadily slipped through the field to trail in a well beaten last.
Near stand-side and better than midfield, responded well to pressure to nick a place late on.
Always prominent down centre of track, pulled 1L clear when asked 200 M out, never in danger of relinquishing the break, had plenty in hand.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Never really got involved, niggled along in 11th at halfway, never likely to place.
Always worse than midfield, 5Ls back and beaten 300 M out.
Established an early lead, vied for the advantage until the 400 M, weakened out of the money inside the final 200 M but not a bad debut either.
Travelled well in midfield over 2Ls from the pace until the 400 M, always held by the same margin but a decent debut nonetheless.
Midfield along the stand's rail 3Ls off pace at 600 M, one-paced and offered little threat.
Raced down the centre of the track, pressured to keep at halfway when 3Ls down, very weak late on.
Eased at start and took rail at rear, 5-1/2Ls off the leaders, harmed by the slow pace, lacked turn of foot in final stages.
Eased to sit in midfield early, moved up 1000 M and sat 1-1/2Ls off the slow pace, trapped 3 to 4-wide without cover throughout and lost ground, out of fuel 500 M.
Pushed forward, 2Ls off the leaders 2 to 3-wide, suited by the slow tempo, but lacked turn of foot and just held ground in last quarter.
Hard ridden early but failed to muster, took rail at rear, more than 6Ls off the leader, not suited by the slow pace, no progress.
Pushed early but failed to muster, at back, 5-1/2Ls off the leaders 2 to 3-wide, dashed well 250 M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Eased to sit behind midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the leaders, not suited by the slow tempo, trapped 3-wide throughout and lost ground, flattened 200 M.
Hard ridden to obtain the box seat, benefited by the slow early sectionals, however just held ground in straight.
Hard ridden to take a prominent spot, enjoyed the slow early tempo outside the leader, however soon dropped off 400 M. (Lame next day.)
Hard ridden to take the rail and led by 1/2L, clocked very slow mid sectionals, kicked 400 M, hung on strongly until 50 M when overhauled, just beaten by a neck in 2nd.
Eased to sit in midfield with cover, 3-1/2Ls off the leaders 2-wide, harmed by the slow pace, demonstrated strong finishing effort final 300 M and dominated in last few strides.
Slow away, hard ridden to regain a midfield spot along the fence, 3-1/2Ls off the leaders, harmed by the slow pace, dashed well 200 M and grabbed 3rd.
Towards rear to straight, kept on steadily without threatening. (Bled.)
Settled in midfield, shuffled back towards the rear rounding home bend, recovered good late ground along the rails down the straight, did best work late.
Soon taken back to rear, remained well behind to straight, made no show.
Soon outpaced, tailed-off into straight and always struggling.
Broke well from the widest barrier, soon taken back towards the rear and raced wide without cover, made no impression in straight.
Broke well, settled in midfield on rails, kept on at the one pace in straight before finding no extra closing stages. (Questioned for poor performances.) (Lame next day.)
Made running to about 250 M, weakened under pressure. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Jumped moderately, gradually picked up to 3L 4th just better than midfield before home bend, came to challenge under pressure inside 300 M, responded well to win convincingly.
Niggled at early, travelled wide without cover at times far side, remained wide just better than midfield around home bend, ran home one-paced.
Began moderately, settled in midfield, faded under pressure in straight.
Broke well from the one draw, settled just off the speed and tracked the leader to straight, hit the front briefly over 200 M out but quickly overhauled.

Began fairly from a poor draw, gradually settled in 2L 3rd far side, slightly further away in 3rd turning for home, ran on to nearly draw level inside the 200 M mark but had no answer to winner's strong late surge.
Standard jump, restrained to a rearward position about 8Ls back, became detached from halfway, didn't respond when asked and was never likely from that position.
In mid-division, urged along passing 500 M but unable to step up a gear. Remained one-paced to the line.

Settled prominently behind the unsustainably fast pace, travelled strongly to final 400 M, quickened to the front 200 M out and powered nicely clear to record his 4th success over the Sha Tin 1000 M with something in hand.
Behind midfield 6Ls back, switched out to challenge near 400 M but found very little in his finish. Never threatening.
Soon grabbed the stands' rail under a positive ride, settled in 3rd and was always in the firing line, had a smooth run against the rail, kept on well inside 400 M to take 3rd.

Slow into stride, soon recovered to race prominently 3Ls off the runaway leader, picked up well under a vigorous ride and pushed the winner all the way to the line. A pleasing effort considering his lack of experience.

Even break, travelled in midfield towards the centre of track, had to be rushed along passing 500 M but couldn't muster the pace to challenge. Disappointing run considering a last start winner over same course and distance.
Seasonal reappearance. Average jump, urged along to hold a midfield position, struggled to keep up from halfway, dropped off rapidly passing 150 M. (Lame next morning.)
Held a position in midfield on the stands' rail, 4Ls down passing 400 M, found little when pressed and didn't seem to appreciate the drop back in distance.
Slow into stride, held a midfield position 1 off the stands' rail, made his move 450 M out, looked threatening for a moment but became one-paced passing 200 M.
Settled behind midfield 6Ls off the pace, shifted out for a clear run passing 400 M but responded only fairly.
Overcame his low draw and led hard in a position towards the stands' side, kicked 3Ls clear at the 400 M mark, unable to sustain effort and was headed near 250 M, weakened quickly thereafter.
Average jump only but gradually crept closer to be 3 to 4Ls behind the runaway leader, plugged on well enough but unable to trouble the winner.
Outpaced soon after the jump and trailed over 10Ls in a distant last, got going inside 400 M but too late to pose any threat. (Jockey severely reprimanded regarding his ride.)
Shared early speed, kicked up to hold lead, pressured throughout and shaded on bend by outside horse, headed at 300 M and just weakened out thereafter.
Out with rest, assumed a midfield role 3 to 4Ls back, difficult to settle in mid-section, awkwardly placed roundin bend, made gradual progress when clear to be closest at finish.
Tardy to begin and unable to take usual promenent spot, positioned 6Ls back in running line, back with last few turning, made some ground final 200 M.
No early speed, taken back to rear, raced 7 to 8Ls or so away at tail, saved ground on rails to bend, made many lengths along inside in straight to be nearest on line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Fast away, pressed on in search of front, posted 3 wide with cover 2Ls off speed, same margin down turning kept on evenly straight holding ground late.
Began in line, slotted in behind pace group 3 to 4Ls back in 2 wide line, had fair run to bend, inconvenienced early straight but got moving over final furlong to go down by a nose.
Standard break, ended up back behind midfield 5 to 6Ls away on rails throughout, lacked extra gear on turning and simply kept on at one paced in straight.
Began with purpose, pressed forward but trapped 3 wide without cover, did plenty of work to bend, hung in straight and unable to be ridden out, folded easily.
Taken back soon after start, ended up 7 to 8Ls away, always rearward and still had plenty to do on turning, no response in straight and battled to line.
Didn't muster and went back from an outside alley, posted 3 wide amongst last few 7Ls or so away, always well back, passed only tired runners late.
Began fairly, hard ridden to take a spot behind speed, raced 1 out 1 back to bend, still 2Ls down turning but found little when placed under pressure and faded out.
Began well, pressed forward to take up prominent role, showed lead throughout, headed leader on turning, led until inside 200 M but couldn't lift when collared, kept on respectably for 3rd.
Standard break, ended up racing 3 wide but had cover in midfield 5Ls off pace, dropped in on bend, struggling on turning, gradually dropped out.
First to hit ground, allowed to relax behind speed racing 2Ls back behind leader, travelled well to turn, angled clear at 400 M, took lead inside 200 M and kept on well to defy rival late.
No early pace, ended up 8Ls back in rearward spot, saved ground, kept improving on turning, made good ground between horses in straight to be closest on line.
Moderate beginning, faded back to race 5Ls off pace in midfield, used little but pace not to suit, held up for a considerable distance straightening, clear only when it was too late.
Amongst first to bend, crossed and took ideal 1 out 1 back spot, no excuses throughout, battled with eventual winner on turning, overhauled inside 100 M by 2nd.
Showed early pace, kept on to take up running, set steady tempo to bend, soon headed on turning, dropped out tamely.
Reasonable jump, obtained trail 2 to 3Ls away on rails, not asked in mid-section, same margin down turning, in traffic to 300 M, did best work late to make frame.
Standard jump, positioned 6 to 7Ls back in running line, slow pace harmed chances throughout, steadied bend, no closer in run to line.
Away early, caught wide and worked forward to race outside leader, had terms to suit with a steady tempo, took over soon after straightening, couldn't keep on and flattened final 200 M.
Fast out, crossed to fence and took trail behind leader, had dream trip to bend, put in picture shortly after turning, drove to front and held enough in run to line.

Taken back from a wide gate, ended up at rear 9Ls off speed racing 2 wide checked at 700 M, gradually made ground turning, not clearest run in straight but kept coming to be not far away at finish. (Explanation reported.)
Reasonable jump, ended up 3 to 4Ls back in midfield, even chance to bend, didn't let down as usual and struggled over concluding stages.
Standard jump, drifted back to be 3 wide 6 to 7Ls off speed, pace against in mid-section, came 4 wide turning, kept on to 200 M before peaking on efforts.
Began with some purpose, posted 3 wide without cover in midfield, raced 5Ls away throughout, gradually improved on bend, kept coming in straight despite hard run for a respectable 5th.
Restrained from a wide gate, raced 3 wide 8Ls back with cover, pace against in mid-section, still well back turning, could only make limited progress given final sections.
Drifted back soon after start, raced 8Ls or so away back with last few, plenty to do turning and held up to 300 M, made plenty of ground when clear to finish a strong 2nd.

Went forward early, settled in 4th along the fence in early stages before switching out to take closer order near 700 M, responded well to hit front 250 M and kept on determinedly to fend off the persistent runner-up.
Drifted back to a rearward position 8Ls behind leader, moved closer on turning but didn't find much passing 300 M. Never likely.
Began well but restrained back to mid-division, had a relaxed run against the rail, plugged on ok inside 300 M but couldn't quite get on terms with the first two.
Broke well from the inside draw and tracked leader one back, had the help of the fence but inclined to hang out, into clear 250 M but ran on very one-paced.
Taken back on jumping and raced as the back-marker 10Ls off the pace in middle stages, taken wide for a run on straightening but picked up only fairly from off the pace. Never threatened.
In a rearward position along the fence, 6-7Ls down passing 400 M and never picked up on straightening.

Began awkwardly from the outside barrier, went forward and crossed to lead passing 1200 M, set a steady tempo but was taken on for the lead making the home turn, faded away from 300 M. (Blood in trachea.)
Urged to a midfield position early but was wide on the 1st turn, slotted in to be 2-wide down the back straight, made up some late headway but never threatened to get involved.

Travelled well in a position better than midfield, drifted away from the fence to challenge near 400 M mark, had 1.5L to make up on the eventual winner as they turned in, stayed on well inside 150 M to go down by a diminishing neck.
Went forward in the early stages, settled handily in 3rd before moving up to race alongside leader passing 500 M, unable to keep on and was gradually outpaced from 250 M. (Jockey questioned.)
Shaken up early to obtain a spot ahead of mid-division, under pressure to hold his position from 600 M and found very little inside 300 M. (Jockey questioned.)
Slow to begin, raced behind midfield 6Ls back, commenced his run round the outside of field from 500 M, kept on ok for a non threatening 4th.
Led along the paint. Was headed by the final furlong but stayed on soundly.
Enjoyed a nice run along the rails behind the speed. Hung in from on straightening until the 200 M, proving difficult to ride, getting home fairly.
Settled in last position and tailed the field throughout the trip.
Tracked the speed, 1 off with cover. Travelled well approaching the home bend, switched out early in the straight and snatched victory in the shadows of the post.
Parked midfield on the fence. Stayed to the inside in the final stretch, whacked away over the final stages.
Travelled midfield 2-wide with cover. Peeled out turning into the home straight and ran on nicely.
Positioned 2 deep just, back from midfield with cover. Worked to the line satisfactorily without threatening.
Stalked the leader along the fence. Worked into the clear on straightening but was nabbed close to home.
Raced behind midfield the fence. Struggled in the straight.
Travelled in 2nd last spot and stayed in the same position for the duration of the race.
Crossed to camp outside the leader. Kept on dourly in the run to the wire.
Raced towards the rear of the field on the rails. Shifted out to a 1 off line with cover mid race, came wide turning for home closing off well over the concluding stages.
Pushed early but was not quick enough to work across. Settled 3-wide without cover at midfield near the Rock. 5-wide and 3Ls off on straightening. Weakened inside 100 M.
Away with them. Slipped to the back 1000 M out. 7 to 8Ls back rounding the bend. Found nothing in the straight.
Raced 4-wide within 3Ls of the pace early stages. 3-wide behind leading section into home straight. Kept giving in the straight to make frame.
Bumped at start. Raced 3-wide and around 6Ls back through to the home turn. Not quickened in the straight.
Pressed on early. Sat 2-wide and 5Ls behind the pace. Urged 500 M out and was 3Ls down turning in. Kept one-paced in the straight.
Drifted back on fence after start. 6 to 7Ls back through to the home turn. Took inside run in the straight but unable to see daylight. Ran on fairly when cleared.
Raced within 2Ls of the pace on fence. Gave plenty in the straight without posing serious threat to the front pair.
Hard ridden early for lead. Eased to sit behind the pace near the Rock. Had every chance in the straight but peaked inside final 50 M.
Eased back after start. Trailed 10Ls down near the rock. Swung widest and was 6Ls off on straightening. Made minor progress in the straight.
Tracked leader after start. Took lead near the Rock. Challenged in the straight but stayed on well to hold off rivals closing stages.
Raced behind midfield on fence, 5Ls off the speed near 900 M. Steadied at 600 M. Got closer turning in. Made a steady run in the straight.
Worked very hard close to fast pace early out wide without cover before leading by 1L at 800 M, headed just inside the 200 M and slipped out of the money.
Disputed early pace, eased back to a 'one-out-one-back' position from halfway to final bend, one-paced to wrap up.
4-back on the fence about 6Ls off pace in 8th at the 1000 M, briefly loomed a threat off last bend but couldn't sustain the bid and well held.
2-wide and 6Ls behind speed in 7th at halfway, closer but widest turning for home, kept on strongly to lead 100 M out, pulled clear.
Disputed early pace on the fence, headed by 1L about 800 M out and a neck down in 2nd off last bend, tired inside final furlong.
7Ls back in 10th at the 1000 M, one from rear but 5Ls down at the last bend, finished off well to dead-heat for 3rd in final stride.
A neck behind fast tempo in 5th at the 1300 M, taken back to 5th or 6th about 3Ls from the lead through to last turn, no impression. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Slow out, 2-wide sharing rear 8Ls off front at 1200 M, 5Ls back taking last bend, headway when crowded and stumbling 150 M out, lost momentum.
Checked early on, 8Ls last at the 1200 M, pressured 500 M out in rear, responded well to pressure to get 2nd late on.
Enjoyed a nice trail on the rail mostly 2Ls of speed in 4th through to home straight, 1L back at the 200 M with place prospects, one-paced thereafter.
Disputed early pace before easing to a 3-back the fence position, 2Ls down turning in, every chance when a neck 3rd at 200 M, run soon peaked.
7Ls off pace out 2-wide in 9th or so at the 1000 M, edged closer on straightening, finished off well down the centre of the track, never nearer.
Slow out, pressed forward from midfield to race 2nd at 1200 M, 4Ls back in 3rd from 800 M to final bend, one-paced thereafter.
Held up in rear as usual, still 9Ls last at the 600 M, stayed on strongly to take 3rd in final strides.
Taken back from wide gate and remained at least 8Ls off pace in rear until final turn, didn't find nearly enough off the bridle.
3-wide no cover from the 1200 M, 6Ls back at 800 M and further back entering home straight, never likely.
3-back the rails at the 1200 M, 6Ls back in midfield at halfway, never looked likely to improve this position.
Held 2nd passing winning post for the first time, 4Ls off in 3rd or 4th from halfway to home turn when under pressure, ceded ground.
Set a fast early pace before handing up the advantage at the 1000 M, 2Ls back in 2nd turning for home and at 200 M, soon swamped.
4-back along the rails in 9th about 7Ls off pace at 1000 M, got into the clear but still 5Ls off winner turning in, stayed on well fro 2nd.
4Ls back in 4th out 2-wide at the 1200 M and much the same turning for home, one-paced to conclude.
6Ls back in 8th with cover in middle stages, 4-wide no cover on the circle, 4Ls back turning for home, finished fairly, lost a place in final strides.
Slow out as usual, rearward about 8Ls behind initial tempo, marginally closer turning for home, moderate late ground on the fence.
Keen early on before pressing forward to lead out 4-wide no cover at the 1000 M, 2Ls to the good turning for home, stayed on strongly to score.
Pushed and crossed in front, settled in box seat, enjoyed the slow pace, but soon weakened 250 M.
Slow away, not suited by the slow pace, never competitive at rear.
Pushed early but failed to muster, 6Ls off the leader at back on the fence, not suited by the slow tempo, no progress.
Eased back, 5-1/2Ls off the leader on the rails, harmed by the slow pace, on heels 600 M, ran on fairly until 100 M showed little dash.
Eased to sit behind midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leader on the fence, not suited by the slow pace, no turn of foot in straight.
Settled well in a prominent position, 1-1/2Ls off the leader on the fence, ran on well to the line for 3rd.
Midfield 2-wide early, moved forward 800 M and sat 2Ls off the leader 3-wide, not suited by the slow tempo, finished the race off strongly and grabbed 2nd.
Pressed forward, took rail and led by 1-1/2Ls early, clocked slow middle sectionals and narrowed the lead, soon out of fuel 250 M.
Pushed forward and occupied a prominent spot 2-wide, favoured by the slow early sectionals, ran on until 200 M flattened.
Plenty of early speed, eased to sit in midfield, 3Ls off the leader along the fence, dashed well 300 M to win despite not suited by the slow pace. Won well.
Eased to sit in midfield early, moved up during the slow middle sections and sat 1L of the leader, trapped 3-wide without cover throughout and lost too much ground, emptied 200 M.
Midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the slow pace, swept towards 3 to 4-wide to improve round the home bend, little dash 200 M.
Began moderately, ridden along to hold midfield spot, remained same turning into straight, fought on steadily under pressure without quickening.
Soon taken back from the widest draw to race in last few, raced awkwardly at times down far side, never nearer. (See Racing Incidents.)
Very slowly away, always struggling at the back.

In a last few after breaking from a poor draw, picked up to just worse than midfield short after jump, remained towards rear turning in, responded well inside final 200 M despite shifting ground, did best work late.
Jumped moderately, travelled in better than midfield mainly in 4th far side, similar turning for home, had no more to give after straightening.

Jumped well from a wide draw, soon crossed to drop anchor behind pace, stalked leader into straight and soon came to challenge under pressure, held every chance only to be nosed out in the shadows of the post.
Began fairly, tightened on rails and lost 2Ls approaching 1000 M bend, never recovered.

Began with others from a wide draw, raced wide without cover in better than midfield down far side, rolled forward to hold one-out-one-back position in 2nd from the Rock, similar turning in but tired under pressure inside final 200 M.

Broke well, close up when hampered and lost 2Ls at 1000 M bend, had to settle in midfield on rails for the length of back straight, same turning in, fought on determinedly under pressure to just get up on line.
