Driven along from middle draw and attempted to make all, held clear advantage down far side and still maintained a 1L break turning in, unable to sustain effort and overhauled close to home.
Niggled along in midfield early, awkwardly placed behind runners for a good part of back straight and shuffled back, made good impression to finish off race from towards rear into home straight.
Broke well, settled in forward of midfield with rails run, came within 3Ls of pace turning in, fought on steadily to be nearest at finish.

Restrained to a 2-side position in mid-division, a long way off the fast pace in middle stages but moved closer making the home turn, stayed on ok but lacked the turn of foot he displayed when winning last time.
Travelled in 4th and always going well, moved closer on the runaway leaders passing 500 M, ran on well in straight, hit the front inside 200 M but was outran close home. Beaten narrowly.
Settled along the fence in 5th but a long way back from the runaway leaders, squeezed badly near 250 M but recovered well and showed battling attitudes to cut down his rivals close home.
Drifted back to a position towards the rear, 3-wide making the home turn, ran on fairly without posing serious threat.

Taken back on jumping, travelled in 2nd last about 10Ls away from the strong early pace, waited with until 350 M before making a run down the inside, but effort appeared to have flattened inside 100 M.
Awkwardly away and was soon taken across to the fence, sat in midfield 6Ls away from the fast face going into final 400 M, ran on evenly down the inside despite hang in near 200 M.

Went forward from the beginning, raced in 3rd 6-7Ls behind the breakaway leaders, under urged from 400 M and looked threatening early in straight, briefly hit front inside 300 M but was unable to sustain effort close home.

Attacked the lead, went a furious pace up front and opened up a 7Ls gap in middle stages, got tired passing 400 M as early hard run took toll, dropped off rapidly in home straight. (Jockey and Trainer questioned.)

Unable to shift in and was caught in a 3-wide without cover position behind midfield, gradually crept closer down the back straight, drifted in under pressure in straight and never picked up, eased down close home.
Patiently ridden in the rear despite the furious early pace, trailed over 10Ls behind leader in middle stages, made his challenge widest and really powered home inside the final 200 M. Just failed.
Was taken on for the lead from 1400 M and ended up setting an unsustainably strong gallop, noticeably weakened passing 400 M and was swamped shortly on straightening. (Jockey and Trainer questioned.)
Held a position behind midfield on the fence after jumping well from the inside barrier, had to be niggled along passing 500 M but offered very little in the finish, weakened final 200 M.
Began awkwardly and lost ground, travelled in a position towards the rear 8Ls off the pace, shifted out to 3-wide passing 600 M, picked up well from off the pace and made some late impression.
Soon in the front rank but was unable to cross from the widest barrier, 3-wide turning in and quickly gave ground on straightening. (Blood in trachea.)
Raced behind midfield but was hampered and pushed to 3-wide down the back straight, finished the fastest and made up plenty of ground inside 300 M to claim 3rd.
Well covered in the centre of the field 4Ls back, into clear 350 M but couldn't step up a gear when asked, kept on one-paced to the line.
In midfield along the fence 3Ls back, steadied near 350 M when attempting a run down the inside, took time to gather speed and did his best work towards the finish.

Slow to begin, raced as the back marker 8 to 9Ls behind leader, gradually moved away from the rails approaching home straight, picked up fairly down the outside but was never likely from that position.

Travelled in a 3-wide midfield position under restraint, covered extra ground on the turn, responded well to hit front along with the eventual winner 200 M out, kept on and was just touched off at the line. (Trainer questioned.)
Unable to settle down the back straight, had 5Ls to make up passing 400 M didn't have a clear run until 250 M, finished off the race well enough.

Taken across behind runners and obtained a rearward spot on the fence, had huge task in hand turning in but picked up OK once saw daylight down the inside. Seemingly appreciated the step up in distance.
Always in the firing line just behind the front running trio, accelerated well to be in front near 200 M, pushed by the runner up but kept on finding enough to keep his rival at bay.
Crossed from the wide barrier to race alongside leader under a steady tempo, weakened rapidly from 350 M, eased close home.
Crossed to the fence and took them along under a steady tempo, didn't travel well and was inclined to hang out, headed near 250 M and quickly dropped away inside 100 M.
Slotted into a rail position 2Ls off the leader, well positioned to strike turning in but offered very little in the finish, swamped inside 100 M.
Enjoyed the run off the race on the back of the 2 leaders. Took a split between runners rounding the home turn and picked up well to go on and score easily.
Travelled midfield 3-wide and without cover for most of the trip. Finished tailed out. (To trial.)
Raced towards the rear of the field, 3-wide with cover. Pluggged away in the final stretch.
Raced in last position. Closed off fairly without threatening.
Set a solid tempo in front whilst over racing as joint leader, traveling 1 off. Faded in the straight.

Fractious in the gates, had its head turned when the barriers opened and as a consequence lost a considerable amount of ground. Settled at the rear, 2 deep with cover. Peeled to the outside turning for home, worked home fairly.
Slowly away then raced midfield, 2-wide with cover. Struggled in the run home.
Vied for the lead along the fence racing at a quick tempo. Weakened noticeably after the furlong.
Raced behind midfield the fence. Battled on at the same speed in the run home before tiring over the concluding stages.
Showed some speed to travel behind the principals, 2 deep with cover. Was under pressure after the 500 M, got to the line dourly.
Travelled midfield on the fence. Shifted off the rail by the 500 M to chase the leaders, worked home soundly.
Slightly slow to jump but quickly recovered along rails to a prominent spot through to straightening. Unable to turn up a notch thereafter.
Quickly into stride. Taken to a handy position through to the home turn. Kept one-paced in the straight. Fought hard in a battle for minor placing and was just touched off near the line.
Hard ridden early. Ran 3-wide without cover, 2Ls behind the leader. Still in front early in the straight but soon weakened.
Began well. Eased to sit 2-wide, 4 to 5Ls back at 1000 M. Urged to maintain position 800 M out. Blocked early in the straight but failed to quicken when clear.
Ridden early. Took lead on fence 900 M out. Held a 1-1/2L advantage into home straight. Kept on well but was firmly put aside by the winner 100 M out.
Out nicely and eased off in search of cover. Sat 2-wide and within 3Ls of the pace through to the home straight. Caught leader at 100 M and won with some comfort.
Checked to race at rear early stages. 5 to 6Ls down on fence rounding the bend. Produced some good effort in the straight and was nearest at finish.
Taken to race at midfield from a high draw. 3-wide and 4Ls away at 1000 M. Got closer and was 5-wide turning in. Gave plenty to snatch minor placing near the line but no hope with quinella pair.
Raced at midfield on fence, 4Ls behind the pace through to the home turn. Ran on steadily in the straight.

Drifted back on fence after start. 7Ls behind the speed making the home turn. Taken very wide to make his challenge on straightening. Ran fairly well in the straight and peaked inside 50 M. (Mucopus.)
Raced at midfield early. Slipped to the rear section and was 6Ls back on turn. Swung wide turning into the straight and ran on fairly.
Raced 3-wide about 7Ls off the pace early stages. Forced to go widest rounding the bend. Made up minor ground in the straight.
2-wide and about 5Ls back in 7th until home straight, 2Ls back in 4th and with place prospects at least at the 200 M, couldn't sustain the run.
Pressed forward but 3-wide no cover and 2Ls back in 4th from 900 M to entering home straight, did well to hang onto a place in the straight.
Went forward as usual, 1L back in 2nd out 2-wide from 800 M to final turn, led inside the final furlong but denied victory in final stride.
With cover and better than midfield 3Ls from the speed until the home turn, steadily retreated.
Checked at the 900 M when worse than midfield, shuffled back to 6Ls last entering last 400 M, one-paced thereafter.
Led by 1L at the 900 M, same margin clear turning for home but headed just inside the furlong pole and one-paced to wind up.
Slowest away as usual, 6Ls back in 9th initially, marginally closer turning for home but never any better than midfield.
Worse than midfield about 6Ls off pace on the rails through the first two-thirds of the race, unbalanced 200 M out, always held.
3-back the fence 4Ls off in 6th leaving back straight and same turning in, found a gap inside final 200 M and overhauled SUPER RED on the line. (Questioned for improved performance.)
Didn't break well and checked in rear 7Ls off pace at the 900 M, 5Ls adrift turning for home, never likely to make a telling impact.
Crossed from wide gate to box-seat on leader's back through to the final two furlongs, found nothing off the bit, no excuses.
Led by 1L at the 800 M, maintained a break before being headed soon after straightening, dropped out rapidly, later found breathing abnormally. (Questioned.)
Slowly away, 4-back the fence along the back, 6Ls back at halfway and 4Ls off at top of home straight, always held from the top four bracket.
3-back the fence 3Ls off the speed leaving back straight, pressured to retain this proximity entering home straight, petered out.
4Ls back in 7th out 3-wide no cover at the 800 M, closer but ridden along turning for home, very one-paced in the home straight.
3Ls back in midfield with cover at the 800 M, eased to the front 300 M and looked the winner, didn't find much more and headed by HUSSLER final 50 M.
Enjoyed 'one-out-one-back' spot in 4th about 2Ls back until final bend, 5th at the 200 M but stayed on well enough for 3rd without troubling front pair.
2-wide and no more than 1L back in 2nd until the home turn, half a length behind GOOD STRIKE 300 M out, got back on top of that rival inside final 50 M.
Got loose before start, box-seated in 3rd just over 1L behind leader until home turn, held up until the 200 M when 4th, not a bad debut all considered.
In last or one from rear throughout while at least 8Ls from the pace.
Flipped over in paddock and very wound up before the start, always rearward at least 5Ls or 6Ls from the pace.
Got loose before start, raced ungenerously while hanging out through first half around midfield, offered little in the home straight.
Went back from widest gate, 8Ls last at the 800 M, 5Ls back in 9th turning for home, one-paced.
Midfield, 3-1/2Ls behind the good pace 3-wide, progressed steadily 200 M and ran 3rd.
Rolled forward, 1L off the good pace, raced 3-wide no cover throughout, flattened in straight.
Very slow away, at rear, 8Ls off the good pace on the rails, progressed steadily 300 M.
Pushed to take the rail and led by 1L at good pace, hung on strongly until last few strides, just missed win by a short head.
Pushed to sit in midfield, 3Ls off the good pace 2-wide, no turn of foot, just held ground in straight.
Eased back, 6Ls behind the good pace 2-wide, made ground steadily 200 M.
Never competitive at back, tailed out.
Settled 1-1/2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, closed the race off strongly and won by a narrow margin.
Pushed to obtain the box seat, good pace, soon dropped off 400 M.
Bumped shortly after start, hard ridden early but failed to muster, 4-1/2Ls off the good pace along the fence, no progress.
Hard ridden forward, 1L off the good pace, raced 4-wide throughout and lost too much ground, ran on well to the line.
Settled in 4th within a striking distance of 2Ls off the speed, cantered to lead over 200 M out, won going away.
Began awkwardly losing considerable ground, always struggling at the back.
Began moderately, gradually recovered to make running from 1400 M, held lead to 400 M, soon dropped out.
Soon prominent, settled one back in 3rd on rails, baulked for a run until late at 250 M, responded fairly to just hang on for 2nd.
Began fairly, settled just behind midfield on rails, similar turning in, fought on steadily along rails, never nearer.
Began fairly from a poor draw, travelled in a 1-out-1-back position to straight, hit front momentarily 400 M out before tiring quickly.
Jumped slowly, travelled towards rear to straight, kept on same pace without quickening.
Settled in forward of midfield, responded well inside final 250 M, nearest at finish.
Broke well from middle draw, soon taken back to midfield, similar turning in, ran on steadily under pressure to narrowly miss the placegetters.
Began well from a poor draw, raced wide without cover in rear of midfield or worse down far side, widest runner turning in, fought on steadily down straight, did best work late.
Settled one from last, no better turning in, shifted out for a run when straightening, made only modest progress down centre of straight without threatening.
Always in touch, loomed up alongside the eventual 2nd 300 M out, kept on strongly to score under top weight.
Settled in a prominent position just off the pace, unable to keep up from 400 M, folded rapidly passing 200 M. (Subsequently retired.)
Began awkwardly and lost ground, rushed along to a position behind midfield 4Ls behind leader, found very little when placed under pressure, no extra passing 200 M.
Standard jump, raced in the rear against the stands' rail, 6Ls down inside 400 M but never picked up at any stage.
Went forward to set a decent pace down the middle of track, had every chance but not able to sustain run when the race got serious, headed near 300 M and gradually weakened in the run to the line.
Well enough away and was handily placed behind leaders, didn't find a change in pace when asked, weakened inside 200 M.
Settled in mid-division on the outside of field, picked up OK in the final 400 M although unable to match the principals.
Assumed a rearward position one off the stands' rail, shaken up passing 500 M but failed to respond, eased close home. (Mucus.)
Quickly into stride and prominently placed in a position towards the stands' rail, collared by the eventual winner near 300 M but kept battling to the line. Narrowly beaten.
Held a midfield position on the stands' rail 3Ls back, couldn't go with the leaders as tempo quickened inside 400 M, remained one-paced to the finish.
Took cover in midfield 3Ls off the pace, ran on steadily inside 300 M but couldn't really threaten the first three.
Slightly slow out, gradually improved to be 2Ls behind leader passing 400 M, stuck on well to claim 3rd in what was a promising debut.
Away fairly, assumed ideal spot 1 out 1 back, had every chance in run despite a strong speed, didn't quicken in straight and just held ground late.
Began smartly, drove through to hold front despite being headed, used a bit on strong speed, kicked on turning, found plenty and was never seriously challenged. (Improved performance questioned.)
Fast into stride, shaded leader racing outside speed throughout, did share of work on genuine speed with pressure from outside horses, kept on respectably but couldn't match winner final 200 M.
Jumped only fairly, drifted back to race 3 wide at rear, had cover but never really travelling, didn't make any impression in the straight.
No early pace, ended up 4 to 5Ls away on rails, back with last few but saved ground on rails on bend, made steady progress in straight to make frame.
Standard jump, ended up at rear 4 to 5Ls away in 2 wide line, had a fair run to bend, taken 4 wide turning, made many lengths down outside to be nearest on line.
Bounced out, pressed on when caught wide, no better than 4 wide without cover throughout, challenging on circle, used too much petrol and weakened understandably.
Out in line, ended up in midfield in running line, 3 to 4Ls back on bend, in traffic and held up until 150 M, didn't close off when clear and struggled late.
Moderate beginning, held a midfield role but forced to race 3 wide with cover 2 to 3Ls back, travelled well on bend, crowded a bit turning, kept on to 200 M before run ended.
Showed usual speed, pressed on to take closer order, unable to slot in and raced 3 wide without cover in duel for lead, did plenty of work to bend, faded out in straight.
Out in line, ended up in midfield but raced 4 wide in middle stages, forced to cover too much ground, didn't find at business end.
Jumped well, pressed on to hold spot behind leader, did some work on back of useful pace, had every chance to bend, just kept on at same pace late.
Amongst first few to break, rolled forward to take up running, set decent tempo early, held narrow lead turning, soon headed and didn't show much fight, faded final 300 M.
Taken back from widest alley, raced at rear 9Ls from top end, aided by pace, saved ground on turning, made steady progress along inside without really threatening.
Standard getaway, settled 6 to 7Ls back in running line, still behind half of field on bend, shifted wider on turning in, closed to 200 M, however action shouldered late and dropped off.

Out with first few, tucked in to 1 out 1 back position, trailled well 2Ls off speed, no excuses to bend, challenged with eventual winner on turning, was a place chance but peaked on run inside 200 M and just held ground late.
Failed to muster, ended up 8 to 9Ls back in running line, helped by pace, shifted 3 wide on bend, came widest in straight, made some late ground from impossible spot.
Began reasonably, taken back when unable to slot in, settled 3 wide 5Ls back in run, covered ground to bend, struggling on turning, gradually faded out in straight.
Lost ground on jumping, mustered to race 4Ls back in running line, had fair trip although did race ungenerously, niggled on bend, found nothing in straight.
Fair to begin, pressed forward but trapped 3 wide without cover 1L away, used plenty to bend, drifted after turning, well beaten soon after, eased down.
Out well, took ideal spot behind leader, used some early with pace on, still there on turning, didn't pick up when pressured and steadily weakened out.
Jumped moderately, restrained and ended up 6Ls away on rails, saved ground throughout, improved between horses turning, made very good progress in straight to narrowly miss out on place.

Slow into stride, settled behind midfield 7Ls back in running line, travelled well but shifted back approaching bend, near last and shifted in to improve, made remarkable ground final 200 M to take place.
Out with rest, settled 5Ls back in midfield, travelled well between horses on bend, into mix soon after straightening, kept chasing but just failed to catch winner final 50 M.

Began nicely showed plenty of speed to take early lead, checked to travel outside leader, relaxed well in run, moved up to challenge leaving bend, took over soon at 400 M, fought strongly to defy challengers.
Reasonable break, pushed up to race 4Ls off lead in midfield, had ideal run throughout, continued to improve turning in, made steady progress along inside in straight to be nearest on line.
Settled better than midfield and never far off the pace, shaken up rounding the home turn but found nothing in reserves. Eased 100 M from home.
Settled on the fence in a position behind midfield, shuffled back down the back straight and was last turning in, had 6Ls to make up but didn't pick up at all.
Vied for the early lead before settling in 3rd passing 1600 M, gradually shuffled back to a midfield position down the back straight, steadied near 350 M but stayed on well to claim 4th.
Given a waiting ride in a 2-wide position towards the rear, had 5Ls to make up turning in, made some headway but never looked likely from that position.
Eased to the rear on jumping, over 8Ls down in middle stages and was given a few reminders down the back straight, swung wide into straight and was again disappointing in the finish.
Broke well, soon took hold of a 2-wide position in midfield, pushed wide from 1300 M and went forward tracking leader, hit front early in straight but couldn't sustain effort over the final 200 M.
Behind leaders in early stages before drifting back to midfield, looked promising early in straight but found no extra inside final 200 M.
Travelled pleasingly in mid-division 7Ls back, crept closer approaching the home turn, commenced his run from 400 M, kept on well under pressure to register a maiden win.
Used up early to obtain a forward position, sat in 3rd in middle stages, under serious pressure passing 500 M and was beaten early in straight. (Jockey questioned.)
Slotted into a 2-wide spot better than midfield but raced without cover in major parts of the race, well placed turning in and plugged on for 3rd.
Attacked the lead from the outset but was caught wide making the 1st turn, crossed to lead near 1600 M, outpaced from 300 M as stamina appeared to give out.

Drifted back to a rearward position, not suited to the slow tempo and over-raced in the middle stages, caught wide turning in before coming with a sweeping late run inside 300 M to get within a neck of the winner.
Raced outside the leader before crossing to the fence and assuming the lead at the 500 M. Weakened over the concluding stages.
Enjoyed the run of the race behind the leader on the paint. Peeled out near the 500 M and improved nicely but came up marginally short after having every chance.
Settled 3 back the fence. Had every chance.
Jumped well and speared forward but was caught wide and settled 3 deep with cover midfield. Struggled in the straight.
Travelled worse than midfield 2-wide with cover. Closed off soundly.
Forced to work for the majority of the trip, 3 deep without cover with the front markers. Managed to cross to race 1 off as joint leader by the 500 M, however faded in the run to the line.
Landed midfield 1 off with cover. Worked home well to finish in the frame.
Raced on the back of the speed 2-wide with cover. Rolled out making the turn at the 500 M coursing 3 deep without cover. Not likely from that point on.
Raced behind midfield the fence. Whacked away at the same speed in the final stretch.
From a wide gate was allowed to settle in last position. Was stoked along from about the 450 M and swung wide turning for home mowing down rivals in the shadows of the post.
Went forward to lead along the fence. Commenced to tire near the 500 and was a spent force soon after finishing tailed out. (To Trial.)
Travelled in 2nd last position along the paint. Never quickened at the business end.
Settled behind midfield on rails. 3Ls away off the turn. Kept one-paced in the straight.
4-wide at rear. Shifted 2-wide and was 4Ls back entering the home straight. Made some late headway thereafter.
Pushed early to race 2-wide better than midfield. Urged to maintain position 500 M out. Weakened inside final furlong.
3-wide without cover behind the speed. Pressed on in the straight but failed to pick up.
Eased to sit at rear early. Improved 2-wide at the bend and was 2 to 3Ls off the pace turning for home. Made a strong run in the straight. Just nosed out on line.
Began well but unable to work across. Trapped 5-wide without cover at midfield through to the home turn. Just held ground in the straight.
Bumped at start and was crowded for room early stages. Ran 4-wide without cover at midfield and was 5Ls down making the home turn. Faded inside 150 M.
Away in line and trapped wide early. Slotted into a midfield position, 4-wide with cover just before the turn. Came widest and was 6Ls down swinging for home. Made substantial ground in the straight.
Good early speed. Disputed lead 800 M out. Checked at 200 M. Stayed on thereafter to make frame.
Ridden to occupy a prominent spot. Responded well in the straight and ran on strongly closing stages. Nearest at finish.
Ridden early. Disputed lead 800 M out. Hit front 150 M. Just clung on for the win by the narrowest margin. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began awkwardly and trailed field. Got closer on rails rounding the bend and was 6Ls back on straightening. Failed to follow through thereafter.
Disputed the pace out 2-wide initially, 1L back in 2nd off last turn, briefly lead inside the final 200 M before the winner swept past about 75 M out.
Handy in 4th or 5th no worse than 2Ls or so from the speed until the 400 M, found zero under pressure.
Another poor run, 7Ls off pace initially and worse than midfield and same taking final bend, ceded further ground.
7Ls back in 10th at the 800 M, slipped further behind on point of home bend, never in touch.
A neck back in 4th out 3-wide but with cover at 1000 M, eased back to 5th but niggled along on the circle, one-paced to conclude.
Pressed on from widest gate out 4-wide no cover to cross to lead by 1L at the 600 M, headed inside the 200 M and just about clung onto 4th place.
Always worse than midfield and 3-wide no cover the back straight, 8Ls back turning for home, remained like that.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Slowest away, one from rear 8Ls off pace at halfway, quickened up nicely in the straight, won with more in hand than bare margin suggests.
Taken back from wide gate, rearward at least 7Ls from the speed through to last turn, plodded past a few spent forces in the straight. (Tactic questioned.)
Best away, led by 1L before handing up lead to box-seat 2Ls off in 3rd until home turn, had every chance in the straight, narrowly failed to get 2nd.
About 5Ls off pace and 3-back the rails in midfield through to straightening, no impression.
4Ls back in midfield at the 1000 M, 3-wide no cover from the 500 M, briefly threatened when 1L back in 4th at the 200 M, run peaked.
Travelled well 3-back on rails in mid-division between 3Ls and 4Ls from pace through to last bend, quickened up to lead 100 M out, all out to hang on.
Lost ground at start, about 5Ls back in 9th at halfway, 4-wide no cover from the 600 M, finished off very strongly, just failed, vastly improved run.
Slow out, in front rank but caught 3-wide no cover through first half of the race, 1L back in 2nd on straightening, soon fizzled out.
Handily placed 2-wide and 2Ls back in 5th at the 1000 M, a little further back in midfield off last curve, dropped out quite tamely.
4-back the rails in 8th or so about 5Ls off pace at 1000 M, shuffled back a little before home turn, still finished off strongly along the rails for 3rd.
Best away but handed up the lead to box-seat at 1200 M and relaxed on fence in 3rd until the last corner, didn't find enough on the bridle.
Broke well from wide gate to cross to lead by the 1200 M, 1L clear through to the last bend, headed around the furlong pole, yielded ground.
Pressed forward from wide gate to be 2-wide and 1L off pace from 1200 M to 500 M, all out to be upsides 200 M out, swamped late on.
Slowest out, taken back, one from rear 7Ls off pace at halfway, made some late headway but never quite troubled the principals.
Taken back to race 6Ls back in 10th at the 1000 M, still with the most of the field ahead of him turning for home, kept chasing them.
8Ls off pace in rear at the 1000 M, still at the tail but a little closer off last turn, finished off well down the centre of the track and not far off in 4th.
Bumped start, dropped to rear, 6Ls off the good pace on the rails, ran on ok last 400 M, blocked 200 M, just ran on.
Eased to sit behind midfield with cover, 4-1/2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, checked 800 M, made ground steadily 200 M and ran 2nd without threatening the winner.
Hard ridden to obtain a midfield spot, 3-1/2Ls off the good pace, trapped 3 to 4-wide throughout, lacked turn of foot, but still ran on ok despite losing so much ground on bends.
Hard ridden early to keep up with the front group, 3Ls off the good pace along the fence, checked badly 800 M, ran on well to the line and grabbed 3rd.
Pushed to occupy the box seat, checked 800 M, ran on until 100 M emptied.
Behind midfield along the fence, 4-1/2Ls off the good pace, checked badly 800 M, ran on fairly in straight, again checked 100 M.
Bumped start, eased to rear, 7Ls off the good pace 2 to 3-wide, progressed steadily 200 M.
Prominent, 2Ls behind the good pace 2-wide, ran on until 100 M flattened.
Pushed to take the rail and led by 2Ls at good pace, drifted away after straightening and scored easily.
Eased to sit in midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, checked badly 800 M, lack turn of foot in final stages, just ran on ok.
Eased back, 5Ls off the good pace, trapped 3 to 4-wide and lost too much ground, progressed steadily final 250 M.
Hard ridden early, 4Ls off the good pace, raced 4-wide in midfield throughout and lost too much ground, flattened 500 M.
Began with others, raced wide in midfield to straight, ran on down centre of track, however, not able to be ridden out behind runners closing stages.
Began moderately, settled in last few on rails, took closer order around the bend, fought on steadily to just fail to get up on line.
Niggled at early, settled one-out-one-back in joint 3rd, kept on steadily in straight without quickening.
Began only fairly, settled in forward of midfield on rails, hung in badly and a difficult ride in straight checking off heels about 150 M out, but kept on strongly to finish.
Began from the widest barrier, raced wide without cover behind midfield down far side, similar position turning in, made good impression down straight, did best work late.
Broke well from a high draw, joint leader to straight, gained narrow advantage turning in, unable to sustain effort and swamped inside final 50 M.
Settled in midfield, responded well in straight to gain upper hand closing stages.
Broke well to lead but soon joined by eventual 4th, came under pressure after straightening, soon yielded ground.
Began fairly, ridden along for pace before settling one back on rails, ran out of room inside final 200 M, not fully tested.
Soon found himself well behind, no closer turning into straight, made significant progress down centre of track, never nearer.
Slow out, making headway when badly checked 600 M out dropping to last, made no recovery in straight.
Went forward to chase the pace but was caught wide on the first turn, one out one back from leader rounding the home bend but dropped away quickly inside 300 M.
Patiently ridden in a rearward position 6 to 7Ls behind the leaders, waited with until 350 M and finished strongly from off the pace.

Held a position in midfield early but was gradually shuffled back towards the rear, under serious pressure passing 600 M but unable to find his stride, eased 150 M from home. (Jockey questioned / Unacceptable performance.)
Showed early speed to cross over and took them along under a steady tempo, had an uncontested lead to straight, kept on until succumbing inside the final 150 M.
Assumed a 3-wide position in midfield after beginning from the widest barrier, shifted wider passing 400 M to go forward, responded fairly to pressure and could never make his presence felt.
Crossed to the rail under a positive ride, raced close to the pace throughout, well placed turning in but couldn't find another gear, outpaced from 200 M.

Jumped well and soon grabbed the inside rail, 3Ls back in 6th making the home turn, ran on strongly down the inside and looked to have the race sewn up until the winner swooped late. Fine effort in defeat.

Ordinary jump, guided to a handy position not far off the leaders, had to be urged along passing 700 M, charged down the center of track and looked a winner 200 M out, but unable to sustain effort close home.
Along the fence in midfield early but shifted wide to stride forward entering the back straight, unbalanced near 600 M, had his chance but unable to muster speed. No extra inside 200 M.
Able to hold a rail position in midfield with the help of an inside draw, shifted wide to improve passing 500 M, produced a sustained burst inside 300 M to ultimately win this in determined fashion.
Slow to begin, held up in 2nd last along the rail, 7Ls to make up passing 400 M , picked up only fairly down the inside and was never threatening.
Away well enough and drifted back to the rear as expected, over 10Ls behind leader down the back straight, came out of the pack to finish best of the rest but was given too much to do.
Close enough in early stages but struggled to keep up passing 600 M, never picked up.
Well enough away, prominent early but was outpaced from midway, found disappointingly little when asked, eased close home.
Behind midfield early but gradually crept up to a handy spot approaching 400 M, fought on gamely to claim 3rd but could not quite match the first two.
2 to 3Ls in behind the leader, came under pressure 500 M out and was unable to go on, faded inside 200 M.
Prominently placed in the firing line, battled on willingly inside 300 M despite hanging out in the run to the line.
Always in the front rank and travelled well under restraint, went in pursuit of the leader 350 M out, hit front 150 M and took this with something in hand.
Poor start, severely checked near 900 M, settled at the back of the main group, found little under pressure and dropped away inside 200 M.
Slightly slow out and obtained a midfield position one off the stands' rail, into clear 400 M out, stayed on but was never going to get there.
Standard break, within 2 to 3Ls of the leader, asked for a forward move inside 400 M but ran on at one pace to the line.
Always in touch, crossed to lead on the nearside approaching halfway, kept on well inside 400 M, pulled nicely clear of others but unable to withstand the finishing effort of the winner inside 150 M.
In midfield towards the outside of group, ran on only fairly inside 400 M, hung out after 200 M had nothing to offer over the final stages.
Slow to begin, didn't muster early speed and soon became detached in last, had 10Ls to make up inside 400 M, never involved.
Rolled along the stands' rail one back from leader, responded farily when asked to go 350 M out, one paced finish only.
On jumping blundered and became badly unbalanced settling behind midfield. Never really likely.
Shared leading duties and looked the likely winner after stealing a break near the furlong but peaked on its run short of the line.
Raced handy to the leaders towards the outer rail, commenced to tire quickly inside the furlong finishing well back.
Began poorly with its head up, then was crowded shortly after the jump, settling back in the field. Closed off soundly.
Travelled at the rear of the field. Raced towards the middle of the course but failed to close off.
Settled just behind the speed on the outside rail. Copped a check near the 300 M, recovered satisfactorily to maintain a gallop right to the wire.
Showed good early speed to travel with the front runners however proved difficult to settle early and faded after the 300 M.
Camped on the back of the speed. Had every chance.
Settled in the 2nd half of the field before shifting out and making a forward move inside the 400 M. Tracked the leaders from that point and ran on well to gain the upper hand close to home.
Overaced as equal leader and was gassed in the latter stages.
Began well then settled midfield along the outside fence, couldn't maintain the pace and struggled over the concluding stages.
Raced towards the centre of the track, midfield. Kept up a strong run to snare third position.
Urged to maintain a position behind midfield early stages. 2-wide 5Ls down at the bend. Picked up moderately on straightening and was hampered at 300 M. Ran on steadily when clear.
Began well. Eased to sit 2-wide 3Ls behind the leader 1000 M out. Shifted 4-wide and was 4Ls down turning in. Kept giving in the straight. Just nailed right the line to miss out on 4th.
Quickly away. Eased to obtain a prominent spot through to the home straight. Remained in front at 300 M but was unable to turn up a notch.
Well enough away. Raced 2-wide 2Ls behind the speed 1200 M out. Put in a sustained effort inside 300 M to chase the quinella pair and was nearest at finish.
Raced 3-wide towards rear after start. 6Ls off and came widest swinging for home. Covered substantial ground in the straight to make frame.
Slowly into stride. Taken to race 2-wide 7Ls back through to the home turn. Produced good late effort in the straight.
Raced 4-wide behind midfield without cover early stages. Slipped to rear before straightening and finished tailed out.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Taken back from a high draw early stages. 5Ls behind the pace on rails from 1100 M. Took inside run rounding the bend and was 3Ls down on straightening. Just held ground thereafter.
Away in line. Sat nicely on rails and within 3Ls of the pace through to the home turn. Made up ground steadily in the straight and caught leader inside final 50 M to win cosily.
Pressed early. Took lead on fence 1100 M out. Held a 1-1/2L advantage into home straight. Hung on well but couldn't fend off the eventual winner inside final 50 M.
Last out. Raced 2-wide 5Ls back 1100 M out. Taken wide on straightening and finished off fairly.
Trailed 7 to 8Ls on fence early stages. Took closer order approaching the home turn but failed to follow through in the straight.
2-wide in a handy position through to the straight but found nothing when asked. Plodded on home inside final furlong.
Best away, midfield with cover 4Ls off speed until final turn, briefly threatened to win 300 M out, one-paced in 3rd inside final 200 M.
3-wide with cover in midfield 5Ls off pace down back straight, pressured to stay even this close off final bend, tepid conclusion.
4-back on the rails at least 5Ls from the speed throughout, never on terms.
Always rearward and pressured, unbalanced hitting the rail 1100 M out, no room and steadied 200 M out, never a genuine threat.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Slightly worse than midfield 4Ls or 5Ls off speed through to final turn, recovered minor late ground for 5th but no real danger overall.
Slow out, 6Ls back in 12th at halfway, struck heels and lost ground 500 M out, always well held.
Box-seated on the rails 2Ls off pace initially, hard pressed to stay in touch taking last turn, weak finish especially given the soft run.
3Ls back in 5th out 2-wide at 1000 M, soon niggled along but responded to pressure even if he could only reach winner's hindquarters.
Pressed forward from widest gate to dispute early pace, 1L back in 2nd at the 1000 M, hard at work to stay in touch off last turn, faded.
Led on the rails by 1L at the 1000 M, still in front and going well entering straight, kept up to his work to score readily.
Taken back as usual, 8Ls last at the 1000 M and still in rear turning for home, ran on past spent forces in the straight for a never-nearer 4th.
Very wide and without cover throughout, had little hope given his limitations after the tough passage, eased final 200 M.
3-wide no cover at halfway when over 2Ls off pace, weakened in the home straight after the extra work, eased final 100 M.
2-wide in 5th about 3Ls from speed through to final bend, quickened up well to lead about 150 M out before being overhauled inside final 50 M.
Always about 5Ls off the pace and behind midfield, ceded further ground in the last 200 M.
Slow to begin, one from rear about 6Ls back initially, keen turning for home and held up until the 200 M, stayed on, unlucky not to get 3rd.
Very wide without cover down the back, disputed 2nd out 3-wide no cover on the circle, gave way after the tough trip in the final furlong.
2-wide and 1L back in 2nd or 3rd through to the last turn, upsides with every chance at the 200 M, couldn't sustain but still placed 3rd.
4Ls off pace in midfield at the 800 M, hung out inside final furlong when a little tight for room but always outpaced by the principals.
Towards rear about 5Ls off early pace, crept closer turning for home, stayed on well to lead inside the final 50 M.
Fractious in gates and lost 4Ls at the start, 6Ls last turning for home, never really got into it.
Led by 1L on the rails through to the home turn, headed by a few at around the furlong pole and soon slipped out of contention.
Disputed early pace on the fence and soon box-seated, struggling to retain this proximity 600 M out, fell away.
3-wide no cover in midfield leaving back straight, pressured to keep up soon after and very weak in the home straight.
Left wide no cover vying for early lead, eased back 4Ls off pace at halfway, slipped further behind in the last 400 M.
Slow away, hard ridden to take a midfield spot, 4-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the slow tempo, ran on ok in final stages.
Eased back and took rail, 8Ls off the leader, harmed by the slow early sectionals, no turn of foot in final stages.
Eased to sit 1-1/2Ls behind the lead 2-wide, benefited by the slow tempo, just ran on for 3rd without any threat to the winner.
Pushed to occupy the box seat, suited by the slow tempo, lacked room top straight, however no turn of foot when clear.
Eased to sit in midfield, 5-1/2Ls off the leader 3-wide, not suited by the slow tempo, no turn of foot in straight.
Slow away, pushed to hold the rail in midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leader, not suited by the slow tempo, soon weakened 400 M.
Secured a more prominent position, 3Ls behind the slow pace 2-wide, closed the race off strongly 250 M to run 2nd and clear rest of the field.
Slow away and lost considerable ground, eased to rear and crossed towards rails, 10Ls off the leader, dashed well 200 M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Very slow away, hard ridden to keep up in midfield, not suited by slow pace, never competitive.
Took rail easily and led by 1-1/2Ls at advantageous slow early sectionals, kicked away 300 M to score its first victory without using much fuel in the tank.
Hard ridden early but didn't muster, 10Ls off the leader at rear, trapped 3 to 4-wide and lost ground, harmed by the slow pace, no progress.
Eased to sit in midfield, 4Ls off the leader 3-wide, not suited by the slow tempo, ran on well to the line.
Slow away, behind midfield, 5-1/2Ls off the leader, trapped 4-wide throughout and lost too much ground, harmed by the slow pace, dropped off quickly 500 M.
Eased back, further bad than usual 8Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, harmed by the slow pace, ran on ok in straight.
Began slowly, remained in last few to straight, found nothing.
Niggled at early, settled in forward of midfield on rails, could only keep on under pressure at the same pace in straight.
Settled just worse than midfield, wide into straight, made modest progress under pressure without threatening.
Settled in 2L 5th within striking distance, gradually came to challenge after straightening, fought on steadily only to gain upper hand final strides.
Settled just in rear of midfield, made steady headway down inside of straight without threatening.
Settled in midfield, switched out for a clear run upon straightening, ran on steadily inside final 300 M without threatening.
Close up 3-wide without cover, similar in 4th position turning in, yielded ground gradually.
Refused to jump and took no part.
Began moderately, settled mainly 3-wide in midfield, similar turning in, found nil in straight.
Settled one-back mainly in 3rd on rails, kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Settled in last few, found nothing under pressure in straight.
Soon took up running, broke 2Ls clear upon straightening, tiring when overhauled inside final 150 M.
Broke well from a high draw, gradually settled outside leader, fought on to hold every chance inside final 200 M only to be outlasted at the finish.
Soon settled at the back after beginning from a poor draw, trailed the field most of the way. (Tactic questioned.)
Always in the firing line but raced a shade keen in early stages, briefly led inside 400 M, kept on before fading away close home.
Towards the rear 5Ls off the pace, appeared to struggle passing midway but stayed on OK towards the end.
Always in the front rank, crossed to race along the nearside rail 600 M out, unable to sustain effort passing 300 M, flattened out late on.
Slow to begin but quickly recovered, tucked in just behind leaders, accelerated well inside 400 M and had his chance but never looked like catching the winner.
Steadied on jumping, dropped back to the rear 6 to 7Ls off the leader, picked up OK from off the pace but never looked likely from that position.
In rearward throughout, had 5Ls to make up going into final 400 M, showed little dash and proved disappointing on this outing over an unsuited distance.
Behind midfield early but gradually moved up to be within one length of the leader going into 400 M, responded well and kept on stoutly for 3rd.
Settled just behind leaders under restraint, couldn't accelerate with them as the race got serious passing halfway. Disappointing.
Began awkwardly, shaken up early to hold a nearside rail position behind midfield, 4Ls down 400 M out but found little for pressure. No impression.
Showed good early speed to be in front passing 800 M, on the bridle to 350 M, quickened well once asked and was able to sustain his effort to the line.
Tracked leader along the nearside rail, switched out to challenge from 500 M but responded fairly, no extra close home.
Niggled along from the outset but couldn't muster speed and struggled to keep up, ran poorly inside 400 M over a trip that appeared not to suit.
Drawn on the farside but was steadily tacked across to race down the centre of track, close enough early but looked in trouble passing midway, weakened rapidly from 300 M. (Jockey questioned.)

Settled in midfield off the moderate early pace, in pursuit of the leaders passing midway, ran on inside 200 M. Posted a decent first up effort although never a posed serious threat to the first four.
Moderate beginning, ended up in midfield 5 to 6Ls away, raced 3 wide with cover, throughout, improved on bend, came 4 wide turning, improved to 200 M before emptied.

Reasonable jump, went forward but unable to slot in, forced to race 3 wide without cover, did work 2Ls off speed throughout, didn't give in when pressure applied and battled respectably for an improved finish.
Began well, pushed up to hold leaders back, had dream trail thereafter 2Ls off speed, right there on turning, challenged at 300 M, couldn't match dash of first two final 200 M.
Faded back to rear from an awkward draw, 9 to 10Ls back racing 2 wide throughout, last turning and made no serious impression in straight.
Well away, went on to take ideal 1 out 1 back spot, travelled strongly in middle stages, urged along approaching bend, didn't pick up and just held ground in straight.
Ordinary break, positioned 7 to 8Ls away on rails, used little in mid-section, still 6Ls down turning, kept to inside and made gradual progress to be nearest on line.
Away well enough, slotted in behind speed 3Ls or so from lead in running line, had easy time in mid-section, held up turning to 300 M, made gradual headway when clear final 200 M.

No early pace, faded back to race 7Ls off speed 3 wide with cover, gradually improved on bend, shifted wide on turning, let down with a strong sprint to hit lead inside 200 M, kept on for another strong win.
No early pace, soon at rear, raced 8 to 9Ls back on rails, didn't improve mid race as is often the case, well back turning, unable to pick up in straight and struggled late.
Out with first few, continued on to race at leaders girth, enjoyed a fair run in mid-section, soon took over after straightening, led only briefly as lacked extra gear and just kept on late.
Began with more purpose, went forward and led soon after, overraced and kept speed genuine throughout, struggled on turning and dropped out quickly.
Away in line, positioned in midfield 6Ls away in running line, shifted back approaching bend, angled wide in straight and made some minor progress to 200 M before run ended.

Drifted back from gate, raced 8 to 9Ls from top end, was 3 wide at rear with cover throughout, followed eventual winner on bend, switched widest in straight and closed strongly to just miss, well clear of 3rd.
Checked early, assumed a midfield role 5Ls from front runners, had soft trip in mid-section, lacked usual finish and just battled away in stretch. (Mucopus.)

Faded back soon after start, raced in rear division 6Ls off speed, had fair run throughout, well back between horses turning, weaved passage through and sprouted wings over final 100 M to draw away with some in hand.
First to hit ground, set standard sections upon taking lead, shaded by outside horse on bend, headed on straightening, kept on respectably to be not far away in finish.
Began well, took prime position 1 out 1 back, used little in run, appreciated easy sections, right there on bend, challenged soon after straightening, battled strongly final 300 M to just miss 2nd.
Began with rest, ended up in midfield 3 to 4Ls away in 2 wide line, had trouble free run to bend, steadied on turning didn't find when required once clear and just held ground in straight.
Taken back from an awkward draw, raced 7Ls away at tail, still last turning in, battled away making very little progress.
Moderate jump, settled in last few 6Ls or so from lead racing 3 wide with cover, still well back and had job to do turning, kept giving and made fair ground without threatening.
Lost ground at jump, regathered to race 5Ls back on rails, had a fair run in mid-section, improved along inside turning, made no serious headway.
Began OK, unable to slot in from an outside draw, had cover racing 3 wide 5Ls back, improved approaching turn, kept on soundly in straight holding ground without really looking likely.
Ordinary break, overraced and moved forward to race 3 wide without cover at 100 M, 3Ls off lead on bend, hard run took toll in straight and faded out thereafter.
Amongst first few out, pushed on to hold ideal spot behind leaders, tracked well to bend, into clear turning and challenged strongly, hit lead inside 200 M but run down in concluding stages.
Out in line, showed usual pace to take position outside leader, travelled comfortably with standard sections, shaded leader on bend, took over on straightening, kept to task and lost place late.
Began with rest, ended up 4Ls off speed in midfield, no excuses in run, saved ground on turning, struggling on turning and found little under pressure, weakened 200 M.
No early speed, situated near to rear 7Ls off speed on rails, always rearward and struggling on turning, made no impression in straight.
Slightly slow to muster, settling in midfield when met interference approaching home bend, similar in midfield around the bend and into the straight, fought on steadily without quickening.
Travelled just better than midfield, gradually weakened out of contention after straightening.

Jumped best from the widest draw gradually crossing to rails, shared the pace within a neck of leader around the bend, hit the front under pressure briefly inside 300 M but unable to sustain effort passing the 200 M mark.
Broke well from a high draw, settled in midfield or slightly worse, similar turning in, kept on before making moderate late headway inside final 200 M. (Abnormal breathing noise.) (Roarer.) (Lame.)
Began moderately, soon moved up to a prominent spot, gained slender lead around the bend, gradually weakened after straightening.
Travelled at the back, saved ground turning for home, kept on steadily down straight without threatening.
Began fairly, steadily shuffled back from a prominent position to be last few around the bend, made significant progress down grandstand side of straight to be nearest at finish.
Soon taken across to the rails behind the field, gradually moved up to settle in midfield, similar turning in, fought on steadily under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Began with others, settled just off the speed within 2Ls of pace, weakened under pressure in straight.
Began moderately, settled at the back, checked 1000 M, trailed the field into straight, ran past beaten runners closing stages.
Began fairly from the one draw, settled within striking distance of 2Ls off the pace, came to challenge inside final 400 M hitting front over 150 M out, won readily.
Raced wide without cover behind midfield far side, equally wide in midfield around the bend, no response under pressure in the run home.
Began fairly, settled slightly worse than midfield, given reminders turning in, ran home one-paced.
Behind midfield early, made swift headway passing 1000 M to join leaders 3-wide around the bend, held every chance in straight and unable to find another gear in the final stages.
Went forward but was caught wide on the 1st turn, settled in 3rd down the back straight, struggled to hold his position passing 500 M, tailed off. (Subsequently retired.)
In a position better than midfield in early and middle stages, unbalanced and shuffled back near 600 M, finished off the race fairly but was never a danger.
In midfield 4Ls back but unable to slot in and remained wide throughout, responded fairly when pressed inside 500 M, no extra 200 M out. (Lame next day.)
Eased to the rear and was taken across to the rail, 8Ls behind leaders down the back straight but moved closer from 700 M, found little under pressure, emptied close home.
Sent to the front early and led them along on the fence at a steady tempo, gradually weakened after being headed near 300 M.
Reasonable jump from the inside draw, tracked leaders handily, travelled well throughout, held every chance and finished the race in fine style. Narrowly beaten.
Taken to a rear spot on the fence early but switched to 3-wide entering back straight, came widest to challenge, made some progress but could settle for a distant 4th only.
Held a position in midfield, saved ground along the fence, loomed up as the likely winner passing 300 M, kept on gamely to the line but was nailed close home.
Drifted back to last after a fine start, 8Ls off the pace in middle stages, shifted out under pressure inside 300 M and never really got into contention.
Slow into stride, gradually improved his position round the outside of field to be 4th entering the back straight, briefly led inside 500 M but had nothing left in tank coming off the bend.

Began awkwardly, patiently ridden behind midfield in early and middle stages, gradually maneuvered out for a clear passage near 600 M, made late surge inside 200 M and got up to win just before the line.
Up with the leaders but travelled keenly without cover, under serious pressure 400 M out, weakened rapidly turning in. (Unacceptable performance.)
Bumped at the start then, despite being ridden along, was slow to muster speed. Travelled wide and without cover in a midfield position thereafter. Never likely.
Raced midfield on the rails. Worked out into the clear turning for home and closed off soundly.
Was taken back from a wide barrier to settle with the backmakers. Closed off well without threatening.
Slow into stride, raced keenly behind midfield, 2 deep with cover. Struggled in the straight. After the race, Veterinary Officer said the horse had an intermittent displacement of the soft palate.
Raced behind midfield the fence. Made late headway without posing a serious challenge to the principals.
Settled in last position. Never quickened failing to pass any runners.
Ridden along early and landed one out one back. Peeled out rounding the home turn and maintained a good gallop right to the wire to score in nice fashion.
Raced midfield 2-wide with cover. Plugged away at the same pace in the run to the line.
Led along the fence. Couldn't sustain its effort and tired close to home.
Stalked the leader along the paint. Wasn't able to gain clear running for the majority of the straight.
Began awkwardly, settling towards the rear, 1 off with cover. Did not run on.
Parked outside the leader. Faded over the concluding stages.
Raced 2-wide within 3Ls of the pace through to the Rock. Ridden 500 M out when the tempo quickened. Kept making headway in the straight to make frame at the line.
Began well from a high draw. Raced 2-wide behind the speed from 1200 M. Disputed lead 500 M out. Hung on well in the straight but couldn't fend off the eventual winner closing stages.
Slow to begin. Raced 8Ls back on rails through to the Rock. 6Ls off and came widest swinging for home. Made up minor ground in the straight.

Good jump. Eased to a prominent spot 1300 M out. Urged from 500 M when the tempo quickened and shifted 4-wide turning in. Responded well in the straight and powered clear to claim victory closing stages.
Quickly into stride. Took lead on fence from 1300 M. Disputed lead 500 M out. Kept battling with the quinella pair until 100 M. Finished out of the frame just by a narrow margin.
Raced 2-wide 6Ls back through to the Rock. Hard ridden and got closer rounding the bend. No further improvement down the centre of the straight.
Raced within 4Ls of the pace on fence through to the home turn. Ran on well in the straight and was closest at finish.
Raced 2-wide 8Ls back early stages. Sprinted into the leading section passing 700 M and was 3-wide making the home turn. Just held ground thereafter without troubling the principals.
Slowly away. Raced 6Ls off the pace on fence through to the Rock. Urged at the bend when the tempo quickened but couldn't quite follow. No progress in the straight.
Trailed 10Ls on fence throughout. Never picked up.
Well enough away. Settled 2-wide within 5Ls of the pace through to the home straight. Ran on fairly thereafter.
Eased back from barrier 9, 10Ls last at the 600 M, always giving away too much ground to get seriously involved.
Slow out again, 4-back on the rails down the back, hard ridden and 6Ls down in 8th off last turn, one-paced.
3-wide no cover down the back straight in rear, always going to struggle given his limitations and being so wide and far back.
Slowest out, at least 7Ls from the speed throughout in rear.
2-wide and back in 8th about 5Ls off early speed, about 6Ls down entering home straight, recovered some fair late ground to 5th.
3-wide no cover early on, pressed on to race 2Ls back in 2nd at 800 M, further back in 3rd and pressured turning in, one-paced to wind up.
Best out and led by 1L on fence at the 1000 M, clear by between 1L and 2Ls before being headed inside final 100 M, had to settle for 3rd.
3-back the fence 4Ls off pace in midfield down back straight, still 3Ls down at the 200 M, finished off strongly to lead 50 M out and kept on.
In 5th or 6th between 3Ls and 5Ls from the pace through to final bend, stayed on okay without troubling the principals.
Box-seated on rails in 2nd at halfway, 1L back in 2nd at the 200 M, headed by winner 50 M out as soon as he overhauled the long-time leader, clear 2nd.
Nicely placed in 'one-out-one-back' position in 4th down the back, slipped further back on the circle, couldn't quite recover lost ground in straight.
Taken back from wide gate, 7Ls back in 9th turning for home, never really landed a blow.
Slow to muster pace and 3-wide no cover for much of the back straight, pressed forward 3Ls off pace turning in, soon beat a hasty retreat.
Led by 1L at first before opting to race 1L back in 2nd from 600 M to home bend, kept on well for pressure in straight, missed a place but still a good effort.
Box-seated 2Ls back in 3rd initially, 4Ls back in 5th turning in, rallied again strongly in the home straight, got close in 3rd.
3-wide but with cover and worse than midfield 6Ls off pace through to final turn, produced a telling burst down the centre to lead in final bounds.
One from rear at the 1000 M and 7Ls to make up from rear on straightening, finished off well, was closest at the line.
Awkward break losing ground, 6Ls back initially but never any better than midfield and chasing the majority of the field.
Disappointing run for a favourite, decent position in 6th at 800 M, but pressured to stay in touch before taking last turn, very weak in response. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Nice position in 3rd at the 800 M and still just 2Ls behind off last bend, had every chance to place, couldn't follow through.
Slowest out, 8Ls or so from the pace through to the final bend, recovered some decent late ground, nearest at the finish.
In 10th on the rails down the back straight, 7Ls adrift turning for home, ran on well late, never nearer.
3-back the rails in midfield 5Ls behind early pace and little closer turning for home, couldn't keep up in the straight.
Disputed early pace out 2-wide before leading by 1L at the 600 M, maintained a narrow break before being collared by the winner just before the line.
Pressed forward and shared the lead at good pace along the fence, ran on until 150 M when out of fuel.
Eased to sit in midfield, raced keenly, 3-1/2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, carried into 4-wide without cover in back straight and home bend, dropped off 400 M.
Settled in midfield early but trapped 3-wide, went forward and crossed to 2-wide, sat 1-1/2Ls off the good pace, soon weakened 450 M.
Very slow away, behind midfield, 6Ls off the good pace along the fence, made ground in straight, held up 100 M.
Eased to rear for cover and took rail, 8Ls off the good pace, still had plenty to do back between horses turning dashed well 200 M to win by a narrow margin.
Eased to sit in midfield, 5Ls off the good pace 2-wide, progressed steadily 300 M to grab 3rd.
Eased back, 7Ls off the good pace 2-wide, blocked most straight, kept making ground under limited clear running.
Hard ridden to share the lead at good pace, trapped 3-wide early and crossed to 2-wide at home bend, dominated 300 M, overhauled 50 M and flattened.
Settled nicely in box seat, closed the race off strongly and finished 2nd, just beaten by a neck.
Hard ridden early to obtain a midfield spot along the fence, 3Ls off the good pace, raced very keenly, swept forward 3-wide at home bend and lost ground, flattened in straight.
Pushed to hold the rail in front of midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the good pace, held ground in straight, checked 100 M.
Eased to rear, more than 10Ls behind the good pace on the rails, raced flat until 100 M to make some minor ground.

Worked his way across to lead passing winning post the first time, ceded advantage to KING ACRYLIC when on rails approaching 1000 M bend, still close up turning in, dropped out under pressure passing 200 M.
Gradually crossed from middle draw to be outside leader by stables bend, took up running by half a length far side, led the field to straight and soon joined, tired noticeably passing 200 M.
Settled in midfield, remained same into straight, went quite wide turning for home, ran home one-paced.
Sluggish at start and settled well back, hampered by unseated rider approaching straight, made no recovery in the run home.
Held up to race in midfield on rails, saved ground turning for home, only 2Ls down when field fanned out early in straight, kept on steadily without quickening.
Began restrained to race behind midfield, similar turning for home, made no show in the straight.
Began well, settled in 4th and never far off, went wide into straight, about 2Ls down when shaken up upon straightening, fought on determinedly down straight only to be denied narrowly.
Settled in last few after beginning from the widest barrier, widest runner turning in, made no impression down centre of the straight.

Began fairly, settled one back in 3rd on rails, as further as some 3Ls off the pace early far side, switched off the rails to challenge turning in, hit front under pressure 200 M out only to be collared close to finish.
Tucked in in rear of midfield after beginning from a poor draw, took some time to obtain a clear passage early in straight, finished off race well inside final 200 M to just get up.
Began awkwardly, remained in last few, unseated rider approaching home turn.
Began well, taken back to travel just better than midfield in 5th on rails, soon came to challenge upon straightening but could only produce modest impression without threatening.
Slow to begin, obtained a run along the fence in mid-division, finished ok down the inside but couldn't trouble the principals.
Given a patient ride in the rear, checked near 600 M and lost 1L, had enormous task in hand, finished with his usual good late effort but the winner had kicked clear.
Drifted back to a rearward position 5-6Ls behind leaders, raced wide throughout and covered extra ground on the turns, came widest in straight but never managed to get involved.
Away well enough, sat behind the fast leading trio in early stages, unbalanced on the turn near 600 M and lost some momentum, couldn't find his stride turning in and was eased down.
Slow to begin, crossed to a rearward position on the fence, had 5Ls to make up 400 M out, attempted a run down the inside but was held up over the final 150 M. Not properly tested.
Went forward as expected, led until 800 M, under pressure to keep up approaching home straight, battled on but finally gave out inside 150 M.
Slotted into a 2-wide position in midfield, into clear 300 M and did his best work inside 200 M after taking some time to get going.
Eased to a position behind midfield, shuffled further back down the back straight and had 5Ls to make up 400 M out, checked at a vital moment approaching 200 M, finished off the race fairly.

Jumped well, over-raced and vied for the early lead before taken back approaching 700 M, prominently placed in 2nd turning in, briefly hit front 200 M but had no answer to the winner's acceleration, flattened inside 50 M.
Had the help of the inside draw and travelled handily near the speed in 4th, switched out approaching home straight and came with a strong challenge, took it up 150 M from home and won decisively.
Rushed forward from the outside barrier, took it up near 800 M under a solid tempo, headed 200 M out and gradually fizzed out from that point.
Unable to slot in from a wide barrier and was caught wide without cover in midfield throughout, struggled from 400 M and didn't seem to act on this testing ground.
Didn't muster early pace and settled in a position towards the rear, under serious pressure from 500 M, didn't pick up from off the pace and never threatened to play a part in the finish.
On the fence in 5th, had a smooth trip throughout, went in pursuit of the leaders soon on straightening but couldn't find a change in gear and kept on one-paced.
Broke well but drifted back to a rearward position 7Ls back, taken wide to challenge on straightening but showed little dash and never looked like getting involved.
Standard jump, urged along to hold a 3-wide position just ahead of midfield, had his chance but couldn't quite get into it on this testing ground, weakened inside 200 M.
Up with the early pace and emerged as the race leader passing 900 M, built up a 2Ls gap on straightening, kept on well but was unable to fend off the persistent runner-up inside final 50 M.
Settled in midfield 4Ls back, urged along passing 500 M, plugged on inside 200 M without quite getting involved.
Settled prominently just off the pace, had 2Ls to make up on the leader on straightening, stuck to task well and came strong inside final 200 M to get on top with 50 M to go.
Rolled forward along the rails and was placed handily behind leader, rallied well in straight despite not able to trouble the winner. Made a respectable debut considering the ground conditions.
Well enough away, eased back to a position towards the rear 5Ls off the pace, handled the soft going well and made good headway inside 300 M to be nearest at the finish.
Taken back to last, 7Ls back to leader on the fence, angled out 350 M and produced some late impression from a fair way back.
Slow into stride, settled behind midfield 5 to 6Ls back, appeared to struggle from the halfway point, dropped away under pressure inside 400 M.
Camped in 2nd position. Enjoyed the run of the race and had every chance after being swamped in the run to the wire.
Raced in 2nd last position, 1 off with cover. Made some late ground in the run home.
Positioned close to the principals, 3 deep without cover. Never likely.
Travelled behind the speed, 1 off with cover. Floundered over the concluding stages in the wet conditions.
From a wide gate settled back in the field 3-wide with cover. Failed to extend when asked for an effort in the straight.
Couldn't go the early speed and settled behind midfield along the rails. Closed off strongly in the straight to snare 2nd spot.
As the start was effected, became fractious, began awkwardly and lost a considerable amount of ground tailing the field. Never in the hunt.
Went forward and led at a good clip along the paint. Folded over the latter stages.
Settled in a handy position, 2 deep with cover. Kept on at the same pace in the final stretch.
Raced behind midfield, 2-wide with cover. Paddled in the soft going.
Parked in front of midfield the fence. Got to the line soundly however was steadied close to home when tightened for room.
Settled around midfield with cover before improving into 3-wide line turning for home. Peeled out in the straight and although inclined to lay in knuckled down well to come up trumps.
Away in line. Soon driven to take a prominent spot. Kept giving in the straight to hold its position in the frame.
Hard ridden early but trapped wide in midfield. Moved up to race 3-wide without cover behind the speed passing 800 M. Gave plenty in the straight and just missed out on 4th.
Quickly into stride. Disputed lead on fence 800 M out. Ran away in the straight and won easily.
Failed to muster early. Raced 4-wide behind midfield making the home turn. 6Ls away on straightening. No progress in the straight.
Pressured early. Disputed lead 2-wide 800 M out. Retreated after 300 M.
Moderate getaway. Pressed to occupy a midfield position on fence. 3Ls off on straightening. Made steady progress in the straight to snatch minor placing near the line.
Failed to show usual early speed. Raced better than midfield wide without cover rounding the bend. Soon flattened after straightening.
Well enough away and was allowed to drift back towards rear. Commenced run round the outside from 800 M. Ran on fairly in the straight.
Trailed 10Ls through to the home straight despite being ridden along. Past only beaten rivals closing stages.
Pressed early. Raced behind midfield at 800 M. 6Ls behind the pace turning for home. Just held ground in the straight.
Urged along but lacked early speed. 7Ls off on fence rounding the bend. Made minor ground in the straight.
Last out. Wide without cover and was 8Ls down approaching the home straight. Never in contention.
Began well and eased off in search of cover. Trapped 3-wide in midfield and was pressured to maintain position at the bend. Couldn't pull out extra in the straight.
Good jump. Eased to sit better than midfield. 2-wide 3Ls down turning in. Never likely to catch winner but did enough to figure in the quinella.
Always rearward, 6Ls back in rear at the 800 M, lost plenty further ground in the straight, eased down final stages.
With cover about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in midfield through to final turn, remained a similar margin from the front.
Vied for the lead out 2-wide through first half, 1L back in 2nd off last turn, had little chance with the winner and just held 2nd.
2Ls back in 4th or so down back straight, 3Ls down into home straight, very tame finish.
Had a rails run about 3Ls off pace between 3rd and 5th through to final bend, kept on at the same pace in the straight and nearly got 2nd.
3Ls back in 5th or 6th leaving back straight, lost ground on the circle and lost out on the battle for 4th place inside the final 50 M.
Always worse than midfield, 5Ls off the pace at halfway, ceded further ground in the straight, said not to have handled conditions.
6Ls off pace initially towards rear, 5Ls back and ridden along turning for home, flat effort.
Midfield or slightly worse about 5Ls off pace until home straight, a little closer at the furlong pole, just missed 4th place. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slowest out and soon 7Ls last, never competitive and always detached from the main body of the field.
3-wide no cover vying for early lead, 1L back in 3rd at 800 M and 4Ls back and pressured off last turn, weakened further and eased down late on.
Disputed early pace on fence, clear by 1L turning for home and skipped 2Ls clear at the furlong pole, won unchallenged.
Slowly away, recovered to race in midfield on rails 4Ls off pace at halfway, one-paced to conclude and never looked like placing.
Worse than midfield 5Ls off paced in middle stages, pressured when short of room on inside turning for home, one-paced once clear.
Taken back from wide gate, one from rear 6Ls behind at halfway, couldn't go with the principals in the straight.
Box-seated in 3rd at halfway and led soon after straightening, headed about 150 M out and soon relegated to 3rd.
8Ls last and detached and pressured at the 1200 M, headway to race in midfield off the final bend but nothing more to offer in final furlong.
3Ls back in 6th in middle stages, made steady headway before leading about 150 M out, no response when winner past 50 M out but held 2nd okay.
Midfield but wide at halfway, 3Ls off pace taking the last turn, couldn't keep up and beaten before the 200 M.
Slowest away, midfield or slightly worse between 3Ls and 5Ls off lead through to final bend, dropped out quickly.
Disputed early pace, on the rails and still vying for the lead off last bend, found nothing under pressure and beaten by the furlong pole.
Slow to muster early pace, towards rear 5Ls off pace at halfway, closer turning in and 2Ls back in 3rd at the 200 M, couldn't follow through.
4Ls off pace on the rails at the 1000 M, 2Ls back in 4th off final turn, found very little off the bridle.
In rear down back straight, one from rear 500 M out when 6Ls adrift, found clear running 350 M out and quickened up to lead at 50 M, kept on well.
Led by a neck at the 1200 M, eased into 'one-out-one-back' position at halfway, struggling turning for home, dropped out, found lame next day.
Disputed early pace out 4-wide no cover, hard pressed to remain in the front rank at top of home straight, fell away.
Midfield about 3Ls or 4Ls from the pace until the home turn, petered out very tamely.
Pushed early, 6Ls off the leader 4 to 5-wide, benefited by the fast pace, progressed steadily 500 M and grabbed 3rd.
Bumped start and lost ground, at back, 3 to 5-wide, favoured by the fast tempo, never competitive.
Pushed to sit in front of midfield along the fence, 3Ls off the fast pace, carried back 500 M and lost ground, progressed steadily when clear 300 M and finished 2nd.
Bumped start, eased to rear, 3 to 5-wide, suited by the fast pace, but never competitive.
Hard ridden to take the rail and led by 2Ls, used up too much fuel during fast early sections, dropped off quickly 500 M.
Box seat, not suited by the fast early sectionals, carried back 500 M, totally emptied 400 M.
Pushed to obtain a prominent spot, 3-1/2Ls behind the fast pace 3-wide, moved forward 800 M, ran on until 250 M flattened.
Hard ridden forward, 2Ls off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the fast tempo, ran on well to the line.
Very slow away, pushed to keep up in midfield, 6Ls off the leader 3 to 4-wide, suited by the fast pace, no progress in final stages.
Eased to sit in midfield, 5Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, helped by the fast tempo, no progress in straight.
At rear 4 to 6-wide, suited by the fast pace, never a factor.
Hard ridden forward, 2Ls off the leader 2-wide, harmed by the fast pace, flattened 300 M.
Eased to sit in midfield, 4Ls off the fast pace 4-wide, moved forward 800 M, faded rapidly 350 M.

Pushed early but failed to cross runners inside, then eased to sit behind midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leader 5-wide without cover, suited by the fast pace, made early move 800 M, drifted away 200 M to win.
Broke well from the one draw to lead on rails, gave up advantage to LUCKY QUALITY coming out of back straight, still in touch turning for home but unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Waited with, ran home strongly down centre of track to snatch victory final strides.
Began moderately, travelled wide towards rear down far side, widest runner and near last turning for home, made no impression in straight.
Amongst leaders far side, gave ground rapidly rounding home bend.
Began well but soon taken back to race in rear of midfield, in similar position behind midfield turning in, produced a strong late run inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Never far off, amongst leaders on inside turning in, kept on until tiring noticeably inside final 100 M.
With leaders till 200 M, unable to sustain run closing stages.
Broke moderately, raced with leaders before taking over coming out of back straight, led until finding no extra after straightening for home.
Settled in midfield, failed to quicken under pressure early in straight, folded up inside final 200 M.
Virtually trailed the field all the way to straight, made good late progress past well-beaten horses.
Settled in last few, came home strongly down centre of straight to hit front over 100 M out only to be pipped at post.
Close up far side, shuffled back to midfield around home bend, dropped further away after straightening.

Broke well but was restrained back to mid-division 4Ls away from leaders, tracked the eventual runner up approaching home straight, showed a nice turn of foot to forge to the front 150 M out and found enough to hold on.

Began awkwardly and lost ground, raced in the rear 10Ls away, carried wide and covered more ground than others, picked up well in straight and was closing on the first three with every stride. Narrowly beaten.
Settled just off the early pace but never really got going on this ground. No impression.
Cut out the early running and set a decent pace up front on the rain affected track, was taken on from 900 M and weakened rapidly coming off the bend.
Slow into stride, raced behind midfield 5 to 6Ls off the pace, couldn't quite get into it on this soft going, never threatened and was eased close home.
Tracked leaders prominently, went for the inside route and saved ground on turning, couldn't pick up on the soft ground and had no extra left inside 200 M.
Behind midfield in 9th, acted OK on this deteriorating ground and came with a late run inside 400 M to get within a length of the winner.
Ridden along to hold a position near the rear, shifted wider on turning and had plenty to do inside 400 M, never picked up in this testing condition, eased down passing 200 M.
Towards the rear early, made a forward move passing 700 M round the outside of field, hit the front early in straight, ran on well but was picked off 150 M from home.
Ahead of mid-division 3Ls back, under serious pressure turning in, couldn't pick up on this soft ground and dropped out tamely inside 300 M.
Patiently ridden in 2nd last, 10Ls behind in early stages but gradually crept closer after midway, carried wide on turning, made some headway from off the pace but was never in the hunt.
In mid-division early but moved closer passing 1000 M to be 2Ls down on turning, held every chance but remained one-paced in the run to the line.
Gradually moved to the front alongside leader, went a decent gallop in the deteriorating ground, struggled early on straightening, tailed out. (Bled.)
