Slotted into a 2-wide position before the home turn, placed handily in 4th and was always in touch, came with a strong looking challenge inside 350 M but turned flat close home.

Soon taken across to the fence, travelled 7Ls off the pace in a position behind midfield, pressed home from 500 M and ran on nicely down the inside, shifted ground to challenge 200 M out and finished with a flourish. Closest at the line.
Hard ridden to go forward, crossed to lead near 1300 M and set a decent pace upfront, kept on till 200 M and weakened noticeably thereafter.

Obtained a midfield position along the fence, placed behind a beaten runner and was steadied and shuffled back approaching the home turn, ran on fairly in straight without threatening, steadied near 100 M.
Failed to muster speed and was settled in the rear over 10Ls behind leader, had impossible task turning in and made only minor headway in straight. Never likely.
Drifted back to a rearward position 10Ls off the pace, had huge task turning in and never picked up (Unacceptable performance.)

Jumped well but couldn't muster enough speed to obtain a position forward, trapped 3 deep without cover towards the rear, struggled to keep up on the turn and was eased down early in straight. (Jockey questioned.)
Broke well but was eased back for cover before settling in midfield 2-wide, plugged on inside 350 M for a non-threatening 4th.
Tracked leader along the fence, travelled strongly throughout and took charge inside 200 M in a matter of strides, kept on well to deny the fast finishing runner-up.

Ridden along to hold a position ahead of mid-division, never travelled at any stage and was in trouble after halfway, gave ground rapidly making the turn and finished tailed off. (Unacceptable performance.)
Allowed to drift back to a rearward position, way off the pace in middle stages and made a forward move inside 600 M, stayed on ok in straight but was given too much to do.

Unable to shift in after jumping and went forward to avoid getting wide, travelled fairly in 2nd and was under serious pressure making the home turn, soon beaten in straight and was eased down inside 200 M.
Was checked at the start then was ridden along to secure a position 3 back the fence. Travelled well approaching the final stretch and got to the post soundly.
Raced 3 back, 3-wide without cover. Paddled in the run to the line.

Slow to begin, then shifted in and bumped another runner, was then ridden vigorously however had to be steadied near the 800 M, taking up a rearward place along the fence. Failed to accelerate at the business end.
Travelled midfield on the rails. Battled away one paced in the straight.
Worked forward from a wide gate to settle outside the leader by the 600 M. Folded during the concluding stages.
Worked forward from the outside alley to camp 1 out 1 back. Peeled out entering the straight and fought on well.
Raced midfield, 2 to 3-wide with cover. Was under pressure before the home turn, but failed to respond.
Parked behind the leader along the paint. Faded in the run to the wire.
Settled towards the rear of the field, 2 to 3-wide with cover. Never likely.
Raced with the backmakers, 1 off with cover. Made no real impression in the run home.

Was hard ridden from barrier rise and eventually managed to cross and make the speed on the rails by the 600 M. Quickened the speed approaching the home turn and had enough gas left to hold on to victory.
Slow to begin, traveling with the tail enders, 3-wide with cover. Struggled in the straight.
Inconvenienced after start and raced at rear. Took inside run making the home turn to save ground. 4Ls off on straightening. Kept improving steadily in the straight to make frame late.
Showed early speed and took lead on fence 650 M out. Hung on top of the straight but failed to sustain closing stages.
Began awkwardly and was last out. 3-wide and trailed 8Ls through to the home straight. Passed only beaten rivals in the straight.
Ridden along the fence to stay in a rearward position. Improved on bend and was 3Ls away turning in. No hope with the winner but did the best of the rest to figure in the quinella.
Began well. Urged to stay midfield on fence. Shifted wider and was 2Ls behind the lead passing 400 M. Same pace in the straight.
Well enough away. Pushed along to race 2-wide better than midfield. Bumped and carried wider at 500 M. Unable to find extra gear in the straight.
Pressured early. Raced 2-wide behind the speed 800 M out. Hit front soon after straightening and won by a big margin going away.
Niggled to race 2-wide behind midfield. 3 to 4Ls behind the speed on straightening. One-paced to conclude.
Wide without cover behind midfield through to the home straight. No impression thereafter.
Wide without cover behind midfield through to the home straight. Found nothing thereafter.
Hard pressed early. Settled 2 to 3Ls back on fence 700 M out. Gave plenty in the straight to snatch minor placing near the line.
Never really got involved, in 10th about 6Ls behind early pace, much the same entering home straight, soon beaten.
One from rear about 7Ls off pace from start to the last turn, one-paced to conclude.
Nicely placed in 'one-out-one-back' 2Ls off pace in 4th out 2-wide, niggled along despite soft trail down back straight, one-paced in final section.
2-wide in 8th about 5Ls off pace at halfway, same position turning for home, stayed on well enough for 2nd.
Taken back to race in 9th on rails about 6Ls from speed passing post for first time, ran on best of the rest in the straight for 2nd.
Soon led by 1L on fence, same margin clear while setting a steady pace through to last turn, kicked clear, stayed on well.
5Ls back in 6th out 2-wide at the 1200 M, hung out when 3-wide no cover off last turn when 4Ls down, didn't find much off the bit.
Disputed early pace, 1L back in 2nd from 1400 M to final straight, weakened out quite tamely.
Enjoyed the box-seat trail in 3rd on the rails 2Ls behind leader right until straightening, given every chance, could only get 4th.
4-back on the rails in 7th at the 1200 M, same position about 5Ls down turning for home, tight for room until the 100 M but appeared held in any case.
In last throughout at least 6Ls from the pace, never a factor.
3-back the rails about 3Ls off pace in 5th through to final turn when pressured to keep up, plodding conclusion.
Worked hard 3 and 4-wide no cover to be 1L back in 2nd in middle stages, beat a hasty retreat from top of home straight.
Eased back from the start, 8Ls off pace in last at halfway, recovered some minor late ground in the straight, never nearer.
Midfield 4Ls off pace at 1000 M, left 3-wide no cover from the 800 M, widest turning for home, yielded ground quickly.
Eased back from inside gate, always rearward on rails at least 5Ls from the speed, very weak in the straight and eased down.
Raced on the leader's back initially and 3-back the rails 3Ls back in 6th from 800 M, pressured turning in, one-paced to wind up.
Pressed on to lead by 1L at the 1000 M, held the advantage before being headed at the top of home straight, very weak final furlong.
2-wide about 4Ls back in 7th or 8th through to the 600 M, closer turning for home, responded to strong riding to get up close home.
Taken back from wide gate, one from rear 6Ls off pace at 1000 M, a little closer on straightening, stayed on well late and only just missed a place.
Bounded at start, jockey knocked his head of the top of stalls and was unseated.
Settled in 'one-out-one-back' spot in 4th from 1200 M to final turn, had every chance of at least a quinella finish, no extra and all out to hold 3rd.
Never any better than midfield 3-wide with cover and at least 5Ls from the pace, said to have not handled underfoot conditions.
Best away and led early on, handed up to box-seat in 3rd on fence from 800 M to lead again 300 M out, grabbed by the winner inside the final strides.
Pushed to share the lead at good pace, dominated from 600 M, weakened 250 M.
Hard ridden to occupy the box seat, carried back 600 M, flattened in straight.
Very awkward away, took rail at rear, 8Ls off the good pace, progressed steadily in straight, lacked room final 200 M. Best work late.
Eased to sit behind the leading group early, however trapped 4-wide, then went forward, took rail and shared the lead at good pace on leaders back at mid-point, out of fuel 200 M.
Pushed early, behind midfield, 5-1/2Ls off the good pace 2 to 3-wide, lacked turn of foot in final stages.
Eased back early, soon allowed to stride forward and sit in midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the good pace, trapped 3-wide throughout and lost ground, no progress in straight.
Pushed to obtain a prominent spot as usual, 2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, led 300 M, overhauled 100 M, ran on for 2nd.
Eased back, 7Ls off the good pace 2-wide, held up 4-2, just ran on when clear.
Pushed forward and shared the lead at good pace, trapped 2 to 3-wide and lost ground, ran on well to the line for 3rd.
Pushed early to hold the rail spot behind midfield, 6Ls off the good pace, made ground steadily in straight, lacked room 200 M.
Eased to sit in front of midfield along the fence, 3-1/2Ls off the good pace, swept forward 2-wide from 600 M to improve, however just held ground in last quarter.
Eased back and took rail, 9-1/2Ls off the good pace at tail, swept forward 3-wide at home bend to make run, dashed well 200 M, dominated 100 M.
Near last most of way to straight, kept on steadily to be nearest at the blanket finish.
Never far off in 4th or 5th to straight, kept on same pace in straight without quickening. (Blood in trachea.)
Began moderately, settled in rear of midfield on rails, similar turning in, made modest progress under pressure without threatening.
Broke well from a wide draw, prominent when wide without cover early in back straight, taken back to rear of midfield but still throughout far side, found nil under pressure in straight.
Settled in just worse than midfield, swung wide into straight, fought on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Soon took up running, held on well under pressure to make all.
Soon taken back to wide in midfield from a poor draw, similar turning for home, fought on well under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Settled towards rear, very wide turning in, produced moderate late impression in straight, never nearer.
Disputed lead most of way, unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Broke well, settled in a prominent spot mainly 3-wide without cover down far side, kept on until fading under pressure inside final 200 M.
Slow out, soon picked up to forward of midfield on rails, closer up around home bend to be just off the lead turning in, soon faded under pressure after straightening.
Began moderately, settled at the back, trailed the field into straight and widest runner turning in, made significant late progress in straight to be nearest at finish.
Tracked leader and travelled kindly for most of the way, lengthened really well on straightening and rallied back inside 150 M to edge out the eventual runner-up. (Jockey dropped whip 200 M.)
Drifted back after the start and was given a waiting ride in a position behind midfield, edged out to commence his run passing 400 M, ran on well down the outside but couldn't get to the first two.
Urged along to hold a position behind midfield on the fence, 4Ls down passing 400 M and had a clear run down the inside, lacked an instant acceleration but stayed on okay to claim 4th.
Held up last 8Ls behind leader and waited with until 350 M, stayed on only fairly, never dangerous.
Prominent early but unable to shift in and trapped 3 deep throughout, under pressure making the home turn and never able to pick up in straight.

Lost ground at the start and was soon taken to a rear spot on the rail, had more than 5Ls to make up inside 400 M but didn't pick up from off the pace, eased close home. (Jockey reported it didn't handle the track conditions.)
3-wide in midfield 5Ls back, came widest turning for home and had nothing to offer inside 300 M. Disappointing.
Slow into stride but soon recovered to race prominently behind leaders, under pressure on the turn and was eased down early on straightening.

Began well but was eased back for cover before the first turn, hampered near 1300 M and was shuffled back, 6Ls off the pace and had a daunting task turning in, plugged on inside 300 M but never looked like figuring.

Tracked leaders in early stages but eased back to midfield entering the back straight, ridden inside 500 M to hold a position and struggled to go with them as the race heated up in straight. (Jockey questioned.)
Unable to shift in before the first turn due to the wide draw, crossed to lead on the rail passing 1300 M and an uncontested lead to straight, headed inside 300 M and tired into 5th.

Well enough away, held a 2-wide position in midfield 4Ls back, pressed on inside 450 M and burst to the front 200 M out, unable to get away from the winner though and was eventually reeled in 50 M from home.
Well enough away but was gradually shuffled back to a midfield position, had 3Ls to make up turning in but was quickly outpaced inside 300 M. No impression.

Close to midfield in early stages, lost ground before making the home turn and was shuffled back to 3rd last, held up behind a wall of horses in the straight and didn't obtain a clear run throughout. (Not properly tested.)

Shaken up and went forward soon after jumping from the inside draw, placed handily just off the pace and appeared to travel well, attempted a run down the inside but unable to produce a change of gear.
Slow to begin, ended up racing in detached last trailing over 10Ls to leader, still at the rear inside 300 M but encountered traffic problem and didn't have a clear crack in the run to the line.
Never far off the pace in 4th, 2-wide making the turn but inclined to hang out, came with a strong looking challenge but couldn't sustain effort inside final 100 M.
Average break, ridden along to hold a position in front of midfield, plugged on inside 300 M but was never going to trouble the principals.
Not the fastest away but gradually crept forward to race prominently alongside leader, hit front briefly on straightening but offered disappointingly little inside the final 200 M.
Standard break, unable to shift in and trapped 4 deep in midfield, hampered and carried very wide making the home turn, finished strongly down the outside but the winner had enough to hold on.

Began awkwardly and lost ground, settled in 2nd last and was placed in a very unpromising position turning in, held up behind horses early in straight but hit top gear inside 200 M to finish closest on the line.
Jumped well but soon drifted back to midfield, carried wide on turning, had his chance but unable to quicken when the race heated up.
First to jump, restrained to a position behind leaders but travelled ungenerously, struggled from 300 M and dropped away tamely.
Took a while to muster and settled in midfield 5Ls off the pace, into clear 400 M out, quickened well to hit the front near 200 M, kept on to score cosily.
Ordinary jump from the widest barrier, urged to the front and crossed to lead along the rails entering the home turn, headed inside 350 M and failed to last home.
Taken back on jumping from a wide barrier, travelled in a rearward position over 7Ls back in early stages but moved closer on turning, stayed on well and put in some solid late work.

Very slow to begin then was bustled to join the field and by the 700 M had managed to work forward on the fence into a reasonable spot behind midfield. Responded nicely to vigorous riding and won drawing away.

Positioned behind the speed 3 deep with cover. Shifted out into the clear on straightening and showed some response before tiring after the 300 M. (See Racing Incident.) (Jockey reported abnormal breathing.)
Raced 4-wide with cover in a midfield position. Carried wider turning for home continued to close off well.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Positioned back in the field, 1 off with cover, held up turning, plugged away at the same pace in the straight.
Took up a position at the tail of the field 2 to 3-wide with cover. Came wide in the straight and battled on fairly making some late ground.
Raced 2-wide, slightly behind midfield with cover. Never a factor.
Travelled on the speed but coursed 4-wide and without cover, throughout, not likely.
Went forward to lead along the fence. Folded after the final furlong.
Positioned at the rear of the field 1 off with cover. Paddled in the run to the line.
Parked on the speed but was posted 3-wide and without cover for most of the trip. Kept on evenly over the concluding stages.
Raced 3 back on the fence. Had every possible chance. (See Racing Incident.)
Stalked the leader along the rails. Never really quickened and was one paced in the run home.
Ridden along to travel outside the leader. Was under pressure after the 500 M but kept on soundly.

Sat behind the pace early. Moved up to race alongside leader 500 M out. Looked dangerous at top of the straight but was outsprinted by the eventual winner passing 200 M. Was hampered inside 100 M and missed out on 3rd.
Urged along to sit at midfield on fence. Shifted out and was 4 to 5Ls down on straightening. Produced good acceleration in the straight to figure in the quinella closing stages.
Hard pressed to race at midfield. 3-wide without cover and 6Ls back making the home turn. Ridden vigorously in the straight and ran on steadily in closing stages.
Began awkwardly and trailed field. Came widest making the home turn. Never in contention.
Wide at midfield after start. Failed to follow from 500 M and soon dropped out in the straight.
Away in line. Went forward to race behind the speed 800 M out. 3-wide without cover and 3Ls down turning in. Didn't pick up at all in the straight.
Soon took lead on fence after start. Was taken on for the lead 500 M out. Challenged in the straight but kept on finding enough to keep rivals at bay.
Pressured early but failed to muster. At rear on fence throughout. No impression.
Pressured and was given reminder to maintain a prominent spot through to the home straight. Not much to offer thereafter.
Pushed to stay in touch early. Raced 2-wide behind midfield 1000 M out. Under serious pressure 500 M out. Made up minor ground late.
Began well, ended up at midfield rounding the bend. 5 to 6Ls off turning for home. Closed off well to snatch minor placing near the line.
Drifted back to sit 2-wide behind midfield after start. Steadied to the back at 700 M. Shifted out and was 7Ls behind the lead on straightening. Ran on fairly thereafter.
Always better than midfield towards inner, 3Ls back at halfway and closer turning for home, 1L down at the 200 M, kept on well to lead close home.
Slipped in (illegally) from wide gate to hold 'one-out-one-back' position at 900 M, weakened in the straight. (Bled.)
Taken back from the start, 4-back on rails about 5Ls from speed leaving back straight, closer off last bend, one-paced but still nearly placed.
Led by a neck on the fence early on but headed soon after straightening, very weak to wind up.
Severely checked at the 1100 M, 8Ls last at halfway, never got into it.
3-wide no cover about 1L back in 3rd until the 600 M, very laboured in the straight after the tough passage.
About 5Ls off pace in 10th or so at the 1000 M, still rearward 3-wide but with cover on the circle, had his chance to place, went close.
A neck in 2nd at the 1000 M, led shortly after straightening for home, 1L clear at the 200 M, ground down by the winner in final strides.
4Ls back in midfield at 1000 M, pushed out 4-wide no cover at 600 M, over 2Ls back in 4th turning for home, kept on at the same pace to just nick 3rd.
Fractious in the gates, nicely placed on rails just behind the lead 2Ls back until straightening, very weak to conclude given the cushy trip.
Prominent early on before easing back to midfield 4Ls off pace at the 800 M, continued to lose further ground.
Never on terms, always at least 6Ls from the pace in rear.
7Ls off pace in rear down the back, only marginally closer off last curve, could only wrap up at the one pace.
A little worse than midfield 5Ls off pace at the 1000 M, fizzled out steadily from then on.
6Ls back in 8th or so from back straight to home straight, found nothing under pressure.
Midfield or better 4Ls or 5Ls down through to final section, very one-paced and, as such, no chance of taking advantage.
One from rear 9Ls off pace at the 800 M and not much closer on straightening, stayed on through pedestrian rivals to nick an unlikely, remote 3rd.
Trapped 3 and 4-wide no cover in midfield about 5Ls off pace until before home turn, tired in the straight after the tough trip.
Over-raced when a neck down in 2nd initially, 1L off in 2nd at the 800 M and 2Ls down off last turn, very one-paced to wrap up. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Rearward at least 7Ls from the speed down the back, marginally closer turning for home, one-paced to conclude.
Worse than midfield and very wide throughout sometimes without cover, never got into it.
Last between 7Ls and 9Ls from the front through to home bend, held up a little on inside around the 200 M but of little consequence overall.
Never any better than midfield, struggling turning for home and one-paced to finish off, very flat run for one so fancied.
A neck clear on fence initially, 2Ls to the good from the 800 M to final turn, headed by quinella pair 300 M out and rapidly slipped out of contention.
Slowly away and 4-back the rails about 6Ls behind early speed, 3Ls back off final turn and led at the 200 M, asserted inside final 100 M.
3Ls back in 3rd at the 1000 M, began to lose this proximity before the home straight, eased out of the race. (Bled.)
Raced in 4th on the rails about 3Ls off pace at 1000 M, still close enough in 3rd entering the home straight, had every chance to place, only got 4th.
3-back on fence 5Ls back in midfield at halfway, closer turning in and upsides winner at 200 M, run peaked, well clear of 3rd home.
Eased at start and took rail at rear, 7-1/2Ls off the leader, harmed by the slow early sectionals, lacked turn of foot, just ran on fairly in final stages.
Settled in front of midfield along the fence, 3Ls off the leader, not suited by the slow tempo, just held ground in straight.
Pushed forward, 2-1/2Ls behind the slow pace 3-wide, ran on well to the line and grabbed 3rd.
Slow away, hard ridden to obtain a midfield spot, 4-1/2Ls off the leader 3-wide, not suited by the slow tempo, flattened 300 M.
Eased back early, trapped 5 to 6-wide, then allowed to stride forward, sat 2Ls off the slow pace 3-wide, lost too much ground at bends, dropped off quickly 400 M.
Prominent, helped by the slow pace, but trapped 3 to 4-wide throughout, ran on ok in straight.
Midfield on the fence, checked early, 5Ls off the leader, raced very keenly, dashed well 300 M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Took rail easily and led by 1L at advantageous slow early sectionals, headed on turning, hung on to win by a narrow margin.
Pushed forward and occupied the box seat, enjoyed the slow early sectionals, closed the race off strongly, just beaten by a head in 2nd.
Eased back and crossed behind the field for cover, 6-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, harmed by the slow pace, held up 400 M, ran on ok when clear.
Eased back, 6Ls off the leader, trapped 3 to 4-wide throughout and lost too much ground, harmed by the slow pace, held ground in straight despite all negative racing situations.
Hard ridden to go forward, was hampered early, pushed back to midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the slow tempo, soon out of fuel 400 M.
Slow away, pushed to keep up in midfield, checked early, 4Ls off the leader, trapped 4-wide throughout, harmed by the slow pace and lost too much ground at bends, weakened 400 M.
Extremely slow away, raced keenly at rear 2 to 3-wide, harmed by the slow pace, no progress.
Broke well to lead attempting to make all, kicked 4Ls clear making home bend maintaining a healthy break early in straight only to be overhauled when tiring 100 M out.
Settled in distant 4th from tearaway leader but just on heels of joint 2nds, switched out to challenge upon straightening, quickened well to claim victory late.
Held a prominent spot on rails in 3rd behind tearaway leader, hung on well under pressure for a place chance, winner too good.
Raced mainly 3-wide in midfield to straight, fought on doggedly under pressure in straight to just fail to reach 3rd before the line.
Began with others, soon settled towards the rear, remained in last few turning in, made no progress in straight. (Tactic questioned.)
Always struggling in last few, never seen with a chance.
Trailed the field most of way.
Settled just worse than midfield, similar turning for home, made steady headway down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled in rear of midfield of strung-out field, shifted out for a clear run after straightening, fought on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Travelled in forward section of strung-out field to straight, came to challenge upon straightening but could only plod home.
Travelled in rear of midfield to straight, ran home one-paced.
Chased tearaway leader to straight, gradually weakened after straightening.
Travelled in last few, kept on one pace down centre of straight without quickening.
Broke well, soon settled 3-wide in rear of midfield, travelled further behind turning in, made no progress in straight.
Handily placed in 4th along the fence and always travelled well, waited with until 400 M, showed his class and ran on strongly down the inside to win this stayers' championship for the third time.

Keen in early stages and was wide making the first turn, unable to tuck in and raced without cover throughout, crept closer to leader passing halfway, briefly led turning in but found very little when pressed. (Jockey questioned.)

Prominent early but was restrained to a position in midfield, hit front early in straight, shifted in near 200 M causing jockey to stop riding but kept on to just lose out to the battle-hardened winner.

Taken back, over-raced in early stages but travelled well once settled, came close with a strong run inside 300 M, but effort flattened over the final stages giving impression that he might not see out the trip.
Assumed his pace-making role for stable companions, led them along shortly after the start under a steady tempo, was taken on approaching 600 M, soon weakened.

Patiently held up in a rearward position 5Ls off the pace, remained on the inside throughout and was unable to improve passing 800 M mark, shifted out to challenge in straight, ran on fairly without troubling the first three.

Broke well but eased back to a 2-wide position towards the rear, made his move approaching 600 M, looked to have a strong chance turning in but couldn't match the acceleration of the first three, plugged on for 4th.
Hard ridden to a more forward position than usual, tracked the pacemaker and had an uneventful trip to the final bend, struggled to keep up passing 600 M and was a beaten horse when they turned in.
Standard jump, faded back, raced 7Ls away in running line, well back turning, shifted out and made good progress down middle to make frame despite being a margin from first 3.
No early speed, settled in rearward divisiion 8Ls back on fence, always well back, made no real headway and only passed beaten runners late.
Showed plenty of speed, held front despite early pressure, worried in mid-section, fought back on bend and held advantage to 200 M, battled on gamely once headed.
Jumped in air and lost ground, soon at rear 10Ls from leader, niggled throughout to hold spot, last turning, struggled.
Began with rest, took ideal spot 1 out 1 back following decent speed, 2Ls down turning, hit front passing 200 M, looked set for victory but just caught final 50 M.

Slow into stride, ended up 8Ls away in 2 wide line near to last, made turn awkwardly, made steady progress in straight without really threatening, shifted 200 M. (Jockey reported never really comfortable.)
Standard jump, ended up 5Ls back in 2 wide line, had race run to suit with pace on, worked into race 3 wide leaving bend, made a strong finishing effort final 200 M to go down narrowly late.
Fairly away, settled 4Ls away in 2 wide line, enjoyed reasonable run on back of speed, improved turning but unable to lift a notch at 300 M, weakened thereafter.

Tardy into stride, ended up 7Ls back on rails, had an economical trip to bend, still same margin back turning and set a near impossible task at 300 M, sprouted wings final 200 M to get up in emphatic fashion.
Began with rest, worked forward to challenge for front, forced to race 3 wide without cover, used too much to bend, weakened out final 300 M.
Displayed usual speed to challenge for front, used a bit shading leader in pace battle, soon under pressure on turning, unable to keep on thereafter.
Even jump, positioned 5Ls away on rails, had easy time on bend and saved ground turning, little response when pressed and plugged away late.
Reasonable break, pressed on but caught 3 wide, had cover racing 3Ls off front runners, used some petrol in mid-section, pushed 4 wide turn, made no real headway despite steadied at 300 M.
Away well enough, took spot on leaders back, used a bit with, good pace on, niggled on turning, didn't find much and gradually faded out in straight.
Decent break, took spot on rails 5Ls off lead, had even run following solid speed, one paced turning and gave in cheaply.
Even jump, positioned 6Ls off tearaway leader on fence, had a good run to bend, shifted on turning, made steady headway late without threatening.
Bounced out but soon drifted into midfield, raced 7Ls back in running line, had even run thereafter, found little in straight and struggled in run to line. (Jockey reported flat. Lame next day.)
Moderate break, positioned behind midfield 8Ls away in running line, well back and struggling on turning, soon under pressure and showed little.
Began with rest, pressed on to race first without cover, 5Ls from tearaway leader, travelled well to bend, gradually improved turning, kept on soundly for placing despite having to cart field up.
Slow into stride, positioned at tail 10Ls from lead, never likely despite some crowding at 200 M.
Out in line, restrained to race in rear division, ended up sharing trail 10Ls back, set a task same margin down on turning, made minor ground from impossible spot. (See Racing Incidents.)

Awkwardly away and restrained from an outside alley, ended up in rear division, 8Ls away on rails, followed eventual winner on bend, not clearest run in straight but kept closing to be nearest on line.
Began nicely, raced first behind leader 3Ls away, followed a strong speed throughout, well clear of rest, kept giving on turning but peaked inside 200 M, despite being a bit short of room.
Out in line, took sit in front of midfield 6Ls from lead, travelled well on bend, gradually improved turning, made strong finish from 300 M but couldn't match speed of winner last 100 M.
First to hit ground, settled 3Ls clear soon after, ran along at a strong tempo, got further in front on bend, held margin to 150 M before early workload told and dropped off.

Slow into stride, ended up in middle of main bunch 7Ls off lead on rails, had easy time to bend, gradually progressed in straight but found an extra gear to hit lead 100 M and hold a comfortable margin on rivals.
Standard jump, drifted back into a midfield role 7Ls off front, did share of work 3 wide no cover, kept responding despite hard run and was a big effort to make frame.
Lacked speed from jump, ended up 3 wide 8Ls off top end, had cover throughout, still had job to do turning, made gradual progress down centre without looking likely. (See Racing Incidents.)
Broke well, settled just better than midfield, similar turning in, fought on steadily to be nearest at finish without threatening.
Always struggling well behind, ran past well beaten horses closing stages.
Broke well to lead on rails, held slender advantage until joined inside 400 M, unable to sustain effort and swamped inside final 100 M.
Began well to settle just off the speed, travelled one-back in 3rd on rails into straight, slightly inconvenienced about 70 M out, kept on same pace to finish.
Travelled well behind, last and widest turning for home, finished off race strongly down centre of straight, never nearer.
Began fairly, settled in rear of midfield, found nothing under pressure in straight.
Never better than midfield, found nothing in straight.
Always in last few, made moderate headway past well beaten horses closing stages.
Began fairly, travelled just better than midfield far side, gave ground rapidly from approaching home straight. (Irregular heart beat.)
Began fairly from a poor draw looking for cover in midfield, similar turning in, produced good late impression closing stages.
Broke well from the widest barrier, remained wide down far side early stages, settled in 2L 4th coming out of back straight, similar turning for home, kept on well in the run home. (Questioned.)
Settled in midfield, commenced move turning in, ran on stoutly to hit front inside 150 M despite hanging in.
With leaders throughout, drew level under pressure early in straight only to be swamped by fast-finishing winner inside final 150 M.
Always in last few. Jockey said horse raced greenly.
Quietly ridden in early stages and settled in a 2-wide backward position 6Ls off the pace, made his move out wide than most in straight but picked up only fairly.
Broke well from the inside draw and placed prominently behind leaders, came through inside 150 M to dispute it with the eventual winner but was held in the closing stages.
Quickly recovered from a slow start, settled in midfield along the fence, had his chance against the inside rail but found no extra close home.
Niggled along in the first half to hold a position behind midfield on the rail, took a while to get going in straight and closed off the race fairly.
Hard ridden forward to race outside the lead, under pressure approaching home straight and was soon on the retreat passing 300 M. (Jockey questioned.)
Ridden to hold a position behind midfield after a sluggish start, found very little under pressure and never looked like getting involved.
Standard jump, slotted into a 2-wide position in midfield, gradually picked up on straightening and made up some late ground without being able to threaten the first three.
Didn't go forward possibly due to the wide draw and was trapped 3-deep without cover behind midfield, did make up some ground from off the pace but was never likely.
Fastest away and led them steadily on the fence, kicked 2Ls clear inside 300 M, kept on but was eventually headed 100 M from home.
Travelled smoothly just off the pace and looked a strong chance going into the straight, picked up well and swept to the front near 100 M and always had enough to repel the persistent 2nd.
Failed to muster speed and struggled to stay in touch from midway, beaten early in straight. No impression.

Taken back on jumping from the wide barrier, crossed to race towards the rear of the field, had 7Ls to make up inside 400 M but could only make limited headway along the inside. (Jockey and Trainer questioned.)
Raced midfield 2 deep with cover. Was dour in the run home.
Raced behind the speed, 3-wide with cover. Not a factor.
Raced 1 out 1 back. Shifted out to clear running on straightening and kept on at the same pace in the run to the line.
Led along the fence. Faded when challenged at the furlong.
Caught wide early and was allowed to stride forward to sit outside the leader. Was well beaten inside the final 100 M.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Fractious in the gates, was slow to begin then travelled at the rear along the fence. Closed off fairly without ever threatening.
Parked behind the leader along the fence. Whacked away at the same speed over the final 350 M.
Raced behind midfield, 2-wide with cover. Crept forward around runners prior to the final bend and maintained a good gallop in the straight to repel challengers.
Received a solid check near the 1100 M, settling back in the field along the paint. Switched to the outside rounding the home turn and closed off soundly.
Copped a check near the 1100 M then raced in midfield on the fence. Peeled out turning for home but made little impression in the final stretch.
Settled in last position, 1 off with cover. Began a sweeping run around the field after the 450, making some late headway.
Pressed early. Settled 2-wide behind the speed 1000 M out. Made a steady run in the straight.
Jumped well. Eased to take a prominent spot 1000 M out. Kept one-paced in the straight.
Well enough away, ended up at midfield after 1000 M. 3-wide and 4Ls behind the pace turning in. Closed off fairly well in the straight and was nearest at finish.
Trapped 3-wide without cover early. Sat 2-wide within 3Ls of the pace 900 M out. Made a strong run inside final furlong and was just nosed out in the shadow of the post.
Within 3Ls of the pace on fence through to the home turn. Ran on fairly in the straight.
Pushed early. Led on fence nicely passing 1000 M. Was taken on for the lead 500 M out. Pulled clear at 200 M but was seriously challenged by the 2nd placegetter close to home. Just got up on line.
Missed start. Always at rear. Never a factor.
Slow into stride. Raced 5Ls behind the speed on fence through to the home turn. Responded well in the straight and ran on strongly closing stages to snatch minor placing.
Taken to race at rear from a high draw. 3-wide and 7 to 8Ls away on straightening. Made some headway in the straight.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
2-wide and 5 to 6Ls off through to the home turn. Covered minor ground late.
Trapped 4-wide without cover early. Never far off the pace. Disputed lead passing 500 M. Hung on well in the straight but couldn't fend off the front trio close to home.
Taken back from wide gate, always worse than midfield at least 4Ls or so from the pace.
3-back on rails about 4Ls off pace through to 500 M, closer and going well off last bend, quickened up well to lead 100 M out, scored comfortably.
Rearward throughout out 3-wide but mostly with cover, never got any closer than 5Ls from the speed.
Held the 'one-out-one-back' position 2Ls back in 4th until the last bend, had every chance to place but lacked the turn of foot.
Soon led on fence, clear by no more than 1L until final bend, headed by the 200 M, one-paced final stages and lost a place on the line.
Pressed forward from widest gate, less than 1L off pace in 2nd from 800 M to straightening, led 200 M out, no response to winner's kick but held 2nd fine.
Checked at the 1000 M but slow to muster early pace anyway, 4-back on the fence through to final bend, never likely to take a hand in the finish.
Trapped 3-wide no cover throughout, midfield at least 4Ls behind speed through to last bend, very one-paced.
Awkward break, rearward about 6Ls or 7Ls from the speed through to final straight, ran on well late to nick 3rd on the line.
Raced in 6th out 2-wide outside the winner down the back, 4Ls behind off last curve, one-paced to conclude.
Checked at 1100 M but recovered to race directly behind the leader on the rails before home straight, no real excuses for the weak finish.
Under pressure in rear at 800 M about 9Ls off pace, never travelling well.
Slowly away, recovered to race 5Ls back in 6th at the 1000 M, 4Ls back turning in, one-paced to wrap up.
Raced in 10th at least 6Ls from the speed through first half, soon came under pressure, very flat run for one who was a close 2nd previously. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Taken back to race on rails in rear at least 7Ls from the pace through to final bend, soon beaten.
Fractious in gates, always rearward at least 7Ls from the speed, another weak effort.
Bounded at the start and slowest out, on the rails in 8th at 1000 M, 6Ls adrift turning for home, never really threatened.
2-wide and 1L in 2nd at the 1200 M, remained in 2nd through to final turn when pressured, couldn't get to the winner and all out to hold 2nd.
4-back on the rails about 6Ls off pace at 1200 M and a little closer off last turn, never likely to improve much.
Led early on before handing up the lead to box-seat on fence in 3rd from 1200 M to last bend, stayed on fairly well, nearly got 2nd.
3-back on the fence 4Ls off speed in 5th at the 1200 M, going well turning for home, couldn't quicken up sufficiently.
Nicely placed in the 'one-out-one-back' position 2Ls or 3Ls off pace in 4th until the final section, kept on at same pace for 4th.
Always midfield or slightly worse off out 2-wide at least 5Ls from the speed.
Went forward to lead by 1L on the fence at the 1200 M, controlled the race from the front thereafter and well in command in the straight.
Pushed forward to cross to 2-wide and share the lead, suited by the track pattern which favoured front runners, however soon out of fuel 250 M.
Hard ridden to obtain the box seat, benefited by the track pattern which favours front runners, just held ground in straight.
Pushed to hold the rail and shared the lead at good pace, benefited by the track pattern which favours front runners, made all, never had threats.
Behind midfield but on the fence, 5Ls off the good pace, not suited by the track pattern which favoured front runners, held up majority of straight, ran on ok.
Hard ridden to occupy a midfield spot, 3-1/2Ls off the good pace, trapped 3-wide throughout and lost too much ground, not suited by the track pattern which favours front runners, flattened 200 M.
Eased to sit in midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the good pace along the fence, not suited by the track pattern which favours front runners, momentarily held up 300 M, dashed well for 2nd.
Eased back, 6-1/2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, not suited by the track pattern which favoured front runners, blocked most straight, checked 100 M, not tested.

Slow away, hard ridden early but failed to muster, then eased to sit behind midfield, 5-1/2Ls off the good pace, trapped 4-wide throughout, not suited by the track pattern which favoured front runners, still held ground in straight.
Hard ridden forward, 1L off the good pace 2-wide, helped by the track pattern which favoured front runners, ran on until 150 M flattened.
Pushed early but failed to muster, took rail at rear, 7Ls off the good pace, not suited by the track pattern which favoured front runners, no progress in final stages.
Eased to sit in midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leader 3-wide, lost ground at bends, not suited by the track pattern which favours front runners, dashed well 200 M.
Bumped start, pushed to take a midfield spot, 3Ls off the good pace 2-wide, not suited by the track pattern which favours front runners, held up 4-2, little dash when clear and grabbed 3rd.
Began moderately, soon settled towards the rear, took closer order briefly going up the Rock, in rear of midfield on rails rounding home bend, found nothing under pressure in the run home.
Disputed lead most of way to straight, soon yielded ground. (Abnormal breathing noise) (Lame next day)

Niggled along for early pace, settled in forward of midfield after entered back straight, still midfield turning in but couldn't find much racing room for a good part of home straight. (Stewards stated not fully tested)
Always struggling at the back and never seen with a chance.
Settled mainly 3-wide in midfield to straight, fought on steadily down centre of straight without threatening.
Soon taken to the back of the field after beginning from the widest barrier, remained one from last throughout, swung wide into straight, made no show.

Began fairly, settled in midfield on rails, moved slightly closer approaching home bend, slightly baulked for a run over 200 M out, only kept on at the same pace without making any further impression closing stages.
Broke well with others, held slender lead on rails setting a steady pace, went 1L clear turning for home, kept on same pace only to be worn down 100 M out.
Began well from a wide draw, soon taken back to travel in 4th within 3Ls of pace, similar turning in, ran on steadily closing stages without threatening.
Towards rear most of way to straight, ran on past well beaten horses closing stages.
Stayed wide in rear of midfield after beginning from a poor draw, similar turning for home, produced steady late headway down centre of straight without threatening.
Began well with others, settled one back on rails in 3rd, only 2Ls off turning in, quickened under pressure inside final 200 M to assert authority close to home.
Drawn wide but was able to shift in quickly under positive riding, enjoyed a smooth run in mid-division, squeezed through a gap to challenge inside 250 M and kept grinding away in the finish.
Lost ground at the start, rushed to a position behind midfield but was checked and shuffled back near 1100 M, had 6Ls to make up inside 400 M but gave very limited response when asked.
Away well enough, prominently placed in early stages and gradually moved up vying for the lead, soon under pressure on straightening and weakened.
Unable to slot in and was kept wide in midfield throughout the first half, had nothing left in reserves inside 350 M and didn't finish the race off. (Post-race stress noted next day.)

Soon led from the beginning, given a breather approaching the home turn before quickened up again to establish a significant 2Ls advantage inside 300 M, kept on determinedly and just held off the 2nd on the line.
Slow to begin and raced ungenerously in mid-division, tailed out. (Unacceptable racing manner.)
Drawn wide and ended up racing towards the rear 6Ls back, made a wide sweeping move round the outside from 600 M before finding disappointingly little in the finish.
In the rear from the outset and struggled to keep up passing halfway, eased down early in straight. (Unacceptable performance.)
Assumed a position towards the rear, awkwardly placed behind a beaten runner turning in, took time to muster and made some headway when the race was all over.
Always close enough tracking the leaders, couldn't step up a gear when the race heated up, plugged on to finish 4th but was well ahead of the rest.
Allowed to shift into a rail position in midfield, had an uneventful trip to straight, used little but could only find one pace when it mattered.
Broke well from the inside and was always close up on the fence, gradually gathered pace inside 350 M and flashed home late on just failing to reel in the winner.
Never far away on the Stands' side, under pressure midway but stayed on encouragingly to just miss out on 3rd.
Close enough to early leaders but ran green in his debut and inclined to hang out for the major parts of the race, unable to quicken under pressure and got tired close home.
Hampered on jumping but soon recovered to race in the front rank, held every chance but failed to find much when the race got serious.
Poor start, towards the rear early but gradually weaved his way through to be 4th at the 400 M mark, kept on soundly to 100 M but weakened close home.
Settled towards the rear along the stands' rail, had plenty to do going into final 400 M but found nothing to pressure, dropped away close home.
Shifted abruptly after start, gradually moved up to force the pace, headed 350 M out and gave ground rapidly thereafter.

Lost ground when checked after leaving the stalls, failed to muster speed and became detached in last trailing over 8Ls in early stages, began to pick up inside 400 M and finished off the race in eye catching style. (Jockey questioned.)
Keen early on, placed handily behind leaders, came with a strong looking challenge 300 M out but ran flat close home. A pleasing debut effort nevertheless.
Obtained cover behind midfield, switched to the nearside rail inside 400 M, ran on OK to the line.
In midfield 2Ls off leaders, under serious pressure from halfway and was outpaced inside 400 M, eased close home.
Quickly taken to the front under a positive ride, took them along steadily and travelled the best going into final 400 M, soon quickened away and opened up an unassailable gap. Won with ease.
Broke well, settled in mid-division towards the outside of field, hard pushed inside 400 M but the response was one-paced.
Slow into stride, niggled along to hold this position but failed to muster pace, near the rear throughout and was never in the hunt.
Was pressured in the lead mid race whilst positioned along the rails. Hit the front by the 400 M, but was overhauled soon after.
Was slow into stride, then throughout the race travelled wide and without cover close to midfield. Never likely, (See Racing Incidents.)
Stumbled at the start, raced midfield on the fence then was checked to avoid heels near the 900 M. Paddled to the line.
Raced with the backmarkers 3-wide with cover. Finished tailed out. (To Trial.)
Met with a squeeze at the start then worked across to race on the fence well off the pace setters. Didn't quicken in the final stretch.
Went forward and raced as equal leader 1 off. Faded inside the final furlong.
Blundered soon after the jump settling towards the rear along the fence. Struggled in the run home.
Parked one off on the back of a solid tempo, 2-wide no cover. Kept on fairly over the concluding stages.
Travelled midfield, 1 off with cover. No extra in the final stretch. (See Racing Incidents.)
Enjoyed the run of the race behind the 2 principals. Maintained a good gallop right to the wire to win in good fashion.
When the gates opened lifted its front feet off the ground and was slow into stride settling in last position. Made good late headway.
Raced behind midfield, 2-wide with cover. Whacked away at the same speed in the run home.

Raced towards rear early. Improved round the outside passing 800 M and was 4Ls back turning in. Made a strong run inside final furlong and had every chance until eventual winner flashed past near the post.

Travelled wide and without cover in midfield. Hampered and forced to go widest at 700 M. 4Ls behind the speed turning for home. Improved steadily in the straight to snatch minor placing close to home.
Hard pressed early. Stayed within 3Ls of the pace through to the home straight. Peaked inside 150 M.
Eased to sit behind midfield early. Improved from 1000 M but trapped 2 to 3-wide without much cover. 2Ls behind the speed on turning. Ran on steadily in the straight and weakened inside 100 M.
Well enough away. Settled 2-wide behind the pace from 900 M. Hampered and shifted 4-wide at 700 M. 2Ls off turning into the home straight. Kept trying but faded inside 100 M. (Bled.)
Always at midfield until straightening. Failed to quicken when asked.

Began awkwardly and raced at rear. Inconvenienced and slipped further back making the home turn. Took inside run thereafter and was 5Ls off on straightening. Kept going in the straight and was nearest at finish.
Began well. Sat on fence behind the leader 900 M out. Launched challenge in the straight but outsprinted by the principals final 100 M.
Jumped well and enjoyed an easy run on fence at midfield through to the home straight. Kept one-paced thereafter.
Pressed early from a high draw. Led 2-wide with a 1L advantage rounding the turn. Still hung on at 100 M but couldn't fend off the front trio closing stages.

Urged along after start but didn't quite pick up. Trailed 9Ls and was taken very wide swinging for home. Had enormous task in the straight but stormed home to cut down rivals inside final 250 M for a last to first victory.
Last out. Raced at rear on fence early stages. Gradually moved away from the rails passing 700 M. 4-wide 7Ls down on straightening. Progressed steadily in the straight.
Raced in 5th about 4Ls off pace at halfway, much the same turning for home when pressured, could only stay on at the same pace.
Travelled well 3-back on rails 6Ls off in 6th at 1200 M, closer turning for home and led about 150 M out, barely clung on for the win.
Never travelling in rear and always at least 7Ls from the speed, very poor again.
Went back initially, advanced out 3-wide no cover from halfway but still 5Ls back turning for home, not a bad finish given the tough trip.
Worked hard early out 3-wide no cover before slipping 2-wide and 1L back in 2nd from 1000 M to final turn, soon weakened.
Settled at least 7Ls from the speed in rear through to last section, never looked like finishing better than midfield.
Led by 1L on fence 1200 M out, held a 1L break before being heaed by the winner 150 M out, hung on to a place.
Handily placed in 4th between 2Ls and 4Ls from the speed before straightening, had every chance to at least place, lacked acceleration.
Very lethargic effort overall, fractious in gates and slow out, 10Ls last and ridden along early on, always chasing the majority of the field. (Questioned for poor performance.)
3-wide with cover towards rear at 1100 M, headway but 6Ls adrift turning in, stayed on very strongly down the centre, barely missed the win.
Awkward break, 6Ls back in 7th at the 1200 M, hard pressed to retain this proximity off last corner, ceded ground.
Enjoyed the box-seat trail in 3rd about 2Ls off the speed through to the final 400 M, couldn't have had a cheaper run and no excuses not to place.
Eased back as usual, 4-back on the rails 8Ls off pace at the 1200 M, closer turning in and briefly loomed a threat on rails at 300 M, run soon peaked.
Mostly in 12th or so about 8Ls off pace through first half, hard ridden to try improve turning for home, very one-paced.
Did not break well and worked hard to lead by 1L at 1000 M on fence, headed shortly after straightening and one-paced to conclude.
Handily placed in midfield with cover no worse than 3Ls from the speed before final bend, quickened up well to lead 150 M out, pulled clear.
At least 6Ls off pace at 1000 M in rear, still well back and struggling turning for home, made no impact. (Not fully tested final 100 M.)
On the leader's back on the fence less than 2Ls from the speed until the final turn, dropped away very tamely given his very soft passage.
3-back on the rails about 4Ls back in midfield in middle stages, always outpaced by the top trio.
Never travelling well and always at least 5Ls from the speed, dropped out rapidly from top of home straight, to trial.
Taken back from widest gate, towards rear 3-wide with cover and 6Ls off speed at halfway, stayed on from well back to get 2nd late on but no threat to winner.
3-wide no cover throughout, 2Ls off pace at 800 M and led at top of home straight, headed by winner at 150 M and lost 2nd close home. (Tactic questioned.)
Worse than midfield down back straight but began to struggle at the 600 M, unacceptably weak in the home straight, to trial.
Fractious in gates and slow to begin, 7Ls last at the 1000 M, marginally closer but still in rear turning for home, very weak conclusion.
2-wide and 1L off pace vying for 2nd down the back straight, still there with every chance off final bend, weakened steadily.
Slightly worse than midfield throughout, 4Ls off pace down the back, a little held up at top of home straight but he was well held anyway.
Had a nice spot with cover in 5th initially but over-raced in places, 3Ls back in 7th turning for home, very weak in the closing stages. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Midfield 4Ls behind early pace, left 4-wide on the circle and 3Ls back turning for home, one-paced thereafter and had his chance to place.
Eased back as usual, 8Ls off the leader 3-wide, not suited by the slow tempo, little dash 200 M.
Eased to sit behind the pace group, 4Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, made the move from 600 M, favoured by the slow tempo, dashed well 300 M to win by a narrow margin.
Took rail and led by 1-1/2Ls at slow pace, broke down 700 M.
Pushed to sit in front of midfield, 4Ls off the leader, trapped 3 to 4-wide and lost ground, harmed by the slow tempo, no progress in final stages.
Settled in box seat, benefited by the slow early sectionals, closed the race off strongly 300 M, just beaten by a nose in 2nd.
Pushed early but failed to cross in front, soon eased back for cover, 6-1/2Ls off the leader 3-wide, held up 400-200, dashed well when clear despite not suited by the slow pace.
Eased to rear for cover, 8-1/2Ls off the leader on the rails, harmed by the slow pace, finished the race of strongly 300 M, stormed home for a remarkable 3rd.
Hard ridden to keep up in midfield along the fence, 4Ls off the leader, dashed well 250 M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Hard ridden to go forward, 2-1/2Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide favoured by the slow tempo, moved up 600 M, in the lead 4-2, flattened afterwards.
Settled in a prominent spot 2-wide, enjoyed the slow early sectionals, led 500 M, hung on until 200 M flattened.
Pushed early, 6Ls off the leader on the fence, harmed by the slow pace, little dash 300 M.
Eased to sit in midfield, 5-1/2Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, harmed by the slow pace, just held ground in straight.
Eased to sit in midfield, 5-1/2Ls off the leader, trapped 3 to 4-wide and lost ground, not suited by the slow pace, dashed only fairly in straight.
Eased to rear, harmed by the slow pace, never competitive.
Settled at the back after a moderate start, remained well behind to straight, saved ground turning in, fought on steadily down inside to be nearest at finish.
Broke well from the one draw to lead on rails nearly making all, kicked 1.5L clear after straightening only to be caught in the shadow of the post.
Began restrained, soon crossed for rails run settling just worse than midfield, saved ground on rails turning in within 2L of pace, quickened up well to snatch victory final strides.
Settled within striking distance of 2L on rails, stalked leader into straight, ran home one-paced under pressure.
Chased leader to straight, dropped out.
Settled at the back, remained last into straight, only went past well-beaten horses closing stages.
Soon taken back to race towards rear far side, still in last few turning in, finished off well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Close up early, settled in forward of midfield, came under pressure entering home straight, produced moderate late impression closing stages.
Slightly slow out, but quickly picked up a prominent spot out wide, yielded ground from upon straightening, lost rider over 200 M out.
Raced wide towards rear to straight, soon faded.
Jumped well but raced wide in midfield throughout, took closer order entering home straight, weakened out of contention under pressure inside final 200 M.
Struck the overhead bar on jumping, ended up racing in a rearward spot 6Ls behind leaders, had enormous tasks turning in but struggled to pick up from off the pace.
Handily placed in 4th just off the pace, plugged on in the straight without troubling the principals.
Taken back on jumping and travelled in the rear throughout. Tailed off. (Unacceptable performance.)
Settled in mid-division, saved for a run until 300 M, emerged to have his chance and produced his usual consistent effort but found the front pair too strong.
Dropped back to a rearward position 5Ls off the leader, 3-wide and moved closer approaching the home turn, unable to quicken and stayed on one-paced to the line.
Taken to a position better than midfield, saved ground on the inside for much of the race, box-seated early in straight but unable to match the acceleration of the first two once into clear.

Crossed to the fence soon after the start, given a waiting ride in the rear and was 8Ls off the pace in middle stages, taken wide entering home straight but hung out badly and drifted across to the stands' side. (Jockey questioned.)
Average start, along the fence behind midfield but overraced from 800 M, switched out for a clear run approaching home straight but found disappointingly little in the run to the line.
Broke well but was allowed to drift back, settled 5Ls off the leader in a position behind midfield, driven 400 M out but could only plod on at the same pace. Disappointing.
Shaken up early to hold a midfield position, unable to shift in and was caught 3-wide without cover from 800 M, pressed on from 400 M but didn't find the pace to challenge.
Moved forward from the wide outside to force the pace upfront, headed 350 M and dropped out rapidly thereafter.
Broke well from the inside draw and travelled in midfield 5Ls off the pace, stayed on inside 400 M without posing any serious threat.
Quickly into stride and obtained a good early position tracking the leaders, responded positively under urge from 450 M and put in a sustained effort to nail the runner up inside 100 M.
Not the fastest away but gradually crept forward to race 1-out-1-back from leader, took over entering 350 M before being collared close home.
Began well enough, didn't press on and trapped 3 wide without cover 4Ls back, used too much in run, struggling turning and just battled away in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
No early pace, shared rear racing 7Ls from top end, saved ground on bend, still had job to do on turning, made many lengths along inside in straight to make frame.
Began in line, rolled forward to race outside leader, had chance 2Ls behind leader to turn, same margin down turning, couldn't match dash of winner but stuck on respectably.
Drifted back from a wide gate, shared rear 7Ls away from lead, always 3 wide with cover, still well back to bend, never really likely.
Began reasonably, assumed box seat 1-out-1-back 4Ls off speed, had good run to bend, didn't find much when asked and just kept on at same speed, steadied 100 M.
Checked early, mustered to race 5 to 6Ls back on fence, had even run thereafter, had plenty to do same margin down to bend, lacked a close in straight.
Standard getaway, ended up just behind midfield 6Ls from lead, even run in mid-section, improved 3 wide turning, battled final 200 M.
Bounced out OK, positioned well first behind leader, travelled 3Ls away on bend, eased out turning, tried hard but unable to run down winner.
Well enough away, raced midfield 4 to 5Ls away on rails, inside runs appeared turning, lacked a pick up and gradually faded out in straight.
Slow to muster, received a bad check at 1200 M, raced 4 wide with cover 7Ls away at rear, never really likely with track aiding leaders, struggled in run home.
Hit ground first, led field easily, kept 2Ls clear throughout and aided by front runner advantage, found another gear straightening, kicked clear and drew away for a commanding victory.
No early pace, caught 4 wide without cover 5Ls away from lead, used plenty in run, dropped out when emptied from turn.
Average jump, settled in behind midfield 6Ls back, had cover 3 wide but proved difficult to settle, lost position approaching bend, just finished off fairly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from a wide gate, raced 7Ls back at rear on rails, made progress 3 wide to bend, looked a place chance briefly at 300 M but didn't run on final furlong.
First to hit ground, raced outside leader before rolling to top, travelled well in mid-section, headed at 300 M but dug deep and drew away for battle final 200 M, kept fighting back late to score.
Out in line, angled into 2 wide line in rear division, raced 6 to 7Ls away in running line, improved between horses on bend, made only minor headway.
Displayed usual speed, took a sit before moving forward to race outside leader, levelled up turning and shaded inside horse, drew clear and held narrow advantage before winner fought back late.
Standard jump, took a close spot than usual 4Ls back on fence, improved position on rails turning, kept closing to take place but well behind first two.
Lacked early speed, ended up 6Ls or so away on rails, saved ground on turning, made steady progress between horses to 100 M before run closed. Not fully tested thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Standard jump, positioned 3 wide behind midfield, severely checked at 700 M, nearly fell, eased down thereafter.
Amongst first to jump, led before taking trail on leaders back, had every chance thereafter, struggling on turning, found little and dropped off final 300 M.
Began in line, drifted back to midfield from awkward draw, raced 3 wide with cover 5Ls back, made a 4 wide run turning, didn't pick up and just battled away late.
Even jump, slotted into a midfield role 4Ls or so away, had a good run in middle stages, improved 3 wide from bend, didn't let down as usual and just held ground final 200 M.
Reasonable break, posted 3 wide without cover 2Ls away, had a tough run to bend, same margin down and kept fighting to 200 M before run ended. (Bled.)
Tardy to begin, ended up 8Ls away at rear, always had field to beat, gradually weakened out, poor effort.
OK getaway, pushed up to race 3Ls away on fence, used nothing in run, took inside run turning, lacked pull up in straight and just faded.
No early pace as usual, ended up 7 to 8Ls away sharing rear, left with plenty to do and track pattern against, still well back at 300 M and lacked usual finish.
Drifted back from an awkward draw ended up 3 wide 5 to 6Ls away with cover in midfield, bumped on bend, kept coming down middle to make frame.
Went forward and took hold of a rail position early, eased back to midfield entering the back straight, ran on fairly inside 350 M but was hampered 150 M and lost his chance from that point.
In a position better than midfield, unable to slot in and was forced 3-wide without cover throughout the race, under serious pressure to hold his position passing 500 M before dropping out quickly.
Slow to begin, crossed to the fence behind runners and remained in the rear to straight, took time to get going and did his best work towards the finish.
Travelled 3-wide in a position behind midfield, 4Ls down inside 400 M, kept on in straight without troubling the first three.
Broke well, given a waiting ride in a rearward position, 5Ls behind leaders making the turn, ran on steadily inside 300 M without looking dangerous.
From a wide barrier used up plenty of early speed to cross for the lead, struggled to hold on early in straight and weakened rapidly from 200 M.
Slow into stride, drifted back to the rear 8Ls off the pace but was unsettled in early stages, made a wide run into straight but couldn't quite pick up from off the pace.
Went forward to race in a prominent position behind leaders, under urge making the home turn, trapped on the inner rails and was checked near 250 M and 200 M, never recovered.
Recovered from a slow start to race besides leader, briefly led in straight but found no extra inside 150 M.
In midfield early but was shuffled back down the back straight, attempted a run down the inside on straightening but was severely checked near 200 M and didn't have a clear crack.
Reasonable jump, severely checked near 1300 M but had a smooth run in midfield thereafter, quickened well on straightening to take the lead 150 M out, kept on to win with a little in hand.
Slotted into a 2-wide position better than midfield, well placed in 4th turning for home, led briefly near 200 M but was soon collared by the winner, rallied but unable to peg back.
Not the best away and after receiving at bump the start settled behind midfield 2-wide with cover. Never really threatened.
Parked on the back of the leaders 1 off with cover. Worked into the clear rounding the home turn and finished off well to win easily.
Raced with the backmakers, 1 off with cover. Commenced to close the race off however had some difficulty obtaining clear running and was not fully tested.
Wasn't the best to begin and took up last position. Never a factor.
Duelled for the lead in the 1 off line. Pinched a break early in the straight but was nabbed close to the winning post.
Knuckled over at the start then was beaten for speed settling midfield, 1 off with cover. Closed off soundly.
From a wide gate managed to race just off the speed before settling 3 back, 2-wide with cover in a trailing position. Battled away one paced in the final stages.
Ridden along to go forward and raced behind the principals. Coursed 2 to 3-wide without cover and gave in quickly over the final stages.
Settled back in the field along the rails. Whacked away at the same pace in the final stretch.
Slow into stride settling midfield the fence. Struggled in the run home.
Took advantage of gate 1 to spear through and race as joint leader along the paint. Faded inside the furlong.
Worked hard early to be amongst the leaders before dropping into a position 3 back, 3-wide with cover near the 600 M. Came wide in the straight but only paddled to the line.
Taken back from a high draw. 2-wide and trailed 7Ls from 1000 M. Peeled out on straightening and made a strong run inside final furlong. Won convincingly.
Well enough away. Sat 2-wide 3Ls behind the pace through to the home straight. Weakened after 200 M.
Raced within 4Ls of the pace on fence through to the home straight. No match with the winner's turn of foot but did well enough to figure in the quinella near the line.
Trapped 3-wide behind midfield despite urged along after start. Improved gradually passing 600 M and was 3Ls down turning in. Ran on fairly well in the straight.
Drifted back towards rear after start. Picked up top of the home straight but checked severely critical stages. Not in it thereafter.
2-wide 5 to 6Ls behind the speed through to the home turn. Barely saw daylight in the straight until final 150 M. Made a steady run when clear. (Lame right front leg day after.)
Began well. Eased to occupy a prominent spot through to the home turn. Ran on well in the straight without posing serious threat to the front trio.
Soon in the leading section on fence. Led out from 700 M. Hung on until the quinella pair finished off strongly closing stages.
Hard ridden for lead from a high draw early stages. Eased to travel 2-wide behind the leader from 700 M. Flattened inside final furlong.
Settled towards rear on fence until straightening. Checked severely at 200 M. Past beaten rivals thereafter.
Never far off the pace but trapped 3-wide without cover. Was a beaten horse soon after straightening before checked at 200 M.
Saddle shifted back on jumping. Raced 3-wide at rear through to the home turn. Swung widest and was 6Ls back on straightening. Kept making ground thereafter.
Led by 1L on the rails at the 1300 M, pressured on the circle and began to yield ground before final turn, dropped out further.
Always worse than midfield at least 5Ls from the speed, niggled along to stay in touch at the 600 M, weakened.
Midfield about 5Ls back with cover through first half, edged closer turning in, stayed on well late and went very close to winning.
Held the 'one-out-one-back' position about 2Ls back in 4th until the 600 M, 2Ls back in 2nd at the 200 M, no extra and had to settle for 4th.
Box-seated on rails 2Ls back in 3rd until the 600 M, dragged back a little before final turn, kept on at the same pace in the finish.
3-wide no cover throughout, at least 5Ls off the pace as well and extra work took its toll in the straight.
4-back on the rails in 7th and 5Ls down in middle stages and same turning for home, never posed much of a threat.
Taken back and 8Ls last at the 1200 M and not much better off spinning for home, always chasing and never likely.
1L back in 2nd at the 1200 M, remained in 2nd before taking off for home 450 M out, grabbed by the winner inside final strides.
One from rear 2-wide and 8Ls off pace at the 800 M, still well back making final turn, never likely.
3-back the fence about 4Ls off pace in 5th through to final turn, finished off strongly along the rails to lead on the line.
Blew the start, 6Ls back in 10th at halfway and similar off last curve, couldn't make up much ground.
9Ls back in last at the 1000 M, didn't get much closer.
Keen around midfield early on, pressed on to dispute lead at the 600 M, 1L down in 2nd at the 200 M, did just enough to hold 4th.
Checked at the 1300 M when 3rd or so, 3Ls back in 6th at halfway, further back turning for home, very one-paced.
Very slow break, 9th on rails and 5Ls back in middle stages and no better off on straightening, always chasing and no danger.
8Ls back in 9th or 10th initially, still well back turning in, no chance with winner but stayed on strongly to nick 2nd on the line.
Never any better than midfield, 5Ls back at halfway and worse taking the last turn, never likely.
Worked hard out wide no cover on first bend, got in 2-wide and 2Ls back in 3rd at the 800 M, struggling on the circle and unbalanced, weakened right out.
Crossed to lead on fence at the 1300 M, led or disputed lead setting a brisk pace until the home straight, still 1L ahead at 200 M, lost 2nd final strides.
4-back the rails in 7th about 4Ls off pace at halfway, 5Ls back in 5th turning in, kept on okay but no threat to principals.
Close-up at first, 2Ls back in 2nd at the 800 M and 3Ls back in 3rd turning for home, one-paced to conclude.
Taken back from wide gate, in rear between 7Ls and 9Ls off speed through to final turn, never really got involved.
Settled 3-back the rails about 4Ls off pace through first half, peeled out at top of straight and led inside the 100 M, kept on well.
Eased to sit in midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leader along the fence, not suited by the slow tempo, demonstrated strong finishing efforts final 300 M to grab another victory.
Hard ridden to take the rail and led by 2Ls at advantageous slow sectionals, hung on until 200 M weakened.
At rear, more than 10Ls off the leader 2-wide, harmed by the slow pace, little dash 200 M, ran on ok.
Pushed to occupy the box seat, checked 500 M and lost its position, just held ground in straight.
Settled in a 2-wide prominent spot, favoured by the slow tempo, however lack turn of foot in straight, flattened 200 M.
Eased back and took rail, 7-1/2Ls off the leader, dashed well 200 M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Eased to rear, more than 9Ls off the leader 2-wide, harmed by the slow pace, dashed strongly 200 M.
Pushed early, hold the rail spot in midfield, 6Ls off the leader, harmed by the slow pace, held up 4-2, dashed well when clear.
Eased back, sat 2-wide, crowded for room early, not suited by the slow tempo, never competitive.
Settled in front of midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the slow pace 2-wide, progressed steadily from 500 M, ran on well to the line for 3rd.
Pushed to obtain a prominent spot 2-wide, benefited by the slow early sectionals, made early move 600 M, led briefly 200 M, ran on well to finish 2nd.
Eased back, raced keenly, 6Ls off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the slow pace, no progress.
Began restrained from the widest barrier settling in last few on rails, slightly closer up coming out of far side, saved ground turning for home, kept on same pace without quickening.
Soon taken back to trail the field from a wide draw, produced good late finish down centre of straight but never threatening.
Began moderately, travelled in rear of midfield down far side, took slightly closer order about 500 M out, produced modest late impression to reach 4th near the line.
Slightly slow out, always well behind travelling 3-wide most of way, made no response under pressure in straight.
Began fairly , soon taken back to forward of midfield but wide without cover throughout far side and around the bend when gaining closer order, one-paced under pressure in the run home.
Settled towards rear, remained in last few around the bend, wide into straight, ran home one-paced.
Settled mainly 3-wide in midfield, wider turning for home, made no impression in straight, faded out tamely. (Performance questioned.)
Jumped well for a wide-ish draw, tracked leader to straight, came to hit the front upon straightening, soon moved clear to win convincingly.
Prominent in 3rd, not much worse in 4th when dropped away quickly about 500 M out. (Stewards reported horse to have been struck into and badly unbalanced. (Lame next day.)
Broke well, settled two back on rails, similar turning for home, found nothing.
Broke well, shared pace early, gained 1L advantage leaving Rock, soon headed by the winner after straightening, fought on doggedly without pegging back the winner.
Slightly slow out, soon picked up to midfield on rails, similar turning in, made short-lived effort after straightening, soon faded.
Taken back on jumping, switched off to the back trailing 9Ls behind the leader, had plenty to do turning in but never looked like getting involved on this Happy Valley debut.
Went forward but unable to shift in from a wide barrier, stuck wide without cover throughout and was beaten 500 M from home.
Broke well, travelled strongly in mid-division, quickened well down the inside to lead 150 M and strode clear to win impressively.
Began awkwardly and lost ground, ridden to hold a rail position towards the rear, under pressure 500 M out and couldn't quite pick up from off the pace.
Settled in a position behind midfield 6Ls back, vigorously ridden 400 M out, didn't pick up instantly but kept grinding away inside 200 M to take 4th close home.
Taken back to the rear, used little in running but had 8Ls to make up passing 400 M, made some headway down the outside but never looked like figuring in the finish.
Drifted back to a rearward position 7Ls off the pace, ran on steadily down the inside for a non-threatening 5th.
Quickly into stride, had a smooth run along the rail in a prominent position behind leader, sent to the front 300 M out and looked the most likely winner until the winner swept past 150 M from home.
Never far off the pace in 4th but was one-paced when asked to produce a finish, no extra inside 100 M.
Crossed to a 2-wide position and chased the pace in 2nd, kept on well in straight but found no answer to the winner's turn of foot.
Hard ridden forward to force the pace upfront but probably went off a little too fast, headed near 300 M and weakened rapidly.
Slow to muster pace despite being ridden, 4-5Ls back in a 2-wide position in midfield, under urge near 400 M and made only little impression in the run to the line.
In mid-division 5Ls off the pace, taken wide for a run passing 500 M, plugged on at same pace and had no extra inside 150 M.
Unable to shift in from a wide barrier, gradually taken back to the rear and crossed, ran on well in straight and was the only horse that could make significant ground from off the pace.
Always handy in the early stages, couldn't pick up with the front two and plugged on for a distant 3rd.
Towards the rear from the outset, still green and was outpaced from halfway, never in contention.
Went forward and quickly crossed to the fence, had a commanding lead and opened up a 3Ls gap inside 400 M, kept on strongly to the line under hands and heels riding. Won with plenty in hand.
In midfield but struggled to keep up making the home turn, beaten passing 400 M.
Slow to begin, crept closer to be 5Ls down in midfield halfway, stayed on one-paced and inclined to drift out in the run to the line.
Bounded in the air and lost ground at the start, soon recovered to race in a handy position better than midfield, responded well under pressure but couldn't get close to the runaway winner.
Slow to begin, given a patient ride in the rear and had over 10Ls to make up passing 400 M, made some headway from off the pace going past beaten runners.
Behind mid-division 8Ls back and raced a shade too freely, gradually outpaced turning for home and had nothing left in the finish.
Ridden forward to be prominent behind the early pace, found nothing when asked and faded away rapidly inside 300 M. (Lame right hind leg. Mucus.)
Raced midfield the fence. Railed up turning for home then peeled out early in the straight. Kept up workload nicely to grab an advantage close to the wire.
