Raced one of the joint leaders, 2-wide. Was found wanting over the concluding stages.
Travelled with the backmakers 3-wide with cover. Plugged away in the final stretch.
Vied for the lead along the paint. Was in front after the 400 M but peaked before the line and was inclined to lay out in the final stages.
Raced towards the tail of the field along the fence. Made up some ground over the final stages.
Settled with the rear division 2-wide with cover. Kept towards the inside in the straight and closed off soundly.
Fractious in the gates and was slow to begin however recovered to park on the back of the speed, 1 off with cover. Failed to respond to pressure in the straight.
Raced with the leading division, 3 deep, copped a check near the 800 M and 400 M, never recovered. Vet reported after the race that the horse is a Roarer. To trial.
Went forward but was trapped 4-wide without cover to the outside of the leaders. Not likely from turn, faded out.
Coursed 4-wide with cover on the back of the speed. Finished tailed out. To Trial
Travelled 3 deep, midfield with cover. Struggled in the run home.
Travelled towards the rear 4-wide with cover. Switched out turning for home and got to the line fairly.
Sat 2-wide behind the pace early stages. Moved up to race alongside leader passing 600 M. Looked dangerous at top of the straight but couldn't sustain effort. Lost out on 4th at finish.
Well enough away but trapped wide. Settled at rear from 800 M. 9Ls off turning for home. No impression thereafter.
Pressed early. Raced 2-wide behind leading section through to the home turn. Fought hard in the straight to make frame close home without troubling the front trio.
3-wide in the front rank until 450 M. Soon dropped off thereafter.
Trapped 4-wide without cover behind leading section. Pressed for home rounding the bend but soon out of contention in the straight.
Taken back from wide draw. 2-wide 6Ls behind the speed making the home turn. Ran past only beaten rivals in the straight.
Prominent spot and had a nice run throughout. Took charge inside 200 M in a matter of strides. Won with plenty to spare.
At rear on fence after start. 4Ls back turning in. Finished off well to figure in the quinella but was well beaten by the winner.
2-wide behind midfield through to the home straight. Flattened thereafter.
4-wide behind midfield through to straightening. Plodded on home.
Raced in midfield on fence through to the home straight. Rider stopped pressuring 300 M (Lame right front leg.)
Soon led on fence. Disputed lead passing 600 M. Hung on well in the home straight but found the quinella pair too strong closing stages.
3-back the fence and 4Ls off pace in 5th at the 1000 M, closer turning for home, 1L back in 2nd at the 200 M, couldn't quite reel in the winner.
5Ls off the pace in 7th at halfway, steadily slipped out of the picture from the top of the home straight.
Enjoyed a nice trial in 3rd on rails over 2Ls back until the 600 M, 1L back in 3rd turning in and led 300 M out, 1L clear at 200 M, all out to hang on.
Led by 1L on the rails down the back straight, headed at the top of the straight and dropped out of contention quickly.
4-back the rails about 5Ls behind at the 1000 M in midfield, edged a little closer off last turn, stayed on best of the rest for 3rd.
Slow to muster early pace, remained in rear throughout at least 8Ls from the speed, must trial again.
5-back along the rails about 8Ls off pace at 1000 M, ridden along to get closer off last bend, recovered minor late ground.
2-wide and half a length off pace in 2nd down the back straight, led briefly from top of home straight to the 300 M, fizzled out very quickly in final furlong.
Slowly away, about 7Ls off early pace in rear, not much closer turning in when pressured, ran on fairly well late, never nearer, may want more ground.
Worse than midfield down the back straight, 3-wide no cover on the circle, didn't find much down the centre of the track.
In 4th and 2-wide some 3Ls back at the 1000 M, still 4th on straightening, kept on unthreateningly at the same pace and barely held 4th .
In 6th about 5Ls off pace out 2-wide at 1000 M, a little nearer off last curve, stayed on okay, nearest at finish.
Always in rear duo, went back from wide gate, stayed at least 8Ls from the pace throughout, must trial again.
Slowest away, raced 4-back on rails initially, crept closer to go just over 2Ls back in 5th turning in, responded well for pressure to lead inside final 50 M. .
Very keen while hanging out down the back straight when rearward, 8Ls adrift turning for home, lost further ground, poor.
9Ls last at 1000 M but improved on the circle to be 4Ls back in midfield off last corner, stayed on well for 3rd without quite tackling quinella pair.
Towards rear 6Ls off early speed, 5Ls down on straightening, didn't quicken up sufficiently to place, all out to grab a moderate 4th.
Awkwardly away, worse than midfield when checked at the 800 M back to 12th about 7Ls off speed, never on terms.
Close-up in 4th about 3Ls off pace at the 1000 M, soon began to back-pedal, hung in while dropping out from top of home straight, to trial.
Led by 1L on rails before handing up and box-seating from 800 M to home turn when briefly leading, soon headed and one-paced to wrap up.
5Ls off pace in 8th at the 800 M, over 2Ls down turning for home, didn't find much under pressure and beaten 200 M out.
Nicely placed on rails in 3rd at the 1000 M, moved closer off last turn and led over 300 M out, was ground down by the winner inside the final 50 M.
Worked very hard out wide no cover to lead by 2Ls on rails at the 800 M, headed just before the final bend and steadily fell away.
Midfield on the rails down the back straight, briefly tight for room when challenging 2Ls off pace at top of home straight, one-paced when clear.
Slowly away, worse than midfield trapped 4-wide no cover from the 800 M, 5-wide (widest of all) into straight, extra work took its toll.
Caught 3-wide no cover down the back straight when 4Ls off pace in 6th or so, worse off spinning for home, dropped out very rapidly.
Handy better-than-midfield position 4Ls off pace at 800 M, struggling to lie up turning for home, ceded ground very rapidly.
Shared lead easily at good pace, ran on strongly to the line, dominated 100 M, just shared the lead in final two strides.
Eased to rear, never competitive.
Eased back, 3Ls off the good pace, progressed steadily 300 M, closed off strongly to the line and shared the win in last 2 strides.
Awkward away, hard ridden to keep up in midfield, 3Ls off the good pace, soon emptied 400 M.
Shared lead, overhauled 300 M, ran on ok to the line.
Shared lead easily at good pace, out of fuel 250 M.
Bumped start, eased to sit behind the leaders, 1-1/2Ls off the good pace, flattened 300 M.
Raced away from the main bunch along the inside part of the 1000 M chute, never better than midfield.
Hard ridden early but failed to muster, never competitive at rear.
Eased to sit just off the good pace, raced keenly, weakened 200 M.
Eased to sit just off the pace, made the move early from 500 M, led 400 M, hung on until 100 M overhauled, ran on for 3rd.
Slow away, eased to sit in midfield, 2Ls off the good pace, blocked 4-2, ran on well when clear.
Eased back, 6Ls behind the good pace, ran on ok in final stages.
Shared lead easily at good pace, soon weakened 250 M, hampered 200 M and lost further ground.
Broke well from the widest barrier, raced wide without cover down far side, shuffled back to midfield around the bend, made creditable late impression inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Slightly slow out, gradually picked up to be 2L 3rd around the bend, similar turning in, kept on well.
Jumped moderately, made no impression throughout, did nothing in straight.
Broke well from a high draw, amongst leaders early before shuffling back to 4-wide midfield approaching home bend, went backward turning in and made no show in straight.
Began awkwardly losing ground, settled wide in last position far side, in similar awkward position turning for home, ran past well beaten horses down centre of straight.
Began with others, raced 3-wide in midfield most of way to straight, kept on one pace. (Tactic questioned.)

Began with others, niggled at early to share the pace outside joint leader, held slender advantage turning for home, given reminders early in straight but always in command under hands and heels final stages.
Began only fairly, gradually picked up under urge to dispute lead along rails, narrow 2nd turning for home but unable to peg back eventual winner throughout closing stages.
Jumped moderately, settled just worse than midfield before losing position approaching home bend, towards rear into straight, fought on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Settled in forward of midfield on rails, soon weakened out of contention after straightening.
Began fairly, soon ridden to muster speed, settled in forward of midfield to straight, ran home one-paced.
Began fairly, gradually settled in last few on rails, made no impression in the run home.
Held up behind midfield 4 to 5Ls back, squeezed through to challenge inside 400 M, stayed on well to miss out narrowly on 2nd.
Began awkwardly, raced in a 3-wide position towards the rear, 4Ls down passing 400 M and could only plug on at the same pace.
Prominent early but was shuffled back to midfield rounding the home bend, steadied near 400 M to obtain a run but couldn't find much when cleared.
Switched off to the rear 8Ls behind leaders and used little in running, switched wide to challenge in straight but responded only fairly.
Up with the pace early before emerging as the clear cut leader near 1300 M, kept on well in straight only to find the winner too strong.

Awkwardly away, 3-wide in midfield but was left without cover from 1200 M, gradually strode forward to race alongside leader, weakened rapidly inside 400 M. Tailed out. (Jockey and trainer questioned.)
Positioned in midfield and always going nicely, made smooth headway to join the leaders near 200 M, came clear and soon had the race won in good style.
Went forward as expected, raced along the fence one back from leader, looked a threat early in straight but found no extra inside 200 M giving impression that the step up in trip did not suit.
Assumed a rail position behind midfield, under pressure from 600 M and dropped away quickly passing 250 M. Tailed out.
Settled 3Ls back in midfield along the fence, box-seated early in straight but had every chance when cleared for a run 300 M out, unable to step up a gear and just held ground in the run to the line.
Drawn wide and was gradually eased back to the rear obtaining cover, 5Ls to make up going into straight, stayed on down the outside without troubling the principals.
Standard jump, ended up trailing speed 3 wide 2Ls away, had a fair run to bend, took gap on turning and came after leader, hit front inside 150 M and kept on well to defy late challenge.
No early pace, soon back with last few 6 to 7Ls off pace 2 wide, had a standard trip to bend, stuck to fence turning, made good headway final 300 M without looking likely.
Amongst first to hit ground, soon took a trail on leaders back, had a good trip to bend but did overrace, didn't find much and struggled late.
Began with rest, slotted in nicely 2Ls off speed behind leaders, raced keenly and moved 3 wide without cover on bend, lacked usual dash and just battled at same speed in straight.
Away fairly, pressed on to race outside leader, raced on level terms throughout, unable to quicken on turning, steadily lost touch late.
Standard jump but showed usual pace to take up running, shared lead throughout at an even tempo, fought off rivals to inside 150 M but didn't see out journey late.
Taken back from awkward gate, positioned 3 wide with cover 5Ls or so back, gradually progressed on bend, shifted to middle and picked up nicely late just failing to run down winner.
Tardy into stride, ended up racing 5Ls away on fence, shifted 2 wide on circle, had job to do on turning, did best work late to be nearest on line.
Allowed to drift back from a wide alley, settled 5 to 6Ls away in running line, amongst last few turning, switched to outside rail in straight, made many lengths going down in 3 way go.
Outpaced early, soon at rear 7Ls or so from front, always trailing to bend, plenty to do turning, shifted wide and picked up late when race was over. Needed further.
Even jump, settled closer than usual 3Ls away in 2 wide line, had an easy time to bend, behind horses on turning, made gradual progress in straight to be not far away at finish.
Out in line, assumed a midfield role 3Ls away on rails, used nothing in run, steadied at 800 M, pushed along approaching bend, found nothing and gradually weakened.
Jumped with them, pushed on but unable to slot in and raced 3 wide without cover, pushed 4 wide on bend, 1L down and struggling turning, faded right out in straight.
Awkwardly away, regathered soon to race 3Ls back in running line, bit keen in mid-section, close enough turning but lacked usual finish and just battled away in straight.
Jumped nicely, rolled forward to race outside leader early, continued to apply pressure, took up running on circle, headed shortly after turning but soon weakened out.
Amongst first few to break, positioned handily on back of speed, same margin down but first outside leader turning, didn't let down and soon steadily faded.
Began with rest, posted 4 wide without cover early, used plenty still working wide on speed to bend, soon struggling on straightening, folded easily.

Fast away, pressed on to take top spot, did some work early, eventually took trail after continued pressure, soon challenged on straightening, lead and was clear to 150 M, couldn't match acceleration of winner late.
Even getaway, didn't have much pace and raced 5 to 6Ls back on rails, shifted 2 wide on bend, urged along turning, picked up final 200 M making good progress to be in frame.
Began nicely, ridden up to hold a spot 3 wide in midfield with cover, raced 3 to 4Ls away throughout, looked to have plenty to offer on turning, peaked inside 200 M and just held ground thereafter.
Drifted back to race at rear 6 to 7Ls from leaders, coursed 3 wide with cover in mid-section, still with last few on turning, made many lengths down centre to be closest at finish.
Allowed to drift back from a wide gate, settled 7Ls or so away at rear, still back with last few with job to do turning, made only minor ground without looking likely.
No early speed, settled 5Ls away on fence, urged along on bend, found zero.
Little early speed, assumed spot 5Ls back in midfield, still back in pack on turning, worked home evenly down middle of course to be closest at finish.
Became in line, pressed on but caught 3 wide without cover, kept working 1 to 2Ls from speed off trail, niggled turning, hard run took toll and no extra gear final 300 M.

No early speed, ended up in rear 6 to 7Ls away on rails, used little to bend, continued to improve turning, took run between horses and let down with a big sprint, surged to lead inside 100 M and went on to win easily.
Began with them, assumed role behind lead, had ideal run thereafter, shuffled 3 back fence on circle, improved soon after straightening, kept closing before run ended at 100 M. (Lame after race.)

Behind mid-division one off the fence, hampered by the slow pace and difficult to settle, shifted wider approaching home straight for a clear run, picked up nicely from off the pace to finish a close 3rd.
Behind midfield 5Ls back early, commenced his move round the outside of field 700 M from home, hit the front early in straight but did not last out the final 100 M and was swamped close home.
Handily placed in midfield, travelled well to straight but ran on one-paced. (Subsequently retired.)
4Ls back in midfield, inconvenienced by the slow tempo, into clear 350 M, ran on steadily to take 4th.
Behind leaders early but unsuited by the slow pace and moved to the front rank passing 1000 M, struggled to keep up on straightening, weakened inside 300 M. (Subsequently retired.)
Towards the rear, hard ridden 400 M out but gave very limited response. (Subsequently retired.)
Gradually moved forward, crossed to the lead passing 1400 M but dropped back to midfield approaching the home turn, had his chance but never really got going.
In midfield early but was steadied near 800 M and shuffled back, 3-wide turning in, ran on only fairly and found no extra close home.
3-wide and 7Ls back towards the rear, made the home turn widest of all, ran on well but hung in under pressure and lost out in a close finish.
Slow to begin, caught 3-wide in midfield for most of the trip, plugged on for 5th but lacked a change of pace.
Went forward from a wide barrier, crossed to the lead from 1100 M, under pressure 450 M out, soon faded.
Always prominent chasing the pace in 3rd, looked threatening early in straight but turned flat inside 250 M and faded away.
Switched off to the rear, given a waiting ride along the fence 8Ls back, still had plenty to do passing 300 M but delivered a strong challenge and won determinedly.
Placed towards the rear 7Ls back, not suited by the slow tempo and was difficult to settle in middle stages, had plenty to do turning in but couldn't pick up. Well beaten.

Not the best away then struck interference early in the race to settle midfield on the rail. Got all the breaks along the fence after the 500 M, and once in the straight let down strongly to win easing down.
Went forward early before settling off the pace in a 2-wide position. Had no excuses.
Settled 3 back the fence. Switched out in the straight and maintained a good gallop right to the wire.
Raced handy to the speed along the rails. Faded inside the furlong.
Raced with the backmakers along the paint. Kept to the inside in the straight but failed to close off.
From a wide barrier settled towards the rear 2-wide with cover. Shifted in near the 300 M to take inside runs and chased to the line well.
Settled towards the rear, 3-wide with cover. Came wide entering the straight but struggled thereafter.
Made satisfactory late ground after settling in last position.
Began well the drifted back to travel 2 deep in a midfield position, with cover. Raced flat throughout.
Ran along in front but was found wanting over the final stages.
Slow into stride settling towards the back of the field 2-wide with cover. Never a factor.
Raced behind midfield 3-wide without cover after the 800 M. Plugged to the line.
Was taken back from a wide alley to settle around 2nd last position on the fence. Made some late ground in the straight.
Tracked the leader along the fence. Had every chance however weakened noticeably in the run home.
Taken back from a low draw. Made up some ground when asked from 400 M. No extra inside final furlong.
Raced in midfield on stand's rail early stages. Shuffled back at 650 M. Made some headway under pressure inside 300 M.
Led all along. Pulled nicely clear of others closing stages but unable to withstand the finishing effort of the winner near the post.
Midfield on stand's rail through to 400 M. Passed only beaten rivals thereafter.
Began awkwardly but soon moved up to race behind the leader. Pressed 400 M out but couldn't find extra gear. (Abnormal breathing noise).
At rear early. Picked up from 300 M and finished off well. Closest at finish.
Raced within 4Ls of the speed and kept on steadily in run home.
Raced behind the leader early stages. Failed to follow when the race got serious after 400 M.
Raced behind the leader early stages. Asked 450 M out but failed to respond. Weakened inside 250 M.
Good jump. Travelled nicely down the centre of the track behind the leader. Hung on well inside 300 M for a minor placing without troubling the front pair.
Midfield through to midpoint. Dropped out thereafter.
Never far off the pace on stand's rail. Hard ridden to chase the leader 450 M out. Snatched victory in the last few strides.
Never better than midfield. Lacked a finish late.
Restrained to sit midfield early stages. Found nothing when asked inside 350 M.
No early speed, 8Ls last at halfway and soon came under pressure, always chasing the majority of the field.
2-wide and about 7Ls back in 12th at 1200 M, no closer on straightening, never really in the hunt.
Never any better than midfield, at least 6Ls off pace down back straight.
Positioned handily on pace but always niggled along, 2Ls back at halfway but 3Ls behind off last bend, very one-paced.
Close to the pace but 3-wide no cover throughout, 2Ls back in 3rd or so down back straight, tiring before home turn, one-paced.
3-wide but with cover about 4Ls back in midfield at halfway, a little worse off turning for home, stayed on okay to nick 2nd on the line.
Slowest out, rearward on rails through first half, 6Ls down turning in when held up slightly, kept on fairly, never nearer.
Mostly wide without cover, towards rear at least 6Ls from early pace, recovered minor late ground in homestretch but no real threat posed.
Never travelling, pressured in rear soon after the jump, struggling long before the final bend and soon eased out of race, finished "distressed".
Held the 'one-out-one-back' position in 4th or so about 3Ls off pace until final turn, had his chance to place.
Around midfield with cover 5Ls back at the 1000 M, steadily ceded ground, performance deemed unacceptable.
Pressed on from widest gate to lead by 1L at 1200 M, clear by 2Ls at one point but overhauled inside the 200 M and lost 2nd on the line.
Slowly away but recovered to hold a position in midfield on the inside, 5Ls back off last turn, offered little response.
Always prominent, 2Ls back in 2nd at 1200 M, less than 1L back turning for home, led inside the 200 M and stayed on well.
4Ls back in 5th at halfway and same margin back in 6th turning for home, kept on at the same speed.
4-back the fence 6Ls behind early pace and only marginally closer spinning for home, responded well to pressure, nearest at the finish. (Tactic questioned.)
Didn't press forward as is often the case, worse than midfield throughout at least 5Ls from the speed, no danger. (Tactic questioned.)
3-wide no cover down back straight when 3Ls back in 4th and same on straightening, stayed on well and just missed out, better over further.
3-back the rails about 4Ls off pace at halfway, 3Ls down turning for home, couldn't get any closer.
Soon led on fence and 1L clear until straightening, headed around 200 M out and lost 2nd close home.
2Ls back in 3rd at halfway, progressed to lead 200 M out and all out to hang onto the win.
Enjoyed a cushy trip in 2nd on fence and 1L off pace through to last turn, no excuse for picking up better after that soft run.
Not travelling well early on in rear, 8Ls last at halfway, 6Ls adrift turning for home, recovered good late ground when the race was over. (Tactic questioned.)
Over-raced a little down back straight in midfield, with 4Ls to make up off last corner, made up a little late ground but no genuine threat.
Went back from widest gate, at least 6Ls off pace out wide through to final bend, very one-paced.
4-back the fence and 5Ls off speed through to final bend, never likely to make an impact.
Always rearward at least 7Ls from the speed.
Always one from the rear at least 6Ls from the front, never a factor.
Pushed early but lacked speed, settled behind midfield, 6-1/2Ls off the solid tempo, made ground steadily final 300 M, closed off most strongly 100 M, dominated in last few strides.
Hard ridden early but trapped 5 to 6-wide outside the pace group at stable bends, took rail and led by 1-1/2Ls at solid tempo in back straight, soon emptied 400 M.
Hard ridden early to obtain a position behind the leading group, 3-1/2Ls off the solid tempo, trapped 3 to 4 wide throughout, just held ground in straight despite the negative racing situations.
Pushed to occupy a prominent spot just off the solid pace 2-wide, led 400 M and drifted away by 3Ls, hung on until last few strides, just missed by a neck.
Hard ridden to cross in front, settled in box seat, ran on until 200 M flattened.
Eased at start to cross at rear, never competitive.
Eased back and travelled along the fence, never better than midfield, checked 200 M.
Midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the solid tempo 2 to 3-wide, progressed steadily 300 M to secure 3rd.
Eased back, 7-1/2Ls off the solid pace, trapped 3 to 4-wide throughout and lost too much ground, bumped 400 M, made ground 200 M.
Hard ridden early to keep up in midfield along the fence, 4-1/2Ls off the solid pace, no progress in final stages.
Hard ridden to obtain a prominent spot on the fence, 3Ls behind the solid pace, weakened 300 M.
Eased at start to cross behind the field, 8Ls off the solid pace 2-wide, progressed steadily in straight, momentarily held up 400 M to 200 M.
Pushed early but failed to muster and held 5 to 6-wide at stable bends, crossed to 3-wide in midfield in back straight, 5-1/2Ls off the solid pace, made some ground in straight. Peaked 200 M.
Very slow away, at rear, 8Ls off the solid pace on the rails, blocked most straight, checked 200 M, never tested.
Nudged along to hold coveted one-back spot on rails, angled off rails for a clear run turning in, soon hit front and drew 1L clear under pressure inside 200 M, just held off runner-up's late surge.
Had only a fair start, gradually picked up to dispute lead most of way until top of straight, folded up quickly. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Began moderately, soon shuffled back to the tail-end, clear last turning in, kept on past beaten horses in the run home. (Jockey reprimanded for not riding out.)
Showed no early speed, niggled along towards rear, produced modest late impression inside final 200 M past well beaten horses.
Raced wide without cover just better than midfield far side, yielded ground from home bend.
Ridden along from middle draw to dispute lead gaining narrow advantage around the bend, headed over 200 M out and soon died on its run.
Broke well from a wide barrier, soon snatched back to rear of midfield, commenced move turning for home, made up good ground down straight to be nearest at finish.
Always well there, raced one-out-one-back most of way to straight, could only keep on at the same pace without quickening under pressure in straight.
Jumped moderately, travelled in forward of midfield most of way to straight, baulked for a run 400 M out and again had to be steadied at the 200 M, fought on hard without much recovery.
Fair start, settled on rails just better than midfield, turned into home straight within 3Ls of tiring leaders, but ran home one-paced.
Began awkwardly losing ground, remained struggling in last few throughout.
Soon taken to the rear from the widest barrier, trailed the field to approaching home bend, saved ground on rails improving to forward of midfield turning in, folded up quickly.
Taken back on jumping, kept wide and unable to obtain cover throughout the trip, inclined to hang in final 300 M and was a difficult ride.
Chased the pace in a handy position just behind leaders but found nothing off the bridle on straightening. Another disappointing effort.
Began slowly, ended up towards the rear 8 to 9Ls off the leader, in an unpromising spot turning in and had to shift wide for a run but was steadied near 300 M and close home. (Not fully tested.)
Jumped well but was allowed to drift back, settled behind midfield 6Ls off the pace, waited with until 400 M but was held up momentarily approaching 200 M, ran on OK once into clear.
Hard ridden to a 3-wide spot in mid-division after a sluggish start, raced keen over the home turn, couldn't find a change of gear as the race heated up and was merely plodding on.
Tracked leader prominently in 2nd, inclined to hang in for the major part of the race, struggled to keep up passing 300 M, dropped out rapidly.
Switched off to a rearward position as expected, urged along passing 600 M and was taken wide on straightening, took time to get going and did his best work towards the line.
Drawn widest but slotted into a 2-wide position behind midfield just before the turn, switched out for a run passing 500 M, ran on well but was never able to catch the runaway winner.
Ordinary jump, obtained a 2-wide position in midfield, had 6Ls to make up on the runaway leader inside 400 M but unable to switch another gear and remained one pace in the run to the line.
Taken across behind runners from a wide draw, travelled in the rear throughout and ran very green under pressure in straight. No impression.
Checked at 1000 M and shuffled back to a position behind midfield, attempted a run down the inside passing 400 M but didn't pick up and never got involved.
Broke well from the inside gate and was well placed on the fence 3Ls behind leader, kept on fairly but was gradually outpaced over the final 200 M.

5Ls back on the fence in mid-division and travelled smoothly throughout, although not looking like to catch the runaway winner, he showed good acceleration and battling qualities inside 400 M to finish best of the rest.

Quickly into stride and grabbed the lead as expected, went a decent gallop up front and kicked 4Ls clear passing 400 M, kept on strongly and never looked like stopping under the guidance of a 10 lb claimer.
Standard jump, behind midfield on fence 6Ls or so back, not asked throughout, urged along turning, lacked a response in straight.
Out in line, ended up 3 wide in midfield, 5Ls back with cover throughout, did share of work in mid-section, didn't quicken but steadily worked home to make frame.
Well enough away, assumed prominent spot behind leaders, did some work with solid speed on, found little from bend and dropped off quickly.
Fair to begin, held a spot 3Ls or so away in midfield, had easy run in mid-section, gradually improved to bend, kept on respectably but couldn't get near first two.

Showed early speed, pressed on to take up running, set a genuine tempo throughout, still held advantage turning, stepped up a notch turning, defied challenger to 100 M before overhauled. Well clear of rest.
No early speed, ended up amongst last few on rails, aided by tempo 8Ls away throughout, still last turning, made some minor progress between horses in straight but never likely.
Began well, worked across to race at leaders girth, travelled well to bend, 1/2L down turning, gradually challenged and gained upper hand final 100 M to score another cosy win.
Standard jump, settled 6Ls back in running line, in rear division throughout, angled wide turning in, made some ground to 200 M before run ended.
Reasonable beginning, settled in nice spot 3Ls down behind leaders, raced 2 wide to bend, found nothing from turn and faded out cheaply.
Amongst first to break, pushed forward but trapped 3 wide without cover, used too much to bend, 2Ls down turning, kept to task before hard run took toll inside 250 M, held ground to 100 M.
Began in line, positioned just behind midfield 5Ls back, niggled approaching bend, no response and gave in from 300 M.
No early toe, ended up 7 to 8Ls back at rear racing 3 wide, had cover throughout, still back with last few on turning, set too much to do and only made minor ground.
Ordinary break, ended up back with last few, 7 to 8Ls away throughout, not used in mid-section, had plenty to do turning, passed only tired runners.
Average jump, mustered to track speed 3 wide 3Ls back, had even trip to bend but used some with solid tempo, pushed along turning, didn't let down and gradually dropped out.
First to hit ground, pressed on but caught 3 wide without cover, used too much in mid-section, spent force turning and faded out shortly after.
Showed usual early speed to go forward and race outside leader, challenged inside horse throughout, kept going to 200 M but couldn't lift thereafter and lost touch last bit.
Standard jump, mustered to hold a prominent spot, had nice trail 1 out 1 back in mid-section, right there challenging on turning, in mix to 200 M before run ended soon after.
Began well, steadied and drifted right back in first furlong, back and 3 wide 7 to 8Ls back turning, closed soundly down middle to be nearest on line.
Began in line, went forward and raced 3 wide with cover 2 to 3Ls off speed, used share of petrol in run, took some time to get going, leaving bend but did best work final 200 M to be right in finish.
Slow into stride, settled in rear division 8Ls or so from speed, was difficult to settle in middle stages, no response in straight.

Slow into stride, pushed up along fence in midfield, had an easy time 3 to 4Ls back throughout, followed eventual winner on bend, made a strong challenge inside 200 M, got close but winner had a bit in hand.
Standard jump, ended up 6 to 7Ls away on rails, used little and saved ground on bend, didn't quicken but just kept on at one speed in run to finish.
Began evenly, took a spot 3 to 4Ls back in midfield, had every chance to bend, pushed into clear on turning, found little in straight.
Out nicely, pressed forward to ensure a rails run, forced to race in unfamilar role in front, challenged on circle, kept on to 200 M before run ended, kept on to make frame.
Average jump, regathered to drive up into spot behind leader, had run of race thereafter, angled clear on turning, took over passing 200 M, kept to nicely to score with some in reserve.
Moderate beginning, ended up in midfield 5Ls back, had easy time using little to turn, lacked usual finish and just battled away in straight. (Rider reported not comfortable in finish.)
Drifted back from an awkward alley, raced best part of 10Ls back on rails, still detached turning, impossible spot at 300 M but closed soundly along inside to be closest at finish.
Began with them, pushed on to race in midfield, was 5Ls back 3 wide with cover throughout, was keen to bend, steadied turning, made no serious progress.
Taken back early and travelled in 2nd last throughout, taken wide for a run in the home straight, made some headway from the rear but inclined to hang in and was difficult to ride.
Prominently placed in 3rd after cutting out the early running, remained one pace early in straight and found no extra inside 200 M.
Taken back to a position behind midfield, caught 3-wide without cover from 800 M, delivered a strong finish inside 300 M to be closest on the line.
Shifted in for a rail position after the start, raced towards the rear 6-7Ls off the steady pace, kept to the inside and ran on fairly in the run home.
Urged along to maintain his position after the jump, settled in midfield 5-6Ls behind leader, shifted wide in straight to obtain run but responded only fairly.
Obtained a run along the fence in mid-division, 5Ls down inside 400 M but didn't respond to riding. Soundly beaten.
Quickly crossed to the rail from a wide barrier, settled in 5th 3Ls behind the leader, held every chance turning in but couldn't muster sufficient pace to challenge the principals.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Rolled forward and led them from 1200 M, set a steady tempo up front, was taken on making the home turn, kept on before weakening rapidly inside 100 M.
2-wide behind midfield 4-5Ls back, into clear 300 M and closed off the race well despite being carried in over the concluding stages.
Began awkwardly and lost ground, ended up racing in the rear over 10Ls back, had plenty to do turning in but never picked up from off the pace.
Handily placed in a position better than midfield and not far off the pace, stayed on inside 300 M without posing serious threat.

Ridden along but couldn't go the early speed of the race and was posted 4-wide without cover until finally pushing forward after coursing deep to settle in the lead 1 off at the 900 M. Completely gassed in the final stages.
Went forward but was caught wide and without cover on the pace. Gradually gave ground on the circle and finished well back. (Vet reported mucopus.)
Box seated early then vied for the lead approaching the 1000 M. Gained cover to travel 1 out 1 back near the 600 M. Struggled in the final stretch.
Began evenly then drifted back to settle in last position. Saved ground rounding the home turn then hooked to the outside and made good late ground.
Raced near the back of the field along the fence. Railed up in the straight but only plugged to the line.

Travelled early along the fence behind the leader but commenced to pull hard and shifted to the 1 off line near the 1000 M. Continued to race hard and near the 800 M shifted out to travel 3 deep without cover. Kept on well.
Showed good gate speed to lead early before handing up and taking a trailing position near the 600 M. Didn't find any extra at the business end.
Jumped on terms with the field then settled 3 back the rails. Shifted off the fence prior to the 600 M, worked into the clear early in the straight and won easily.
Travelled in 2nd last position, with cover. Sought an inside passage in the run home but ran into traffic problems and was held up for the final furlong.
Raced midfield 1 off with cover. Reaching the 700 M was 3-wide with cover, but was found to be one paced when under pressure over the concluding stages.
Bounced out in front but was trapped 3 deep without cover early before crossing to the fence by the 1000 M. Was well and truly overhauled by the 200 M.
Settled towards the rear, 1 off with cover. Never looked likely.
Urged to race in the leading section after start. Eased to a prominent spot 900 M out. Took a split between runners at 200 M. Ran on strongly to hold off rivals close to home.
Began fairly. Soon driven to race 2-wide behind the leader passing 900 M. Moved up to challenge the leader 450 M out. Found no extra inside 200 M.
Taken back from high draw. Came widest and was 8Ls back leaving the bend. Took some time to pick up but finished strongly inside final furlong. Closest at finish.
Good jump but was unable to work across. Drifted back to race 3-wide at midfield without cover. 4Ls back on straightening. Just held ground thereafter.
Jumped nicely but was trapped 4-wide. Took lead on fence from 850 M. Disputed lead passing 450 M. Hung on until weakened inside 100 M.
Well enough away but was drifted back to race 2-wide at midfield. 4-wide 4Ls down on straightening. Closed off well in the straight but failed to match on terms with the front pair.
2-wide in rear section. 7Ls back rounding the bend. Kept progressing in the straight.
Slow to begin. Sat behind midfield on fence. 6Ls off the speed making the home turn. Ran on fairly well in the straight.
Ridden early and raced in 'one-out-one-back' through to the home turn. One-paced to conclude.
Began well but was taken to race 3-wide behind midfield. 6Ls down turning for home. Kept making headway in the straight.
Away in line but was soon checked to rear. 8Ls behind the pace on fence on turning. Made up ground steadily in the straight.
Hard ridden early to race better than midfield on fence. Similar position turning in. Failed to get clear run in the straight.
4-back on rails in 7th at 1200 M, same position and 4Ls back swinging for home, kept on pretty well along the inner, just missed a place.
No early pace and caught 3-wide no cover from the top of the back straight in a worse-than-midfield position, never likely in the home straight.
Enjoyed a soft trail on fence in 3rd or 4th about 2Ls behind lead until final turn, all out to just snare a place.
Eased back, 8Ls last in middle stages, tried to loop field from the 500 M, widest and 5Ls adrift off last bend, could not land a blow.
Taken back from widest gate, 7Ls behind at halfway, 6Ls adrift on straightening, made some moderate late ground, never nearer.
3-back the fence about 4Ls off pace at 1000 M, closer turning for home, dangerous when 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, couldn't quite follow through.
Slowest away, on the rails and 7Ls back in 10th at 1200 M, marginally closer turning in, recovered some late ground without really threatening.
Led by 1L at the 1200 M, joined for the lead from 600 M to home turn, 1L clear at 300 M with every chance, swamped inside final furlong.
2-wide in 8th or so some 6Ls back at 1100 M, with about 5Ls to make up at 400 M, kept on okay but never likely to trouble principals.
Caught wide on first bend, pressed on to be 1L back in 2nd at 1100 M, disputed lead out 2-wide at 600 M, fizzled out from top of home straight.
Best away, eased back into 'one-out-one-back' slot in 4th from 1000 M to 600 M, pressed on 3-wide turning in, led 150 M out, ridden out strongly.
Never travelling very well, 5Ls back in 6th at halfway with cover, closer turning for home but pressured, flat in the finish. (Questioned for performance.)
Eased back to race 10th early on, 7Ls off the front at the 500 M, made up some late ground but no great danger overall.
Pressed on from widest gate to lead on fence by 1L at 600 M, 2Ls up turning for home, headed inside the 200 M and just clung on for a place.
Soon tracking leader in 2nd, 2Ls back in 2nd before final turn and led about 150 M out, grabbed by the winner 30 M out, held 2nd okay.
Soon 2-wide and slightly worse than midfield, 6Ls back in 7th turning for home, quickened up impressively to lead 30 M out, stylish win.
3-back on rails at the 600 M, 5Ls back in 6th turning for home, never likely to pick up the principals.
Always in the last couple of runners at least 4Ls from the speed. (Questioned.)
Prominent initially, 3Ls back in 4th off home turn, closer and every chance to place at the 200 M, run soon peaked.
Always worse than midfield, left 3-wide no cover from the 600 M and 5Ls back in 5th turning for home, outpaced.
Slowest away, soon 5Ls back in rear, 8Ls down turning for home, never on terms.
Eased back from widest gate, always towards rear and at least 4Ls from the speed.
Midfield 3Ls back early on, 6Ls back in 8th off last bend, ran on okay late but never likely to place.
Best away and led by 1L early on, headed at 600 M and 3Ls back in 3rd turning for home, every chance of a place at the 200 M, just missed out.
Eased at start and crossed towards the rail behind the field, 4Ls off the leader, favoured by the fast tempo and the rail-run, held up from 400 M to 200 M, made ground when clear.
Midfield, 2-1/2Ls off the fast pace along the fence, raced very keenly, ran on fairly in straight, flattened 200 M.
Eased back and took rail at rear, 5Ls off the leader, helped by the fast pace, but never progressed.
Eased to sit in midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the fast pace, trapped 3 to 4-wide throughout and lost too much ground, flattened 200 M.
Eased to sit in midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, checked badly 400 M, flattened afterwards.
Settled in a prominent spot, 2Ls behind the fast pace 2-wide, kicked away 200 M to produce a comfortable victory.
Pushed early but not muster, trapped 3 to 4-wide throughout, never better than midfield.
Awkward away, hard ridden forward and took box seat, not suited by the fast early sectionals, dropped off rapidly 500 M.
Pushed to occupy a prominent spot as usual, 2Ls off the leader, trapped 3-wide without cover throughout, not suited by the fast tempo, held ground in straight and secured 3rd.
Eased back for cover, 5Ls off the leader 2-wide, suited by the fast pace, checked 400 M, lacked room 300 M, no progress when clear.
Trapped 2 to 3-wide at first bend, pushed further forward to take rail and led by 1L, not suited by the fast early sectionals, weakened 250 M.
Settled just off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the fast tempo, ran on well to the line for 2nd without much threat to the winner.
Travelled in one from last, saved ground turning in, switched out for a run over 250 M out, fought on steadily without threatening.

Began fairly with others, soon taken back from the middle draw to settle in mid-division, saved ground turning in, closed steadily under pressure to just fail to get up on line. (Rider lost whip 100 M out.)
Amongst leaders travelling 3-wide without cover, yielded ground quickly from home bend.
Began well from a wide barrier, quickly taken back to rear of midfield for cover, similar into straight and soon struggled.
Sluggish start, soon picked up to just worse than midfield, switched out for a clear run upon straightening, fought on doggedly to be nearest at finish.
Began moderately, quickly ridden to muster speed to lead holding more than 1L advantage around home bend, began to tire under pressure inside final 200 M, just lasted.
Slightly slow out, travelled in last few, near last swinging for home, made no progress in straight.

Began from the widest barrier, quickly settled at the tail- end of the field, commenced move around home bend circling the field, swung widest of all turning in, kept on at the one pace without quickening.
Always handy to straight, dropped away quickly from joint 2nd shortly after straightening.
Began with others, soon settled 2L off the pace on rail in 6th or 5th, closer up when disputing 2nd turning into straight, failed to quicken under pressure.
With leaders, lost touch from the Rock, struggled in midfield home bend. (Questioned.)
Raced wide without cover with leaders until dropped away quickly around home bend.
Tracked the early pace, couldn't accelerate away as they turned in and was brushed aside passing 150 M.
Began slowly and ended up racing in the rear 9Ls back, left without cover from 800 M and crept closer, plodded on inside 300 M but offered little threat to the principals.
2-wide in mid-division and had a smooth run throughout, given every possible chance but could only manage to stay one pace inside the final 200 M.
Towards the rear 7Ls back, taken wide for a run on straightening but couldn't pick up. Disappointing. (Lame right front leg next day.)
Went forward as expected and led steadily, enjoyed an uncontested lead throughout, collared near 150 M, rallied back but effort just flattened out in the closing stages. Sound effort.
Switched off to the rear, used little in running but had 8Ls to make up turning in, ran on strongly down the outside giving some late impression. (Jockey questioned on riding tactics.)
Behind midfield early, 6Ls down inside 400 M, didn't respond under urging and ran poorly in this step up in trip.
In a rearward position 6Ls back along the fence, in a very unpromising position turning in, shifted out for a run but was already done with passing 200 M.
Held a position along the fence in midfield, trapped on the inside in straight and couldn't come through behind leaders. (Not fully tested.)
Restrained to a position in midfield, raced a shade keen down the back straight, squeezed his way through to challenge in the final 200 M. A fine effort despite always being held by the winner.
Broke well and was placed handily in 4th 3Ls off the pace, put in a well timed challenge inside 300 M, picked up in good fashion to wear down the leader close home.

Stayed close to the pace in this step up in distance, tracked well behind leader and looked the most likely winner passing 200 M, briefly hit front but was run down by the first two just before the line.
Went forward on jumping from a wide barrier and raced 3-wide outside the lead, gave ground rapidly from 400 M.
Settled well in a 3-wide position in midfield, showed a good attitude and picked up well on straightening, edged right under pressure inside 100 M but still ran on.
Away with them, gradually moved up to a prominent position tracking the leaders, couldn't show a turn of foot on this soft going and plugged on for 4th.
In midfield early but struggled to keep up from 800 M, eased down. (Unacceptable performance.)
Ended up in the rear after a sluggish start, had to be shaken up approaching 800 M, soon beaten coming off the bend.
Jumped well, soon crossed and shared lead, acted well on this soft going and quickened nicely clear 400 M out, kept on strongly to the line and went beyond recall.
Well enough away, gradually dropped back to last before the home turn, had 9Ls to make up passing 400 M but couldn't pick up at all on this yielding surface.
Towards the rear 7Ls behind, lacked pace and was under serious pressure to stay in touch over the turn, never a factor.
Prominent early, steadied near 800 M and shuffled back to midfield, tracked only fairly and couldn't find anything when pressed in straight. Dropped out close home.
Vigorously driven forward after the start but was hampered near 1200 M, ended up in midfield 3Ls back, found less than expected and remained one-paced in the finish.
Ordinary jump, towards the rear early but took closer order in midfield before making the turn, taken wide near 350 M for a clear run and closed off the race reasonably.
Recovered from a slow start and settled in midfield 4Ls back, appeared to have every chance down the inside but had no more to give 200 M from home.
In the middle of the front rank disputing the lead, hung out inside 400 M, gradually weakened and didn't see out the final 100 M.
Broke well from the inside draw and enjoyed a smooth run along the fence, close enough on turning, ran on determinedly inside 400 M but couldn't match the winner's acceleration on this soft going.
Positioned just off midfield along the paint. Had to negotiate traffic in the straight while closing off soundly.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Travelled close to midfield, 2-wide with cover. Only plodded to the post. (Vet reported irregular heart beat).
Settled back in the field along the fence. Ran to the line smartly.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.

Enjoyed the run of the race behind the leader on the fence. Dashed clear by the furlong but peaked on its run just shy of the winning post. (Vet reported the following day that the horse was lame in its left front leg OVE req.)
Settled in 2nd last position 1 off with cover. Came widest in the run home and responded well to hard riding to close the margin and finish over the top of its rivals.
Raced on the pace, 1 off. Struggled in the straight.
Raced in last position. Kept to the fence in the straight but made no impression and was never likely.
Positioned slightly forward of midfield, 1 off with cover. Was a beaten horse turning for home.
Led along the fence until about the furlong. Folded soon after.
Raced handy to the leaders along the rails. Kept on in the final stages.
Parked midfield, 2 deep with cover. Worked into the clear after the 400 M and finished off dourly.
Raced midfield 3-wide with cover. Whacked away at the same pace in the final stretch.
Raced behind midfield on fence through to the home straight. No impression thereafter. (Bled.)
Jumped well. Raced 2-wide and was 6Ls off making the home turn. Hard ridden on straightening but failed to respond.
Began awkwardly and shared rear on fence early. Took inside run rounding the bend and was 10Ls away on straightening. Improved substantially in the straight but of little consequence overall.
Quickly into stride. Never far off the pace until the leader attempted to run away passing 600 M. Found nothing when asked in the straight.
Ridden early to take lead on fence. Attempted to run away and opened up a 5Ls gap leaving the bend. Caught by the front trio at 50 M and was all out to hold 4th.
Moderate jump, ended up 2-wide in rearward section at 800 M. Over 10Ls back on straightening. Made up minor ground in the straight.
Away in line. 4-wide towards rear at 800 M and was 9Ls behind the tearaway leader turning in. Quickened well inside final 350 M to claim victory at finish.

Began well. Sat 2-wide at midfield near 800 M. Rallied on with the quinella pair to chase the tearaway leader in the straight and hit front briefly at 50 M. Failed to hang on but left the rest of the field far behind.
Eased towards rear after start. Under pressure from 800 M but couldn't quicken. Never in the hunt.
Behind midfield early. Swung widest and was 8Ls behind the breakaway leader making the home turn. Fought on well in the straight. Just failed to contain the eventual winner at the post.
Well enough away. Settled 2-wide at midfield near 800 M. 8Ls down turning for home. Made limited progress down the centre of the track thereafter.

Slow into stride and was driven to race wide behind the pace before the turn. In distant 3rd when the leader attempted to run away passing 600 M. Made progress briefly top of the straight and weakened inside 200 M.
Away with them. Raced at midfield on fence at 800 M. Struggled thereafter and was a beaten horse soon after straightening.
Better than midfield early. Soon dropped out on straightening.
Slowly away again, 8Ls last before straightening for home, never likely.
Slow to muster pace, around midfield at least 5Ls from speed until final bend, ran on well, nearest at finish.
Trapped 3 and 4-wide no cover throughout, 3Ls back in midfield in middle stages, extra work took its toll in the straight.
Always worse than midfield along inside, 6Ls back at halfway, retrieved a little late ground in the straight but no danger overall.
Disputed early pace, 2-wide and 1L back in 2nd at 800 M, 2Ls back in 2nd off last turn, found very little off the bridle.
3Ls back in 6th or so at 800 M, further back off last bend when tight for room, recovered some late ground without really threatening.
Went back as usual and about 6Ls back through to final bend, stayed on well late, nicked 3rd close home.
Slowest out, at least 7Ls off speed until straightening, always outpaced.
Always in front rank, niggled along when a close 3rd at 600 M, 2Ls down in 2nd at 200 M, responded well for pressure to lead close home.
Disputed early pace before leading on fence at 800 M, going well turning for home and 2Ls up at 200 M, no extra late on and grabbed inside final 50 M.
Away well, box-seated in 3rd on fence at 800 M, over 3Ls back in 4th turning for home, no apparent excuse for not placing.
Midfield on rails about 4Ls back through first half, never saw much daylight along inside in the straight, might have got closer.
Slow to muster pace, 6Ls back in 11th initially, similar margin behind turning for home, kept on at the same pace to conclude.
Slow to muster pace, worse than midfield at least 4Ls off speed until final bend, dropped out quickly.
Always rearward at least 7Ls from the pace, found nothing under pressure.
Disputed early speed before drifting back suddenly about 900 M out, struggling turning for home, found to be "stiff" afterwards.
Went forward as usual and 1L to the good leaving back straight, joined for lead at top of home straight, tired inside final furlong.
Last out, one from rear and 7Ls back at 800 M, 6Ls down off last bend, kept on fairly well for 4th, never nearer.
3Ls back in 5th at the 800 M, similarly placed at the last bend, steadily faded out of the picture.
6Ls back in 10th at the 800 M, pressured but closer turning for home, 2Ls back in 5th at the 200 M, kept on dourly to just nick a place.
Pressed on from widest gate to dispute early pace, 1L back in 2nd and vying for lead again swinging for home, still there at 200 M but tired late on.
Around midfield and within 4Ls of the speed through to final bend, similar at the 200 M, very weak thereafter.
Always close-up, nicely placed in the 'one-out-one-back' position through to the final bend, narrowly led at 200 M, collared on the line.
Midfield 2-wide in a nice spot at halfway, 3Ls back in 5th turning for home, very one-paced.
Box-seated on fence down back straight, 2Ls back in 4th turning for home, 1L back at 200 M, switched off the inside soon after to lead on the line.
10Ls last at the 800 M, same margin behind off last bend, never in touch.
Midfield, 2-1/2Ls behind the good pace 2-wide, weakened 300 M.
Very slowly away, 6-1/2Ls off the good pace on the fence, closed the raced off strongly 400 M, dominated 200 M, however overhauled last few strides, just beaten by a short head.
Eased back, 5-1/2Ls off the good pace, trapped 3 to 4-wide, progressed steadily 400 M, run ended 100 M, hung on for 3rd.
Hard ridden early to sit 3Ls off the good pace along the fence, dropped off rapidly 600 M.
Never competitive and tailed out.
Pushed forward and shared the lead at good pace 2-wide, ran on until 200 M weakened.
Hard ridden to take the rail and shared the lead at good pace, ran on until 250 M emptied.
Hard ridden forward, trapped 3 to 4-wide without cover just behind the good pace, ran on ok in straight. (Lame.)
At rear, 8-1/2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, made ground final 300 M.
Hard ridden early to occupy a more prominent spot, 2-1/2Ls behind the good pace, trapped 3 to 4-wide, bumped 400 M, ran on well until 200 M flattened. (Abnormal breathing.)
Hard ridden early to obtain a more prominent spot, 1L off the good pace 2-wide, on heels 800 M, faded quickly 400 M.
Box seat, on heels 800 M, out of fuel 250 M.
Eased to sit behind midfield, 4Ls off the good pace on the rails, no progress in final stages.
Prominent, 1L off the good pace 3-wide with cover, checked 800 M, ran on strongly to the line and won by a narrow margin.
Settled well back, only went past beaten horses in the run home.
Always struggling, saved ground hugging inside rails on home turn, plugged on under pressure in the bias-against inside run, stopped noticeably passing 200 M.
Slow out, settled in midfield on rails, similar turning in, shifted out for a run on good ground early in straight, ran home one paced.
Close up until 500 M, dropped out of contention quickly.
Caught wide in midfield early, remained wide despite gaining a more prominent spot far side, shuffled back from 1-out-1-back position around home bend when still racing wide, never recovered.
Settled in last few, saved ground turning in, made modest headway early in straight to lie up but failed to oblige inside final 200 M.
Began moderately, niggled along to hold better than midfield spot, crept closer out wide down far side, just one off the lead approaching home turn but soon weakened noticeably.
Began with others, settled 3-wide just worse than midfield, remained wide on home turn, failed to quicken to make any impression in straight.
Jumped well from the one draw, held back to travel one back in 2nd just off the rails far side, similar turning in, found nothing under pressure in the run home.
Soon sought to lead but handicapped by the wide draw, eventually crossed to front turning into far side, made running to 300 M, folded up quickly.
Soon taken back to race towards the rear, trailed the field into the straight, finished strongly down centre of straight to swoop on the leader for an impressive victory.

Soon settled in midfield but remained wide after beginning from the widest barrier, took closer order passing 1200 M, quickened well under pressure from 3rd into straight to hit front at the 300 M only to be run down final strides.
Settled in forward of midfield on rails, saved ground turning in, shifted out for a run on good ground upon straightening, but could only produced modest headway without threatening.
Settled just better than midfield, shaken up for a run turning in, only produced moderate impression under pressure. (Jockey said horse not acted on the going.)
Settled in 4th about 4Ls behind leader, went wide over the turn in search of better ground, picked up gradually inside 400 M under top weight and finished nearest on the line.
Broke well and cut out the early running till 900 M, had his chance but unable to keep on passing 300 M.
Dropped back to the rear and given a waiting ride, 7Ls down going into final 400 M and despite making some headway had too much to do.
First to jump but eased back to a position in midfield 6Ls off the pace, produced a strong run inside 300 M to get within one length of the winner.
Handily placed in 3rd 3Ls off the pace, hung in abruptly inside 400 M and was difficult to ride. Had his chance but unable to take ground off the leader.
Ended up in a spot behind midfield after a poor start, didn't travel and was off the bridle from 800 M, taken wide to challenge in straight but didn't respond, ran well below par. (Mucus.)
Raced outside the lead before taking it up passing 900 M, travelled strongly throughout and kicked clear 300 M, was always in command despite the challenges late on.

Began awkwardly and lost ground, crept closer and settled in mid-division, covered less ground than the rest by keeping close to the inside but failed to act on this soft going and offered very little in the finish.
Towards the rear and appeared not travelling well, had almost 8Ls to make up on straightening, ran on fairly under hands and heels riding (Jockey dropped whip 350 M).
Out in line, faded back from an awkward alley, ended up 3 wide 7Ls back sharing rear, had cover to bend, lacked usual close and made no impression late.
Moderate beginning, ended up 4 wide behind midfield 6Ls back, always working wide without cover, ran out of petrol at 300 M when hard run took toll.
Fair beginning, raced midfield 4 to 5Ls away, improved 3 wide on turning, made gradual headway in straight, just lost 2nd late.
Lost ground at jump, mustered to race 3 wide behind speed 3 to 5Ls off pace, had cover to bend, switched wider turning in, did best work late to snare 2nd.
Standard jump, ridden up to hold spot 3Ls back tracking speed, fair run to bend, moved wide on turning, lacked a pick up and just battled late (reluctant to stride out).
Began well, unable to slot in and forced to travel 3 wide without cover, 2Ls back, used too much in mid-section, spent force by 200 M.
Showed speed, took sit behind leaders, had every hope in run, 2 to 3Ls back on turning, responded well to hard riding to drive up and take lead at 100 M, scored with a bit in hand.
No early pace, ended up well back on fence, 6 to 7Ls off speed, used little to bend, switched out to middle turning, made some late headway to make frame.
Amongst first few to break, pressed on and took up lead, raced 2Ls clear throughout, kicked on turning and kept on to 100 M before run ended.
Slow into stride, settled further back then usual 7Ls or so from top end, never really likely and struggled in run home.
Standard jump, settled in midfield, had every hope 3 to 4Ls off lead, lacked pick up in straight and struggled to line. (Blood in trachea.)
Out smartly, held spot 1L off leader first without cover, niggled along on bend, gave in easily in straight.
Faded to muster, settled 7Ls away in rear division, still well back to bend, switched near to outside rail, couldn't make impression late.
Positioned in midfield 4 to 5Ls off speed, raced 3 wide with cover in mid-section, had chance when clear running emerged turning and worked home soundly to make frame.
Showed enough pace to hold 1 out 1 back spot 2 to 3Ls back, shifted 3 wide without cover on circle, kept improving turning, place chance to 200 M before run ended.
Standard jump, faded back from a wide draw, raced 4 wide behind midfield with cover 5 to 6Ls back, did work to bend, closed evenly without threatening.
Awkwardly away and lost ground, regathered but couldn't slot in, ended up 4 and 5 wide without cover, improved to bend, peaked at 150 M when ran out of gas.
Fast out as customary, assumed role as leader, travelled comfortably conserving more energy than usual, kept on to inside 200 M before lost advantage, kept on respectably.
Out with rest, faded back to settle behind midfield 6 or more lengths back in running line, still had plenty to do turning, made minor progress without looking likely.
Standard jump, ended up 4Ls away on rails in midfield, angled off rails rounding bend, closed nicely final 300 M to take a clear 2nd.
Began with more purpose, settled 1L off leader first without cover, tracked well to bend, lengthened nicely final 200 M to collar leader and keep on for a strong win.
Amongst first to break, took up a prominent role racing behind leader, had every chance to bend, on worst going towards inside but didn't close final 200 M.
Fair to begin, dropped to rear about 8Ls off speed, always well back, switched out turning, came down outside but didn't make much progress.
Began in line, worked forward but raced 4 wide without cover in midfield, did share of work to bend, 3Ls down turn, faded before 250 M mark.
Went back from a wide alley, ended up 4 wide at rear 8Ls off speed, set huge task turning widest and had field to pass, made remarkable headway in straight to make frame.
Given reminders in midfield early stages, travelled mainly 4-wide down far side and around home bend, even wider when came under the whip again turning for home, found nil.
Began with others, caught wide in a handy position throughout far side and around the bend, similar entering straight, hit front under pressure inside 300 M and hung on well to finish.
Began well but restrained to midfield before home bend, similar turning for home, one-paced.
Jumped awkwardly, settled well behind, snuck up on rails turning in joining leaders briefly over 200 M out, found no extra closing stages.
Raced wide and never better than midfield, slightly inconvenienced early in straight, ran home one-paced down centre of the track.
Settled behind midfield, made no impression in straight.
Settled well behind, very wide when widest turning into straight, made better progress under hard driving early in straight than when hanging in inside final 200 M.
Began moderately, travelled in a prominent position to straight, kept on before fading inside final 200 M.
Settled on rails in midfield within 3Ls of speed, saved ground on inside turning in, with leaders early in straight but unable to quicken under pressure and lost 2nd late.
Midfield, yielded ground rounding home bend, found nothing in straight.
Settled behind midfield, soon struggled under pressure after straightening.
Began moderately, settled 3-wide in the middle of the pack, soon came to challenge upon straightening, fought on doggedly under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Began with others, gradually picked up on rails to lead by a slender margin, narrowly headed turning in and soon weakened under pressure.
Prominent to 400 M, faded gradually.
Rolled along the fence and settled handily in 4th place, momentarily held up early in straight but turned in a good finishing effort inside 200 M once into the clear.
Cut out the running as expected but inclined to hang out in middle stages, led steadily to the home straight but unable to keep on passing 300 M, gradually weakened.
Hard ridden out the gate, settle in midfield 3-wide without cover, took some time to get going in straight and made some late headway inside 200 M.
Assumed an usual position near the rear, 7Ls back and 3-wide making the home turn, made some late impression down the outside but left with too much to do.

Slow to begin, crossed to the fence and raced 6Ls back, hampered by the pace and not settled at times, shifted out near 300 M, ran on strongly for 2nd to clinch a second that spared him from compulsory retirement.
Ended up towards the rear after a slow start, 6Ls to make up inside 400 M but ran on very one-paced and finished her racing career disappointingly.
Away with them, didn't muster and gradually drifted back towards the rear, 7Ls down inside 400 M but unable to pick up and was eased close home.
Away well enough, 5Ls back in midfield 2-wide but was a shade keen, checked near 250 M but could never get involved.
Taken back on jumping from a wide barrier, always in the rear 8Ls behind leader, no response when asked inside 450 M.
Along the fence in mid-division and always going well, into clear 350 M, picked up well to be in front 150 M from home, kept on over the concluding stages.
Jumped well, placed in a handy position better than midfield, had to be urged along rounding the bend, threatened briefly near 200 M but couldn't sustain his effort late on.
Obtained a 3-wide position behind midfield after a sluggish start, under serious pressure from 600 M and found very little left on straightening.
Ordinary jump only but soon taken to a prominent 3rd under a positive ride, travelled strongly throughout and being produced with every chance inside 300 M, kept on when headed 150 M from home.
Urged to the front and raced one out one back from leader, kept plugging away till weakening inside 200 M.
Enjoyed the run of the race behind the leader along the paint. Had every chance. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced behind midfield on the rails. Never likely.
Was able to slide across to race outside the leader after being trapped wide early. Ran to the line evenly to post a sound win.
Raced with the backmakers, 1 off with cover. Was hampered near the furlong whilst making fair ground in the run to the line.
Was the best to begin, raced greenly in a midfield position, 3 deep with cover. Came widest in the straight and showed good fight under pressure.
Slow to begin then settled on the paint behind midfield. Plodded to the post.
Positioned midfield, 2 to 3-wide with cover. Ran to the finish dourly.
Raced just off the speed, 2 deep with cover. Battled to the finish one paced.

From the outside gate was taken back and raced at the rear along the fence. Kept to the inside turning for home and was steadied near the 200 M when having difficulty obtaining clear running. Made steady ground to the line.
Took up a position towards the tail of the field 3 to 4-wide without cover. Worked home reasonably.
Began awkwardly losing some ground then was checked near the 1000 M, settled towards the rear 3 deep with cover. Failed to close off.
Positioned slightly ahead of midfield but was caught 3-wide and without cover for most of the trip. Weakened over the final stages.
Led on the fence. Was overhauled close to home.
Tracked the speed on the fence. Had every chance.
Travelled nicely and was never far off the pace through to the home straight. Couldn't find extra gear when the race got serious after 250 M.
2-wide at midfield back straight. Took closer order passing 700 M. 3-wide 3Ls away on straightening. Held ground only in the straight.
3-wide better than midfield through to the home turn. Was a beaten horse soon after straightening.
Always behind midfield. Found nothing under pressure in the straight.
Raced 3-wide without cover and 2Ls behind the leader early stages. Slotted into 'one-out-one-back' making the home turn. Couldn't turn up a notch in the straight.

2-wide at rear back straight. Ridden from 600 M. Shifted widest and was 9Ls back turning for home. Covered substantial ground in the straight and was just denied to figure in the quinella at the post.
2-wide behind midfield. Slipped towards rear on straightening. Made up minor ground down the centre of the track thereafter.
Quickly into stride and led easily on fence. Still in front in the straight but was swamped inside 250 M.
Away with them but dropped out and became detached after midpoint. Finished tailed-out.
Away in line. Eased to sit 3-wide at rear passing 1400 M. Came widest and was 7Ls down turning in. Dashed strongly in the straight and took charge from 200 M. Easy win.
Bumped after start and became badly unbalanced. At rear on fence thereafter and was never a factor.

Moderate jump. Urged early and occupied a prominent spot 1100 M out. Took a split between runners in the straight. Easily passed by the eventual winner at 200 M but hung on to repel challenge from 3rd.
3-wide behind midfield through to the home turn. No impression thereafter.
Well enough away. Sat better than midfield on fence. Urged from 600 M but couldn't pick up.
Disputed early speed on fence, a neck down in 2nd turning for home, didn't find much off the bridle and missed out on a place in final 100 M.
Covered ground out wide no cover down back straight, pressed on to race 3rd from 900 M to home turn when 1L back, steadily faded out of the picture.
Always rearward, 6Ls back in 12th at the 800 M, last turning for home and ceded further ground on the run-in, another poor run.
Early pace but opted 3-back on rails 4Ls off pace until final bend, very one-paced.
Taken back from wide gate and soon one from rear, at least 5Ls back before last bend, brief rally at the 200 M, could not sustain.
Always worse than midfield, 5Ls down in 10th turning for home, that was about as close as he got.
Ideally placed in 'one-out-one-back' spot until final turn, was given every hope to at least place, lacked acceleration.
Settled in 7th between 2-wide and 3-wide through first half, over 3Ls back turning for home, kept on unthreateningly for 3rd.
Soon box-seated on rails 2Ls back in 4th, still close-up and with place prospects at the 200 M, couldn't seal the deal as is so often the case.
Vied for early lead out 2-wide, a neck clear and pressured turning for home, grabbed by the winner inside the 200 M but held a clear 2nd.
Fractious in gates and slowest out by 2Ls, about 8Ls last at the 800 M, ran on through spent rivals in the straight, never nearer.
Keen at halfway, midfield and 4Ls behind spinning for home, couldn't draw any closer.
Midfield 2-wide and 4Ls off speed in middle stages, quickened up from top of straight to lead inside the 200 M, kept on well, tidy win.
3-wide with cover at the 800 M when about 4Ls off pace, hard pressured to retain this proximity off last corner, weakened.
Midfield with cover down back straight, quickened up well off home turn, dangerous when 1L down at the 200 M, marginally held from the placings.
Disputed early running, gradually picked up the tempo to lead by 2Ls turning for home, headed before the 200 M and quickly swallowed up.
2-wide in 10th down the back straight, still rearward and 6Ls adrift turning for home, always chasing the majority of the field.
3-wide with cover in midfield down the back, unbalanced turning in when about 5Ls behind speed, lacked pace of the principals.
Held the 'one-out-one-back' position in 4th at 1100 M, about 4Ls back in 5th swinging for home, one-paced to conclude.
Midfield and 3-back on the rails through to the 600 M when 4Ls back, every chance when a neck 2nd at the 200 M, no extra final furlong.
Worse than midfield 3-wide but with cover until home straight when 5Ls back, stayed on strongly down centre of the track, only narrowly failed.
No early pace and soon 8Ls last, crept at little closer at one point in the home straight but couldn't follow through inside final 200 M.
Very wide no cover initially, still wide when 1L back in 3rd at 1200 M, struggling turning for home, beat a hasty retreat.
Always rearward, 6Ls back at halfway and 8Ls last turning for home, never a factor.
4-back the rails in 10th at halfway, looked the likely winner when quickening up well to lead 200 M out, caught by EVER KING close home.
Patiently ridden, still 6Ls back in 12th at the 600 M, quickened up well down the centre of the track to lead inside final few strides.
Box-seated in 3rd at 1200 M, every chance when 2Ls back in 2nd off final turn, soon swamped and steadied when beaten 100 M out.
Could not lead solo and force to work early on, 1L back in 2nd at the 800 M, weakened at top of home straight and dropped out tamely.
Behind midfield, 6Ls off the leaders 3-wide, demonstrated strong finishing efforts 300 M despite not being suited by the slow pace, ran a remarkable 2nd.
Eased at start and took rail at rear, 8Ls off the leaders, harmed by the slow pace, little dash 200 M, lacked room 100 M.
Eased back, 7Ls off the leaders 2-wide, checked 800 M, harmed by the slow pace, no progress.
Took rail and led easily at advantageous slow early sectionals, hung on until 100 M overhauled, ran on for 3rd.
Settled outside the lead, enjoyed the slow early sectionals, ran on ok to the line without threatening the winner.
Hard ridden early but failed to muster, trapped 3-wide in midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leaders, not suited by the slow tempo, no progress.
Pushed forward, 2Ls off the leaders 2-wide, benefited by the slow tempo, flattened 200 M.
Bumped start, hard ridden to obtain a midfield spot, 4-1/2Ls off the leaders 2-wide, dashed well 200 M despite not suited by the slow tempo.
Midfield along the fence, 4-1/2Ls off the leaders, not suited by the slow pace, little dash in straight.
Pressed forward, 1-1/2Ls off the leaders 3-wide, soon weakened 300 M.
Eased back, 6-1/2Ls off the leaders 2-wide, not suited by the slow pace, blocked most of straight, but kept making steady ground in final stages.
Hard ridden to occupy the box seat, 2-1/2Ls off the slow pace, checked 800 M and lost its position, just held ground in straight.
Prominent, 2-1/2Ls off the slow pace 2-wide, checked badly 800 M, ran on fairly in straight, bumped and checked 150 M.
Eased to rear, 8Ls off the leaders 3-wide, harmed by the slow pace, dashed strongly 200 M to score with ease, not fully tested.
Soon dropped to tail-end after beginning from the widest barrier, always struggling. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Soon restrained to last few, remained well back to straight, produced good late impression closing stages.
Settled wide behind midfield, remained similar turning in, quickened up well inside final 300 M to take charge over 100 M out despite hanging in, won well.
Soon gained slender lead, crossed to rail coming out of far side, joined after straightening, gradually faded inside final 200 M.
Began well, settled one-out-one-back in 4th to straight, dropped out noticeably under pressure. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Settled just better than midfield in joint 5th, ran home one-paced under pressure in straight.
Settled in rear of midfield, saved ground on inside turning for home, fought on steadily down straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled just worse than midfield, made no impression in straight.
Soon taken back to race towards rear from a wide draw, remained similar turning in, made no impression in the run home. (Tactic questioned.)
Jumped awkwardly, settled well behind, finished off well inside 300 M down inside of straight.
Moderate start, ridden along to hold better than midfield spot on rails, remained similar turning in but gradually faded under pressure in straight. (Irregular heart beat.)
Began fairly, settled on rails in joint 5th, came off the rails for a run turning in, just kept one at the same pace to finish.
Began fairly, soon moved up to dispute lead, settled outside leader rounding home bend, shared pace holding every chance early in straight but overhauled by fast-finishing winner passing 100 M.
Settled one back in 3rd on rails, chased leaders into straight, held some chance between joint leaders early in straight, found no extra inside final 200 M.

Switched off to a rearward spot after the start, trailed over 10Ls early but crept closer making the home turn, closed off the race strongly down the inside but ran into traffic near 200 M. Would have been closer.
Went forward on jumping from a wide barrier and crossed to a 2 wide position behind the leading pair, couldn't quicken in straight and was quickly swept aside.
Trailed the field throughout and didn't at any stage show competitiveness. (Unacceptable performance and lame next day.)
Jumped well, prominently placed behind leaders, steadied when box-seated early in straight but found very little once into clear passing 300 M.
Held up towards the rear, made a move round the outside of field passing 600 M, plugged on down the outside but never seriously threatened.
Drifted back to the rear and slotted into a position one off the fence, had over 5Ls to make up 400 M out, came strongly from off the pace to beat all but the winner.
In mid-division 4Ls back, made his move along with the eventual winner, looked to have a place chance halfway down the straight but was unable to quicken towards the finish.
4-5Ls back in midfield along the fence and remained in that position until the home straight, gave very limited response when pressed. No impression.
Rolled along the fence in a position ahead of midfield, picked up well in straight and soon found himself in front 250 M from home. Kept on but couldn't repel the late surge of the winner.
