Showed his usual early speed and cut out the running, all out passing 400 M but lacked a change of pace, headed 200 M and faded gradually to the line.
Settled behind midfield 5Ls off the pace, switched out to improve passing 500 M but lost ground when becoming unbalanced on straightening, closed off the race well.
Went forward disputing the lead, raced 2-wide throughout, kept on well till 150 M, no extra close home.
Had a smooth run in midfield 3Ls back, well placed to strike turning in, responded well despite jockey dropping the whip near 300 M, took complete control final 100 M.
Slow into stride, moved closer to sit behind midfield 6Ls off the pace, struggled to go with them inside 400 M, eased down passing 200 M.
Faded back from an awkward alley, raced 6Ls away 2-wide in rear division, aided by strong speed on, switched out turning and closed soundly to make frame.
Sent forward to take a prominent spot behind leader, had chance but did use a bit on strong speed, took gap turning and was in mix until inside 200 M before peaked on run.
Bounced out, showed speed to take up leader, worked with pressure from outside horse, lost advantage on turning and gave in quickly from 300 M.
Began well, pushed up to assume a prominent spot 1 out 1 back, did share of work close to a solid speed, couldn't go on final 200 M.
No early speed, ended up 7Ls of so away at rear, fair run with pace on, tracked eventual winner on bend, made a strong run final 300 M but just failed to catch winner.
Out in line, unable to slot in and posted 3-wide without cover, always working 2Ls back, improved to be 1L down turning, challenged to 200 M, weakened out final 100 M when hard run took toll.
Standard getaway, positioned in rear division 6Ls back on rails, improved between horses on bend, asserted authority inside 200 M, kept on strongly to line for another solid win.
Away only fairly, raced behind midfield 5-6Ls back 3-wide, had cover and aided by speed on, checked 500 M, made only moderate headway in straight.

Out in line, drifted back soon after, showed no interest and ended up more than 12Ls from speed, well off 2nd last horse throughout, came very wide on bend, made remarkable ground from an impossible spot to take placing.

Slowly away, ended up behind midfield on rails 4-5Ls back, used little in run and suited by speed on, took inside runs turning, hung in straight and failed to close in usual fashion. (Abnormal breathing.)
Amongst first few to break, ended up 3-wide in midfield with cover 3Ls back, urged along on bend, folded easily in straight.
Tardy into stride, recovered to take a spot in midfield 5Ls away in running line, was difficult to settle in mid- section, continued to work home making steady ground final 200 M.
Useful beginning, worked a bit racing first outside leader, challenged leader in mid-section, led turning in and kept on to 300 M but stopped soon after and dropped out tamely.
Out in line, unable to match early speed, ended up 4-wide without cover 5Ls back behind midfield, used too much in mid-section, pushed wider turning, was a spent force by 300 M.
Lost ground early and was soon taken back, ended up a clear last 8Ls off speed, always well back to bend, closed soundly last 300 M making many lengths to take a spot in frame.
Taken back from an outside alley ended up nearly 7Ls back 3-wide with cover, covered ground throughout, improved sharply 5 and 6 wide at 500 M, finished strongly over top of rivals final 200 M.
Average getaway, settled behind midfield racing 2-wide, 7Ls back in mid-section, held up before coming 3-wide on turning, did best work final 300 M making plenty of late ground. (Rider questioned.)
Out well, took ideal spot on leaders back, no excuses in run, lacked a kick on turning and weakened out tamely final 300 M.

Fair getaway, ended up 3Ls away in front of midfield, had chance to bend, saddle shifted on turning, made gradual progress in straight with jockey at a disadvantage, lost run inside 100 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Amongst first few to break, camped behind speed in 1 out 1 back spot, had every hope to bend, lacked a response when pressured and dropped off in finish.
Away with rest, ended up 3-4Ls back on fence, had an easy time in mid-section, under hard riding turning, weakened out badly in straight.
Shared pace to cross to lead, set an even tempo in front, challenged on circle, headed on turning in, lacked usual fight and just struggled final 200 M.
Tardy into stride, settled behind midfield 5-6Ls back on rails, used little to bend, unable to find an extra gear and just kept on at same rate late.
Began okay, pushed on to take sit on speed, ended up 3-wide without cover on bend, challenged on turning but soon stopped and dropped right out in straight.
No early pace and drifted back from an outside draw, raced in rear division early, improved 3-wide with cover on bend, made strong finish with eventual winner but just out lasted final 200 M.
Out in line, pressed on to take closer order, was 3-wide before racing outside leader, did share of work to turn, took over and kept in mix to 200 M before run ended.
No early pace, settled behind midfield 5-6Ls back, had even run to bend, held up at 300 M, hung and was difficult to ride thereafter but still made good ground to be nearest on line.
Out reasonably, camped 3Ls back 3-wide behind speed, kept improving on bend, looked a place chance at 200 M but couldn't progress and just held ground thereafter.
Race wide with leaders most of way to straight, gradually weakened. (Lame next day.)
Settled in forward of midfield on rails, badly baulked for a run shortly after straightening, made steady headway when a clear passage emerged inside final 200 M.
Soon taken back to settle well behind, last into straight, ran past well beaten horses closing stages.

Began with others, soon restrained to race in midfield, saved ground turning for home, briefly baulked upon straightening, quickened up inside final 300 M to hold every chance but not match pace of first two inside final 50 M.
Soon gained slender lead on rails after beginning from the one draw, made the running until finding no extra inside final 300 M.
Soon taken back to 4-wide in rear of midfield from a wide draw, one of the widest turning in, kept on steadily past well beaten horses in the run home.
Raced wide in last few, soon came to challenge upon straightening, quickened up well under pressure inside final 300 M to hit front at the 50 M mark, fought on gamely to finish.
Soon taken to rear after beginning from the widest barrier, remained well behind when taken very wide into straight, made moderate progress down straight without threatening.
Settled in midfield, obtained a run shortly after straightening, improved well down centre of straight in tandem with winner but unable to peg him back throughout.
Began well, soon settled wide in midfield, one of the widest turning for home, gradually faded. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Settled in last few, not much room when shifted in for a run early in straight, forced to steady over 200 M out, fought on under pressure despite a tight passage on rails closing stages.
Raced very wide without cover down far side, close up before taken back to forward of midfield coming onto home bend, loomed up briefly to hold some chance early in straight but soon died on its run.
With leaders early settling just off the pace, chased leader turning in, moved on to draw level shortly after straightening but unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Prominent to straight, soon lost touch after straightening.
Shaken up early to go forward, unable to cross and was left racing 3-wide without cover, couldn't accelerate in straight and got tired passing 200 M. (Jockey dropped whip 250 M.)
Reigned back to a position behind midfield after a good start, tracked well on turning but was denied a clear run from 300 M to 100 M.
Away in line, assumed a position 3-wide in midfield, made good progress down the outside in straight, looked a winner 100 M out but was outrun close home.
Made some use early to keep up with the early pace, under serious pressure passing 300 M, faded rapidly over the closing stages.
First to jump, gradually taken back and slotted into a 3 wide spot towards the rear before the turn, responded only fairly down the outside on straightening. Never dangerous.

Met with interference shortly after the start and ended up racing as the back marker 8Ls away, became detached passing the top of the bend but gradually picked up on straightening and stayed on well inside final 200 M.
Jumped well. Close up to pace early but dropped back to mid-division approaching home turn, gradually picked up from 300 M and confirmed his ability in this lower grade with a workmanlike victory.
Drawn wide and unable to find sufficient pace to cross, 4-wide on turning and covered more ground than others, beaten passing 250 M.
Tracked well along the fence in midfield, came through horses to challenge 300 M out, briefly threatened but couldn't sustain effort inside final 150 M.
Eased back on jumping from a wide barrier to look for cover, towards the rear throughout, under urge from 500 M but gave very limited resonse. No impression.
Settled in a position behind midfield 6Ls back, switched to inside and saved ground over the turn, had some difficulty finding clear run near 200 M but stayed on well towards the line.
Broke well from the inside, tracked race leader one back on the fence, took a while to put things together and started making progress inside 200 M. Good effort.
Slow to begin but soon recovered and led steadily, all out passing 400 M, kept giving until stamina gave way inside 100 M.
Up with the pace early, eased back to sit in midfield before turning, made some progress inside 400 M but not enough to trouble the principals.
Settled midfield maintaining a one off line. Peeled out entering the straight and despite wanting to lay in, motored to the line for a decisive win.
Settled 3 back the fence early, before being shuffled back 1 position near the 600 M. Kept up its workload right to the wire.
Travelled on the speed, 2-wide without cover. Kept up a sound gallop right to the wire.
Tracked the leader along the fence then settled 3 back by the 600 M. Kept to the rail in the straight but faded over the final stages.
Raced towards the tail of the field but coursed wide and hung out on the circle. Never a factor.
Settled towards the rear along the paint. Failed to close off.

Went forward and soon crossed to lead along the fence near the 900 M. Steadied the pace quickly midrace, then handed up to take a trailing position close to the 600 M. Kept on one paced in the run home.
Raced behind midfield, 1 off with cover. Struggled in the run home.
Raced close to midfield, 2-wide with cover. Was a beaten horse by the 400 M.

Landed on the back of the speed, 2-wide with cover, but when the pace went off near the 800 M, commenced to pull, shifted out and after racing wide and without cover was allowed to stride forward to lead along the fence near the 600 M.
Caught wide early and was obliged to come back behind midfield to obtain cover, 3-wide. Never really quickened in the final stretch.
Travelled with the backmarkers, 2 deep with cover. Copped a check near the 800 M, and never fully recovered from that point on.
Began very awkwardly settling at the rear of the field. Failed to pass another runner for the major part of the race.
Began evenly then drifted back to settle one off at the rear. Shifted out into clear running and closed off nicely (See Racing Incidents.)
Eased to rear after start from a wide draw. Came widest and was about 10Ls off on straightening. Responded fairly well in the home straight.
Always within 4Ls behind the pace through to the home turn. Couldn't keep up when the race got serious.
Trailed field for the major part of the race. Made up some ground in the straight but hung in badly.
Enjoyed an easy run on fence behind leaders. Pushed by the runner up in the straight but kept on finding enough to keep rivals at bay.
Handy position through to the home turn. Had a duel with the eventual winner in the straight. Fended off closing stages yet pulled nicely clear of others.
Urged early and sat better than midfield on fence back straight. Hard ridden from 500 M. Just held ground in the home straight.
Settled amongst last few on fence back straight. Took inside run and was 6Ls behind the lead making the home turn. Progressed steadily in the straight to make frame near the line.
Raced behind midfield early. Took closer order on fence round the bend and was 5Ls down on straightening. Kept making headway to snatch minor placing without posing threats to the top pair.
Elected to sit towards rear after start. Ridden from 600 M and past only beaten rivals.
Led along on fence and soon dropped out on straightening.
Never better than midfield. One-paced to conclude.
Disputed lead through to the home turn. Hit front briefly at 400 M but was soon swamped thereafter.
Pushed to stay midfield early. Given reminder round the bend to stay in touch but found nothing. Never in the hunt.
Slowest out, about 8Ls last at halfway, remained at the tail of the field.
Patiently handled 4-back on fence, 5Ls back in midfield turning for home, recovered some nice late ground to nick 4th on the line.
Close-up in 3rd within 3Ls of the pace through to final turn, 1L down in 4th a furlong out, edged closer and barely led on line in head-bobbing finish.
Rearward and 3-wide with cover at least 6Ls from the lead through first half of pace, outpaced overall despite retrieving a little late ground.
Led as usual, 2Ls clear initially before being headed at the 300 M, quickly faded out of the picture.
Great effort to get so close having been 3-wide no cover for the duration, midfield at first, 3Ls back into straight, a neck 2nd at 200 M, kept on.
Worse than midfield at 6Ls from speed until straightening, recovered some nice late ground, nearest at the finish.
Never really landed a blow, 8Ls last at the 800 M, not much better off turning for home, no danger.
4Ls back in 4th at halfway, a little nearer spinning for home, picked up well to lead 100 M out, foiled right on the wire having led before and after.
Never any better than midfield, at least 4Ls off the speed before homestretch when pressured, retrieved some late ground, never nearer.
Tracked leader in 2nd at 800 M, 1L down off last turn, led 300 M out and fleetingly looked the winner before yielding ground inside final 100 M.
Prominent but wide no cover initially, led by 1L out 2-wide at 800 M, headed before the furlong marker, wilted.
Disputed early exchanges, eased back into box-seat at the 800 M, 2Ls back in 3rd off final bend, very flat in the finish after such a cushy passage.
Slowest out, 8Ls last at the 800 M, remained in the rear bunch despite recovering marginal ground in the straight.
Always around midfield, 4Ls adrift before last turn, kept on at the same pace.
Bumped at start, never any better than midfield, 6Ls back in 10th at the 800 M, ran on past some spent rivals in the straight, nearest at finish.
One from rear about 7Ls down at the 800 M, still at the rear at the furlong pole, remained among the also-rans.
3-wide but with cover in 9th some 5Ls from the speed before last bend, finished off pretty well for 4th.
Rearward and over-racing a little when 3-wide but with cover some 7Ls behind at halfway, posed no genuine threat in the stretch.
Bumped at start, 4-back the fence about 5Ls from lead at halfway, peeled out wider in home straight, recovered some fair late ground.
Nicely placed in 4th within 2Ls of the speed through to last corner, led over 200 M out but couldn't repel winner's late dash.
Wide no cover early on, 2Ls back in 3rd at the 800 M, 2nd turning for home, found zero under pressure, very disappointing favourite, blood in trachea.
In 5th or so but 3-wide no cover at halfway on the circle, surrendered pretty tamely in the straight, eased down late on.
4-wide no cover in rear at least 5Ls off pace before last turn, rider also dropped reins 150 M out, did well to place under the circumstances.
Midfield 3-back the rails through to final bend within 3Ls or 4Ls of pace, quickened up to lead 100 M out, did enough to score.
Settled in box seat, favoured by the slow tempo, however just ran on fairly in last quarter.
Eased to sit in midfield, 4Ls off the leader, trapped 3 to 4-wide and lost ground, harmed by the slow pace, just held ground in straight.
3Ls off the slow pace 2-wide, dropped off quickly 500 M.
Eased back, 5Ls off the leader, raced 3 to 5-wide and lost too much ground, dashed well 300 M despite not suited by the slow sectionals.
Hard ridden forward to cross and sat 1-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, benefited by the slow tempo, but soon weakened 300 M.
Eased to sit just behind the leading group, settled 2-1/2Ls off the lead 3-wide, benefited by the slow pace, closed the race off strongly to run 2nd.
At rear, 7-1/2Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, harmed by the slow pace, lacked room 400 M, little dash 200 M.
Eased to sit in midfield, 4Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, held up 4-2, dashed strongly when clear.
Eased to sit in midfield along the fence, 3Ls off the leader, not suited by the slow tempo, blocked 400 M, just held ground when clear.
Awkwardly away, eased to sit behind midfield along the fence, 4-1/2Ls off the leader, not suited by the slow pace, ran on fairly in final stages.
At back, 6-1/2Ls off the leader, not suited by the slow tempo, trapped 3 to 5-wide, no turn of foot.
Niggled along to take rail, led by 1-1/2Ls at advantageous slow early sectionals, made all.
Slow away, 6-1/2Ls off the leader on the rails, harmed by the slow pace, raced flat 400 M, lack room 250 M, picked up well 100 M.
Slow away, at tail, 9Ls off the leader 2-wide, harmed by the slow pace, swept forward 5-wide on straightening to make run, dashed strongly 300 M to finish 3rd.
Tight between runners at start, settled towards the rear, weakened under pressure out of contention inside 300 M.
Began fairly, soon taken back to race in rear but without cover down the centre of the track, given reminders over 300 M out, kept on steadily to the line.
Began well, settled in midfield along grandstand rails, soon found no extra under pressure from the halfway mark.
Jumped sideway but soon straightened and took up running, held narrow advantage before the eventual 2nd tired out of contention close to home, hung on well.
Began slowly and tightened at start, held up towards the rear early stages, found nothing under pressure over 300 M out.
Tracked leader/eventual winner, came under pressure to challenge inside final 400 M but could only produce one-paced effort to finish.
Disputed lead racing down the centre of straight, came under strong driving passing 300 M to maintain position but unable to sustain run inside final 200 M.
Began well, soon restrained to race at the back, remained in rear before commencing move coming onto course proper, however, found nothing under pressure.
Settled not far off the speed down the centre of the track after beginning from a poor draw, came to challenge under vigorous riding inside final 300 M, fought on steadily to be nearest at finish.

Broke well from the 2 draw to race up with the pace, but caught travelling without cover down the centre of the track, held slight chance from the 200 M but unable to sustain effort after the 50 M mark
Broke well, soon settled just worse than midfield, ran home one-paced.
Began well, tracked leader/eventual winner, came to challenge after coming onto course proper, kept on steadily without quickening under pressure closing stages.
Began with others, soon settled in rear, never threatening.
Broke well from the inside barrier, 6Ls back in midfield and used little in running, showed good acceleration to challenge inside 350 M but found the winner too strong.
Slow to begin, settled in 2nd last 9Ls off the decent pace, switched to outside for a clear passage in straight, made some eye catching late run inside 200 M.
Away in line, keen in early stages and had to be restrained, 2-deep in midfield making the turn, ran on only fairly in straight.
Showed good early pace to lead, headed inside 300 M but despite urging, found little left in reserves in the run to the line.
Pushed wide in the early stages and raced without cover for most of the journey, struggled to keep up on straightening, eased. (Abnormal breathing / unacceptable performance.)
Interfered near 1100 M and was unable to slot in, 3-wide behind midfield making the home turn, lacked a change of pace when required, weakened inside 200 M.
Settled rearward after an awkward start, trapped on the fence coming off the bend, gradually angled out for a clear run, stayed on well in the closing stages.
Standard break only, rushed forward to track leaders in 3rd, ran out of gas approaching 200 M, weakened rapidly.
Swiftly away, had a smooth run along the fence in 4th, progressed steadily inside 350 M for a respectable 3rd.
Up with the pace from the start, cruised pass the pace setter inside 300 M and established a commanding lead, kept on well to score with something in hand.
Taken back from the wide barrier, raced in last about 10Ls behind leader, took time to muster speed in straight and started to pick up inside 200 M.
Settled 2-wide in a position behind midfield, 7Ls adrift of the leader passing 400 M, kept on at the same pace, never threatened.
Amongst first few to begin, took up box seat 2Ls back behind pace pair, had every chance in run, close enough turning but lacked needed response final 200 M. Rider reported reluctant to stride out.
Away well, pushed up to race on speed, had an easy run with steady speed, 1L down on bend, levelled up turning and hit lead narrowly inside 300 M, unable to hold on when winner fought back.
Ridden along just to take a midfield spot, raced 4 to 5Ls from leaders throughout, struggling to pick up on bend, unable to get nearer in straight.
Ordinary break, settled at tail 7Ls of pace, still well back to bend, shifted out but made no impression in straight, not suited.
Amongst first to break, went forward but unable to get closer than 3 wide, forced to cover ground throughout without a trail, used too much and weakened inside 300 M.
Standard getaway, positioned in midfield 4Ls back on fence, had an easy trip throughout, same margin down turning, closed race off creditably.
Fair to break, unable to slot into running line, travelled 3 wide 3Ls back, did have cover in mid-section, lacked a pick up from 400 M but did make some minor ground late.
Began with purpose, assumed usual role in front, set terms to suit 1L clear in mid-section, unchallenged until turning, headed passing 300 M, dug deep and fought back for a narrow win.
Reasonable break, slotted in nicely on leaders back, had every chance in run, right there on turning, just kept on at same pace to line.
Taken back from a wide alley, shared rear 7Ls away on rails, not asked in mid-section, always well back and lacked a finish in straight although pace was against.
No early pace, ended up behind midfield 5 to 6Ls away on rails, used little in run, still had plenty to do turning, held up from 250 M to 150 M, motored late to make frame. See Racing Incidents.
Slow into stride, ridden up to sit behind midfield 6Ls back in running line, same margin back throughout, never likely in leader dominated affair.
No early pace, raced 3 wide in rearward division 6Ls away, had a trail throughout, moved wider turning, set a task but made many lengths in straight.
Taken back early, ended up last and the best part of 7Ls away, had plenty to do still well back on bend, weaved between horses in straight making many lengths for an unlucky 2nd.
Reasonable jump, raced 3Ls or so back or few, had easy time throughout, saved ground turning, just kept on behind them in straight.
Well enough away, ended up in box-seat on leaders back, had every chance in run, part of the action from 400 M and made strong finishing effort in 4 way finish.
Standard break, positioned in midfield 3 wide with a trail 5Ls or so back in midfield, travelled well to bend, let down nicely turning, dug deep final 200 M to score a narrow victory.
Began nicely, positioned prominently 1 out 1 back, did some work early, still 2Ls down turning, condition gave out inside 300 M and dropped out of it.
Fast into stride, took up running soon after, held inside running although shaded on bend, drove through again on turning, lost lead inside 200 M but kept giving to be not far away on line.
Ridden along to take close order early, raced 3 wide without cover 2Ls back, used too much in run, faded out in straight.
Out in line, assumed a midfield role 2 wide 5Ls off front runners, had an easy time in run, angled out on turning, closed well down middle to just miss in 3 way go.
No early pace as usual, settled 7Ls away in rear division, still had job to do turning, just kept on behind them late.
Standard jump, ended up in midfield, 4Ls off speed, enjoyed easy time, taken wider on turning in, lacked a dash but made steady ground in run to line.
Moderate beginning, settled near to rear 7Ls off top end, moved 3 wide on circle, still last turning in, made good progress down centre to be nearest on line.
Began with first few, used a bit to work across and race outside leader, shaded leader on bend, 1/2L down turning, couldn't sustain effort and peaked at 200 M.
Standard getaway, took a trail 4 to 5Ls back on rails in midfield, easy time throughout, inconvenienced turning, made no real progress and just held ground late.
Slowly into stride and towards rear, 8Ls off the leader in middle stages, made steady progress over the home turn, stayed on well inside 200 M.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.

Cut out the early running till 1100 M, sat one back on the fence from leader, challenged and led 200 M out, kept on well to hold off the persistent runner-up. (Trainer questioned re running position.)
Awkwardly away, settled in midfield 5Ls off the pace, driven along and some progress 500 M out, swung wide into straight, had his chance but weakened passing 200 M.
Away in line, eased and crossed to race at the back of the field, waited with until 400 M, lacked a sparkling turn of foot and could only make limited progress from off the pace.
Away with them, in midfield along the fence, keen and difficult to settle down the back straight, made steady headway inside 400 M but unable to trouble the first two.
Overcame a wide draw to lead approaching 1200 M, set a steady pace up front, collared near 400 M and found nothing under pressure, dropped out rapidly inside 250 M.
Good jump, restrained to a 2-wide position towards the rear of mid-division, moved closer making the home turn but couldn't find another gear in straight. One-paced finish.
Behind leaders early, eased back to midfield entering the back straight, angled out from the rails for a clear run passing 400 M, ran on final 200 M.
Well enough away, raced in a 2-wide spot ahead of mid-division, driven out approaching 400 M, couldn't step up a gear when required, no extra 200 M out.
Lost ground at the start, always prominent tracking the leader, took over passing 400 M, headed 200 M, attempted to rally back but was always held.
Broke well from the inside but lacked early speed and was dropped towards the rear, struggled to keep up passing 500 M and never looked likely from that point.

Was unable to muster sufficient speed to cross runners to its inside whilst racing with the front division and was caught 3 deep. Gradually gave ground while racing wide and without cover on the circle but still managed to keep on.
Travelled with the back makers along paint. Kept to the inside in the straight but failed to run on.
Ridden along from barrier rise to settle behind the speed, 2 deep with cover. Didn't quicken early in the straight, but knuckled down to its task well over the latter stages hitting the line hard.
Couldn't go the early speed of the race, settling midfield, 3-wide with cover. Battled away in the run to the post.
Showed good early dash to settle as joint leader, 1 off. Commenced to lay out from the 500 M, and compounded in the straight, collapsing after the post.
Worked forward effortlessly from a good draw to land in the lead on the fence. Didn't enjoy all favors in front but was able to pinch a break before the home turn. Lost out over the final stages.

From the inside gate, was able to park on the back of the leader along the paint and had the run of the race. Peeled out before the furlong and stretched away in the final stages to gain the ascendancy.
From a wide gate was taken back and settled near the rear of the field, 1 off with cover. Came widest in the final stretch and ran respectably.
Travelled 3 back the fence. Closed off satisfactorily.
Raced behind midfield, 2-wide with cover. Failed to run on when asked for an effort over the final 300 M.
From an outside alley was taken across behind other runners to race in last position. Struggled at the business end of the event.
Pushed early but was unable to muster speed from a wide draw. Trapped wide at midfield thereafter and dropped out on straightening.
Taken to rail at rear and had an economical trip to bend. Ran on fairly in the straight.
Amongst the first few after start but was trapped wide making the first turn. Taken to race midfield at half-way. Hard ridden from 450 M but found nothing.
Always in the leading section but was unable to take rail. Prevailed in a duel with the leader in the home straight but failed to contain the eventual winner.
Raced with leaders before taken in behind in a 2-wide position passing 800 M. Had every chance in the straight but was unable to turn up a notch.
Disputed lead on fence through to the home turn. Fought hard in the straight to settle for minor placing.
Jumped awkwardly and elected to sit at rear through to the home turn. Past only beaten rivals in the straight.
Eased to rear from a high draw. Swung out for clear run and was 5Ls down approaching the home straight. Found little when the race got serious.
Raced within 4Ls behind the pace on fence and finished off fairly well to make frame.
Trapped wide behind pace after good jump. Weakened on straightening.
Prominent spot throughout. Finished off strongly and won with some comfort.
Raced 2-wide and 4Ls down until the home turn over-raced throughout. Couldn't pull out extra in the home straight.
Handily placed in 4th about 2Ls off on fence from the 1200 M until the last turn, stayed on best of the rest but winning post came too soon.
Pressed forward from wide gate, raced 2nd or 3rd within 2Ls of the pace from 1100 M to final bend, one-paced.
Pressed on to lead by 1L on fence just before the 1000 M, skipped over 2Ls clear off final turn and at 200 M, tired late, did enough to hang on.
8Ls last at halfway, only a little nearer spinning for home, retrieved some fair late ground, never nearer.
Caught 3-wide no cover around midfield for the duration, 3Ls down off final bend, extra work exerted its toll late on.
On the fence about 5Ls behind initially, marginally closer into final quarter, stayed on okay on the inner, never nearer.
8Ls last passing post for the first time, 6Ls back in rear and 4-wide taking last curve, ran on well down centre of the track, never nearer.
2-wide and 4Ls back in 5th at the 1000 M, much the same on straightening, kept on fairly well for a place.
Briefly held the early lead, then raced 2nd or 3rd within 2Ls of the pace from 1100 M to final bend, lacked a turn of foot.
On fence about 5Ls back in 6th at halfway and turning for home, checked at the 300 M, lost momentum, most unlucky not to place.
10th and 7Ls off pace down the back straight, struggling before final turn, dropped out.
Never any better than midfield, 2-wide and 5Ls off speed at halfway, steadily faded out of the picture from top of home straight.
Soon led on fence by 1L, maintained a similar break through to the last corner, headed just inside the 200 M and tossed out of a place on the line.
Bounded and lost over 2Ls upon exiting gates, 7Ls down in 10th or so at halfway, recovered some late ground in the straight, never nearer.
Did well to get cover from wide gate, in 5th some 3Ls back at the 1000 M, loomed closer off last turn and led at the 100 M, stayed on well.
5-wide no cover on first bend, always close-up but 3-wide no cover from 1000 M, briefly led inside the 200 M, couldn't sustain the run.
Midfield 3-back the fence about 4Ls off pace through to final bend, held up until the 200 M when 2Ls down, did enough to get 2nd once clear.
Didn't break well, always rearward and 8Ls last through to last turn, never likely to make an impact.
One from rear at least 6Ls or 7Ls from the lead through to the final quarter, recovered moderate late ground but never really in the hunt.
4-back on fence but a little keen at the 1000 M, over 4Ls back in 9th turning for home, finished off strongly to nick 3rd on the line.
Sat on the leader DR WELL'S tail in 4th or so through to final bend when briefly held up, found zero off the bit, poor performance given the soft run.
3-wide with cover on first bend, 1L back in 2nd or so at halfway, still right there into final turn, yielded ground inside final furlong.
With cover between 4Ls and 5Ls from the speed through to the last bend, one-paced.
Midfield about 4Ls off speed and 3-wide but with cover until the final turn, weakened inside final 200 M.
Eased to sit behind midfield along the fence, 5-1/2Ls off the leader, harmed by the slow tempo, held up 300 M, on heels 100 M, demonstrated strongly finishing efforts for 3rd.
Eased back for cover, 4-1/2Ls off the leader, raced very keenly, trapped 3 to 4-wide and lost too much ground, harmed by the slow pace, lacked turn of foot in final stages.
Eased to rear and took rail, 8Ls off the leader, dashed strongly 250 M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the slow tempo, little dash 200 M.
Hard ridden to secure the box seat, enjoyed the slow tempo and the rail-run, momentarily held up 300 M, closed the race off strongly to win.
Hard ridden early, 2-1/2Ls off the leader, not suited by the slow tempo, trapped 3-wide throughout and lost ground, emptied in straight.
At rear, 7-1/2Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, harmed by the slow pace, held up 4-2, little dash when clear.
Hard ridden to occupy a prominent spot, 1-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, favoured by the slow early sectionals, led 200 M, just missed by a head in last few strides.

Slowly away, hard ridden to obtain a midfield spot, 3-1/2Ls off the leader, trapped 3 to 4-wide throughout, harmed by the slow pace and lost too much ground at bends, flattened in straight. (Lame next day.)
Hard ridden early but failed to cross in front, trapped 3 to 4-wide throughout outside the leader, out of fuel 250 M.
Eased at start and crossed at back, 5-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the slow sectionals, blocked 300 M, ran on ok when clear.
Hard ridden to take the rail and led by 1L, benefited by the slow early sectionals and the rail-run, overhauled 200 M, just missed 3rd.
Soon took up running on rails from the 1 draw, made running to 300 M, soon headed and plugged on 3rd.
Tracked leader, angled off rails to challenge turning in, soon hit front over 200 M out to win readily.
Raced keenly and wide without cover in better than midfield, 2L 4th down far side, yielded ground noticeably from around home bend.
Began with others, settled one-out-one-back in 2nd, lost position turning in, kept on same pace under pressure in closing stages.
Settled in rear of midfield, blundered but held position about 700 M out, made no show in straight.

Began restrained from the 12 draw, soon crossed to rails in last few, commenced move rounding home bend, widest runner turning in when just off midfield, sustained progress down straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled just better than midfield in 4th or 5th, made no impression in straight.
Settled in forward of midfield saving ground on rails throughout, shaken up upon straightening, quickened up well from joint 5th into straight to reach 2nd over 100 M out.
Settled in rear of midfield on rails, switched off rails for a run upon challenging, did not quicken.
Always in last few, very wide turning for home, never seen with a chance.
Settled well behind, produced good impression in straight despite not much room inside final 200 M.
Gradually crossed from the 11 draw settling 2-wide in midfield, ran home one-paced under pressure.
Taken back on jumping, crossed to the rails and settled towards the rear 4 to 5Ls off the pace, trapped on the inside and had no clear run till 200 M, ran on only fairly when cleared.
Unable to lead and was pushed very wide throughout, already under pressure making the final turn, soon beaten on straightening.
Held up towards the rear, had a smooth run to straight, came through to challenge down the inside, ran on well in the closing stages.
Away quickly, alongside leader, didn't handle the turn and lost touch from 450 M, found nothing under pressure, soon running on empty.
Gradually dropped back to a 3-wide position in midfield after a good start, came to challenge inside 300 M but didn't find a change of pace.
Settled prominently in the chasing group, commenced to hang out 550 M, came with a threatening-looking run early in straight but wasn't able to sustain it inside the final 150 M.
First to jump but not fast enough to cross, ran wide for most of the journey, struggled to hold his position passing 500 M, no response coming off the bend, eased.
Took up running as expected, set a decent pace up front and had the field under pressure 400 M from home, kept on strongly in straight to score his 5th consecutive win over Happy Valley 1200 M.
2-deep in mid-division racing keenly, had to be shifted out near 250 M for a clear path but found less than expected in the run to the line.
Held midfield running and saved ground on the inside, driven and made steady progress inside 300 M but couldn't get close to the decisive winner.
Pushed along to stay just off the pace, travelled well enough into contention 400 M out, unable to close the gap on the runaway winner, weakened inside 100 M.
Eased back on jumping, held up in last 5Ls behind leader, switched out for a run passing 400 M, couldn't pick up and kept on same pace to the line.

Away with them and placed 2-wide in front of midfield, checked near 900 M and commenced to race wide without cover thereafter, briefly threatened inside 300 M, kept on same pace final 150 M. (Jockey dropped whip 300 M.)
Settled prominently in the chasing group, struggled to keep up passing 450 M, behind and eased final 200 M.
Jumped a shadow shortly after the start, lost momentum but gradually picked up again to lead 1000 M out, soon collared in straight, kept battling till final 100 M when stamina finally gave out.
Awkwardly away, better than midfield on the inner, shifted 2-wide halfway round the bend, challenged 250 M out, no chance with the winner but kept on well to hold on for 3rd.
In midfield 3-wide and left without cover from 1200 M, strode forward to track leader approaching the turn, led briefly in straight but run ended about 200 M from home.
Awkwardly away, travelled 3-wide in midfield, hampered with near 700 M and pushed wider at the turn, made some progress from 400 M but ran flat over the concluding stages.
Given a patient ride in the rear 7 to 8Ls off the pace, waited with till 400 M, made steady headway from the back but no threat overall.
Slotted into a 2-wide spot behind mid-division, travelled well to straight, picked up in good style when switched to outside of field, led 100 M out, comfortably.
Dropped back to last and trailed 10Ls from the leader in the first half, moved closer from 800 M, hard ridden coming off the bend but kept on same pace. No impression.
Lacked early pace, pushed along to stay in touch, behind midfield throughout, shifted out and made good progress passing 350 M, never nearer.
Broke well but allowed to drop in behind midfield, held inside running and moved closer over the turn, steadied near 200 M, ran on well when clear.
Taken back on jumping and settled towards the rear, 7Ls down and last going into straight, made promising headway inside 300 M, nearest at the finish.
Led them till 1000 M, 3rd going into straight, found nothing under pressure and weakened 250 M out.
Slow to begin, bustled along and held inside running in midfield, shifted to 3-wide passing 800 M, didn't have the clearest run from 400 M to 200 M, stayed on towards the finish.
Began awkwardly however was able to land on the back of the speed. Shifted in to continue into clear running near the 200 M but only battled to the line.
Raced midfield then improved to be handy to the principals along the centre of the track. Failed to quicken when asked for an effort tiring over the latter stages.

Was slow to begin then was ridden along out of the gates, however was steadied soon after, settling at the rear. Pushed for the better part of the journey along the outside fence and made fair ground.
Raced near the back of the field. Had no excuses.
Crowded at the start settling with the backmakers near the outside rail. Struggled over the final 400 M.
Began awkwardly then improved to race handy to the leaders. Gave ground before the furlong and was a spent force soon after.
Landed on the back of the speed and despite being under pressure midway, gave little at the business end.
Couldn't match the early speed of the race and settled midfield along the outside rail. Picked up nicely when placed under pressure running on nicely.
Began well then settled early to take up a position on the outside fence back in the field. Failed to run on.
Slow to begin, settling along the middle of the track with the rear division. Failed to quicken tiring noticeably over the final stages.
Worked forward easily to share the lead. Battled on gamely over the final stages.
Took a forward position early and was always traveling comfortably on the bridle. Moved up to the leaders at the halfway mark, lengthened impressively when allowed to stride clear and won decisively.
Bounced out of the gates to make the early running before being joined by runners to its inside. Battled on soundly.
Raced with the tailenders down the middle of the course. Was a beaten horse passing the 300 M.
Urged early and took lead on fence 800 M out. Held 2Ls advantage final 300 M. Hung on closing stages to hold off late challengers.
Raced on fence behind midfield before breaking down on straightening.
Soon checked to rear after moderate jump. Trapped in similar position on fence on bend. Held up for clear run for the major part of the straight. Not fully tested.
Raced as the back marker throughout. Never in contention.
Pushed early to stay behind midfield. 2-wide 5Ls down on straightening. Closed off well and was nearest at finish.
Good jump but failed to work across. Raced 4-wide without cover at midfield early. Took closer order 700 M out and was 3Ls away on straightening. One-paced to conclude.
Better than midfield on fence through to the home straight. Found nothing when asked.
Hard ridden early to stay midfield. Shuffled back passing 800 M. Moved up outside the field making the home turn and was 5Ls down on straightening. Responded only fairly in the straight.
Led early before taking a sit behind the pace at 800 M. Chased hard in the straight but couldn't make up on winner.
Driven early and settled within striking distance. Failed to turn up a notch when the race got serious.
Quickly into stride, ended up at midfield. 2-wide 4Ls down turning for home. Kept giving in the straight. Just failed to make frame in a photo finish.
Settled amongst last few after start. Improved wide gradually and was 6Ls down rounding the bend. Ran on well to make frame at the line.
Midfield about 4Ls or 5Ls back until the final turn, briefly tight for room at 150 M but always outpaced by the principal trio.
On fence between 2Ls and 3Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th at halfway, same turning for home, had every opportunity, failed to quicken up sufficiently.
3 and 4-wide no cover throughout, held a midfield position before the last bend but quickly faded in the straight after the extra work.
Never better than midfield, 11th at the 800 M, 5Ls back turning for home when under pressure, outpaced.
Crossed from wide gate to lead at the 1000 M and soon 2Ls clear, headed 300 M out and steadily slipped out of contention.
Much improved run, one from rear until the final 400 M at least 8Ls from the front, stayed on well to be nearest at the finish.
3-wide no cover briefly down the back in 5th or so, much closer 1L back in 3rd off last bend, had every chance to place but failed to follow through.
Crossed from widest gate to race handily in 4th at 1000 M, still close enough turning for home but found very little off the bit and yielded ground rapidly.
4-back the rails and 6Ls off pace at the 1000 M, same margin behind and struggling on straightening, folded tamely.
Always worse than midfield, 8Ls back in 10th at halfway, kept chasing the majority of the field.
Midfield with cover down the back, 4Ls down turning in 7th out 3-wide, no match for winner but went 2nd about 50 M out and held onto quinella.
Led early on, handed up advantage at 1000 M, raced 2nd before leading again 300 M out, headed again by the winner 100 M out, lost 2nd at 50 M, got 3rd.
Never going well, last and niggled along down the back straight, plodded on past two beaten rivals in the straight.
Towards rear at least 6Ls from speed before straightening, quickened up nicely out wide to lead at the 100 M, won with plenty in hand.
Checked at the 1200 M and never any better than midfield, pressured and 7Ls adrift off last turn, never on terms. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Slowest away, always detached at the tail of the field at least 8Ls from the speed, hard to enthuse about.
Nicely placed in 'one-out-one-back' spot in 5th or so and 2Ls until last bend, bumped 350 M out, had his chance to get 3rd, subsequent objection dismissed.
2-wide around midfield 3Ls from initial tempo, further back and outpaced at top of home straight, no impression.
Raced 6th out 3-wide but with cover about 3Ls from pace at halfway, one-paced and unthreatening to the principals in the straight.
3-wide no cover for the duration, close-up in 3rd at halfway, began to fall out of touch on the circle, left further behind in the straight.
Quietly ridden one from rear and 6Ls off speed at the 1000 M, much the same turning for home, ran on past a few spent forces to wind up.
Midfield about 3Ls off speed down the back, lost his position on the circle and very weak in the home straight. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Always worse than midfield at least 5Ls from the pace, widest of all spinning for home, didn't offer much in the wrap-up.
Soft trail on the leader's back on rails in 3rd or 4th before straightening for home, never likely to challenge quinella pair and all out to get 3rd.
Checked early back to about 6Ls off pace on the fence, same margin back and rearward off last bend, recovered only very minor late ground.
Soon led on the fence, no more than half a length clear from 1000 M to final 200 M, overhauled by the winner inside final 50 M.
Sent on from widest gate to flank pacesetter in 2nd through to final furlong, clawed his way to the front inside final 50 M, gamely.
3-back the rails in midfield about 4Ls or so from the speed through to the last turn, never likely to draw a great deal closer.
Shared the lead easily at good pace, dominated from 300 M.
At back, 5Ls off the good pace, ran on fairly in final stages.
At back, 5Ls behind the good pace, no turn of foot.
Prominent, 2Ls behind the good pace, soon flattened 400 M.
Settled behind the leaders, 2Ls off the good pace, just held ground in last furlong.
Shared the lead at good pace, started riding along vigorously half way, closed off well for 2nd, not much threat to winner.
At back, 4Ls off the good pace, no progress.
Eased at start, never competitive at rear.
Occupied a more prominent spot than usual without making much use, 2Ls off the good pace, just ran on ok in last quarter.
Eased to sit behind midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the good pace, made ground 300 M.
Failed to obtain the lead without making much use, 2-1/2Ls off the good pace, very one paced, made some ground 100 M and grabbed 3rd.
Checked after start, at back, 4-1/2Ls off the good pace, made steady ground 400 M, lacked room final 100 M.
Settled just behind the leaders, 1-1/2Ls off the good pace, just held ground in final stages.
Drawn wide, soon taken across to settle just worse than midfield, switched off heels for a run turning in, kept on steadily under pressure without quickening in straight.
Raced up with the pace 3 wide without cover, crossed to lead around home bend, tiring when headed over 200 M out, weakened quickly out of contention under pressure closing stages.
Settled in midfield, kept on steadily under pressure on rails in straight before fading passing 200 M.
Towards rear to straight, produced good late impression in closing stages.
Drawn wide, soon taken back to race in rear in 3rd last, produced good late progress down centre of straight, nearest at finish snatching 3rd late.
Settled in rear of midfield, finished off the race well to grab 2nd over 200 M out.
Broke well from the one draw, held rails run sharing the pace, retreated to one off the speed around home bend, dropped out after straightening.
Ridden early to muster early speed to share the pace, ceded lead to race one-out-one-back around the bend, close up in 3rd when badly tightened 350 M out, fought on under pressure to the line.
Always well behind, never a factor.
Settled in 4th about 2Ls off the pace, switched out to commence run upon straightening, hit the front over 250 M out, won readily.
Settled in forward of midfield, fighting on under pressure when tightened and blundered inside 200 M, never recovered.
Began awkwardly, restrained to a rearward position 4 to 5Ls behind leader, switched out for a clear path and challenged from 300 M, ran on strongly under pressure to finish nearest at the line.
Dashed to the front, sat one-out-one-back from leader at the turn, had every chance but looked very laboured when asked to quicken, faded away inside 200 M.
Raced in last few, held inside run, made some progress down the inner on straightening but no real impression.
Quickly into stride, led early but gradually dropped back to midfield, chased leader 300 M out, kept grinding to the line and just held on for 3rd.
Up with the early pace, unable to cross and trapped 3-wide, not picked up in straight, eased close home.
Raced 2-wide behind midfield, had to be pushed along passing 500 M, kept on one pace to the line, never on terms. (Mildly distressed / abnormally high heart rate.)
Drawn on the outside, raced 4-wide and covered more ground than others, under pressure 400 M, soon running on empty.
Hard ridden out the gate, up front disputing the lead early but dropped back to avoid racing wide entering the home turn, unable to pick up and weakened over 200 M out.
Held inside run and cruised to the lead near 600 M, drifted away from the fence making the turn, driven out 250 M, headed inside 100 M.
Away in line, settled in midfield but always in touch, had a dream run along the rails, quickened well in straight to hit the front 100 M from home.
Assumed a position in midfield, 3-wide on the turn, made steady headway down the centre but was never getting there in time.
Taken back on jumping from the wide barrier, 2 off the fence in the rear group, steadied early in straight and had huge task in hand, ran on well over final 200 M, never nearer.
Standard jump, landed spot behind midfield 8Ls off pace, improved position on bend, flat footed on turning when they sprinted but wound up nicely late making good ground for 2nd.
Landed in ideal spot 3Ls off lead behind pace quartet, every hope throughout, let down nicely from 350 M, asserted authority final 100 M for an overdue win.
Tardy into stride, mustered to race forward and sit outside leader, used a bit with honest tempo, levelled up soon after turning, faded when condition gave out at 200 M.
Away nicely, assumed a prominent spot 1 out 1 back, raced 2Ls away throughout, in mix on turning but peaked at 200 M, stuck on to make frame.
No early pace, raced 8Ls from leaders, niggled to improve on bend, made no real progress and only passed tired horses in straight.
Even jump, assumed midfield role 5Ls off top end, used little in run, outpaced at business end and tired late.
Began nicely, landed in front before electing for a trail, OK run thereafter despite being on solid speed, found little under pressure and dropped out.
No early pace, ended up 10Ls or so back at tail of field, set a big task still well back turning, came to middle and made many lengths late. (See Racing Incidents.)
Lacked early toe, shared rear on rails 9Ls off pace, saved ground on inside rounding bend, made steady progress along paint without looking likely.
Jumped handy, faded back to race behind midfield, 7Ls or so away in mid-section, improved 3 wide on circle, lacked dash and just battled away in straight.
Fast away as usual, landed in lead role but forced to do some early work, held a 1L advantage on turning, headed inside 150 M and just held position from that point.
Displayed early pace, led before ending up in trailling position, OK trip thereafter, held up early straight and was reluctant to take inside runs, kept coming late to go down narrowly.
Taken straight down to fence, raced in midfield 4 to 5Ls back, saved energy throughout, held up turning in, kept on well once clear to take 3rd.
Average break, regathered to race 3Ls back on rails, had an easy time thereafter, checked when held up at 350 M, kept on steadily holding ground in finish.
Out sharply, backed out of speed battle early, raced 2Ls back behind pace pair, no response turning and gave in cheaply.
Worked early to cross outside leader from a wide alley, reasonable run thereafter, struggling turning and soon dropped out.
Began with rest, raced midfield 5 to 6Ls back, lost spot on bend, with last few on turning, made only minor ground in straight.
No early speed and gradually faded back to be 8 to 9Ls down in rear division, 3 wide on bend, struggled to pick up and just battled in straight.
Began smartly, worked to front, controlled affairs at top end 1L clear, kicked on turning and kept on soundly under hands and heels riding for place.
Moderate jump, landed spot 5Ls away just off midfield, raced wide with cover throughout, chased strongly from 400 M, peaked on run at 100 M but held on to make frame.
Slotted into a midfield spot 4Ls back in running line, crowded at 1200 M but had an OK run thereafter, checked again at 350 M, just battled away final furlong.
Restrained from outside alley, ended up at rear 9 to 10Ls away, at tail throughout, widest on straightening, made good deal of headway to be nearest at finish.
Out in line, unable to slot in and posted 3 wide without cover, did too much in middle stages, 3Ls down on turning, faded out from 300 M.
Tardy into stride, soon with last few 8Ls back on rails, continued to make progress on fence to turn, held up from turn to 200 M, clear too late and just held ground in run to line.
Not quick away, 6 to 7Ls away in running line throughout, lost position approaching bend, switched out turning, closed soundly down middle to be closest on line.
Slightly slow out, held running in midfield 2-wide, gradually angled out for a clear run passing 350 M, stayed on but never looked dangerous.

Taken back on jumping from the wide barrier, settled 2nd last 5Ls away from the pace, shifted out abruptly entering the home straight, hung in under pressure and didn't have a clear crack until halfway down the straight.
Up with the early pace but couldn't shift in from the outside, 4-wide and dropped back to midfield entering the turn, had nothing to offer coming out of the bend, soon beaten.
Held up towards the rear, placed on the fence and commenced to make good progress inside 300 M, never nearer.

Slow to begin, crossed to the fence and moved closer to a midfield position prior to the turn, made steady progress from 350 M, shifted ground for a clear passage near 100 M, ran on well in closing stges.
Broke well from the inside, always prominent just off the pace, challenged 300 M out and led near 150 M, kept on well.
Couldn't muster speed and soon ended up racing in last trailing 6Ls from the leader, always behind, no impression. (Retired after race.)
Broke well but was restrained to mid-division, settled 3-wide and 3Ls off the pace, every chance when presented a clear run inside 300 M, ran on but no impression on the first two.
Held the lead in opening strides and later chased the pace outside leader, driven 300 M out but found nothing under pressure, soon weakened.
Even break, rushed forward but unable to cross, 3-wide swinging for home, never picked up on straightening and faded away inside 200 M.
Ordinary jump, chased leaders, not responded to urging inside 400 M, soon eased. (Unacceptable performance / lame next morning.)
Bustled along after the start, led them steadily on the fence, headed 150 M from home, weakened in closing stages and just held on for 3rd.
Went forward from barrier rise and crossed after the 1200 M to make the running. Stayed on well to finish close to the principals.
Shifted in after the start from a wide gate to race on the rails at the tail of the field. Made some late ground over the final stages.
Raced behind midfield the fence. Peeled out turning for home, getting to the line dourly.

Ridden patiently early with cover along the fence, close to midfield. Began to pull after the 1200 M, and was permitted to stride forward mid race to travel outside the leader. struggled in the straight.
Travelled in 3rd position, 2 wide. Was crossed near the 600 M and took up a trailing position. Faded in the straight.
Settled towards the rear, 1 off with cover. Closed off nicely out wide.
Settled in 2nd last position along the rails, Peeled out rounding the home turn and took inside runs in the straight closing off soundly to grab 2nd close to the post.

Settled back in the field along the fence. Shifted out to be 1 off mid race and prior to the home turn had made a forward move rolling out to race 3 deep. Was 4 wide turning for home running on smartly.
Parked midfield, 2 wide with cover. Rolled out after the 500 M, making a sweeping run and opening up an advantage on its rivals. Held on over the final stages to repel challengers.

Was prominent early before settling 3 back the fence. From passing the 500 M until entering the home straight, was held up for clear running and was again eased near the 100 M. Ran on late finishing strongly.
Led early on the rails before handing up after the 1100 M and took a sit. Raced on the bridle but gave little in the run home.
Settled midfield, 1 off early with cover, but was carried out near the 1200 M, to race 3 wide without cover from that point on. Gave ground prior to straightening and tailed out. To trial.
Raced behind the pace on fence through to the home turn. Shared lead on straightening but was swamped inside 150 M.
Last out and raced toward rear on fence. Checked near 600 M. One-paced to conclude in the straight.
Raced behind midfield on fence after moderate start. 5Ls away turning for home. Responded fairly well in the straight and was nearest at finish.
Hard ridden early and settled 2-wide behind midfield from 900 M. Found nothing in the straight.
Midfield on fence through to the home turn. 3Ls down into home straight. Improved moderately in the straight.
Always handy on rail. Every chance in the straight but found the winner too strong closing stages.
Settled 2-wide better than midfield after good jump. 3Ls down turning in. Ran on well late and just missed out on 2nd.
Pushed forward from wide barrier and was 5-wide making the first turn. Took lead in a 2-wide position from 800 M. Ran down by the front trio inside final 200 M but hung on just to make frame.
Ridden along from high draw but failed to muster. Settled 2-wide at midfield from 900 M. 4Ls behind the pace on straightening. Ran on steadily thereafter.
Taken back from wide barrier and trailed field. Moved up gradually from 500 M outside the field. Couldn't pull out extra in the straight.
Amongst first to begin but trapped 4-wide making the first turn. Slotted 'one-out-one-back' from 800 M. Finished off well to score victory.
Taken towards rear after start. Forced to be 3-wide rounding the bend and was 5Ls down turning in. Made some headway in the straight.
Pressed forward from wide gate but posted 3-wide no cover throughout, in 3rd or so but wide until last bend, extra work soon exacted its toll. (Tactic questioned.)
One from rear about 8Ls from the pace at the 1000 M, same position and left flat-footed as field straightened for home, soon beaten.
Always nicely place in 4th or 5th with cover and well within striking range, over 2Ls back in 3rd at the furlong marker, couldn't follow through.
3-back on fence in midfield some 4Ls from leader through to straightening, responded well to lead about 50 M out, kept on.
Went back as usual, always niggled along a little, 9Ls last 700 M, recovered some decent late ground in the straight, never nearer.
4-back the rails in 8th or 9th about 5Ls from the lead at the 1000 M, seemed held when squeezed for room 200 M out, never really landed a blow.
Always worse than midfield, at least 5Ls from the pace before last bend, never loomed with any sort of threat.
No early pace, unable to take a more prominent position than 10th, 7Ls adrift turning for home, rattled home strongly for an unlikely placing.
Midfield and 2-wide just behind winner GRAND GENERAL throughout, kept on pretty well in the straight to just hold 2nd.
Mustered enough pace to box-seat from the inside draw, trailed the leader back but struggling to keep up turning for home, wilted.
Pressed forward, flanked pacesetter in 2nd about 1L off pace from 1200 M to final turn, had every chance to place, didn't miss out by much.
Led as usual, 1L clear on fence at the 1200 M, tried to pinch the race by kicking 2Ls clear 300 M out, reeled in 50 M out and just missed a place.
4-back the rails and worse than midfield throughout, always at least 5Ls off pace also, very weak in the stretch.
Worse than midfield in a 2-wide position initially, 3-wide and 5Ls back in 8th off last bend, crowded at 200 M but well held in any case.
3-back the fence in 5th about 4Ls off pace at 1000 M and a little closer spinning for home, had his chance to place, failed narrowly. (Tactic questioned.)
Went back from wide gate, detached and at least 8Ls adrift 600 M, posed no sort of threat from there.
Travelled nicely on the leader's back throughout, peeled out wider off last turn, led at the 200 M, sped well clear, easily.
Slowest away, mostly one from rear at least 6Ls from the pace before final turn, no chance with winner but ran home strongly to nick 2nd on the line.
Led by 1L on the fence at the 1200 M, led or disputed the advantage before being headed just before 200 M then yielding ground rapidly.
2-wide and 1L back in 2nd at the 1200 M, disputing the lead on straightening for home, didn't find much off the bridle, soon outpaced.
Drew widest, posted 3-wide no cover throughout, pressed on from 700 M to join leaders 500 M out, the run was short- lived, weakened in the straight.
Pressed forward from wide gate, 2-wide in midfield 4Ls or 5Ls off speed at halfway and same off last bend, one-paced to wrap up.
Settled 4th about 3Ls off pace out 2-wide at halfway, steadied slightly at point of home turn, finished off fairly well but just missed quinella.
Eased to sit in midfield, 4.5Ls off the good pace 2 wide, just held ground in straight.
Hard ridden early to occupy a spot in front of midfield, 3Ls off the good pace 2 wide, showed remarkable turn of foot 200 M, drifted away 100 M to win.
Pushed to sit in front of midfield, 3Ls off the good pace, trapped 4 wide throughout and lost too much ground, out of fuel 200 M.
Hard ridden forward to share the lead at good pace, trapped 3 wide throughout and lost ground, soon emptied 400 M.
Settled nicely in box seat, ran on well to finish 2nd but never threatened the winner.
Hard ridden throughout to hold the rail spot in midfield, 4.5Ls off the good pace, lacked room 400 M to 200 M, made ground when clear.
At back, 6Ls behind the good pace, trapped 3 wide and lost ground, made steadily ground 200 M.
Eased to rear, 7.5Ls off the good pace along the fence, made some ground from 400 M.
Trapped 3 wide in midfield throughout, 4.5Ls off the good pace, ran on OK in final stages.
Pushed forward and shared lead at good pace, ran on until 200 M, weakened.
Very slow away, hard ridden to keep up with the field, 6Ls off the good pace 2 wide, on heels 600 M, ran on OK.
Hard ridden to hold the rail and shared the lead at good pace, hung on until 200 M overhauled, ran on for 3rd.
Settled in rear of midfield, came under pressure 3-wide around the bend, ran home steadily without threatening.
Not far off when mostly in 4th to 400 M, failed to maintain position under pressure early in straight, beaten when tightened 200 M out.
Settled behind midfield, made rapid progress from the Rock around the field to lead into straight, retreated to 2nd when tiring 200 M out, swamped for a placing final few strides.

Gradually crossed for the rails run up with the pace after beginning from a wide barrier, eventually crossed to lead passing the 1000 M bend, headed turning for home but hung on well to re-gain advantage over 150 M out.
Settled within 3Ls of pace in 5th on rails, saved ground on inside turning in, fought on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Soon taken across from the wide draw, settled well back and never seen with a chance.
Broke well, held rails run sharing the lead, taken back to track leader in 3rd far side, some 2Ls off upon straightening, fought on under pressure to narrowly miss 2nd.
Settled towards rear, in last few into straight, never nearer.
Settled well behind, trailed the field to the Rock, 3rd last into straight, made no progress.
Travelled mainly 3-wide in forward of midfield, produced good impression in straight.
Settled in rear of midfield, similar turning in, tight between runners early in straight but produced good late impression inside final 200 M.
Raced outside leader in 2nd, yielded ground from approaching home turn, gradually faded under pressure.
Lost ground at the start, towards the rear always, badly hampered by the slow pace and was unable to settle, couldn't quicken in straight and weakened over final 200 M.
One off the fence in midfield, not helped by the slow pace and unable to improve behind horses, challenged from 350 M and made good progress down the inside to be nearest at the finish.
Pushed to the front and led them along at a leisurely tempo, disputed for lead down the back straight, locked horns with the eventual winner inside 300 M, weakened final 100 M but held on for 3rd.
Settled in a 3-wide position better than midfield, hampered by the slow pace and raced without cover throughout, under pressure from 500 M, kept on same pace in straight.

Went forward from the outside barrier, set and benefitted from a slow pace upfront, ready to strike turning in, battled hard to shake off his nearest persuader and led going into 100 M, kept on well to score.
Handily placed in front of midfield, shuffled back to midfield entering the home turn, picked up well when clear inside 250 M to get within a neck of the winner.
Parked 3-wide in mid-division, not suited by the slow tempo, sandwiched between horses early in straight, not clear until 200 M, ran on. (Jockey questioned regarding his riding in straight.)

Hampered on jumping and ended up towards the rear, not helped by the slow pace and strode forward from 600 M, covered extra ground on the turn, progressed steadily from 350 M but never any impression on the principals.
Given a waiting ride in the rear and was about 6Ls off the pace, had plenty to do turning in and made only very limited progress down the inside, never a factor.
Began awkwardly, towards the rear early, pushed wide on entering the back straight and from 600 M strode forward to be alongside leader, not quicken inside final 350 M.

Soon guided to the fence and cut out the early running, held back for cover from 1100 M and raced ungenerously at times, had his chance but not matched with the winner's pace. (Jockey severely reprimanded for his riding.)
Heled up in mid-division, badly hampered by the slow pace, checked and blundered near 850 M, switched wide for a clear path inside 400 M but soon running on empty.
Along the fence in mid-division, tracked well to bend, driven and made some progress from 350 M to finish a non-threatening 3rd.
No early pace and had to be pushed along to stay in touch, 2nd last going into straight, not quicken.
Even break, parked 3-wide in mid-division, under serious pressure 450 M out, soon weakened on straightening. (Irregular heart rhythm.)
Settled in midfield 4Ls off the pace, progressed steadily inside 400 M but offered little threat to the principals.
Broke well from the inside, held up in midfield along the fence, challenged 400 M but only kept on at the same pace. (Jockey dropped whip 100 M.)
Up with the pace tracking leaders prominently, kept on final 400 M but not enough pace to challenge.
Always held a handy position in front of midfield, put in a sustained effort to overhaul the leader inside 50 M, won in class record time.
Taken back on jumping, raced in last few and 6Ls off the pace making the home turn, into clear 350 M, made some headway from the back but never looked dangerous.
Hard ridden out the gate to find the lead, led steadily to straight, headed 250 M and weakened rapidly over the final 100 M.
Began awkwardly and lost ground, ended up racing in last 7Ls behind leader, difficult to settle at times, taken wide to challenge from 400 M and made even progress to the line.
Bustled along after the start and raced one out one back from leader, under urge passing 450 M and faded out gradually.
Went forward from the outside barrier, unable to cross and raced 3-wide following leaders, led from 250 M, kept on well only to be swamped by the winner near 50 M.
Shifted in at the start then speared forward to race with the leaders. Coursed wide and without cover throughout and was never likely to figure in the finish.
Worked forward to lead on the paint. Kept on until the final stages, but was overhauled soon after.
Was in the leading division caught wide, eased and took a sit near the 800 M to race 3 wide with cover. Rolled out entering the straight but faded in the latter stages.
Crowded at the start, travelling 3 deep with cover towards the rear of the field. Struggled in the run home.
Enjoyed the run of the race 1-2 deep on the back of a solid tempo. Hit the front after the furlong and drew a margin in the run to the line.
Settled in last spot on the rails. Made some late headway without ever threatening.
Settled with the backmakers, 1 off with cover. Came wide in the final stretch and made satisfactory ground over the 400 M.
Settled around midfield 3 wide with cover. Ran widest turning for home, failing to close off.
Raced behind the speed early before checking near the 800 M, settling midfield the fence. Failed to quicken in the run home and got to the line one paced.
Hampered at the start, and then showed sufficient gate speed to share the lead, 1 off. Responded well when asked for an effort and dueled with the winner early in the straight to finish a strong 2nd.
Raced with the backmakers along the paint. Hung out in the middle stages and made some moderate ground in the straight.
Was crowded at the start, settling midfield, 2 deep with cover. Gained runs through the field in the straight, closing off soundly.
Ridden to stay midfield early but ended up 2-wide towards rear making the home turn. 4Ls down on straightening. Picked up gradually in the straight and ran down rivals at finish.
Eased to race 3-wide behind midfield after starting from high draw. Swung widest and was 4Ls down turning in. Kept making up ground in the straight and was nearest at finish.
Raced 2-wide and within 3Ls behind the pace through to the home turn. Improved fairly well in the straight along with the front trio and made frame near the line.
Raced 2-wide at rear early. Urged along and was 6Ls behind the leader making the home turn. Made some headway in the straight.
First to hit ground. Took a sit behind the leader on fence 1000 M out. Attacked the lead from 300 M and battled with the principals until weakened inside 100 M.
2-wide behind the leader through to the home straight. Every chance inside 300 M but couldn't fend off the top pair close to home.

Soon in the front rank but was trapped wide. Taken to sit 3-wide better than midfield passing 1000 M. 3Ls off on straightening. Made a strong run inside 300 M and looked a winner 100 M out but was overrun at finish.
Raced greenly at rear and hung out in the early and middle stages. Detached entering the home straight but did make up some ground closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Shaken early and took lead one-off the fence approaching 1000 M. Still in front at 400 M but was unable to find extra gear when the race got serious.
Better than midfield on fence through to final 350 M. No extra thereafter.
Taken back from high draw. Driven along the fence passing 100 M and raced behind midfield rounding the bend. Ran out of petrol after straightening.
Raced on fence towards rear early and was 6Ls away on straightening. One-paced to conclude.
3-back the rails about 4Ls from the speed until last turn, found nothing off the bridle, poor effort.
Worse than midfield 4Ls or 5Ls from the pace through to last turn, ran on fairly through spent rivals in the straight to get 5th.
3-wide but with cover in last about 8Ls behind leader and winner, never had much hope given slow tempo. (Tactic questioned.)
More prominent than usual in the one-out-one-back spot through first half, one-paced in the straight but did enough to place.
Pressed forward, half a length back in 2nd out 2-wide at 900 M and still close-up off last bend, one-paced to wrap-up and missed a place. (Tactic questioned.)
Always worse than midfield at least 6Ls from the speed, never likely to get seriously involved.
Best away and made all, about half a length clear until final turn, kicked 2Ls clear at the 200 M, always in command.
Good early pace to race 2nd initially before box-seating 2Ls back in 3rd from 900 M to last turn, gave vain chase to the winner, comfortably held 2nd.
Crowded at start, 4-back the rails at halfway 5Ls off speed, much the same turning for home, yielded ground in the straight.
2-wide about 4Ls off speed in midfield down back straight and same turning for home, weakened steadily.
3-wide but with cover towards rear some 5Ls or 6Ls off the speed before last corner, never likely to threaten principals.
3-wide no cover for much of the race, 5Ls back in midfield and wide at halfway, remained in a similar position.
One from rear at least 7Ls from the speed before last turn, remained a similar margin from the lead despite running on past beaten rivals in the straight.
Crowded at the start, a little worse than midfield about 5Ls off pace from lead before final turn, offered nothing under pressure.
Pressed forward to lead by 1L on fence at 1000 M, a neck to the good from 800 M before being headed shortly after straightening, ceded ground rapidly.
Best out, nicely placed in 4th in one-out-one-back position no worse than 2Ls off pace through to final bend, held down a place.
Taken back to 8Ls last early on the fence, still last and 7Ls behind turning for home, recovered some decent late ground, never nearer. (Riding questioned.)
No early pace and raced 4-back the rails at halfway, 4Ls back in 7th turning for home, one-paced to conclude.
Slowly away but recovered quickly to take up box-seat position over 1L back in 3rd, lacked the winner's turn of foot but best of the rest for 2nd.
Did well to get into 3-back the fence position from wide gate, 4Ls backing 5th off final bend, led at furlong pole, won unchallenged.
Pressed forward to flank pacesetter in 2nd at halfway, upsides with every chance off last bend, didn't find much off the bridle, faded to midfield.
3-wide with cover in rear 6Ls off early pace, launched a brief rally at the 300 M but couldn't follow through.
Never really in the hunt at any stage, 2-wide towards rear at least 5Ls from the lead through to the last bend, no impression. (Questioned for disappointing performance.)
Midfield but 4Ls behind initial pace, 4-wide no cover on the circle when further behind, very weak in the straight.
Midfield throughout, about 4Ls adrift before final bend, briefly loomed a place chance but weakened inside final 200 M.
Prominent but 3-wide no cover at halfway despite drawing gate 2, began to yield ground before final bend, faded out.
Never travelling well towards the rear some 6Ls from the speed before final turn, always chasing the majority of the field.
Pressed forward and took rail, shared the lead at fast early sectionals, hung on strongly until 100 M overhauled, ran on for 2nd.
Eased to rear, more than 11Ls off the leaders along the rails, suited by the fast tempo, however never progressed.
Eased to sit in midfield, eased out of race 1000 M.
Eased back for cover, further back than usual, 10Ls off the leaders 2 wide, benefitted by the fast pace, made ground 200 M.
Pushed early to keep up in midfield along the fence, lost ground 900 M and sat 8Ls behind the leaders, suited by the fast tempo, ran on fairly in straight.
Suited by the fast tempo, hampered 900 M, never competitive at rear.
Settled nicely just behind the front-running group, 3Ls off the leaders 2 wide, benefitted by the fast tempo, progressed steadily 400 M to win.
Eased back, 10Ls off the leaders, favoured by the fast pace but trapped 3 wide, made steady ground 300 M.
Awkwardly away, more than 11Ls off the leaders at rear, raced 3 wide throughout, helped by the fast tempo, closed the race off strongly final 250 M.
Eased to sit just off the leaders 2 wide, not suited by the fast early tempo, ran on well to the line and finished 3rd without any other threat from behind.
Hard ridden to maintain a midfield spot along the fence, suited by the fast pace, but soon dropped off 400 M.
Pressed forward to share the lead at fast early sectionals, used up too much fuel in the early stages, soon emptied 350 M.
Hard ridden to occupy the box seat, not suited by the fast pace, weakened 300 M.
Eased to sit in midfield on the rails, 8.5Ls off the leaders, benefitted by the fast pace, progressed steadily 300 M.
Settled on rails in midfield, shuffled back towards rear around home bend, saved ground on rails turning in, hampered twice in early part of straight, kept on well to finish.
Raced wide without cover just better than midfield, similar when within 2Ls of speed turning for home, fought on steadily under pressure at the same pace without threatening.
Slow into stride, ridden to take up running approaching home bend, led narrowly into straight when soon headed and dropped out of contention.
Broke well from a wide draw, but restrained to race wide in midfield, took closer order turning for home, one-paced when checked about 300 M out, not recover. (Bled.)
