Taken back at the start to race in last few of bunched field, switched out for a run upon straightening, ran on well down centre of the track, hung in badly and saddled shifted inconveniencing rider closing stages.
In front early, restrained to stalk leader around the bend, hit the front upon straightening, unable to sustain effort and headed over 200 M out.
Began awkwardly, travelled in rear of midfield to straight, shifted in for a run early in straight, kept on at the one pace without quickening.
Raced 3-wide in midfield, forced wider turning in, faded under pressure in straight.
Settled in midfield, commenced move turning in, not much room early in straight, kept on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Began well, settled in 3rd on rails about 2Ls off the speed, obtained a clear passage on rails shortly after straightening, led 200 M out, won readily.
Soon taken back to race in rear from the widest draw, trailed the field into straight, making late progress on rails when hampered inside 200 M, kept on nicely to finish.
Held up towards the rear and had 5Ls to make up on straightening, picked up strongly inside 300 M to finish nearest at the line.
Dropped in behind midfield under restraint, 3-wide turning for home, remained one pace throughout, no impression.
Fast away, rolled along the fence in a midfield position 3Ls behind leader, picked up strongly from 300 M but no chance with the impressive winner.
Rushed to a forward spot after a slow start, 3-wide without cover throughout, remained same pace on straightening and could find no extra close home.
Raced 3-wide towards the rear, hard driven inside 400 M but not enough pace to challenge.
Well enough away, dropped back to mid-division towards the rail, driven out from 400 M but made very limited progress. Never dangerous.
Away in line, assumed a 3-wide spot in the chasing group, picked up well passing 400 M, kept on without troubling the winner.
In rearward always, last coming into straight, took time to muster and didn't get going too until 200 M, stayed on well towards the finish.
Quickly into stride, eased back to midfield, had a smooth run to bend but had trouble finding room inside 400 M and didn't have a clear crack in the run to the line.
Gradually crossed from out wide and showed early pace to lead, ran too free and had to be restrained approaching the turn, headed near 250 M and weakened quickly.
Pushed along soon after jumping, always in touch with the leader, kept on till weakening inside 100 M.
Began badly and lost ground, towards the rear, no pace to challenge passing 400 M, checked 50 M from home. (Jockey questioned.)

Driven early, crossed to the rail and settled prominently behind leader, poised to strike turning in, pressed on inside 300 M and showed instant acceleration to draw away from the field. Impressive debut.
Never better than mid-division, struggled to pick up on straightening, weakened over the final 200 M. (Abnormal breathing.)
Tardy into stride, mustered to race 4 to 5Ls back on rails in midfield, enjoyed an easy trip, just held position in run to line.
Dropped into a midfield position, raced 4 to 5Ls back throughout and enjoyed a good run to bend, didn't see daylight in straight and wasn't really tested.
Drifted back from a wide alley, raced near to last 7Ls off top end, tracked nicely on bend, let down sharply inside 300 M and showed good fight to keep a narrow advantage on line.
Allowed to fade back from outside gate, positioned in rear division, best part of 7Ls down on bend, made no real impression in straight.
Outpaced early, dropped in on rails in rear division, raced well back throughout, still 6Ls down on bend, steadied turning in then switched wide and made good progress late from tail of the field.
Used early from a wide gate to take a prominent spot, kept working throughout 3 wide without cover outside leaders, spent too much petrol and gradually folded 300 M.
Positioned closer than usual but was 3 wide behind speed, raced keenly in mid-section, had cover to bend, unable to close off late.
Pushed along to go to front, set a decent tempo before steadying before bend, challenged on circle, still there turning, collared at 200 M, stayed on OK to make frame.
Slow into stride, settled behind midfield in running line, best part of 6Ls back throughout, hemmed in on turning, dashed strongly 250 M when broke free, just failed to get there.
Nice getaway, positioned nicely 1 out 1 back throughout, travelled well on turning, held up and no real crack for length of straight. Not properly tested.
Jumped poorly, soon at rear, best part of 8Ls back throughout, didn't find anything in straight.
Pressed on after a decent jump, raced first outside leader, applied pressure on inside horse throughout, still in 3 way battle turning, faded 250 M when early effort told.
Eased in early stages to find cover, no luck and posted best part of 4 wide without cover in midfield throughout, used too much in run, peaked at 200 M when petrol ran out.
Well enough away, pushed up to hold spot behind leader, had an even trip despite travelling a bit strongly, urged along turning, weakened when condition gave out.
Well enough away, elected for a trail 4Ls back in midfield, travelled well to bend, steadied when lost run at 350 M, made good ground before hampered again at 150 M. Unlucky.
Restrained soon after start, slotted in rear, ended up 6 to 7Ls back on rails, aided by strong speed in mid-section, weaved between horses in straight and finished over the top of rivals late.
Began well from a wide alley, ended up 3 wide without cover on pace, did work with solid tempo, peaked inside 300 M and faded out when hampered at 150 M.
Drifted back from an awkward alley, raced 5 to 6Ls away in running line, back behind runners turning, steadied at 400 M and checked at 350 M, just one paced when clear.
Reasonable jump, raced 3 wide 2 to 3Ls back, did work despite having cover, struggling on turning, couldn't sustain effort.
Plenty of early speed to take up running, set a decent pace when shaded throughout, fought off challengers turning, found plenty but just ran out of gas late.
Drifted back soon after start, posted 3 wide 5 to 6Ls away, overraced in mid-section, offered little in run to line.
Amongst first few to jump, ideal run 2Ls off behind strong pace, improved turning but didn't let down as at last start, kept to task to be not far away at finish.
Showed pace to hold a spot on leaders back, used a bit on solid pace, struggling on turning, gradually dropped out in straight.
Standard jump, positioned behind midfield on rails 4 to 5Ls back, saved ground on bend, had ideal run through on turning, made good ground in finish to just miss 2nd.
Missed start by 3, ended up travelling field throughout, 8Ls back throughout, just passed tired horses late.
Fair to begin, unable to get closer than midfield 5Ls back, raced 3 wide with cover on circle, lacked dash but kept on gradually working to line.
Away smartly, raced a little keenly outside leader, ensured a solid tempo in mid-section, urged on turning, early effort took toll and dropped off from 300 M point.
Jumped positively, went on with it when unable to get in, posted 4 wide without cover, challenged to bend before fading understandably.
Unable to cross from a wide barrier, 3-wide in midfield and intended to hang out making the turn, challenged from 400 M and had his chance, ran flat passing 150 M.
In midfield early but not settled, gradually crept forward to be alongside leaders 500 M out, briefly led in straight but hung in and was difficult to ride, weakened close home.
Lacked early speed and had to be shaken up soon after the start, held running in midfield but always in touch, responded well and led near 150 M, kept on strongly to score in fine style.
Fast away, up with the pace but raced 3-wide without cover, pushed wider passing 500 M, weakened rapidly on straightening, tailed off.
First to jump, raced 2-wide and disputed for lead, no match with the first two but showed battling qualities between horses and stayed on for 3rd.
Away in line, dropped back to a position behind midfield, 4Ls down on straightening, made promising headway from 400 M to beat everything but the winner. Finished well clear of the rest.
Began well, soon crossed and cut out the running along the fence, had lead disputed rounding the home turn, kept on till weakening inside 200 M.
Tardy to begin, towards the rear 6Ls behind, had plenty to do passing 400 M but responded well to pressure and made even progress inside 200 M.
Lost ground at the start, behind midfield 4Ls away, made a short dash early in straight but unable to sustain run, no extra close home.
Quickly into stride, held inside run in the group chasing the pace, kept on at the same pace in straight, steadied near 100 M and was eased.
Began awkwardly and lost ground, ended up racing in last trailing 7Ls behind leaders, taken wide approaching home straight for a clear path but unable to pick up from off the pace.
Slow to begin, ridden along to hold a midfield position on the fence 3Ls back, kept on in straight but never looked threatening at any stage.
Was bumped out of the machines but picked up well to travel on the back of the leaders. Shifted in to continue its run near the 300 M and maintained a sound gallop right to the wire.
Worked forward and quickly came across from the gates towards the outside and raced as joint leader for some distance thereafter. Faded over the final furlong.
Positioned with the backmakers near the centre of the course. Struggled in the run home.
Travelled midfield with cover. Switched to the inside near the 300 M and plugged away one paced to the finish.
Positioned on the middle of the track around midfield. Was quickly beaten off over the final 400 M.
Scrubbed along early to maintain a midfield position 3 off the outside fence with cover. Kept on at the same pace over the latter stages.
Raced on the outside fence on the back of the speed. Was crowded near the 800 M, but couldn't accelerate when called upon near the 300 M.
Slow to begin and was soon at the tail of the field. Closed off soundly despite experiencing some traffic problems near the 300 M.

Took up a prominent position early before being crowded near the 800 M and taking a sit behind the speed. Commenced a forward move at the half way point and gave plenty under pressure, winning easily.
Raced towards the rear, about 3 off the outside rail with cover. Failed to show any dash when pressured midrace and gave ground in the run to the post.
Travelled behind midfield against the outside rail before copping a check near the 800 M. Never recovered from that point on. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slow to begin then showed good gate speed to race prominently. Suffered a check near the 850 M but rallied to stay in touch with the leaders, weakened over the concluding stages.

Showed plenty of dash from barrier rise to cross to the outside section of the track. Didn't have much peace in front but kicked nicely to steal a break near the 400 M. Tried hard but couldn't match the winner.
Raced close to midfield towards the outside fence. Received a check approaching the 800 M and was not likely thereafter.

Away in line. Eased to rear passing 1400 M. Over 10Ls behind the tearaway leader turning in. Made a strong run top of the home straight and looked very good place chance final furlong but failed to sustain last 100 M.
Slowly away, recovered to race behind midfield on fence from 1400 M. (ls back at the bend. Made some headway in the straight.
Raced towards rear back straight. 3-wide and 9Ls down rounding the bend. Improved moderately in the home straight.
Jumped well. Took a sit on fence in 2nd from 1300 M. Had 3Ls to make up on leader coming into straight. Tried hard to close the gap but leader was too strong. Did well enough to figure in quinella.
Nice jump. Took lead on fence from 1200 M. Pulled clear at 800 M and lengthened well on straightening. Won convincingly.
Raced 2-wide at midfield back straight. 6Ls behind the leader turning for home. Stayed on fairly thereafter.
Raced 3-wide towards rear back straight. Swung widest and was 9Ls away on straightening. Shifted gradually towards the stand's rail in the straight but made no improvement.
Urged early and raced 4Ls behind the leader through to 800 M. Dropped out gradually thereafter despite under pressure. Finished tailed-out.
Niggled along and raced better than midfield back straight. 5Ls adrift on turn and could never get any closer in the home straight.
Trapped 3-wide without cover in midfield back straight. 6Ls behind the tearaway leader making the home turn. Kept giving in the straight and ran on strongly final 100 M to snatch minor placing.
At rear throughout. No impression.
Raced at midfield on fence back straight. Hard ridden approaching the home straight to maintain position. Plodded on home.
7th with cover 7Ls from the pace at halfway, crept closer at last bend and quickened up to hit the front about 150 M out, ridden out to score.
Always under the stick, pressured when 12th at halfway, never a serious contender.
5Ls behind early pace, caught 3-wide no cover on circle and still 5Ls back off last bend, briefly with place prospects at 200 M, couldn't follow up. (Questioned.)
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Handily placed in 4th or 5th with cover no worse than 5Ls from the pace through first half, all out to remain in touch off final bend, dropped out.
Always to the fore enjoying a soft trail on the fence in 3rd or 4th, closer in 2nd or 3rd and with every chance from 400 M to 200 M, no excuse not to place.
Quietly ridden as usual, tracking winner FUJIAN PRINCE about 8Ls off early tempo, remained a similar margin from the winner, still ran a clear 2nd.
Crossed from wide gate to lead by 2Ls early on, 3Ls back in 2nd at halfway, struggling to keep up in 4th taking last corner, faded out tamely. (Tactic questioned.)
On fence in 8th or so between 6Ls and 8Ls from pace until the last turn, found nothing off the bridle.
Went back from wide gate, 12Ls last at the 800 M, 9Ls adrift turning for home, made up good late ground to be nearest at finish.
Very flat performance, never travelling in rearward position, hard ridden to be 7Ls behind turning for home, retreated hastily.
Trapped 3-wide no cover before leading 1200 M and darting 4Ls clear at halfway, headed by quinella pair inside final furlong and all out to hold 3rd.
In the front rank down the back, 4Ls back in 3rd at halfway, 2Ls back in 2nd with every hope off last turn, could not take advantage.
Poor effort, always a long way back at the tail of the field, in trouble 600 M out and eased down final 200 M.
Never any better than midfield, initially about 5Ls back with cover at 1000 M, lacklustre performance overall.
No early pace and soon at the tail of the field 8Ls back, 6Ls last turning for home, kept on past a few beaten rivals in conclusion.
Slowest out, 3-back on fence 4Ls down in midfield initially and similar off last bend, offered little.
Tracked the leader on fence in 4th or 5th down the back straight and same turning for home, found nothing when asked to quicken up.
On fence and either a neck in front or disputing the pace from start to top of straight, had every chance to at least place, lacked a turn of foot.
Wide sometimes without cover but prominent early on, 2-wide a neck back in 2nd from 800 M to final turn, began to drift back from the 300 M.
Close to the pace but at least 3 wide no cover through to the final turn, 2Ls back in 4th at 300 M, kept on well for 2nd but couldn't reel in winner.
Clipped heels early on, rearward 6Ls adrift initially, on heels again and shuffled back to last before home turn, could only run on past beaten rivals.
Didn't break well, one from rear about 7Ls behind at halfway, gradually became more involved and finished pretty well to place, better for further.
Midfield with cover with 3Ls striking distance of the speed before turning for home, very one-paced to conclude, might have expected better.
More prominent than normal in 3rd or 4th down back straight, led at top of home straight, continually hung left under pressure, all out to score. (Questioned for improved performance.)
Always rearward, widest turning for home when one from rear and 6Ls behind, ceded further ground.
Midfield, 3Ls off the leaders, not suited by the slow tempo, checked 200 M, ran on fairly afterwards.
Eased back, 5Ls off the leaders, dashed well 100 M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Eased back, 5Ls off the leaders, harmed by the slow pace, no dash.
Eased to sit just off the leaders for cover, benefitted by the slow tempo, closed the race off strongly 300 M, however out of fuel 50 M.
Shared lead easily, enjoyed the slow early tempo, ran on well to the line for 3rd.
Eased back, never better than midfield, tailed out.
Eased to sit behind leaders, 2Ls off the slow pace, flattened 200 M, checked 100 M.
Pushed to share the lead at advantageous slow sectionals, soon weakened 300 M.
Pushed early, obtained a prominent spot behind leaders, 2Ls off the slow pace, closed the race off strongly 300 M, just beaten by a neck in 2nd.
Eased to sit behind leaders, 2Ls off the slow pace, ran on fairly in final stages.
Slowly away, at rear, 5.5Ls off the leaders, harmed by the slow pace, dashed well 300 M, run ended 100 M.
Shared the lead easily at advantageous slow early sectionals, hung on strongly until 100 M, flattened.
Very slow away, settled in midfield, 3Ls off the leaders, harmed by the slow pace, held up 4-2, dashed strongly when clear to win by a narrow margin but not fully tested.
Slow away, behind midfield, 4Ls off the leaders, harmed by the slow tempo, little dash 250 M.
Midfield early, gradually shuffled back to second last approaching home bend, remained well behind turning in, produced strong late impression down centre of straight. (Riding questioned.)
Began awkwardly losing ground, settled just worse than midfield, saved ground turning in, made up good ground down inside final 200 M, never nearer.
Began fairly from a wide-ish draw, gradually crossed to take up running, led the field until no extra inside final 200 M.

Began well from a wide draw, gradually settled in a prominent one-out-one-back spot down far side, tracked leader into straight, gained slender lead under pressure passing 200 M but overhauled close to home.
Raced wide without cover in midfield, came under pressure to challenge upon straightening, ran on steadily without threatening.
Settled in last few, produced impressive late run down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled at the back, trailed the field into straight, made no impression in the run home.
Began well, settled in 2L 4th, became 3rd turning in, but soon weakened out of contention.
Settled one back in 3rd on rails, lost position around home bend, weakened further out of it shortly after straightening.
Settled in midfield, came to challenge passing 400 M, fought on well to assert authority inside final 100 M.
In mid-division early but gradually crept forward to lead approaching 900 M, kept on well inside 350 M despite hanging in and difficult to be ridden out. Just held on.
Held inside running in midfield, waited with until 350 M, progressed steadily inside 200 M, kept on late.
Towards the rear 7Ls back and saved ground on the inner, pressed on inside 500 M, made some headway from off the pace but offered little threat.
Close up behind leaders, was a shade keen and had to be restrained, ridden 350 M out, soon outpaced.
Dropped back on jumping, 3-wide in last few 7Ls back, under pressure inside 500 M, not quicken. Never a factor.
Slow to begin, placed behind midfield 5 to 6Ls off the pace, switched to 3-wide making the final turn, plugged on in straight but never dangerous.
Broke well but was taken back to mid-division, travelled 3-wide throughout and no cover from 800 M, held every chance in straight, ran on nicely towards the line.
Settled behind midfield and used little in run, steadied near 300 M but thereafter quickened impressively to nearly win the race.
Handily placed in a position ahead of midfield, had a smooth trip to straight, picked up well passing 300 M, nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield 5Ls back, well covered throughout, stayed on inside 400 M but not pace to challenge.
Eased to the rear on jumping, given a patient ride and was 7Ls down entering the straight, steadied and shifted out near 400 M for a clear run, stayed on strongly towards the finish.
Led steadily on rails till 900 M, driven 300 M out, found little and weakened quickly final 100 M.
Up with the early pace, always prominent in 3rd, strongly challenged the race leader inside 250 M but was always held.
Moderate jump, ended up 8 to 9Ls back on rails, unable to hold position and lost ground from 800 M, never likely thereafter.
Out well but forced to restrain to find cover, settled 6Ls or so away 3 wide, had a trail to bend, bumped 400 M, didn't let down in straight.
Drifted back from a wide gate, settled well back sharing rear 9Ls off pace, appreciated good speed, set huge task turning when coming to middle, motored late making many lengths to narrowly miss out.
Decent jump, took a sit 3Ls off leader on rails, enjoyed easy run throughout, close enough turning, lacked a pick up and struggled in run to line.
No early pace, positioned in rear division 7Ls from top end, aided by tempo, still plenty to do turning, made solid progress down outside to make frame.
Jumped nicely, assumed spot first outside leader, had even run despite strong tempo, took over soon after turning in, dug deep to hold off late challengers.
Standard jump, ended up in midfield, raced 4 to 5Ls back throughout, travelled well turning, impeded slightly at 250 M, did best work late to just miss.
Average jump but mustered to hold spot, used a bit on solid tempo, gave ground soon after straightening and was beaten a fair away.
Moderate beginning, settled a little closer in midfield 5Ls down, saved ground to bend, kept on evenly between horses in straight to be nearest on line.
No early toe, shared rear 10Ls off lead on rails, set plenty to do even further back on circle, made some minor headway late.
Away well, took a hold to sit behind pace 2 to 3Ls back, had easy time thereafter, in contention from bend, just peaked at 150 M and held ground thereafter.
Scooted to early lead, set a useful tempo in front, still 2Ls clear leaving bend, headed before 200 M, kept on respectively given early workload.
Reasonable break, caught wide from an awkward gate midfield without cover throughout, did work however kept improving on turning in, there to inside 150 M before petrol ran out.
Awkwardly away, behind midfield 6Ls away in running line, difficult to settle in mid-section, just whacked away in straight.
No early speed, went down to rails in rear division, 10Ls back in 2nd last place throughout, switched out in straight and made gradual progress to be closest on line.
Went forward from a wide gate, posted 3 out without cover 4Ls off pace, did work in mid-section under a solid speed, there to 200 M before hard run took toll.
Began well, pressed forward to race outside leader, too keen and forced a speed battle well clear of rest, began to struggle soon after turning and stopped quickly when emptied.
Out with rest, ended up in midfield 3 wide with cover, improved on turning, kept coming strongly final 300 M but was outclassed late by a smart horse.
Awkwardly away and lost considerable ground, ridden hard to recover in midfield, had an easy time thereafter, didn't respond in straight and gradually faded.
Bounced out, took up unfamiliar role in front, was challenged and overraced in duel for lead, well clear of rest on circle, came back to them straightening, run ended 300 M.
Average jump but recovered to sit first behind headway pair, had to cart field up on a strong tempo, struggled soon after turning and faded out.
Standard jump, taken down to rails, 8Ls off pair throughout, saved ground to bend, weaved between horses turning, made useful ground when clear for 3rd.
Reasonable jump, positioned 5Ls back in midfield, aided by tempo, lacked usual pick up on turning and peaked on run at 200 M and struggled thereafter.
Lacked early toe as usual, positioned behind midfield 8Ls back, gave start on turning, made some minor ground in straight but never likely.
Faded back from an awkward alley, best part of 10Ls from speed, helped by strong tempo, swung wide turning and closed closed soundly final 300 M to just miss place.
No early pace and soon at rear, raced 12Ls off speed, struggled to keep touch throughout, still well back turning, made a little late ground passed tired runners.

Slotted into ideal spot 4Ls or so away in running line, helped by decent tempo, improved despite hanging shortly after turning in, let down strongly to put a gap on rivals and kept going comfortably to line.
Began nicely, box-seated 5Ls behind leading pair, still there in 4th place turning, found nothing under pressure and dropped right out.
Had a smooth run behind midfield on the fence, stayed on stoutly inside 200 M to get within half length of the winner.
Settled in midfield 4Ls back, briefly threatened with a short dash inside 300 M, but found no extra 150 M from home.
Always handy tracking leaders in early and middle stages, took over inside 350 M, quickened well and ran out a gutsy winner.
Patiently held up in the rear, moved closer over the turn, challenged inside 400 M but found disappointingly little in the finish. No impression.
Taken to rear on jumping, 6Ls back in the last pair throughout, made good progress from the rear inside 400 M but lost momentum when shifting out abruptly under pressure near 50 M.
Prominently placed just off the pace but travelled 3-wide without cover, had every chance but couldn't step up a gear and remained one pace to the line. (Had a nail punctured the horse's sole.)
In 5th not far off the leaders, pressed on inside 400 M but couldn't pick up, eased late on.
Adopted a front running tactics and raced outside the leader, struggled to keep up inside 450 M, soon weakened and dropped away.
Led as expected and set a steady pace upfront, headed near 300 M and found little when pressed on, weakened gradually.
Began awkwardly, travelled towards the rear and was difficult to settle at times, challenged strongly on straightening and looked a possible winner, but effort flattened inside 150 M.
Went forward to race outside the leaders, 3 wide no cover, never likely.
Travelled outside the leader. Had no excuses.
Settled behind midfield, 2 to 3 wide with cover. Was held up for clear running from the entrance to the straight until passing the 300 M, battled to the finish.
Travelled in a clear last position soon after the 1000 M. Shifted out to be the widest runner in the home straight and let down smartly to finish over the remainder of the field.
Became badly unbalanced at the start after being bumped, then travelled midfield, 3 deep with cover. Gave ground over the final furlong.
Raced midfield 4 wide without cover. Struggled in the straight.
Slow to begin then was taken in across to park midfield the fence. Worked out into the clear after the 300 M running to the line dourly.
Began slowly then found the paint from a wide gate to settle at the rear. Gained a split near the 300 M, plugged away in the run to the post.
From a wide gate was allowed to drift back to find cover, racing with the backmakers. Closed off soundly along the inside after gaining clear running near the 300 M.
Raced 1 out 1 back. Was swamped over the concluding stages, had every chance.
Camped midfield, 1 off with cover. Peeled out into the clear turning for home, kept on same pace during the final stretch.
Settled behind midfield, 3 wide with cover. Came wide entering the straight and fought on well to hold 2nd.
Ridden forward to cross and lead on the fence, was gassed by the last 200 M.
Parked behind the leader on the rails. Was unable to obtain clear running over the final 200 M and consequently was not tested, finishing well back.
6Ls away on fence back straight. Closer order approaching the home straight but only ran on to beat tired runners.
Sat within 3Ls of the pace on fence back straight. Rallied on in the home straight under pressure. No hope with the winner but prevailed in a battle for 2nd near the line.
Led along on fence until final 350 M. Struggled thereafter.
Settled 2-wide 3Ls behind the pace through to the home turn. Moved up to challenge the leader leaving the bend. Took charge inside 350 M in a matter of strides and won with plenty to spare.
Settled midfield through to the home turn and was 3Ls down on straightening. Found nothing when asked.
Ran 2-wide in midfield early. Shifted 3-wide and was 3Ls down rounding the bend. Plugged on top of home straight under vigorous riding. Weakened final furlong.
Trailed 7 to 8Ls until home straight. Finished off fairly well but was beaten far by the front trio.
Towards rear early and middle stages. 2-wide 6Ls down on straightening. Clear running in the straight but responded only fairly.
Raced within 2Ls behind the leader through to the home turn. Levelled up on straightening but was soon overhauled by the winner at 350 M. Hung on gamely and just lost out on 2nd closing stages.
3-wide without cover towards rear back straight. Came wide and was 4Ls back on straightening. Couldn't pull out extra in the straight and dropped out final 200 M.
Trapped 3 and 4-wide no cover throughout, midfield within 3Ls off speed till home turn, one-paced to wrap up.
Always at least 5Ls from the speed, towards rear initially, ran on past a few stragglers in the straight, never dangerous.
More prominent than normal on leader and winner's back no worse than 2Ls from pace until home turn when 2nd, all out to hold quinella spot.
3-back the rails about 4Ls off pace at halfway, edged closer in 3rd off last turn, had his chance to take 2nd but couldn't go on final 100 M.
No early pace, rearward at least 6Ls behind leader before last bend, stayed well behind.
Very flat effort, close-up with cover at first but struggling to lie up off last turn, weakened rapidly.
Soon led on fence, about a neck clear at 800 M and 2Ls to the good off home turn and at 200 M, kept on well, won unchallenged.
Over-raced a bit early on, with cover and 4Ls behind at halfway, yielded ground thereafter.
Badly checked about 800 M out, rearward some 5Ls behind through to home straight, never troubled principals.
Nicely placed in one-out-one-back spot down the back, lost this proximity on the circle and beaten soon after turning for home.
Always well behind, 7Ls last initially, no danger whatsoever.
Didn't break well, rushed forward to flank leader at the 800 M, made a hasty retreat from top of home straight, eased down, bled.
Taken back from wide gate, 8Ls adrift at the 1000 M, made up a little minor ground without looking remotely dangerous.
2-wide and 2Ls back in 2nd down the back straight, began to lose this proximity on the circle, weakened out rapidly.
Worse than midfield at first, caught 5-wide no cover on the circle when 5Ls down, never likely to improve much further.
Rearward at least 7Ls behind initial tempo, 4-wide no cover on the circle, kept chasing the majority of the field.
3-back the rails down back straight, struggling to lie up when 5Ls down off last turn, lost further ground on the run-in.
Blew the start by about 4Ls, rearward at least 7Ls from the speed until home turn, never seriously in contention.
4Ls back in 4th leaving back straight, closer turning for home, led about 250 M out, ridden out to hold a margin.
Midfield with cover about 5Ls off pace at halfway and closer but pressured off last turn, retreated very quickly thereafter.
Wide no cover throughout, keen when 5Ls down at first, closer and 4th into striaght, 1L back and every chance at 200 M, couldn't follow through.
Leader's back on fence, 1L back in 2nd into straight, briefly led before being grabbed by winner 250 M out, kept on but couldn't lead again.
At least 6Ls behind in 10th or so at 1000 M, closer on straightening and looked a chance 200 M out when 2Ls down, run peaked.
4-back the fence about 6Ls off early speed, 5Ls down at the last turn, finished off only fairly, found a few too good once again.
Soon led on fence by 2Ls, headed shortly after straightening and soon wilted out of the picture.
Rearward at least 6Ls from the speed through to the last turn, recovered some late ground without genuinely threatening a place.
Hard ridden forward, trapped 3 wide throughout outside the lead, weakened 350 M.
Eased to rear, more than 8Ls off the good pace along the fence, made move after straight, held up 300 M, produced big finish when clear and scored by a very narrow margin.
Eased back and took rail, 5.5Ls off the good pace, progressed steadily in straight.
Hard ridden to secure the box seat, 1.5Ls off the good pace, weakened 200 M.
Pushed forward to sit outside the lead, ran on well until 100 M, flattened.
Blundered badly at start and rider almost dislodged, never competitive.
Hard ridden forward but failed to take lead 2Ls off the good pace 2 wide, dropped off quickly 400 M. (Bled.)
Eased at start to cross at back, more than 8Ls off the good pace 2 wide, minor progress in final stages.
Hard ridden early to keep up with the field at back, 5.5Ls off the good pace 2 to 3 wide, made ground steadily 300 M and finished 3rd, just beaten by narrow margin.
Hard ridden to keep up in midfield, 3.5Ls off the good pace, trapped 3 to 4 wide throughout, made ground 400 M, run ended 100 M.
Pushed to take the rail and led by 0.5L at good pace, hung on strongly until last few strides overhauled, just missed by a short head.
Pushed to obtain a midfield spot, 3.5Ls off the good pace 2 to 3 wide, blocked most straight, just ran on when clear but too late.
Began well from a low draw, gradually taken back along rails to settle just better than midfield, just off the speed turning for home, weakened noticeably under pressure shortly after straightening.
Began well, gradually crossed to the front travelling one-off the rail, held slender advantage most of way until run ended just short of the line.
Settled in rear of midfield, raced 3-wide with cover around the bend, obtained a clear run shortly after straightening, ran home one-paced.
Held up in last few, trailed the field around home bend and into straight, finished off race strongly inside final 200 M, impressive.
Began with the faster ones, travelled in a prominent spot to straight, found nothing under pressure in the run home.
Settled towards the rear, came with a good late finish inside final 250 M to score readily.
Began fairly, settled in midfield, lost position around the bend, joint last into straight, made no impression thereafter. (Questioned.)
Broke well in front, settled just off the speed on rails inside leader, still close up turning in, weakened under pressure inside 200 M.
Badly drawn and remained wide throughout, gradually moved forward down far side to reach close-up 3rd around the bend, similar turning in but soon weakened out of contention.
Settled on rails in midfield, no clear passage early in straight until approaching 200 M, kept on well for a nice finish home.
Travelled in forward of midfield, crept closer to be one from the front, struggled for room early in straight, kept on the same pace inside final 200 M.
Settled well behind to cross for rails run, baulked early in straight, switched for a clear run inside 250 M, did best work late.
Well covered in mid-division, shifted to centre of track 400 M out and challenged, plugged on under pressure but offered little threat to the principals.
Showed customary early speed to lead towards the Stands' rail, kept on well till weakening over the final 100 M.
Ran freely on the outside of group, close up to leaders but unable to sustain run passing 300 M, weakened rapidly. (Abnormal breathing.)
Prominent behind leaders, challenged from 400 M, not quicken.
Along the stands' rail in a rearward position, picked up strongly inside 300 M to win the battle of the main group, but no match with the winner on the far side.
Showed early speed to lead, found little off the bridle near 400 M, gradually weakened.
Away awkwardly, in midfield along the Stands' rail, driven approaching 400 M but could only keep on at the one pace.
In 5th never far off the pace, driven inside 450 M and briefly looked threatening, stayed on well but no chance with the winner.
Drawn towards the far side but soon crossed behind runners to race along the stands' rail, in rear throughout and had no clear run until passing 250 M, quickened strongly when clear.
Behind midfield towards the outside of group, pushed along when outpaced halfway, switched to the far side and put in an incredible run to hit the front 100 M out. Won impressively.
In midfield 2 to 3Ls back, driven 400 M out but no response, dropped away late on.
Even jump, faded to midfield, raced 4 to 5Ls back in midfield, urged along on circle, shifted out and closed steadily without threatening.
Standard break, ended up 4Ls back in midfield on fence, had an easy time to bend, chased along turning but condition gave out final 300 M.
Awkward, no early dash, posted behind midfield 5 to 6Ls off lead, took inside runs turn, no serious progress in straight.
Failed to muster, well back on fence best part of 8Ls off speed, set too much to do well back to bend, made some minor late headway.
Good pace, held lead despite early battle, kept speed genuine holding out challenger to bend, in leading trio at 300 M, no more to offer final 150 M.
Faded back, raced 6 to 7Ls away in mid-section, not asked to bend, just battled away in straight.
Out swiftly, angled into trailling spot 2 to 3Ls back, came 3 wide on circle, improved to challenge on turning in, went to leaders and kept on strongly to score.
Began in line, posted 3 wide without cover 4Ls back in midfield, did some work in mid-section, set out after leaders turning, kept on well but held last 100 M.
Went back from a wide alley, ended up 3 wide 7 to 8Ls back at rear, did work despite having cover, still plenty to do turning, some progress to 200 M.
Began with purpose, pushed on to race outside leader, used a bit challenging on circle, narrowly behind turning, kept on to 200 M before hard run took toll.
Shared pace early, raced near lead before bumped at 900 M, trailled pace pair thereafter, raced 2Ls behind to bend, struggled and weakened final 200 M.
Showed pace, settled just behind leaders girth, didn't apply pressure until turning, took over at 250 M, held advantage to 100 M before overhauled.
Taken back from a wide alley, raced 7Ls away on fence, harmed by slow tempo, well back on turning, made some ground before losing run late.
Standard break as usual, mustered to race 6Ls back on rails, saved ground throughout, used nothing to bend, angled wide, closed gradually to be nearest on line.
Even jump, ended up in midfield 4Ls back, didn't settle in mid-section, improved 3 wide from bend, didn't go on with it and just held ground last bit.
Lost considerable ground at start, settled a clear last, 9Ls away at rear with tempo against throughout, set impossible task, switched wide and made some good late ground.
No early pace, behind midfield, found nothing, collapsed after race.
Led easily, set steady pace with terms to suit, held a 1L break to bend, headed passing 300 M, kept on well despite being tightened late to make frame.
Unable to slot in from an awkward gate, posted 3 wide without cover 4Ls back, improved 5 wide on bend, kept to task and closed creditably late given workload.
Lost ground early, in rear division 7Ls or so back in running line, didn't settle throughout, unable to make ground in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Assumed ideal trail on rails 3Ls off lead, didn't use any reserves with steady pace in mid-section, angled out on turning, closed too well final 200 M to score a handy victory.
No early speed, raced behind midfield, 7 to 8Ls back throughout, pace against to bend, made good headway between horses in straight to be closest at finish.
Slotted in on leaders back soon after start, had an easy run with steady pace on, urged turning, unable to lift and faded from 250 M.
Average jump, raced 3 wide 5Ls back with cover, unsuited by slow tempo, came wide turning, made no serious headway.
Bounced into prime position, raced 1 out 1 back before moving 3 wide on circle, shifted out turning, unable to go up a notch at 250 M, battled gamely for a place.
Raced 3-wide without cover in midfield and difficult to settle at times, driven from 300 M but soon outpaced and weakened.
Up with the early pace, moved up to 2nd passing 800 M, under pressure to keep up inside 450 M, soon outpaced in straight.
Handily placed behind leaders early, hampered by the slackening race tempo in middle stages, made some headway from 350 M but could find no extra in the closing stages.
In midfield along the fence, hampered by the slow tempo in middle stages and shuffled backwards, had to switch out for a clear run in straight but not quicken.
Held up in a position behind midfield, not helped by the slow pace in middle stages and strode closer making the home turn, held up to 250 M then made good headway to claim 2nd close home.
Lacked early speed and raced towards the rear, lost 2Ls near 800 M when checked due to the slackening pace, last going into straight and remained very one paced in the finish.
Towards the rear 6Ls back, under serious pressure halfway round the home bend, took long time to pick up and only got going close to the finish.
Well enough away, cut out the early running before taken back to track leaders down the back straight, looked very laboured when pressed on in straight, weakened inside 200 M.

Slow to begin, ended up in last 8Ls off the pace in the first half, moved closer approaching the final turn and driven from 550 M round the outside, progressed steadily in straight but not threatened the principals.

Fractious in stalls and began awkwardly, held 2-wide running in mid-division, moved to 3rd approaching the final turn, had his chance but never looked a threat to the runaway winner, beaten to 3rd close home.

Overcame a wide draw and gradually found his way to the front, slowed down the pace significantly passing 800 M and dictated the race from that point, had a 2Ls lead off the bend and kept on strongly to score.
Was slow to begin settling at the tail of the field along the paint. Ran on soundly.
Tracked the principals, 2-wide with cover. Loomed up to challenge in the straight but failed to capitalize.
Raced with the backmakers, 2 deep with cover. Came widest in the run home and closed off fairly.
Settled at the rear of the field, 1 off with cover. Struggled over the final furlong.
Enjoyed a nice run in behind the bold running front runner. Had no excuses.
Got back in the event positioned on the fence with cover. Made good ground along the inside in the final stretch.
Travelled on the fence on the back of the speed. Was given every chance.
Strolled along in front setting a solid tempo. Faded in the straight.
Parked in midfield on the rails. Closed off well but was somewhat dour in the run to the wire.
From a wide gate was able to secure a midfield spot, 2-wide with cover. Peeled out turning for home and responded nicely to go on and win easily.
Settled behind midfield 1 off with cover. Finished off smartly.
Chased the speed in 3rd position 1 to 2-wide. Was in with a chance at the 250 M, but folded over the last 150 M.

Soon in the front rank but was trapped 3-wide making the first turn. Raced on fence in the leading section 700 M out. Pushed by the runner up in the home straight but kept on to win by a narrow margin.
Away in line. Shuffled towards rear early. Pressed home 600 M out but ran on to beat tired runners only.
Quickly into stride. Assumed a handy position on fence behind leaders from 800 M. Pressured 500 M out but didn't quicken. Eased down. (Heart Irregularity.)
Trapped 4-wide amongst leaders making the first turn. Led one-off the fence 700 M out. Peaked inside final furlong.
Began nicely. Elected to sit 2-wide behind the leading section 1000 M out. Swung 4-wide leaving the bend and launched a sustained challenge in the home straight. Just held by the winner at finish.
Raced greenly throughout. Never in the hunt.
Travelled wide without cover in the leading section through to the home straight. No extra final furlong.

Good jump from wide draw but trapped 5-wide making the first turn. Raced 3-wide behind midfield passing 800 M. Ridden from 500 M and was 3Ls down turning in. Ran on for 3rd comfortably without threatening the quinella pair.
Slow to begin but was driven to race 3-wide behind the leading section passing 1000 M. Slipped to midfield turning into home. One-paced to conclude.
Never better than midfield. Struggled in the straight.
At rear early despite ridden along. Picked up gradually from 500 M and made substantial ground in the straight.
Raced 3-wide towards rear after starting from wide barrier. Improved wide passing 500 M and was 4Ls away on straightening. Kept making up ground and was nearest at finish.
Worse than mid-division 4Ls back and 3-wide with cover at 1000 M, marginally closer into straight, every chance at 200 M, lacked dash of quinella pair.
Squeezed at start, rear and 3-wide with cover 7Ls back at halfway, 4-wide turning in, let down well to be upsides at 150 M, won a head-bobbing finish.
Raced 3 and 4-back on the rails around 9th or 10th through to final curve, stayed on fairly well to nick 4th on the wire.
Disputed early pace out 2-wide, on rails and vying for lead from 900 M to final bend and at the 200 M, weakened late on. (Tactic questioned.)
Caught 3-wide no cover from the 900 M in midfield between 3Ls and 4Ls until home straight, outpaced by principals in the stretch.
Taken back, one from rear inside winner at 1000 M, advanced on the circle and 5-wide (widest) off last bend, led 150 M out, collared by winner on line.
Nice spot in 4th in 'one-out-one-back' position through to final turn, upsides and with every chance of at least a place at 200 M, run peaked.
3-wide no cover initially before getting across to vie for the lead out 2-wide from 900 M to final turn, tired rapidly.
Disputed lead on fence at 1200 M, handed up 900 M out and on leader's back through to last turn, very one-paced to conclude.
Poor effort given his soft trail in the box-seat at first then 3-back the fence from the 900 M, was close enough if good enough.
2-wide towards rear and 6Ls off speed at the 1000 M, marginally closer turning for home, always chasing the majority of the field.
2-wide in or around 7th and some 4Ls from the speed until final turn, always outpaced but didn't disgrace in the finish.
Trapped 3-wide no cover throughout, raced in front rank within 1L of the speed until final turn, kept on well in straight considering the extra work he did.
3-wide with cover in 6th about 3Ls off at halfway, 4Ls down off final bend, stayed on to take 2nd 100 M out, nosed out of quinella on the line.
2-wide over 2Ls from the lead early on, shuffled back on the circle to be over 4Ls off turning for home, recovered only minor late ground.
Pretty weak overall, under pressure at halfway when 4-back on the rails, 8Ls last turning for home, stayed there.
Flanked pacesetting winner out 2-wide until last turn, 1L back in 2nd and toiling at the 200 M, tired thereafter.
Taken back from widest gate to race 7Ls off the speed in rear, still a good distance off on straightening, made some minor late headway. (Tactic questioned.)
Nice spot in 4th or 5th about 2Ls off speed with cover until last turn, stayed on well for pressure, nosed into 2nd on the line.
Disputed the lead on the rails before turning for home, kicked 1-1/2Ls clear 150 M out, tired a little and was clinging on at the line.
On the leader's back on the fence through to the last bend no worse than 2Ls from the pace, couldn't take advantage of the cheap run, one-paced.
3-back the rails in midfield down the back, slipped further behind on circle and 5Ls off speed in 9th taking last corner, remained thereabouts.
Messy start losing 3Ls immediately, rearward between 4Ls and 5Ls off speed until last bend, always chasing the majority.
Behind midfield when checked at the 700 M, 8Ls back in 10th off last turn, very one-paced.
Eased back, 5Ls behind the good pace 2-wide, swept forward 4 to 5-wide at home bend, made some ground in straight.
Pushed early to keep up in midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the good pace, trapped 4-wide throughout and lost too much ground, ran on fairly in straight.
Pushed to hold the box seat, 2Ls off the good pace, just held ground in straight.
Pushed forward, 2Ls off the good pace, trapped 3-wide, closed the race off strongly 200 M to score by a narrow margin.
Eased at start to take rail at rear, 8Ls off the good pace, kept being last on straightening, blocked 4-2, made good ground when clear.
Checked after start, pushed to obtain a midfield spot, 3-1/2Ls off the good pace, trapped 3-wide, checked 500 M, progressed steadily 300 M to grab 3rd.
Hard ridden early to cross in front, then eased to sit 2-1/2Ls off the good pace with cover 2-wide, closed the race off strongly 250 M, just beaten by a short head in 2nd.
Hard ridden forward to share the lead at good pace 2-wide, ran on until 150 M flattened.
Hard ridden to take rail and shared the lead at good pace, hung on until 200 M weakened.
Pushed forward to share lead at good pace but trapped 3 to 4-wide throughout, used up too much fuel at bends, soon emptied 400 M.
Very awkward away and lost large amount of ground, 6Ls off the good pace 2-wide, held up 4-2, progressed steadily when clear.
Behind midfield, 5Ls off the good pace along the fence, held up 4-2, made ground when clear.
Slow out from the widest barrier, ridden for pace and soon travelled in 4th within 3Ls of speed, commenced move around home bend, soon weakened after straightening.
Attempted to make all, unable to sustain effort and headed over 100 M out.
Soon obtained midfield position, remained same into straight, baulked for a run 200 M out, ran home one-paced inside final 200 M. (Questioned for disappointing performance.)
Began with others, settled on rails in midfield, lost position around the 1000 M, tailed off before home bend. (Irregular heart rhythm.)
Raced wide in midfield, remained same into straight, responded well after straightening to grab the lead over 100 M out, won convincingly.

Trailed the field to halfway, made swift headway around the field up the Rock to reach midfield for home bend, widest turning in, sustained good progress down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled mainly in rear of midfield, kept on steadily in straight without threatening. (Questioned for disappointing performance.)
Quickly ridden from a side draw to gain one-out-one-back 2nd position before stables bend, remained similar into straight, gradually weakened.
Failed to muster early, settled in last few, made no impression in the straight.
Settled in last few, switched wide into straight, produced good impression down centre of straight despite not threatening. (Questioned for disappointing performance.)
Began well, well placed in 3rd on rails, shaken up turning in, kept on well without quickening under pressure despite forced to switch over 100 M out.
Assumed a forward position as expected, tracked leaders on the rails but had to be niggled along at the home turn, kept on at the one pace before fading away over the final 100 M.
Went forward and disputed for lead, caught wide in the first turn but later shifted to a 2-wide position, kept on in straight but not pace of the first three in the last 150 M.
Drawn wide but was able to slot in near 1200 M, travelled kindly in midfield never far off the pace, strong run entering home straight, led 150 M and held on gamely.
Raced in the last pair throughout, had 6Ls to make up inside 400 M and progressed steadily over the final 200 M from an unpromising position far off the pace. (Jockey questioned.)
Always in touch behind leaders, challenged strongly from 350 M, briefly threatened but found no extra in the final 150 M.
Raced 3-wide without cover in the chasing group behind leaders, moved closer approaching the home turn, outpaced early in straight and was eased passing 200 M.

Checked soon after the break, raced as the back-marker in the first half trailing 7Ls to leaders, headway from 600 M, picked up well in straight but failed to find another gear to get past the winner.
Lost ground at the start, crossed to the fence and raced towards the rear 6Ls back, had to be ridden along 500 M out, gave very limited response in straight, eased late on.
Held up towards the rear, switched very wide from 600 M to challenge but not quickened and gave very little impression.
Broke well from the inside, held a midfield spot 4Ls back along the fence, switched out passing 700 M to improve, driven inside 450 M and made steady progress towards the line.
Prominent early, taken back to midfield down the backstraight, responded well and had every chance inside the final 300 M, gave the winner a race but was comfortably held at the end.
Rushed to the front and disputed for lead, set a strong pace but struggled to keep up from 450 M, soon beaten. Eased.
Along the fence in midfield, found nothing when pressed on inside 400 M, eased over the final 150 M.
Broke well, held back to a position behind midfield, had 5Ls to make up inside 400 M, made some progress towards the finish but little impression overall.
In last and had to be niggled along to stay in touch, 8Ls behind going into straight, not picked up.
Swiftly away but dropped back to a 3-wide position behind midfield, made promising headway from 300 M and was well on top inside 50 M.
Gradually crept forward, tracked leader one back on the fence, into clear passing 400 M, challenged strongly and briefly led near 200 M, kept on but just lost 3rd on the line.
Near the rear early but moved closer to midfield in middle stages, 5Ls off the pace as they turned into straight, not quicken and got past a few tired runners only.
Ridden early to hold a position in midfield, steadied near 400 M and made limited progress towards the line.
Taken back on jumping and towards the rear throughout, switched to outside of field passing 500 M, some headway from off the pace but never dangerous.
Shifted out on jumping, jockey dislodged.
Went forward to be one out one back from leader, briefly threatened inside 250 M but not able to sustain run and faded away final 100 M.
Assumed a forward spot as expected and led them slowly in middle stages, headed inside 250 M and weakened rapidly.
Forced wide from his high draw and raced 2Ls off the pace without cover throughout, ran on well and looked a real threat 200 M out before the winner flew by late on.
Even break, raced on the outside of mid-division 3Ls back in 6th, driven passing 500 M, took time to find his stride but picked up well final 200 M to take 3rd on the line.
Even break, gradually moved up to a handy position ahead of midfield, kept on at the same pace early in straight, no extra final 200 M.

Received the back wash of interference 200 M after the jump and settled back in the field. Gradually improved its position to race 1 off with cover, midfield. Worked into the clear and closed off well just falling short.
Was checked about a furlong after the start, settling behind midfield, 2 to 3 deep with cover. Made some late ground without threatening.
Raced handy to the leaders but was caught 3 wide and without cover. Kept on well despite the ground coverage.

Began awkwardly, then soon after the start was bumped on the hindquarters and became unbalanced. Travelled in 2nd position, 2 wide however was inclined to lay out. Weakened noticeably over the concluding stages. (Mucopus.)

Raced 3 back the fence, gained a split early in the straight and fought on well to the finish. After the race, the Veterinary Officer said an endoscopic examination showed a substantial amount of blood in the horse's trachea.

As the start was effected lifted its front feet up and lost ground as a result. Travelled a distant last and proved reluctant to stride out and failed to respond to pressure at any stage in the race. (To trial.)
Raced towards the rear along the fence. Gave ground quickly in the straight.
Led early then handed up near the 900 M and box seated thereafter. Faded in the final stages.
Was ridden along from barrier rise to eventually cross near the 900 M and make the running. Dictated terms in front and had enough petrol left in the concluding stages to prevail for a narrow win.
Raced with the backmakers, 1 off. Plodded to the line.
Behind midfield on fence through to home straight. Lost rider 200 M out.
2-wide in midfield through to the home turn and was 4Ls down on straightening. Made some headway and was steadied at 50 M.
Sat within 2Ls of the pace through to the home straight. Kept chasing the winner but couldn't get closer. Hung on in a close finish for 3rd.
Sat 2-wide and 2Ls behind the leader through to the home straight. Picked up gradually and was nearest at finish. Just failed to make frame.
At rear early. Improved 3-wide on bend and was 4Ls down on straightening. Unlikely to catch the winner but did the best of the rest to snatch 2nd late on.
3-wide at rear early. Moved to midfield from 1200 M and advanced into the lead passing 700 M. Soon outrun by the winner in the straight but stayed on in a battle for 3rd. Just failed final strides.
Raced 3-wide behind midfield through to midpoint. Took closer order rounding the bend and was 2Ls off into home straight. Failed to turn up a notch and was steadied at 100 M.
Towards rear early and slipped to trail field making the home turn. Shifted widest and was 5Ls off turning into home straight. Responded fairly well and was closest at finish.
Began well. Elected to race behind the leader 1300 M out. Kept one-paced in the straight. Steadied at 50 M.
Led along on fence, set a slow tempo throughout, always had enough to fend off challengers closing stages.
6Ls back in 8th out 2-wide at the 1000 M, closer but wide into the straight, picked up well to lead 150 M out, kept up to his work, readily.
7th with cover between 4Ls and 6Ls from the speed before straightening up, 1L back at the 200 M, all out to just sneak into a place.
Enjoyed a soft trail on the fence in 4th or so within 3Ls of the speed until final bend, faded out pretty cheaply considering the easy passage.
Pressed on from wide gate to lead at 1000 M, crossed to rail at 700 M, 1L clear off last turn but headed before furlong pole and very weak late.
Led early on, handed up advantage from 1000 M, soft trail in 2nd to straight, led again briefly 250 M out, had every chance to at least place.
Went back from wide gate and 10Ls last at 1200 M, over 6Ls down and one from rear turning in, stayed on well down the centre to nick 2nd late.
Over-raced in a little 2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 4th down back straight, upsides and with every chance 200 M out, run peaked inside closing stages.
Never travelling very well, ridden along and 10Ls last at halfway, retrieved some late ground in the straight but never a genuine threat.
Raced in 5th with cover some 4Ls back in middle stages and hard pressed to hold this position entering straight, very one-paced to wind up. (Questioned for disappointing performance.)
On and off the bridle throughout, 3-back the fence around midfield within 4Ls or 5Ls of speed till home turn, one-paced for pressure thereafter.
Awkward break and no early speed, 8Ls back in 9th at halfway, 5Ls back spinning for home, couldn't reach the principals.
Went back from wide gate, one from rear at 1000 M when 8Ls adrift, 5Ls back off last bend, recovered some fair late ground, never nearer.
Pressed forward from widest gate, soon a neck clear out 2-wide till straightening, maintained this margin to line, gritty effort with top weight.
Reasonably placed 3-back the rails 4Ls from speed down back straight, no excuse for being so weak in the final 200 M.
Prominent but 3-wide no cover initially, over 1L back in 3rd turning in, stayed on fairly well despite ducking in then out under pressure, held 3rd.
Over-raced in 5th place down back straight, 4Ls back in 6th off final turn, petered out in the stretch.
Slow to muster pace, 6Ls back and rearward at 800 M and worse off cornering for home, never dangerous.
Suited by slow tempo to box-seat 2Ls back in 3rd on rails down the back straight, same off last turn and only held his ground to run 4th at the wire.
3-wide no cover in places, around midfield over 4Ls from pace through to final bend, kept on at the same pace down the centre.
Midfield with cover between 3Ls and 4Ls off the speed before home turn, finished off at same pace and couldn't reach the leaders.
Pressured early on when about 6Ls back in 10th, closer on straightening, kept on fairly without troubling the leaders.
Trapped 4-wide no cover throughout, midfield down the back before losing his position on the circle, no recovery in the stretch.
Didn't break well, keen in a worse than midfield position and at least 6Ls adrift before last turn, made back some late ground.
Slowest out and soon 9Ls last, same turning for home, never in the hunt.
Tended to hang with awkward head carriage in a worse than midfield position throughout, never likely and eased down inside final 200 M.
Went forward as usual, about a neck back in 2nd behind winner on fence down back straight and same at 200 M, kept on well but always just held.
Settled in box seat, picked up steadily 300 M, drifted away 100 M to win.
Awkward away, never competitive at rear.
Pushed to take the rail and led by 1.5Ls at good pace, hung on strongly until 100 M overhauled, ran on well for 2nd without any other threats.
Pressed forward steadily, sat 1.5Ls off the good pace 3 wide no cover, out of fuel 200 M.
Bumped start, pushed to keep up behind midfield, 4.5Ls off the good pace 2 wide, made steady ground 200 M.
Very slow away, 9Ls off the good pace 2 to 3 wide at rear, no progress in straight.
Eased to sit in midfield, 3Ls behind the good pace, ran on well to the line despite being trapped 4 wide throughout without cover and lost ground.
Eased to sit behind the front-running group, 3Ls off the good pace, no dash, flattened 200 M.
Pushed to occupy a prominent spot without cover, 1.5Ls off the good pace 2 wide, no turn of foot in straight, flattened 200 M.
Pushed early, settled slightly in front of midfield, 3Ls off the good pace 3 wide, checked 400 M, blocked 4-2, ran on OK when clear.
Eased back for cover, 3 wide, never better than midfield, tailed out.
Eased back, 4.5Ls off the good pace, raced keenly, trapped 4 wide throughout and lost too much ground, no turn of foot in final stages.
Slow away, eased to rear, on the rails, never a factor.
Eased to sit in midfield along the fence, never better.
Settled outside leader, disputed lead into straight, gradually faded.
Raced very wide without cover in a prominent spot, similar when turning in 4-wide, dropped out under pressure.
Travelled better than midfield, 5th within 2Ls of speed turning in, made steady headway under pressure to hold every chance over 200 M out, swamped closing stages.
Settled in midfield on rails, saved ground turning in, not much room behind a wall of horses early in straight, fought on well to the line.
Settled on rails in better than midfield, closer up around the bend when pace slackened, amongst leaders turning in, soon found no extra in straight.
Slow out, settled towards the rear, widest runner around the bend, kept on same pace down centre of the straight without quickening.
Behind on rails early, baulked briefly for a run 350 M out, finished off race well to be nearest at finish.
Never a danger.
Soon came across the track to take up running setting a steady pace, under pressure to hold leading position early in straight, unable to sustain effort and headed just inside 200 M.
Settled in midfield, gradually shuffled back rounding home bend to be last few before straightening, baulked early on in straight, finished off race strongly over the apparently insufficient trip.
Settled wide with cover in midfield, ran on well down centre of straight to just get up on line.
Always travelling well in behind the pace and had the eventual winner covered, challenged strongly inside 200 M, came close to win but was just outbattled in the finish.
Led at even pace, headed inside 400 M but refused to give in and battled all the way to the line. (Jockey dropped whip near 100 M.)
One out one back from leader and tracked well to straight, swiftly moved to the front 400 M out, kept on stoutly to hold off the persistent runner up.
Chased leaders along the fence, kept on in straight but lacked pace to mount a serious challenge.
Held up in midfield and was difficult to settle at times, challenged from 400 M but not quicken. No impression.
Given a waiting ride in a rearward position, 7Ls down halfway but moved closer approaching home straight, progressed steadily from 350 M but not threatened the principals.
Dropped back to last pair on jumping from a wide barrier, switched wide out to challenge on straightening, gradually picked up and stayed on towards the finish.
Held inside running in midfield, edged into clear 250 M, ran on but not reach front pair.
In midfield travelling 3-wide without cover, looked uncomfortable on the turn and found nothing when pressed on inside 400 M. Eased final 150 M.
Towards the rear, waited with until 450 M but was rather one-paced once angled towards the outside for a run. Never dangerous.
In last, kept to the rail throughout, had to be shaken up passing 500 M, not pace to challenge. Never a factor.
Out with first few, positioned on leaders back 3Ls back, made some use of on a solid speed, found nothing on turning and soon dropped out.
Out in line, went forward to sit 2Ls off leaders, raced 3 wide without cover to bend, found an extra gear under light weight and shot clear turning, kept going and held good break to line.
Fast into stride, took up running soon after, challenged in mid-section and set a strong speed throughout, overhauled at 300 M, used too much.
Taken back from a wide alley, ended up sharing rear on rails, 8Ls or more away in mid-section, saved ground on bend, made useful ground late to make frame.
Reasonable jump, 3 wide in midfield with cover 4Ls off front, improved on bend, kept coming wide out in straight, no match for winner late.
Standard jump, raced 8Ls away in 2 wide line sharing rear, gave big start and under pressure turning, no progress in straight.
Even jump, took up a midfield position 4 to 5Ls away in running line, progressed between horses on turn, continued to close down middle to narrowly take 3rd.
No early pace, 6 to 7Ls back in running line behind midfield, fair run to bend, ridden up on turning, no progress.
Moderate beginning, behind midfield on rails 6Ls or so away from speed, made steady ground between horses to 100 M before run ended.
Began nicely, took up box seat 1 out 1 back 2Ls away, followed a strong speed throughout, found until 200 M before hard run took toll and condition gave out.
Fair to begin, raced 5Ls back on fence in midfield, saved ground on bend, bumped 300 M, kept coming in straight to be nearest on line.
Slow away, rushed up to race outside leader, ensured strong pace applying pressure throughout, overworked on turning and folded cheaply.
Blundered jump, faded back, raced 3 wide at rear 8Ls back, had cover in mid-section, swung widest turn, made some minor ground without threatening.
Out in line, raced 3 wide 7Ls back, struggled on bend and gradually lost touch, never nearer in straight.
Moderate jump, soon at rear 9Ls off lead, set plenty to do, came wide from bend, lacked usual finish and just passed tired runners late.
Began well enough, pushed on to take closer order, forced to race wide without cover on bend, 1L down turning, loomed as a place chance but run ended at 200 M.
Drifted back from a wide alley, ended up 10Ls away at rear, set huge task still last on circle, came widest turning and made remarkable headway to take place.
Out in line, ridden hard and used plenty to cross to front, kept pace reasonable to bend, fought back at 300 M and held on to 150 M before headed. Kept going to make frame.
Displayed early speed, adopted prominent spot 1 out 1 back, on decent tempo to bend, found little when asked and condition gave out final 250 M.
Showed usual speed, worked hard to challenge leader in mid-section, kept pace on shading leader turning, couldn't find final 200 M but battled away well in finish.
Fast out, took a hold and eased back raced behind midfield 7L to 8Ls off leaders, set a task on straightening, no impression.
Settled closer than usual from an inside draw, 3 to 4Ls back throughout, angled clear at 300 M and made run with winner, battled hard final 200 M and just missed.
Out with rest, settled in midfield on fence 5Ls off speed, ridden up and saved ground on bend, no real headway in straight.
Badly crowded at start, regathered to be amongst last few, 3 wide and 8Ls behind on bend, folded 300 M.
Standard jump, posted 3 wide 4 to 5Ls back in mid-section, covered extra ground throughout, lacked a dash but kept grinding away in straight to be nearest on line.
Slotted in to a midfield role 4Ls back in running line, aided by a strong tempo, travelled well to bend, took a while to wind up but closed nicely final 200 M to get up and score.
Standard jump, settled midfield or worse 6Ls off top end, used little in running line throughout, no pick up in straight and simply whaded away.
First to hit ground, led easily before taking a trail, still had to work with pace on urged along turning and kept on evenly to 200 M before tiring.
Soon crossed to the fence behind runners, not helped by the steadying tempo in middle stages, into clear after 250 M, ran on for a never nearer 2nd.
Rushed to a forward position, always prominent but travelled 3-wide without cover, hard driven in straight and kept to his task throughout. Had every chance but not able to reach the winner.
Taken back to a rearward position, hampered by the slow pace and became unsettled, had 6Ls to make up inside 400 M but found very little off the bridle.
Even break, settled in a 2-wide position ahead of mid-division, made steady headway inside 250 M, stayed on but never threatened the winner.
Fractious in stalls, missed the break and lost many lengths, made up the lost ground gradually but still last turning in, taken wide to challenge but made limited headway only.
Held inside running in midfield and travelled kindly throughout, responded well and came through a gap on the inside, led inside 200 M and was nicely on top at the end.
Up with the early pace, moved up to race outside the lead passing 800 M, led early in straight but found nothing under pressure over the final 200 M.
Broke well but dropped back to find cover behind midfield, inconvenienced by the steadying tempo in middle stages, switched out 350 M but not pace to seriously challenge.
Dropped back to 2nd last on jumping from a wide barrier, gave little response when driven out 250 M. No impression.
Awkwardly away, couldn't muster early speed and ended up towards the rear 4 to 5Ls back, not helped by the slow tempo in middle stages, made some progress inside 250 M but offered little threat.
Bustled along after the start to be on the heels of the leader, hampered by the slackening tempo near 1000 M and inclined to hang out, not quicken in straight and outpaced passing 200 M.
Soon in front, hugged the rails led them slowly, driven from 300 M but not quicken, weakened rapidly over the final stages.
Settled in last position on the rails. Worked home soundly down the outside despite being hampered near the 200m.
Raced behind midfield, 3 wide with cover. Peeled out rounding the home turn and fought on strongly after being hampered over the final furlong.
Was quickly into stride landing 1 out 1 back. Worked into clear running early in the straight and gave plenty when placed under pressure to win in good style.
Worked forward to make the running along the paint. Faded soon into the straight.
Travelled behind midfield, 2 deep with cover. Was held up early in the straight, but ran on well once in the clear.
From the outside barrier was taken across to park on the fence at the rear. Made some late ground in the final stretch.
Camped outside the leader 2 wide. Had every chance.
After being slow to begin was aggressively ridden to improve its position settling behind the leader. Gave little at the business end.

Attempted to be positioned behind the speed however was caught 3 wide without cover for the majority of the race, on the back of the leaders. Never likely after the mid-point despite being severely checked near the 200 M.
Camped 3 back the fence. Found inside runs in the straight and battled away to the post.
Quickly into stride. Taken to race 2-wide better than midfield through to the home turn and was 3Ls down turning in. One-paced to conclude.
4-wide in the leading section making the first turn. 2-wide disputed lead 800 M out. Bumped and soon faded upon entering the home straight.
3-wide at rear making the first turn and trailed field on fence 900 M out. 7Ls away on straightening and covered substantial ground thereafter.
Disputed lead on fence until overhauled by the front trio passing 200 M. Hung on to make frame.
Trapped 4-wide early and shifted 2-wide behind midfield passing 800 M. Improved wide rounding the bend and was 5Ls down on straightening. Made good progress to figure in quinella near the line.
Soon in the front rank but was trapped 3-wide. Steadied to midfield for cover from 800 M. Swung 5-wide and was 5Ls behind the lead on straightening. Ran on only fairly.

Trapped wide without cover at midfield on first turn. Allowed to race 3-wide behind leaders passing 900 M. Attacked the lead turning in and hung in badly on straightening. Every chance over final 150 M.
Slow to begin. Raced towards rear on fence early. Urged to race behind midfield passing 800 M. Never nearer.
Raced one-off the fence at midfield early and middle stages. Moved to race behind leaders passing 400 M. Failed to follow through.
Raced 2-wide towards rear through to the home turn and was 6Ls off on straightening. Made some headway before checked at 200 M.
2-wide at midfield early. Bounded in the air at 900 M and lost ground. Never recovered.
Began well, took prominent spot 1000 M out. Battled well in the straight and prevailed closing stages.
2-wide and 6Ls or so back in 7th at 1200 M and similar on straightening, finished off well enough to place.
Always worse than midfield and at least 8Ls from the speed until last bend when pressured, very one-paced.
Box-seated in 3rd on fence through to last turn, picked up well to lead 150 M out, driven out.
Briefly without cover initially, gained cover about 1100 M out, when 5th, in 4th and 4Ls back off last bend, had his chance to place.
Bounded at start and keen when one from rear at the 1000 M, 8Ls behind leader on straightening, never on terms.
In 4th or so 3-back the rails about 4Ls from the speed through to straightening, had his chance to place, lacking a turn of foot.
Settled in 8th about 7Ls from lead at 1000 M and marginally closer off last bend, ran on well down the centre for a clear 2nd.
5-back on the rails about 8Ls off pace in 9th at 1000 M, marginally closer taking final bend, recovered some minor late ground.
Went forward and 1L back in 2nd at the 1000 M, hard pressed to remain in touch cornering for home, emptied out, eased down final 200 M.
Soon led on fence by 1L, kicked on to be over 2Ls to the good taking last bend, headed about 150 M out and faded out of the money.
Went back from wide gate, more than 10Ls behind speed before last bend, never really in the hunt.
4-back the rails in 7th about 6Ls from early tempo, ridden along to try and make an impact before last curve, always outpaced.
Disputed early pace before tracking leader 1L back in 2nd through to last turn, upsides 200 M out, no extra and missed a place in closing stages.
Awkward break and soon 8Ls off the speed in 10th, about 5Ls off the speed inside winner taking last corner, recovered some minor late ground.
Raced in 6th no worse than 4Ls from the speed before last turn, with place prospects at the 200 M but the run peaked.
Led by 1L at the 1000 M, maintained a similar break until final bend, headed before the furlong pole and quickly swallowed up.
Fractious in gates and slowest out, over-raced early on when 9Ls last, 6Ls last off last bend, never a genuine threat.
Box-seated in 3rd or 4th on the rails until home turn when going well, led about 250 M out, picked up by winner inside final 100 M, barely held 2nd.
Caught 3-wide no cover throughout, 5Ls back around midfield at 1000 M but closer turning for home, extra work took its toll in the straight.
Checked early on, 3-back on rails in middle stages and 3Ls back in midfield off final bend, very one-paced to conclude.
Went back from wide gate and 8Ls back in 11th at 1200 M, still rearward and widest turning in, picked up very well to lead inside 100 M, kept on.
4-back the rails until final bend between 5Ls and 6Ls from the speed, outpaced by the principals.
3-wide but with cover around 9th at the 1000 M, improved to be 4Ls off lead spinning for home, kept on well, just missed 2nd.
3Ls back in 4th out 2-wide at the 900 M, closer in 3rd swinging for home, a place hope when 1L down at the 200 M, couldn't follow through.
Checked start, at back, 6LS off the good pace along the rails, ran on fairly in straight.
Eased back, 6-1/2Ls behind the good pace, trapped 3-wide and lost ground, ran on ok in final stages.
Midfield, 5-1/2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, no progress in straight.
Pushed to cross in front but failed to take lead, 2-1/2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, ran on until 100 M flattened.
Eased at start, trapped 3-wide, never competitive at rear.
Took rail easily and led by 2Ls at good pace, never being challenged.
Settled in front of midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the good pace along the fence, just held ground in straight and ran 3rd.
Eased at start and crossed towards rear, 7-1/2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, made minor ground 200 M.
Slow away, pushed to hold a midfield spot along the fence, 5Ls off the good pace, progressed steadily 300 M and took 2nd.
Slow away, hard ridden to occupy the box seat behind the good pace, ran on until 100 M out of fuel.
Pushed early but did not muster, settled in midfield, 4Ls off the good pace 2-wide, just held ground in straight.
At back, checked early, 6-1/2Ls off the good pace along the fence, no progress in last quarter.
Never far off, commenced move turning in, soon hit front and drew clear under pressure.
Raced keenly on rails behind leaders, shuffled back to forward of midfield far side, saved ground turning in, one paced under pressure in the run home.
Raced wide without cover in midfield, moved forward to dispute lead into back straight, soon dropped out after home turn.
Settled in midfield, found no extra in straight.
With leaders, taken back to race behind pace before stables bend, weakened in straight. (Tactic questioned.)
Settled well behind after coming across from a wide draw, last into straight, responded well down centre of track, nearest at finish.
Checked at start, settled at the back, same into straight, made good progress down centre of track, did best work late.
Settled in midfield, angled out for a run turning in, ran home steadily without quickening.
