Showed early speed, eventually crossed to lead coming out of home straight, held narrow advantage to home turn, soon dropped out. (Questioned for poor performance.)
Settled towards rear, commenced run around the field making home bend, sustained steady progress under pressure down centre of straight, not threatening.
Raced wide in forward of midfield, found no cover down far side, effort rounding home bend, ran home at the same pace.
Settled behind midfield on rails, saved ground turning in, fought on well between runners down inside without threatening.
Up with the early pace and was one out one back from the leader, all out inside 250 M, kept on but couldn't quite get to the winner, checked 100 M from home.
Dropped back to 2nd last about 5Ls behind leader, pressed on inside 350 M but unable to quicken from off the pace. No impression.
Pressed forward to lead and dictated the race with a steady tempo, all out from 300 M, edged left under pressure over the final 50 M but found the necessary to held on.
Parked 3-wide in midfield, proved difficult to settle in early and middle stages, no response inside 350 M, soon out of contention.
Unable to shift in from a wide barrier and was forced wide and without cover in the chasing pack throughout, found disappointingly little when asked in straight, weakened close home.
Restrained after the start and was shuffled back to midfield gradually, under serious pressure passing 400 M and kept on at the one pace. (Jockey questioned re riding position.)
Patiently held up in last, 7Ls behind going into the final turn, taken wide to challenge in straight, stayed on relentlessly from over 200 M out, never nearer.
Restrained to a 2-wide position towards the back, had 5Ls to make up entering the straight, into clear 300 M and progressed steadily to 50 M, drifted in over the final stages.
Lost ground at the start, along the fence never better than midfield, under pressure inside 400 M, soon eased on straightening. (Jockey questioned.)
Broke well and alongside leader early, restrained back in search of cover passing 1100 M, challenged strongly final 300 M, came close but couldn't reel in the winner.
Tracked leader along the fence, always in touch, ran on gamely down the inside over the final 300 M, drifted out under pressure close home.
Soon grabbed the Stands' rail, settled in midfield never far off the pace, kept on at the same pace and no impression on the principals.
Tracked the leading trio, progressed inside 300 M but not troubled the winner.
Restrained to a position behind midfield, made good headway from 300 M out to claim 6th on the line.
Showed early speed to take up running, kept on till finding no extra final 100 M.
Handily placed in mid-division towards the outside of the field, soon dropped out passing 400 M, eased.
Placed on the outside of group, towards the rear throughout, driven from 350 M but not quicken.
Dropped in just behind leaders, effort from over 400 M out, ran on late for second without ever looking like getting to the winner.
Held up in mid-division but never far off the pace, out into clear 400 M, stayed on.
Slow out, raced keenly in midfield, progressed steadily inside 300 M and made good impression late on.
Rushed forward, not travel and under serious pressure halfway, weakened rapidly inside 400 M.
Fractious in stalls and lost ground at the start, ended up in last few, shaken up approaching 400 M but gave very limited response.
Held up in the rear 4Ls back, effort on the outside passing 350 M but no extra gear to seriously challenge.
Quickly into stride, showed plenty of pace to lead, drew clear inside 300M, ran on powerfully and was well in command 100 M from home.
In midfield towards the Stands' side, always in touch but could only keep on at the one pace for pressure inside 300 M.
Coursed wide in the early and middle stages from a wide gate to eventually camp midfield 3 wide with cover. Plodded to the post.
Parked midfield, 2 deep with cover. Worked into the clear in the final stretch but just couldn't get past the eventual winner.
Travelled with the backmakers 1 off with cover. Never likely.
From the outside ally was taken back across runners to settle at the rear, Struggled in the run home.
Settled back in the field along the rails. Was under pressure turning in and ran on nicely.
Raced midfield the fence. Peeled out after straightening for home and dug deep to fight off challengers.
Worked forward from a wide alley to cross and make all on fence, peaked on its run inside the final 50m.
Was bumped at the start losing ground and settling at the rear along the fence. made some late ground.
was slow to begin then was checked away from the heels settling behind midfield 2 wide with cover. Made a dash in the straight but peaked well before the post.
Raced behind midfield, 3deep with cover. Plodded to the line.
close to the speed but was caught 3 wide & without cover for most of the trip. Whacked away in the final stages.
on the back of the speed 2 wide with cover. Was a beaten horse after the 500m, and gave in quickly over the final 400 M.
Chased the leader for most of the trip along the paint. Shifted off the rail near the 800m but commence to tire passing the final furlong.
Raced 3 back the fence. Had every chance.
Last out but soon recovered to race 2-wide at midfield. 3-wide behind leaders turning in. Lacked instant acceleration but put in a sustained effort to charge down rivals close to home.
Raced within 6Ls of the pace through to the home straight. Covered some ground thereafter.
Began awkwardly. Raced at midfield on fence from 1200 M. Shifted 3-wide and was 3Ls down on straightening. One-paced to conclude.
Travelled 4 to 5 wide and without cover at midfield through to the home straight. Faded thereafter. (See Racing Incidents - saddle shifted.)
Raced towards rear early and was given reminder to maintain position 800M out. Never a factor.
Raced as the back marker trailing over 10Ls early. Moved closer on straightening and continued to make up ground when the race was all over.
Sat 3-wide in midfield after average start. Steadied and shuffled further back near 1100M. 4-wide 8Ls down on straightening. Made some headway in the home straight.
Disputed lead on fence early. Led by 1L passing 800M and was levelled turning in. Couldn't keep up in the straight.

Quickly into stride and overcame high draw to lead one-off the fence early. Taken to track the leader 800M out. Responded well in the straight and hit front at 150M. Just failed to fend off the winner closing stages.
Raced within 3Ls of the leader and travelled wide through to the home straight. Unable to turn up a notch. (Mucopus)

Away in line. Taken to sit 2-wide behind the speed early. Allowed to take lead passing 600M in a 3-wide position. Still in front at 200M but failed to hold off the front trio closing stages. Hung on to make frame comfortably.
Behind midfield early. Took closer order outside the field passing 800M and was 5-wide without cover turning in in the front rank. Dropped out thereafter.
Always at rear. No impression.
Behind leading section on fence through to the home straight. Rallied on with the front pair and was not beaten far.
Soon led on fence by 1L; struggling to maintain gallop before straightening; dropped out really poorly; eased down.
3-wide but with cover in 10th down the back; about 5Ls down when blocked for a run for majority of home straight; not fully tested.
Midfield with cover 4Ls or 5Ls from speed through to last bend; briefly 4th over 200m out; run peaked; again without excuses.
A bit keen when 2Ls back in 3rd at the 1000m; checked soon after; still in front rank off last curve; surrendered; another poor run.
Soon settled into 4th 'one-out-one-back'; 1L down in 2nd turning for home; kept on pretty well to lead 150m out; driven out.
Taken back from widest gate; 10Ls last at halfway; still 7Ls adrift off last turn and widest; recovered good amount of late ground; never nearer.
Over-raced early on when around midfield and 4Ls off speed; mid-division with place prospects entering straight; couldn't follow through.
Went back from wide gate to 12th or so; wide and 6Ls off leaders taking final turn; briefly loomed a place chance; run peaked final 200m.
Slowest out; 11th and 7Ls back at the 1000m and not much closer turning in; ran on past a few beaten rivals to wrap up.
3-back the rails in 5th or so and within 4Ls of the front until last turn; emptied out. (Heart irregularity.)
Caught 3-wide no cover for the duration; 3Ls back in 6th at and similar off last turn; did fairly well to take 3rd under circumstances.
Eased back from inside gate; one from rear 8Ls from speed at halfway; outpaced in the straight. (Questioned.)
Raced 2-wide in 2nd at 1000m; pace moderate; assumed the lead before the home turn but headed by winner about 150 M out; comfortably held 2nd.
Checked on the rails early on; 4-back on inner at 800m in 9th place; failed to become competitive in the straight.
Best away and soon clear by 1L on fence; maintained lead through to final bend but soon headed and lost a place inside final 100 M.
Went back from widest gate; shared last place at least 6Ls from pace until final bend; ran on through several straggler and nearly placed.
Caught 3 and 4-wide no cover throughout; in front rank until the 600m but began to slip back off last turn; soon beaten; eased down.
3-wide but with cover in 9th or 10th and at least 4Ls from speed prior to the 600m when pressured; all out to nick a distant 3rd.
Taken back from wide gate; 7Ls last at 1200m; 6Ls down in 12th or so spinning for home; always chasing the majority of the field.
Soon 3-back on fence despite exiting gate 12; around midfield from 1200m to home turn; no chance with the winner but stayed on best of the rest.
Always travelling well on the leader's back on rails in 3rd until the 600m; 2nd turning for home; soon quickened right away, unchallenged.
Raced prominently as usual; 2Ls back in 3rd at halfway; bumped by winner entering home straight; emptied out very quickly.
3-wide no cover throughout but tracking leader in 2nd until the 600m; began to struggle before final bend; dropped out.
Slow out and never travelling very well despite midfield spot about 4Ls off pace before last turn; short of room 200 M out but outpaced anyway.
Rearward on the rails between 5Ls and 6Ls from the speed before the last turn; steadied and shifted out 200m out but well held in any case.
4-back the rails in 10th or so about 5Ls from pace at 1200 M, a little closer turning in but very one-paced and little threat overall.
Never on terms; shared last place down back straight; 8Ls last into home straight, no danger.
Fractious in gates; broke okay and 3-wide with cover in midfield no worse than 3Ls from speed before last turn; didn't find much off the bridle.
Eased back, helped by the fast tempo, never better than midfield.
Midfield, 6.5Ls off the leader 2-3 wide, benefited by the fast tempo, just ran on fairly in straight.
At back, checked early, suited by the fast pace, never a factor.
Midfield along the fence, 6Ls off the leader, favoured by the fast pace, showed nothing in straight.
Very awkward away, moved steadily forward along the back straight, 2.5Ls off the leader, harmed by the fast pace, trapped 3 wide, out of fuel 250M.
Eased to rear, more than 11Ls off the leader 2 wide, suited by the fast pace, ran on fairly in final stages.
Eased to sit in front of midfield, 5Ls off the leader 2 wide, benefited by the fast tempo, progressed steadily 300M and grabbed 3rd.
Suited by the fast pace, never competitive at rear, tailed out. Rider reported never striding out.
Took rail and led by 2Ls at fast sectionals, raced keenly, used up too much gas in early stages, overhauled 300M, emptied 200 M.
Obtained a prominent spot, 2Ls behind the leader 2 wide, not suited by the fast early sectionals, ran on well for 2nd.
Hard ridden forward, 3.5Ls behind the leader 2 wide, not suited by the fast tempo, soon emptied 400M.
Eased to rear, more than 11Ls off the leader 2-3 wide, favoured by the fast pace, progressed steadily 300M, hung in badly and proved difficult to be fully tested, just missed 2nd.
Settled nicely in a prominent spot along the fence, 3.5Ls behind the fast pace, closed the race off strongly 300M, drifted away 200M to win by a big margin.
Slow away, behind midfield on the rails, 8Ls off the leader, helped by the fast pace, held up 4-2, made ground steadily when clear, just missed 3rd.
Soon took up running and made most to straight, found no extra under pressure.
Settled in better than midfield, similar turning in, ran home one-paced under pressure.
Settled just worse than midfield, commenced move around the bend, very wide turning for home, ran on steadily without threatening.
Travelled well behind, saved ground turning in, made up good ground inside final 200 M down inner, nearest at finish.
Travelled in midfield, lost position coming out of back straight, just worse than midfield turning in, kept on well to finish.
Midfield on rails when badly tightened losing about 4Ls far side, trailed field onto home turn, never recovered.
Raced wide in last few, effort rounding home bend, widest runner turning for home, made steady progress under pressure in the centre of straight.
Began from a wide draw, gradually crossed to 2-wide prominent position, switched out for a run turning in, fought on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Settled in midfield, found nothing under pressure in straight.
Settled off the rails in midfield, raced wide down far side, commenced run around the bend to hit front turning in, soon drew clear and hung on well under pressure.
Travelled in last few, hampered again approaching home bend, similar in towards rear on rails turning in, soon eased early in straight. (Lame next day.)
Broke well from a low draw, settled in 4th on rails within 3Ls of pace, similar when not much room in box seat after straightening, got clear run inside 200 M but failed to quicken to feature.
Ridden from wide barrier to circle field around stables bend, settled outside lead far side, faded gradually after straightening.
Soon switched to the inside after the start, travelled kindly in midfield 3 to 4Ls back, had his chance but could find no extra inside final 150 M.
Led from the start and never seriously challenged for the lead, found nothing when pressed inside 350 M, weakened and eased. (Irregular heart rhythm.)
Dropped to the rear 7Ls behind leader, had plenty to do on straightening but made only limited progress from off the pace. No impression.
3-wide no cover in midfield, kept on in straight but lacked another gear to seriously challenge.
Unable to cross from the outside barrier and travelled towards the rear four wide without cover, steadied near 300 M, not quicken after.
Never better than midfield and kept to the rail throughout, driven 400 M out but no response. Never a factor.
Dropped in behind midfield, not helped by the pace and was difficult to settle, 3-wide turning for home, not picked up when clear inside 300 M.
Assumed a midfield spot 3Ls off the pace, well covered to straight, challenged strongly from over 300 M to claim 3rd on the line.
Caught wide in midfield throughout, effort from over 350 M out but not pace to challenge.
Prominently placed behind leader, box seated on straightening and briefly held up to 350 M, ran on well when clear without ever threatening to overhaul the winner.
Gradually made his way forward and raced outside the lead, quickened off 300M, ran on to score decisively.
Handily placed just off the pace, pushed along inside 450M, all out but not able to close the gap with the leader.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield, kept on one paced under pressure 400 M from home. Never dangerous.
Restrained on jumping and raced in last pair, waited with till 400 M and came wide with his effort, made promising headway inside final 300 M, never nearer.
Caught off trail from outside alley, no better than 5 wide without cover, faded from bend given impossible workload.
No early speed, ended up 7Ls or so away at rear, always well back to bend, stuck to rails in straight and made some late ground.
Even jump, 3 wide in midfield 3 to 4Ls back, had cover throughout, kept improving on turn, made gradual ground in straight to make frame.
Stayed in gates, missed start considerably, always detached and never in contention, ignore.
Unable to slot in, posted 3 wide without cover throughout, used too much in run, still 2Ls down turning, weakened in straight.
Moderate beginning, drifted back to race 3 wide 5Ls away in midfield, fair run to bend, improved turning, closed reasonably doing best work late.
Pushed on from an awkward alley, 1L off lead but forced to race 4 wide without cover, niggled turning, gave in when hard run took toll.
Out in line, ended up in midfield 3 to 4Ls back, tracked up 2 wide on bend, brief place chance turning but couldn't go on with it final 200 M.
Even jump, had a soft run 3Ls back throughout, had every chance in mid-section, gradually faded in straight.
Bounced on lead, set terms to suit throughout, 1L clear on bend, always travelling turning, kicked strongly and held a comfortable margin in finish.
Began well, positioned well outside leader, raced 1L back when shaded by outside horses, kept finding in straight and made progress despite finding winner too good late.
No early speed, 5 to 6Ls away on fence, had a soft run to bend, just battled away in straight.
Amongst first to begin, took a trail on leaders back, followed well throughout, close enough turning, battled away nicely following home 2 smart ones.
Taken back, raced at rear 6 to 7Ls away, shared rear throughout, made some minor progress in straight but only passed tired runners.
Drifted well back, ended up more than 10Ls off speed sharing rear, gave an impossible start, improved approaching bend, made only minor ground.
No early speed, clear last early, best part of 10Ls away in mid-section, set huge task, made many lengths final 300 M to make frame.
No early pace, drifted well back from a wide gate, always well back and dropped right out. (Irregular heart beat.)
Rolled forward from a favourable gate, sat outside leader throughout, applied pressure on bend, took over on straightening, broke clear and kept on holding off highly favoured rival.
Bounced out, prominent throughout on leaders back, 2Ls down to bend, had chance but condition couldn't sustain effort, just held ground late.
Didn't jump and took no part.
Out in line, settled in midfield 5Ls back, tracked favourite to bend, didn't let down at business end and just struggled in straight.
Faded back, raced well back 8 to 9Ls away in running line, set task, made no real progress final 400 M.
Out with rest, pushed on to take up running, set an even tempo, challenged passing 600 M, unable to turn up a notch from bend, gave in 300 M.
Taken back from a wide alley, overraced 7 to 8Ls back behind midfield, ridden along turning, disappointing effort in run home.
Began with them, assumed spot behind speed 4Ls back in running line, shifted 3 wide on circle, kept to task but couldn't run down winner with pull in weights.
Lacked usual speed, took spot midfield or so 5Ls from leaders, had an easy run throughout, one-paced in straight.
Out in line, pressed on from a wide gate, ended up 1 out 1 back 2Ls off speed, fair run to bend, didn't find in straight and dropped out.
Even jump, landed in ideal spot 3 to 4Ls back behind pace, saved ground on rails throughout, into clear from 300 M, worked home nicely but well off first pair.
Hard driven early to hold a midfield position on the fence, awkwardly placed early in straight and shifted into clear 250 M, ran on well to almost take 2nd on the line.
Slow to begin, never a factor in the rear throughout, weakened approaching 200 M.
Even break, dropped back to a position behind midfield, waited with till 350 M, challenged strongly and showed an impressive turn of foot to cut down the leader in the final strides.
Jumped awkwardly from the wide barrier, went forward to be close up behind leaders, came under serious pressure making the home turn, weakened rapidly passing 250 M.
Made some use early to find the lead, set an even pace upfront, headed inside 200 M, weakened and no extra final stages.
Began awkwardly, couldn't muster speed and ended up racing behind midfield, no clear run early in straight and hampered 250 M out, ran on well towards the finish.
Swiftly away, went forward and tracked leaders on the rails, loomed up as the main danger in straight, led 250 M out, kept on stoutly and was only reeled in two strides from the finish.
Prominent placed behind leaders early but struggled to keep up halfway, soon beaten turning into straight. (Lame front leg.)

Caught wide on jumping from the outside barrier, settled 3-wide in midfield but was left without cover passing 600 M, made his move from 500 M, briefly threatened in straight but could find no extra inside 150 M.
Away with them, settled 2-wide in midfield with cover 3 to 4Ls back, taken wide to challenge passing 400 M, stayed on but never near leaders.
Not used in early stages, gradually dropped back to last pair, had 7Ls to make up passing 400 M, stayed on at the same pace final 200 M and was never dangerous.
Taken back on jumping, 5Ls off the pace in a rearward position throughout, didn't handle the turn and swung wide into straight, no response when asked.
Positioned 3 back the fence. Travelled well approaching the home turn and dashed away after the 250 M to win convincingly.

Hard ridden from barrier rise and took time to muster speed, coursing wide & eventually settling outside the leader. Used plenty of gas but kept on gamely over the final stages to finish in the frame.
Raced behind midfield, 3 wide with cover. Came widest in the straight and plugged to the line.
Began with its head up, lost ground and settled at the tail of the field. Made ground in the straight from last position. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well then drifted back to settle 3rd last along the fence. Made satisfactory ground along the inside over the final stretch. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced midfield early, before being aggressively ridden to land on the back of the leader along the rails. Battled on one paced down the inside over the concluding stages.
Raced keenly on the back of the speed gaining cover near the 700 M. Peeled out early in the straight but failed to go on and pose a threat.
Travelled midfield 2 deep with cover. Ran to the line soundly without threatening.
Raced near midfield but was caught 3 wide without cover for most of the trip. Struggled in the run home.
Slow to begin settling towards the rear 2 deep with cover. Never likely.
Led along the rail, but was overhauled near the furlong and faded soon after.
Raced back in the field, 1 off with cover. Battled to the line.
Trailed field through to the home straight and made up minor ground late.
3-wide without cover at midfield through to the home straight. Soon emptied.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Led on fence 1400 M out. Headed 200 M from home but kept battling for a place until tired last few strides.
Began in line from an outside draw. Eased to race towards rear on fence 1400 M out. Shifted 2-wide and was 6Ls down making the home turn. Finished off strongly to nick 4th on the line.
Travelled 3-wide without cover ahead of midfield until 700 M. 2-wide 4Ls down making the home turn. Good place chance in the straight but peaked final strides to finish out of frame.
Raced within 3Ls of the pace on fence through to the home straight. Checked at 200 M but soon regained momentum to prevail in a 3-way finish for 2nd.
Pressed forward after start and slotted into one-out-one-back from the first turn. Closed off well and powered clear final 100 M for a convincing victory.
Never better than midfield. Gave very little impression.
Quickly into stride. Taken to prominent spot 1400 M out. Fought gamely in the straight for 2nd and just nosed out on line.
Behind midfield on fence through to the home straight. Struggled home.
Slow to begin and pushed forward. Settled outside the leader from the first turn. Shifted out abruptly 300 M and was steadied 100 M. Just ran on thereafter.
Midfield 3-back the rails, 5Ls off pace at halfway and closer turning in, didn't have much room at top of straight but held in any case.
Opted to race 4Ls off speed in midfield at 1000 M, closer and with place prospects off last turn and at 200 M, lacked a decisive turn of foot.
Slowest out and soon 10Ls last, still 6Ls down turning for home, stayed on strongly late for 3rd.
3-wide no cover throughout, 3Ls back in 5th at halfway and 1L down in 3rd off final curve, one-paced thereafter.
Midfield with cover 5Ls off pace at 1200 M, moved up just before final turn to lead 250 M out, no extra when grabbed by winner final 50 M.
Led by 1L on fence at the 1200 M, set a decent pace and headed on straightening for home, dropped out.
Didn't lead on this occasion, 'one-out-one-back' in 4th at 1200 M, ridden along to maintain this proximity turning in, soon beaten. (Tactic questioned.)
Enjoyed a soft trail in 4th on fence through to the last turn, entitled to hold down 4th given the cheap run but an improved run nonetheless.
Didn't break well as usual, one from rear initially, 8Ls back at halfway, quickened up well in the straight to lead 50 M out.
6Ls behind early speed in 9th, 4Ls adrift on straightening, never really troubled the principals.
Raced in 10th initially at least 6Ls from leader, 5-wide (widest of all) turning for home, briefly loomed a place chance, run peaked.
Caught 3-wide no cover 1300 M out, pressed on to track pacesetter and briefly led off last bend, headed soon after and faded out of picture.
Forward of midfield initially, niggled along to keep in touch 500 M out, outpaced.
10Ls last at the 600 M, wide turning for home, finished off strongly down centre of track, never nearer.
On the leader's back on fence in 2nd or 3rd through to home turn, 1L back at the 200 M, outclassed by winner and all out to hold 2nd.
Went back from wide gate, 10th and about 7Ls off pace before last turn, recovered some late ground but always chasing the majority.
Away alertly and soon in front by 1L, joined at 800 M, again 1L clear turning for home and same at 200 M, always in command.
Prominent within 2Ls of the speed in 4th or so through to straightening, stayed on well, nearly got 2nd.
No early speed, one from rear 8Ls from speed through to the last bend, never dangerous.
Worse than midfield at least 6Ls from pace through first half, recovered some good late ground, nearest at the finish.
Raced 3 and 4-back on the rails between 4Ls and 6Ls off speed until last turn, made up good late ground, nearest at finish.
In 5th on inside 3Ls or 4Ls off pace down back straight, 2Ls back in 4th at the 200 M, couldn't follow through.
Went forward from widest gate and disputing speed at 800 M, 1L back turning for home, weakened out rapidly.
Over-raced in 7th or so through early stages, down by about 6Ls cornering for home when 3-wide, kept on fairly well but no real threat.
Pushed early, midfield along the fence, 3Ls off the leaders, not suited by the slow tempo, lack turn of foot, just held ground in straight.
Eased to rear from bad draw, 7Ls off the leaders 2-wide, harmed by the slow pace, dashed well final 200 M.
Eased to sit in midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the leaders, trapped 4-wide throughout and lost too much ground, harmed by the slow pace, still held ground in straight despite all negative racing situations.
Took rail and shared the lead easily at slow early sectionals, hung on strongly until 100 M overhauled, ran on for 3rd.
Eased back, 5-1/2Ls off the leader, trapped 3-wide and lost ground, dashed strongly 200 M despite not suited by the slow pace and ran a solid 2nd.
Hard ridden to go forward, just off the leaders but trapped 3-wide, ran on well to the line.
Hard ridden to share the lead at fraction slow early sectionals, trapped 2-wide, lack turn of foot in straight, ran on to the line.
Pushed to occupy the box seat, enjoyed the slow early tempo, closed the race off strongly, dominated final 50 M.
Eased back, 4Ls off the leaders 2-wide, harmed by the slow pace, blocked and checked 200 M, dashed well when clear.
Eased to sit in midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the leaders, raced 3-wide, not suited by the slow pace, no dash.
Eased to sit in front of midfield, 2-1/2Ls off the leaders 2-wide, raced keenly, not suited by the slow tempo, ran on fairly.
Behind midfield but on the fence, 5Ls off the leaders, harmed by the slow pace, little dash 100 M.
Sluggish at start, travelled in rear of midfield on rails after repeated urges early stages, in similar position turning in, ran home one-paced.
Began only fairly, with leaders before shuffled back far side to share 3rd spot just off the speed, similar turning for home, fought on under pressure only to lose out in a bob of heads.
Travelled in last few, saved ground turning in, never nearer.
Slow to muster, settled in forward of midfield to straight, saved ground turning in, ran on steadily down straight to be nearest at finish.
Soon taken well, waited with, shifted wide turning in for a strong run down the centre of the straight, just prevailed by the narrowest of margins in a four-way photofinish.
Broke well, soon restrained to race on the back of pacesetter on rails, shifted out for a run turning in, fought on but never able to draw level throughout straight.
Worked from a wide gate to a prominent spot but remained wide without cover throughout, drifted wider making home turn, soon faded out under pressure.
Held rails run in front benefiting from the one draw, headed approaching home turn, soon dropped out tamely.
Raced just worse than midfield to straight, made up good late ground without threatening in a blanket finish.
Began with others, settled well behind, commenced move turning in, switched out for a run over 200 M out, finished off race well, tightened final few strides.
Raced freely in midfield without much cover down far side, similar turning in, produced good late finish in the run home racing tight between runners close to home before checked crossing the line.
Worked from a wide draw to settle outside leader, moved up to hit front turning in, fought on well but pipped at post.

Behind leader, unsettled by the slackening tempo near 1000 M and shifted to one out one back entering the back straight, all out in straight but not reach the winner, weakened final 100 M. (Trainer and jockey questioned.)
Crossed to the fence soon after the start, in midfield 5Ls back making the turn, had an uninterrupted run down the inside, stayed on well towards the finish.

Gradually crossed to a 2-wide spot in midfield, moved closer to leaders over the home turn, held every chance in straight but couldn't find the extra to challenge. (Trainer and jockey questioned on racing position.)
Bustled along after the start, soon led them on the fence and dictated the pace, kicked home 350 M, drifted out to centre of track under pressure but kept on well to hold off his persuers.
Close up behind leaders and well placed throughout, kept on determinedly inside 300 M but not able to reel in the winner.
In touch behind leaders and raced 3-wide without cover down the back straight, outpaced halfway round the home turn, beaten and eased final 200 M.
Restrained to a 2-wide spot in mid-division, travelled strongly to straight and made steady progress from 300 M to be nearest on the line.
Towards the rear, more than 6Ls down passing 400 M but not really picking up from off the pace. Never a factor.
Held inside running in midfield, kept on same pace inside final 300 M but couldn't take ground off the leaders.
Travelled 2-wide behind mid-division, pushed along inside 400 M, stayed on final 200 M but not reach leaders.
Dropped back, patiently held up 9Ls behind leaders, made his move 500 M out, made steady headway down the outside but offered little threat to the leaders.
Held up in last, 10Ls off the pace in middle stages, moved closer on turning, switched out to challenge but stayed on one paced only.
First to jump, went forward and raced prominently outside the lead, hard driven approaching 400 M, couldn't repel the winner but put in a workmanlike effort to finish 2nd.
Dropped to last 7Ls behind leader, pushed along to stay in touch halfway, no impression on straightening.
Never better than midfield, caught 4-wide without cover making the home turn and weakened over 300 M out. (Blood in Trachea / Jockey and Trainer questioned.)
Well covered in midfield, driven from 400M and made some progress, not reach leaders.
In mid-division early, dropped back to the rear halfway, wide on the turn and covered more ground than others, took time to gather and only made some progress late on.
Had the benefit of the rail and led them steadily, held 1L advantage inside 400M, kept on early in straight, headed 150 M and weakened over the final stages.
Held inside running behind leaders in early stages, gradually outpaced making the home turn, no extra final 200 M.
Towards the rear for most, not quicken when driven inside 400 M. Never a factor.
Held up behind midfield, no clear run early in straight, picked up well from 300M to finish nearest on the line.
Behind the leading group 2-3Ls back, difficult to settle at times, not quicken when asked 400M out, gradually weakened inside 200 M.
Well placed in 3rd and travelled kindly throughout, picked up well in straight to lead passing 150M and won comfortably in this lower grade.
Drawn wide, shifted into a 3-wide position in the chasing group just before the turn, ridden and weakened inside 300 M.
Checked after the start and lost 2Ls, raced in restricted room from 1000M and unable to improve position, 2nd last turning in and could only make limited progress down the outside.
Held up in mid-division, into clear 400M and had his chance, kept on same pace final 200 M.
Travelled behind midfield. 3 wide with cover. Closed off fairly.
Gradually strolled to the lead and set a leisurely tempo outside the leader. Began to tire near the furlong.
Went forward and led at an easy tempo along the fence. Folded quickly.
Enjoyed a nice run on the back of the leaders 2 wide with cover before shifting out at the 800m to race and improve 3 deep without cover from then on. Plodded to the line one paced.
Raced midfield, 3 wide with cover. Struggled in the straight.
Camped behind the speed along the rails. Gained a split early in the straight and marched to the line dourly.

Wasn't the best away then was ridden along vigorously to settle back on the fence. Raced keenly near the 800 M, shifted out into the 1 off line continued to roll out approaching the home bend and finished off strongly.
Raced at the rear of the field, 2 wide with cover. Worked its way into the clear soon after the 400 M and closed off soundly.
Settled at the tail of the field, 2 wide with cover. Came widest in the straight but failed to go on.

Reared up as the gates opened, landed awkwardly, resulting in its rider, becoming unbalanced. Came out a clear last then managed to land around midfield, 2 deep with cover. Weakened in the run to the lone.
just behind the speed 3 wide without cover. Was carried 4 deep after the 800m, and maintained a strong gallop to just short of the wire.
Raced 3 back the paint. Kept to the inside in the final stretch and closed off satisfactorily.
Moderate jump. Urged early to race behind the leading section. Fought on from 300M for a minor placing but kept one-paced. Just hung on to make frame.
Always in midfield. Hard ridden from 300M but failed to get nearer.
Always in front. No answer to the winner's turn of foot final furlong but clung on to figure in quinella.
Quickly into stride on stand's rail. Amongst leaders until peaked 300M.
Towards rear early. 6Ls behind the pace midpoint. Ridden out from 400M but no progress.
Closed to the speed early but dropped out from midpoint.
Raced in mid-division through to midpoint. Got clear run 400 M out but could only produce one-paced effort to finish.
Midfield throughout and kept on steadily to the line. (Bled.)
Slow to begin and raced as a back marker on stand's rail from 900M. 8Ls down at midpoint. Made up minor ground late.
Jumped awkwardly. Found stand's rail at rear 700M out. 4Ls down near 400M. Picked up gradually and nicked a minor placing at the line.
Behind midfield early. Slipped further back and was 6Ls down halfway. Made limited headway closing stages.
Raced with leaders but found nothing when the race got serious 300 M out.
Began fairly. Shaken up to race in the front rank from 800M. Lengthened impressively final furlong to score another easy victory.
Behind midfield early. Steadied near 400M and just ran on thereafter.
3 and 4-wide no cover for the duration of the race; prominent initially but 4Ls back swinging for home; yielded ground. (Questioned.)
Switched inside from widest gate to race 4-back on the rails, over 4Ls down turning for home; one-paced to conclude.
Over-raced and green chasing leader 1L back in 2nd at 800m; began to lose this prominence from top of home straight; very weak final 200m.
Slowest away; soon one from rear 6Ls from the lead; never really in the hunt.
Never really on terms in rear; tended to hang out at the 800 M when 5Ls back in 12th; left further behind in the straight.
Awkward break; midfield and within striking range until halfway but found zero when the tempo quickened.
Caught very wide early on; gained cover in middle stages when about 4Ls off speed; very one-paced to wrap up.
Broke well but restrained to race 3-back the fence until last bend when 3Ls back in 5th; finished well; wasn't far away from getting 2nd.
Led by 1L early on; same margin clear turning for home; headed 300m out; all out to just hold down 2nd.
Taken back from wide gate; 7Ls last at the 800m; same margin behind and pressured turning for home; never on terms.
Okay to break; over-raced a little early on; in the 'one-out-one-back' spot in 4th through to straight; outpaced.
Checked early on; worse than midfield 4Ls or 5Ls off pace through to last turn; outpaced overall.
Away well; box-seated in 3rd at the 1000m; travelling well turning for home; led 300m out; kicked clear; comfortably.
Never any better than midfield some 4Ls or 5Ls off the speed, very one-paced in the straight.
6Ls back in 12th or so down back straight; still a good way back off last turn; made up good late ground; never nearer.
Soon led on fence by 1L; held a similar break before being headed by winner 300m out; all out to barely cling onto 4th.
Held up in 12th; left 4-wide no cover on the circle and widest into straight when 6Ls off pace; made no impact down centre of track.
With cover but slightly worse than midfield some 5Ls from pace before last bend; never likely to trouble principals.
2-wide in midfield between 4Ls and 5Ls from speed through to final turn; kept on at the same pace to wind up.
No early speed and soon 8Ls last; similarly placed before final bend; never dangerous.
Box-seated on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd through to final bend; had every chance to at least place; lacked a decisive turn of foot.
Raced last or one from last throughout when at least 7Ls from the pace.
Soon contrived to be 3-wide no cover despite exiting gate 4; about 2Ls back in 4th or 5th until final turn; weakened in the home straight.
Taken back to race 4-back on the fence; 5Ls down on the circle; could only hold this margin in the straight.
3-back the rails about 4Ls off speed in 6th or so through to the last bend; weak finish after the soft trail; later scoped with blood in trachea.
Didn't have to work too hard to cross from widest gate to race 1L back in 2nd down back straight; led 300m out; always holding a small margin.
Didn't lead this time; 4-wide no cover and keen at 1000m; gained cover in midfield on circle; no turn of foot and very weak final 200m. (Trainer warned for inconsistent performance.)
Raced in 4th or 5th out 2-wide no worse than 3Ls off down back straight; over 1L off winner at the 300m; kept on well; couldn't get past APPRECIATION.
Pushed to share the lead 2 wide at very slow early sectionals, closed the race off strongly until 100 M, flattened.
Pushed to take the rail and shared the lead at advantageous slow sectionals, ran on well to the line and just hung on for 3rd.
Eased to rear, 7Ls off the leaders, trapped 4 wide throughout and lost too much ground, harmed by the very slow pace, moved slightly forward 800M, dashed fairly in straight.
Very slow away, pushed to occupy a midfield spot along the fence, 4Ls off the leaders, not suited by the very slow tempo, no turn of foot in final stages.
Pushed early but not muster, 6.5Ls off the leaders on the rails, harmed by the very slow tempo, little dash in straight.
Settled in a prominent spot just behind the leaders, enjoyed the very slow early sectionals, ran on ok until 200 M flattened.
Slow away, pushed to regain a forward spot but hampered 1000 M, up 3Ls off the leaders 2 wide, not suited by the very slow tempo, lacked room 400M, no dash when clear.
Eased to take the box seat, raced keenly, benefited by the very soft early sectionals and a rail-run, however dashed fairly.
Pushed to secure a more prominent spot from wide draw, 2.5Ls the very slow pace, dashed well 300M and finished a solid 2nd, winner far too good.
Eased to sit in midfield, 4.5Ls off the leaders 2 wide, checked 1000M, harmed by the very slow pace, blocked 4-2, dashed well when clear, just missed 3rd.
Eased to rear, 8Ls off the leaders 2-3 wide, checked 800M, momentarily held up 400M, harmed by the very slow pace, dashed impressively when clear and produced another remarkable success.
Eased back, 5.5Ls off the leader 3 wide, harmed by the very slow pace, ran on ok in straight.
Eased back, 6.5Ls off the leaders, trapped 3-4 wide and lost ground, checked 800M, harmed by the very slow pace, never a factor.
Eased at start and took cover at rear, 7.5Ls off the leaders wide, raced keenly, dashed well 250M despite not suited by the very slow pace.
Settled in midfield, quickened well inside final 300 M to assert authority near finish.
Attempted to make all, kicked over 1L clear after straightening, unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Began well, prominent when hampered and lost one position coming out of back straight, similar in joint 4th some 3Ls back turning for home, fought on under pressure without threatening.

Broke well, led early, taken back to 3rd on rails coming out of back straight, quickened well to hold some chance early in straight reaching 2nd just inside 200 M, failed to sustain effort close to home.
Settled in last few, widest runner turning in, made significant progress down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Travelled just worse than midfield, shuffled back behind bunching field rounding home bend, kept on well in the run home without making any serious impression.
Soon tailed-off and never in contention, jockey reported saddle shifted.
Began with others, travelled in better than midfield on rails mainly in 5th, came to challenge after straightening down inside of track but did not find much room throughout closing stages.
Soon ridden to a prominent wide without cover spot, travelled one-out-one-back around the bend, dropped out tamely after 400 M.
Raced wide without cover towards rear, remained same into straight, soon weakened after straightening.
Midfield early, soon shuffled back towards rear, remained in last few rounding home bend, ran on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.

Travelled in forward of midfield, awkwardly placed behind heels when pace of field slackened around home bend, obtained a clear passage inside 400 M, kept on well without much opportunity to quicken while tight closing stages.
Travelled mainly 3-wide in midfield, similar turning in, made steady progress under pressure in straight without threatening.

Raced very awkwardly and refused to settle when without cover far side, well behind on rails rounding home bend, saved ground turning for home, forced to steady 350 M out, made no impression down centre of straight.
Well covered in mid-division, driven 450M, kept on but never looked like getting involved.
Away awkwardly and gave others a big start, moved up along the fence to be 5Ls off the pace in midfield, run ended 200 M from home and weakened.
Handily placed in 4th and had a smooth run throughout, challenged strongly inside 400M to get within half length of the winner who had got first run on him.
In midfield 3-wide without cover throughout, never picked up in straight, eased when beaten inside 200M. (Jockey questioned.)
Towards the rear on the inner, had 8Ls to make up passing 400 M, no response under pressure, soon beaten.
Always in last, 8Ls down turning in, not quicken and never looked likely from off the pace.
Out in the back early on, 6Ls behind off the bend and produced a sustained effort towards the outside. Never nearer.
Taken back from the wide draw and raced in the rear as expected, had 6Ls to make up on straightening but didn't have a clear crack until 150M, finished well.
One out one back from leader, had every chance but couldn't sustain his effort, faded inside 200 M.
Chased leader one back and was ideally placed turning in, stayed on but not pace to challenge, eased close home. (Jockey reminded to ride out to the end.)
Behind mid-division and not helped by the steady tempo, waited with till 350M, showed good acceleration to come through between horses for 3rd.
Held up 3-wide in midfield and raced a shade keen at times, made good progress down the outside from 400M but turned flat in the closing stages.
Jumped well, in touch not far off from leaders but could only keep on same pace in the run in. No impression.
Jumped well form his wide draw and shifted across for an easy lead, dictated at a steady pace before galloping on strongly inside 200 M to hold off his rivals.

Even jump, assumed a midfield position, raced 5 to 6Ls back in midfield, no excuses in run, improved into race on bend, raced in restricted room for best part of straight and not able to be fully tested.
Began nicely, raced prominently in spot behind leader, had a fair run despite a solid speed, loomed on straightening and hit lead briefly at 200 M, faded last bit.
Amongst pace group early, sat 2Ls or so behind decent tempo, there to bend, lacked customary finish and gradually faded.
Faded back from a wide alley, settled at rear more than 12Ls off speed, enough pace on, still had plenty to do from bend, came widest and made plenty of progress in straight.
Fair to begin, settled not far away behind early speed 4Ls or so back, enjoyed easy time mid-section, had good trail in, couldn't match powerful finish of winner final 150 M.
Only moderate to begin, ended up in midfield 6Ls from lead, used nothing in run, saved ground on bend, didn't find in straight.
Amongst first to hit ground, rolled forward to challenge leader, applied pressure for a genuine tempo throughout, stopped soon after turning in.
No speed as usual, back with last few 12Ls or so from top end, had pace to suit, set a task same margin down leaving bend, produced usual honest finish.
Standard jump, settled in rear division 9 to 10Ls or so back, still well back on circle, switched out in straight, claimed them with ease final 200 M, won nicely.
Jumped with first few, ended up 3 to 4Ls away on rails, enjoyed a soft run throughout, close enough on turning, found little at business end.
Rolled forward to take usual role in front, set a genuine tempo with pressure from outside horse, held a 1L lead turning, overhauled inside 250 M, plugged away.
No early speed 8 to 9Ls off leaders on rails, even run in mid-section, one paced at finish making no serious progress.
Average jump as usual, easy time 7Ls or so, had every hope to bend, didn't see out trip.
Average jump, 7Ls or so from leaders, had a fair run, didn't let down in straight. (Bled on 3rd occasion.)
Moderate jump, taken back to rails, raced 6 to 7Ls back on fence, saved ground on bend, closed off well along inside doing best work late for 2nd.
Bounced into ideal spot behind leaders 3Ls away, travelling well throughout, into clear at 400 M, let down easily and drew away to win comfortably.
Speedy beginning, pushed on to race outside leader, dropped in on bend, made challenge turning, kept coming to 200 M before peaked, stayed on.
Fair to begin, settled 6Ls back just worse than midfield, tracked well approaching bend, peaked final 200 M.
Dropped to rear from an awkward draw, always 8 to 9Ls off them, made no serious progress in straight.
No speed as usual, ended up 8Ls away at tail, always well back throughout, took inside runs but didn't close off in straight.
Drifted back soon after start, 8Ls away in running line, even run to bend, didn't have a crack until after 300 M but response was only moderate when clear. (didn't fully stride out.)
Plenty of speed, took lead and led by 2Ls, set an even speed, gave in passing 300 M and dropped right out.
Began well raced 5Ls away in mid-section, saved ground on rails throughout, took inside runs and kept on soundly to make frame.
Began with some purpose, slotted into running line 3Ls or so away, gradually improved to bend, didn't go on after bump at 400 M and folded tamely.
No early speed, got well back, wide without cover in mid-section, 7 to 8Ls away throughout, came wide turning, didn't close off late.
Average jump, ended up in midfield 5Ls or so back, enjoyed a fair run in mid-section, just held ground late.
Well enough away, prominently placed behind leaders, quickened well to lead near 100M. Comfortably.
Up with the early pace in 2nd, pushed along inside 500M but could find no extra in straight. Weakened rapidly final 150 M.
In touch 3Ls behind leader, pressed on near 400M but not pace to seriously challenge. (Jockey reported his saddle shifted.)
In mid-division early but dropped to last few entering the back straight, had much to do turning in but responded well under pressure and progressed steadily down the outside.
Held midfield running, waited with till 400M, attempted a run down the inside but was held up over the final 200M. Not properly tested.
Awkwardly away, settled on the rails 5Ls back in midfield, steadied 350M, made some headway down the inside but overall not threatening.
Broke well from the inside and held a position in front of midfield, stayed on inside 300m but failed to produce any impression on the principals.
Soon led and set an even tempo to 700M, opened up a 3Ls gap rounding the home turn, kept on well and looked a strong chance 200M out, but was undone by the winner's sharp turn of foot final 100 M.
Taken back on jumping from the outside draw, towards the rear 8Ls away, finished well inside 300M once out in the clear.
Slow to begin and travelled towards the rear, under pressure and lost touch from 600M, tailed out. (Blood in trachea / unacceptable performance.)
Caught wide for most part of the race, strode forward entering the back straight to be alongside leader, couldn't keep up passing 600M and got tired early in straight.
3-wide in midfield throughout, kept on same pace in straight, weakened over the closing stages.
Was pressured as joint leader whilst racing along the rail. Fought on gamely right to the wire.
Ridden along from barrier rise to eventually race 3 back, 1 off with cover. Peeled out rounding the home turn and claimed the prize in the final stages.
Settled behind midfield but caught 3 wide and without cover from about the 700m. Never likely.
Raced midfield the fence. Worked to the line one paced.
Speared through from the widest stall to vie for the lead 1 off. Kept on soundly in the run to the line.
Parked behind the leaders on the fence. Had every possible chance.
Raced 1 out 1 back, had every hope.
Raced towards the rear 2-3 wide with cover. Plodded to the line.
From a wide gate settled towards the rear, 3 wide with cover cover, struggled in the run home.
Missed the start, and travelled in last position. Made steady ground in the straight.
Slow to begin racing with the back markers along the paint. Failed to close off.
From an outside alley managed to camp midfield 1 off with cover. Made decent late ground out wide.
In leading section early. Settled 3Ls behind the pace in a 2-wide position 800M out. Just held ground in the home straight.
Hard ridden to race in a forward position. Shuffled to midfield passing 1000M. Given reminder from 500M but failed to improve. (Bled.)
Slow to begin and was taken to the rear. 3-wide 7Ls down on straightening. Dashed strongly and was nearest at finish.

Driven forward early but was trapped 5-wide making the first turn. Steadied passing 1000M and continued to travel wide shifting 2-wide on leader's back near 600M. Picked up gradually in the home straight and charged down ....too long
Taken to race towards rear after a fair start from high draw. 2-wide 8Ls adrift turning for home. Covered substantial ground late.
Amongst leaders early on fence. Sat 3Ls behind the speed 800M out. Not much to offer in the home straight.

Rushed to the lead after start but was trapped 6-wide making the first turn. Led on fence passing 700M. Held a 2Ls advantage turning in. Looked set for victory but was caught 50M. All out to hold 2nd.

Pressed early but was trapped 4-wide on the first turn. Settled behind the leader on fence 800M out. Just maintained position under pressure top of home straight but finished off well final 100M. Narrowly missed out on 2nd.
Towards rear on fence after start. Took inside run rounding the home turn. Hardly saw daylight in the straight and was not fully tested.
3-wide behind midfield early. 2-wide 6Ls off on bend. Made up some ground in the straight. Steadied concluding stages but was of limited significance.
2-wide behind midfield early and parked on fence near 900M. Niggled and was 6Ls down passing 500M. Just ran on thereafter.
Soon in the front rank. Shuffled to midfield and was trapped 3-wide passing 900M. Swung wide and was 6Ls off entering the home straight. Made headway steadily.
9Ls last at 1200m; still well back on straightening; recovered some fair late ground down centre of track; nearest at the finish.
4-back the rails about 6Ls off speed in 7th or 8th through to final turn; kept on pretty well along the inner; never nearer.
Soon racing one from the rear; at least 8Ls off speed throughout; never dangerous.
Soon led by a neck and maintained a break before being headed soon after turning for home; faded.
3-back the rails some 4Ls back in midfield until the 500m; twice held up at the top of the home straight; didn't recover.
Taken back from wide gate to race in 10th out 2-wide at 1000m; 5Ls off turning in; quickened up strongly of a slow tempo; went close to winning. (Questioned.)
2-wide and a neck 2nd at 1200m; advanced to lead at top of home straight; grabbed by winner 100m out and lost quinella soon after.
Did well to get into 'one-out-one-back' spot from gate 10 at the 1200m; 3-wide and 2Ls back in 3rd turning for home; led 100m out; ridden out.
Midfield throughout; 4Ls back in 6th at the 1200m and similar off last turn; closer and with place prospects at the 200m; couldn't follow through.
Went back from gate 8 to 10th place; pressured when 8Ls off at the 600m; 4-wide off last curve; never landed a blow.
5-back on the fence about 7Ls behind speed before last turn; kept chasing in the straight; never nearer.
Box-seated on the fence 2Ls back in 3rd from 1200m to final turn; petered out meekly after such a soft trail.
Midfield but left 3-wide no cover down the back straight when 4Ls from lead; stayed on pretty well in the stretch despite the tough trip.
Established outright lead on fence at 1000m; led by 1L until the 200m; grabbed by winner soon after and swamped late on.
Held the 'one-out-one-back' position about 2Ls back in 4th from 1200m to last bend; quickly left behind.
In last throughout at least 6Ls from the speed and never a factor.
Led initially before box-seating on fence 2Ls back in 3rd until home turn; led again 150m out; driven out.
Slow to muster early pace; 4-back the fence at the 1000m; 5Ls down before last turn; never really landed a blow.
Settled in 9th between 5Ls and 6Ls from the speed through to last bend; finished off okay but always outpaced by principals.
3-back on fence about 4Ls off speed in 5th through to last turn; 2Ls back in 3rd at the 200m; kept on well enough but couldn't reel in the winner.
Checked early on; one from rear when 7Ls off speed at halfway; much the same turning in; quickened up well to place despite slackened tempo.
Went back from wide gate; in 10th at least 5Ls or 6Ls from from the speed before last turn; held up 200m out; ran on again once clear but too late.
Midfield with cover about 4Ls off speed through to last turn; kept on fairly well but just held from the money.
Keen and 3-wide no cover initially; pressed on to race 1L back in 2nd out 2-wide until last turn; folded tamely.
Hard ridden to occupy a prominent spot, 1.5Ls off the leaders 2 wide, favoured by the slow tempo, ran on well to the line for 3rd.
Took rail easily and shared the lead at advantageous slow sectionals, stuck on well to finish 2nd.
Pushed forward and shared the lead 2 wide, enjoyed the slow early sectionals, dominated final 100M.
Eased to sit in midfield, 4.5Ls off the leaders along the fences, not suited by the slow pace, flattened in straight.
Eased to sit in front of midfield, 3.5Ls off the leaders 2 wide, no dash.
Eased at start and sat at rear, 6Ls off the leaders, trapped 3-4 wide and lost too much ground, dashed strongly 200M despite not suited by the slow pace.

Eased to sit behind midfield, 4.5Ls off the leaders, raced 3 wide throughout and lost too much ground, harmed by the slow pace, checked 200M, still held ground in straight despite all negative racing situations.
Eased back, 6Ls off the leaders 2-3 wide, harmed by the slow pace, ran on fairly in final stages.
Eased at start and took rail at rear, 6Ls off the leaders, harmed by the slow pace, blocked 4-2, dashed strongly when clear.
Pushed to secure the box seat, benefited by the slow pace, however never progressed in straight.
Pushed early, behind midfield, 5Ls off the leaders 2-3 wide, not suited by the slow tempo, moved forward 500M, dashed well 250M.
Pushed early, trapped 3 wide throughout in midfield, 3Ls off the slow pace, moved up 800M, just held ground in straight.
Began well from middle draw, soon taken back to hold prominent one-out-one-back spot, came to challenge after straightening hitting front inside 200 M but grabbed final strides.
Settled well behind, jockey said not able to properly testing his mount due to a shifted saddle.
Towards rear to straight, finished off race okay despite without quickening.
Close up early, settled one back on rails within 2Ls of speed, in similar spot in 4th turning in, kept on well for a nice run home.
Not great start though soon moved up to midfield, only produced moderate headway under pressure in straight, never threatening.
Lost ground at start, soon picked up to behind midfield position, similar turning in, fought on steadily under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Soon taken well back from the widest barrier, trailed the field to straight saving ground on the turn, made good progress to be nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield on rails, remained same into straight, no clear run down inside throughout, not tested.
Raced wide in midfield, slightly worse turning for home, ran home well to grab victory close to home.
Raced wide in better than midfield after beginning from a wide draw, weakened steadily after straightening. (Lame next day.)
Niggled along from jump to soon dispute lead, gained slender advantage midway down back straight, unable to sustain effort passing 200 M, dropped out noticeably.
Broke well to lead on rails, narrowly headed halfway down far side, similar turning in, faded steadily under pressure.
Began awkwardly, assumed a 2-wide spot in midfield 6Ls off the pace, switched out for a clear passage inside 250M, plodded on final 200M.
From the wide draw slotted into a 2-wide position ahead of midfield, driven inside 400M, stayed on but not pace to challenge the principals.
Raced towards the back of the field in early and middle stages, 7Ls behind leader 400M out, never looked likely despite finishing well from off the pace.
Rushed to a forward position in the group behind leaders, struggled from 600M, soon beaten turning in.
Broke well, dropped back towards the rear, 7Ls down inside 400 M but made up plenty of ground in straight. Never nearer.
Always well positioned, 3rd going into straight, swept to the lead inside 250M, briefly threatened but unable to sustain effort over the final 100M.
Towards the rear, 9Ls off the pace rounding the final turn, taken to outside of group and driven from 450M, ran home strongly and just came out worst of the three-way battle for 2nd.
Behind midfield and was given a waiting ride, had 6Ls to make up inside 400M but could make no impression in the straight.
Dropped in from his wide draw, raced in last throughout, trailed 8Ls over inside 400M, made promising headway down the inside but was left with too much to do.

Niggled along on jumping from the inside barrier and set a fast sectionals in early stages, couldn't find much off the bend, headed near 250M and weakened rapidly. (Jockey was advised his riding in early stages lacked judgement.)
Soon hugged the inside rail, in midfield 4-5Ls back and always going smoothly, out into clear inside 300M, quickened well and kept up to his work once in front to draw clear for a comfortable win.
Chased the leader in 2nd and was always doing a bit much considering the fast early pace, couldn't find much when placed under pressure near 350M and was swamped final 150M.
Broke with rest, pressed on to race outside leader, challenged inside horse throughout, took over soon after turning, drew away for a convincing victory.
No early speed, soon at rear, 7Ls or so off top end, niggled throughout, same margin down turning in, passed only tired runners.
Taken back from wide alley, raced 6Ls or so away on rails, still had job to do turning, worked home evenly but never really likely.
Even getaway, positioned in midfield 3 to 4Ls away, had ideal trail in mid-section, came through runners turning and finished well final 200 M to take a place.
Slow away, faded to tail from a wide gate, amongst rear division throughout, swung wide on bend, made some minor ground from well back.
Standard jump, unable to slot in and posted 3 wide 4 to 5Ls back in midfield, did some work but had cover to bend, didn't let down as usual and battled late.
Even jump, ended up in midfield 3 to 4Ls back, had used little on rails, tightened 600 M, saved ground turning, just held ground in straight.
Bounced out, crossed to take up running, had pressure applied throughout, shaded on turning, no match for dash of winner but kept on gamely to hold 2nd.
Fastest into stride, took a trail after 200 M, had ideal run behind leader, right there on bend, stuck on in straight but couldn't find extra final 100 M.
Standard jump, checked and found wide at 1000 M, no cover 3Ls back working wide throughout, dropped out from 300 M after hard run.
Average jump, unable to lead, sat in 1 out 1 back spot, under pressure on turning, found little in straight and weakened cheaply. (See Racing Incidents.)
Struggled early, settled well back 7 to 8Ls near to last, never really looked comfortable, no resonse at business end.
Drifted back to race 6Ls or so away at rear, used little in run, improved wide on bend, made plenty of late ground down middle to be nearest on line.
Amongst leading group early but unable to slot in and posted 3 wide without covering, used too much in mid-section, weakened out.
Bounced out, took lead easily, gave up front passing 1000 M, had an easy time thereafter, lacked needed response turning and dropped out easily.
Reasonable break, pushed on to race outside leader, used a bit to be there, prominent throughout took over turning and stuck on bravely before overhauled inside 150 M.
Little early pace, ended up midfield or worse 5Ls from lead, had good run and all favours to bend, improved into clear on turning and closed best down middle to score.
Failed to muster, raced well back 6Ls away on rails, had a cheap run throughout, still plenty to go, last on turning, got run between horses and closed hard to make frame.
Fair getaway, shuffled back early and posted 3 wide in midfield, raced 3 wide with cover 4Ls back, ridden along turning, stuck on to 100 M.
Out smartly, slotted into 1 out 1 back spot, no excuses thereafter, peeled out to challenge turning and in mix length of straight but just overhauled final 50 M.
Average jump, taken to rear, raced 6 to 7Ls back, lost action at midpoint, wide and never comfortable thereafter, eased down.
Moderate jump, posted 4 wide without cover 5Ls or so back, set too much to do throughout, improved on bend, tried final 150 M when hard run took toll.
Began well, pushed on and eventually took up lead, used a bit to be there, led to bend, not much left when asked turning and gradually weakened.
Well enough to begin, ended up 4Ls back on rails, every hope in run, didn't produce usual finish. (Bled.)
Never better than midfield and raced 3-wide throughout, nudged along passing halfway and found disappointingly little going into straight.
Raced 4-wide without cover in the chasing pack, outpaced on the turn and shuffled backwards, never on terms. (Jockey questioned re riding position.)
Driven to the lead and took them along at even tempo, had lead disputed approaching the home turn, outpaced from 500 M and weakened rapidly on straightening.
Well enough away, held inside running and tracked leaders 2Ls back, responded well in straight and came closest inside 50 M, just held.
In midfield along the rails, 4Ls down turning in, made even headway inside 300 M to finish nearest on the line.

Fractious in the stalls, began awkwardly and lost ground, ended up in last few 5Ls off the pace, held up for a clear run early in straight but finished strongly once a gap opened up 200 M. Never nearer.
Never far off in the group chasing leaders, quickened to lead 200 M out, held on well under pressure when strongly challenged throughout final 100 M.
Slow to muster, urged along to stay midfield, 3-wide turning for home and under pressure from 500 M, weakened final 200 M.
Slow to begin and taken back to last, 8Ls behind passing 400 M, made little impression on rails, kept at the one-pace and never threatened. (Jockey questioned re riding position.)
Slightly slow out and soon rousted along to assume a position in midfield, made some progress final 200 M but never near leaders.
Towards the rear and raced ungenerously in early and middle stages, never got going and soon beaten turning in.
Bustled along after the start, raced outside the lead before taking over at the turn, surged 2Ls clear at the top of the straight, headed inside 200 M, outpaced and weakened approaching 100 M.

Settled 2 wide with cover early then was posted 4 wide without cover, behind midfield near the 1000m. Crept forward passing the 600m, hit the front at the 200m, but was collared close to the post. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slow to begin settling towards the rear 2-3 wide with cover. Made some ground early in the run home before peaking well short of the line.
Lifted its front feet off the ground at the start and was slow to begin, settling with the backmarkers 1 off with cover. Never quickened in the final stretch.
Caught 3 - 4 wide early before working forward & shifting in to race 3 wide without cover from about the 1000m, just behind the speed. Struggled over the final furlong.
Travelled behind midfield the fence. took some time to wind up in the straight running on nicely.
Missed the start then speared forward to lead by the 1300m but coursing wide. Crossed to the fence near the 1000m. Did plenty of work early and was gassed inside the final 100m.
Travelled handy to the leaders, 2 deep with cover. Experienced traffic problems in the straight, ran to the line adequately.
Led early before box seating near the 1000m. Gave ground quickly in the run home, finishing well back.
Travelled 3 back the fence. took inside runs in the straight and got to the line fairly after being held up approaching the 200 M.
Raced midfield on the rail early, then turning into the back straight rolled out to travel 2 wide with cover. Worked into the clear after the 300m and snatched victory close to the wire.
Raced midfield, 1 off with cover then was shuffled out after the 1200m, settling 3 wide with cover. Came wide rounding the home turn and stayed on soundly.
Didn't muster a lot of early pace from a wide gate and settled behind midfield, 4 wide with cover. Passed only tiring horses in the straight down the outside.
Began very awkwardly, got its head up on a number of occasions and as a consequence lost ground, settling at the tail of the field. Not likely.
Raced outside the leader, no cover. Had every chance.
Even break from high draw. Taken to race 3-wide at midfield through to the home straight. Failed to turn up a notch.
Broke well, ended up at midfield on fence passing 700 M. Past only beaten rivals in run home.
Fair start and raced 2-wide behind midfield. Peeled out and was 7Ls down on straightening. Made up some ground but not threatening.
Disputed lead through to the home straight. Dropped out rapidly passing 300 M.
3-wide towards rear throughout. Never in the hunt.
Began well. Eased to sit ahead of midfield in a 2-wide position 700 M out. Gave plenty to fight for a minor placing in the home straight. Just failed at finish.
Pushed to hold the rail early. Settled better than midfield from 700 M. Clear run along the paint in the home straight but kept on one-paced.
Soon in the front rank but trapped 3-wide early. Urged along and shared the lead on fence making the home turn. Built a 2Ls gap from 300 M and always had enough to hold off rivals.
Good jump. Travelled nicely in prominent spot 700 M out. Well position to strike turning in but couldn't get to the winner. Held 2nd fine.
Ridden along after start but failed to muster. Towards rear throughout and gave very little impression.
Bumped after start and raced at rear. Trailed 10Ls to the leader turning in. Covered substantial ground thereafter.
Pressed forward from midfield early after a rough start. Parked one-out-one-back making the home turn. Battled gamely for 3rd without posing serious threat to the quinella pair.
Prominent but caught 3-wide no cover despite exiting gate 3 entering back straight, in 2nd with every chance at the 200 M, run peaked close home.
Midfield with cover about 5Ls off speed before last turn, ran on well in the straight but winning post came a fraction too soon to place.
5-back the fence some 7Ls off pace in 11th at 1000 M, rattled home pretty well from off pace, nearest at the finish.
4-back the fence and niggled along throughout as usual, 4Ls or 5Ls back in midfield at halfway, never troubled the principals.
Nicely placed in 2nd or 3rd before halfway, struggling to maintain this proximity swinging for home, dropped out. (Bled.)
Better than midfield and 3-wide but with cover 1000 M out, niggled along when 5Ls off speed at 600 M, very one-paced.
Taken back to last from wide gate, at least 8Ls from pace and pressured to improve before final turn, could only run on past a few stragglers.
Pressed on from wide gate to lead by 1L at 1200 M, held a break of 2Ls before final bend, headed and swamped about 150 M out.
Poor effort, always rearward at least 6Ls from the speed and struggling before the final turn.
Taken back to race on fence one from last, 6Ls down into home straight, good turn of foot to be 1L back at the 200 M, kept on well, just failed.
Handily placed in 5th or 6th throughout within 3Ls or so of the speed before 600 M, given every chance in the straight to win, lacked a decisive kick.
2-wide and 2Ls back in 2nd early on, still close-up in 2nd entering home straight, quickly dropped off once tempo quickened.
Held up in 12th initially, pressured to improve when 7Ls off pace at halfway, closer turning for home, upsides 200 M out, all out to prevail.
3-back the fence in 6th at halfway and similar turning for home, could only finish off one-paced.
Away well, eased back to midfield 4Ls off speed at 800 M, closer on straightening, had his chance and lacked a turn of foot.
Caught very wide without cover throughout, midfield initially but retreating when 6Ls off turning for home, no danger.
Tracked pacesetter in 2nd out 2-wide from 800 M to final bend, a neck back in 2nd at the 200 M, didn't shirk the task but always just held.
Slowest out and 6Ls last down the back, still well adrift turning for home but recovered good late ground, never nearer.
Box-seated on fence 2Ls back in 3rd until straightening for home, given every chance but was too one-paced to conclude.
Held up 3 and 4-back along the fence about 4Ls from speed before final bend, quickened through a gap 150 M out, soon led and held on.
Unbalanced at the start, 3-wide sometimes without cover in midfield until home turn when 4Ls down, soon struggling, disappointing effort.
Yet another poor run, always rearward at least 5Ls from the pace, offered little or nothing.
Always slightly worse than midfield, about 5Ls back at halfway, retrieved minor late ground in the straight no real threat overall.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Soon led on fence by 1L and held a similar break through to the home straight, headed over 100 M out but easily hung on for a place.
4th on the inner within 3Ls of the pace before spinning into home straight, 1L down and with place hopes at 200 M, did not follow through.
Pushed forward, 1L off the leaders, trapped 3-wide without cover and raced very keenly from 900 M, not suited by the fast tempo, ran on well until 100 M flattened.
Pushed to take a prominent spot as usual, 1L off the leaders 2 to 3-wide, not suited by the fast sectionals, ran on well to the line and grabbed 3rd without much threat to the winner.
Pushed forward to cross and shared the lead, used up too much fuel to cross during the fast early sections, ran on until 150 M weakened.
Eased to rear, 7Ls off the leaders along the fence, favoured by the fast tempo, progressed steadily 300 M, drifted away 100 M to score comfortably.
Never competitive at rear.
Awkward away, hard ridden to occupy a midfield spot, 3Ls off the fast pace 2 to 3-wide, soon weakened 400 M.
Eased back, 6Ls off the leaders 2-wide, benefited by the fast pace, made some ground final 200 M.
Shared the lead along the fence, not suited by the fast early sectionals, hung on until 200 M emptied.
Prominent, 2-1/2Ls off the leaders on the rails, benefited by the fast pace, closed the race off strongly, led briefly 150 M, overhauled 100 M, ran on for 2nd.
Pushed to keep up in midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leaders 2-wide, favoured by the fast pace, progressed steadily 300 M.
Very slow away, hard ridden along the fence and to obtain a midfield spot, 4-1/2Ls off the leaders, suited by the fast tempo, but no progress in straight.
Eased back, 6Ls off the leaders, trapped 3-wide, helped by the fast pace, ran on ok in final stages.
Raced wide without cover in prominent 4th, ran home one-paced.
Began with others from the poor draw, soon settled wide in rear of midfield, remained same into straight, kept on one pace under pressure.
Settled on rails in midfield, switched out for a clear run upon straightening, fought on steadily under pressure to get up on line.
Travelled in better than midfield on rails, similar turning in, kept on well between runners to finish, never nearer.
Settled just worse than midfield, weakened after straightening, never seen with a chance.
Broke well, travelled one-back in 3rd on rails, briefly baulked for a run just inside 200 M, fought on to the line without threatening.
Towards rear on rails, but kept on well to finish, never nearer.
Slightly slow out, travelled just worse than midfield to straight, made steady headway down inside of track to be nearest at finish.
Soon took up running, led the field to 250 M, dropped away quickly. (Tactic questioned.)
Began from a wide draw, ridden around first bend to gain prominent spot outside leader, hit front over 200 M out only to be caught in the shadows of the post.
Settled at the back, produced good late impression in the run home. (Jockey warned re riding in straight.) (Sore next day.)
Travelled in forward of midfield, commenced run 4-wide turning in, fought on steadily without threatening.
Soon taken to race in rear, never a danger.
Settled in 5th and better than midfield to straight, went backward steadily after straightening.
Slow to begin, settled towards the rear 8Ls back, moved closer approaching the final turn, gradually picked up in straight and made up some late ground.

Towards the rear early, strode forward to midfield on entering the back straight, crept forward from 500 M to be 4th going into straight, held every chance in straight, kept on but couldn't find the extra.
Restrained to a position in midfield, rousted along 450 M out but finished off the race very one-paced. (Jockey questioned.)
Broke well but was restrained to a 2-wide spot in mid-division, waited with until 450 M, made good progress final 300 M and claimed 3rd close home.
In mid-division early, shuffled back to rear when hampered near 1200 M, 8Ls down in an unpromising position turning in and made no impression in the run to the line.
Held inside run in midfield, lost ground near 1200 M and again at 450 M when checked severely, never recovered.
Towards the rear, raced wide throughout and covered more ground than others, couldn't pick up when asked, eased when beaten 200 M out.
In mid-division, raced 3-wide without cover early but was able to shift in at halfway, well placed in 3rd turning in, closed off strongly final 200 M to lead in last few strides.
Dropped back to the rear after the start and was given a waiting ride, niggled along 500 M out, finished well from off the pace but not reach leaders.
Went forward from the outside barrier, tracked leader prominently until weakening inside 450 M, finished tailed out. (Unacceptable Performance.)
Taken across to the fence soon after the start, raced in last pair 9Ls behind leaders, soon outpaced on straightening.
Along the inside never far off the pace in chasing group, severely checked by a beaten runner near 450 M and lost momentum, hard driven 300 M but not quicken.

Always in touch, moved to 2nd in pursuit of the leader rounding the home turn, responded well under hands and heels riding and briefly led inside 200 M, battled on but was headed inside final strides. (Jockey questioned.)
Soon led, set even pace upfront and had an uncontested lead to the final bend, headed 200 M and found no extra over the final stages.
Led right from the start, opened up a 2Ls gap inside 400M, all out final 200M but was caught close home.
Began very awkwardly and lost ground at the start, ended up in last pair over 6Ls off the pace, not quickened under pressure inside 400M.
Towards the rear, pushed along midway, briefly held up near 400M but could make little progress when clear.
Held up in touch in midfield, ridden and effort passing halfway, outpaced final 200M.
Towards the outside of group in midfield, nudged along 400M out, stayed on towards the finish but never seriously threatened.
Held up in last but struggled to go with them from halfway, never a factor.
