Drawn on the farside but soon moved across to race prominently behind leader down the centre of track, found less than expected in the finish and couldn't get close to the first two.
In mid-division, shifted to the stand's rail for a clear passage approaching 500M but run ended 200M from home and faded.
Up with the pace but ran a shade free, driven approaching 400M but no response in the run to the line, eased.
Showed greenness in his debut, tracked leader early but found nothing off the bridle passing 400M, dropped out and eased when no chance inside 100M.
Hampered at the start and lost ground, crossed to the stand's side and raced in a rearward spot 5Ls off the pace, made even progress from the rear inside 400M but not reach the leaders.
Dropped in behind midfield, driven inside 350M but remained one-pace in the finish.
Tracked leader in a handy position, hard driven 400M out and dug deep under pressure to get the better of the more experienced runner-up in the closing stages.
In chasing group towards the outside, driven 500M out, finished off at the same pace and made no real impression on the leaders.
Crowded at the start and settled behind midfield, 2 deep with cover. Rounded the home turn widest and made some late ground without threatening.
Raced towards the tail of the field, 2 wide with cover. Never likely.
Raced midfield the fence. Commenced to give ground passing the furlong.
Shifted across to the fence from a wide barrier and settled with the backmakers. Plodded to the post.
Stalked the leader to its outside, hit the front by the 400 M, but was nabbed over the concluding stages.
Travelled in last position. Struggled in the run home.
Slow to begin then settled on the rails behind midfield. Worked out into clear running after the 400m, and run on well down the centre.
Settled behind the speed, 3 wide with cover for most of the trip. Was one paced in the run home.
Raced 3 back the paint. Angled out to obtain clear running after turning for home and picked up nicely to land the prize.
Box seated, no excuses.
Settled in a handy position 2 wide with cover. Had every chance.
Pushed forward to lead on the fence from a wide alley. Rated well in front but couldn't find any extra at the business end of the race.
Worked forward from a wide barrier, settling behind the principals but found difficulty gaining cover, travelling 2-3 wide. Battled to the line.
Travelled 1 off with cover, midfield. Got clear running early in the straight and closed off well.
Began in line and sat 2-wide behind midfield. Shifted 4-wide and was 5Ls down leaving the bend. Made steady progress thereafter.

Pressed after start and took lead on fence at 1300M. Travelled nicely and held a 1L advantage at the bend. Kept giving and fended off all rivals but the winner final strides. (Questioned for improved performance.)
Jumped fairly but soon dropped to the rear despite vigorous riding. Detached 900M out.
Raced 4-wide without cover behind the pace through to the home turn. Soon emptied thereafter. (Jockey warned regarding his riding in middle stages.) (Lame right front leg.)
Pressed forward from high draw. Parked behind leaders in a 2-wide position before making the home turn. Well position to strike in the straight but lacked a finishing touch.
Jumped awkwardly and raced 3-wide towards rear early. Came widest and was 6Ls behind the pace turning in. Covered substantial ground in the straight.
Slowly away, recovered to race behind midfield on fence 1000M out. 3Ls off turning for home. Hard ridden in the straight and made some headway without serious threat to the principals.
Towards rear on fence through to the home turn and was 5Ls down top of home straight. Past only beaten rivals.
Raced within 3Ls of the pace in a 2-wide position through to the home straight. Hard ridden but failed to quicken. Dropped out final furlong.
Midfield early. Urged along the fence and settled on leaders' back 800M out. Had some trouble seeing daylight until 200M but kept one-paced once into clear.
Soon in the front rank but trapped 3-wide early. Shifted 2-wide behind the leader making the home turn. Every chance in the straight but only plugged on for 3rd.
Away with them, eased to sit 3-wide behind midfield from 1200M. 4Ls down swinging wide for home. Came with a strong looking challenge inside 200M but peaked close to home.

Out in line, ridden to race 4-wide behind front runners early. Taken to sit 3-wide at midfield from 900M. 3Ls down on straightening. Kept chasing the leader with the field without blistering acceleration. Got on top closing stages.
Fair start and moved to race behind leaders in a 3-wide position through to the home straight. No response under pressure and weakened inside 300M. (Mucopus).
3-wide with cover in 9th at 1000m; 4Ls back at halfway; 4-wide (widest) turning in; every chance when a neck 2nd at 200m; just held from quinella.
Box-seated in 3rd or so 2Ls from the lead down the back and into home straight when tight for room; not much space again close home; not beaten far.
Worse than midfield at least 5Ls off speed before last turn; never likely to land a blow in the straight. (Tactic questioned.)
4-back on the rails at least 5Ls from the speed before last turn when hard ridden to stay in touch; didn't succeed.
3-back the rails in midfield no worse than 3Ls from speed before final turn; dangerous when 1L down at 200m; kept on; only just failed; improved.
Slowest out; 8Ls last on fence at halfway; unsuited by slow tempo and no great danger overall.
Led by a neck at the 1000m; set steady pace; headed about 300m out; rallied when a head back in 2nd at 200m; didn't shirk the task.
Slowly away; rearward and 6Ls from early pace; 5Ls down turning in; kept on at much the same pace down the centre of track.
2-wide and a neck back in 2nd at 1000m; still upsides off last bend; weakened in final furlong.
Over-raced initially in midfield; 4Ls off leaders at halfway; never quite got to the grips with the principals.
One from rear out 2-wide some 7Ls from the pace down the back straight; remained at the tail of the field.
Trapped 3-wide no cover throughout; 2Ls back in 4th at first but 1L down in 3rd spinning for home; remained in the hunt until the 200m; one-paced late on.
Covered up a close 5th just 2Ls off speed until last turn; led about 250m out; reeled in by leading trio about 100m out, still not beaten far at all.
3-wide with cover in midfield down back straight; 3Ls off lead at halfway; 1L down and challenging 200m out; got up on the line.
Made all; 2Ls clear 1400m out; still 1L clear and going well on straightening; 2Ls to the good 200m out; won readily.
Immediately veered towards riverside rail down back straight and virtually pulled up; took no part.
4-back on the rails behind midfield at least 5Ls from speed before final bend; hung awkwardly with head up in the straight; never dangerous. (Tactic questioned.)
Slowly away; midfield and 4Ls behind early pace; further back turning for home; offered no threat whatsoever. (Tactic questioned.)
1L off pace in 3rd at halfway; lost this proximity on the circle; no real threat and one-paced in the straight.
Worse than midfield 5Ls off pace at halfway; slightly further back off last bend; recovered some minor late ground.
Caught 3 and 4-wide no cover before pressing on to briefly dispute speed at halfway; 2nd off last turn but soon burnt off by main players.
Tracked winner and pacesetter on fence down back straight; 2Ls back in 3rd turning for home; gave vain chase to MY GOAL but comfortably held 2nd.
Raced in 11th some 6Ls or 7Ls from the speed down the back straight; niggled along to try and get closer on the circle; did not succeed.
Taken back from wide gate; 7Ls behind slow early pace; 4-wide on straightening; couldn't make an impact.
Prominent but 3-wide no cover at first; 2Ls back in 4th or so at halfway; struggling before the home turn and petered out.
Slowly away; one from rear at least 7Ls off pace; hung towards stands' rail to wrap up; best work at the finish; never nearer.
3-back on rails and 3Ls off pace at halfway; same margin back in 4th and pressured tackling last turn; kept on at same pace; just nicked 3rd.
2-wide in midfield 3Ls of pace in middle stages; 4Ls back at last corner; had every chance to at least get 3rd; lacked sufficient dash.
Hard ridden to take the rail and shared the lead at fast pace, faded quickly 350M.
Hard ridden early but not muster, trapped 4 wide throughout throughout in midfield and lost too much ground, 5Ls off the fast pace, dropped off 500M.
Eased to rear, 8Ls off the leaders 2 wide, favoured by the fast tempo, momentarily held up 400M, progressed steadily when clear and finished 2nd.
Prominent, just off the leaders 2 wide, not suited by the fast pace, ran on until 200M flattened.
Slow away, hard ridden to keep up in front of midfield, 3.5Ls off the fast pace 2 wide, ran on fairly, flattened 200M.
More prominent from soft draw, 3Ls behind the fast pace, held up 400M to 200M, ran on fairly when clear.
Midfield, 5Ls off the leaders 3 wide, helped by the fast pace, but never a factor.
Midfield along the fence, 4.5Ls off the leaders, suited by the fast tempo, held up 400M to 200M, made minor ground when clear.
Eased back, 6.5Ls off the leaders, benefited by the fast pace, progressed steadily 300M to win.
Eased to rear, 8Ls off the leaders 3 wide, on heels 1400M, favoured by the fast tempo, just ran on ok in straight.
Eased back, 6.5Ls off the leaders, raced 3 wide throughout, suited by the fast tempo, made good ground 400M, however run ended 200M and flattened.
Awkward away, hard ridden to sit in front of midfield, 3Ls behind the fast pace, trapped 3 wide and lost ground, weakened 250M.
Pushed to shared the lead 2 wide at fast early sectionals, used up too much fuel in early stages, emptied 250M.
Eased at start to cross at rear, 6.5Ls off the leaders on the rails, benefited by the fast pace, blocked 400M to 200M, made ground when clear and grabbed 3rd.
Soon taken back to midfield for cover after beginning from the innermost draw, tracked leaders before losing cover coming onto course proper when about 2.5Ls off the speed, ran home one-paced.
Held midfield to 200 M, yielded ground under pressure.

Trailed the field early, shifted inward coming onto course proper quickly gaining towards midfield down centre of the track, sustained steady headway to the line despite without threatening. (Found lame after race.)
Raced keenly in midfield to halfway, dropped out tamely.
Broke well, showed early speed to share the pace, still amongst leaders onto course proper, began to tire inside final 200 M.
Broke well from middle draw, gradually crossed to stands rails holding slender advantage until headed inside final 50 M.
Always travelled in last few, never seen with a chance.
Broke well, held back to race in midfield within 2Ls of speed, shaken up to challenge passing 200 M, ran on well late to be nearest at finish.
Gradually taken back to rear of midfield near the centre of the track, kept on strongly to the line despite hampered 200 M out.
Restrained just off the speed in 4th for cover, commenced move inside 300 M, hit front just inside 100 M, fought on gamely under pressure.
Began awkwardly losing ground, travelled in last few most of way, failed to quicken under pressure inside final 200 M.
Began awkwardly from gate 2, shared the lead most of way but failed to find that little extra under pressure throughout final stages.
Dropped back, caught wide without cover behind midfield, not picked up in straight, eased final 200M.
Crossed to a 2-wide position in midfield, shifted out and ridden inside 400M, made steady progress but not reach the leaders.
Assumed a forward position as expected, raced one out one back and loomed up as the main threat coming off the bend, found less than expected and stayed on same pace final 300M.
Handily placed behind the leader, travelled strongly into straight, powered clear inside 250M to win this a shade cosily.
Placed ahead of midfield and held inside running, picked up well inside 200M but not able to match the pace of the winner.
Very awkwardly away, over 7Ls behind in last few, made good headway from 400M but offered little threat to the winner.
Began awkwardly and lost ground, ended up racing in last pair over 8Ls off the pace, driven 450M but no progress. Never a factor.
Along the fence in midfield about 5Ls back, moved well into straight, switched out to challenge in straight but could make limited progress only.
On the rails towards the rear, 6Ls to make up passing 400M, no progress under pressure, never likely.
Held up in midfield, driven inside 400M, stayed on well final 200m to beat all but the winner.
Ordinary jump, clipped heels near 1200M and ended up in last, steadied 350M, ran on well down the inside but was short of room 150M out. (Jockey questioned.)
Bustled along to go forward, settled in 4th 2-3Ls back, under pressure 450M out, plodded on till weakening inside 200 M.
Had an uncontested lead but lacked the pace to contain the principals when challenged inside 200M, weakened over the concluding stages.
Began with more purpose, box seated on leaders back throughout, did a bit of work on speed, right there turning, kept on soundly late to place.
Ridden up early, dropped into running line 5Ls off speed, no excuses in run, didn't let down as usual and peaked at 200 M, battling thereafter.
Bounced out, led soon after, rolled along at even sections, still held a 1/2L advantage leaving bend, fought off immediate challenge but couldn't hold off rival 150 M.
Out reasonably, positioned 4Ls off speed in front of midfield, enjoyed an easy run in running line, didn't find extra late and faded final 200 M.
Standard getaway, settled 6Ls away on fence, had an easy time throughout, saved ground on fence, closed off best of rest despite restricted room late to be nearest on line.
Fair to begin, raced behind pace trio 4Ls away on rails, used little in run, improved turning, worked home soundly to just miss frame.
No early speed, drifted back to 2nd last 9 to 10Ls off pace, always well off leaders, 2nd last turning, made some minor headway late.
Well enough away, drifted back to race 6Ls of so away, 3 wide without cover throughout, faded out after a hard run.
Jumped well, pressed on to apply pressure to leader, challenged throughout, 1/2L down on turn, gave in cheaply at business end. (See Racing Incidents.)
Steadied early, got back from a wide alley, settled 7 to 8Ls back in rear division, set a task and came widest turning, made many lengths in straight to make frame. Useful debut.
Not much early speed, ended up 6 to 7Ls back just behind midfield, tracked well throughout, came to middle and let down nicely final 200 M to score with something in hand late.
Awkwardly away, soon at rear, best part of 10Ls away throughout, same margin down turning, made some late ground. (Bled both nostrils.)
Ended up in midfield 4Ls or so away in running line, even run, moved 3 wide on bend, closed off best down centre final 200 M to snatch victory late.
Standard jump, didn't lead as per last time, raced 3 wide in midfield refusing to settle, improved on turning, didn't have extra inside 300 M and dropped off late.
Positioned ideally behind leader, had run to suit throughout, still 1 to 2Ls down turning, came around heels but didn't let down and was very one paced late.
Moderate beginning, settled rear division on rails, raced 6 to 7Ls back throughout, inside runs turning, made no serious progress in straight.
Pressed on to take up position at leaders girth, shaded inside horse on bend, continued to lead up turning and held front to 150 M, lost advantage but kept on nicely.
Restrained from a wide gate, no better than 4 wide throughout at rear, without cover, still 7Ls or so back turning, didn't figure.
Ideally positioned in 1 out 1 back slot, 2Ls away with every chance to bend, found little under pressure and dropped out easily. (See Racing Incidents - didn't back up.)
Standard jump, settled 2 wide in behind midfield 6 to 7Ls away, 3 wide with cover on circle, kept improving turning, put in usual honest finish making good ground to be nearest on line.
Taken back from outside alley, settled 5Ls back in 2 wide line behind midfield, lost position on bend, well back and held up to 250 M, clear only when too late.
Began well, assumed new role in front, shaded by outside horse throughout, severe check 700 M, recovered to be not far down turning, kept on OK in straight without quickening.
No speed, checked early, ended up back last 8Ls off speed, joined 3 wide line on bend, came widest in straight, closed fairly before run ended at 200 M.
Settled 3Ls back on rails, had an easy time throughout, run appeared on turning in, closed off nicely when in clear and was a place chance to inside 100 M when peaked on run.
Restrained from an awkward draw, raced 4 to 5Ls away on rails, took inside runs and challenged at 200 M, held lead until shadows of post when overhauled.
Dropped in behind midfield, shaken up rounding the home turn, made even progress inside 300 M but offered little threat to the first two.
Broke well, handily placed in the group chasing the leaders, quickened up well on straightening, no match with the winner but kept up good work to the finish.
Ridden along to hold a rail position ahead of midfield, stayed on inside 300 M but not pace to seriously challenge.
Jumped well, showed early speed and helped force the pace alongside leader, driven from 300 M but found nothing under pressure, weakened tamely inside 100 M.
Restrained to a midfield position early, urged along passing 800 M to stay closer to the pace, picked up strongly once clear and swiftly went to the front 150 M out. Won going away.
Towards the rear, outpaced passing halfway and made no impression on straightening. Never a factor.
Vigorously ridden in early stages to lead and set a decent pace upfront, pressed on by another runner throughout, kept on till giving out passing 150 M.
In midfield along the fence, shifted out to 2-wide making the home turn, kept grinding away inside 300 M without being able to reach the winner.
Never better than midfield, pushed wide on making the turn, ridden from 400 M but gave little response. Never dangerous.
Nudged along to obtain a forward position, unable to shift in and raced 3-wide without cover, ran on in straight but lacked the finishing pace of the first two. Lost out on 3rd close home.
Slow to begin but soon crossed to the fence and pushed forward to obtain a position behind midfield, kept on one paced till finding no extra inside 150 M.
Ridden along down the back straight but couldn't muster speed, detached in last throughout and was 10Ls behind passing 400 M, made no progress in straight and was soundly beaten.
Settled with the backmakers, 2-wide with cover. Made late ground out wide after taking some time to wind up.
Throughout the race travelled wide and without cover in a midfield position. Never likely.
Went forward after the 1400 M when unable to obtain cover while racing 3 deep. Managed to box seat along the fence passing the 1200 M. Gave in quickly approaching the furlong.
Led soon after the start. Pinched a break from the field by the 800 M, had a breather soon after, but couldn't capitalize and was collard over the concluding stages.
Raced midfield the rail. Came deep on the home turn and ran on satisfactorily.
Raced 2 deep, midfield with cover. Failed to close off.
Took up a prominent role behind the leaders along the paint. Peeled out prior to the 200 M and commenced to grind home hitting the front near the 50 M, but was mowed down in the shadows of the post.
Settled at the back on the fence. Recovered well from being checked off heels at the 1400 M and the 800 M, charged home down the outside in the final stretch to grab victory close to the wire.
Travelled at the tail of the field. Was a beaten horse a long way from home.
Began awkwardly, blundered and lost ground settling midfield the fence. Never accelerated when pressured turning for home and gave ground over the latter stages.

Was checked at the start and also the 1400 M, settling behind midfield the paint. Peeled out early in the straight but only struggled to line despite again being checked off heels in the run to the line.
Showed some early speed to race with the leader before settling in 3rd position 1 off. Was unable to sustain its effort weakening over the final 150 M.
Sat 2-wide at midfield through to the home turn and was 4Ls down on straightening. One-paced to conclude.
Trapped wide towards rear throughout. Never a factor.
Travelled 3-wide without cover behind midfield through to the home turn and was 5Ls back into home straight. Ran on fairly.
Away in line and sat within 3Ls of the pace on fence. Made a strong run down the centre of the straight but no hope with the winner. Snatched 2nd late.
Slow to begin and was soon taken to race at rear on fence. Took inside run and was 7Ls behind the pace rounding the bend. Made up minor ground.
Prominent spot through to the home turn. Soon outrun by the winner but stuck on until overhauled by the 2nd closing stages.
2-wide behind midfield early and middle stages. Under pressure from 500 M but failed to improve.
Behind midfield on fence through to the home turn and was 5Ls away turning in. Made some headway late.
Soon in the front rank. Eased to sit within 3Ls of the pace in a 2-wide position through to the home turn. Maintained position thereafter.
Always at rear. No impression. (Substantial amount of blood in horse's trachea, lame next day.)

Began well but not enough speed to lead out. 3-wide without cover ahead of midfield first turn. Strode forward passing 900 M and tracked leader one-off the fence 700 M out. Couldn't follow through in the straight.
Quickly away. Ridden to work across and took lead on fence 1000 M out. Built a 2Ls gap and dominated final furlong.
4Ls back in 6th out 2-wide at the 1200 M, pressured to loop forward without cover from the 600 M, 1L back in 3rd off last bend, tired soon after.
8Ls last and briefly 3-wide no cover at 1000 M, 7Ls last turning for home, recovered minor late ground between a few beaten rivals. (Questioned.)
3-back the fence midfield or better between 3Ls and 4Ls from the speed, had his chance to at least place, one-paced to conclude.
Led before handing up to the winner before the 1200 M, box-seated on fence in 4th until last bend, had every chance, lacked a decisive turn of foot. (Tactic questioned.)
3-wide no cover before taking up 2nd out 2-wide from the 800 M to last turn, lacked any acceleration when it counted.
Mostly 9th with cover between 5Ls and 6Ls from the pace before final turn, briefly loomed a place chance at the 200 M, couldn't follow through.
One from rear on fence about 6Ls behind leader at 1200 M, 5Ls down on straightening, kept on well along the inner to nick 4th late on.
Squeezed up at the start, midfield and 5Ls back at 1000 M, looped forward from the 500 M, 2Ls back and vying for 2nd at 200 M, kept on for a place.
A close 3rd at the 1000 M, ridden along just over 2Ls back in 5th off final curve, found nothing under pressure, eased down close home.
Slowest out and soon one from rear about 7Ls off the pace, much the same taking last turn, no danger. (Tactic questioned.)
No early speed, 4-back on rails 5Ls off speed in midfield from halfway to home turn, stayed on best of the rest but no real threat to the winner.
Made virtually all, led by 1L at the 1200 M, skipped 2Ls clear at top of home straight, always doing enough to score.
Broke well but soon eased back to 5th, handily placed before checking badly 500 M out, 3Ls back off last bend, steadily wilted from the scene.
Broke well disputing early pace, eased back to box-seat from 800 M to last bend, picked up well to lead about 100 M out, readily.
4-back on rails at least 5Ls from the speed before final bend, recovered some good late ground for 4th, never nearer.
Wide no cover throughout, always on the pace, disputing the lead turning in, headed by winner about 100 M out, lost 2nd on line, still a good run.
Around midfield and some 3Ls back until halfway, badly checked 500 M out, 10th turning for home, stayed there.
Worse than midfield from wide gate, briefly without cover down the back, 4-wide (widest) when 5Ls off lead, only made up minor late ground.
Keen early on when behind midfield, badly checked 500 M out and 7Ls back in 11th off last turn, no impression, diagnosed a roarer again.
Pressed on to lead by 1L about 900 M out, disputing the lead on the fence off last curve, yielded ground quickly inside final 200 M.
3-back the fence in midfield about 4Ls off speed before home turn, switched out to challenge, outpaced by the winner and just nicked 2nd final strides.
Midfield and 3Ls behind early speed, left without cover on the circle and still 3Ls off spinning for home, gradually faded out of the picture.
Away well from wide gate, in the front trio within 1L of the pace before the last bend, still every chance of at least a place at the 200 M, faded late on.
Slowest out losing 1L immediately, green early on, in last place throughout and never competitive.
Pushed to hold the rail in midfield, 2-1/2Ls off the leaders, benefited by the fast pace and the rail-run, ran on until 200 M flattened.
Hard ridden early but failed to muster, trapped 4 to 5-wide in midfield throughout and lost too much ground, dropped off 400 M.
Hard ridden to obtain a prominent spot, 1-1/2Ls behind the leaders 2-wide, not suited by the fast tempo, no turn of foot in straight.
Hard ridden forward, sat outside the lead, harmed by the fast pace, closed the race off strongly until 150 flattened.
Hard ridden forward, 2-1/2Ls off the leaders 3-wide, suited by the fast pace, weakened 200 M.
Bumped start, pushed to obtain a midfield spot, 3-1/2Ls off the leaders 2-wide, favoured by the fast tempo, progressed steadily 250 M and scored.
Very awkward away, at rear, 6Ls off the leaders 2 to 3-wide, helped by the fast tempo, ran on ok in final stages.
Hard ridden early but failed to muster, trapped 3 to 4-wide in midfield throughout and lost too much ground, flattened 400 M.
Eased at start to cross at rear, 5-1/2Ls off the leaders 2-wide, benefited by the fast pace, progressed steadily 300 M to run 3rd.
Pushed to take the rail and led by 1L, not suited by the fast early sectionals, hung on until 150 M overhauled and flattened.
Eased back, 4-1/2Ls off the leaders 3-wide, suited by the fast tempo, momentarily held up 300 M, made some ground when clear.
Pushed to obtain the box seat, not suited by the fast early sectionals, ran on well to the line for 2nd.
Settled well back, kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Broke well, settled in midfield travelling mainly 2-wide down far side, remained similar turning in, fought on under pressure without threatening.
Travelled in 4th just better than midfield, in similar spot in joint 4th turning for home, kept on before fading under pressure inside final 200 M.
Settled well behind, last one turning in, ran home well for good late impression closing stages.
Settled in last few, switched wide rounding home bend, made significant progress down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.

Travelled in midfield without cover around first bend, obtained cover midway down far side, saved ground turning for home, held some chance with rails run after straightening but failed to quicken under pressure.
Broke with others, settled in 3L 3rd on rails early stages, became 4th in similar spot passing Rock, came to challenge upon straightening but unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Settled behind midfield, widest runner turning for home, fought on determinedly under pressure to prevail short of line.
Began with others, soon found cover in midfield, similar turning in, ran home one-paced.

Began fairly from a middle barrier, handed up lead to settle behind pacesetter around first bend, switched 2-wide passing Rock, hit front narrowly upon straightening, held advantage under pressure only to be headed in the shadows of the post.
Settled in midfield on rails, switched off rails at Rock making rapid progress to 3-wide spot outside leaders, remained similar into straight, kept on well in the run home. (Tactic questioned.)
Worked hard to take up running from the widest barrier attempting to make all, headed shortly after straightening, fought on hard to narrowly miss a placing.
Held up in the rear 8Ls back, waited with till 350 M, made steady progress from off the pace despite short of room over the final 150 M.
Settled beautifully off the pace and came through inside 350 M to have every chance, weakened over final stages but managed to hold on for 3rd.
Just off the pace in the chasing group, pressed on 400 M to move into a challenge position, held every chance but kept on only one-paced in the run to the line.
Never better than midfield and travelled 3-wide throughout, brought out wider rounding the final bend but was badly checked near 300 M, eased.
Behind midfield early and shuffled further back approaching the home turn, switched out to challenge and threatened wit a strong run early in straight but couldn't sustain effort final 100 M.
2-wide in mid-division, showed up well enough in straight before getting tired in closing stages.
Caught 4-wide no cover early, strode forward passing 1100 M to race outside leader, under pressure 400 M out but gave little response, faded out of contention gradually.
Placed 3-wide ahead of midfield, close up to the pace in first half but raced without cover from 800 M, found nothing when asked 350 M, weakened final 200 M.
Allowed an uncontested lead and took them along steadily, kept battling in the finish but was headed inside 100 M by the impressive winner.
Held inside running in midfield but not able to pick up on straightening, eased when no chance passing 150 M.
Towards the rear in early and middle stages, brought out widest to make his effort turning for home, stayed on but never looked like troubling the leaders.
Along the fence and travelled superbly well in the rear, emerged from off the pace inside 300 M and burst through to win this in fine style.
Alongside leader and had the benefit of an easy lead, took over approaching 400M, all out final 200M, kept on well only to be headed near the finish.
Travelled easily in behind the leading trio, moved into a challenging position passing 400M, pressed hard and cut down the leader final 50M to register his first win in Hong Kong.
Dropped back to the rear, 6Ls down passing 400M, couldn't find his stride and never got involved.
3-wide in mid-division, had every chance on straightening, ran on in his first attempt over AWT but just lacked the acceleration to seriously challenge.
Taken across behind runners after the start, raced in last about 8-9Ls behind leaders, switched wide turning for home, made some progress late on but was left with too much to do.
Settled 3-wide in the group behind leaders, picked up well enough final 300M, came close to win but was out-sprinted near the finish.
Held back to a 2-wide position near the rear, made his effort round the outside of field approaching 400M but wasn't making any ground in the home straight, eased close home.
Always behind midfield, pushed along and struggling from midway, eased final 250M, never a factor.
Restrained to a position behind midfield 2 off the fence, switched wide to challenge passing 450M, made steady progress from off the pace to finish 4th but not reached the leaders.
Never far off in the first half, struggled to keep up approaching the home turn, weakened and eased inside 200M.
Behind midfield early, inclined to hang in down the back straight, crept closer after midway to be 3Ls off leaders over the turn, plugged on in straight and never seriously involved.
Had an easy lead after jumping from the inside barrier, took them along steadily until weakening inside 400M, gradually dropped out of the race.
Hard ridden to find the lead early, couldn't cross and was trapped 3-deep throughout, driven 450m out but no progress, swamped inside 200M and weakened rapidly over the final stages.
In midfield 4Ls back, ran on well inside 400M but was momentarily steadied near 150M, would have finished closer.
Positioned with the backmakers along the fence. Battled in the final stages. A veterinary inspection after the race including an endoscopic examination showed that the horse was a "roarer".
Ridden along from an outside gate to settle behind the speed but was caught 3 wide without cover. Gave ground after the 300m.
Raced flat over the latter stages after box seating. Subsequently found to be lame in the left hind leg.
Went forward from a wide barrier to race outside the leader. Was well and truly beaten by the 400m.
Got back in the event along the rails. Peeled out early in the straight and worked to the line nicely.
Travelled in a handy spot behind the speed, 2 wide with cover. Shot to the lead at the 100m but was headed close to the winning post.
Urged forward from high draw to cross and lead on the fence. Was pressured by a runner to its outside from about the 800m, maintained a good gallop to the finish.

Settled back in the event, then made the turn awkwardly at the 800m, got its head up and lost ground, settling behind midfield 2-3 wide with cover. Eased out early in the straight and made good ground.
Raced back in the field, 3 wide with cover. Copped a check near 800m, then struggled in the final stretch.
From the outside alley, settled midfield 3 deep with cover. Straightened widest and lifted well over the last furlong to gain the ascendancy inside the last 20m.
Settled close to midfield 3 wide with cover. Kept on one paced in the final stages.
Slow to begin then was checked soon after, settling towards the rear, 3-4 wide with cover on the circle. Found little in the straight when placed under pressure.
Raced at the tail of the field 2-3 wide with cover. Kept to the inside in the run home but only plodded to the line.
Raced midfield the fence. Raced tight inside another runner approaching the 350m, ran to the wire soundly.
Began well, ended up 2-wide at midfield middle stages and was 4Ls back turning into home. One-paced to conclude.
2-wide behind leader until no extra final 300M.
2-wide at rear throughout. Never in the hunt.
Stumbled at the start and raced at rear. Improved gradually on rail and was 8Ls down leaving the bend. Made up some ground when the race was over.
Got its head up on jumping. Raced 3-wide towards rear throughout. Never a factor.
Soon took lead on fence after good jump. Held a 1L advantage turning in. Seriously challenged final furlong but kept on finding enough to keep rival at bay.
Away in line and was taken across behind runners. Took rail behind midfield passing 800M and was 5Ls off on straightening. Found nothing under pressure and passed only beaten rivals.
Slow to begin but soon hooked onto leader's back on rail 1000M out. Looked extremely dangerous when half length 2nd at 200M but failed to reel in the winner closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly. Failed to muster and trapped 3-wide ahead of midfield through to the home straight. Peaked well before the post.
2-wide behind midfield early and middle stages. Struggled home. (Substantial amount of blood in horse's trachea).
Always within 3Ls of the pace on fence through to the home turn. Hard ridden from 300M but improved only steadily. Ran to the line without serious threat to the front trio.
Fair start, ridden to race with cover within 2Ls of the pace in a 2-wide position through to the home turn. Finished off well but no hope with the front pair.
One from rear 9Ls back at 1200m; 4Ls back in 13th at last bend; briefly led 150m out; winner went past soon after.
10Ls last 1200m out; suited by a decent pace; 5Ls back but still last turning in; picked up well to lead 100m out; hung in under pressure; did enough.
1L back in 3rd at the 1200m; closer again turning for home but beaten before the 200m.
Midfield but trapped 4-wide no cover before the 600m; 2Ls down off last turn; extra work soon exacted its toll.
Midfield and 3-wide with cover down the back; responded to strong pressure to lead 300m out; one-paced late on; just missed a place.
4-back the rails about 7Ls from early speed; niggled along before last bend; never threatened to improve beyond midfield.
Midfield or better within 3Ls of the speed before home turn; given every opportunity but a pretty tame finish overall.
Disputed decent early tempo out 3-wide no cover; 1L back in 2nd at halfway; briefly led at top of home straight; soon swamped; weakened.
Set or disputed a brisk pace down back straight; still a neck clear off last bend; soon headed; wilted.
9th or 10th about 6Ls back through first half; challenged off home turn and every chance at 200m; one-paced; just missed a place.
Slowest out; 8Ls back in 12th at 1200m; same position but only 4Ls down off last bend; lacked a turn of foot and only a moderate 6th.
Towards rear about 7Ls back at 1200m; widest 6-deep off last last turn; upsides and every chance at 200m; run peaked and and all out to hold 3rd.
Didn't try to lead; 5th tracking leader on inside down back straight; 1L back 4th turning for home; beaten before the furlong pole.
Midfield on the inner about 6Ls off lead through first half; closer but without much room from top of home straight until 200m; outpaced anyway.
1L back in 3rd at the 1000m; led soon after straightening but headed 200m out; kept on well but couldn't match winner.
Midfield 4Ls off pace at the 1000m and much the same but wide off last bend; one-paced; never nearer.
Slowest out; one from rear about 7Ls back initially; still well adrift off last bend; stayed on well late to nick 3rd on the line.
Trapped 4 and 5-wide no cover down back straight; strode forward to dispute speed at halfway; petered out in the straight after the tough trip. (Tactic questioned.)
Always just behind midfield; some 5Ls back before last bend; never properly competitive.
Always rearward; struggling at halfway at least 7Ls from the lead; soon beaten and eased down late on.
Led at the 1000m; shared the lead on the inner from 800m to last turn; soon headed and one-paced to wrap up.
Eased back to a worse than midfield position; 5Ls back and under pressure at the 600m; never troubled the principals.
One from rear and 8Ls off pace at the 1000m; struggling 600m out; beaten shortly after straightening.
Lacking in early pace again and soon 10Ls last; a long way back off last bend; best work late down the centre; never nearer; may want further.
Better than midfield within 3Ls of the speed through to the last turn; no real threat to quinella pair but still only narrowly missed a place.
Caught wide but mostly with cover in midfield until halfway; soon under strong pressure and beaten before the last bend.
Away well; crossed from wide gate but keen early; tracked leader down the back straight; challenged off home turn; led 200m out; kept giving.
3-back the rails 5Ls off the speed at 1000m; a little closer turning in; had his opportunity; one-paced.
Midfield along the fence, 4Ls off the leaders, not suited by the slow tempo, no progress in straight.
Pushed early, 8Ls off the leaders on the rails, dashed well 200M despite not suited by the slow pace and made good late ground to finish 3rd.
Very slow away, hard ridden forward, 2.5Ls off the leaders on the rails, not suited by the slow pace, lacked room 300M, ran on fairly when clear.
Eased to sit in midfield, 4Ls off the leader 3 wide, not suited by the slow pace, closed the race off strongly 300M to take 2nd.
Eased to sit just off the leader 2 wide, benefited by the slow pace, ran on until 100M flattened.
Not suited by the slow tempo, never better than midfield along the fence.
Pushed forward, sat 1.5Ls off the slow pace 3 wide, ran on until 200M dropped off.
Settled just off the leader along the fence, favoured by the slow tempo, ran on well until 100M flattened.
Pushed early to take the lead by 1L at slow pace 2 wide, soon weakened 250M.
Eased back, 7Ls off the leader 3 wide, harmed by the slow pace, dashed strongly 250M to draw away with ease.
In front of midfield, 2.5Ls off the leaders 3 wide, not suited by the slow tempo, being stuck on heels 500M, no progress in straight.
Eased back, 7.5Ls off the leaders 4 wide, harmed by the slow pace, dashed well 300M, but run ended 150M.
Settled in last few, widest turning for home, produced modest progress in straight without threatening.
Soon taken back for rails run, settled towards rear to straight, remained wide turning for home, made up good ground down straight to snatch 2nd final strides.
Began with others, soon taken back to last few, remained towards rear turning in, made no impression in the run home.

Soon took up running from a wide barrier racing wide around the first bend, remained one off the rails far side with barely a length to spare, crossed to rails coming out but soon headed into straight and weakened out of contention.
Settled in forward of midfield on rails, similar swinging for home, one-paced under pressure in the run home.
Began awkwardly losing considerable ground, soon picked up along rails to travel in rear of midfield around first bend, remained similar into straight but soon faded out of contention.
Settled just worse than midfield stalking COLLECTION throughout, quickened up well to challenge upon straightening, closed rapidly to narrowly miss the placegetters.
Settled in midfield, commenced run inside final 300 M, responded well to swoop on leaders 100 M out to score impressively.
Well there on rails, remained in one-back spot turning in, kept on steadily without quickening.
Began well, settled not far off on rails, similar turning in, failed to quicken to threaten in straight.
Settled in midfield upsides of COLLECTION, commenced move rounding home bend, ran on under hard driving early in straight but outsprinted by smart winner closing stages.
Prominent, gradually improved to one-out-one-back spot far side, hit the front narrowly upon straightening only to be overhauled inside final 100 M.

Settled in 5th improving to 4th about 2Ls off the pace far side, switched out to challenge holding some chance early in straight, unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M. (Bled from both nostrils.)
Began with others, gradually taken back to settle well behind, last one turning for home, finished off race strongly.
Pushed along to obtain a forward position just behind leaders after a sluggish start, moved into a threatening position off the bend, briefly looked dangerous but run ended 200M from home.
Began awkwardly, settled towards the rear and raced greenly in his debut, hung out and covered extra ground over the turn, made some progress late on but never dangerous. (Jockey questioned.)
Held up in the rear 6Ls behind leaders, waited with till 500M, stayed on from off the pace but was never a threat to the principals.
Away with them, travelled smoothly in a spot behind midfield, crept closer and poised to strike passing 500M, picked up strongly in straight to cut down the leader in the final stride.
Showed early pace to dispute lead on the outside, driven inside 400M but was gradually outpaced final 200M. (Jockey questioned.)
Awkwardly away and stumbled after the start, recovered to race 3-wide in midfield, strongly challenged 200M out and made good impression although not able to pull out extra close home.

In chasing group just off the pace but was caught wide, quickened well and hit the front 200M, did well enough to shake off the 3rd but couldn't hold the winner who flashed past down the outside. (Jockey dropped whip 150M.)
Taken back on jumping from a wide barrier, raced in last 8Ls off the pace, shifted out to find clear running from 500M, finished well down the outside but had too much to do.
Quickly into stride, with leaders early but was held back approaching the turn, showed little response when driven in straight, faded final 200M.
Ahead of midfield never far off the pace, kept on till weakening 200M out.
Away well enough, held inside running in midfield, outpaced from 500M and not picking up in straight, eased when no chance close home.
Restrained to a 2-wide position in midfield, 4Ls down off the bend and was held up early in straight, ran on well when clear near 250M but not reached the leaders.
Jumped well from the inside barrier, led to 350M, weakened and dropped out of the race rapidly.
Up with the early pace, dropped back approaching the home turn, kept on one-paced inside 400M and found no extra over the final stages.
Tardy into stride, regathered to race 3 to 4Ls away on rails, saved ground on bend, made good ground along inside in straight to be not far away in finish.
Bounced out, pushed on racing 3 wide without cover, did it tough throughout on speed, challenged to bend, faded when hard run took toll.
Out with rest, gained a spot in running line behind midfield 6Ls back, tracked well to bend, travelled into race 3 wide and sprinted too well for rivals final 200 M to score.
Settled last best part of 10Ls back, never really looked comfortable, showed nothing at business end.
Showed usual speed to take up running, worked a bit in run with pressure from outside horses, overhauled inside 300 M and faded out.
Standard jump, 3 wide in midfield 5 to 6Ls away, had cover but did share of work in run, didn't let down in straight and weakening when steadied.
Average jump, settled in midfield 5Ls off frontrunners, no excuse in run, improved on turn, closed well when clear but just peaked on effort at 100 M. Steadied shortly after.
No early speed and faded back, raced in last few 2 wide 7 to 8Ls back, set task on circle, one paced in straight.
Showed speed, prominent throughout challenging in first 3, right there turning, soon under pressure turning and dropped right out late.
Moderate jump, mustered to hold spot behind leader, had reasonable run to bend, gained run turning but let down only fairly lacking usual finish.
Began in line, assumed nice travel 3Ls or so behind leaders, had good run to bend, made strong finishing dash from 250 M but couldn't get close last 100 M.
Got back early, raced wide at rear 7Ls back with cover, set a bit to do on bend, came wide on turning, worked home gradually final 300 M.
Slotted into 1 out 1 back spot 2Ls off speed, had chance in run, just battled away behind them at same place in straight.
Drifted back from an outside gate, raced 8Ls or so from top end, 3 wide with trail on bend, made many lengths widest in straight to take place.
Awkwardly away and soon at rear, mustered to be 6 to 7Ls down in mid-section ridden along bend, gradually weakened.
Drifted back from an awkward alley, well back 9 to 10Ls from leaders, still plenty to do on bend, made many lengths in straight.
Rolled forward to take up running, 1 to 2Ls clear throughout at a decent tempo, kicked on turning, 3L advantage at 300 M, caught at 150 M, stayed on OK thereafter.
Took up ideal spot 1 out 1 back, 3Ls or so away on bend, chased leader from 350 M and went with eventual winner but just outlasted final 100 M.
Out with them, struck heels as field settled, forced to race 3 wide without cover, did share of work to bend, didn't find much and weakened out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Went forward to settle on speed, raced first without cover 1 to 2Ls back, did a bit of work tracking leader, couldn't turn up a notch from bend and just battled in straight.
Average jump, faded back to race 3 to 4 wide behind midfield 6 to 7Ls back, had cover but used some throughout, no impression on straightening.
OK to break, raced in midfield 4 to 5Ls back, even run throughout, didn't find when asked and faded right out.
Even jump, settled 3 to 4Ls back on fence, had a soft trip to bend, into clear turning, didn't dash from 300 M and just plugged away to line.
Slotted in first behind leader, had good run to bend, 3Ls away chasing leader on turn, stopped inside 300 M, bled 2nd time.
No early speed, ended up back with last few 8Ls or so from top end, improved on bend, let down strongly making many lengths from rear to overhaul them and win comfortably.
Even jump, assumed a position 3 wide with trail 6Ls or so back, covered ground throughout, didn't let down in straight despite steadied 300 M.
Standard jump, ended up 3 wide at rear 8Ls or so, did work wide throughout despite cover, struggling turning, faded.
Never far off in the group chasing leaders, travelled strongly to bend and found plenty under urge to shake off the persistent runner up 100 M from home.
Up with the pace early, dropped back to midfield down the back straight, ridden along 450 M out but no progress, never a factor.
Made use early to go forward from the outside barrier, settled prominently behind leader entering the back straight, took over from 350 M, headed 200 M from home and weakened rapidly.
Pushed wide on the first turn, strode forward to lead them entering the back straight, under serious pressure passing 400 M, soon weakened in straight and dropped out.
Ridden along after the start, soon crossed to the fence and raced one back form leader, had every chance turning in, pushed the winner all the way until weakening in closing stages.
Assumed a midfield position along the fence, nudged along making the final turn, stayed on one-paced and could find no extra final 100 M.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield, shuffled further back approaching the home turn, 7Ls down passing 400 M, made some progress in straight but never threatened.
Travelled well enough towards the rear, improved on the outside of field passing 600 M, stayed on in the home straight for a well beaten 4th.
Dropped back from the outside barrier, raced in last few throughout, made progress 350 M out to mount a challenge, stayed on once in the clear passing 200 M.
Caught 3-wide behind midfield throughout and raced without cover from 800 M, driven 500 M out but made only limited progress from the rear.
Pushed along to hold a rail position ahead of midfield, not traveling well and was under pressure over the turn, weakened inside 300 M.
Slow to begin, towards the rear throughout, last turning in and had plenty to do, made even progress down the outside without reaching the first two.
Settled in 3rd position a few lengths behind the speed, 1 off with cover. Speared to the lead near the 150 M and was never headed.
Settled close to midfield 2-wide with cover. Had to be checked to avoid heels near the 800 M, recovered to make good late ground in the straight.
Worked forward to cross and sit outside the leader by the 600 M. Was gassed early in the straight.
Set a moderate tempo in front along the rails. Came under siege near the 400 M and battled on gamely, tiring over the final stages. (Bled.)
Travelled handily, about 3 lengths back 2 deep with cover. Closed off soundly.
Slowly away and took up a position as one of the backmakers along the fence. Failed to close off and only plodded to the wire.
Positioned 2-wide, midfield with cover. Was checked off heels at the 800 M, kept on one paced in the run to the line.
Travelled behind midfield, but was caught 3-wide without cover. Not likely.
Slow to begin, settling at the rear of the field 1 off with cover. Made good steady ground in the final stretch.
Missed the start settling behind midfield the fence. Struggled in the run home.
Settled with the backmakers 1 off with cover. Near the 800 M was checked off heels, rallied and worked home strongly.
Raced early behind the speed on the paint. Lost some ground when crowded for room after the 600 M. Angled out into the clear on straightening but gave ground despite being under strong riding.
Soon in the front rank but trapped 4-wide. Shaken up and raced outside the leader passing 700 M. Led by 2Ls turning in. Held on until overhauled by the front pair closing stages.
Towards rear early and middle stages. Struggled home.
Jumped awkwardly and raced greenly at rear throughout. Never a factor.
In the leading section early. Settled one-out-one-back from 650 M. Made steady progress in the straight and just missed out on 4th.
Poor start, ridden to race 3-wide without cover at midfield through to the home straight. Peaked final furlong. (Dynamic pharyngeal collapse.)
Raced within 3Ls of the pace near the rail through to the home straight. Responded well and ran on strongly to snatch 2nd final strides.
Pushed to hold lead on fence early. Shared lead 700 M out. Build a 2Ls gap turning into home. Couldn't sustain final furlong and just held 4th.
Began well but trapped wide. Slotted into a 2-wide position at midfield near 800 M. Took inside run and was 4Ls down turning in. Unable to turn up a notch.
Urged to race amongst leaders after start. Eased to a prominent spot from approaching the Rock. Kept chasing the leader in the straight and was nicely on top near the finish.
Travelled 3-wide behind midfield through to the home straight. Couldn't pull out extra under pressure.
Raced 2-wide behind midfield through to the home turn and was 7Ls away into final stretch. Made up good ground late and was steadied closing stages.
Steadied after start and failed to muster. Over 10Ls behind the speed rounding the bend. Beat tired runners only.
4-back on the rails towards rear some 5Ls or 6Ls from the speed, very one-paced to conclude.
Led by 1L before handing up the lead 1200 M out, box-seated from there until final turn, weak finish and no excuse.
8Ls last at the 1000 M and much the same turning for home, recovered a little late ground but no real threat.
1L back in 2nd initially, eased back to midfield from 1200 M to final turn, made no impression.
Awkwardly away, 3-wide with cover at 1000 M about 5Ls off pace, keen soon after, 4Ls down turning in, lacklustre finish.
Slowly away, raced 1L back in 2nd from 1200 M to home turn when hard ridden, weakened in final furlong.
Keen early on, 7Ls off the pace at halfway, 5-wide (widest of all) turning for home, ran on well for a place, never nearer.
In 4th or 5th mostly 3-back on the fence about 4Ls of pace before final bend, was entitled to finish closer after such a cushy run.
In 4th or so about 3Ls or 4Ls from the speed at 1000 M but all out to hold this position at the 500 M, very one-paced, dropped out.
Pressed on to lead out 3-wide no cover early on, 1L clear from half way to final turn, grabbed by the winner in shadows of post.
Left 3-wide no cover from halfway in midfield, edged closer turning for home, every chance when 2Ls back in 3rd at 200 M, one-paced to wrap up.
Slowest out and soon 8Ls last, ridden along at 1200 M, one from rear and 7Ls down turning in, finished off strongly to lead final strides.
3-back the rails in midfield 4Ls off speed through to final bend, seemed anchored by the big weight in the straight.
2Ls back in 3rd at first, struggling to maintain this proximity off last bend, one-paced in the straight but didn't totally drop away.
Didn't break well, one from rear throughout at least 7Ls from the speed.
Slowest away, worked hard out wide to lead by 1L at the 900 M, held a neck margin until the 200 M, collared by the winner in final bounds.
3Ls or 4Ls back in 5th with cover before last turn, kept on pretty well in the straight but winning post came too soon.
Keen at halfway when 6Ls off the speed, 10th turning for home, no real threat.
Awkward break, on the rails worse than midfield at least 5Ls or 6Ls from speed before last turn, recovered some minor late ground down the centre.
Midfield with cover at halfway, looped forward out wide from the 700 M to be a neck 2nd at the last bend, couldn't sustain the run.
8Ls back in rear at halfway, retrieved only minor late ground in the straight.
Box-seated in 3rd at the 1200 M, over 2Ls back in 4th turning for home, quickened up well to lead close home.
Soon led by 1L, handed up the advantage at the 1000 M, 2Ls off pace turning for home, dropped out rapidly.
Slow to muster early pace, never any better than midfield or closer than 4Ls from the lead.
Eased to sit in front of midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the leaders 2-wide, not suited by the slow pace, dropped off 500 M, checked badly 400 M.
Settled in box seat, benefited by the slow tempo, weakened 250 M.
Midfield, 5Ls off the leaders 2 to 3-wide, harmed by the slow pace, little dash in straight.
Eased at start to take cover at back, 6-1/2Ls off the leaders 2 to 3-wide, raced keenly, dashed well 200 M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Eased back, 6-1/2Ls off the leaders on the rails, not suited by the slow sectionals, dashed strongly 250 M.
In front of midfield along the fence, 3Ls off the leaders, not suited by the slow tempo, no turn of foot in final stages.
Eased to rear, raced very keenly as usual, 8Ls off the leaders 2 to 3-wide, harmed by the slow pace, demonstrated very strong finishing effort last 200 M.
At rear, 8Ls off the leaders, raced 4 to 5-wide and lost ground, harmed by the slow pace, dashed well 200 M without much threat to place getters.
Eased at start and soon took rail behind midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leaders, dashed strongly 300 M despite not suited by the slow pace, just beaten by a neck in 2nd.
Pushed to sit outside the lead, enjoyed the slow early sectionals, closed the race off strongly to win by a narrow margin.
Hard ridden forward, 2Ls off the slow pace 2-wide, dashed well 300 M, run ended 100 M.
Hard ridden to take the rail and led by 1/2L at slow early sectionals, hung on strongly until 50 M overhauled, ran on well for 3rd.
Close up, tracked leader down far side, quickened to take up running coming out, held over 1L advantage turning in, unable to sustain effort and overhauled inside final 200 M.
Settled in midfield, switched out wide for a run when straightening, soon came to challenge under pressure, tended to hang in early on before responding well inside final 200 M, did best work late.
Settled just better than midfield mainly 2-wide in 5th, carried wider turning for home, fought on well to gain upper hand narrowly.

Soon taken back to midfield from the one draw, cropped a check and lost position approaching 1000 M bend, just worse than midfield turning in, saved ground on rails making home turn, kept on well under hands and heels in tight run.
Quickly ridden to cross to front, held narrow advantage until headed coming out of back straight, plugged on under pressure from 2nd turning in but swamped inside final 200 M.
Began from a high draw, soon crossed for inside run but had to settle for 4th one-out-one-back, similar turning for home, finished off race okay. (Jockey warned for looking around in straight.)
Settled just worse than midfield, remained similar turning in, kept on steadily without quickening.
Broke well from the two draw, settled just off the pace in 3rd on rails, came under pressure turning in a 4L 4th, kept on one pace before fading inside final 200 M.
Settled well back, trailed the field to 400 M, kept on steadily without quickening.
Began awkwardly, then blundered and lost position passing winning post the first time, remained well back and not in contention thereafter.
Settled in forward of midfield on rails, switched out for a run turning for home, ran on gamely under pressure alongside eventual winner to just fail to peg him back.
Soon settled in last few from a wide barrier, went the widest runner turning into straight, made no impression.
Dropped in behind midfield and used little in running, behind horses early in straight and had to shift out for a clear run, stayed on well final 200 M.
Overcame his wide draw to lead evenly, kept on strongly in straight only to be headed 100 M from home.
Taken across behind runners, in the rear throughout and never any impression. Heavily eased final 200 M. (Bled)
Jumped well but couldn't cross and was forced wide throughout, effort 350 M out but no progress. Never a factor.
Held inside running in midfield and tracked well to bend, kept on in straight but couldn't find the extra to mount a serious challenge.
In 4th never far off the pace, held every chance turning in but was only one-paced in the finish.
On the rail behind mid-division throughout, niggled along passing 700 M, stayed on from off the pace but not reached the first three.
Tracked leaders prominently, moved into a challenge position off the home bend, came through with a strong run to lead 100 M out and stayed on the best of the leading trio.
In midfield early but was gradually taken back, 3-wide throughout and had to make his effort widest in straight, never picked up and eased inside 200 M.
Went forward on jumping from the wide barrier, placed one out one back behind leader, ran on well and came close to win but the winner found the extra in the finish.
Jumped well, held up 2-wide in midfield 4Ls back, driven inside 400 M but only kept on at the same pace.
Towards the rear, 6-7Ls down passing 400 M, no clear run early in straight, ran on well once clear. (Jockey questioned)
Drawn on the rail, saved ground on the inside chasing the pace, travelled well enough throughout but found very little in the finish, weakened rapidly final 200M.
Held inside run ahead of midfield, slipped off the fence to challenge approaching the final straight but lacked the needed response.
Lacked speed and had to be ridden along in early stages to stay in touch, over 10Ls behind approaching the final turn, swung to wide outside in straight and gave no response in the drive home.
Patiently ridden behind midfield in the first half, effort from 800M and swung widest midway on the home turn to launch his bid, stayed on and kept battling towards the finish.
Crossed to the rail halfway on the first turn and led steadily, 2Ls clear turning for home, headed 250M and faltered towards the line.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Unhurried in early and middle stages, tucked in along the rail while racing towards the rear over 10Ls behind leaders, rallied mildly along the inside final 400M but never looked dangerous.
Held up behind midfield along the fence and waited with till 350M, made even progress to 100M then drifted towards the rail while weakening over the final stages.
Raced 2-wide in mid-division, showed signs of distress approaching the entrance of final straight, soon gave way then heavily eased inside 150M. (Bled)
Saved ground early while racing along the rail in mid-division, angled to 3-wide rounding the home turn, ran on well between horses and continued willingly to the line.
Slow to begin, ended up in last over 12Ls behind leaders, advanced 4-wide making the home turn, progressed steadily from off the pace but not reached the principals.
Settled well in front of mid-division, fanned 3-4 wide over the home turn, closed strongly and had a duel with the runner-up inside 250M, fought on determinedly to prevail narrowly on the line.

Never far off the pace, moved into a challenge position approaching the entrance of home straight, dueled all the way to the line from 250M, brushed with the winner late and just missed out. (objection overruled)
Moved to the fore 2-wide and pressed the leader, had to be niggled along inside 500M and soon gave way early in straight. Finished tailed off. (Unacceptable Performance)
Struck some crowding at the start and settled behind midfield, 2 deep with cover. Peeled out early in the straight and got the runs through the field, only to come up just short.
Settled midfield and coursed 3 wide having cover on some sections of the circle. Stayed on well.
Raced in last position and failed to pass another runner throughout.
Travelled 3 deep with cover behind midfield. Produced nothing under pressure over the concluding stages.
In the early and middle stages raced keenly and after the 800m, was left racing 3 wide without cover. Not a factor.
Settled close to midfield after suffering some crowding near the 1400m. travelled fairly on the rails, but struggled in the straight.
Hustled forward from a wide alley to land in a prominent position, 2 deep with cover. Maintained a good gallop to the winning post.
Settled 3 back, 2 wide with cover after the 800m. raced to the lead at the 200m and held gamely to score a narrow win.
Settled in 2nd last position, 1 off with cover. Worked home satisfactorily.
Enjoyed the run of the race along the paint on the back of the speed. Had no excuses peaking on its run inside the 50m.
Crowded at the start but managed to roll forward and dug up to take the lead along the fence after the 1100m. Gave little in the run to the line.
Came out running from the gates and took up the lead before handing up and taking a sit near the 1100m. hit the front close to the 400m, but was a spent force in the run to the wire.
Raced 1 off midfield with cover. Made up some ground to the final furlong but only whacked away thereafter.
Raced behind midfield, always 1 off with cover. Stayed to the inside in the straight and battled to the line fairly.
Botched start. Never in contention. ("Roarer")
Good jump but couldn't work across. Sat 3-wide without cover in midfield from 1000M. Improved wide rounding the turn to track leaders. Couldn't find extra gear in the straight.
Rushed to the lead after beginning awkwardly and took the fence 900M out. Levelled tuning into home straight. Couldn't turn up a notch from there.
Soon led out. Gradually eased to one-out-one-back making the home turn. Kept giving thereafter but couldn't pose real threat to the principals.
Niggled along after start but could only stay behind midfield. 7Ls down on straightening. No hope with the winner but landed 2nd closing stages with some comfort.
Urged early to race forward. Settled 2-wide behind the leader from 900M. Led turning in but was caught by the winner at 200M. Hung on but failed to hold 2nd closing stages.
Dropped to rear on fence after start from high draw. Some improvement along the rail from 800M and was 7Ls away into final stretch. One-paced to conclude.
Crowded for room after start but soon found the rail behind midfield. 6Ls off at bend. Had some difficulty finding clear passage in the straight but kept making headway in run to line.
Raced within 5Ls of the pace in a 2-wide position through to the home straight. Made strong run from 300M to score decisively.

In the front rank early. Eased to sit 3-wide ahead of midfield at 1000M. Shifted 2-wide and was 4Ls away at bend. Dashed well top of home straight but couldn't sustain closing stages. Barely missed 4th.
Broke well, taken towards rear early and middle stages. Swung 4-wide and was 8Ls away tuning into home. Closed off well and was nearest at finish.
Amongst first to break but was soon ridden to maintain position at midfield on fence. Settled in similar spot making the home turn. Failed to quicken and passed only beaten rivals in the straight.
On fence on leader's back through to the home straight. Found nothing and faded from 300M.
Taken towards rear from high gate. 9Ls behind the speed turning in near the rail. Covered decent ground in the straight.
Keen when severely checked at the 800m when at the tail of the field; similar spot off last bend; faded out. (Bled.)
Nicely placed 3-back on the rails in 5th about 4Ls off speed before last turn; given every hope; lacked a change of gear.
Nicely handled from gate 11 to race 2-wide and 4Ls off pace in 4th at 800m; same turning for home; weakened inside final 200M.
Midfield with cover at least 5Ls from the speed before taking last curve out 3-wide; stayed on well to nick a place late on.
Good early pace from wide gate to lead by 1L on fence at the 900m; 2Ls clear turning in; grabbed by the winner 100m out; hung on for 2nd.
Hard ridden from middle gate to track the leader on fence in 3rd until home straight when pressured; responded to lead 100m out; kept on.
8Ls off pace in rear down the back; wide no cover on the circle; stayed on okay out widest down the centre but never posed a threat.
Taken back from wide gate; 9Ls off pace at halfway; recovered some decent late ground along the inner in the final stages.
Broke okay; worse than midfield some 7Ls off speed before final bend; made up some late ground down the centre without threatening.
6th with cover in midfield before straightening for home; closer at the 200m; had his chance to place inside final 50m; just missed out.
In rear at good 8Ls or 9Ls behind pace until the home turn; recovered some nice late ground; never nearer.
Tracked early pace out 1L off 2-wide in 2nd; 2Ls back in 2nd turning in; challenged on all sides final 100m but still nearly placed.
Awkward with head up through first half; hung out on the circle when about 8Ls back in 11th or so; kept chasing the majority.
Slowest away; 4-back on the rails at halfway about 5Ls off pace in midfield; lacklustre conclusion; later scoped for mucus. (Questioned for disappointing performance.)
10th and 2-wide 5Ls off speed at 1000m; pressured to get closer off last bend; briefly threatened winner 150m out; run peaked; easily held 2nd.
Raced 4-back along rails in 9th at the 1200m; about 4Ls down turning for home; never threatened quinella pair; stayed on best of the rest for 3rd.
Led early on fence; disputed decent pace or a neck 2nd until 600m; hard pressed to hold position off last turn; dropped out. (Blood in trachea.)
Trapped 3-wide no cover for the duration; 4Ls back in 5th at the 1200m but struggling to keep up turning for home and soon beaten.
Box-seated in 3rd place on the rails from the 1600m to the last bend; failed to quicken up and gone before the 200m.
Slowest away; 3-wide but with cover in midfield in middle stages; 4Ls back and still mid-div turning in; found very little off the bit.
Nicely placed in midfield and appeared to travel well until the 600m; 3Ls down and dangerous off last bend; very weak final 200M.
Raced 5-back along the rails towards rear and at least 6Ls off pace down back straight; ran on past some beaten horses in the straight. (Tactic questioned.)
Settled 8Ls or so last at the 1600m; widest and still rear turning for home; never landed a blow.
Broke well and closer than usual 3-back on the rails; 3Ls back at halfway; nearer turning in; quickened up to lead 300m out; stayed on strongly.
Disputed the lead at the 1600m; pace was solid; led by a neck at halfway but struggling before the last turn and faded out.
Rear and 3-wide but with cover at least 5Ls from the pace before the 600m; kept on at same pace in the straight; offered little threat.
Rearward at least 6Ls from the leaders at the 1200m; not much closer on straightening; ran on past a few very tired rivals.
Nicely placed in 'one-out-one-back' position in 4th from 1600m to the 1600m; 1L back in 3rd off last turn; had every chance to place.
Hard ridden forward, 2.5Ls off the leaders, trapped 3 wide, not suited by the fast pace, emptied 250M.
Eased back, suited by the fast tempo but trapped 3-4 wide, green and didn't handle turn. Never better than midfield.
Eased back, 7Ls off the leaders 3 wide, helped by the fast tempo, progressed steadily 300M to run 3rd.
Hard ridden to take a prominent spot, 1L off the leader 2 wide, used up too much fuel during the fast early sections, ran on until 100M flattened.
Pushed early but failed to muster speed to lead, 3Ls off the fast pace, trapped 4 wide throughout and lost ground, soon weakened 300M.
Midfield, 4.5Ls off the leaders 2-3 wide, helped by the fast tempo, flattened 200M.
Eased at start, 8Ls off the leaders along the fence, benefited by the fast pace, made some ground in straight.
Eased to sit in midfield with cover along the fence, 4Ls off the leaders, favoured by the fast pace, no turn of foot in straight.
Pushed early, behind midfield, 6.5Ls off the leaders on the rails, suited by the fast tempo, just ran on fairly in straight.
Midfield, 4Ls off the leaders 2 wide, benefited by the fast pace, made ground 300M and grabbed 2nd.
Eased back, 8Ls off the leaders 2 wide, benefited by the fast pace, no progress in final stages.
Pushed to occupy the box seat, traveled nicely during the fast early sectionals, kicked away 200M to win.
Led by 1L along the fence at fast early sectionals, hung on until 200M weakened.
Pushed early, only maintained a spot behind midfield, 6.5Ls off the leaders 2-3 wide, suited by the fast tempo, just ran on fairly in last quarter.
Settled one from last far side before trailing the field around the bend, switched out turning in, finished off race strongly down the centre of the straight to snatch 3rd final strides.
Travelled wide without cover in prominent spot far side, shuffled back to midfield around the bend, faded out of contention in straight.
Gradually took up running and led by half a length to straight, soon headed after straightening, faded gradually.
Soon taken back to race in worse than midfield, travelled wide around the bend and into straight, failed to make any impression in the run home.
Broke well from a wide draw, gradually moved across to settle outside leader, remained same turning in gaining slender advantage momentarily 200 M out, fought on gamely for 2nd.
Settled in just worse than midfield, came to challenge shortly after straightening, quickened up under pressure to hit front passing 100 M, won readily.
Close up on rails, travelled in 3rd within 2Ls of pace making home bend, hit front under pressure momentarily 200 M out, soon swamped.
Settled just better than midfield, faded steadily out of contention from 5th into straight.
Settled well back, saved ground turning in, ran home one-paced.
Travelled on rails in midfield, similar turning in saving ground on rails, shifted out gradually to obtain clear passage 200 M out, kept on strongly to the line.
Slowly away but not hurried, behind horses in the upper stretch but came through strongly to briefly lead inside 200M, outpaced by the impressive winner but continued on well to secure 2nd.
Quickly moved to the lead, set even pace upfront and led them till 250M, came up empty under pressure and steadily tired thereafter.
Prominent down the back straight, sat back turning into straight, challenged inside 350M and put in a mild finish between horses before turning flat close home.
Fractious in stalls and gave others a big start, recovered to race in last pair, driven inside 400M but no progress, never a factor.
Behind midfield 4Ls back, 3-wide turning into straight, made steady progress down the outside but made little impression on the runaway winner.
Pursued the leaders throughout, held every chance turning in but run ended near 150M then faded away.
Chased the pace in the 2nd flight, kept to the fence throughout, briefly threatened early in straight before weakening inside 200M.
Held up in midfield, ridden along off the home turn but found disappointingly little in the finish, eased final 100M. (Blood in trachea)
Went forward as expected and helped forcing the pace on the outside, struggled to sprint with them passing 400M and dropped rapidly out of contention.
Patiently ridden and settled in the rear group 6Ls off the pace, went for a gap on the inside and made good headway inside 250M to take 3rd on the line.
Settled 2-wide behind mid-division, checked near 600M then held up early in straight, angled out into clear and produced a strong finish inside 200M. Never nearer.
Dropped back to last few 5Ls behind leaders, fanned 3-wide into the straight, driven 400M out but took time to muster speed, stayed on towards the line.
Settled in midfield along the inside, tracked well into the straight, held up to 300M but came through with a devastating turn of foot, drew 2Ls clear and cruised home.
Assumed a position in midfield and raced 3-wide into the home turn, rallied well inside 300M and was just edged out to 4th in a close finish.
Began with first few, went on to sit behind pace pair, 1 out 1 back, had an even trail with speed on, challenged at 300 M and lead inside 200 M, overtaken in final strides.
Standard jump, just worse than midfield on rails, 6 to 7Ls back throughout, saved ground on bend, closed soundly final 300 M to be closest on line.
Fractious in gates, began well enough, held spot first behind leader throughout, in behind horses turning until 300 M when forced clear, responded well under hard riding to claim victory late.
No early speed, back with last few 10Ls off pair, had plenty to do when still last turning, passed a few tired runners late.
Hard ridden from an outside alley to race alongside leader, applied pressure to inside horse throughout, used plenty to bend, faded out from 300 M.
Fastest out, led easily but challenged by outside horse throughout, set a strong speed in mid-section, held a 1/2 length turning, headed at 200 M and could only hold ground thereafter.
Fair getaway, ended up in midfield 5Ls back in running line, came 3 wide at 600 M and 4 wide turning, looked a place chance at 300 M but tired inside final furlong.
Fair getaway, raced 3 to 4Ls away on rails, had an easy run in mid-section, didn't display a pick up in straight and just battled to line.
Away well, allowed to drop into a midfield spot, 4Ls back in running line, progressed 3 wide from 600 M, in 3 way battle from 300 M, just couldn't match first two inside 100 M.
Slotted in behind midfield from an awkward alley, raced 6 to 7Ls off speed throughout, improved wider on bend, closed best of rest to be nearest at finish.
Took up a good spot 3Ls back in running line following speed, even run to bend, unable to respond to riding from turn and faded cheaply.
Drifted back from the widest alley, raced at rear 8Ls or so from top end, still well back to turn, made some late ground from well back but never looked likely.
Steadied early, soon at rear, detached early more than 12Ls back, never got much closer.
Rear division on rails best part of 10Ls from lead, saved ground throughout, no response at business end.
Amongst first few out, pushed on in search of front, battled for lead and drew well clear of rest, 3 to 4Ls clear at 400 M, stopped quickly final furlong. (Saddle shifted.)
Fractious in stalls and awkwardly away, ended up in rear division, had pace on to suit but still well back to bend, didn't find and struggled in straight.
Well enough away, held rails first behind leader, not aided when speed went on, kept improving on bend, held up turning and checked at 200 M, just kept on when finally clear.
Began OK, faded back when unable to get in, 8Ls or so away in running line throughout, helped by strong speed, responded well final 300 M to close over top of rivals.
Out in line, midfield 6 to 7Ls back in mid-section, had ideal run with speed on, lacked usual pick up from 400 M and just closed steadily before run ended at 150 M.
Faded back from outside alley, more than 12Ls away at rear, helped by strong tempo, under riding from 400 M but really only made useful progress last 200 M when too late.
Even getaway, raced 5Ls or so back in front of midfield, had no excuses to bend, kept on in straight without quickening. Sound with weight.
Little speed, raced back with last few, still 10Ls down on circle, gradually wound up and pulled plenty of ground back late to make frame.
Reasonable break, settled down in midfield 3 wide 7Ls or so away, had cover in mid-section, kept finding in straight and closed soundly but couldn't hold off finish of winner.
No early pace, back in usual role near to rear 12Ls or more from leaders, aided by strong tempo, saved ground and made remarkable progress in straight to take place.
Out in line, pushed on but posted 3 wide without cover 6Ls back, a bit keen and forced to do too much with fast pace on, struggled final 300 M.
Awkward jump, regathered to race 4Ls or so away on rails, not asked in mid-section, under pressure turning and faded out in straight.
Average jump, showed plenty of speed to lead, pressured and drew well clear in battle with outside horse, struggling to keep touch on bend, folded quickly 300 M.
