Began smartly, trailed pace pair, chance harmed with strong pace on, carted field up on bend, didn't go on from 250 M and dropped off thereafter. (Mild blood in trachea.)
Contested the pace on the outside, continued on final 300 M but couldn't find the extra to seriously challenge. Just missed out on 3rd.
Held inside running in midfield, held up while approaching the entrance of home straight, ran on final 200 M to take 3rd on the line.
Taken across behind runners after the start, towards the rear throughout and failed to make any late impact.

Unable to cross from a wide draw, dropped back to mid-division 3-wide without cover, came wider turning into straight and lacked the needed kick when asked. (Jockey reminded not to cover unnecessary ground.)
Raced handily behind leaders while 2-wide, had his chance but run ended passing 200 M and weakened rapidly.
Sped to the early lead, dueled on the back straight but emerged as the clear leader turning for home, kept on well but couldn't withstand the winner's late charge from inside 150 M.

Placed ahead of midpack, shifted out on the final turn and moved to a striking position passing 400 M, made up some ground but was not a serious threat. (Jockey questioned re his riding in straight / Blood in trachea.)
Drawn wide but soon crossed to a midfield position one off the fence, ran on one-paced before finding no extra in the closing stages.
Checked at the start, lacked any speed and raced a long way off the pace in detached last, crept closer passing 500 M, ran on mildly but never factored.
Settled in good position behind leader and travelled strongly throughout, quickened well when asked and gained the lead inside 100 M to win going away.
Behind midfield and not hurried in early stages, saved ground along the inside, made even progress inside 300 M and battled willingly from between rivals to the line.
Restrained to a rearward position, 6Ls down in a very unpromising position turning in and gave no response under urge.

Began awkwardly then a short distance later was crowded for room. Coursed wide early but managed to camp on the back of the speed 1 of with cover. Copped a heavy bump near the 800 M, found nothing under pressure.
Went forward on the rail to make every post a winner and scored a handy win after kicking well clear final 300 M.
Travelled midfield, 3 deep with cover. Came wide in the straight but only plodded to the line.
Left the gates on terms, traveling 3 back the paint. Ran on soundly.
Settled towards the rear, 2-wide with cover. Worked home steadily.

Showed good gate speed to land in a forward position but after being caught came back in an endeavor to find cover eventually settling with the backmakers, 3 deep with cover. Was flat when asked for an effort in the run home.
Wide for most of the trip, failed to gain cover while placed close to the pace, not likely.
Settled around midfield, 1 off with cover. Got strung up close to heels near the furlong but never really made much impression after shifting out in the clear passing the furlong.
Settled midfield the fence. Kept on one paced in the final stretch.
Snagged back at the start to settle in last position. Struck interference near the furlong and was never a factor thereafter.
Travelled with the tail enders on the rail. Made good ground late along the inside.

Began well then tracked the leader along the paint. Commenced to race keenly after the 800, shifted to the one off line before resuming a position with cover behind the pace setter. Battled away to hold onto 3rd.
Slow to begin and raced at rear on fence. 9Ls behind the speed on straightening. Made up good ground top of home straight. In traffic problems at 100 M and was not fully tested.
Urged along the fence to stay behind midfield. 6Ls back at bend. Picked up gradually in the straight. Hung in under pressure at 150 M and resumed fairly well.
Always at rear. Eased down approaching the home straight. (Irregular heart rhythm.)
Trapped wide in the leading section early and middle stages. Raced outside leader making the home turn. Emptied final 200 M.
Hard ridden on fence after start. Settled within 3Ls of the pace through to the home turn. Hit front from 200 M. Won going away.
Broke nicely. Eased to race within 2Ls of the pace from 1000 M. Well positioned to strike in the straight but failed to follow through.
Trapped wide at midfield through to the home turn and was 4Ls down into final stretch. Ran on steadily thereafter.
Good jump. Pushed early to hold rail and shared the lead 1000 M out. Swamped final furlong.
3-wide at midfield early. Shifted 2-wide and was 4Ls down making the home turn. No hope with the winner and gave plenty to hold 2nd closing stages.
Pressed early and trapped 4-wide in the leading section first turn. Raced with leaders in a 2-wide position passing 800 M. Behind pace rounding the turn. Found nothing in the straight.
Raced towards rear on fence throughout. No impression.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. 8Ls away turning in. Covered substantial ground down the centre of the straight. Nearly figured in quinella.
Slowest out and switched inside from wide gate, soon 9Ls last, ridden along to get closer at 500 M, ran on past a few beaten rivals late on.
Led by 1L at the 1200 M, pace was solid, still 1L clear off last turn but headed about 150 M and soon swamped.
Taken back from wide gate, one from rear 8Ls off pace at halfway, ran on very well out wide (defying bias) in straight, post came a stride too soon.
Box-seated in 3rd at the 1200 M and still 2Ls down turning in, petered out meekly.
3-back the fence at 1200 M, niggled along on the circle for home, picked up to lead 150 M out, all out to barely hang on.
5-back the rails in 10th at the 1200 M, 7Ls off pace at the 600 M, never really landed a blow.
3Ls back in 4th out 2-wide at the 900 M, upsides and looked to have every chance 200 M out, run peaked but still managed to place.
In 9th out 2-wide at the 1000 M, 6Ls off the lead spinning for home, no impression.
3-wide no cover 1300 M out, pressed on to be 2-wide and 1L back in 2nd behind decent pace at 1000 M, struggling in 2nd turning in, weakened.
Around midfield but 3-wide no cover for the duration, 5Ls or so off pace from halfway to final turn, dropped out soon after the tough trip.
4-back the fence in 8th at the 1000 M, recovered some minor late ground for 4th.
5Ls back in midfield at the 800 M and much the same turning for home, one-paced to wrap up.
Away well, always prominent, 1L clear and going well turning for home, kicked clear, always in command.
1L behind early pace, midfield and 4Ls off lead when left 3-wide no cover on the circle, no real danger in the straight.
Couldn't lead and 3-wide no cover before getting in 2-wide at the 600 M, 2Ls back in 4th off last bend, kept on fairly in the straight for 5th.
Always rearward, 9Ls last at the 700 M, no danger.
Vied for early pace, 5th when steadied 600 M out, about 4Ls down in 6th turning for home, one-paced.
Always behind midfield, 2Ls down at the 800 M and 4Ls away at the last turn, offered little in the finish.
Went back and raced 4-back on the rails at the 600 M, kept on fairly well for 4th in the straight but of no great threat to placed runners.
Didn't break well, very wide without cover down back straight, 6Ls back in 10th off last bend, never a factor.
Tried to lead solo but couldn't, worked hard to lead by a neck at 600 M, 1L back in 2nd at the last turn, soon faded out.
Went back from a wide gate, shared last place about 8Ls off speed at the 600 M, never got any closer thereafter.
Always to the fore, box-seated on fence in 3rd at halfway, stayed on well for 2nd but had little chance with the winner.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Bumped start, pushed to sit in midfield along the fence, 5Ls off the leader, benefited by the fast pace, momentarily held up 4-2, progressed steadily when clear and scored with narrow margin.
Hard ridden early but didn't muster, 3Ls off the leader 2-wide, benefited by the fast pace, held up 4-2, made ground when clear.
Pushed to occupy the box seat, not suited by the fast early sectionals, ran on well to the line, just beaten by a short head in 2nd.
Hard ridden forward, 2Ls off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the fast tempo, ran on until 100 M flattened.
Slow away, pushed to hold the rail in midfield, 3Ls off the leader, favoured by the fast tempo, made ground early straight, blocked 200 M, not fully tested.
Hard ridden forward, 1-1/2Ls off the leader, trapped 3-wide throughout, harmed by the fast pace and lost too much ground at bends, emptied 250 M.
Eased back, 5Ls off the leader 2-wide, helped by the fast pace, just ran on fairly in final stages.

Pushed to sit 2-1/2Ls off the fast pace, trapped 3 to 4-wide throughout and lost ground, closed the race off strongly despite not suited by all negative racing situations, just missed win by half a length in 4th.
Eased to rear, 7-1/2Ls off the leader along the fence, benefited by the fast pace, progressed steadily 300 M, lacked room 200 M.
Eased to rear, more than 9Ls off the leader 2-wide, favoured by the fast tempo, made ground steadily 250 M and took 3rd.
Hard ridden to take the rail and led by 1-1/2Ls at fast early sectionals, hung on strongly until 150 M overhauled and flattened.
Hard ridden to keep up in midfield, 4Ls off the fast pace, trapped 3-wide throughout and lost ground, ran on ok in straight.
Wide in better than midfield early, rolled closer up before coming back to 2L 4th far side, one-paced when rider lost rein over 200 M out, made no impression closing stages.
Soon settled well back, kept on steadily under pressure down centre of straight without quickening.
Settled in midfield, saved ground turning in, kept on one pace without quickening under pressure.
Settled in one-out-one-back spot in 2nd, soon weakened out of contention after straightening.
Towards rear, met interference around stables bend, remained in last few on rails to straight, switched out for run after straightening, briefly baulked inside final 200 M, finished off race well.
Midfield on rails when badly hampered and lost about 4Ls around stables bend dropping towards rear, similar in last few turning in, fought on steadily down straight to be nearest at finish.
Given reminders early to muster speed, settled one back in 3rd on rails, shaken up upon straightening, ducked out under pressure 200 M out, kept on well to the line.

Travelling just off the speed when hampered and lost about 2Ls coming out of home straight, settled in 5th on rails within 3Ls of pace, soon came to challenge in straight and not panicking when tight in running 200 M out, won cosily.
Raced wide in last few after beginning from the widest draw, remained similar turning for home, did not find much room behind drifting runner the length of straight, kept on well to finish.
Better than midfield early, involved in scrimmaging on stables bend, travelled in midfield down far side, wide turn, kept on before fading under pressure inside final 200 m.
Raced wide in rear of midfield, similar turning in, fought on steadily without threatening.
Soon took up running after beginning from the middle draw, attempted to make all holding half a length advantage to straight, held on under pressure before swooped on by smart winner close to home.
Tracked the leaders inside and well placed to strike nearing 350 M, responded well to urging and gained the lead 200 M from home , won with something in hand.
Taken back to last few and fanned 3-wide into home straight, made his move 400 M out but could not offer the necessary response.
Never better than midfield, raced 2-wide and 4Ls off the pace, effort from 350 M out but little progress only.
Patiently held up in 2nd last and used little throughout, 6Ls down over the home turn, made good progress from off the place in straight and finished never nearer.
Behind midfield and saved ground along the inside, driven passing 350 M but gave very little response. No impression.
Dropped back and taken across to the fence, raced in last 8Ls off the pace, switched wide to challenge on straightening and progressed evenly down the outside without reaching the principals.
Caught widest making the first turn, gradually strode forward to lead on the outside from 1000 M, had a short lead into straight and was soon headed then weakened in the finish.
Raced 3-wide without cover in midfield, came under serious pressure making the final turn, soon gave way and left behind. (Unacceptable Performance.)
Overcame an ordinary start to take up early running but was pressed from 1000 M, headed inside 200 M but kept on willingly to hold 2nd.
Soon hugged the rail, travelled well enough in mid-division, driven 350 M and made a mild rally to the line.
In 5th never far off the steady pace, came out in the straight and challenged strongly final 200 M to just miss out on 2nd.
Made some use early to go forward from the widest barrier, chased leaders in 3rd before weakening 250 M from home.
Awkwardly away, settled 2-wide in mid-division, 5Ls to make up passing 400M but not able to quicken in the drive home. (Mucus.)
No early speed, raced at the back over 8Ls away, fanned 4-wide into the straight and soon left behind. No impression.
In mid-division but had to be niggled along to stay in touch, pushed 4-wide making home turn and never factored in the finish. Eased.

Quickly into stride, led briefly down the back stretch then tracked leader one out one back, stayed on well to hit the front 100M from home and found enough to hold off the fast finishing 2nd in closing stages.
Even break, angled to a 2-wide position in midfield, raced keenly in middle stages, ran on inside 400M but couldn't find the extra to seriously challenge.
Went forward from an outside barrier, crossed to the lead near 900M and set an even pace up front, continued on willingly inside 400M only to be headed in late stages.

Keen in early stages, travelled wide down the back straight then pulled his way forward to be 4th turning into straight, gradually got into the race and came with a late surge inside 200M to finish within a neck from the winner.
Slowly away, ended up in a rearward position 6-7Ls back and was difficult to settle making the home turn, taken wide to make his move inside 400M, stayed on without reaching the leaders.
Well enough away, settled in 5th ahead of midpack, lacked a finishing kick when required and offered no threat to the principals.
Tracked leaders along the fence and always within striking distance, driven hard inside 300M but couldn't close the gap on leaders.
Never better than midfield, saved ground on the inside but couldn't pick up when asked passing 500M, eased when no chance final 150M.
Slow to begin, raced towards the rear and was difficult to settle at times, angled out for a run passing 400M but found very little in the finish.
Camped on the back of the speed near the outside fence. Had every chance.
Settled with the backmakers towards the outside. Failed to quicken at any stage.
Showed plenty of early dash to spear forward in the middle of the course. Held on gamely to finish in the frame.
Travelled about 3 back towards the middle of the course. Maintained a steady gallop right to the post.
Raced towards the centre of the track in a midfield position. Struggled in the final 400m.
Copped a check at the start settling midfield. Made constant ground whilst shifting in after the furlong and ran to the line gamely.
Badly checked at the start settling a long last. Made some late ground along the grandstand side.
Always travelled like the winner down the centre of the course about 3 lengths of the leaders. Responded nicely to pressure and struck the lead at the 100m and was never headed.
Parked behind the speed. Shifted towards the outside in the final stages and worked to the line evenly.

Shifted out very abruptly at the start causing interference to a number of runners to its outside. Eventually settled behind the speed on the outside fence, tired noticeably in the run home. (To trial.)
Sent forward to lead down the outside. Commenced to tire quickly after the 300m. (Pulled up distressed.)
Recieved a solid check at the start and never fully recovered settling towards the rear. Passed some tiring runners close to home.
Settled midfield after being severely checked at the start. Was well beaten joining the course proper.
Showed nice early speed to take up a prominent position towards the outside. Fought on gamely when challenged from the 400m, tiring on its efforts close to home.
Always in midfield. Ran on steadily to the line.
Raced within 3Ls of the speed near the stand's rail. Quickened well when pressed from 300M to score a narrow victory.
Raced within 2Ls of the speed. Urged from 450M. Kept on without serious threat to the front trio. Made frame at finish.
Rolled towards the centre of the track from low draw early. Parked midfield at 700M. Ridden from 500M but found nothing.
Tracked leader on the far side after start. Picked up nicely 300M from home. Just failed to fend off the front pair final strides.
In the front rank near the stand's rail early. Couldn't turn up a notch when asked passing 400M. Emptied 200M.
At rear early. Shifted in for clear run down the centre of the track and made some headway passing 450M. Couldn't find extra thereafter.
Travelled nicely in the front rank on the stand's side. Ran on strongly and looked a good chance final 50M. Was nailed right at the line.
Sat 4Ls behind leader near the stand's rail. Ridden from 450M and made up some ground when the race was over.
Always behind midfield. No impression.
Slow to begin and raced towards rear. Under pressure 450M out but kept one-paced.
Led on the far side from low draw until overhauled by the principals closing stages. Not beaten far.
Raced forward along the stand's rail. Still in front until dropped out 300M from home. (Lame right front leg morning after.)
Raced inside the leader on the far side until weakened passing 400M.
Raced 10th and 2-wide some 6Ls behind early pace; steadied at 500m and held up from 400m to 300m; one-paced when clear.
Pressed forward from wide gate to dispute lead at 1000m and lead by 1L on fence at 800m; headed again at top of straight; faded out very quickly.
2-wide and 1L back in 2nd at the 1000m; still right there off the last bend; very weak to conclude.
3-wide with cover and 5Ls back in 8th at 1000m; niggled to take closer order at 200m; responded best and led 50m out; kept on.
Best away; led by 1L on fence at 1200m; headed soon after and soft trail in 3rd until last bend; 1L back in 2nd at 200m; tired late and missed a place.
Worse than midfield mostly in 11th throughout; at least 6Ls from the pace; yielded ground on the run-in to the line.
Midfield on the rails down the back straight; slightly closer 3Ls off lead turning for home; didn't find much off the bit.
Keen early on; left wide no cover for most of back straight; always rearward; seemed quite reluctant to stretch out in the straight.
Handily placed either in box-seat or 3-back the rail before final turn; picked up nicely to lead 300m out; grabbed by the winner about 50m out; held 2nd.
Awkward break; better than midfield within 2Ls or 3Ls before before straight; had every chance to at least place; tended to hang under pressure.
3-wide with cover when checked 900m out and left without cover soon after on the circle; 3Ls down turning in; soon beaten.
Messy start; towards rear through first half of race; improved tracking runner-up GO STITCH along inner turning for home; all out to get 3rd.
Midfield with cover 4Ls off pace at halfway; pressured to maintain this proximity turning for home; could only hold his ground.
Settled 8Ls last at the 1000m; still last and 6-wide (widest) turning for home; good late ground down the centre of the track; nearly nicked a place.
Slowly away; on the inner 5Ls off pace at 1000m; 4Ls back in 6th off last bend; kept on okay for a place.
Good pace to cross from wide gate to settle 3rd at 1200m; 2Ls back at 800m and 1L down off last turn; led 250m out; soon in charge; unchallenged.
6Ls behind leaders down back straight; hard ridden to stay this close 700m out; kept on very dourly at the same pace in the straight.
Box-seated or 3-back the rails in 5th down the back straight, 3Ls off lead in 4th off last bend; had his chance to place; lacked the turn of foot.
Wide without cover for some of the backstretch; 3Ls back in 4th at halfway and same off last bend; weakened sharply final 200m after extra work.
Over-raced while 4Ls back in mid-div at 1000m; hard pressed to remain in touch off last bend; steadily faded out of the picture.
3-wide with cover and behind midfield through first half; 5-wide turning in when 7Ls adrift of leaders; one-paced and no threat in the finish.
Quietly ridden; 8Ls last at halfway; similar margin behind turning for home; briefly loomed a place chance at the 200m; run peaked.
Failed to muster customary early pace; 3-wide with cover in midfield 5Ls off pace at halfway; never got any closer than this.
Went back as usual; 12th at the 800m; still at least 7Ls from the lead taking last bend; never likely to improve better than midfield.
Led early on before handing up the advantage at the 1000m; about a neck back in 2nd from 800m to last turn; soon left behind.
Bumped at start; 8Ls last initially; 5-wide and still in rear turning for home; hung in under pressure; but still kept on past most of the field for 4th.
Pressed on out wide with cover to lead by 1L at 1000m; vied for the lead from 800m to last turn; headed 250m out and swamped late on.
Lacked early pace; niggled along in 12th on inside at 1200m; 5Ls back off last bend; stayed on best of the rest but never likely to grab the winner.
Eased back, 7.5Ls off the leader 3 wide, not suited by the slow pace, no progress.
Eased to sit in front of midfield, 4Ls off the leader 2 wide, not suited by the slow tempo, dashed well 300M to finish 2nd.
Eased at start, 7.5Ls off the leader 2 wide, held up 400M, closed the race off strongly when clear despite not suited by the slow pace.
Pushed forward and took box seat, 1L off the slow pace, soon weakened 300M.
Took rail steadily and led by 1L at advantageous slow early sectionals, hung on until 150M overhauled, ran on for 3rd.
Midfield, 5.5Ls off the leader 2 wide, not suited by the tempo, just held ground in straight.
Pushed forward, 2.5Ls off the leader along the fence, favoured by the slow tempo, out of fuel 250M.
Eased to rear, 9Ls off the leader, trapped 3 wide, closed well 400M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Very slow away, 8.5Ls off the leader on the rails, harmed by the slow pace, no turn of foot in straight.
Pushed forward, 2.5Ls off the leader 2 wide, helped by the slow tempo, however just held ground in straight.
Eased to sit in midfield along the fence, 5.5Ls off the leader, dashed well 400M to win despite not suited by the slow pace.
Eased back, 9Ls off the leader 2 wide, harmed by the slow pace, lacked room 400M, dashed well when clear.
Eased to rear, more than 10Ls off the leader, trapped 3 wide, harmed by the slow pace, demonstrated strong finishing effort final 200 M.
Pushed early to keep up in midfield, 7Ls off the leader along the fence, harmed by the slow pace, just ran on fairly in last quarter.
Settled in forward of midfield, held up for a run until after 200 M, finished off well to just get up final strides.

Ridden along from the widest barrier, travelled wide in midfield before making headway around the bend gaining 3rd in one-out-one-back spot, fought on gamely under pressure in straight without quickening to threaten.
Settled wide in midfield, ran on under pressure early in straight, tight between runners 100 M out, unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Gradually took up running after beginning from a wide draw, held narrow lead to 200 M when overhauled.
Broke well, soon taken back towards rear of field, wide turning for home, kept on steadily without threatening while hanging in.
Settled in forward of midfield, briefly baulked early in straight, soon found no extra.
Settled towards rear on rails, not much room after straightening until 200 M mark, kept on well to the line.
Settled in midfield, shifted out to obtain clear run soon after straightening, only produced moderate progress down straight to just beat third home.
Jumped in air losing ground, remained well back until the field bunched up turning into straight, fought on well down centre of track to be nearest at finish.
Held narrow lead early far side, became 2nd when half a length off the speed around home bend, kept on under pressure before fading quickly out of contention inside 200 M.
Jumped in air and lost ground early, soon picked up to a position just worse than midfield, wide turning in, responded well to hit front over 200 M out only to be pipped at post.
Slightly sluggish early, soon picked up to prominent position, 4th within 2Ls of speed around home bend, kept on steadily without quickening.
Trailed the field most of way, never seen with a chance.
Held prominent spot on rails, in similar 2L-back position turning in, soon weakened.
In midfield settled in 6th throughout, ran on final 350M but not pace to seriously challenge.
Slow to begin, ended up in 2nd last over 10Ls away, fanned 3-wide into the home straight then made promising headway down the outside to claim 3rd close home.
Within striking distance behind leading trio, progressed steadily 400M out and continued willingly to wear down the leader in closing stages.
Stalked the leader one out one back, driven approaching the straight and gained the lead inside 300M, stayed on but could not match strides with the winner in final stages.

Up with the early pace but became unsettled once in the lead, set a strong tempo at the front end but found nothing left turning for home. (Jockey advised to make more effort to have his mount settle.)
Never better than midfield and travelled over 10Ls off the pace, niggled along inside 500M but lacked any response. Never a factor.
Taken back to last, not hurried throughout and was 10Ls behind passing 400M, rallied mildly from off the pace and couldn't reach the leaders.
Towards the rear over 10Ls off the pace, held up briefly in early part of straight but ran on only fairly once into clear.
Held up in 7th 8-9Ls away, crept closer over the home turn, finished evenly but found less than expected inside final 100M. (Jockey questioned regarding his riding in closing stages.)
Placed 2-wide behind midfield and used little to straight, responded well inside 400M to finish 4th never nearer.
Tracked leaders along the inside, made good headway passing 400M and briefly threatened, unable to sustain run 200M and weakened towards the line.
Led to 1500M then settled just off the pace, advanced 3-wide passing 600M, briefly led in straight before giving way from over 250M out. (Jockey and Trainer questioned)
Standard jump, pushed into a slightly closer role than usual 3 to 4Ls back, midfield on rails throughout, lacked trademark finish and just battled last 200 M.
Jumped nicely, unable to slot in and posted 3 wide without cover, used plenty but still only 3Ls down to bend, couldn't pick up and weakened out.
Out in line, angled into running line in midfield 4Ls or so away, back in traffic before run emerged at 300 M, kept chasing but not able to make ground on first two last furlong.
Ordinary jump and soon became well detached, never really travelled and took little part. To trial.
Fastest out, led easily, kept rolling setting genuine sections, held a 1L margin turning, under pressure at 300 M, couldn't respond after early work and faded late.
Out in line, 4 wide with cover 4 to 5Ls away in midfield, set a significant task throughout, faded as expected.
Broke well, pushed on to race outside leader, did some work with solid sections, didn't see out trip and faded from 300 M.
No early speed, ended up 5 to 6Ls back amongst last few, saved ground throughout, stuck to inside from 400 M, kept closing gradually to be not far away and just missed frame.
Average jump, faded back from a wide alley, raced 5Ls or so back in running line, in rear division to bend, took gap between horses and closed soundly from rear, well clear of 3rd.
Slow away, ended up 3 wide with cover in midfield, used a bit with even speed, didn't have an extra gear but instead held position in run to line.
Bounced out with rest, urged to hold leaders back, had good trial despite solid sections, into clear on turning, went to them easily but had to dig in to repell late challenger. Cosy at post.
Fair to jump, trapped 3 and 4 wide without cover 2 to 3Ls away, worked too hard in run, no extra final 300 M and dropped out.
Moderate jump, drifted back to race 3 wide at rear, 5 to 6Ls back, always at rear to bend, made some minor ground without threatening.
Positive from outset, box seated 1 out 1 back, close to genuine tempo throughout, near enough on bend, didn't pick up but instead held ground evenly late.
Standard jump, ended up 6Ls or so away behind midfield, had an easy time to bend, worked into clear turning and finished well despite no match for winner.
Fastest out, led easily but took trail before first turn, had reasonable trip despite solid section, came under pressure on turning, lacked usual close and folded tamely.
No early pace, got well bck from a wide gate, raced 3 wide near enough to tail, best part of 8Ls away throughout and still well down to bend, made some good late headway. (See racing incidents.)
Out nicely, travelled behind pace trio 3Ls away on rails, had an even trip to bend, didn't find much and weakened out easily.
Away well, rolled forward to eventually take front by 1200 M, set even tempo gradually increasing speed, held a handy break at 300 M, went on to score with plenty in hand.
Out in line, unable to get nearer than 3 wide from difficult alley, 4Ls back without cover throughout, did plenty to bend but didn't give in and kept working right to line.
Jumped nicely, went forward to end up first without cover in running line, had a fair run 1 to 2Ls clear on bend, couldn't match dash of winner but stayed on OK late.
OK to begin, slotted in to midfield spot 5Ls off pace, difficult to settle throughout, still amongst horses on turning but worked home evenly when clear.
Drifted back soon after start, raced 10Ls or more away at tail, rearward throughout, limited response in finish.
Steadied early, 9 to 10Ls back on rails, used little throughout, well back to bend, pursued inside runs and in traffic to 250 M, closed nicely when clear.
No early pace and dropped well back for a wide gate, best part of 10Ls away 3 wide at rear, set plenty to do well back to bend, only got passed tired runners.
Ordinary jump, mustered to be in midfield 4Ls off pace, enjoyed an easy time to turn, didn't close off and just plugged on in straight.
Began well enough, settled behind speed 3Ls back, had a fair run to turn, soon struggling and didn't run on in straight.
Only fair to break, settled down 3 wide behind midfield 6Ls back with trail, did some work covering extra ground to bend, didn't close but just stayed on.
Even break but lacked early speed and soon ended up racing in last 7Ls off the pace, failed to make any impression in straight and ran past beaten runners only.

Jumped well from the inside draw and tracked leader along the inside, well placed to challenge turning in but lacked the needed response, run ended inside 200 M and weakened. (Irregular Heart Rhythm.)
Up with the pace and stalked the leader, travelled strongly throughout and soon took over turning in, continued on well only to be headed in late stages.
In mid-division one off the fence, stayed on one paced inside 350 M and never reached leaders.
Caught wide from an outside draw and raced without cover throughout, crept closer to the lead approaching home turn, had his chance but was swamped when turning flat inside 200 M.
Bustled along to go forward, led them till coming under pressure approaching the entrance of home straight, rapidly weakened final 200 M and dropped away.
Reserved early, raced 5Ls back towards the rear, fanned widest into home straight, ran on strongly final 200 M to wear down the runner up in final strides.
Taken back to last on jumping from a wide barrier, not hurried in early stages and was well back turning for home, shifted out to clear near 300 M and finished the race strongly.
Behind midfield along the inside fence, 5Ls down passing 400 M, stayed on but ran into traffic 200 M out and was not tested to the line.
Away with them, settled handily in chasing group 2-wide, kept on at the same pace turning in and was never a serious factor.
6th in midfield and saved ground by racing along the fence, plodded on in straight and made little impression on the first three which are well clear.
Away well enough but was restrained to a midfield spot one off the fence, fanned 3-wide turning into straight, made steady progress but not pace to serious challenge.
Raced in restricted room soon after the jump and settled midfield near the fence, peeled out turning for home and ran on soundly.
Settled behind midfield the fence. Kept to the inside in the straight but never really quickened.
Raced in front of midfield the fence. Made a dash at the furlong but peaked on its run prior to the finish.
Was prominent early before taking up a trailing position, 3 back 1 off the rail with cover. Made steady ground over the final furlong.
Began on terms then drifted back and remained racing off the rail in last position. Came wide in the straight and closed off satisfactorily. (See Racing Incidents.)
From a wide alley was taken back across behind runners and travelled with the backmakers 2 deep with cover. Failed to close off.
Enjoyed a nice run on the back of the leader along the paint after commencing best. Rolled out turning for home and progressed nicely to finish as one of the principals.
Caught 3-wide on the speed early before settling near the 800 M, 1 off tracking the leader. Failed to find any extra at the business end of the race.
From the outside gate was taken back to a position towards the rear, 1 off with cover. Hung in over the final 350 while plodding to the line.

Began fairly and looked to settle off the pace, then was set alight about 150 M after the start and looped inside runners to cross over to the rail and make the running by the 900 M. Kept a strong gallop right to the post.
Throughout the race travelled wide and without cover, midfield. Not likely.
Settled close to midfield, 1 off with cover. Kept on one paced in the run to the wire.
Hard ridden early to race one-off the fence behind leaders. Prominent position into final stretch but not much to offer. Weakened 100 M.
Began well, took lead on fence 700 M out. Held a half length advantage turning in. Never seriously challenged in the straight.
Raced behind leaders on fence until dropped out 400 M from home.
Pressed early but could only stay 2-wide towards rear. 5Ls down on straightening. Did best work late.
Slow to begin. Raced 2-wide at rear. No impression.
Trapped wide at midfield after start. Taken to sit 3-wide behind midfield approaching 800 M. Raced greenly making the home turn. No pick up in the straight.
Travelled wide and without cover at midfield through to the home turn. Faded thereafter.
Slow to begin. Urged early to stay behind midfield on fence. 5Ls away into home straight. Made even progress without threatening the front trio.
Sat 2-wide at midfield through to the home straight. Couldn't turn up a notch.
3-wide without cover at midfield early. Improved on bend to race behind leaders. Ran home steadily.
Good jump. Raced outside speed through to the home turn. One-paced to conclude.
Raced at rear on fence throughout. Never a factor.
Held 5th or so on the rails at 1000 M, same position and 4Ls down off last bend but held up until 150 M out, unlucky not to finish closer. (Tactic questioned.)
Pressed forward from wide gate to lead on fence by 2Ls at 1100 M, set sedate pace, headed by winner 250 M out, all out to hang onto a place.
Disputed early pace, eased into 2nd behind steady pace before last turn, found zero off the bridle again, poor.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
4-back on the rails about 5Ls off slow pace at the 1000 M, tight for room turning for home, kept chasing the majority.
Held up one from rear about 8Ls behind steady tempo, 7Ls last turning for home, race wasn't run to suit.
Slowest away, on fence 6Ls off pace on rails at halfway and similar spinning for home, recovered minor late ground, never nearer.
Mostly in the 'one-out-one-back' position within 2Ls of the slow pace until straightening for home, no excuse for not finishing better.
Went back from widest gate, in rear between 6Ls and 8Ls off the slow pace, no real impact in the finish.
8th or so and 2-wide about 4Ls or 5Ls back until turning for home, lacked a turn of foot and only held ground.
Midfield with cover about 4Ls from slow speed until the 500 M, checked off home turn, no chance with winner but stayed on best of the rest for 2nd.
Over-racing behind slow pace in 10th at the 1200 M, looped field from the 500 M to lead 250 M out, soon well clear, easily.
Midfield on the inner within 3Ls or 4Ls from the speed before final bend, had his chance to place but lacked a change of gear.
4-back the rails about 6Ls off in 10th at 1000 M, 5Ls back turning for home, ran on well late, done for 2nd close home.
4-wide no cover at the 1300 M, soon got cover and 3Ls back at halfway, hampered into homestretch, weakened.
Disputed fast pace at 1200 M, still upsides out 2-wide off home turn, was entitled to wilt after working hard so he did well to hold down 4th. (Tactic questioned.)
No early pace, 8Ls last 600 M out, suited by the strong tempo and ran over the top of several rivals to nick 2nd late.
Slow to muster early pace, wide off first bend and pressed on 4-wide no cover from the 700 M, 1L down in 3rd entering straight, soon faded.
Switched inside from widest gate, 2-wide and rear at 1000 M, soon 3-wide with cover, hampered entering straight, never likely from then on.
Awkward break, settled 9th at the 1200 M, over-raced at the 800 M when 4Ls back, 5-wide (widest) off last bend in 10th, one-paced to wrap up.
In front rank 1L off pace but 3-wide no cover from 1200 M to 600 M, struggling to keep up turning in, very one-paced.
Box-seated or 3-back the fence behind a strong pace before straightening when going well, quickened up to lead about 150 M out, kept on strongly.
Disputed a speedy tempo on fence at 1100 M, still upsides taking final bend, weakened out of the picture inside final 200 M.
Held the 'one-out-one-back' position in 4th or so just forward of the winner KEEP ME until the 800 M, very weak in the final quarter.
Eased to sit behind midfield along the fence, 5-1/2Ls off the leaders, harmed by the extremely slow tempo, no progress.
Eased to rear, 7Ls off the leaders, trapped 3 to 4-wide throughout and lost too much ground, harmed by the extremely slow pace, ran on ok in final stages.
Settled rear, 7Ls off the leaders 1 to 2-wide, not suited by the extremely slow sectionals, little dash 200 M.
Eased to sit outside the lead, carried back and lost ground 900 M, 2-1/2Ls off the leaders 2-wide, not suited by the extremely slow tempo, little dash 100 M.
Awkward away, hard ridden to keep up in midfield, raced keenly, 3Ls off the leaders 2 to 3-wide, moved forward 1000 M, not suited by the extremely slow tempo, held ground in straight.
Eased back early, moved forward from 1100 M to share lead 2-wide, enjoyed the extremely slow early sectionals, however soon weakened 200 M.
Pushed to obtain prominent spot early, carried back 900 M and lost ground, 4Ls off the leaders 2 to 3-wide, harmed by the extremely slow pace, held ground in straight.
Eased to rear for cover early, made early move from 1200 M, settled 1-1/2Ls behind the leaders 2-wide, favoured by the extremely slow tempo, closed the race off strongly and took 2nd.
Pushed to occupy the box seat, benefited by the extremely slow early sectionals and the rail-run, ran on well to the line for 3rd.
Eased to rear, 5Ls off the leaders on the rails, checked 1100 M and 800 M, swept forward 4 to 5-wide at home bend and lost significant ground, harmed by the extremely slow pace, no dash.
Took rail and shared the lead easily, clocked extremely slow sectionals until 800 M when pressured, kicked well and made all.
Settled third last, widest turning in, finished off race well down centre of straight. (Questioned.)

Began with others, ridden along to keep up with leaders early, gained narrow advantage off the rails far side, similar turning in but soon headed in straight, plugged on under pressure in the run home.
Settled in midfield, checked and lost about 2Ls coming off Rock, towards rear into straight, kept on before fading closing stages.
Began with others, soon dropped to forward of midfield, shifted off rails straightening, found nothing under pressure.
Settled dropped to midfield, switched out for a run turning in, ran home one-paced.
Midfield when hampered approaching 1200 M, remained towards rear before making his move around home bend, sustained effort from 3L 6th into straight to snatch victory final strides.
Settled well behind from a wide barrier, saved ground turning for home, finished off race well despite racing greenly.
Amongst leaders, disputed lead throughout far side along the rails, gained slender advantage on home bend, broke over 1L clear under pressure early in straight only to be pipped at post.
Soon ridden, made gradual headway 3-wide down far side, prominent when lost position 800 M out, gave ground sharply from approaching home turn.
Soon picked up to a prominent position, similar in one-out-one-back spot into straight, dropped out tamely under pressure. (Questioned for disappointing performance.)
Soon outpaced, saved ground hugging the rails home turn, fought on steadily under pressure for a fair finish.
Began from a wide barrier, raced wide in a prominent position gradually settling in 3rd far side, only one-paced under pressure in straight.
Raced close up behind the leading trio and tracked well to straight, went through a gap on the inside 200 M, ran on well but not able to match strides with the winner.
Not able to shift in and caught wide making the first turn, dropped back towards the rear for cover, effort from 350 M and finished the race mildly. (Jockey questioned.)
Taken across behind runners, settled 2nd last and unhurried throughout, full of running in the finish but was held up in the middle of straight and had no clear crack until final 50 M.
Slow to begin, raced in last over 10Ls off the pace in early and middle stages, crept closer over the final turn but lacked a needed response when asked inside 400 M.
Soon crossed to the lead, took them along slowly, headed inside 300 M and dropped away rapidly.
Unable to cross and raced 3-wide in midfield without cover, fanned wide into the home straight, driven but no progress. (Jockey questioned.)
Settled 2-wide behind mid-division, fanned wide into the straight and closed off the race willingly outside.
Overcame a wide draw to chase leader one out one back, hit the front soon on straightening but found no extra when headed inside 150 M.
Shaken up early to go forward, handily placed in 3rd along the inside before shifting out to challenge 3-wide over the final turn, made a mild bid but failed to sustain the drive inside 150 M.
Held up in midfield along the fence, effort 350 M out, progressed steadily but couldn't find the extra to seriously challenge.
Nicely settled in mid-division and travelled strongly throughout, brought wide to challenge approaching the home straight before delivering a withering run to hit the front 150 M, kept on.
3-wide behind midfield in early stages, not suited by the slow tempo and crept forward to 4th down the back straight, under pressure near 400 M and soon weakened.
Set steady tempo and enjoyed an easy lead throughout, driven out 350M, kept on well under top weight and was only headed inside 150M.
Up with the pace and travelled one out one back from leader, driven passing 450M, stayed on to finish clear 2nd best but couldn't match strides with the winner.
Tracked leader along the inside, moved out to a striking position turning for home, rallied strongly between horses to hit the front 150M from home. Won with something in hand.
Held up 2-wide in midfield and within 2Ls of leader turning for home, had his chance but couldn't get close to the first two.
Towards the rear in 5th but always in touch, couldn't quicken when asked inside 400M and remained at the same pace to the line.
Raced in last pair and proved difficult to settle at times, took time to gather in straight but stayed on well final 200M to take 3rd on the line.
Not hurried in early stages, 4-5Ls back in last making the home turn, switched wide with his challenge but found very little in the drive home.
Moved briskly to the front, maintained even sections along the paint to make every post a winner, scoring in fine fashion.
Settled 3 - 4 wide with cover on the back of the speed. Kept on gamely considering the extra ground covered.
By the about the 700m, managed to settle 2 back, 1 off with cover. Had no excuses.
Settled midfield, 1 off with cover. Was a beaten horse prior to the 400m and gave ground noticeably in the straight.
Was hampered soon after the jump, settling back in the event, 4 wide with cover. Only battled away in the straight.
Travelled near the rear of the field, 2 deep with cover. Plodded to the post.
Travelled very wide and without cover throughout the race, midfield. Not likely.
Settled midfield the fence. commenced to tire before the home turn, never a factor.
Camped on the back of the leader after the 900m along the fence. Hung out on the circle and failed to make any impression in the run home.
Settled 3 wide, midfield with cover. Peeled out turning for home and closed off soundly.
Settled outside the leader about 3 parts of a length back. Maintained a fair gallop in the run to the wire.
Stood flat footed when the gates opened and lost considerable ground settling in last position on the fence. Kept to the inside in the straight and ran on soundly. To trial.
Fair start and stayed towards rear on fence. Took inside run and was 5Ls away rounding the turn. Kept on at the same pace.
2-wide behind midfield early. Hung out making the home turn and was 7Ls back into final stretch. Made up decent ground.
Began awkwardly and raced at rear throughout. Never in contention.
Quickly into stride. Pressed to take lead on fence 800M out. Hung on well in the home straight until overhauled by the winner 50M from home. All out to hold 2nd.
Pressured early from high draw. Raced 3-wide behind midfield passing 900M. Swung widest and was 5Ls down turning in. Dashed strongly and caught the leader at 50M. Did enough.
Ridden to hold rail after good start. Settled behind leader Kept on without threatening the front trio.
Pressed to race 2-wide behind midfield. 5Ls down on straightening. Ran on steadily.
Failed to muster early and middle stages. Past only beaten rivals in the home straight.
Raced within 2Ls of the speed through to the home turn. Couldn't turn up a notch.
Urged after start and raced at midfield on fence passing 900M. Well positioned to strike in the straight. Improved gradually and just failed to figure in quinella.
Broke well but couldn't work across. Trapped wide ahead of midfield through to the home straight. One-paced to conclude.
3-wide behind leader until dropped out after entering the home straight.
4-back the rails about 5Ls off speed at halfway; a little closer on straightening; looked to have his chance to place but lacked a turn of foot.
5-back on rails in 12th at 1200m; 5Ls off in midfield turning in; checked 250m out and tight for room at 100m; possibly unlucky not to place.
Awkward break; about 4Ls off pace in 4th at 1000m; a little closer on straightening but soon pressured and yielded ground rapidly.
Niggled along in rear initially; 8Ls off speed at halfway; marginally closer turning for home; ran on well late on; never nearer.
Darted straight to the front and led by 3Ls at 1000m; briefly headed shortly into straight; rallied; led again; pulled clear inside final 100m.
Handily placed in 4th on fence at the 1200m; 4Ls back in similar spot at halfway; surrendered tamely in the straight despite the soft run.
Slow to muster early pace; rearward through first half; 7Ls down in 12th cornering in; ran on strongly to a nick 2nd in final stride.
Caught wide no cover at first; 3-wide with cover in mid-division 6Ls off leaders at halfway; never looked like drawing much closer than midfield.
Sat 2nd initially; 3Ls back in 2nd tracking winner 700m out; briefly led at top of home straight; couldn't sustain; all out to hang onto a place.
Never much of a factor; always at least 5Ls or so from the speed in rear.
Always rearward; still 10Ls last at 600m; widest turning for home; no real impression.
Midfield 5Ls off pace with cover at the 1000m; close enough if good enough before last bend; very weak inside final 200m despite easy trip.
2-wide and 8th or 9th about 7Ls off speed down the back; closer off last bend; every chance of a place at 200m; missed out in final strides.
Caught a little wide in places; midfield 5Ls off pace at halfway; closer turning in but found zero off the bit; to trial.
Pressed on to share a fast early pace; about a neck back in 2nd out 2-wide from 1000m to final bend; swamped around 200m out; eased late on.
Always rearwards at least 7Ls from the pace; another weak performance.
3-wide but with cover in 10th or so some 7Ls off pace before last bend; never likely to improve much better than midfield.
On the rails within 3Ls or 4Ls of the pace in 4th or 5th before final bend; 2Ls back and vying for 2nd at the 200m; couldn't get to grips with the winner.
Eased back from the start; 11Ls last at the 1000m; never landed a blow.
Led solo before being joined disputing a strong early tempo with BABY WAVE; a neck clear off last bend; swamped 200m out. (Tactic questioned.)
Caught 3-wide no cover throughout despite exiting gate 5; mid-div between 4Ls and 6Ls from speed before last bend; weakened final 200m.
Went back from wide gate; one from rear at least 8Ls from the speed before last bend; never troubled leaders.
Slowest away; switched inside from wide gate; 11th on the rails about 6Ls or so from pace before final bend; 4Ls back at the 200m; run peaked.
Held 'one-out-one-back' position outside winner BE GRATEFUL at 1200m; struggling to lie up 600m out; dropped out sharply; poor effort.
2-wide around midfield about 6Ls off pace in middle stages and same turning in; found zero under pressure.
Midfield or slightly better 4Ls or 5Ls off pace before being checked 750m out; stayed on okay late; probably had his chance to place, though.
Box-seated in 4th about 3Ls from lead at 1000m; tended to hang left; going well turning in; led 300m out; ran on well to score while still hanging.
4-back on the rails in 9th about 6Ls off at halfway; marginally closer turning in; kept on pretty well for a place.
Hard ridden forward from wide draw, trapped 3 wide throughout outside the lead, good pace, closed the race off strongly to score.
Slow away, pushed to keep up with the field, 7Ls off the good pace at rear but on the rails, made ground steadily in straight, tightened for room and checked 50M.
Hard ridden forward, 1.5Ls off the good pace 2 wide, flattened in straight.
Hard ridden to take the rail and led by 0.5L at good pace, hung on until 100M flattened.
Eased to rear for cover, 8Ls off the good pace 2 wide, progressed steadily 200M.
Settled in midfield along the fence, 3.5 beind the good pace, blocked most striaght, just ran on.
Pushed forward to sit outside the lead, ran on until 150M flattened.
Eased to sit in midfield, 3.5Ls off the good pace, raced 4 wide throughout and lost ground, hung out 500M, emptied.
Eased back, 5Ls off the good pace 3 wide, made ground 300M.
Slow away, pushed to sit in midfield, 5Ls behind the good pace 2 wide, made ground 300M to grab 3rd.
Never better than midfield in 3 wide.
Easily took box seat, 1.5Ls off the good pace, held up most straight, ran on well for 2nd.
Prominent, met minor interferences 600 M out, better than midfield turning in, failed to quicken under pressure early in straight but kept on same pace to the line.
Slow out, picked up gradually to just worse than midfield, made good headway between runners down inside early in straight, fought on doggedly to the line without threatening.
Soon found itself in last few, last into straight, ran past beaten horses closing stages. (Lame next day.) (Tactic questioned.)
Lost ground at start, quickly picked up to forward of midfield, baulked for a run after straightening and tightened inside 300 M, no extra afterwards.
Raced wide in rear of midfield, reasonable response early in straight, fought on steadily for a nice impression at the finish.
Began from the widest gate, soon outpaced, remained in last few, saved ground turning in, kept on steadily without quickening.
Jumped from a wide gate, gradually taken back to rear of midfield for cover, similar turning for home, finished off well inside final 200 M.
Began with others, soon ridden to prominent one-back spot on rails, gradually faded under pressure in straight.
Soon picked up to prominent one-out-one-back spot, same turning in, hit front under pressure inside 200 M, won readily.
Quickly into stride to lead attempting to make all, only headed under pressure closing stages.
Began from a wide gate, raced wide without cover in a prominent spot, 3-wide in 2L 3rd turning for home, dropped away quickly.
Soon picked up along rails to forward of midfield after a slightly slow start, remained similar to straight but dropped out tamely.
Travelled just better than midfield, coming under pressure to hold position when hampered 250 M out, no further impression. (Abnormal breathing noise.)
Soon settled at the back, widest runner turning in, produced good progress down centre of the track, did best work late.
Taken across to the fence behind runners, raced in the rear group throughout, driven passing 400M but no progress. Never a factor.
Slightly slow out, settled towards the rear about 7Ls back, used little in run to the straight, switched out passing 400M for a very strong finish and came nearest on the line.
Went forward and took hold of a rail position behind leader, loomed up as the main threat turning in, briefly led in straight but unable to sustain run and weakened rapidly final 150M.
Towards the rear about 6Ls off the pace, fanned 4-wide into the straight and made his challenge widest, stayed on from off the pace but offered little threat to the leaders.
Even break, raced 5Ls back and 2-wide in mid-division, tracked well to straight, made his move alongside the eventual winner, kept on till weakening final 75M.
Shaken up early to obtain a midfield spot on the inside 4Ls behind leader, hard driven passing 450M and finished off the race evenly despite drifting out under pressure in closing stages.
Fractious in stalls and subsequently slow to begin, ridden forward to track leader one off the fence, had his chance but was soon outpaced in straight and quickly swamped passing 200M.

Jumped well and quickly moved to 4th position, travelled strongly into final straight and responded well under pressure, shook off his nearest pursuer inside 100M and continued on willingly to the line.

Restrained to a midfield position along the fence but proved difficult to settle in middle stages, angled out to 3-wide over the home turn, held up briefly near 300M before running on for a close 5th.
Not hurried in early stages, settled 2-wide in last pair 8Ls back, lacked a response when asked and never looked dangerous at any stage.
Driven out early to overcome a wide draw, led them along at a solid tempo, head 300M then weakened rapidly in the run to the line.
Unbalanced early and got further back than intended, 7Ls away, 3 wide behind midfield, struggling on turn, didn't find and turned in a disappointing performance. (See Racing Incidents.)
Plenty of early pace, went to front and controlled affairs throughout, challenged on turning in, soon overhauled passing 300 M, gradually faded.
Drifted back from a wide alley, shared rear 8 to 9Ls off speed in running line, set task when still well back to bend, made some late headway.
Showed usual speed, travelled nicely on leaders back, had a fair run despite even speed, right there turning, in mix for a place but lost out final 50 M.
Even getaway, settled behind pace group on fence 4Ls back, used nothing in run, worked into clear passing 300 M, stayed on well for a place.
Fair to begin, behind midfield 6Ls down on rails, few excuses to bend, plodded away in straight.
Broke nicely, rolled on to race outside leader, travelled strongly throughout, 1/2L down turning, found nothing when pressure applied and dropped out.
Slow into stride and soon at rear, best part of 9 to 10Ls off leaders throughout, still back there on rails turning, just passed tired runners late.
Angled into midfield from an awkward alley, tracked eventual winner throughout, improved wide on turning, kept going nicely in run to take a distant 2nd.
No early pace, settled 8Ls away 3 wide, well back last turning, closed steadily late making some progress final furlong.
Slow out and checked early, posted 3 wide without cover throughout, used too much in mid-section, struggling bend, weakened easily.
No speed from outset, settled in rear division 8Ls to 9Ls off speed, saved ground on rails on bend, made some ground final 200 M but never really likely.
Slowly away, got too far back as a result racing 6Ls or so from top end, hung in mid-section, didn't finish off as normally would.
Positive from outset, box seated in 1 out 1 back slot throughout, travelled well to bend, eased out and quickly put a break on rivals, ran away to win convincingly.
No early speed, soon at rear 9 to 10Ls back, moved 3 wide at circle, swept 5 wide on turning, peaked on run by 200 M.
Behind midfield throughout, best part of 7 to 8Ls down on circle, had a bit to do on straightening, made some minor progress without threatening.
Ridden prominently, worked early to end up outside leader, 1L down on bend, came under pressure on turning, didn't close off. (See Racing Incidents.)
Even jump, raced 3 to 4Ls back on rails, used nothing in middle stages, saved ground on bend, stayed on nicely to make frame.
Unbalanced early, ended up 3 wide behind midfield, 7Ls or so away but did have cover in mid-section, improved turning, closed off well to be nearest on line.
Fairly away, midfield or worse 6Ls from lead, used little and saved ground on rails throughout, no response.
Tardy into stride, got well back 8Ls away on rails, set a big task still last to bend, didn't see out trip.
Bounced out, assumed ideal spot on leaders back, had run of race in mid-section, right there turning, went head to head with winner final 200 M going down narrowly.
Began well, had a nice run 4Ls back in running line, no excuses to bend, found little under pressure, average effort.
Standard jump, got well back 7 to 8Ls away on fence, had soft run to bend, saved ground turning, made some late headway.
Lacked usual speed, assumed a midfield trail 5Ls from speed, reasonable run to turn, niggled soon after turning, poor in finish.
Worked hard to lead, settled affairs but still set even sections, did too much to turn, weakened in straight.
Standard jump, caught 3 wide in midfield 5 to 6Ls back, did it tough without cover, kept improving turning in, joined in at 250 M, kept on under riding to prevail.
Prominent from outset, sat behind pace 1 out 1 back, good run to bend, improved 3 wide entering straight, no match for first two but battled gamely all the same.
Travelled 3-wide in mid-division throughout, urged along making the home turn and looked very laboured in the finish. No impression.
Never far off from the weak early pace, vied for lead down the back straight before speeding off inside 600M, built up an unassailable lead and continued on strongly to the line.
Chased the pace along the inside, left behind when the leaders sped away making the home turn, stayed on in the finish but not pace to seriously challenge.
Placed in a good position chasing leaders two deep, hard driven 500M from home, kept on in the straight but couldn't get close to the winner.
Crossed to a 2-wide position after the start, towards the rear throughout, had to be niggled along passing 600M but not picking up at all. Soundly beaten.
Raced 2-wide in midfield, came under pressure making the final turn and lacked a response when needed.
Never better than midfield, under pressure some way before the straight, never looked a threat and kept on at the same pace only.
Saved ground on the inside, 5Ls back in 9th in early and middle stages, had plenty to do off the bend and couldn't offer the necessary response.
In last few over 6Ls back on the fence, waited with till 350M, hung in early on straightening and was never in a position to challenge. (Mucus.)
Took up early running, set a slow pace upfront and was taken on down the back straight, surrendered the lead inside 600M, kept on but couldn't make ground on the runaway winner.
Dropped back to the rear to avoid racing wide in early stages, not hurried and was over 10Ls away as they turned in, made some headway inside 300M but was never likely from that position.
Held inside run in mid-division 3-4Ls back, driven inside 350M but no progress, weakened towards the finish.
Travelled just behind midfield, 2 wide with cover. Closed off strongly to come up just short of the prize.
Hampered on jumping then raced in restricted room for some distance after settling in last position along the rail. Failed to close off.
Settled at the rear of the field one off with cover. Closed off soundly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Crowded at the start, then while being steadied by its rider near the 1000 M, lost its position when crowded for room, settling behind midfield the fence. Struggled in the straight.
Settled midfield 1-off before rolling to the fence near the 800 M. Failed to make any impression in the final stretch and was disappointing. (See Racing Incidents.)
Sent forward and lead at even sections along the fence. Drew a margin turning into the home straight and kept a sufficient margin to hold on for victory.
Ridden along early and coursed very wide in the early stages Settled in 2nd position but remained racing wide and without cover. Kept on despite tough run.
Ridden in a handy position 3 deep with cover for most of the trip. Gave little when asked for an effort after the 400 M and hung in for the remainder of the event.
Showed good gate speed to spear forward and lead early, took a sit and settled 1 off by the 900 M. Was well and truly beaten by the 400 M.
Raced midfield, 2-deep with cover. Progressed to the line satisfactorily.
Camped on the back of the leader on the paint. Niggled along to maintain its position and never really quickened in the run to the line.
Couldn't go the early speed of the race settling with the backmakers, one off with cover. Came home with an eye catching final 400 M.
Last out and rolled towards the fence. Trailed 8Ls down through to the home straight. Made up many lengths down the centre of the track to snatch 3rd. (Lame right front leg).
Prominent spot through to the home straight. Given every chance but kept on at the same pace. Raced tight close to finish but was of little significance overall.
Elected to sit better than midfield on fence after start. Burst to the front in a 2-wide position approaching 1200 M. Hard ridden from 400 M but not much to offer.
Began awkwardly and shifted to one-off the fence near rear from high draw. Improved briefly rounding the turn but couldn't follow through.
3-wide without cover in the front rank until 600 M, struggled in run home.

Soon in the leading section but failed to work across. Eased to sit 2-wide ahead of midfield from 1300 M. 3Ls back on straightening. Kept on without threat to the front pair. Raced tight near finish and just missed out on 4th.
Raced behind midfield on fence throughout. No impression.
Sat within 3Ls of the speed near the fence early. Urged approaching the Rock and was ridden vigorously making the home turn. Failed to turn up a notch in the straight.
Fair start. Urged early but failed to work across. Trapped 3-wide ahead of midfield 1300 M out. Pressured from 600 M but no pick up.
Sat within 5Ls of the pace in a 3-wide position early and middle stages. Commenced his run outside field from 400 M. Dashed strongly final furlong. Took charge 50 M.
Shaken after start and took lead on fence at 1300 M. Held the rail and shared the lead 900 M out. Fended off all pursuers but the winner closing stages.
Taken to rail towards rear from high draw. 7Ls away until home straight. Covered good ground to make frame at finish.
3-wide no cover around midfield for duration; 4Ls off speed down backstretch; closer on straightening; 1L down and place hopes at 200 M; no extra.
2-wide in midfield at the 600 M when 4Ls off pace; a little nearer off last bend; lacked a decisive turn of foot.
Slender advantage or disputing lead on inside before final bend; headed about 250 M out; one-paced in closing stages.
Had the box-seat run in 3rd on rails 2Ls back in 3rd before final turn; held up until around 200 M out; lost momentum and unable to recover.
Away well; opted to race 3-back the rails down the back; travelled well a close 5th turning in; kept on well down the inner; just missed the win.
Eased back to race 8th about 5Ls behind initial tempo; closer but 5-wide (widest) turning in; ran on strongly for 3rd; post came just too soon.
Eased back; 10Ls off the pace in rear at 700 M; 6Ls back but wide turning for home; ran on well late; never nearer.
Raced 4-back on the rails down the back straight; going well turning in; found little or no running room on the run-in; discount the run.
Switched inside from widest gate; 8Ls sharing last at halfway out 2-wide; made up good late ground; nearest at the finish.
Just behind or disputing the pace out 2-wide before the last turn; swamped inside the final furlong.
Slowest out; in 10th or so about 7Ls off the speed; 6Ls back at the final turn; outpaced.
Soon slotted into one-out-one-back spot from gate 9; in 4th about 1-1/2Ls from pace before final bend; led 250 M out; all out to just cling on.
4-back the rails in 7th at the 1000 M; 4Ls down in midfield before home turn; stayed on fairly well along inner; just missed a place.
With cover in 6th initially; tried to advance out 3-wide no cover from the 600 M; lacked any acceleration and yielded ground in the straight.
Slipped into one-out-one-back position at 1300 M; 5Ls back in 4th at halfway; struggling to keep up off last corner; one-paced.
Keen early on; in 10th or 11th about 10Ls behind speed at 900 M; 7Ls off into straight; recovered minor late ground.
Always rearward; 9Ls off pace at halfway; a little nearer off last turn but never likely to land a blow.
Soft run 3-back the rails 5Ls off pace at 1000 M; closer and going well turning for home; picked up to lead 100 M out; in charge thereafter.
3-wide no cover and worse than midfield before the 600 M; gained cover on the circle but struggling before final bend; eased down when chance had gone.
2-wide in 8th at the 1200 M; 8Ls adrift in middle stages; outpaced from the top of the straight.
Quietly ridden again; 12Ls last at the 900 M; very wide (6-wide or more) into straight; moderate late headway.
1L back in 2nd at 1200 M; 2Ls off at 800 M and same again off home turn; one-paced to the line.
Soon led on fence by 1L; skipped 3Ls clear 600 M out; grabbed by the winner at the 100 M but no trouble hanging onto 2nd.
Quickly into box-seat position; edged out before home turn when 2Ls back in 3rd; every chance at 200 M; run peaked; just held 3rd.
Eased back, 4-1/2Ls off the leaders, trapped 3-wide, suited by the fast tempo, no progress.
Extremely slow away, detached early, suited by the fast pace made some ground, but ran on fairly in final stages.
Very slow away, never competitive, tailed out.
Behind midfield but on the fence, 5Ls off the leaders, benefited by the fast pace, just ran on ok in last quarter.
Hard ridden early, trapped 3-wide throughout in midfield, 3Ls off the fast pace, flattened 300 M.
Pushed forward to cross, took rail and led by 1L at fast early sectionals, hung on strongly until 100 M overhauled, ran on for 2nd.
Slow away, at back, 6-1/2Ls off the leaders 2-wide, helped by the fast pace, made some ground 200 M.
Hard ridden forward and obtained the box seat, not suited by the fast pace, ran on well to the line for 3rd.
Prominent, 1-1/2Ls off the leaders 2 wide, not suited by the fast early tempo, just held ground in straight.
Behind midfield, 5-1/2Ls off the leaders 2 wide, favoured by the fast tempo, progressed steadily 200 M.
Very slow away, pushed forward, 3Ls behind the fast pace 2-wide, just held ground in straight.
Hard ridden to keep up with the speed, 2Ls off the fast pace along the fence, closed the race off strongly and score.
Began awkwardly but still quickly into lead, held narrow advantage down far side, soon weakened out of it after straightening.
Broke well, settled outside leader, niggling along one-back in 3rd far side, switched out to challenge turning in hitting front over 200 M out, just caught on the line.
Missed the start, quickly driven through the field to dispute lead from 1000 M bend, held same spot into straight, however, soon dropped out under pressure. (Tactic questioned.)
Began with others, settled behind midfield, made no show under pressure in straight.
Broke well looking for cover, tucked in for 5th one off the rails within 3Ls of speed, similar in 4th when commenced move rounding home bend, wide turning in, could only go one-paced under pressure.

Prominent when steadied on rails coming onto stables bend, still held forward of midfield position down far side, came under pressure to challenge from around home bend, forced to check 300 M out, never involved thereafter.
Soon taken back to race in rear, waited with, produced strong late effort despite an interrupted run down home straight.

Jumped from the widest gate, found cover in rear of midfield coming onto stables bend, travelled wide-ish in midfield down far side, swung very wide turning in, kept on before making late impression nearing finish.
Gradually settled in last few, saved ground turning in, keeping on when tightened on rails 200 M out, fought on dourly to the line.
Settled in midfield, came under pressure around the bend, made no impression in straight.
Gradually taken back to race in rear, commenced move around home bend, sustained effort down centre of straight to just get up on line.

Close up travelling one back in 4th on rails, remained same on rails turning in, had every conceivable hope when a gap opened up early in straight reaching 2nd inside 200 M, failed to sustain effort in the run home.
Settled well in midfield and always in touch, taken wide for a clear run in straight, responded well to finish a creditable 2nd but had no chance with the impressive winner.
Went forward early then caught 3-wide without cover in the group chasing the pace, struggled to go with them inside 400M. Never a factor. (Jockey severely reprimanded re his riding in early stages)
Restrained to a midfield position along the fence, kept to inside throughout and briefly looked threatening inside 300M but soon outpaced by the first three.
3Ls back in a position ahead of midfield and always going strongly, swept to the lead near 200M under hands and heels riding, cruised home.
Held up in last and over 10Ls off the pace as they settled, crept closer approaching home turn, taken wide to challenge but was only one-paced in the drive home.
Made use early to go forward from a wide barrier, dueled for the lead on the outside from 1200M, all out on straightening but was headed near 200M, dropped out rapidly.
Not hurried in early stages, moved out to 2-wide entering the back straight and came widest over the home turn, continued on well for 3rd.
No early speed, raced with last few 8-9Ls off the pace, had plenty to do turning for home, ran on for a non-threatening 6th but a pleasing debut nevertheless.
Never far off in the group chasing the pace, well placed to strike turning for home, ran on but was firmly put in his place by the first three.
Driven early to obtain a forward position, vied for lead throughout and found nothing under pressure turning in, soon beaten.
Briefly led then sat back tracking leader along the rails, had a smooth run to the home stretch, made a mild rally in straight but found no extra in late stages.
Began awkwardly, assumed running in a position behind midfield, switched away from the fence making the final turn, ran on but not pace to challenge.
Driven early to be one out one back from leader, couldn't match the strides of the first two in straight, kept on till weakening final 100 M.
Slow to begin, assumed running towards the rear of the field, had plenty to do turning in and only started to motor inside 200M. Pleasing debut.
2-off the fence towards the rear, came widest making the home turn, made even progress from off the pace but couldn't get close to the leaders.
Shaken up early to hold a position in midfield, caught wide and couldn't handle the turn, made some progress early in straight but was then one paced over the final stages.
In midfield along the inside rail, kept on at the same pace before finding no extra final 100M. (Bled)
Sped to the lead and attempted to make all, travelled strongly and quickened clear inside 400M before losing out a duel with the winner in mid stretch.
Broke well and settled 2-wide in mid-division, driven 400M out but no progress, dropped away and was eased close home.
Placed behind midfield 6Ls off the pace, not picking up on straightening, steadied 200M and remained one paced to the line.
Up with the early pace and raced handily one back, outpaced by the first two on straightening but kept on soundly for 4th.
Never better than midfield, saved ground on the fence, driven inside 350M but lacked a rally. No impression.
Prominently placed behind leaders, moved out to a striking position passing 500M and showed a fine turn of foot to reel in the leader inside 200M. Won impressively.
Lacked early speed and ended up in last over 8Ls away, raced greenly throughout, hung in early in straight and was a difficult ride but stayed on in late stages.
Slow to begin, recovered to a position behind midfield but was caught 3-wide throughout, inclined to hang out in middle stages and lacked any response in the drive home.
Caught wide no cover in midfield, crept closer to the lead passing 800M, kept grinding away under a strong drive to take 3rd in late stages but offered little threat to the first two.
Enjoyed the run of the race stalking the leader along the rail. Maintained a good gallop to the finish.
Began awkwardly settling midfield the fence. stayed on satisfactorily in the run to the line.
Proved difficult to settle in the early stages whilst at the rear of the field. Failed to close off.
Settled 1 out 1 back. Had every chance.
Settled 3 wide with cover slightly worse than midfield. Tracked up nicely early in the straight and found the line to win convincingly.
Worked forward from the widest alley to sit outside the leader. Was well and truly overhauled by the furlong.
Sent forward and dictated an even tempo settling on the rail. Was challenged near the 200m, and gave ground soon after.
Travelled 3 wide and without cover for most of the trip behind the speed. Kept on well in the run to the post.
Raced towards the rear along the paint. Shifted out in the straight and ran on nicely.
Travelled 3 wide, had cover with the back makers. Made no impression in the final stretch.
Blew the start settling with the tail enders, 1 off with cover. Failed to make any ground in the straight.
Raced 2 deep with cover, midfield. Plugged home.
Raced behind midfield 1 off with cover. Commenced to move out prior to the home turn and hit the line strongly.
Dropped back from high draw. Found the fence at 1000M. Slightly closer rounding the turn but was still 10Ls away. Made up many lengths to make frame at finish.
Away in line. Raced behind midfield on fence passing 1000M. Past beaten rivals in the straight.
Stayed 2-wide towards rear despite being urged along. Swung wide and was 10Ls off turning in. Kept making headway in the straight.
Soon with leaders in a 2-wide position through to the home straight. Kept on finding enough to hold off pursuers but not the winner in final strides.

Began awkwardly and was steadied after start. Shaken up from last to race 2-wide behind midfield passing 1000M. 8Ls down near the centre of the track on straightening. Covered substantial ground thereafter.
Quickly into stride but trapped wide. Taken to rear approaching home turn and improved moderately in the straight.
Badly hampered and was crowded for room on jumping. Raced 3-wide ahead of midfield early. Shifted 2-wide at bend and was 5Ls down into final stretch. Closed off well.
Niggled along after fair start. 3-wide without cover in the front rank 850M out. Had a duel with 2nd placegetter in the straight but both were unable to contain the eventual winner near the line.

Urged early and occupied the fence in the leading section. Eased to a prominent spot from 900M. Took a while to pick up and got clear run in the straight. Dashed well and charged down rivals near finish.
Soon led and took fence at 900M. Disputed lead from 800M until peaked 300M.
Pressed early, sat midfield on fence passing 1000M. Ridden from 800M and ran on steadily in the straight. Inconvenienced near 100M.
Driven early. Raced within 3Ls of the speed in a 2-wide position until tired top of home straight.
3-wide at midfield early and middle stages. Covered decent ground thereafter.
Always at rear. No impression.
3-back the rails and 4Ls off pace in middle stages; pressured turning for home; checked at the 300m and any chance soon disappeared.
One from rear about 8Ls from pace at 1000m; closer about 5Ls down turning for home; never really troubled the principals.
Enjoyed the box-seat run on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd or so until halfway when ridden along to stay in touch; was beaten before the final bend.
Close-up but 3-wide no cover throughout; 1L back in 3rd at halfway out wide; briefly led at top of home straight; stuck to task well; just missed a place.
Slowest out; between 8Ls and 10Ls until the 600m; launched a strong challenge down centre of home straight to lead in final two strides.
Nicely placed with cover about 2Ls from the pace before the home turn; led along the inner about 100m out; grabbed by winner in final strides.
Slotted in midfield with cover passing post for first time; 1L down and with every chance off last turn and at 200m; run peaked close home.
6Ls off pace with cover at 1200m around midfield; 3Ls down turning for home; kept on strongly for a place.
Rearward in 11th or so down the back straight; 6Ls adrift at the 800m; briefly looked a place hope at the 300m but run faded somewhat final 100m.
2-wide and 3Ls off pace in mid-div at the 1200m; loomed a lot closer at last turn; led 250m out had every chance to at least place; just missed out.
Led on fence by 1L passing post first around; headed at top of home straight and soon swamped.
4-back on the rails 5Ls off speed at the 1000m; edged a little closer on straightening for home; soon outpaced.
