Pressed on out wide early on to race 2-wide in 2nd with 1L off pace from 1800m to home straight; lacked a turn of foot and retreated by the 200m.
Best away but allowed to ease back to midfield about 4Ls off pace until home turn when going well; led 150m out; ran on strongly.
2-wide around midfield about 5Ls off pace at the 800m and similar turning for home; ran on well to nick 4th in dying strides.
A little slowly away but rushed up to lead 900m out; all out to hold 2nd place off last bend; dropped out.
Caught 3 and 4-wide without cover throughout; better than midfield before home turn but weakened sharply after the tough trip.
Rearward on the rails 7Ls from early pace; 6Ls down turning for home; finished off strongly for a place.
Eased back from wide gate; 8Ls last at halfway and same turning for home; ran on very strongly down centre for 2nd; post came too soon.
4-back the rails about 5Ls from the speed at halfway; found nothing off the bridle. (Bled.)
On the rails in rear some 8Ls off early pace; not much closer on straightening; nearest at the finish but no real threat overall.
Never any better than midfield; 6Ls in 10th behind early and same turning for home; recovered some minor late ground; never nearer.
Box-seated in 3rd at the 900m; 2Ls back in 3rd off last turn, stayed on pretty well in the straight but lacked the dash of leading quintet.
5Ls back in midfield initially; ridden along to remain in touch at the last bend; one-paced.
Away well; led or a close 2nd down the back; 2Ls clear off final bend; headed by winner 150m out; lost 4th place on the line.
At least 7Ls off pace in 12th or so before final bend; retrieved some late ground; never nearer.
3-back the rails in 4th about 4Ls from pace before home turn; lacked a decisive turn of foot.
Sat outside the lead, enjoyed the slow early sectionals, ran on until 200M, out of fuel.
Behind midfield, 4.5Ls off the leader on the rails, not suited by the slow tempo, flattened in straight.
Midfield, 3.5Ls off the leader 2 wide, harmed by the slow pace, held up 400M, dashed well when clear.
Bumped start and lost ground, 5.5Ls off the leader along the rails, harmed by the slow pace and overraced, no turn of foot in final stages.
Eased to sit in midfield, 3Ls off the slow pace 3 wide no cover, made advantageous early move 800M, led 300M, hung on strongly until 50M when overhauled, ran on for 2nd.
Behind midfield, 4.5Ls off the leader 3 wide, not suited by the slow tempo, moved forward 800M, dashed well 300M and once had threats, however run ended and weakened quickly 100M.
Took rail and led by 0.5L at advantageous slow sectionals, soon overhauled 300M, weakened 250M.
Eased to sit in midfield, 4.5Ls off the leader 2-3 wide, dashed strongly 250M to run 3rd despite harmed by the slow pace.
Settled in box seat, 1.5Ls behind the slow pace, lacked room 400M, emptied 200M.
Prominent, 2Ls off the leader 2 wide, not suited by the slow tempo, just held ground in straight.
Eased back, 5.5Ls off the leader 2-3 wide, harmed by the slow pace, dashed impressively 250M to win.
Eased to rear, 7Ls off the leader 3-4 wide, little dash 200M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Midfield along the fence, 3Ls off the leader, not suited by the slow pace, weakened quickly 400M.
Eased to rear, 6Ls off the leader 3-4 wide, harmed by the slow pace, no progress.
Bumped at start, soon taken back to settle in last few stalking HAPPY ZERO, went wide into straight, finished off race strongly down centre of straight to assert authority final strides.
Settled at the back, came under pressure soon after straightening, fought on gamely to do best work late.
Did not begin well, travelled in midfield to straight, did not find much room early on, faded under pressure inside final 200 M.
Settled on rails in better than midfield within 3Ls of speed, disputed 3rd when closer up turning in, fought on dourly to hold every chance inside 200 M only to be out-sprinted close to home.
Soon taken back to travel behind midfield, did not find much room early in straight, finished off race quite well inside final 200 M.
Settled at the back and last one into straight, only ran past well-beaten runners closing stages.

Shared pace down far side after beginning from a wide draw, eventually took over coming out of back straight, led them until joined 300 M out, fought on well to only narrowly miss a placing final strides.
Broke well, settled one back on rails, came under pressure to draw level with EGYPTIAN RA after straightening, soon faded out of it inside 200 M.
Began with others, soon taken back to midfield but remained 3-wide far side, switched out to challenge approaching home turn but soon weakened under pressure.
Slightly inconvenienced at start, settled on rails in midfield, saved ground on inside turning in, kept on same pace without quickening.
Settled behind midfield, went wide into straight, loomed up to hold every chance inside final 200 M, only to be overshadowed by GOOD BA BA at the finish.
Prominent and wide without cover, gave ground quickly from approaching 500 M.
Settled 2-wide in 2L 3rd, faded gradually in straight.
Settled in forward of midfield, soon came under pressure after straightening, gradually faded.
Travelled 2-wide in mid-division, quickly swept to the front nearing 200M and kept on strongly to hold off the persistent runner up.
Settled well in 4th along the fence and had a smooth run behind leaders, had every chance inside 300M, kept on well but couldn't find the extra to seriously challenge.
Held up in midfield along the inside and waited with till 350M, stayed on towards the line but made little impression on the first two.
Patiently held up in 2nd last about 10Ls away from the pace, took time to muster in straight before running on strongly final 200M to finish a non-threatening 3rd.
Soon crossed to the rails and settled behind midfield, held up to 300M before squeezing through a gap to challenge, pushed the winner all the way to the line but was always held.
Towards the rear 8-9Ls back and swung wide into the straight, progressed steadily inside 400M but not pace to challenge the first two.
Tracked the pace throughout, moved alongside leader over the home turn and took over nearing 400M, kept on till headed 250M then weakened rapidly towards the line.
Up with the early pace, settled 2-wide in 3rd and placed 3Ls behind leader, well positioned to strike turning in but lacked the needed response despite a strong drive, no extra close home.

Taken back to last, not hurried and trailed over 10Ls behind leader, made limited progress when taken wide to challenge, never threatened but was a fair effort considering the strength of the opposition.
Driven early, soon crossed to the fence and took them along evenly, 2Ls clear down the back straight but was pegged back turning for home, soon weakened and faded out of contention.
Positive jump, ended up in 1 out 1 back spot, enjoyed a good run throughout, came around heels turning, made good ground and looked set to pick up winner but hung out late.
Moderate beginning, ended up just behind midfield 6Ls from pace, had an easy trip on rails throughout, had chance in straight but just stuck on at one speed.
Reasonable break, ideally placed 3 to 4Ls off pace on rails, travelled well to bend, looked a brief place chance but just held ground last 200 M.
Fast out, took lead easily and rolled along at decent sections, 1 to 2Ls clear turning, overtaken inside 300 M and steadily gave ground.
Out in line, inconvenienced on settling and as a consequence was posted wide without cover, keen throughout 4 to 5Ls back, didn't finish off after a hard run.
Ended up in midfield 4 to 5Ls back in running line, used little in run, worked into clear turning, closed nicely to make frame (checked late).
No early pace, ended up back with last few 10Ls or so from speed, gave a big start on bend, made many lengths to be nearest on line.
Worked from widest alley to sit outside leader, used a bit with decent speed on, 2Ls down on turning, kept on to 200 M but peaked on effort thereafter.
Drifted back from an awkward draw, 8Ls back in running line, came wide from 500 M, closed sharply final 300 M making remarkable ground for 3rd (inconvenienced late).
Average beginning, soon in rear division, 9Ls back on rails, not asked throughout, didn't find at business end, not a factor.
Out in line, urged up to take leaders back, no excuse in run, set out after leader when 2Ls down turning, went clear inside 200 M and just did enough to hold off late challenger.
Lacked early speed, checked at 1000 M, 7 to 8Ls away on rails throughout, saved ground on turning, didn't find much and was unable to see out trip final 300 M.
Taken back to find cover, ended up worse than midfield 3 wide 7Ls or so from speed, did work throughout and didn't settle, unable to close. (See Racing Incidents regarding riding.)
Restrained to be nearer to rails, ended up sharing tail best part of 10Ls from top end, set plenty to do well back to bend, made only moderate ground.
Allowed to relax in midfield 5Ls or more from top end, all favours in run, balanced up turning in and let down with powerful sprint, ran away final 200 M to score convincingly.
Began with more purpose, unable to slot in and raced 3 wide without cover in midfield, keen throughout, didn't finish off when workload took toll.
Midfield early, worked forward when wide to sit first outside leader, 2Ls back throughout, close enough on bend but battled inside 300 M tiring late.
Standard jump, ridden up to settle 4Ls back on rails, tracked speed nicely to bend, held up turning, sent back to inside and finished soundly to snare 2nd, winner in different grade.
Drifted back to last after checked at 1500 M, 10Ls away sharing tail throughout, never looked likely and didn't see out trip.
Out in line, restrained to rear, 10Ls or so away in mid section, saved plenty of ground rounding bend, made good progress to 200 M before run ended.
Forced to drift back to angle into running line, checked at 1400 M and difficult to settle, 6 to 7Ls down on bend, closed off well to take place behind some smart ones.
Standard beginning, rolled forward from a wide alley to take up running, kept pace genuine, skipped 3Ls clear early in straight, tackled inside 200 M and lost place late.
Showed early speed, positioned close up in 1 out 1 back spot, improved into clear on turning, lacked finish and just plugged away in straight.
Drifted back from outside alley, was around 9Ls away on rails, still had plenty to do turning, passed only tired runners in straight.
Taken back from widest alley in rear division, 8Ls off leaders in running line, well back to bend, made some late progress without threatening.
Fair beginning, faded back to be 3 wide behind midfield, 8Ls or so away throughout, had cover to bend, didn't look likely in straight.
Out in line, taken down to rails, 7 to 8Ls off speed throughout, spared in middle stages, steadied at 200 M and didn't see much daylight in straight. Not fully tested.
Showed plenty of speed, took a trail after 200 M, did share of work with honest tempo, struggling turning, faded out thereafter.
Up with the early pace but travelled 3-wide without cover throughout, driven 300 M and briefly threatened but found no extra in late stages. (Retired after race.)
Even beak, couldn't shift in and was caught 4-wide without cover in midfield, lacked pace to challenge going into final 300 M, never dangerous.
Driven out early, tracked leader, had every chance turning in but run ended 200 M, no extra close home.
Broke well, held back to sit in midfield not far off leaders, into clear 300 M and plugged on for a non-threatening 4th.
Assumed running in midfield after a sluggish start, checked and shuffled back approaching home turn, ran on final 300 M but couldn't get close to the leaders.
Jumped well from the widest barrier but couldn't muster speed early, shuffled back to a rearward spot 4-wide making the home turn, outpaced from 400 M and beaten.
Slowly away then improved to a midfield position along the inside, ran on strongly final 150 M to take 2nd but made little impression on the winner.
Slow to begin and raced 3-wide behind midfield 5Ls off the pace, never picked up and remained one-paced throughout.
Standard jump then switched off the back, under pressure nearing 400 M but couldn't find much off the bridle. Never a factor.
Dropped back to last, had 5Ls to make up passing 400 M, ran on well down the outside and was the only horse that could make ground from off the pace.
Chased the pace along the inside fence, couldn't close the gap on the runaway leader but kept on well for 3rd.
Quickly into stride, enjoyed an uncontested lead and opened up a 1-1/2L gap inside 300 M, kept on stoutly to the line and was never seriously challenged.
Roughed up on jumping, settling behind midfield on the rail. Made good ground over the latter stages.
Settled midfield, 2-deep with cover. Struggled in the straight.
Hampered at the start settling at the rear, 1-off with cover. Failed to make any appreciable headway in the final stretch.
Raced 1-out-1-back for the greater part of the race. Was 3-back after the 600 M but found nothing in the run to the post.
Camped on the back of the leader along the paint. No excuses.
Worked forward for most of the trip and was never really better than 3-wide without cover until assuming a 1-off position outside the leader near the 600 M. Kept on well in the run home.

Coursed wide early before joining the leader and traveling 1-off from about the 1100 M. Handed up and took a trailing position near the 600 M. Shifted out on the home turn and closed off well to come up just short.
Badly crowded at the start settling on the rail at the tail of the field. Commenced to run on strongly however over the concluding stages ran into traffic problems and went to the wire untested.
Travelled midfield, 3-wide with cover for most of the trip. Failed to close off.
Held the fence from the inside gate and dictated terms in front. Had every possible chance.
Settled behind midfield after being crowded at the start, 2-deep with cover. Made good late ground from well off the leaders.
Parked midfield the fence. Peeled out 3-deep approaching the final bend, hit the lead at the 100 M and managed to secure victory under aggressive riding.
Began awkwardly. Driven to race in midfield on fence 700 M out. 4Ls away on straightening. Not much to offer.
Slow to begin, failed to muster and shared rear. Never in contention.
Awkward jump. Shaken but trapped 3-wide at midfield early. Slotted into a 2-wide position behind midfield near 650 M. Ran on fairly in the straight.
Away with them, restrained towards rear in a 2-wide position early. 7Ls down on rail entering the home straight. Covered good ground thereafter.
Pressured along the fence to stay within 2Ls of the pace through to the home turn. Failed to turn up a notch under vigorous riding final stretch.
Pressed after start and sat 2-wide behind leader 700 M out. Kept chasing the winner in the straight but was always held by a 1L gap.
Urged early on fence and took lead from the Rock. Always had enough to fend off rivals.
Raced within 3Ls of the pace in a 3-wide position through to the home straight. No response when asked.
Jumped well from high draw. Ridden along to stay in the front rank but trapped 3-wide through to the home straight. Ran on steadily to the line.
Jumped awkwardly, niggled along the fence and raced behind midfield. 5Ls away on straightening. Made up minor ground.
Quickly into stride, raced 2-wide ahead of midfield approaching the Rock. Made even progress in the straight without serious threat to the front pair.
Always at rear. No impression.
3-wide with cover one from rear 5Ls back in middle stages; same margin off but midfield turning in; ran on well but post came too soon for the win.
Led by 2Ls on fence at 1000 M; slightly further clear on straightening; pegged back winner 250 M out and tipped out of the money soon after.
Performance deemed unacceptable; handily placed early on; checked when retreating about 450 M out; dropped out.
Disputed early pace before handing up and 2Ls back in 2nd mid-race; hard pressed to lie up turning for home; faded.
3-back the rails in midfield at halfway; 5Ls back in 6th turning for home; kept on fairly well; just missed a place.
Didn't break well and soon worse than midfield about 5Ls from the pace; widest turning for home; didn't make much headway. (Tactic questioned.)
Slowest out; 4-back the rails at the 1200 M; same and 6Ls behind leader turning for home; remained behind midfield.
3-wide but with cover in rear initially; 4Ls off pace at halfway; advanced when 3-wide no cover from 500 M to lead 250 M out; kept up to his work.
Led soon after the break; handed up the advantage and 3Ls back in 5th at halfway and further back off last bend; lacked a turn of foot. (Questioned.)
3Ls off leader in midfield early on; shuffled further back before last bend; very one-paced to conclude.
Slow to muster early pace; 4th or so 3-wide no cover at 1000 M; 2-wide at the 500 M; one-paced in the straight but still held a place.
Never really in the hunt; went back from wide gate and 6Ls last; a little further behind turning for home; no impression.
Over-raced through initial stages when 2Ls back in 4th; about 3Ls off in 8th turning for home; flat inside final 300 M. (Questioned.)
Better than midfield with cover within 2Ls of the pace before last turn; one-paced to conclude.
Rearward about 5Ls or 6Ls from pace before final bend; very one-paced to wind up.
4-back the rails around 4Ls off the pace mid-race; going well cornering in; got the breaks and quickened up well to lead 50 M out; readily.
3-wide no cover early on; 2-wide and 1L back in 2nd at the 500 M; still with every chance of a place 300 M out; tired late on.
3-back the rails some 3Ls off pace at 800 M and off last bend; 1L down and vying for 3rd at 200 M; no chance winner but nicked 2nd on the line.
Soon led but couldn't cross to the fence until the 600 M; 1L clear turning for home; headed 250 M out; run of out the frame inside final 100 M.
3-wide sometimes without cover throughout; within 2Ls or so of the speed better than mid-div before last turn; yielded ground.
Best away but happy to take box-seat on rails in 3rd until final bend when going well; led 250 M out but grabbed by winner 50 M out and lost 2nd on the line.
Trapped 4-wide no cover throughout; within 3Ls of pace in midfield before last turn; extra work took its toll in the home stretch.
Failed to muster much early pace; 4Ls back in 9th at the 800 M; never dangerous down the centre of the home straight. (Tactic questioned.) (Blood in trachea.)
Switched inside from widest gate; rear or one from rear 5Ls or so from pace before last bend; made up some late ground to nick 4th on line.
Midfield, 3Ls behind the leader 2-wide, not suited by the slow sectionals, flattened in straight.

Slow away, pushed to keep up in midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the leader, raced 5 to 6-wide throughout and lost significant amount of ground at bends, harmed by the slow pace, ran on OK to the line despite all negative situations, good effort.
Settled in prominent spot, 1-1/2Ls behind the leader 2-wide, favoured by the slow tempo, ran on well to the line for 2nd without threat to winner.
Clipped heels after start, eased to rear and took rail, 6-1/2Ls off the leader, harmed by the slow pace, little dash 100 M.
Pushed forward, 1-1/2Ls behind the slow pace, trapped 3 to 4-wide without cover throughout and lost ground, soon weaken 300 M.
Pushed to obtain the box seat, benefited by the slow pace, however lack turn of foot and just held ground in straight.
Settled outside the lead, enjoyed the slow early sectionals, however soon weakened 250 M.
Took lead easily by 1/2L and clocked favourable slow early sectionals, never challenged after straightening.
Pushed early but failed to cross in front, trapped 4 to 5-wide throughout in midfield, 2-1/2Ls off the leaders, harmed by the slow pace and lost too much ground at bends, emptied 250 M.
Eased back, took rail and then ridden along to hold a midfield spot, 3Ls off the leader, not suited by the slow tempo, no turn of foot in final stages.
Eased back, 4-1/2Ls off the leader along the fence, harmed by the slow pace, held up from 400 M to 200 M, dashed well when clear and finished 3rd.
Midfield, 3Ls off the leader 3-wide, not suited by the slow tempo, flattened 200 M.
Soon taken back to rear of field racing keenly far side, obtained a clear passage over 250 M out, kept on well to the line. (Rider dropped whip and rein 150 M.)

Driven forward to dispute lead on rails, held 1L advantage when fellow pacesetter faded out after straightening, unable to match winner's late burst of speed and headed inside 200 M, hung on best of the rest.
Began from the widest barrier, trailed the field to straight, made significant progress down centre of straight, did best work late. (Questioned for riding in straight.)
Travelled in forward of midfield in 5th position, similar but wider turning in, responded well to assert authority 100 M out, comfortably.
Began awkwardly, settled on rails in rear of midfield, shifted off rails for a run turning in, tightened inside 200 M, made no further impression.
Raced wide without cover in rear of midfield throughout, soon weakened in straight.
Began well, settled one back on rails, lost position leaving Rock to become more than 2Ls off the speed, saved ground turning in, dropped out tamely under pressure.
Settled behind midfield, made no impression in the run home.
With leaders early, settled one-out-one-back in 3rd to straight, gradually weakened under pressure.
Settled at the back on rails, saved ground turning in, snuck up under pressure along rails to be nearest at finish.
Raced wide without cover in midfield briefly early, taken back towards rear for cover afterwards, still wide straightening, ran home one paced.
Began moderately but soon ridden forward to join leaders, dropped quickly out of contention after straightening.
Well enough away, stalked leader one back before taking over near 550 M, looked the winner in early straight but had no answer to the winner final 100 M.
Broke well then dropped back to 7th in mid-pack, 3-wide swinging for home, made steady headway final 300 M but offered little threat to the first two.
Chased leaders on the fence, always in touch, outpaced approaching the home straight and didn't respond to urging. (Bled 2nd time.)
Overcame a wide draw and managed to slot into a 2-wide position in midfield, travelled nicely to bend and driven from 400 M, kept on strongly to lead entering 100 M and held off the 2nd comfortably.
Settled behind midfield along the inside, outpaced making the final turn and shuffled back to last going into straight, soon beaten.
Raced towards the rear and not hurried in early stages, progressed to midfield over the final turn, ran on well to go 2nd 100 M from home.
Went forward and placed handily in 3rd, under whip passing 500 M, not picked up and soon faded out of contention.

Patiently held up towards the back, crept closer passing the Rock and swung widest into straight, made even progress final 300 M but inclined to lay in and required corrective measures from the jockey.
Towards the rear along the inside fence, shuffled back to last approaching home turn, effort from 500 M, took a while to muster before finishing off the race strongly inside 200 M.
Made some use early to go forward, led from 1000 M to final turn, kept on till weakening final 200 M.

Held a midfield position and saved ground along the fence, 4Ls behind leader turning for home, steadied and had to shift ground near 150 M then finished off the race mildly. (Jockey reported his mount hanging in throughout the race.)
Switched off the back and settled over 10Ls behind leader, advanced 3-wide passing 700 M, stayed on without reaching leaders.
Held up patiently behind mid-division, saved ground by keeping to the inside but had to shift out near 300M to make his challenge, finished off the race strongly.
Never better than midfield, raced greenly and hung in over the final 300M. Never a threat.
Not hurried and gradually taken across to a fence spot in the rear group, 7Ls behind leader turning into straight, driven but no progress.
Caught 3-wide in a position ahead of midfield, kept on same pace before finding no extra final 100M.
2-wide behind mid-division, soon into clear turning in, quickened up nicely to finish 2nd but was comfortably held by the winner.
Lacked early pace, ended up in last trailing 7Ls behind the pace, taken wide to make his move approaching home straight, made up some ground but couldn't reach leaders.
Even break, placed handily in 3rd and within striking distance always, ran on and briefly looked threatening near 250M but turned flat in late stages.
3Ls back in 4th and enjoyed a smooth run along the inside throughout, ran on well in his debut although offering little threat to the principals.
Recovered from a slow start to take the lead passing near 800M, drew 2Ls clear passing 400M, kept on till 100M then weakened into 6th.
Towards the rear 7Ls back, no response when driven inside 400M, never any impression.
Settled nicely in midfield, angled into clear 300M and showed a good turn of foot to take it up near 100M then kept on well to hold off the runner up.
Made early running until 800M, found nothing turning in and weakened rapidly, heavily eased. (Heart Irregularity.)
Positioned behind midfield, 1 off with cover. Quickened nicely down the middle of the course and had the race in its keeping a furlong from home.
Raced midfield the fence, only battled away in the run home.
Settled at the rear of the field 1 off with cover. Never a factor. Found to be lame in the left fore leg the following day.
Travelled slightly worse than midfield the fence. Railed up early in the final stretch and ranged up as a place threat before ending its run over the concluding stages.
Sent forward and led at a brisk tempo along the fence. Faded in the straight. A post race endoscopic examination showed a substantial amount of blood in the horse's trachea. (To trial.)
Traced the leader on the rail. Kept on satisfactorily.
Raced 3 back, 1 off with cover. Challenged for the minors near the furlong but faded over the latter stages.
Raced in 2nd position, 1 off. Hit the front near the 400m, stayed on soundly.
Began awkwardly settling at the rear of the field along the paint. Came down the centre of the course but only plodded to the post.
Settled back in the race, 2 deep with cover. Shifted out near the 350 M and ran on nicely.
Settled with the backmakers on the rail. Failed to close off.
Raced midfield, 2 deep with cover. Peeled out for clear running early in the straight but only paddled to the finish.
Settled behind midfield, 3 wide with cover. Kept on one paced in the straight.
Raced around midfield but was caught 3 wide and without cover for most of the journey. Struggled in the straight.
In front rank until struggled 400M from home.
Always within 3Ls of the leading section. One-paced to conclude.
Travelled within 2Ls of the pace one-off the stand's rail. Shifted in for clear running from 400M and hit front 150M. Pushed by the 2nd placegetter but kept on strongly to score victory.
Raced towards rear down the centre of the track. Couldn't turn up a notch when the race got serious.
3Ls away behind midfield early. Pressed from 500M but kept at the same pace. Beat tired rivals home.
Midfield early but gradually dropped to rear passing midpoint. Never likely.
Began awkwardly and raced 4Ls back early and middle stages. Weaved through horses to make his run from 400M and finished off fairly well.
Raced beside the leader until faded passing 400M.
Stayed within 3Ls of the speed on stand's rail. Picked up well passing 350M. Looked dangerous at 150M but was always held by a narrow margin.
Away in line. Steadied near 900M and was 4Ls away on stand's rail. Under pressure passing 400M and gave some response. Covered minor ground late.
Quickly into stride. Took lead on stand's rail passing 800M. Hung on until peaked 200M.
At midfield towards centre of the track early and middle stages. No response when asked passing 400M.
Slow to begin. Raced amongst runners at midfield early. Commenced his run from 400M. Ran on well but couldn't match on terms with the front pair. Clung on for 3rd.
3-wide with cover in midfield about 6Ls off pace at halfway; no real threat while finishing off nearer the stands' rails.
Missed start badly losing 7Ls immediately; soon tacked onto main body; 7Ls back and wide turning in; finished closer to stands' rail but no danger.
Away well; 2Ls in front 1000m out; skipped 3Ls clear and going well turning for home; kept up to his work to score unchallenged.
4-back the rails about 6Ls back in midfield at halfway; kept on pretty well in the straight to nick 3rd close home.
Led initially before handing up; 3Ls off pace in 2nd at the 800m and same into straight; 2Ls back at furlong; one-paced and lost a place final strides. (Questioned.)
Towards rear at first before pressing on 4-wide without cover from 700m out; 5Ls back in 6th turning for home; very one-paced to wrap up.
3-back the rails 4Ls off lead in 4th at 1000m; 5Ls back in same spot off last bend; a little held up at the 100m but appeared held from the frame anyway.
7Ls off pace with cover early on and similar around 10th at last turn; recovered some minor late ground.
Eased back from wide gate; keen in places; about 7Ls off pace in rear at halfway; didn't find much off the bridle. (Blood in trachea.)
Towards rear 5-back on the rails down the backstretch; at least 7Ls off in 12th at last bend; not much room inside final 200m; not fully tested.
3-wide no cover down the back straight while midfield; about 5Ls back off last curve; faded out soon after the extra work.
Always handy in the run; 4Ls off leader and winner but pressured straightening for home; responded fairly well but no threat to winner.
2-wide in midfield 5Ls off initial tempo; 6Ls down in midfield turning for home; made no impression. (Questioned.)
Very reluctant at the start with head up and lost 6Ls easily; 8Lsd last at halfway; made some very minor late ground nearer the stands' rails.
Always prominent; keen in places; 2-wide and 1L back in 2nd at halfway; led at top of home straight but headed 200m out; hung onto a place.
Better than midfield early; 3-wide no cover from the 800m; pressed on 1L down in 3rd off last bend but struggling to remain in touch; soon beaten.
Led by 1L at the 1000m; headed at the top of the home straight; weakened rapidly. (Blood in trachea.)
7Ls back in 12th initially; good headway turning for home and 1L back in 3rd at the 200m; bumped in final strides before leading on the line.
Bumped at start; pressed on to race 2nd initially then box-seated from 800m to home turn; had his chance to place.
On the rails in 6th about 4Ls off pace at 800m; 3Ls back but held up for a run from top of straight to the 200m; possibly unlucky to finish closer.
3-wide with cover in 10th in middle stages; closer within 3Ls of speed off last bend and led 200m out; shifted left final 50m; lost 2nd on the line.
Checked at 1000m; on fence 6Ls back in 11th at 1000m; 4Ls down at the last bend; kept on at same pace and no danger to trouble principals.
Crowded at start; midfield with cover about 4Ls off speed down the back; 3Ls down cornering in; had his chance but lacked a turn of foot.
Bumped at start; behind midfield 3-wide but with cover at the 800m; closer but pressured turning in; run peaked 200m out; weak effort; to trial. (Questioned for disappointing performance.)
3Ls off pace in 5th at the 1000m; ideally positioned 2Ls back in 4th off last bend; found nothing off the bit and beaten before the 200m.
Niggled along early one from rear and 8Ls off pace; 5Ls back turning in; kept on widest down centre of the track; nearly placed; better for further.
Went back from wide gate; between 6Ls and 9Ls before last bend; never remotely dangerous.
Slowest out; 5Ls off early speed; 4-back on the rails on circle; held up cornering and checked 300m out; never saw much daylight; ignore run. (Not tested.)
Took rail easily but led by 1.5Ls at fast early sectionals, made all to score unchallenged.
Eased back, 9Ls off the leader 3 wide, favoured by the fast pace, just ran on fairly in straight.
Pushed early to hold the rail in midfield, 6Ls off the leader, benefited by the fast pace, made ground 200M.
Pushed early to occupy a midfield spot, 4.5Ls off the leader 2 wide, helpd by the fast pace, made ground 250M.
Eased to rear, more than 10Ls off the leader 2-3 wide, helped by the fast tempo, stayed flat until 200M, made some ground.
Eased back, 7.5Ls off the leader on the rails, suited by the fast pace, no progress.
Eased back, 7.5Ls off the leader 3 wide, favoured by the fast pace, made ground steadily 300M and finished 2nd.
Eased back, 9Ls off the leader along the fence, favoured by the fast pace, lacked room 4-2, progressed steadily when clear.
Hard ridden early to obtain a midfield spot, 4Ls off the leader 3 wide, suited by the fast tempo, just held ground in straight.
Prominent, 3Ls off the leader 2 wide, suited by the fast tempo, flattened 200M.
Eased to take the box seat, not suited by the fast tempo, ran on well to the line for 3rd.
Pushed forward, 3Ls behind the fast pace along the fence, clipped heels 800, blundered and rider almost dislodged, weakened 400M.
Awkward away, never competitive, tailed out.
Eased to sit behind midfield, 6Ls off the leader 3 wide, suited by the fast tempo, only ran on fairly in straight.
Began awkwardly, travelled in midfield, found nothing under pressure passing halfway mark, soon dropped out. (Lame next day.)
Disputed lead, came under pressure to hold prominent position passing 400 M, kept on same pace to finish.
Travelled in midfield, met minor interferences 300 M out, kept on well for a somewhat nice run over an apparently insufficient trip.
Began awkwardly, settled in rear of midfield, making ground when forced to switch inside 200 M, continued to close on leaders to the line.
Close up, failed to respond under pressure passing 400 M, gave ground from 150 M.
Never far off, commenced move 300 M out, responded well to overhaul front-runners passing the 100 M mark, authoritative victory.
Inconvenienced at start, soon settled in last few, never a danger.
Not far off the speed without cover in the centre of the straight course, found nothing under pressure in closing stages.
Showed good early speed gradually crossing to stands side while in front, hung in away from rails passing 300 M and only headed by smart winner 100 M out.
Close up, commenced to lose touch coming onto course proper, soon weakened. (Questioned for disappointing performance.)

Tightened jumping out, remained in last few down centre of the track racing without cover, came under pressure at midway mark but could only keep on steadily past well beaten horses in the run up to the line.
Broke well, settled not far off the speed along stands rails, gradually gave ground after coming onto the course proper.
Behind midfield when inconvenienced and lost position 800 M out, ran past well beaten horses inside final 200 M.
Midfield to halfway, folded up quickly coming onto course proper.
Held inside running in midfield, briefly threatened with a promising looking run inside 300M but could find no extra in the closing stages.
Settled 2-wide in midfield, made a mild rally down the inside under a strong drive but couldn't reach the leaders.
Checked at the start and lost ground, ended up in last pair 8-9Ls behind leaders, trapped on the inside in straight and lacked racing room to 100M, eased late on.
Broke well and took up a 2-wide position ahead of midfield, badly blundered and shifted out abruptly near 450M, recovered but could only finish off the race at the same pace.
Vied for lead with two other runners, took a 1L lead inside 400M but was soon headed, weakened badly in late stages.
Caught wide in midfield throughout, hampered and pushed wider near 450M, began to hit top gear halfway up the straight, led 150M from home and held on.

Along the fence in the chasing group behind leaders, swiftly moved to the front in straight and looked a big danger until challenged by the winner inside 150M, rallied on and only went down by a narrow margin.
Chased leaders in 4th, moved into a striking position approaching the top of the straight but was unable to quicken once coming under pressure, faded away 200m out.
Settled behind mid-division and swung wide into straight, stayed on down the outside but lacked the extra gear to challenge the first three.
Switched off the back from the outset and was way off the pace in early stages, responded to pressure in straight and got motoring final 200M to come within half a length of the winner.
Pressed on early and vied for lead on the inside, soon outpaced turning for home, eased when no chance passing 200 M.
Held up behind midfield but not far off from leaders, shifted out to a clear path inside 350M, ran on well for some distance before hitting a flat spot in late stages.
Driven out to press the lead on the outside of three, weakened going into straight, soon behind.
Awkwardly away, behind midfield 7Ls away from the strong early pace, taken wide to make his move but lacked the needed response. Never a factor.
Slow into stride, mustered into prominent spot 1 out 1 back, had run of race to bend, cut back inside on turning, chased well to line.
On speed from outset, sat behind lead group 2 to 3Ls back on rails, no excuses to bend, came to inside but peaked final 200 M, just held ground in run to line.
Drifted back to rear division, raced 8Ls back at tail, urged along 3 wide on bend, found little in straight.
Out in line, ended up 3 wide just worse than midfield, had OK run 5Ls back, improved circle and came 4 wide turning, asserted final 200 M and kept on to score.
Speed early, raced freely and pressed early leader, continued to race keenly when took up front, folded at 200 M after early work.
Positive to begin, trapped 3 wide without cover 3Ls back, worked in mid-section, crept close to challenge on bend, ran out of petrol final 100 M after hard run.
Began with purpose from a wide alley, worked hard early 3 wide, eventually crossed to be 2 wide outside leader, struggling turning, faded when workload took toll.
Slotted into midfield, had easy time throughout, tracked well approaching bend, didn't have a clear run on turning in, finished nicely final 200 M when clear.
Led soon after start, handed up when challengers continued, overraced behind them thereafter, still behind leader to bend, didn't let down in straight.
Faded back as usual, settled last on fence, 8Ls or so from lead, had job to do on bend, switched out and made considerable ground late.
Standard jump, 4 to 5Ls away on rails in middle stages, used nothing to bend, not much room early straight and steadied 200 M, closed well clear.
Tardy into stride, positioned behind midfield 5 to 6Ls back, quiet time to bend, very one paced in straight.
Began poorly, raced keenly 7Ls or so back on fence, still in rear division and in traffic on turn, took inside runs but finish was poor final 300 M.
Drifted back soon after start, raced 3 wide in rear division 6 to 7Ls back with cover, tracked eventual winner on bend, worked home soundly.
Away well, pressed on to sit outside leader, had every chance in middle stages, right there turning, kept finding to not go down by much.
Lost ground early, shared rear 7Ls from top end, had field to beat turning, no real progress and just passed tired ones late.
Fast out, worked to take up running from widest gate, set a standard tempo, hung on bend and drifted out turning, stayed on well to make frame.
Began with first few, taken to rails and trailed first 3 2Ls back, easy run to bend, kept on behind them without threatening.
No early speed, drifted back and settled behind midfield, raced 4 to 5Ls back in running line, fair run to bend, kept on in straight making late headway.
Faded back to rear soon after start, 7Ls or so away, pace didn't suit in mid-section, made some late ground.
Plenty of speed, led before taking a trail, had run of race on leaders back, gained inside run turning, went to front and held on with a little in hand.
Out well enough, ridden up to be in first half, 3 to 4Ls back but raced 3 wide albeit with cover, close enough turning, peaked at 200 M.
Angled back from an awkward draw, ended up on rails 6Ls or so from lead, well back and last turning, no response in straight.
Slotted nicely into 1 out 1 back spot soon after start, on bit throughout, awkwardly placed on turning, kept chasing when clear final 200 M to work winner right to post.
Average jump and didn't take usual role in front, checked at 850 M, was 5Ls down on turning in, didn't finish off in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began with rest, ended up midfield or slightly worse 3 wide, still 4Ls down on turning, made a brief challenge but didn't go on final furlong.
Standard jump, posted 4 wide without cover 5Ls back, had a tough run throughout, 2 to 3Ls down turning, faded when petrol ran out.
Average jump, ended up 5Ls back 3 wide with cover, improved on bend and came 4 wide turning, made gradual progress to be nearest on line.
Ended up behind midpack after a slow start, saved ground on the inside 4 to 5Ls back, driven 350 M out but no progress. Never a factor.
Crossed to the fence soon after the start then vied for lead to straight, kicked 1L clear turning in, all out but was swamped inside 100 M.
Placed in midfield 3Ls off leaders, made a crucial move away from the fence passing 400 M, progressed steadily to lead near 100 M and found the necessary to hold on.
Never far off the pace, one off the fence in the chasing group behind leading pair, drifted to the inside 350 M out and finished off at the same pace only.
Dropped back to a 2-wide position behind midfield, over 4Ls behind nearing the top of the straight, closed off the race well when clear inside 200 M. Narrowly beaten.
Taken back and racing towards the rear throughout, 6Ls behind leader passing 400 M and ran on strongly down the outside to finish within a neck of the winner.

Broke well from the advantageous inside draw, placed handily behind leaders and swiftly moved into a striking position off the bend, ran on well but couldn't match strides with the late finishers final 100 M.
Taken back from a wide barrier and settled in last 7Ls off the pace, niggled along from 500 M but took long while to muster, ran on final 200 M under maximum pressure.
Caught wide in midfield throughout and raced without cover from 800 M, close enough turning in but found nothing off the bridle, eased.
Up with the early pace then restrained to a position in midfield, swung widest into the straight, picked up strongly final 300 M to finish nearest on the line.
Went forward and attacked the lead on the outside, under serious pressure halfway round the home turn and weakened badly over the final 200 M.
Slow to begin, ended up in last few trailing 7Ls to leaders, failed to pick up at all when asked, eased near 200 M.
Travelled near enough to 1-out-1-back. Peeled out turning for home, had every chance.
Settled midfield the fence early before suffering a bad check near the 1400 M. Never recovered.
Settled towards the rear, 1-off with cover. Got a trail after the 500 M, to improve 3-wide. Battled away one paced over the concluding stages.
Worked forward from the widest gate to secure a position outside the leader. Was a spent force after the furlong.
Settled 3-back the fence. Struck some trouble in the straight and thereafter did not close off.
Raced at the back along the paint. Copped a check early in the race but was never really in the hunt.
Raced midfield the fence. Stayed to the inside in the straight and ran on strongly for victory.
Slow to begin and settled at the tail of the field 1-off with cover. Struggled in the run home.

Didn't enjoy the best of runs after receiving interference early, settling behind midfield, 2-deep with cover. Shifted out near the 500 M to improve 3-wide without cover. Looked some hope near the 200 M, but ended its run soon after.
Handed up the lead early and camped behind front runner along the rail. Maintained a sound gallop right to the post.
Ridden along to lead along the paint. Set a true tempo and fought on well to finish in the frame.
Speared across early to take up a midfield position, 2-wide with cover. Progressed at the same speed in the final stretch.
Always prominent. Hit lead 200 M and kept on well to repel challengers.
No Comments on Running information for this horse.
Slow to begin and was driven to race at midfield on fence approaching the Rock. Checked and lost ground at 600 M. 4Ls down on straightening and responded well along the rail to land 3rd.
Never far off the pace but trapped 4-wide without cover until home turn. Shifted 3-wide and sat ahead of midfield at 450 M. No extra gear in the straight.
Sat within 3Ls of the pace in a 2-wide position through to the home straight. Couldn't quite get to the winner but snatched 2nd late.
Pressed forward early and led on fence from the Rock until peaked 300 M.
Trapped wide behind midfield throughout. Failed to pick up in the straight after a tough trip.
Began well. Eased to sit 2-wide behind the leader. Every chance in the straight but couldn't contain the finishing effort of the front trio closing stages.
Towards rear despite being ridden along. Checked severely at 600 M and dropped to last. 7Ls off turning in and ran strongly final 150 M. Nearest at finish.
3-wide at midfield through to the home straight. Found nothing when asked.
Travelled wide and without cover behind the speed until weakened shortly after home straight.
Slowly away and was bumped after start. Raced 3-wide towards rear through to the home straight. Made up good ground wide.
Out evenly, caught 3-wide without cover to 600 M, improved to raced outside leader, applied pressure bend and lead briefly turn, held on ok to make fame.
Slightly slow jump and raced wide throughout, ridden forward to settle behind midfield, kept on steadily without making any serious impression.
Settled in midfield, keeping on same pace when badly bumped 200 M out, remained one paced to the line.
Soon taken back to race in rear, trailed the field to straight, made moderate progress without threatening.
Ordinary jump, behind midfield on rails, 5 to 6 Ls away throughout, took inside runs, kept on well to be nearest on line.
Disputed lead 3-wide early, crossed in front for rails run 800 M out, held narrow advantage to straight, soon dropped out.
From a wide gate drifted back to be 7 to 8 Ls running line, well back to bend, made many lengths widest in straight to take place.
Standard jump, settled midfield on rails, had all favours in run, 3Ls down turn, chased well in run to line.
Prominent 2-wide in joint 3rd before hanging out badly around the bend losing all chances, ignore run.
Out nicely, assumed good spot first behind leader on rails, did a bit on strong speed, just same speed in finish.
Even getaway, ended up in running line 3 to 4 Ls off speed, had good trail to bend, went passed rivals inside 200 M and scored with some in hand.
Raced wide in midfield, carried very wide making home bend losing all chances, ignore run.
Angled into running line, had fair run 6Ls or so from speed, tracked 3-wide on turning, made some late ground without threatening.
Shared speed, took up lead soon after start, controlled affairs throughout, dropped anchor in mid-section, challenged at Rock, lost lead on bend, fought back in straight and held off late rivals.
Away nicely, took a spot on early leaders back, fair run to mid-point before unbalanced and lost ground, didn't handle bend and lost position further, no finish.
Failed to muster, drifted right back, raced 3-wide with cover 7Ls down first half. 2-wide thereafter, didn't respond in straight and just plugged to line.
Fair beginning, behind midfield on rails 5Ls or so away, had soft run to bend, saved ground and gradually progressed before running out of room late.
Didn't show usual purpose early, ended up in midfield 5Ls or so back, fair run to bend, angled wide turning, lacked a finish in straight.
Began in line, posted 3-wide without cover for first half, dropped in down back, urged on bend, just battled away at same speed.
Fast into stride, strode up outside leader, had easy time to Rock before applying pressure to leader, took over at 400 M, held advantage to inside 200 M before run ended.
Restrained to tail, well back 8Ls or so from speed, had plenty to do on bend, struggled in run to line.
Tardy into stride, ended up 4Ls back on fence, had an easy time in mid-section, in traffic turning at steadied 100 M, one-paced thereafter.
Out well enough, assumed ideal spot 1-out-1-back, had good run throughout, ridden along on bend to go with first two, battled bravely in straight getting close late.
Slow into stride, raced near last on rails 7Ls or so off speed, had job to do on turning, made many lengths from well back for a remarkable 3rd.
Took rail and lead, hung on until 200 M weakened.
Very slow away, out paced along the fence, held ground in straight.
Pushed along the hold the rail in midfield, progressed steadily in straight.
Box seat, ran on until 200 M flattened.
Behind midfield, trapped wide, made ground 300 M.
Sat in midfield early but trapped wide, progressed forward 800 M and settled outside the lead, closed the race off strongly and scored.
Pushed to secure prominent spot, ran on well to the line for 3rd.
Behind midfield, made no ground.
Eased at start to cross at rear, momentarily detached in middle stages, raced flat until 200 M made some ground. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield, bumped 600 M, no turn of foot in straight.
Eased at start to take rail at rear, made remarkable ground 300 M to be nearest on line.
In front of midfield along the fence, closing the race off strongly when steaded at 200 M, just beaten by a head in 2nd.
Not far off in 4th or 5th, similar turning in, improved steadily to draw level over 100 M out, found no extra near finish.
Slightly tightened early, settled in midfield on rails to straight, baulked for a run until 200 M, quickened to hit front inside final 100 M, just lasted.
Soon taken back to race towards the rear, ran on determinedly between runners in straight to just fail to get up on line.
Soon taken well back to trail the field to straight, responding well when badly held up inside final 100 M. (Not tested.)
Broke well from the widest barrier, gradually moved up to travel outside leader, held every chance into straight but unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Not far off early travelling in 2L 4th down far side, shuffled back to some 3Ls off the lead around the bend, kept on steadily without quickening in straight. (Questioned.)
Ridden along to gain prominent spot early on, in similar one-back position turning in, kept on same pace without quickening inside final 200 M.
Settled in midfield, came to challenge under pressure after straightening, slightly inconvenienced 100 M out, fought on nicely to the line.
Soon took up running and held rails run, led until headed under pressure inside final 200 M, faded quickly out of contention.
Settled in last few, went wide into straight, made significant progress down outside to narrowly miss first two.
Settled just worse than midfield racing wide throughout, widest turning for home, fought on under pressure before bumped and tightened 100 M out, no late recovery.
With leaders when checked and lost position 1000 M out, travelled 3-wide in forward of midfield to straight, gradually weakened.
Towards the rear and not hurried in early and middle stages, swung widest for home and struggled to pick up in stretch. Never a factor.
Tacked leaders prominently, slightly outpaced making the turn for home, kept battling on in straight but lacked extra pace to mount a serious challenge.
Hampered at the start and ended up racing out the back, not suited by the slackening pace in middle stages, driven inside 350 M but no progress.
Broke well from the inside draw and held a fence position within striking distance from the leader, plugged on final 350 M but offered little threat to the first two.
Towards the rear always, struggled to go with them passing 600 M, soon behind and finished tailed out.
In midfield 5Ls back and kept to the inside throughout, strongly challenged from 350 M, finished the fastest and would have been closer in the finish if wasn't held up final 50 M.
Restrained to a midfield spot one off the fence and had an uneventful trip, stayed on at the same pace on straightening and never reached leaders.
Given a waiting ride as usual and travelled 6 to 7Ls behind leader, kept on same pace turning in and never looked likely.
Never better than midfield, saved ground on the inside but gave very limited response when asked for effort final 350 M. No impression.
Cut out the early running then settled handily one back from leader, responded well under maximum pressure from 350 M and managed to reel in the race leader close home.
Went forward to find the lead, led them uncontested from 1100 M, quickened off to a 2Ls lead passing 600 M, kept on well to the line and was just headed inside 50 M.
Jumped well and soon occupied a 2-wide position ahead of midfield, had his chance but couldn't find the extra to seriously challenge.
Severely checked at the start, ended up racing in 2nd last over 5Ls behind leader, driven inside 400M but no response. No impression.
Chased the pace in 5th and always going smoothly, came with a strong run inside 400M, hit the front 100M form home and drew nicely clear.
Tucked in behind leaders, challenged strongly passing 400M, briefly threatened but was firmly put aside by the winner inside 100 M.
Shifted in abruptly at the start, soon recovered and moved to a forward spot just behind the pace, briefly led inside 400M, inclined to hang in and couldn't sustain effort final 200M.
Towards the rear, driven nearing 400M but no progress. Never factored.
Led along the stands' rail till 400M then weakened badly towards the line. (Lame left front leg.)
Prominently placed in 3rd, inclined to drift out under pressure from 400M, gradually weakened towards the line.
Severely checked at the start and failed to muster when ridden along, raced at the back throughout and could keep on at the same pace only final 400M.
Assumed running in midfield, shifted into clear 500M out, stayed on under maximum pressure but never looked like winning.
Obtained a rail position towards the stands' side, shifted away from the fence and into clear near 300M, ran on well to go 3rd close home. (Jockey questioned re riding position.)
Behind midfield along the stands' rail, ran on final 200M over a trip that may be a shade too short.
Raced alone down the far side in early stages then shifted to a position on the outside of main group, not picking up when asked inside 400M, no extra close home.
Settled behind midfield 4-5Ls back, lacked speed to challenge and was merely plugging on in the run to the line.
Awkwardly away then settled in the rear group 5Ls behind leaders, progressed steadily from 350M and is the only horse from off the pace that could make some late impression.
Shifted in onto the fence near the 700m after traveling wide, and took up leading duties. Was gassed by the 400m.
Made the early running along the fence before handing up and and box seating near the 700m. Had every chance.
Travelled 3 wide without cover with the leading division early. Copped a steady after being crossed by the eventual leader near the 700m, commenced to stop over the last 200m.
Was crowded soon after the start settling with the backmakers, 1 off with cover. Struggled in the run home.
Settled midfield the fence. Raced tight on the first bend and after improving thereafter angled out near the 300m and ran on well.

Vied for the lead early, then after being crossed near the 700m travelled 1 off to the outside of the leader about a lenght back. Positioned tight between runners and over the final furlong gave ground.
Slow to begin then couldnt go the early speed of the race, travelling wide and without cover for most of the journey. Not likely.
Raced a the rear, 3 wide with cover. Worked home soundly to land in the frame.
Settled with the rear division along the fence. Kept mainly to the inside in the straight but was found wanting under pressure.
Began on terms and was hard ridden early, settling behind midfield after receiving a steady near the 1100m, 3 wide with cover. Failed to close off.
Settled 3-4 wide with cover early. Shifted out to race 4 wide without cover near the 600m, quickened nicely to hit the front by the 200m, and went on to win comfortably.
Travelled prominent early before settling 3 back by the first turn. Peeled out early in the straight and closed off nicely.
Pushed early and held the rail and shared the lead passing 1000M. Hit front 300M and kept on but found the front pair too strong closing stages. Barely hung on for 3rd.
Urged early and settled 4Ls behind the speed on fence through to the home straight. Checked at 350M and was held up until 200M. Finished off satisfactorily once into clear.
Behind midfield early and middle stages. No show in the straight.
Always wide towards rear. Never likely.
Pressured early to race with leaders but trapped wide until slotting into a 2-wide position passing 650M. Couldn't keep up in the straight and weakened final furlong.

Pressed early then sat 2-wide 3Ls behind the speed passing 800M. Peeled out and made a strong run from straightening, looked a strong chance final 200M but failed to withstand the finishing effort of the winner closing stages.
Moderate start. Driven forward from high draw and travelled wide and without cover. Beaten early in the straight.
Taken towards rear from high draw and raced greenly early stages. 2-wide 6Ls off at bend. Kept giving and made decent progress in the straight.
Slow to begin and stayed at rear throughout. No impression.
Fair start but soon recovered to race 2-wide behind leaders. No response in the straight. (Bled.)
3-wide at midfield early. Hung out and was 4Ls adrift making home turn. Closed off well down the centre of the track and nearly snatched 3rd.
Shaken early but failed to muster. Trailed 7Ls and came widest turning in. Covered good ground thereafter.
Raced within 3Ls of the pace on fence through to the home straight. Picked up gradually when asked from 400M. Battled well final 150M and prevailed closing stages.
Raced within 2Ls of the pace in a 3-wide position through to the home straight. Ran on fairly before checked at 150M.
Soon on the rails on the leader's back; always in front rank and with every chance; 3Ls back in 2nd into the straight; kept battling; nearly placed.
Taken back from wide gate; 10Ls off initially; still well back turning in; finished off pretty well down the centre of the track; never nearer.
3-wide no cover the back straight but close enough to pace as usual; 3Ls back in 2nd turning in; didn't find much under pressure.
Never any better than midfield; at least 7Ls behind leader through to final bend; retrieved minor late ground.
Worse than midfield throughout; wide no cover the back straight; with cover but hard ridden to try and lie up 700m out; chased to no avail.
Slowest away; about 8Ls off pace on inner at 800m; 7Ls back at last turn and 5Ls adrift at 200m; finished strongly to lead inside final strides.
3-back the rails around midfield but no better than 5Ls off speed before last bend when appearing to travel well; outpaced in conclusion.
4Ls back in 5th down the back; 3-wide no cover on the circle; 4Ls down in 3rd at the 200m; kept plugging away; just missed the quinella.
Always a little behind midfield and at least 6Ls off pace before last turn; never troubled the principals.
Slow to muster early pace; 9Ls off pace down the back; never really in the hunt. (Blood in trachea.)
Away well and soon 2Ls clear on fence; 3Ls up turning for home; looked the winner 200m out but stride shortened and caught late; barely held 2nd.
4Ls back in 4th with cover at 900m; checked about 700m out; 6Ls back in 6th off last bend; very one-paced.
Never better than midfield; 2-wide and 7Ls off in 10th at halfway; closer turning in but could not genuinely threaten.
Eased back from wide gate; 6Ls back in 12th at halfway; 4-wide turning for home; ran on fairly well; never nearer; nearly placed.
In 6th and 3Ls off pace at halfway; 5-wide (widest of all) turning for home; 2Ls down in 3rd and every chance of a place at 200m; run peaked.
Towards rear at least 5Ls from the pace before the last bend when under strong pressure; lacked a turn of foot.
Around midfield before pressing on out 3-wide no cover from the 900m; 1L back in 3rd out deep from 800m to home turn; one-paced to wind up.
3-back on the rails in 4th at 1200m; just 2Ls back but pressured strongly 500m out; weakened rapidly in the straight.
Soon racing comfortable 2Ls back in 2nd; similar off last bend; responded to pressure to lead over 50m out; won going away.
One from rear 8Ls off early pace; 7Ls back off last turn; never likely to land a serious blow.
Did not break well; 5-back on the rails at first; 4Ls off pace at halfway in 9th; finished off at the same pace.
Caught wide no cover initially before pressing forward at 1600m; 1L back in 2nd at halfway; still in front rank off last bend; soon weakened.
4-back on the rails initially; 3Ls off pace at the 800m and same in midfield off last bend; ran on pretty well for a place; nearly got 2nd.
11Ls last at the 1200m; not suited by tempo; 8Ls down on straightening; hung in under pressure down the centre of the track; posed no threat.
Soon clear by 2Ls on fence; set a steady tempo and 2Ls clear off last bend; headed by the winner over 50m out; all out hold 2nd.
3Ls back in 3rd at the 1400m; similar margin behind but shuffled back in midfield before last bend; one-paced.
Bumped start, 5.5Ls off the leader along the fence, favoured by the fast tempo, held up 400M, no progress when clear.
Settled in front of midfield, 3.5Ls off the leader 3-4 wide, favoured by the fast tempo, just held ground in straight.
Eased back, 5.5Ls off the leader, trapped 3-4 wide, suited by the fast pace, progressed steadily 400M, dominated 100M.
Awkward away, at rear, suited by the fast pace, never a factor.
Eased to sit in midfield, 4.5Ls off the leader 2-3 wide, benefited by the fast pace, held up 4-2, made steady ground when clear and grabbed 3rd.
Behind midfield, 5.5Ls off the leader 2-3 wide, favoured by the fast tempo, blocked 4-2, progressed steadily when clear and took 2nd.
Pushed to occupy a midfield spot along the fence, 4.5Ls off the leader, benefited by the fast pace, however no progress.
Eased back, 5.5Ls off the fast pace, trapped 4-5 wide throughout, made early move 800M, soon emptied 350M.
Eased to rear, 7Ls off the leader 3-4 wide, helped by the fast pace, made ground final 250M.
Hard ridden to hold the rail and led by 1.5Ls at fast early sectionals, hung on until 200M flattened.
Hard ridden early but failed to muster, 4.5Ls behind the leader 3-4 wide, suited by the fast tempo, blocked 400M and checked badly, just ran on afterwards.
Hard ridden throughout to maintain the box seat, used up too much fuel during the fast early sections, flattened in straight.
Hard ridden to obtain a prominent spot, 2.5Ls off the leader 2 wide, not suited by the fast pace, lacked turn of foot in straight.
Pushed forward, 1.5Ls off the leader 2 wide, harmed by the fast pace, ran on until 250M flattened.
Began from a wide barrier, soon taken back to race in rear of field, made good progress down centre of track to be nearest at finish.
Led or disputed lead, narrowly headed straightening, hung on until overhauled when no extra inside final 200 M.

Lacked early pace, travelled in last few, commenced move turning in, not much room early in straight, clear passage emerged closing stages, kept on well, jockey warned re the manner in which he rode the horse in the concluding stages.
Broke well, settled just better than midfield to straight, fought on nicely under pressure to just miss.
Settled well behind, remained similar into straight, fought on behind runners early in straight, closed strongly inside final 150 M, did best work late.
Began in line, raced wide in midfield, ran on steadily down straight only to be pipped at post for a minor placing.
Niggled along on rails behind midfield, saved ground turning for home, snuck up on rails in straight finishing off race well to snatch victory final strides.
Began from a wide draw, ridden along to obtain a prominent spot disputing lead, gained slender advantage turning in to only to be swamped final few strides.
Travelled in midfield, came to challenge under pressure after straightening but could only keep on at the same pace without quickening, faded close home.
Dipped jumping out, settled in 3L 3rd on rails, found nil under pressure after straightening, soon weakened out of it.
Began with others, settled in rear of midfield, shuffled backward turning in, ran on stoutly down straight to be nearest at finish.
Began from the widest barrier, settled wide without cover in midfield, similar turning in, ran on steadily down centre of straight without threatening in the blanket finish.
Quickly into stride and cut out the early running till 1300 M, swiftly moved to the front 250 M and looked the most likely winner, kept on well only to be nailed on the line.
Settled 2-wide in midfield 6-7Ls back, made some progress from 400M to 100M but weakened in late stages.
Towards the rear and was well off the pace in middle stages, made good progress down the outside in early stretch but turned flat final 150M.
Not hurried in early stages, settled in 2nd last 9Ls off the strong pace, switched out for clear running passing 400M then took off inside 200M to score just in time.
Caught 3-wide in midfield as they settled, shaken up 450M, plugged on but not reached the leaders.
Handily placed in 3rd 3Ls behind the runaway leader, briefly looked a threat near 200M but ran on empty in late stages.
Switched off the back and not hurried throughout, over 10Ls behind passing 400M, progressed steadily down the outside to finish never nearer.
In midfield early but went forward to take up the lead from 1300M and set a strong tempo to straight, kept on till weakening final 200M. (Jockey questioned.)
Placed behind midfield in a strongly run race, 7Ls down off the bend, made good headway inside 300M to go 3rd near the line.
Positioned in 4th and was difficult to settle in early stages, in touch coming off the bend, kept battling to the line but couldn't step up a gear and never looked likely.
Held up behind midfield and was way off the pace in middle stages, progressed well from the rear inside 300M and not beaten far.
In mid-division and kept to the fence throughout, slightly outpaced making the turn for home, stayed on well final 250M for a close 4th.
Even getaway, settled in midfield or just worse 6Ls away in running line, had chance in run, closed off in straight well to be nearest at finish.
Used from a widest alley, raced outside lead and applied pressure throughout, continued to share lead turning, held on to 200 M before fading.
Out with rest, went forward but caught 3 wide without cover, did it tough 1 to 2Ls away throughout, struggling on bend and weakened right out.
Began with first few, took ideal spot 1 out 1 back, a little keen in run, there to turn, gave in tamely.
No early pace, best part of 10Ls back at rear, no excuses in mid-section, didn't let down at all (didn't handle track and substantial mucopus.)
Slow into stride, taken down to rails, had soft run 6Ls back on fence, angled off approaching bend, into clear at 350 M, accelerated nicely and held on well from some smart rivals.
Taken to rear from widest gate, raced at back 10Ls from lead, still well back to bend, angled out turning, made many lengths in straight for 2nd.
Began in line, 4Ls or so back in midfield, reasonable run in mid-section, in traffic from turning to 200 M, saw daylight when too late.
Showed speed, took up running soon after, led but harmed by outside horse, still there but shaded turning, no pick up final 250 M.
Worked forward to late close order, unable to slot in and 3 wide with cover throughout, 4Ls down on circle, kept in mix to 200 M before weakening.
Standard beginning, ended up in midfield 4Ls or so off lead, had easy time in mid-section, held up badly from turn, steadied again near rear 150 M, finished hard for 3rd when clear, unlucky.
Standard break, posted 3 wide behind midfield 9Ls or so from lead, had cover in mid-section, job to do on turning, response only fair last 300 M.
Well enough to begin, ideally placed 3Ls back on rails, used little to bend, took inside runs in straight and kept on soundly to finish just behind them.
Restrained to settle rear last, best part of 10Ls away sharing rear, back to rails to turning, forced to come out but let down strongly when clear final furlong making remarkable ground.
Drifted back to rear, settled with last few 8 to 9Ls away in running line, had plenty to do and held up leaving bend, little extra when clear.
Reasonable break, settled in good spot 3 to 4Ls away on rails, used little to bend, found nothing in straight and faded.
Drifted down to rear from outside draw, raced in rear division 3 wide 7 to 8Ls back, had cover to bend, just produced a modest close late.
Faded back from a wide gate, raced 3 wide 8 to 9Ls back, had cover but left with plenty to do to bend, made only minor ground in straight.
Position from outset, slotted in to 1 out 1 back spot, had all favours in mid-section, moved into it on turning, let down well and kept going to score a shade cosily.
Prominent from gates, sat close to speed on leaders back, 3Ls down to bend, gave in soon after straightening. (Abnormal breathing.)
Slow into stride, well back on fence 8 to 9Ls away on rails, saved ground on bend, made some late ground from well back without threatening.
Out in line, ended up in midfield in running, enjoyed a good trip to turn, kept closing in straight to be not far from placegetters at finish.
No speed, well back 9 to 10Ls from speed, always rearward and never picked up in straight.
Slotted into a midfield role, 5 to 6Ls off top end, difficult to settle in mid-section, urged along turning, just one paced final furlong.
No early speed, ended up 7 to 8Ls away on rails, soft run to bend, saved ground on turning, made gradual ground to 200 M before run ended.
Trapped wide from an awkward alley, used plenty 4 to 5Ls back without cover, improved to bend, came after leaders at 250 M and did well to get so close given hard run.
Away well, pressed on to sit outside leader, did a bit of work but relaxed on bend, 3Ls down turning, didn't give up and kept chasing right to line.
Plenty of early pace, lead easily, ran along at decent sections, held a 2 to 3 advantage turning, kept kicking when caught at 200 M and just lost place final 50 M.
